authors_text: Jing Yuan,Shaojie Tang
title: Group Fairness in Non-monotone Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 非单调子模最大化中的群体公平性
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in the Journal on Combinatorial Optimization
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in the Journal on Combinatorial Optimization
abstract: Maximizing a submodular function has a wide range of applications in machine learning and data mining. One such application is data summarization whose goal is to select a small set of representative and diverse data items from a large dataset. However, data items might have sensitive attributes such as race or gender, in this setting, it is important to design \emph{fairness-aware} algorithms to mitigate potential algorithmic bias that may cause over- or under- representation of particular groups. Motivated by that, we propose and study the classic non-monotone submodular maximization problem subject to novel group fairness constraints. Our goal is to select a set of items that maximizes a non-monotone submodular function, while ensuring that the number of selected items from each group is proportionate to its size, to the extent specified by the decision maker. We develop the first constant-factor approximation algorithms for this problem. We also extend the basic model to incorporate an additional global size constraint on the total number of selected items.
summary: Maximizing a submodular function has a wide range of applications in machine learning and data mining. One such application is data summarization whose goal is to select a small set of representative and diverse data items from a large dataset. However, data items might have sensitive attributes such as race or gender, in this setting, it is important to design \emph{fairness-aware} algorithms to mitigate potential algorithmic bias that may cause over- or under- representation of particular groups. Motivated by that, we propose and study the classic non-monotone submodular maximization problem subject to novel group fairness constraints. Our goal is to select a set of items that maximizes a non-monotone submodular function, while ensuring that the number of selected items from each group is proportionate to its size, to the extent specified by the decision maker. We develop the first constant-factor approximation algorithms for this problem. We also extend the basic model to incorporate an additional global size constraint on the total number of selected items.
abstract_zh: 最大化子模函数在机器学习和数据挖掘中具有广泛的应用。其中一个应用程序是数据汇总，其目标是从大型数据集中选择一小组具有代表性且多样化的数据项。然而，数据项可能具有种族或性别等敏感属性，在这种情况下，设计\emph{公平意识}算法以减轻可能导致特定群体代表性过度或不足的潜在算法偏差非常重要。受此启发，我们提出并研究了受新颖的群体公平约束的经典非单调子模最大化问题。我们的目标是选择一组最大化非单调子模函数的项目，同时确保每组中所选项目的数量与其大小成比例，并达到决策者指定的程度。我们针对这个问题开发了第一个常数因子近似算法。我们还扩展了基本模型，以纳入对所选项目总数的额外全局大小约束。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在非单调子模函数最大化问题中引入群体公平性约束，旨在选择代表性的数据项同时确保各群体比例公平。
AI.motivation: 数据摘要等应用场景中，数据项可能包含敏感属性（如性别、种族），需设计公平算法避免算法偏见导致的群体过度或欠代表问题。
AI.method: 提出首个满足群体比例约束的常数近似比算法，并扩展模型以包含总选项目数的全局规模约束。
AI.result: 开发了首个针对该问题的常数因子近似算法，同时支持全局规模约束的扩展模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证子模函数最大化的同时实现群体公平性，为公平数据摘要提供了理论框架与算法支持。

authors_text: Abubakar Siddique,Will N. Browne,Gina M. Grimshaw
title: Lateralization in Agents' Decision Making: Evidence of Benefits/Costs from Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 智能体决策的偏侧化：人工智能带来的收益/成本的证据
abstract: Lateralization is ubiquitous in vertebrate brains which, as well as its role in locomotion, is considered an important factor in biological intelligence. Lateralization has been associated with both poor and good performance. It has been hypothesized that lateralization has benefits that may counterbalance its costs. Given that lateralization is ubiquitous, it likely has advantages that can benefit artificial intelligence. In turn, lateralized artificial intelligent systems can be used as tools to advance the understanding of lateralization in biological intelligence. Recently lateralization has been incorporated into artificially intelligent systems to solve complex problems in computer vision and navigation domains. Here we describe and test two novel lateralized artificial intelligent systems that simultaneously represent and address given problems at constituent and holistic levels. The experimental results demonstrate that the lateralized systems outperformed state-of-the-art non-lateralized systems in resolving complex problems. The advantages arise from the abilities, (i) to represent an input signal at both the constituent level and holistic level simultaneously, such that the most appropriate viewpoint controls the system; (ii) to avoid extraneous computations by generating excite and inhibit signals. The computational costs associated with the lateralized AI systems are either less than the conventional AI systems or countered by providing better solutions.
summary: Lateralization is ubiquitous in vertebrate brains which, as well as its role in locomotion, is considered an important factor in biological intelligence. Lateralization has been associated with both poor and good performance. It has been hypothesized that lateralization has benefits that may counterbalance its costs. Given that lateralization is ubiquitous, it likely has advantages that can benefit artificial intelligence. In turn, lateralized artificial intelligent systems can be used as tools to advance the understanding of lateralization in biological intelligence. Recently lateralization has been incorporated into artificially intelligent systems to solve complex problems in computer vision and navigation domains. Here we describe and test two novel lateralized artificial intelligent systems that simultaneously represent and address given problems at constituent and holistic levels. The experimental results demonstrate that the lateralized systems outperformed state-of-the-art non-lateralized systems in resolving complex problems. The advantages arise from the abilities, (i) to represent an input signal at both the constituent level and holistic level simultaneously, such that the most appropriate viewpoint controls the system; (ii) to avoid extraneous computations by generating excite and inhibit signals. The computational costs associated with the lateralized AI systems are either less than the conventional AI systems or countered by providing better solutions.
abstract_zh: 侧化在脊椎动物大脑中普遍存在，其在运动中的作用被认为是生物智力的重要因素。偏侧化与表现不佳和良好有关。据推测，横向化所带来的好处可能会抵消其成本。鉴于侧化无处不在，它可能具有有利于人工智能的优势。反过来，侧化人工智能系统可以用作促进对生物智能侧化的理解的工具。最近，侧化已被纳入人工智能系统中，以解决计算机视觉和导航领域的复杂问题。在这里，我们描述并测试了两种新颖的横向人工智能系统，它们同时在构成和整体层面上表示和解决给定的问题。实验结果表明，侧化系统在解决复杂问题方面优于最先进的非侧化系统。优点来自以下能力：（i）同时在成分层面和整体层面上表示输入信号，以便最合适的观点控制系统； (ii) 通过生成激励和抑制信号来避免无关计算。与横向人工智能系统相关的计算成本要么低于传统人工智能系统，要么通过提供更好的解决方案来抵消。

AI.tldr: 设计并测试两种新型侧化人工智能系统，以解决复杂问题并验证其优势
AI.motivation: 探索侧化在生物智能中的潜在优势，通过AI系统实现复杂问题求解能力提升并促进生物智能研究
AI.method: 开发能同时处理局部与整体信息的侧化AI架构，通过对比实验验证其性能优势
AI.result: 侧化系统在复杂问题解决上优于现有非侧化系统，且计算成本更低或通过更优解抵消
AI.conclusion: 侧化AI系统展现性能与成本双重优势，为生物智能研究和AI架构设计提供新方向

authors_text: Zihu Wang,Yu Wang,Zhuotong Chen,Hanbin Hu,Peng Li
title: Contrastive Learning with Consistent Representations
title_zh: 具有一致表征的对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning demonstrates great promise for representation learning. Data augmentations play a critical role in contrastive learning by providing informative views of the data without necessitating explicit labels. Nonetheless, the efficacy of current methodologies heavily hinges on the quality of employed data augmentation (DA) functions, often chosen manually from a limited set of options. While exploiting diverse data augmentations is appealing, the complexities inherent in both DAs and representation learning can lead to performance deterioration. Addressing this challenge and facilitating the systematic incorporation of diverse data augmentations, this paper proposes Contrastive Learning with Consistent Representations CoCor. At the heart of CoCor is a novel consistency metric termed DA consistency. This metric governs the mapping of augmented input data to the representation space, ensuring that these instances are positioned optimally in a manner consistent with the applied intensity of the DA. Moreover, we propose to learn the optimal mapping locations as a function of DA, all while preserving a desired monotonic property relative to DA intensity. Experimental results demonstrate that CoCor notably enhances the generalizability and transferability of learned representations in comparison to baseline methods.
summary: Contrastive learning demonstrates great promise for representation learning. Data augmentations play a critical role in contrastive learning by providing informative views of the data without necessitating explicit labels. Nonetheless, the efficacy of current methodologies heavily hinges on the quality of employed data augmentation (DA) functions, often chosen manually from a limited set of options. While exploiting diverse data augmentations is appealing, the complexities inherent in both DAs and representation learning can lead to performance deterioration. Addressing this challenge and facilitating the systematic incorporation of diverse data augmentations, this paper proposes Contrastive Learning with Consistent Representations CoCor. At the heart of CoCor is a novel consistency metric termed DA consistency. This metric governs the mapping of augmented input data to the representation space, ensuring that these instances are positioned optimally in a manner consistent with the applied intensity of the DA. Moreover, we propose to learn the optimal mapping locations as a function of DA, all while preserving a desired monotonic property relative to DA intensity. Experimental results demonstrate that CoCor notably enhances the generalizability and transferability of learned representations in comparison to baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 对比学习展示了表征学习的巨大前景。数据增强通过提供信息丰富的数据视图而无需明确的标签，在对比学习中发挥着关键作用。尽管如此，当前方法的有效性在很大程度上取决于所使用的数据增强（DA）功能的质量，这些功能通常是从一组有限的选项中手动选择的。虽然利用不同的数据增强很有吸引力，但 DA 和表示学习固有的复杂性可能会导致性能下降。为了应对这一挑战并促进不同数据增强的系统整合，本文提出了具有一致表示 CoCor 的对比学习。 CoCor 的核心是一种新颖的一致性指标，称为 DA 一致性。该度量控制增强输入数据到表示空间的映射，确保这些实例以与 DA 的应用强度一致的方式进行最佳定位。此外，我们建议学习作为 DA 函数的最佳映射位置，同时保留相对于 DA 强度所需的单调属性。实验结果表明，与基线方法相比，CoCor 显着增强了学习表示的泛化性和可迁移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CoCor的对比学习方法，通过引入数据增强一致性度量来优化表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖人工选择的数据增强策略，难以系统性地利用多样化增强并可能导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出DA一致性度量，通过控制增强数据在表示空间的映射位置，并学习与增强强度单调相关的最优映射位置。
AI.result: 实验表明CoCor在表示的泛化能力和迁移能力上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoCor通过系统化整合多样化数据增强，有效提升了对比学习的表示能力。

conclusion: CoCor通过系统化整合多样化数据增强，有效提升了对比学习的表示能力。
search_text: Contrastive Learning with Consistent Representations 具有一致表征的对比学习 Contrastive learning demonstrates great promise for representation learning. Data augmentations play a critical role in contrastive learning by providing informative views of the data without necessitating explicit labels. Nonetheless, the efficacy of current methodologies heavily hinges on the quality of employed data augmentation (DA) functions, often chosen manually from a limited set of options. While exploiting diverse data augmentations is appealing, the complexities inherent in both DAs and representation learning can lead to performance deterioration. Addressing this challenge and facilitating the systematic incorporation of diverse data augmentations, this paper proposes Contrastive Learning with Consistent Representations CoCor. At the heart of CoCor is a novel consistency metric termed DA consistency. This metric governs the mapping of augmented input data to the representation space, ensuring that these instances are positioned optimally in a manner consistent with the applied intensity of the DA. Moreover, we propose to learn the optimal mapping locations as a function of DA, all while preserving a desired monotonic property relative to DA intensity. Experimental results demonstrate that CoCor notably enhances the generalizability and transferability of learned representations in comparison to baseline methods. 对比学习展示了表征学习的巨大前景。数据增强通过提供信息丰富的数据视图而无需明确的标签，在对比学习中发挥着关键作用。尽管如此，当前方法的有效性在很大程度上取决于所使用的数据增强（DA）功能的质量，这些功能通常是从一组有限的选项中手动选择的。虽然利用不同的数据增强很有吸引力，但 DA 和表示学习固有的复杂性可能会导致性能下降。为了应对这一挑战并促进不同数据增强的系统整合，本文提出了具有一致表示 CoCor 的对比学习。 CoCor 的核心是一种新颖的一致性指标，称为 DA 一致性。该度量控制增强输入数据到表示空间的映射，确保这些实例以与 DA 的应用强度一致的方式进行最佳定位。此外，我们建议学习作为 DA 函数的最佳映射位置，同时保留相对于 DA 强度所需的单调属性。实验结果表明，与基线方法相比，CoCor 显着增强了学习表示的泛化性和可迁移性。 本文提出了一种名为CoCor的对比学习方法，通过引入数据增强一致性度量来优化表示学习。 Zihu Wang,Yu Wang,Zhuotong Chen,Hanbin Hu,Peng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Dongsheng Xu,Qingbao Huang,Xingmao Zhang,Haonan Cheng,Feng Shuang,Yi Cai
title: DEVICE: Depth and Visual Concepts Aware Transformer for OCR-based Image Captioning
title_zh: DEVICE：用于基于 OCR 的图像字幕的深度和视觉概念感知转换器
comment: 13pages, 8figures. This work has been published in Pattern Recognition
comments: 13pages, 8figures. This work has been published in Pattern Recognition
abstract: OCR-based image captioning is an important but under-explored task, aiming to generate descriptions containing visual objects and scene text. Recent studies have made encouraging progress, but they are still suffering from a lack of overall understanding of scenes and generating inaccurate captions. One possible reason is that current studies mainly focus on constructing the plane-level geometric relationship of scene text without depth information. This leads to insufficient scene text relational reasoning so that models may describe scene text inaccurately. The other possible reason is that existing methods fail to generate fine-grained descriptions of some visual objects. In addition, they may ignore essential visual objects, leading to the scene text belonging to these ignored objects not being utilized. To address the above issues, we propose a Depth and Visual Concepts Aware Transformer (DEVICE) for OCR-based image captinong. Concretely, to construct three-dimensional geometric relations, we introduce depth information and propose a depth-enhanced feature updating module to ameliorate OCR token features. To generate more precise and comprehensive captions, we introduce semantic features of detected visual concepts as auxiliary information, and propose a semantic-guided alignment module to improve the model's ability to utilize visual concepts. Our DEVICE is capable of comprehending scenes more comprehensively and boosting the accuracy of described visual entities. Sufficient experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DEVICE, which outperforms state-of-the-art models on the TextCaps test set.
summary: OCR-based image captioning is an important but under-explored task, aiming to generate descriptions containing visual objects and scene text. Recent studies have made encouraging progress, but they are still suffering from a lack of overall understanding of scenes and generating inaccurate captions. One possible reason is that current studies mainly focus on constructing the plane-level geometric relationship of scene text without depth information. This leads to insufficient scene text relational reasoning so that models may describe scene text inaccurately. The other possible reason is that existing methods fail to generate fine-grained descriptions of some visual objects. In addition, they may ignore essential visual objects, leading to the scene text belonging to these ignored objects not being utilized. To address the above issues, we propose a Depth and Visual Concepts Aware Transformer (DEVICE) for OCR-based image captinong. Concretely, to construct three-dimensional geometric relations, we introduce depth information and propose a depth-enhanced feature updating module to ameliorate OCR token features. To generate more precise and comprehensive captions, we introduce semantic features of detected visual concepts as auxiliary information, and propose a semantic-guided alignment module to improve the model's ability to utilize visual concepts. Our DEVICE is capable of comprehending scenes more comprehensively and boosting the accuracy of described visual entities. Sufficient experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DEVICE, which outperforms state-of-the-art models on the TextCaps test set.
abstract_zh: 基于 OCR 的图像字幕是一项重要但尚未充分探索的任务，旨在生成包含视觉对象和场景文本的描述。最近的研究取得了令人鼓舞的进展，但仍然缺乏对场景的整体理解并产生不准确的字幕。一个可能的原因是，目前的研究主要集中在构建场景文本的平面几何关系，而没有深度信息。这导致场景文本关系推理不足，导致模型无法准确描述场景文本。另一个可能的原因是现有方法无法生成某些视觉对象的细粒度描述。此外，它们可能会忽略重要的视觉对象，导致属于这些被忽略对象的场景文本未被利用。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于基于 OCR 的图像捕获的深度和视觉概念感知转换器 (DEVICE)。具体来说，为了构建三维几何关系，我们引入深度信息并提出深度增强特征更新模块来改善 OCR 标记特征。为了生成更精确和更全面的标题，我们引入了检测到的视觉概念的语义特征作为辅助信息，并提出了语义引导的对齐模块来提高模型利用视觉概念的能力。我们的设备能够更全面地理解场景并提高描述视觉实体的准确性。足够的实验证明了我们提出的 DEVICE 的有效性，它在 TextCaps 测试集上优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEVICE模型，通过结合深度信息和视觉概念感知，改进基于OCR的图像字幕生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR图像字幕生成方法缺乏对场景整体理解，主要问题包括忽略深度信息导致文本关系推理不足，以及未能生成细粒度视觉对象描述。
AI.method: 提出深度增强特征更新模块（引入深度信息构建三维几何关系）和语义引导对齐模块（利用检测到的视觉概念语义特征辅助描述生成）。
AI.result: 在TextCaps测试集上优于现有最先进模型，验证了DEVICE在场景理解全面性和视觉实体描述准确性上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DEVICE通过融合深度感知与视觉概念语义，解决了OCR图像字幕生成中的场景理解不足和描述不准确问题。

Recent studies have made encouraging progress, but they are still suffering from a lack of overall understanding of scenes and generating inaccurate captions. One possible reason is that current studies mainly focus on constructing the plane-level geometric relationship of scene text without depth information. This leads to insufficient scene text relational reasoning so that models may describe scene text inaccurately. The other possible reason is that existing methods fail to generate fine-grained descriptions of some visual objects. In addition, they may ignore essential visual objects, leading to the scene text belonging to these ignored objects not being utilized. To address the above issues, we propose a Depth and Visual Concepts Aware Transformer (DEVICE) for OCR-based image captinong. Concretely, to construct three-dimensional geometric relations, we introduce depth information and propose a depth-enhanced feature updating module to ameliorate OCR token features. To generate more precise and comprehensive captions, we introduce semantic features of detected visual concepts as auxiliary information, and propose a semantic-guided alignment module to improve the model's ability to utilize visual concepts. Our DEVICE is capable of comprehending scenes more comprehensively and boosting the accuracy of described visual entities. Sufficient experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DEVICE, which outperforms state-of-the-art models on the TextCaps test set. 基于 OCR 的图像字幕是一项重要但尚未充分探索的任务，旨在生成包含视觉对象和场景文本的描述。最近的研究取得了令人鼓舞的进展，但仍然缺乏对场景的整体理解并产生不准确的字幕。一个可能的原因是，目前的研究主要集中在构建场景文本的平面几何关系，而没有深度信息。这导致场景文本关系推理不足，导致模型无法准确描述场景文本。另一个可能的原因是现有方法无法生成某些视觉对象的细粒度描述。此外，它们可能会忽略重要的视觉对象，导致属于这些被忽略对象的场景文本未被利用。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于基于 OCR 的图像捕获的深度和视觉概念感知转换器 (DEVICE)。具体来说，为了构建三维几何关系，我们引入深度信息并提出深度增强特征更新模块来改善 OCR 标记特征。为了生成更精确和更全面的标题，我们引入了检测到的视觉概念的语义特征作为辅助信息，并提出了语义引导的对齐模块来提高模型利用视觉概念的能力。我们的设备能够更全面地理解场景并提高描述视觉实体的准确性。足够的实验证明了我们提出的 DEVICE 的有效性，它在 TextCaps 测试集上优于最先进的模型。 本文提出DEVICE模型，通过结合深度信息和视觉概念感知，改进基于OCR的图像字幕生成任务。 Dongsheng Xu,Qingbao Huang,Xingmao Zhang,Haonan Cheng,Feng Shuang,Yi Cai cs.CV

authors_text: Shengze Wang,Alexey Supikov,Joshua Ratcliff,Henry Fuchs,Ronald Azuma
title: INV: Towards Streaming Incremental Neural Videos
title_zh: INV：走向流式增量神经视频
abstract: Recent works in spatiotemporal radiance fields can produce photorealistic free-viewpoint videos. However, they are inherently unsuitable for interactive streaming scenarios (e.g. video conferencing, telepresence) because have an inevitable lag even if the training is instantaneous. This is because these approaches consume videos and thus have to buffer chunks of frames (often seconds) before processing. In this work, we take a step towards interactive streaming via a frame-by-frame approach naturally free of lag. Conventional wisdom believes that per-frame NeRFs are impractical due to prohibitive training costs and storage. We break this belief by introducing Incremental Neural Videos (INV), a per-frame NeRF that is efficiently trained and streamable. We designed INV based on two insights: (1) Our main finding is that MLPs naturally partition themselves into Structure and Color Layers, which store structural and color/texture information respectively. (2) We leverage this property to retain and improve upon knowledge from previous frames, thus amortizing training across frames and reducing redundant learning. As a result, with negligible changes to NeRF, INV can achieve good qualities (>28.6db) in 8min/frame. It can also outperform prior SOTA in 19% less training time. Additionally, our Temporal Weight Compression reduces the per-frame size to 0.3MB/frame (6.6% of NeRF). More importantly, INV is free from buffer lag and is naturally fit for streaming. While this work does not achieve real-time training, it shows that incremental approaches like INV present new possibilities in interactive 3D streaming. Moreover, our discovery of natural information partition leads to a better understanding and manipulation of MLPs. Code and dataset will be released soon.

However, they are inherently unsuitable for interactive streaming scenarios (e.g. video conferencing, telepresence) because have an inevitable lag even if the training is instantaneous. This is because these approaches consume videos and thus have to buffer chunks of frames (often seconds) before processing. In this work, we take a step towards interactive streaming via a frame-by-frame approach naturally free of lag. Conventional wisdom believes that per-frame NeRFs are impractical due to prohibitive training costs and storage. We break this belief by introducing Incremental Neural Videos (INV), a per-frame NeRF that is efficiently trained and streamable. We designed INV based on two insights: (1) Our main finding is that MLPs naturally partition themselves into Structure and Color Layers, which store structural and color/texture information respectively. (2) We leverage this property to retain and improve upon knowledge from previous frames, thus amortizing training across frames and reducing redundant learning. As a result, with negligible changes to NeRF, INV can achieve good qualities (>28.6db) in 8min/frame. It can also outperform prior SOTA in 19% less training time. Additionally, our Temporal Weight Compression reduces the per-frame size to 0.3MB/frame (6.6% of NeRF). More importantly, INV is free from buffer lag and is naturally fit for streaming. While this work does not achieve real-time training, it shows that incremental approaches like INV present new possibilities in interactive 3D streaming. Moreover, our discovery of natural information partition leads to a better understanding and manipulation of MLPs. Code and dataset will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 最近在时空辐射场方面的工作可以制作逼真的自由视点视频。然而，它们本质上不适合交互式流媒体场景（例如视频会议、远程呈现），因为即使训练是瞬时的，也存在不可避免的滞后。这是因为这些方法消耗视频，因此必须在处理之前缓冲帧块（通常是几秒）。在这项工作中，我们通过自然无延迟的逐帧方法向交互式流媒体迈出了一步。传统观点认为，由于训练成本和存储成本过高，每帧 NeRF 是不切实际的。我们通过引入增量神经视频 (INV) 打破了这一信念，这是一种经过有效训练且可流式传输的每帧 NeRF。我们基于两个见解设计 INV：（1）我们的主要发现是 MLP 自然地将自身划分为结构层和颜色层，分别存储结构和颜色/纹理信息。 （2）我们利用这一特性来保留和改进先前帧中的知识，从而分摊跨帧的训练并减少冗余学习。因此，在 NeRF 的变化可以忽略不计的情况下，INV 可以在 8 分钟/帧内实现良好的质量 (>28.6db)。与之前的 SOTA 相比，它的训练时间减少了 19%。此外，我们的时间权重压缩将每帧大小减少至 0.3MB/帧（NeRF 的 6.6%）。更重要的是，INV 没有缓冲延迟，自然适合流媒体。虽然这项工作没有实现实时训练，但它表明像 INV 这样的增量方法为交互式 3D 流提供了新的可能性。此外，我们对自然信息划分的发现可以更好地理解和操纵 MLP。代码和数据集即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为INV的逐帧神经视频方法，旨在解决流媒体场景中传统时空辐射场存在的延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时空辐射场方法因需缓冲多帧导致交互式流媒体（如视频会议）存在不可忽视的延迟，而逐帧NeRF因训练成本高被认为不切实际。
AI.method: 通过发现MLP的结构层与颜色层自然分离特性，设计增量神经视频（INV）框架，利用前帧知识进行知识迁移，实现跨帧训练成本分摊。
AI.result: 在保持NeRF质量（>28.6db）的前提下，单帧训练时间缩短至8分钟，训练效率提升19%，单帧存储压缩至0.3MB，消除缓冲延迟。
AI.conclusion: INV为交互式3D流媒体提供新思路，其对MLP信息分区的发现也深化了神经网络结构的理解，虽未达实时训练但展现了增量学习的潜力。

search_text: INV: Towards Streaming Incremental Neural Videos INV：走向流式增量神经视频 Recent works in spatiotemporal radiance fields can produce photorealistic free-viewpoint videos. However, they are inherently unsuitable for interactive streaming scenarios (e.g. video conferencing, telepresence) because have an inevitable lag even if the training is instantaneous. This is because these approaches consume videos and thus have to buffer chunks of frames (often seconds) before processing. In this work, we take a step towards interactive streaming via a frame-by-frame approach naturally free of lag. Conventional wisdom believes that per-frame NeRFs are impractical due to prohibitive training costs and storage. We break this belief by introducing Incremental Neural Videos (INV), a per-frame NeRF that is efficiently trained and streamable. We designed INV based on two insights: (1) Our main finding is that MLPs naturally partition themselves into Structure and Color Layers, which store structural and color/texture information respectively. (2) We leverage this property to retain and improve upon knowledge from previous frames, thus amortizing training across frames and reducing redundant learning. As a result, with negligible changes to NeRF, INV can achieve good qualities (>28.6db) in 8min/frame. It can also outperform prior SOTA in 19% less training time. Additionally, our Temporal Weight Compression reduces the per-frame size to 0.3MB/frame (6.6% of NeRF). More importantly, INV is free from buffer lag and is naturally fit for streaming. While this work does not achieve real-time training, it shows that incremental approaches like INV present new possibilities in interactive 3D streaming. Moreover, our discovery of natural information partition leads to a better understanding and manipulation of MLPs. Code and dataset will be released soon. 最近在时空辐射场方面的工作可以制作逼真的自由视点视频。然而，它们本质上不适合交互式流媒体场景（例如视频会议、远程呈现），因为即使训练是瞬时的，也存在不可避免的滞后。这是因为这些方法消耗视频，因此必须在处理之前缓冲帧块（通常是几秒）。在这项工作中，我们通过自然无延迟的逐帧方法向交互式流媒体迈出了一步。传统观点认为，由于训练成本和存储成本过高，每帧 NeRF 是不切实际的。我们通过引入增量神经视频 (INV) 打破了这一信念，这是一种经过有效训练且可流式传输的每帧 NeRF。我们基于两个见解设计 INV：（1）我们的主要发现是 MLP 自然地将自身划分为结构层和颜色层，分别存储结构和颜色/纹理信息。 （2）我们利用这一特性来保留和改进先前帧中的知识，从而分摊跨帧的训练并减少冗余学习。因此，在 NeRF 的变化可以忽略不计的情况下，INV 可以在 8 分钟/帧内实现良好的质量 (>28.6db)。与之前的 SOTA 相比，它的训练时间减少了 19%。此外，我们的时间权重压缩将每帧大小减少至 0.3MB/帧（NeRF 的 6.6%）。更重要的是，INV 没有缓冲延迟，自然适合流媒体。虽然这项工作没有实现实时训练，但它表明像 INV 这样的增量方法为交互式 3D 流提供了新的可能性。此外，我们对自然信息划分的发现可以更好地理解和操纵 MLP。代码和数据集即将发布。 本文提出一种名为INV的逐帧神经视频方法，旨在解决流媒体场景中传统时空辐射场存在的延迟问题。 Shengze Wang,Alexey Supikov,Joshua Ratcliff,Henry Fuchs,Ronald Azuma cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Jongwoo Ko,Seungjoon Park,Minchan Jeong,Sukjin Hong,Euijai Ahn,Du-Seong Chang,Se-Young Yun
title: Revisiting Intermediate Layer Distillation for Compressing Language Models: An Overfitting Perspective
title_zh: 重新审视压缩语言模型的中间层蒸馏：过拟合的视角
comment: The 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Findings)
comments: The 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (Findings)
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a highly promising method for mitigating the computational problems of pre-trained language models (PLMs). Among various KD approaches, Intermediate Layer Distillation (ILD) has been a de facto standard KD method with its performance efficacy in the NLP field. In this paper, we find that existing ILD methods are prone to overfitting to training datasets, although these methods transfer more information than the original KD. Next, we present the simple observations to mitigate the overfitting of ILD: distilling only the last Transformer layer and conducting ILD on supplementary tasks. Based on our two findings, we propose a simple yet effective consistency-regularized ILD (CR-ILD), which prevents the student model from overfitting the training dataset. Substantial experiments on distilling BERT on the GLUE benchmark and several synthetic datasets demonstrate that our proposed ILD method outperforms other KD techniques. Our code is available at https://github.com/jongwooko/CR-ILD.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a highly promising method for mitigating the computational problems of pre-trained language models (PLMs). Among various KD approaches, Intermediate Layer Distillation (ILD) has been a de facto standard KD method with its performance efficacy in the NLP field. In this paper, we find that existing ILD methods are prone to overfitting to training datasets, although these methods transfer more information than the original KD. Next, we present the simple observations to mitigate the overfitting of ILD: distilling only the last Transformer layer and conducting ILD on supplementary tasks. Based on our two findings, we propose a simple yet effective consistency-regularized ILD (CR-ILD), which prevents the student model from overfitting the training dataset. Substantial experiments on distilling BERT on the GLUE benchmark and several synthetic datasets demonstrate that our proposed ILD method outperforms other KD techniques. Our code is available at https://github.com/jongwooko/CR-ILD.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏 (KD) 是一种非常有前途的方法，用于缓解预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的计算问题。在各种KD方法中，中间层蒸馏（ILD）以其在NLP领域的性能功效成为事实上的标准KD方法。在本文中，我们发现现有的 ILD 方法很容易过度拟合训练数据集，尽管这些方法比原始 KD 传递更多信息。接下来，我们提出了减轻 ILD 过度拟合的简单观察：仅提取最后一个 Transformer 层并在补充任务上进行 ILD。基于我们的两个发现，我们提出了一种简单而有效的一致性正则化 ILD（CR-ILD），它可以防止学生模型过度拟合训练数据集。在 GLUE 基准和几个合成数据集上蒸馏 BERT 的大量实验表明，我们提出的 ILD 方法优于其他 KD 技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jongwooko/CR-ILD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从过拟合的角度重新审视中间层蒸馏（ILD）方法，以提高语言模型压缩的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的中间层蒸馏方法虽然能够传递更多信息，但容易过拟合训练数据，从而影响模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个一致性正则化的中间层蒸馏（CR-ILD）方法，通过仅蒸馏最后一层Transformer和在补充任务上进行ILD，以减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在GLUE基准和多个合成数据集上的实验表明，CR-ILD方法在压缩BERT模型时优于其他知识蒸馏技术。
AI.conclusion: CR-ILD方法通过减少过拟合，提高了语言模型压缩的效果，为知识蒸馏提供了新的视角和方法。

authors_text: Shin-nosuke Ishikawa,Masato Todo,Masato Taki,Yasunobu Uchiyama,Kazunari Matsunaga,Peihsuan Lin,Taiki Ogihara,Masao Yasui
title: Example-Based Explainable AI and its Application for Remote Sensing Image Classification
title_zh: 基于实例的可解释人工智能及其在遥感图像分类中的应用
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, accepted for publication in International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, accepted for publication in International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation
abstract: We present a method of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), "What I Know (WIK)", to provide additional information to verify the reliability of a deep learning model by showing an example of an instance in a training dataset that is similar to the input data to be inferred and demonstrate it in a remote sensing image classification task. One of the expected roles of XAI methods is verifying whether inferences of a trained machine learning model are valid for an application, and it is an important factor that what datasets are used for training the model as well as the model architecture. Our data-centric approach can help determine whether the training dataset is sufficient for each inference by checking the selected example data. If the selected example looks similar to the input data, we can confirm that the model was not trained on a dataset with a feature distribution far from the feature of the input data. With this method, the criteria for selecting an example are not merely data similarity with the input data but also data similarity in the context of the model task. Using a remote sensing image dataset from the Sentinel-2 satellite, the concept was successfully demonstrated with reasonably selected examples. This method can be applied to various machine-learning tasks, including classification and regression.
summary: We present a method of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), "What I Know (WIK)", to provide additional information to verify the reliability of a deep learning model by showing an example of an instance in a training dataset that is similar to the input data to be inferred and demonstrate it in a remote sensing image classification task. One of the expected roles of XAI methods is verifying whether inferences of a trained machine learning model are valid for an application, and it is an important factor that what datasets are used for training the model as well as the model architecture. Our data-centric approach can help determine whether the training dataset is sufficient for each inference by checking the selected example data. If the selected example looks similar to the input data, we can confirm that the model was not trained on a dataset with a feature distribution far from the feature of the input data. With this method, the criteria for selecting an example are not merely data similarity with the input data but also data similarity in the context of the model task. Using a remote sensing image dataset from the Sentinel-2 satellite, the concept was successfully demonstrated with reasonably selected examples. This method can be applied to various machine-learning tasks, including classification and regression.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可解释的人工智能（XAI）方法，即“我所知道的（WIK）”，通过显示训练数据集中与要推断的输入数据相似的实例示例，提供额外信息来验证深度学习模型的可靠性，并在遥感图像分类任务中进行演示。 XAI 方法的预期作用之一是验证经过训练的机器学习模型的推论对于应用程序是否有效，并且使用哪些数据集以及模型架构来训练模型是一个重要因素。我们以数据为中心的方法可以通过检查所选的示例数据来帮助确定训练数据集是否足以用于每个推理。如果所选示例看起来与输入数据相似，我们可以确认该模型不是在特征分布远离输入数据特征的数据集上进行训练的。使用该方法，选择示例的标准不仅是与输入数据的数据相似度，而且是模型任务上下文中的数据相似度。使用 Sentinel-2 卫星的遥感图像数据集，通过合理选择的示例成功演示了这一概念。该方法可应用于各种机器学习任务，包括分类和回归。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于示例的可解释AI方法'What I Know (WIK)'，通过展示训练数据集中与输入数据相似的实例来验证深度学习模型在遥感图像分类任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法难以充分验证模型推断的有效性，而训练数据集的充分性与模型架构同样关键，需通过数据驱动方式确保模型对输入数据的适应性。
AI.method: 通过选择与输入数据在特征空间和任务上下文中均相似的训练实例作为解释依据，结合Sentinel-2卫星遥感数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在遥感图像分类任务中成功演示了该方法，能够合理选择相似实例以确认模型未受训练数据分布偏差的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动的可解释性方法可扩展至分类、回归等多类机器学习任务，为模型推断可靠性评估提供新思路。

authors_text: Ronghao Dang,Lu Chen,Liuyi Wang,Zongtao He,Chengju Liu,Qijun Chen
title: Multiple Thinking Achieving Meta-Ability Decoupling for Object Navigation
title_zh: 多重思维实现对象导航的元能力解耦
abstract: We propose a meta-ability decoupling (MAD) paradigm, which brings together various object navigation methods in an architecture system, allowing them to mutually enhance each other and evolve together. Based on the MAD paradigm, we design a multiple thinking (MT) model that leverages distinct thinking to abstract various meta-abilities. Our method decouples meta-abilities from three aspects: input, encoding, and reward while employing the multiple thinking collaboration (MTC) module to promote mutual cooperation between thinking. MAD introduces a novel qualitative and quantitative interpretability system for object navigation. Through extensive experiments on AI2-Thor and RoboTHOR, we demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on both typical and zero-shot object navigation tasks.
summary: We propose a meta-ability decoupling (MAD) paradigm, which brings together various object navigation methods in an architecture system, allowing them to mutually enhance each other and evolve together. Based on the MAD paradigm, we design a multiple thinking (MT) model that leverages distinct thinking to abstract various meta-abilities. Our method decouples meta-abilities from three aspects: input, encoding, and reward while employing the multiple thinking collaboration (MTC) module to promote mutual cooperation between thinking. MAD introduces a novel qualitative and quantitative interpretability system for object navigation. Through extensive experiments on AI2-Thor and RoboTHOR, we demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on both typical and zero-shot object navigation tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种元能力解耦（MAD）范式，它将各种对象导航方法汇集在一个架构系统中，使它们能够相互增强并共同发展。基于MAD范式，我们设计了一种多重思维（MT）模型，利用不同的思维来抽象各种元能力。我们的方法从输入、编码和奖励三个方面解耦元能力，同时采用多思维协作（MTC）模块来促进思维之间的相互协作。 MAD 引入了一种用于对象导航的新颖的定性和定量可解释系统。通过在 AI2-Thor 和 RoboTHOR 上进行的大量实验，我们证明了我们的方法在典型和零样本目标导航任务上都优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多思考（MT）模型和元能力解耦（MAD）范式，通过解耦输入、编码和奖励三个维度的元能力，并引入多思考协作模块，提升物体导航任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有物体导航方法难以有效整合多种能力，限制了模型的泛化性和适应性，需通过解耦元能力实现更灵活的协作与优化。
AI.method: 设计MAD范式，将元能力解耦为输入、编码和奖励三个部分，并构建多思考协作（MTC）模块促进不同思考路径的互操作，同时引入可解释性系统增强模型透明度。
AI.result: 在AI2-Thor和RoboTHOR数据集上，该方法在典型和零样本物体导航任务中均优于现有最先进方法（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 通过元能力解耦与多思考协作，模型能够更高效地适应复杂导航场景，同时提升任务的可解释性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Pengcheng Xu,Boyu Wang,Charles Ling
title: Class Overwhelms: Mutual Conditional Blended-Target Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 类压倒性：互条件混合目标域适应
abstract: Current methods of blended targets domain adaptation (BTDA) usually infer or consider domain label information but underemphasize hybrid categorical feature structures of targets, which yields limited performance, especially under the label distribution shift. We demonstrate that domain labels are not directly necessary for BTDA if categorical distributions of various domains are sufficiently aligned even facing the imbalance of domains and the label distribution shift of classes. However, we observe that the cluster assumption in BTDA does not comprehensively hold. The hybrid categorical feature space hinders the modeling of categorical distributions and the generation of reliable pseudo labels for categorical alignment. To address these, we propose a categorical domain discriminator guided by uncertainty to explicitly model and directly align categorical distributions $P(Z|Y)$. Simultaneously, we utilize the low-level features to augment the single source features with diverse target styles to rectify the biased classifier $P(Y|Z)$ among diverse targets. Such a mutual conditional alignment of $P(Z|Y)$ and $P(Y|Z)$ forms a mutual reinforced mechanism. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in BTDA even compared with methods utilizing domain labels, especially under the label distribution shift, and in single target DA on DomainNet. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Pengchengpcx/Class-overwhelms-Mutual-Conditional-Blended-Target-Domain-Adaptation.
summary: Current methods of blended targets domain adaptation (BTDA) usually infer or consider domain label information but underemphasize hybrid categorical feature structures of targets, which yields limited performance, especially under the label distribution shift. We demonstrate that domain labels are not directly necessary for BTDA if categorical distributions of various domains are sufficiently aligned even facing the imbalance of domains and the label distribution shift of classes. However, we observe that the cluster assumption in BTDA does not comprehensively hold. The hybrid categorical feature space hinders the modeling of categorical distributions and the generation of reliable pseudo labels for categorical alignment. To address these, we propose a categorical domain discriminator guided by uncertainty to explicitly model and directly align categorical distributions $P(Z|Y)$. Simultaneously, we utilize the low-level features to augment the single source features with diverse target styles to rectify the biased classifier $P(Y|Z)$ among diverse targets. Such a mutual conditional alignment of $P(Z|Y)$ and $P(Y|Z)$ forms a mutual reinforced mechanism. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in BTDA even compared with methods utilizing domain labels, especially under the label distribution shift, and in single target DA on DomainNet. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Pengchengpcx/Class-overwhelms-Mutual-Conditional-Blended-Target-Domain-Adaptation.
abstract_zh: 当前的混合目标域适应（BTDA）方法通常推断或考虑域标签信息，但低估了目标的混合分类特征结构，这产生了有限的性能，特别是在标签分布变化的情况下。我们证明，即使面对域的不平衡和类的标签分布变化，如果各个域的分类分布足够对齐，域标签对于 BTDA 来说并不是直接必需的。然而，我们观察到 BTDA 中的聚类假设并不完全成立。混合分类特征空间阻碍了分类分布的建模以及用于分类对齐的可靠伪标签的生成。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种由不确定性引导的分类域鉴别器，以显式建模并直接对齐分类分布 $P(Z|Y)$。同时，我们利用低级特征来增强具有不同目标样式的单一源特征，以纠正不同目标之间有偏差的分类器$P(Y|Z)$。 $P(Z|Y)$ 和 $P(Y|Z)$ 的这种相互条件排列形成了一种相互强化的机制。即使与利用域标签的方法相比，我们的方法也优于 BTDA 中最先进的方法，特别是在标签分布变化下以及 DomainNet 上的单目标 DA 中。源代码可在 https://github.com/Peng Chengpcx/Class-overwhelms-Mutual-Conditional-Blished-Target-Domain-Adaptation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需领域标签的混合条件目标域自适应方法，通过建模类别分布并增强特征对齐来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有混合目标域自适应方法过度依赖领域标签，忽视了目标域的混合类别特征结构，导致在标签分布偏移时性能受限。
AI.method: 设计基于不确定性的类别域判别器直接对齐P(Z|Y)分布，同时利用低层特征增强源域特征以修正P(Y|Z)分类器，形成双向条件对齐机制。
AI.result: 在DomainNet等数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在标签分布偏移场景下表现更优，且无需领域标签即可实现单目标域自适应。
AI.conclusion: 通过双向条件分布对齐机制，无需领域标签即可有效解决混合目标域自适应中的类别分布偏移问题。

authors_text: Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Qixiang Ye,Mingliang Xu,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji
title: Spectral Aware Softmax for Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于可见光-红外人员重新识别的光谱感知 Softmax
abstract: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) aims to match specific pedestrian images from different modalities. Although suffering an extra modality discrepancy, existing methods still follow the softmax loss training paradigm, which is widely used in single-modality classification tasks. The softmax loss lacks an explicit penalty for the apparent modality gap, which adversely limits the performance upper bound of the VI-ReID task. In this paper, we propose the spectral-aware softmax (SA-Softmax) loss, which can fully explore the embedding space with the modality information and has clear interpretability. Specifically, SA-Softmax loss utilizes an asynchronous optimization strategy based on the modality prototype instead of the synchronous optimization based on the identity prototype in the original softmax loss. To encourage a high overlapping between two modalities, SA-Softmax optimizes each sample by the prototype from another spectrum. Based on the observation and analysis of SA-Softmax, we modify the SA-Softmax with the Feature Mask and Absolute-Similarity Term to alleviate the ambiguous optimization during model training. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on RegDB and SYSU-MM01 demonstrate the superior performance of the SA-Softmax over the state-of-the-art methods in such a cross-modality condition.
summary: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) aims to match specific pedestrian images from different modalities. Although suffering an extra modality discrepancy, existing methods still follow the softmax loss training paradigm, which is widely used in single-modality classification tasks. The softmax loss lacks an explicit penalty for the apparent modality gap, which adversely limits the performance upper bound of the VI-ReID task. In this paper, we propose the spectral-aware softmax (SA-Softmax) loss, which can fully explore the embedding space with the modality information and has clear interpretability. Specifically, SA-Softmax loss utilizes an asynchronous optimization strategy based on the modality prototype instead of the synchronous optimization based on the identity prototype in the original softmax loss. To encourage a high overlapping between two modalities, SA-Softmax optimizes each sample by the prototype from another spectrum. Based on the observation and analysis of SA-Softmax, we modify the SA-Softmax with the Feature Mask and Absolute-Similarity Term to alleviate the ambiguous optimization during model training. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on RegDB and SYSU-MM01 demonstrate the superior performance of the SA-Softmax over the state-of-the-art methods in such a cross-modality condition.
abstract_zh: 可见红外行人重新识别（VI-ReID）旨在匹配来自不同模式的特定行人图像。尽管存在额外的模态差异，现有方法仍然遵循广泛应用于单模态分类任务的softmax损失训练范式。 softmax 损失缺乏对明显模态差距的明确惩罚，这不利地限制了 VI-ReID 任务的性能上限。在本文中，我们提出了谱感知softmax（SA-Softmax）损失，它可以充分探索具有模态信息的嵌入空间，并且具有明确的可解释性。具体来说，SA-Softmax损失采用基于模态原型的异步优化策略，而不是原始softmax损失中基于恒等原型的同步优化。为了鼓励两种模式之间的高度重叠，SA-Softmax 通过来自另一个频谱的原型来优化每个样本。基于对SA-Softmax的观察和分析，我们用特征掩模和绝对相似项修改SA-Softmax，以减轻模型训练过程中的模糊优化。对 RegDB 和 SYSU-MM01 进行的广泛实验评估表明，在这种跨模态条件下，SA-Softmax 的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种光谱感知softmax损失函数（SA-Softmax），用于解决可见光-红外跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）任务中的模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VI-ReID方法沿用单模态分类的softmax损失，但该方法缺乏对模态差异的显式惩罚，导致性能上限受限。
AI.method: 设计基于模态原型的异步优化策略，通过另一光谱的原型优化样本；引入特征掩码和绝对相似度项缓解训练中的模糊优化问题。
AI.result: 在RegDB和SYSU-MM01数据集上，SA-Softmax相比现有方法取得更优的跨模态行人重识别性能。
AI.conclusion: SA-Softmax通过显式建模模态信息，在跨模态嵌入空间学习中取得突破，为VI-ReID任务提供新的优化范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种光谱感知softmax损失函数（SA-Softmax），用于解决可见光-红外跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）任务中的模态差异问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有VI-ReID方法沿用单模态分类的softmax损失，但该方法缺乏对模态差异的显式惩罚，导致性能上限受限。
ai_content.method: 设计基于模态原型的异步优化策略，通过另一光谱的原型优化样本；引入特征掩码和绝对相似度项缓解训练中的模糊优化问题。

search_text: Spectral Aware Softmax for Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification 用于可见光-红外人员重新识别的光谱感知 Softmax Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) aims to match specific pedestrian images from different modalities. Although suffering an extra modality discrepancy, existing methods still follow the softmax loss training paradigm, which is widely used in single-modality classification tasks. The softmax loss lacks an explicit penalty for the apparent modality gap, which adversely limits the performance upper bound of the VI-ReID task. In this paper, we propose the spectral-aware softmax (SA-Softmax) loss, which can fully explore the embedding space with the modality information and has clear interpretability. Specifically, SA-Softmax loss utilizes an asynchronous optimization strategy based on the modality prototype instead of the synchronous optimization based on the identity prototype in the original softmax loss. To encourage a high overlapping between two modalities, SA-Softmax optimizes each sample by the prototype from another spectrum. Based on the observation and analysis of SA-Softmax, we modify the SA-Softmax with the Feature Mask and Absolute-Similarity Term to alleviate the ambiguous optimization during model training. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on RegDB and SYSU-MM01 demonstrate the superior performance of the SA-Softmax over the state-of-the-art methods in such a cross-modality condition. 可见红外行人重新识别（VI-ReID）旨在匹配来自不同模式的特定行人图像。尽管存在额外的模态差异，现有方法仍然遵循广泛应用于单模态分类任务的softmax损失训练范式。 softmax 损失缺乏对明显模态差距的明确惩罚，这不利地限制了 VI-ReID 任务的性能上限。在本文中，我们提出了谱感知softmax（SA-Softmax）损失，它可以充分探索具有模态信息的嵌入空间，并且具有明确的可解释性。具体来说，SA-Softmax损失采用基于模态原型的异步优化策略，而不是原始softmax损失中基于恒等原型的同步优化。为了鼓励两种模式之间的高度重叠，SA-Softmax 通过来自另一个频谱的原型来优化每个样本。基于对SA-Softmax的观察和分析，我们用特征掩模和绝对相似项修改SA-Softmax，以减轻模型训练过程中的模糊优化。对 RegDB 和 SYSU-MM01 进行的广泛实验评估表明，在这种跨模态条件下，SA-Softmax 的性能优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种光谱感知softmax损失函数（SA-Softmax），用于解决可见光-红外跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）任务中的模态差异问题。 Lei Tan,Pingyang Dai,Qixiang Ye,Mingliang Xu,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Chaowei Fang,Dingwen Zhang,Wen Zheng,Xue Li,Le Yang,Lechao Cheng,Junwei Han
title: Revisiting Long-tailed Image Classification: Survey and Benchmarks with New Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: 重新审视长尾图像分类：使用新评估指标的调查和基准
abstract: Recently, long-tailed image classification harvests lots of research attention, since the data distribution is long-tailed in many real-world situations. Piles of algorithms are devised to address the data imbalance problem by biasing the training process towards less frequent classes. However, they usually evaluate the performance on a balanced testing set or multiple independent testing sets having distinct distributions with the training data. Considering the testing data may have arbitrary distributions, existing evaluation strategies are unable to reflect the actual classification performance objectively. We set up novel evaluation benchmarks based on a series of testing sets with evolving distributions. A corpus of metrics are designed for measuring the accuracy, robustness, and bounds of algorithms for learning with long-tailed distribution. Based on our benchmarks, we re-evaluate the performance of existing methods on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets, which is valuable for guiding the selection of data rebalancing techniques. We also revisit existing methods and categorize them into four types including data balancing, feature balancing, loss balancing, and prediction balancing, according the focused procedure during the training pipeline.
summary: Recently, long-tailed image classification harvests lots of research attention, since the data distribution is long-tailed in many real-world situations. Piles of algorithms are devised to address the data imbalance problem by biasing the training process towards less frequent classes. However, they usually evaluate the performance on a balanced testing set or multiple independent testing sets having distinct distributions with the training data. Considering the testing data may have arbitrary distributions, existing evaluation strategies are unable to reflect the actual classification performance objectively. We set up novel evaluation benchmarks based on a series of testing sets with evolving distributions. A corpus of metrics are designed for measuring the accuracy, robustness, and bounds of algorithms for learning with long-tailed distribution. Based on our benchmarks, we re-evaluate the performance of existing methods on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets, which is valuable for guiding the selection of data rebalancing techniques. We also revisit existing methods and categorize them into four types including data balancing, feature balancing, loss balancing, and prediction balancing, according the focused procedure during the training pipeline.
abstract_zh: 最近，长尾图像分类引起了很多研究关注，因为在许多现实世界中数据分布都是长尾的。设计了大量算法来通过将训练过程偏向不太频繁的类别来解决数据不平衡问题。然而，他们通常评估平衡测试集或与训练数据具有不同分布的多个独立测试集的性能。考虑到测试数据可能具有任意分布，现有的评估策略无法客观地反映实际的分类性能。我们根据一系列具有不断变化的分布的测试集建立了新颖的评估基准。度量语料库旨在测量长尾分布学习算法的准确性、鲁棒性和界限。基于我们的基准，我们重新评估了现有方法在 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集上的性能，这对于指导数据重新平衡技术的选择很有价值。我们还重新审视了现有的方法，并根据训练过程中的重点过程将它们分为四种类型，包括数据平衡、特征平衡、损失平衡和预测平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视长尾图像分类问题，提出新的评估基准和指标，并对现有方法进行分类。
AI.motivation: 现有方法评估时使用平衡或分布不同的测试集，无法客观反映实际分类性能，需新的评估策略。
AI.method: 构建分布演变的测试集，设计多维度评估指标（准确性、鲁棒性、界限），并重新评估现有方法在CIFAR10和CIFAR100上的表现。
AI.result: 发现部分方法在特定分布下表现更优，且将现有方法分为数据平衡、特征平衡、损失平衡和预测平衡四类。
AI.conclusion: 新基准有助于指导数据再平衡技术选择，未来需关注分布变化下的算法鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hamed Rahimi,Hubert Naacke,Camelia Constantin,Bernd Amann
title: ANTM: An Aligned Neural Topic Model for Exploring Evolving Topics
title_zh: ANTM：用于探索不断发展的主题的对齐神经主题模型
abstract: This paper presents an algorithmic family of dynamic topic models called Aligned Neural Topic Models (ANTM), which combine novel data mining algorithms to provide a modular framework for discovering evolving topics. ANTM maintains the temporal continuity of evolving topics by extracting time-aware features from documents using advanced pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) and employing an overlapping sliding window algorithm for sequential document clustering. This overlapping sliding window algorithm identifies a different number of topics within each time frame and aligns semantically similar document clusters across time periods. This process captures emerging and fading trends across different periods and allows for a more interpretable representation of evolving topics. Experiments on four distinct datasets show that ANTM outperforms probabilistic dynamic topic models in terms of topic coherence and diversity metrics. Moreover, it improves the scalability and flexibility of dynamic topic models by being accessible and adaptable to different types of algorithms. Additionally, a Python package is developed for researchers and scientists who wish to study the trends and evolving patterns of topics in large-scale textual data.
summary: This paper presents an algorithmic family of dynamic topic models called Aligned Neural Topic Models (ANTM), which combine novel data mining algorithms to provide a modular framework for discovering evolving topics. ANTM maintains the temporal continuity of evolving topics by extracting time-aware features from documents using advanced pre-trained Large Language Models (LLMs) and employing an overlapping sliding window algorithm for sequential document clustering. This overlapping sliding window algorithm identifies a different number of topics within each time frame and aligns semantically similar document clusters across time periods. This process captures emerging and fading trends across different periods and allows for a more interpretable representation of evolving topics. Experiments on four distinct datasets show that ANTM outperforms probabilistic dynamic topic models in terms of topic coherence and diversity metrics. Moreover, it improves the scalability and flexibility of dynamic topic models by being accessible and adaptable to different types of algorithms. Additionally, a Python package is developed for researchers and scientists who wish to study the trends and evolving patterns of topics in large-scale textual data.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了称为对齐神经主题模型（ANTM）的动态主题模型算法系列，它结合了新颖的数据挖掘算法，为发现不断发展的主题提供了一个模块化框架。 ANTM 通过使用先进的预训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 从文档中提取时间感知特征并采用重叠滑动窗口算法进行顺序文档聚类，从而保持不断发展的主题的时间连续性。这种重叠滑动窗口算法识别每个时间范围内不同数量的主题，并跨时间段对齐语义相似的文档集群。这个过程捕捉了不同时期新兴和衰落的趋势，并允许对不断发展的主题进行更可解释的表示。对四个不同数据集的实验表明，ANTM 在主题连贯性和多样性指标方面优于概率动态主题模型。此外，它通过可访问和适应不同类型的算法，提高了动态主题模型的可扩展性和灵活性。此外，还为希望研究大规模文本数据中主题的趋势和演变模式的研究人员和科学家开发了一个 Python 包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ANTM的对齐神经主题模型，用于探索演变主题，结合预训练大语言模型和重叠滑动窗口算法实现时间连续性主题发现。
AI.motivation: 传统动态主题模型难以有效捕捉主题随时间的演变趋势，且缺乏对语义连续性和主题数量动态变化的处理能力。
AI.method: 利用预训练大语言模型提取文档时间感知特征，通过重叠滑动窗口算法进行序列文档聚类，并跨时间段对齐语义相似集群以捕捉新兴与消退趋势。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上优于概率动态主题模型，在主题一致性与多样性指标表现更优，且模型具备更高的可扩展性与算法适应性。
AI.conclusion: ANTM通过模块化框架有效捕捉演变主题，提供更直观的解释性，配套Python工具包便于大规模文本数据的趋势研究。

Moreover, it improves the scalability and flexibility of dynamic topic models by being accessible and adaptable to different types of algorithms. Additionally, a Python package is developed for researchers and scientists who wish to study the trends and evolving patterns of topics in large-scale textual data. 本文提出了称为对齐神经主题模型（ANTM）的动态主题模型算法系列，它结合了新颖的数据挖掘算法，为发现不断发展的主题提供了一个模块化框架。 ANTM 通过使用先进的预训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 从文档中提取时间感知特征并采用重叠滑动窗口算法进行顺序文档聚类，从而保持不断发展的主题的时间连续性。这种重叠滑动窗口算法识别每个时间范围内不同数量的主题，并跨时间段对齐语义相似的文档集群。这个过程捕捉了不同时期新兴和衰落的趋势，并允许对不断发展的主题进行更可解释的表示。对四个不同数据集的实验表明，ANTM 在主题连贯性和多样性指标方面优于概率动态主题模型。此外，它通过可访问和适应不同类型的算法，提高了动态主题模型的可扩展性和灵活性。此外，还为希望研究大规模文本数据中主题的趋势和演变模式的研究人员和科学家开发了一个 Python 包。 本文提出一种名为ANTM的对齐神经主题模型，用于探索演变主题，结合预训练大语言模型和重叠滑动窗口算法实现时间连续性主题发现。 Hamed Rahimi,Hubert Naacke,Camelia Constantin,Bernd Amann cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE,cs.SI

authors_text: Kazuma Suetake,Takuya Ushimaru,Ryuji Saiin,Yoshihide Sawada
title: Spiking Synaptic Penalty: Appropriate Penalty Term for Energy-Efficient Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 尖峰突触惩罚：节能尖峰神经网络的适当惩罚术语
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are energy-efficient neural networks because of their spiking nature. However, as the spike firing rate of SNNs increases, the energy consumption does as well, and thus, the advantage of SNNs diminishes. Here, we tackle this problem by introducing a novel penalty term for the spiking activity into the objective function in the training phase. Our method is designed so as to optimize the energy consumption metric directly without modifying the network architecture. Therefore, the proposed method can reduce the energy consumption more than other methods while maintaining the accuracy. We conducted experiments for image classification tasks, and the results indicate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which mitigates the dilemma of the energy--accuracy trade-off.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are energy-efficient neural networks because of their spiking nature. However, as the spike firing rate of SNNs increases, the energy consumption does as well, and thus, the advantage of SNNs diminishes. Here, we tackle this problem by introducing a novel penalty term for the spiking activity into the objective function in the training phase. Our method is designed so as to optimize the energy consumption metric directly without modifying the network architecture. Therefore, the proposed method can reduce the energy consumption more than other methods while maintaining the accuracy. We conducted experiments for image classification tasks, and the results indicate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which mitigates the dilemma of the energy--accuracy trade-off.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 因其尖峰特性而成为节能神经网络。然而，随着 SNN 的尖峰放电率增加，能量消耗也会增加，因此 SNN 的优势就会减弱。在这里，我们通过在训练阶段的目标函数中引入一个新的尖峰活动惩罚项来解决这个问题。我们的方法旨在直接优化能耗指标，而无需修改网络架构。因此，所提出的方法可以在保持精度的同时比其他方法更多地降低能耗。我们针对图像分类任务进行了实验，结果表明了所提出方法的有效性，缓解了能量与精度权衡的困境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的惩罚项，用于优化脉冲神经网络（SNNs）的能耗，同时保持模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统SNNs在脉冲发放率增加时能耗上升，导致能效优势减弱，需在不改变网络结构的前提下优化能耗。
AI.method: 在训练阶段的目标函数中引入针对脉冲活动的新型惩罚项，直接优化能耗指标。
AI.result: 图像分类实验表明，该方法在降低能耗的同时保持了模型准确率，缓解了能效与准确率的权衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过引入惩罚项有效优化SNNs能耗，验证了其在保持准确率下的有效性。

authors_text: Bo Li,Dongseong Hwang,Zhouyuan Huo,Junwen Bai,Guru Prakash,Tara N. Sainath,Khe Chai Sim,Yu Zhang,Wei Han,Trevor Strohman,Francoise Beaufays
title: Efficient Domain Adaptation for Speech Foundation Models
title_zh: 语音基础模型的高效域适应
abstract: Foundation models (FMs), that are trained on broad data at scale and are adaptable to a wide range of downstream tasks, have brought large interest in the research community. Benefiting from the diverse data sources such as different modalities, languages and application domains, foundation models have demonstrated strong generalization and knowledge transfer capabilities. In this paper, we present a pioneering study towards building an efficient solution for FM-based speech recognition systems. We adopt the recently developed self-supervised BEST-RQ for pretraining, and propose the joint finetuning with both source and unsupervised target domain data using JUST Hydra. The FM encoder adapter and decoder are then finetuned to the target domain with a small amount of supervised in-domain data. On a large-scale YouTube and Voice Search task, our method is shown to be both data and model parameter efficient. It achieves the same quality with only 21.6M supervised in-domain data and 130.8M finetuned parameters, compared to the 731.1M model trained from scratch on additional 300M supervised in-domain data.
summary: Foundation models (FMs), that are trained on broad data at scale and are adaptable to a wide range of downstream tasks, have brought large interest in the research community. Benefiting from the diverse data sources such as different modalities, languages and application domains, foundation models have demonstrated strong generalization and knowledge transfer capabilities. In this paper, we present a pioneering study towards building an efficient solution for FM-based speech recognition systems. We adopt the recently developed self-supervised BEST-RQ for pretraining, and propose the joint finetuning with both source and unsupervised target domain data using JUST Hydra. The FM encoder adapter and decoder are then finetuned to the target domain with a small amount of supervised in-domain data. On a large-scale YouTube and Voice Search task, our method is shown to be both data and model parameter efficient. It achieves the same quality with only 21.6M supervised in-domain data and 130.8M finetuned parameters, compared to the 731.1M model trained from scratch on additional 300M supervised in-domain data.
abstract_zh: 基础模型（FM）经过大规模广泛数据的训练，并且适用于广泛的下游任务，引起了研究界的极大兴趣。受益于不同模式、语言和应用领域等多样化的数据源，基础模型表现出了强大的泛化和知识迁移能力。在本文中，我们提出了一项开创性研究，旨在为基于 FM 的语音识别系统构建有效的解决方案。我们采用最近开发的自监督 BEST-RQ 进行预训练，并提出使用 JUST Hydra 对源域数据和无监督目标域数据进行联合微调。然后，使用少量受监督的域内数据将 FM 编码器适配器和解码器微调到目标域。在大规模 YouTube 和语音搜索任务中，我们的方法显示出数据和模型参数的效率。与在额外的 300M 监督域内数据上从头开始训练的 731.1M 模型相比，它仅用 21.6M 监督域内数据和 130.8M 微调参数就达到了相同的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的基于语音基础模型的领域适应方法，通过结合自监督预训练和少量监督数据进行微调，实现跨领域语音识别任务的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统语音基础模型训练需要大量标注数据且计算成本高，而领域适应方法能有效利用目标领域无监督数据，降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用自监督预训练模型BEST-RQ进行初始化，通过JUST Hydra框架联合微调源领域和目标领域数据，并利用少量监督数据对编码器适配器和解码器进行微调。
AI.result: 在YouTube和Voice Search任务中，仅使用21.6M监督数据和130.8M微调参数即可达到与从头训练731.1M参数模型相当的性能，显著提升数据与模型效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效的领域适应策略，在减少数据和参数消耗的同时保持模型性能，为语音基础模型的实用化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Anjali Balagopal,Michael Dohopolski,Young Suk Kwon,Steven Montalvo,Howard Morgan,Ti Bai,Dan Nguyen,Xiao Liang,Xinran Zhong,Mu-Han Lin,Neil Desai,Steve Jiang
title: Deep Learning (DL)-based Automatic Segmentation of the Internal Pudendal Artery (IPA) for Reduction of Erectile Dysfunction in Definitive Radiotherapy of Localized Prostate Cancer
title_zh: 基于深度学习 (DL) 的阴部内动脉 (IPA) 自动分割可减少局限性前列腺癌根治性放射治疗中的勃起功能障碍
abstract: Background and purpose: Radiation-induced erectile dysfunction (RiED) is commonly seen in prostate cancer patients. Clinical trials have been developed in multiple institutions to investigate whether dose-sparing to the internal-pudendal-arteries (IPA) will improve retention of sexual potency. The IPA is usually not considered a conventional organ-at-risk (OAR) due to segmentation difficulty. In this work, we propose a deep learning (DL)-based auto-segmentation model for the IPA that utilizes CT and MRI or CT alone as the input image modality to accommodate variation in clinical practice. Materials and methods: 86 patients with CT and MRI images and noisy IPA labels were recruited in this study. We split the data into 42/14/30 for model training, testing, and a clinical observer study, respectively. There were three major innovations in this model: 1) we designed an architecture with squeeze-and-excite blocks and modality attention for effective feature extraction and production of accurate segmentation, 2) a novel loss function was used for training the model effectively with noisy labels, and 3) modality dropout strategy was used for making the model capable of segmentation in the absence of MRI. Results: The DSC, ASD, and HD95 values for the test dataset were 62.2%, 2.54mm, and 7mm, respectively. AI segmented contours were dosimetrically equivalent to the expert physician's contours. The observer study showed that expert physicians' scored AI contours (mean=3.7) higher than inexperienced physicians' contours (mean=3.1). When inexperienced physicians started with AI contours, the score improved to 3.7. Conclusion: The proposed model achieved good quality IPA contours to improve uniformity of segmentation and to facilitate introduction of standardized IPA segmentation into clinical trials and practice.
summary: Background and purpose: Radiation-induced erectile dysfunction (RiED) is commonly seen in prostate cancer patients. Clinical trials have been developed in multiple institutions to investigate whether dose-sparing to the internal-pudendal-arteries (IPA) will improve retention of sexual potency. The IPA is usually not considered a conventional organ-at-risk (OAR) due to segmentation difficulty. In this work, we propose a deep learning (DL)-based auto-segmentation model for the IPA that utilizes CT and MRI or CT alone as the input image modality to accommodate variation in clinical practice. Materials and methods: 86 patients with CT and MRI images and noisy IPA labels were recruited in this study. We split the data into 42/14/30 for model training, testing, and a clinical observer study, respectively. There were three major innovations in this model: 1) we designed an architecture with squeeze-and-excite blocks and modality attention for effective feature extraction and production of accurate segmentation, 2) a novel loss function was used for training the model effectively with noisy labels, and 3) modality dropout strategy was used for making the model capable of segmentation in the absence of MRI. Results: The DSC, ASD, and HD95 values for the test dataset were 62.2%, 2.54mm, and 7mm, respectively. AI segmented contours were dosimetrically equivalent to the expert physician's contours. The observer study showed that expert physicians' scored AI contours (mean=3.7) higher than inexperienced physicians' contours (mean=3.1). When inexperienced physicians started with AI contours, the score improved to 3.7. Conclusion: The proposed model achieved good quality IPA contours to improve uniformity of segmentation and to facilitate introduction of standardized IPA segmentation into clinical trials and practice.
abstract_zh: 背景与目的：放射诱发的勃起功能障碍（RiED）常见于前列腺癌患者。多个机构已开展临床试验，以调查阴部内动脉 (IPA) 的剂量节约是否会改善性能力的保留。由于分割困难，IPA 通常不被视为传统的危及器官 (OAR)。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习 (DL) 的 IPA 自动分割模型，该模型利用 CT 和 MRI 或单独使用 CT 作为输入图像模态，以适应临床实践中的变化。材料和方法：本研究招募了 86 名具有 CT 和 MRI 图像以及噪声 IPA 标签的患者。我们将数据分为 42/14/30 份，分别用于模型训练、测试和临床观察研究。该模型有三项主要创新：1）我们设计了一种具有挤压和激励块和模态注意的架构，用于有效的特征提取和精确分割的产生，2）一种新颖的损失函数用于使用噪声标签有效地训练模型，3）模态丢失策略用于使模型能够在没有 MRI 的情况下进行分割。结果：测试数据集的 DSC、ASD 和 HD95 值分别为 62.2%、2.54mm 和 7mm。 AI 分段轮廓在剂量学上与专家医师的轮廓相当。观察者研究表明，专家医生的 AI 轮廓评分（平均值 = 3.7）高于缺乏经验的医生的轮廓评分（平均值 = 3.1）。当经验不足的医生开始使用 AI 轮廓时，分数提高到 3.7。结论：所提出的模型实现了高质量的 IPA 轮廓，提高了分割的均匀性，并有助于将标准化 IPA 分割引入临床试验和实践。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动分割模型，用于前列腺癌放疗中内部阴部动脉（IPA）的分割，以减少放射性勃起功能障碍。
AI.motivation: 放射治疗导致的勃起功能障碍（RiED）在前列腺癌患者中常见，而IPA因分割难度大通常未被列为常规危及器官。通过剂量保护IPA可能有助于保留性功能，但需解决分割难题。
AI.method: 采用包含squeeze-and-excite模块和模态注意力的深度学习架构，设计新颖的损失函数处理噪声标签，并引入模态丢弃策略以适应仅使用CT的情况。
AI.result: 测试数据集的DSC为62.2%，ASD为2.54mm，HD95为7mm。AI分割结果与专家医生相当，且辅助初级医生后评分从3.1提升至3.7。
AI.conclusion: 该模型实现了高质量IPA分割，可提升分割一致性，推动标准化IPA分割在临床试验和实践中的应用。

search_text: Deep Learning (DL)-based Automatic Segmentation of the Internal Pudendal Artery (IPA) for Reduction of Erectile Dysfunction in Definitive Radiotherapy of Localized Prostate Cancer 基于深度学习 (DL) 的阴部内动脉 (IPA) 自动分割可减少局限性前列腺癌根治性放射治疗中的勃起功能障碍 Background and purpose: Radiation-induced erectile dysfunction (RiED) is commonly seen in prostate cancer patients. Clinical trials have been developed in multiple institutions to investigate whether dose-sparing to the internal-pudendal-arteries (IPA) will improve retention of sexual potency. The IPA is usually not considered a conventional organ-at-risk (OAR) due to segmentation difficulty. In this work, we propose a deep learning (DL)-based auto-segmentation model for the IPA that utilizes CT and MRI or CT alone as the input image modality to accommodate variation in clinical practice. Materials and methods: 86 patients with CT and MRI images and noisy IPA labels were recruited in this study. We split the data into 42/14/30 for model training, testing, and a clinical observer study, respectively. There were three major innovations in this model: 1) we designed an architecture with squeeze-and-excite blocks and modality attention for effective feature extraction and production of accurate segmentation, 2) a novel loss function was used for training the model effectively with noisy labels, and 3) modality dropout strategy was used for making the model capable of segmentation in the absence of MRI. Results: The DSC, ASD, and HD95 values for the test dataset were 62.2%, 2.54mm, and 7mm, respectively. AI segmented contours were dosimetrically equivalent to the expert physician's contours. The observer study showed that expert physicians' scored AI contours (mean=3.7) higher than inexperienced physicians' contours (mean=3.1). When inexperienced physicians started with AI contours, the score improved to 3.7. Conclusion: The proposed model achieved good quality IPA contours to improve uniformity of segmentation and to facilitate introduction of standardized IPA segmentation into clinical trials and practice. 背景与目的：放射诱发的勃起功能障碍（RiED）常见于前列腺癌患者。多个机构已开展临床试验，以调查阴部内动脉 (IPA) 的剂量节约是否会改善性能力的保留。由于分割困难，IPA 通常不被视为传统的危及器官 (OAR)。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习 (DL) 的 IPA 自动分割模型，该模型利用 CT 和 MRI 或单独使用 CT 作为输入图像模态，以适应临床实践中的变化。材料和方法：本研究招募了 86 名具有 CT 和 MRI 图像以及噪声 IPA 标签的患者。我们将数据分为 42/14/30 份，分别用于模型训练、测试和临床观察研究。该模型有三项主要创新：1）我们设计了一种具有挤压和激励块和模态注意的架构，用于有效的特征提取和精确分割的产生，2）一种新颖的损失函数用于使用噪声标签有效地训练模型，3）模态丢失策略用于使模型能够在没有 MRI 的情况下进行分割。结果：测试数据集的 DSC、ASD 和 HD95 值分别为 62.2%、2.54mm 和 7mm。 AI 分段轮廓在剂量学上与专家医师的轮廓相当。观察者研究表明，专家医生的 AI 轮廓评分（平均值 = 3.7）高于缺乏经验的医生的轮廓评分（平均值 = 3.1）。当经验不足的医生开始使用 AI 轮廓时，分数提高到 3.7。结论：所提出的模型实现了高质量的 IPA 轮廓，提高了分割的均匀性，并有助于将标准化 IPA 分割引入临床试验和实践。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动分割模型，用于前列腺癌放疗中内部阴部动脉（IPA）的分割，以减少放射性勃起功能障碍。 Anjali Balagopal,Michael Dohopolski,Young Suk Kwon,Steven Montalvo,Howard Morgan,Ti Bai,Dan Nguyen,Xiao Liang,Xinran Zhong,Mu-Han Lin,Neil Desai,Steve Jiang eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Palash Chatterjee,Ashutosh Chapagain,Weizhe Chen,Roni Khardon
title: DiSProD: Differentiable Symbolic Propagation of Distributions for Planning
title_zh: DiSProD：用于规划的分布的可微符号传播
comment: International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2023. For project website, see https://pecey.github.io/DiSProD/
comments: International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) 2023. For project website, see https://pecey.github.io/DiSProD/
abstract: The paper introduces DiSProD, an online planner developed for environments with probabilistic transitions in continuous state and action spaces. DiSProD builds a symbolic graph that captures the distribution of future trajectories, conditioned on a given policy, using independence assumptions and approximate propagation of distributions. The symbolic graph provides a differentiable representation of the policy's value, enabling efficient gradient-based optimization for long-horizon search. The propagation of approximate distributions can be seen as an aggregation of many trajectories, making it well-suited for dealing with sparse rewards and stochastic environments. An extensive experimental evaluation compares DiSProD to state-of-the-art planners in discrete-time planning and real-time control of robotic systems. The proposed method improves over existing planners in handling stochastic environments, sensitivity to search depth, sparsity of rewards, and large action spaces. Additional real-world experiments demonstrate that DiSProD can control ground vehicles and surface vessels to successfully navigate around obstacles.
summary: The paper introduces DiSProD, an online planner developed for environments with probabilistic transitions in continuous state and action spaces. DiSProD builds a symbolic graph that captures the distribution of future trajectories, conditioned on a given policy, using independence assumptions and approximate propagation of distributions. The symbolic graph provides a differentiable representation of the policy's value, enabling efficient gradient-based optimization for long-horizon search. The propagation of approximate distributions can be seen as an aggregation of many trajectories, making it well-suited for dealing with sparse rewards and stochastic environments. An extensive experimental evaluation compares DiSProD to state-of-the-art planners in discrete-time planning and real-time control of robotic systems. The proposed method improves over existing planners in handling stochastic environments, sensitivity to search depth, sparsity of rewards, and large action spaces. Additional real-world experiments demonstrate that DiSProD can control ground vehicles and surface vessels to successfully navigate around obstacles.
abstract_zh: 该论文介绍了 DiSProD，这是一种为连续状态和动作空间中具有概率转换的环境而开发的在线规划器。 DiSProD 使用独立性假设和分布的近似传播，构建一个符号图，以给定策略为条件，捕获未来轨迹的分布。符号图提供了策略值的可微表示，从而实现了长范围搜索的高效基于梯度的优化。近似分布的传播可以看作是许多轨迹的聚合，使其非常适合处理稀疏奖励和随机环境。一项广泛的实验评估将 DiSProD 与机器人系统的离散时间规划和实时控制方面最先进的规划器进行了比较。所提出的方法在处理随机环境、对搜索深度的敏感性、奖励的稀疏性和大的行动空间方面改进了现有的规划器。其他真实世界的实验表明，DiSProD 可以控制地面车辆和水面舰艇成功绕过障碍物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiSProD方法，通过可微分符号传播分布来解决连续状态和动作空间中具有概率转移的规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有规划器难以高效处理连续空间中的概率转移、稀疏奖励及大动作空间问题，需结合符号推理与梯度优化提升性能。
AI.method: 构建符号图捕捉未来轨迹分布，利用独立性假设进行近似分布传播，通过可微分表示实现梯度优化，适用于长时域搜索与稀疏奖励场景。
AI.result: 实验表明DiSProD在随机环境处理、奖励稀疏性适应及大动作空间表现优于现有方法，并成功应用于地面车辆与水面船舶避障控制。
AI.conclusion: DiSProD通过符号图与可微分优化有效解决了复杂连续空间规划问题，验证了其在实际机器人控制中的可行性与优势。

The propagation of approximate distributions can be seen as an aggregation of many trajectories, making it well-suited for dealing with sparse rewards and stochastic environments. The proposed method improves over existing planners in handling stochastic environments, sensitivity to search depth, sparsity of rewards, and large action spaces. authors_text: Atsuyoshi Kita,Nobuhiro Suenari,Masashi Okada,Tadahiro Taniguchi
title: Online Re-Planning and Adaptive Parameter Update for Multi-Agent Path Finding with Stochastic Travel Times
title_zh: 具有随机旅行时间的多智能体路径查找的在线重新规划和自适应参数更新
abstract: This study explores the problem of Multi-Agent Path Finding with continuous and stochastic travel times whose probability distribution is unknown. Our purpose is to manage a group of automated robots that provide package delivery services in a building where pedestrians and a wide variety of robots coexist, such as delivery services in office buildings, hospitals, and apartments. It is often the case with these real-world applications that the time required for the robots to traverse a corridor takes a continuous value and is randomly distributed, and the prior knowledge of the probability distribution of the travel time is limited. Multi-Agent Path Finding has been widely studied and applied to robot management systems; however, automating the robot operation in such environments remains difficult. We propose 1) online re-planning to update the action plan of robots while it is executed, and 2) parameter update to estimate the probability distribution of travel time using Bayesian inference as the delay is observed. We use a greedy heuristic to obtain solutions in a limited computation time. Through simulations, we empirically compare the performance of our method to those of existing methods in terms of the conflict probability and the actual travel time of robots. The simulation results indicate that the proposed method can find travel paths with at least 50% fewer conflicts and a shorter actual total travel time than existing methods. The proposed method requires a small number of trials to achieve the performance because the parameter update is prioritized on the important edges for path planning, thereby satisfying the requirements of quick implementation of robust planning of automated delivery services.
summary: This study explores the problem of Multi-Agent Path Finding with continuous and stochastic travel times whose probability distribution is unknown. The simulation results indicate that the proposed method can find travel paths with at least 50% fewer conflicts and a shorter actual total travel time than existing methods. The proposed method requires a small number of trials to achieve the performance because the parameter update is prioritized on the important edges for path planning, thereby satisfying the requirements of quick implementation of robust planning of automated delivery services.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了概率分布未知的连续随机旅行时间的多智能体寻路问题。我们的目的是管理一组自动化机器人，这些机器人在行人和各种机器人共存的建筑物中提供包裹递送服务，例如办公楼、医院和公寓的递送服务。在这些实际应用中，机器人穿越走廊所需的时间通常取连续值且随机分布，而行进时间概率分布的先验知识是有限的。多Agent路径寻找已被广泛研究并应用于机器人管理系统；然而，在这种环境下实现机器人操作的自动化仍然很困难。我们建议：1）在线重新规划，以在执行时更新机器人的行动计划；2）参数更新，以在观察到延迟时使用贝叶斯推理来估计行程时间的概率分布。我们使用贪心启发式方法在有限的计算时间内获得解决方案。通过模拟，我们根据经验将我们的方法与现有方法在冲突概率和机器人实际行进时间方面的性能进行了比较。仿真结果表明，与现有方法相比，该方法能够找到至少减少 50% 冲突的出行路径，并且实际总出行时间更短。所提出的方法需要少量的试验即可实现性能，因为参数更新优先于路径规划的重要边缘，从而满足快速实现自动配送服务鲁棒规划的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多智能体路径规划问题的在线重规划与自适应参数更新方法，以应对未知概率分布的随机旅行时间。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景中，如办公大楼和医院，机器人配送服务面临旅行时间随机且分布未知的问题，传统方法难以有效处理动态环境中的冲突与延迟。
AI.method: 采用在线重规划实时更新机器人路径，并结合贝叶斯推断对旅行时间分布进行参数估计，通过贪心启发式算法快速求解。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方法相比现有方法减少了至少50%的冲突概率，且实际总旅行时间更短，参数更新效率高。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过优先更新关键路径参数，实现了快速鲁棒的路径规划，满足自动化配送服务的实时性需求。
