search_text: Online Re-Planning and Adaptive Parameter Update for Multi-Agent Path Finding with Stochastic Travel Times 具有随机旅行时间的多智能体路径查找的在线重新规划和自适应参数更新 This study explores the problem of Multi-Agent Path Finding with continuous and stochastic travel times whose probability distribution is unknown. Our purpose is to manage a group of automated robots that provide package delivery services in a building where pedestrians and a wide variety of robots coexist, such as delivery services in office buildings, hospitals, and apartments. It is often the case with these real-world applications that the time required for the robots to traverse a corridor takes a continuous value and is randomly distributed, and the prior knowledge of the probability distribution of the travel time is limited. Multi-Agent Path Finding has been widely studied and applied to robot management systems; however, automating the robot operation in such environments remains difficult. We propose 1) online re-planning to update the action plan of robots while it is executed, and 2) parameter update to estimate the probability distribution of travel time using Bayesian inference as the delay is observed. We use a greedy heuristic to obtain solutions in a limited computation time. Through simulations, we empirically compare the performance of our method to those of existing methods in terms of the conflict probability and the actual travel time of robots. The simulation results indicate that the proposed method can find travel paths with at least 50% fewer conflicts and a shorter actual total travel time than existing methods. The proposed method requires a small number of trials to achieve the performance because the parameter update is prioritized on the important edges for path planning, thereby satisfying the requirements of quick implementation of robust planning of automated delivery services. 本研究探讨了概率分布未知的连续随机旅行时间的多智能体寻路问题。我们的目的是管理一组自动化机器人，这些机器人在行人和各种机器人共存的建筑物中提供包裹递送服务，例如办公楼、医院和公寓的递送服务。在这些实际应用中，机器人穿越走廊所需的时间通常取连续值且随机分布，而行进时间概率分布的先验知识是有限的。多Agent路径寻找已被广泛研究并应用于机器人管理系统；然而，在这种环境下实现机器人操作的自动化仍然很困难。我们建议：1）在线重新规划，以在执行时更新机器人的行动计划；2）参数更新，以在观察到延迟时使用贝叶斯推理来估计行程时间的概率分布。我们使用贪心启发式方法在有限的计算时间内获得解决方案。通过模拟，我们根据经验将我们的方法与现有方法在冲突概率和机器人实际行进时间方面的性能进行了比较。仿真结果表明，与现有方法相比，该方法能够找到至少减少 50% 冲突的出行路径，并且实际总出行时间更短。所提出的方法需要少量的试验即可实现性能，因为参数更新优先于路径规划的重要边缘，从而满足快速实现自动配送服务鲁棒规划的要求。 本文提出了一种针对多智能体路径规划问题的在线重规划与自适应参数更新方法，以应对未知概率分布的随机旅行时间。 Atsuyoshi Kita,Nobuhiro Suenari,Masashi Okada,Tadahiro Taniguchi cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Ali Reza Ibrahimzada,Yigit Varli,Dilara Tekinoglu,Reyhaneh Jabbarvand
title: Perfect is the enemy of test oracle
title_zh: 完美是测试预言机的敌人
abstract: Automation of test oracles is one of the most challenging facets of software testing, but remains comparatively less addressed compared to automated test input generation. Test oracles rely on a ground-truth that can distinguish between the correct and buggy behavior to determine whether a test fails (detects a bug) or passes. What makes the oracle problem challenging and undecidable is the assumption that the ground-truth should know the exact expected, correct, or buggy behavior. However, we argue that one can still build an accurate oracle without knowing the exact correct or buggy behavior, but how these two might differ. This paper presents SEER, a learning-based approach that in the absence of test assertions or other types of oracle, can determine whether a unit test passes or fails on a given method under test (MUT). To build the ground-truth, SEER jointly embeds unit tests and the implementation of MUTs into a unified vector space, in such a way that the neural representation of tests are similar to that of MUTs they pass on them, but dissimilar to MUTs they fail on them. The classifier built on top of this vector representation serves as the oracle to generate "fail" labels, when test inputs detect a bug in MUT or "pass" labels, otherwise. Our extensive experiments on applying SEER to more than 5K unit tests from a diverse set of open-source Java projects show that the produced oracle is (1) effective in predicting the fail or pass labels, achieving an overall accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 measure of 93%, 86%, 94%, and 90%, (2) generalizable, predicting the labels for the unit test of projects that were not in training or validation set with negligible performance drop, and (3) efficient, detecting the existence of bugs in only 6.5 milliseconds on average.
summary: Automation of test oracles is one of the most challenging facets of software testing, but remains comparatively less addressed compared to automated test input generation. Test oracles rely on a ground-truth that can distinguish between the correct and buggy behavior to determine whether a test fails (detects a bug) or passes. What makes the oracle problem challenging and undecidable is the assumption that the ground-truth should know the exact expected, correct, or buggy behavior. However, we argue that one can still build an accurate oracle without knowing the exact correct or buggy behavior, but how these two might differ. This paper presents SEER, a learning-based approach that in the absence of test assertions or other types of oracle, can determine whether a unit test passes or fails on a given method under test (MUT). To build the ground-truth, SEER jointly embeds unit tests and the implementation of MUTs into a unified vector space, in such a way that the neural representation of tests are similar to that of MUTs they pass on them, but dissimilar to MUTs they fail on them. The classifier built on top of this vector representation serves as the oracle to generate "fail" labels, when test inputs detect a bug in MUT or "pass" labels, otherwise. Our extensive experiments on applying SEER to more than 5K unit tests from a diverse set of open-source Java projects show that the produced oracle is (1) effective in predicting the fail or pass labels, achieving an overall accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 measure of 93%, 86%, 94%, and 90%, (2) generalizable, predicting the labels for the unit test of projects that were not in training or validation set with negligible performance drop, and (3) efficient, detecting the existence of bugs in only 6.5 milliseconds on average.
abstract_zh: 测试预言机的自动化是软件测试中最具挑战性的方面之一，但与自动测试输入生成相比，仍然相对较少得到解决。测试预言机依赖于能够区分正确行为和错误行为的事实来确定测试是失败（检测到错误）还是通过。使预言机问题具有挑战性和不可判定性的原因是假设事实真相应该知道确切的预期、正确或有缺陷的行为。然而，我们认为，在不知道确切的正确行为或错误行为的情况下，人们仍然可以构建一个准确的预言机，但是这两者可能有何不同。本文提出了 SEER，这是一种基于学习的方法，在没有测试断言或其他类型的预言的情况下，可以确定单元测试在给定的被测方法 (MUT) 上是否通过或失败。为了构建真实情况，SEER 将单元测试和 MUT 的实现联合嵌入到统一的向量空间中，这样测试的神经表示与它们通过的 MUT 的神经表示类似，但与它们失败的 MUT 不同。当测试输入检测到 MUT 中的错误或“通过”标签时，构建在该向量表示之上的分类器将充当生成“失败”标签的预言机。我们将 SEER 应用于来自不同开源 Java 项目的超过 5K 单元测试的广泛实验表明，生成的预言机 (1) 可以有效地预测失败或通过标签，实现 93%、86%、94% 和 90% 的总体准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 度量，(2) 可推广，预测不在训练或验证集中的项目的单元测试的标签，性能下降可以忽略不计，(3)高效，平均只需 6.5 毫秒即可检测到错误的存在。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEER方法，通过机器学习在不依赖精确预期行为的情况下，自动判断单元测试的通过或失败。
AI.motivation: 传统测试预言机需依赖精确的基准真相，但实际中难以获取。作者认为无需精确预期行为仍可构建有效预言机。
AI.method: SEER将单元测试与被测代码嵌入统一向量空间，使通过测试的向量相似、失败测试的向量差异，基于此构建分类器作为预言机。
AI.result: 在5000+Java测试用例中，SEER准确率达93%，精确率86%，召回率94%，F1值90%，且泛化性强、检测速度仅6.5毫秒。
AI.conclusion: SEER证明了无需精确基准真相即可构建高效测试预言机，为自动化测试提供新思路。

authors_text: John Harvill,Jarred Barber,Arun Nair,Ramin Pishehvar
title: SPADE: Self-supervised Pretraining for Acoustic DisEntanglement
title_zh: SPADE：声学解缠的自监督预训练
abstract: Self-supervised representation learning approaches have grown in popularity due to the ability to train models on large amounts of unlabeled data and have demonstrated success in diverse fields such as natural language processing, computer vision, and speech. Previous self-supervised work in the speech domain has disentangled multiple attributes of speech such as linguistic content, speaker identity, and rhythm. In this work, we introduce a self-supervised approach to disentangle room acoustics from speech and use the acoustic representation on the downstream task of device arbitration. Our results demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves performance over a baseline when labeled training data is scarce, indicating that our pretraining scheme learns to encode room acoustic information while remaining invariant to other attributes of the speech signal.
summary: Self-supervised representation learning approaches have grown in popularity due to the ability to train models on large amounts of unlabeled data and have demonstrated success in diverse fields such as natural language processing, computer vision, and speech. Previous self-supervised work in the speech domain has disentangled multiple attributes of speech such as linguistic content, speaker identity, and rhythm. In this work, we introduce a self-supervised approach to disentangle room acoustics from speech and use the acoustic representation on the downstream task of device arbitration. Our results demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves performance over a baseline when labeled training data is scarce, indicating that our pretraining scheme learns to encode room acoustic information while remaining invariant to other attributes of the speech signal.
abstract_zh: 由于能够在大量未标记数据上训练模型，自监督表示学习方法越来越受欢迎，并且在自然语言处理、计算机视觉和语音等不同领域取得了成功。先前在语音领域的自我监督工作已经解开了语音的多个属性，例如语言内容、说话者身份和节奏。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种自监督方法，将室内声学与语音分开，并在设备仲裁的下游任务中使用声学表示。我们的结果表明，当标记的训练数据稀缺时，我们提出的方法在基线上显着提高了性能，这表明我们的预训练方案学会了对房间声学信息进行编码，同时对语音信号的其他属性保持不变。

AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练能有效解耦房间声学信息，提升设备仲裁性能，尤其在标注数据有限时表现优异。

search_text: SPADE: Self-supervised Pretraining for Acoustic DisEntanglement SPADE：声学解缠的自监督预训练 Self-supervised representation learning approaches have grown in popularity due to the ability to train models on large amounts of unlabeled data and have demonstrated success in diverse fields such as natural language processing, computer vision, and speech. Previous self-supervised work in the speech domain has disentangled multiple attributes of speech such as linguistic content, speaker identity, and rhythm. In this work, we introduce a self-supervised approach to disentangle room acoustics from speech and use the acoustic representation on the downstream task of device arbitration. Our results demonstrate that our proposed approach significantly improves performance over a baseline when labeled training data is scarce, indicating that our pretraining scheme learns to encode room acoustic information while remaining invariant to other attributes of the speech signal. 由于能够在大量未标记数据上训练模型，自监督表示学习方法越来越受欢迎，并且在自然语言处理、计算机视觉和语音等不同领域取得了成功。先前在语音领域的自我监督工作已经解开了语音的多个属性，例如语言内容、说话者身份和节奏。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种自监督方法，将室内声学与语音分开，并在设备仲裁的下游任务中使用声学表示。我们的结果表明，当标记的训练数据稀缺时，我们提出的方法在基线上显着提高了性能，这表明我们的预训练方案学会了对房间声学信息进行编码，同时对语音信号的其他属性保持不变。 提出一种自监督预训练方法，用于从语音中解耦房间声学信息，并在设备仲裁任务中应用。 John Harvill,Jarred Barber,Arun Nair,Ramin Pishehvar cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yizhou Chen,Guangda Huzhang,Anxiang Zeng,Qingtao Yu,Hui Sun,Heng-yi Li,Jingyi Li,Yabo Ni,Han Yu,Zhiming Zhou
title: Clustered Embedding Learning for Recommender Systems
title_zh: 推荐系统的集群嵌入学习
abstract: In recent years, recommender systems have advanced rapidly, where embedding learning for users and items plays a critical role. A standard method learns a unique embedding vector for each user and item. However, such a method has two important limitations in real-world applications: 1) it is hard to learn embeddings that generalize well for users and items with rare interactions on their own; and 2) it may incur unbearably high memory costs when the number of users and items scales up. Existing approaches either can only address one of the limitations or have flawed overall performances. In this paper, we propose Clustered Embedding Learning (CEL) as an integrated solution to these two problems. CEL is a plug-and-play embedding learning framework that can be combined with any differentiable feature interaction model. It is capable of achieving improved performance, especially for cold users and items, with reduced memory cost. CEL enables automatic and dynamic clustering of users and items in a top-down fashion, where clustered entities jointly learn a shared embedding. The accelerated version of CEL has an optimal time complexity, which supports efficient online updates. Theoretically, we prove the identifiability and the existence of a unique optimal number of clusters for CEL in the context of nonnegative matrix factorization. Empirically, we validate the effectiveness of CEL on three public datasets and one business dataset, showing its consistently superior performance against current state-of-the-art methods. In particular, when incorporating CEL into the business model, it brings an improvement of $+0.6\%$ in AUC, which translates into a significant revenue gain; meanwhile, the size of the embedding table gets $2650$ times smaller.
summary: In recent years, recommender systems have advanced rapidly, where embedding learning for users and items plays a critical role. A standard method learns a unique embedding vector for each user and item. However, such a method has two important limitations in real-world applications: 1) it is hard to learn embeddings that generalize well for users and items with rare interactions on their own; and 2) it may incur unbearably high memory costs when the number of users and items scales up. Existing approaches either can only address one of the limitations or have flawed overall performances. In this paper, we propose Clustered Embedding Learning (CEL) as an integrated solution to these two problems. CEL is a plug-and-play embedding learning framework that can be combined with any differentiable feature interaction model. It is capable of achieving improved performance, especially for cold users and items, with reduced memory cost. CEL enables automatic and dynamic clustering of users and items in a top-down fashion, where clustered entities jointly learn a shared embedding. The accelerated version of CEL has an optimal time complexity, which supports efficient online updates. Theoretically, we prove the identifiability and the existence of a unique optimal number of clusters for CEL in the context of nonnegative matrix factorization. Empirically, we validate the effectiveness of CEL on three public datasets and one business dataset, showing its consistently superior performance against current state-of-the-art methods. In particular, when incorporating CEL into the business model, it brings an improvement of $+0.6\%$ in AUC, which translates into a significant revenue gain; meanwhile, the size of the embedding table gets $2650$ times smaller.
abstract_zh: 近年来，推荐系统发展迅速，其中对用户和项目的嵌入学习起着至关重要的作用。标准方法为每个用户和项目学习唯一的嵌入向量。然而，这种方法在现实世界的应用中存在两个重要的局限性：1）很难学习能够很好地概括用户和项目本身很少交互的嵌入； 2）当用户和项目数量增加时，可能会产生难以承受的高内存成本。现有方法要么只能解决其中一个限制，要么整体性能存在缺陷。在本文中，我们提出集群嵌入学习（CEL）作为这两个问题的集成解决方案。 CEL 是一种即插即用的嵌入学习框架，可以与任何可微特征交互模型相结合。它能够提高性能，特别是对于冷用户和项目，同时降低内存成本。 CEL 以自上而下的方式实现用户和项目的自动动态聚类，其中聚类实体共同学习共享嵌入。 CEL加速版具有最优的时间复杂度，支持高效的在线更新。从理论上讲，我们证明了在非负矩阵分解的背景下 CEL 的可识别性和唯一最佳簇数的存在性。根据经验，我们在三个公共数据集和一个业务数据集上验证了 CEL 的有效性，表明其相对于当前最先进的方法始终具有优越的性能。特别是，当将 CEL 纳入商业模式时，它带来了 AUC $+0.6\%$ 的改善，这转化为显着的收入增益；同时，嵌入表的大小缩小了 2650 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Clustered Embedding Learning (CEL)的嵌入学习框架，旨在解决推荐系统中用户和物品嵌入学习的泛化性差及内存成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理稀疏交互数据时泛化能力不足，且随着用户和物品数量增长导致内存成本过高，难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: CEL通过自上而下的动态聚类方法，将用户和物品分组并共享嵌入向量，结合可微分特征交互模型，实现内存优化与性能提升。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集和一个业务数据集上验证，CEL在AUC指标上提升0.6%，嵌入表体积缩小2650倍，且支持高效在线更新。
AI.conclusion: CEL理论证明了聚类数目的唯一性，并通过实验验证其有效性，为推荐系统提供了兼顾性能与内存效率的解决方案。

authors_text: Wenhan Yu,Terence Jie Chua,Jun Zhao
title: User-centric Heterogeneous-action Deep Reinforcement Learning for Virtual Reality in the Metaverse over Wireless Networks
title_zh: 无线网络虚拟现实中以用户为中心的异构动作深度强化学习
comment: The paper appears in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications (TWC), 2023
comments: The paper appears in IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications (TWC), 2023
abstract: The Metaverse is emerging as maturing technologies are empowering the different facets. Virtual Reality (VR) technologies serve as the backbone of the virtual universe within the Metaverse to offer a highly immersive user experience. As mobility is emphasized in the Metaverse context, VR devices reduce their weights at the sacrifice of local computation abilities. In this paper, for a system consisting of a Metaverse server and multiple VR users, we consider two cases of (i) the server generating frames and transmitting them to users, and (ii) users generating frames locally and thus consuming device energy. Moreover, in our multi-user VR scenario for the Metaverse, users have different characteristics and demands for Frames Per Second (FPS). Then the channel access arrangement (including the decisions on frame generation location), and transmission powers for the downlink communications from the server to the users are jointly optimized to improve the utilities of users. This joint optimization is addressed by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with heterogeneous actions. Our proposed user-centric DRL algorithm is called User-centric Critic with Heterogenous Actors (UCHA). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our UCHA algorithm leads to remarkable results under various requirements and constraints.
summary: The Metaverse is emerging as maturing technologies are empowering the different facets. Virtual Reality (VR) technologies serve as the backbone of the virtual universe within the Metaverse to offer a highly immersive user experience. As mobility is emphasized in the Metaverse context, VR devices reduce their weights at the sacrifice of local computation abilities. In this paper, for a system consisting of a Metaverse server and multiple VR users, we consider two cases of (i) the server generating frames and transmitting them to users, and (ii) users generating frames locally and thus consuming device energy. Moreover, in our multi-user VR scenario for the Metaverse, users have different characteristics and demands for Frames Per Second (FPS). Then the channel access arrangement (including the decisions on frame generation location), and transmission powers for the downlink communications from the server to the users are jointly optimized to improve the utilities of users. This joint optimization is addressed by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with heterogeneous actions. Our proposed user-centric DRL algorithm is called User-centric Critic with Heterogenous Actors (UCHA). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our UCHA algorithm leads to remarkable results under various requirements and constraints.
abstract_zh: 随着成熟的技术赋能不同方面，元宇宙正在兴起。虚拟现实 (VR) 技术作为 Metaverse 中虚拟宇宙的支柱，提供高度沉浸式的用户体验。由于元宇宙背景下强调移动性，VR 设备以牺牲本地计算能力为代价来减轻重量。在本文中，对于由Metaverse服务器和多个VR用户组成的系统，我们考虑两种情况：(i)服务器生成帧并将其传输给用户，以及(ii)用户在本地生成帧并因此消耗设备能量。此外，在我们元宇宙的多用户VR场景中，用户具有不同的特征和每秒帧数（FPS）的需求。然后对信道接入安排（包括帧生成位置的决策）以及服务器到用户的下行通信的发射功率进行联合优化，以提高用户的效用。这种联合优化是通过具有异构动作的深度强化学习（DRL）来解决的。我们提出的以用户为中心的 DRL 算法称为以用户为中心的异质演员评论家 (UCHA)。大量的实验表明，我们的 UCHA 算法在各种要求和约束下都能取得显着的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用户为中心的异构动作深度强化学习算法（UCHA），用于优化元宇宙中无线网络下多用户VR场景的帧生成与传输策略。
AI.motivation: VR设备轻量化导致本地计算能力下降，而用户对帧率需求差异大，需优化资源分配与传输策略以提升用户体验和能效。
AI.method: 通过深度强化学习（DRL）框架，设计异构动作空间，联合优化服务器帧生成/传输功率分配与用户本地帧生成策略，提出用户为中心的批评者与异构执行者算法（UCHA）。
AI.result: 实验表明，UCHA在不同用户需求和网络约束下均显著优于基准算法，有效提升用户效用与系统能效。
AI.conclusion: UCHA算法通过用户差异化建模与异构动作优化，成功解决了元宇宙多用户VR场景下的资源分配难题，为未来沉浸式体验提供理论支撑。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种用户为中心的异构动作深度强化学习算法（UCHA），用于优化元宇宙中无线网络下多用户VR场景的帧生成与传输策略。
ai_content.motivation: VR设备轻量化导致本地计算能力下降，而用户对帧率需求差异大，需优化资源分配与传输策略以提升用户体验和能效。
ai_content.method: 通过深度强化学习（DRL）框架，设计异构动作空间，联合优化服务器帧生成/传输功率分配与用户本地帧生成策略，提出用户为中心的批评者与异构执行者算法（UCHA）。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，UCHA在不同用户需求和网络约束下均显著优于基准算法，有效提升用户效用与系统能效。
ai_content.conclusion: UCHA算法通过用户差异化建模与异构动作优化，成功解决了元宇宙多用户VR场景下的资源分配难题，为未来沉浸式体验提供理论支撑。

search_text: User-centric Heterogeneous-action Deep Reinforcement Learning for Virtual Reality in the Metaverse over Wireless Networks 无线网络虚拟现实中以用户为中心的异构动作深度强化学习 The Metaverse is emerging as maturing technologies are empowering the different facets. Virtual Reality (VR) technologies serve as the backbone of the virtual universe within the Metaverse to offer a highly immersive user experience. As mobility is emphasized in the Metaverse context, VR devices reduce their weights at the sacrifice of local computation abilities. In this paper, for a system consisting of a Metaverse server and multiple VR users, we consider two cases of (i) the server generating frames and transmitting them to users, and (ii) users generating frames locally and thus consuming device energy. Moreover, in our multi-user VR scenario for the Metaverse, users have different characteristics and demands for Frames Per Second (FPS). Then the channel access arrangement (including the decisions on frame generation location), and transmission powers for the downlink communications from the server to the users are jointly optimized to improve the utilities of users. This joint optimization is addressed by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with heterogeneous actions. Our proposed user-centric DRL algorithm is called User-centric Critic with Heterogenous Actors (UCHA). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our UCHA algorithm leads to remarkable results under various requirements and constraints. 随着成熟的技术赋能不同方面，元宇宙正在兴起。虚拟现实 (VR) 技术作为 Metaverse 中虚拟宇宙的支柱，提供高度沉浸式的用户体验。由于元宇宙背景下强调移动性，VR 设备以牺牲本地计算能力为代价来减轻重量。在本文中，对于由Metaverse服务器和多个VR用户组成的系统，我们考虑两种情况：(i)服务器生成帧并将其传输给用户，以及(ii)用户在本地生成帧并因此消耗设备能量。此外，在我们元宇宙的多用户VR场景中，用户具有不同的特征和每秒帧数（FPS）的需求。然后对信道接入安排（包括帧生成位置的决策）以及服务器到用户的下行通信的发射功率进行联合优化，以提高用户的效用。这种联合优化是通过具有异构动作的深度强化学习（DRL）来解决的。我们提出的以用户为中心的 DRL 算法称为以用户为中心的异质演员评论家 (UCHA)。大量的实验表明，我们的 UCHA 算法在各种要求和约束下都能取得显着的结果。 本文提出一种用户为中心的异构动作深度强化学习算法（UCHA），用于优化元宇宙中无线网络下多用户VR场景的帧生成与传输策略。 Wenhan Yu,Terence Jie Chua,Jun Zhao cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Qingfeng Lan,A. Rupam Mahmood,Shuicheng Yan,Zhongwen Xu
title: Learning to Optimize for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 学习优化强化学习
comment: Published at RLC 2024. For code release, see https://github.com/sail-sg/optim4rl
comments: Published at RLC 2024. For code release, see https://github.com/sail-sg/optim4rl
abstract: In recent years, by leveraging more data, computation, and diverse tasks, learned optimizers have achieved remarkable success in supervised learning, outperforming classical hand-designed optimizers. Reinforcement learning (RL) is essentially different from supervised learning, and in practice, these learned optimizers do not work well even in simple RL tasks. We investigate this phenomenon and identify two issues. First, the agent-gradient distribution is non-independent and identically distributed, leading to inefficient meta-training. Moreover, due to highly stochastic agent-environment interactions, the agent-gradients have high bias and variance, which increases the difficulty of learning an optimizer for RL. We propose pipeline training and a novel optimizer structure with a good inductive bias to address these issues, making it possible to learn an optimizer for reinforcement learning from scratch. We show that, although only trained in toy tasks, our learned optimizer can generalize to unseen complex tasks in Brax.
summary: In recent years, by leveraging more data, computation, and diverse tasks, learned optimizers have achieved remarkable success in supervised learning, outperforming classical hand-designed optimizers. Reinforcement learning (RL) is essentially different from supervised learning, and in practice, these learned optimizers do not work well even in simple RL tasks. We investigate this phenomenon and identify two issues. First, the agent-gradient distribution is non-independent and identically distributed, leading to inefficient meta-training. Moreover, due to highly stochastic agent-environment interactions, the agent-gradients have high bias and variance, which increases the difficulty of learning an optimizer for RL. We propose pipeline training and a novel optimizer structure with a good inductive bias to address these issues, making it possible to learn an optimizer for reinforcement learning from scratch. We show that, although only trained in toy tasks, our learned optimizer can generalize to unseen complex tasks in Brax.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通过利用更多的数据、计算和多样化的任务，学习优化器在监督学习方面取得了显着的成功，超越了经典的手工设计的优化器。强化学习（RL）与监督学习本质上不同，在实践中，这些学习优化器即使在简单的 RL 任务中也不能很好地工作。我们调查了这一现象并发现了两个问题。首先，智能体梯度分布是非独立且同分布的，导致元训练效率低下。此外，由于主体与环境的交互高度随机，主体梯度具有较高的偏差和方差，这增加了学习强化学习优化器的难度。我们提出了管道训练和一种具有良好归纳偏差的新颖优化器结构来解决这些问题，使得从头开始学习用于强化学习的优化器成为可能。我们证明，虽然只接受了玩具任务的训练，但我们学习的优化器可以泛化到 Brax 中未见过的复杂任务。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何为强化学习设计有效的学习优化器，解决现有方法在RL任务中表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管学习优化器在监督学习中表现优异，但其在强化学习中因梯度分布特性及环境交互随机性导致效果差，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 提出管道训练方法及具有归纳偏置的新型优化器结构，以应对非独立同分布梯度与高偏差方差问题。
AI.result: 所学优化器在玩具任务训练后，能有效泛化至Brax框架中的复杂未知任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性方法设计，学习优化器可克服RL特性挑战，实现跨任务泛化能力。

authors_text: Frank Neumann,Aneta Neumann,Chao Qian,Viet Anh Do,Jacob de Nobel,Diederick Vermetten,Saba Sadeghi Ahouei,Furong Ye,Hao Wang,Thomas Bäck
title: Benchmarking Algorithms for Submodular Optimization Problems Using IOHProfiler
title_zh: 使用 IOHProfiler 对子模优化问题的基准算法
abstract: Submodular functions play a key role in the area of optimization as they allow to model many real-world problems that face diminishing returns. Evolutionary algorithms have been shown to obtain strong theoretical performance guarantees for a wide class of submodular problems under various types of constraints while clearly outperforming standard greedy approximation algorithms. This paper introduces a setup for benchmarking algorithms for submodular optimization problems with the aim to provide researchers with a framework to enhance and compare the performance of new algorithms for submodular problems. The focus is on the development of iterative search algorithms such as evolutionary algorithms with the implementation provided and integrated into IOHprofiler which allows for tracking and comparing the progress and performance of iterative search algorithms. We present a range of submodular optimization problems that have been integrated into IOHprofiler and show how the setup can be used for analyzing and comparing iterative search algorithms in various settings.
summary: Submodular functions play a key role in the area of optimization as they allow to model many real-world problems that face diminishing returns. Evolutionary algorithms have been shown to obtain strong theoretical performance guarantees for a wide class of submodular problems under various types of constraints while clearly outperforming standard greedy approximation algorithms. This paper introduces a setup for benchmarking algorithms for submodular optimization problems with the aim to provide researchers with a framework to enhance and compare the performance of new algorithms for submodular problems. The focus is on the development of iterative search algorithms such as evolutionary algorithms with the implementation provided and integrated into IOHprofiler which allows for tracking and comparing the progress and performance of iterative search algorithms. We present a range of submodular optimization problems that have been integrated into IOHprofiler and show how the setup can be used for analyzing and comparing iterative search algorithms in various settings.
abstract_zh: 子模函数在优化领域发挥着关键作用，因为它们允许对许多面临收益递减的现实问题进行建模。进化算法已被证明可以在各种类型的约束下为各种子模问题获得强大的理论性能保证，同时明显优于标准的贪婪近似算法。本文介绍了子模优化问题的基准测试算法的设置，旨在为研究人员提供一个框架来增强和比较子模问题新算法的性能。重点是迭代搜索算法的开发，例如进化算法，提供并集成到 IOHprofiler 中，允许跟踪和比较迭代搜索算法的进度和性能。我们提出了一系列已集成到 IOHprofiler 中的子模块优化问题，并展示了如何使用该设置来分析和比较各种设置下的迭代搜索算法。

AI.tldr: 介绍一个用于评估子模优化问题算法的框架，以帮助研究人员比较和提升新算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有标准贪心算法在处理子模问题时效果有限，需通过基准测试框架比较进化算法等迭代搜索算法的性能。
AI.method: 开发并集成迭代搜索算法（如进化算法）到IOHprofiler工具中，用于跟踪和比较算法性能。
AI.result: 展示了多个子模优化问题的集成，并演示了该框架在不同场景下分析和比较迭代算法的效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为子模优化算法的研究提供了有效工具，有助于推动新算法的开发和比较。

authors_text: Mohammad Shifat E Rabbi,Abu Hasnat Mohammad Rubaiyat,Yan Zhuang,Gustavo K Rohde
title: A sliced-Wasserstein distance-based approach for out-of-class-distribution detection
title_zh: 基于切片 Wasserstein 距离的类外分布检测方法
abstract: There exist growing interests in intelligent systems for numerous medical imaging, image processing, and computer vision applications, such as face recognition, medical diagnosis, character recognition, and self-driving cars, among others. These applications usually require solving complex classification problems involving complex images with unknown data generative processes. In addition to recent successes of the current classification approaches relying on feature engineering and deep learning, several shortcomings of them, such as the lack of robustness, generalizability, and interpretability, have also been observed. These methods often require extensive training data, are computationally expensive, and are vulnerable to out-of-distribution samples, e.g., adversarial attacks. Recently, an accurate, data-efficient, computationally efficient, and robust transport-based classification approach has been proposed, which describes a generative model-based problem formulation and closed-form solution for a specific category of classification problems. However, all these approaches lack mechanisms to detect test samples outside the class distributions used during training. In real-world settings, where the collected training samples are unable to exhaust or cover all classes, the traditional classification schemes are unable to handle the unseen classes effectively, which is especially an important issue for safety-critical systems, such as self-driving and medical imaging diagnosis. In this work, we propose a method for detecting out-of-class distributions based on the distribution of sliced-Wasserstein distance from the Radon Cumulative Distribution Transform (R-CDT) subspace. We tested our method on the MNIST and two medical image datasets and reported better accuracy than the state-of-the-art methods without an out-of-class distribution detection procedure.
summary: There exist growing interests in intelligent systems for numerous medical imaging, image processing, and computer vision applications, such as face recognition, medical diagnosis, character recognition, and self-driving cars, among others. These applications usually require solving complex classification problems involving complex images with unknown data generative processes. In addition to recent successes of the current classification approaches relying on feature engineering and deep learning, several shortcomings of them, such as the lack of robustness, generalizability, and interpretability, have also been observed. These methods often require extensive training data, are computationally expensive, and are vulnerable to out-of-distribution samples, e.g., adversarial attacks. Recently, an accurate, data-efficient, computationally efficient, and robust transport-based classification approach has been proposed, which describes a generative model-based problem formulation and closed-form solution for a specific category of classification problems. However, all these approaches lack mechanisms to detect test samples outside the class distributions used during training. In real-world settings, where the collected training samples are unable to exhaust or cover all classes, the traditional classification schemes are unable to handle the unseen classes effectively, which is especially an important issue for safety-critical systems, such as self-driving and medical imaging diagnosis. In this work, we propose a method for detecting out-of-class distributions based on the distribution of sliced-Wasserstein distance from the Radon Cumulative Distribution Transform (R-CDT) subspace. We tested our method on the MNIST and two medical image datasets and reported better accuracy than the state-of-the-art methods without an out-of-class distribution detection procedure.
abstract_zh: 人们对用于众多医学成像、图像处理和计算机视觉应用的智能系统越来越感兴趣，例如人脸识别、医疗诊断、字符识别和自动驾驶汽车等。这些应用通常需要解决涉及具有未知数据生成过程的复杂图像的复杂分类问题。除了最近基于特征工程和深度学习的分类方法取得的成功之外，它们还存在一些缺点，例如缺乏鲁棒性、泛化性和可解释性。这些方法通常需要大量的训练数据，计算成本高昂，并且容易受到分布外样本的影响，例如对抗性攻击。最近，提出了一种准确、数据高效、计算高效且鲁棒的基于传输的分类方法，该方法描述了基于生成模型的问题表述和针对特定类别的分类问题的封闭式解决方案。然而，所有这些方法都缺乏检测训练期间使用的类分布之外的测试样本的机制。在现实环境中，收集的训练样本无法穷尽或覆盖所有类别，传统的分类方案无法有效处理看不见的类别，这对于自动驾驶和医学成像诊断等安全关键系统来说尤其是一个重要问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于氡累积分布变换 (R-CDT) 子空间的切片 Wasserstein 距离分布来检测类外分布的方法。我们在 MNIST 和两个医学图像数据集上测试了我们的方法，并报告了比没有一流分布检测程序的最先进方法更好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于切片Wasserstein距离的方法，用于检测训练过程中未覆盖的类别分布外样本。
AI.motivation: 现有分类方法在处理分布外样本时存在鲁棒性差、泛化能力不足的问题，尤其在医疗影像和自动驾驶等安全关键系统中亟需有效检测机制。
AI.method: 通过Radon累积分布变换（R-CDT）子空间计算切片Wasserstein距离，构建分布外检测模型。
AI.result: 在MNIST和两个医学图像数据集上验证，检测准确率优于现有无分布外检测机制的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分布外检测提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于训练数据无法覆盖所有类别的实际场景。

authors_text: Wyatt Felt
title: Reconsidering Fascicles in Soft Pneumatic Actuator Packs
title_zh: 重新考虑软气动执行器包中的分册
abstract: This paper discusses and contests the claims of ``Soft Pneumatic Actuator Fascicles for High Force and Reliability'' a research article which was originally published in the March 2017 issue of the Journal Soft Robotics. The original paper claims that the summed forces of multiple thin-walled extending McKibben muscles are greater than a volumetrically equivalent actuator of the same length at the same pressure. The original paper also claims that the purported benefit becomes more pronounced as the number of smaller actuators is increased. Using reasonable assumptions, the analysis of this paper shows that the claims of the original paper violate the law of conservation of energy. This paper also identifies errors in the original methodology that may have led to the erroneous conclusions of the original paper. The goal of this paper is to correct the record and to provide a more accurate framework for considering fascicles used in soft pneumatic actuator packs.
summary: This paper discusses and contests the claims of ``Soft Pneumatic Actuator Fascicles for High Force and Reliability'' a research article which was originally published in the March 2017 issue of the Journal Soft Robotics. The original paper claims that the summed forces of multiple thin-walled extending McKibben muscles are greater than a volumetrically equivalent actuator of the same length at the same pressure. The original paper also claims that the purported benefit becomes more pronounced as the number of smaller actuators is increased. Using reasonable assumptions, the analysis of this paper shows that the claims of the original paper violate the law of conservation of energy. This paper also identifies errors in the original methodology that may have led to the erroneous conclusions of the original paper. The goal of this paper is to correct the record and to provide a more accurate framework for considering fascicles used in soft pneumatic actuator packs.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论并质疑了一篇研究文章“用于高力和可靠性的软气动执行器分册”的主张，该文章最初发表于 2017 年 3 月号的《软机器人》杂志上。原始论文声称，多个薄壁延伸的 McKibben 肌肉的总力大于相同压力下相同长度的体积等效执行器。原论文还声称，随着较小执行器数量的增加，所谓的好处变得更加明显。利用合理的假设，本文的分析表明，原论文的主张违反了能量守恒定律。本文还指出了原始方法中的错误，这些错误可能导致原始论文得出错误的结论。本文的目的是纠正记录并为考虑软气动执行器包中使用的分册提供更准确的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视并反驳了2017年发表在《软机器人》期刊上的一篇关于软气动执行器束的研究论文中的主张。
AI.motivation: 原文声称多个薄壁 McKibben 肌肉的总力大于体积相同、长度相同、压力相同的单个执行器，且随着小执行器数量的增加，这一优势更加明显。本文旨在纠正这一记录，并提供更准确的框架来考虑软气动执行器束的使用。
AI.method: 本文通过合理的假设分析了原文的主张，并指出其违反了能量守恒定律，同时识别出原文方法中的错误。
AI.result: 本文证明了原文的主张违反了能量守恒定律，并指出了导致原文结论错误的方法论错误。
AI.conclusion: 本文纠正了原文的结论，并提供了更准确的框架来考虑软气动执行器束的使用。

authors_text: Andrea Gemelli,Emanuele Vivoli,Simone Marinai
title: CTE: A Dataset for Contextualized Table Extraction
title_zh: CTE：用于上下文表提取的数据集
abstract: Relevant information in documents is often summarized in tables, helping the reader to identify useful facts. Most benchmark datasets support either document layout analysis or table understanding, but lack in providing data to apply both tasks in a unified way. We define the task of Contextualized Table Extraction (CTE), which aims to extract and define the structure of tables considering the textual context of the document. The dataset comprises 75k fully annotated pages of scientific papers, including more than 35k tables. Data are gathered from PubMed Central, merging the information provided by annotations in the PubTables-1M and PubLayNet datasets. The dataset can support CTE and adds new classes to the original ones. The generated annotations can be used to develop end-to-end pipelines for various tasks, including document layout analysis, table detection, structure recognition, and functional analysis. We formally define CTE and evaluation metrics, showing which subtasks can be tackled, describing advantages, limitations, and future works of this collection of data. Annotations and code will be accessible a https://github.com/AILab-UniFI/cte-dataset.
summary: Relevant information in documents is often summarized in tables, helping the reader to identify useful facts. Most benchmark datasets support either document layout analysis or table understanding, but lack in providing data to apply both tasks in a unified way. We define the task of Contextualized Table Extraction (CTE), which aims to extract and define the structure of tables considering the textual context of the document. The dataset comprises 75k fully annotated pages of scientific papers, including more than 35k tables. Data are gathered from PubMed Central, merging the information provided by annotations in the PubTables-1M and PubLayNet datasets. The dataset can support CTE and adds new classes to the original ones. The generated annotations can be used to develop end-to-end pipelines for various tasks, including document layout analysis, table detection, structure recognition, and functional analysis. We formally define CTE and evaluation metrics, showing which subtasks can be tackled, describing advantages, limitations, and future works of this collection of data. Annotations and code will be accessible a https://github.com/AILab-UniFI/cte-dataset.
abstract_zh: 文档中的相关信息通常总结在表格中，帮助读者识别有用的事实。大多数基准数据集支持文档布局分析或表格理解，但缺乏提供数据来以统一的方式应用这两个任务。我们定义了上下文化表提取（CTE）的任务，其目的是考虑文档的文本上下文来提取和定义表的结构。该数据集包含 75,000 页完整注释的科学论文，其中包括超过 35,000 个表格。数据从 PubMed Central 收集，合并 PubTables-1M 和 PubLayNet 数据集中注释提供的信息。该数据集可以支持CTE，并在原始类的基础上添加新的类。生成的注释可用于开发用于各种任务的端到端管道，包括文档布局分析、表格检测、结构识别和功能分析。我们正式定义了 CTE 和评估指标，显示了可以处理哪些子任务，描述了该数据集的优点、局限性和未来的工作。注释和代码可通过 https://github.com/AILab-UniFI/cte-dataset 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTE数据集，用于结合文档上下文进行表格结构提取与定义。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集无法同时支持文档布局分析与表格理解任务，缺乏统一处理两者的数据资源。
AI.method: 整合PubMed Central来源的PubTables-1M和PubLayNet数据，构建包含75k科学论文页面（35k表格）的全标注数据集，新增类别并定义CTE评估指标。
AI.result: 发布CTE数据集及代码，支持表格检测、结构识别等任务，提供端到端流水线开发基础。
AI.conclusion: CTE数据集填补了上下文感知表格处理的数据空白，但需进一步优化跨任务泛化能力，未来可扩展至更多文档类型。

ai_content.motivation: 现有数据集无法同时支持文档布局分析与表格理解任务，缺乏统一处理两者的数据资源。

ai_content.result: 发布CTE数据集及代码，支持表格检测、结构识别等任务，提供端到端流水线开发基础。

search_text: CTE: A Dataset for Contextualized Table Extraction CTE：用于上下文表提取的数据集 Relevant information in documents is often summarized in tables, helping the reader to identify useful facts. Most benchmark datasets support either document layout analysis or table understanding, but lack in providing data to apply both tasks in a unified way. We define the task of Contextualized Table Extraction (CTE), which aims to extract and define the structure of tables considering the textual context of the document. The dataset comprises 75k fully annotated pages of scientific papers, including more than 35k tables. Data are gathered from PubMed Central, merging the information provided by annotations in the PubTables-1M and PubLayNet datasets. The dataset can support CTE and adds new classes to the original ones. The generated annotations can be used to develop end-to-end pipelines for various tasks, including document layout analysis, table detection, structure recognition, and functional analysis. We formally define CTE and evaluation metrics, showing which subtasks can be tackled, describing advantages, limitations, and future works of this collection of data. Annotations and code will be accessible a https://github.com/AILab-UniFI/cte-dataset. 文档中的相关信息通常总结在表格中，帮助读者识别有用的事实。大多数基准数据集支持文档布局分析或表格理解，但缺乏提供数据来以统一的方式应用这两个任务。我们定义了上下文化表提取（CTE）的任务，其目的是考虑文档的文本上下文来提取和定义表的结构。该数据集包含 75,000 页完整注释的科学论文，其中包括超过 35,000 个表格。数据从 PubMed Central 收集，合并 PubTables-1M 和 PubLayNet 数据集中注释提供的信息。该数据集可以支持CTE，并在原始类的基础上添加新的类。生成的注释可用于开发用于各种任务的端到端管道，包括文档布局分析、表格检测、结构识别和功能分析。我们正式定义了 CTE 和评估指标，显示了可以处理哪些子任务，描述了该数据集的优点、局限性和未来的工作。注释和代码可通过 https://github.com/AILab-UniFI/cte-dataset 访问。 本文提出CTE数据集，用于结合文档上下文进行表格结构提取与定义。 Andrea Gemelli,Emanuele Vivoli,Simone Marinai cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Kornel Lewicki,Michelle Seng Ah Lee,Jennifer Cobbe,Jatinder Singh
title: Out of Context: Investigating the Bias and Fairness Concerns of "Artificial Intelligence as a Service"
title_zh: 断章取义：调查“人工智能即服务”的偏见和公平问题
comment: Accepted to CHI '23: ACM Human Factors in Computing, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: Accepted to CHI '23: ACM Human Factors in Computing, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: "AI as a Service" (AIaaS) is a rapidly growing market, offering various plug-and-play AI services and tools. AIaaS enables its customers (users) - who may lack the expertise, data, and/or resources to develop their own systems - to easily build and integrate AI capabilities into their applications. Yet, it is known that AI systems can encapsulate biases and inequalities that can have societal impact. This paper argues that the context-sensitive nature of fairness is often incompatible with AIaaS' 'one-size-fits-all' approach, leading to issues and tensions. Specifically, we review and systematise the AIaaS space by proposing a taxonomy of AI services based on the levels of autonomy afforded to the user. We then critically examine the different categories of AIaaS, outlining how these services can lead to biases or be otherwise harmful in the context of end-user applications. In doing so, we seek to draw research attention to the challenges of this emerging area.
summary: "AI as a Service" (AIaaS) is a rapidly growing market, offering various plug-and-play AI services and tools. AIaaS enables its customers (users) - who may lack the expertise, data, and/or resources to develop their own systems - to easily build and integrate AI capabilities into their applications. Yet, it is known that AI systems can encapsulate biases and inequalities that can have societal impact. This paper argues that the context-sensitive nature of fairness is often incompatible with AIaaS' 'one-size-fits-all' approach, leading to issues and tensions. Specifically, we review and systematise the AIaaS space by proposing a taxonomy of AI services based on the levels of autonomy afforded to the user. We then critically examine the different categories of AIaaS, outlining how these services can lead to biases or be otherwise harmful in the context of end-user applications. In doing so, we seek to draw research attention to the challenges of this emerging area.
abstract_zh: “人工智能即服务”（AIaaS）是一个快速增长的市场，提供各种即插即用的人工智能服务和工具。 AIaaS 使其客户（用户）（可能缺乏开发自己的系统所需的专业知识、数据和/或资源）能够轻松构建 AI 功能并将其集成到他们的应用程序中。然而，众所周知，人工智能系统可以封装可能产生社会影响的偏见和不平等。本文认为，公平性的上下文敏感本质通常与 AIaaS 的“一刀切”方法不相容，从而导致问题和紧张局势。具体来说，我们根据提供给用户的自主权水平提出人工智能服务分类，对 AIaaS 空间进行审查和系统化。然后，我们批判性地研究不同类别的 AIaaS，概述这些服务如何导致偏见或在最终用户应用程序中产生其他危害。在此过程中，我们力求引起研究人员对这一新兴领域挑战的关注。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了'人工智能即服务'(AIaaS)模式下的偏见与公平性问题，重点分析其'一刀切'方法与上下文敏感的公平性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 随着AIaaS市场的快速增长，其标准化服务可能无法适应不同应用场景的公平性需求，导致潜在的社会不公，亟需系统性研究该领域的风险。
AI.method: 提出基于用户自主程度的AIaaS服务分类法，通过批判性分析不同服务类别在实际应用中可能产生的偏见或危害。
AI.result: 构建了AIaaS服务分类体系，揭示了各类服务在用户应用中的公平性隐患，引发学界对AIaaS伦理挑战的关注。
AI.conclusion: AIaaS的标准化模式难以满足动态公平性需求，需在服务设计中引入更灵活的上下文适配机制以解决公平性冲突。

authors_text: Mengyan Wang,Weihua Li,Jingli Shi,Shiqing Wu,Quan Bai
title: DOR: A Novel Dual-Observation-Based Approach for News Recommendation Systems
title_zh: DOR：一种新颖的基于双观察的新闻推荐系统方法
abstract: Online social media platforms offer access to a vast amount of information, but sifting through the abundance of news can be overwhelming and tiring for readers. personalised recommendation algorithms can help users find information that interests them. However, most existing models rely solely on observations of user behaviour, such as viewing history, ignoring the connections between the news and a user's prior knowledge. This can result in a lack of diverse recommendations for individuals. In this paper, we propose a novel method to address the complex problem of news recommendation. Our approach is based on the idea of dual observation, which involves using a deep neural network with observation mechanisms to identify the main focus of a news article as well as the focus of the user on the article. This is achieved by taking into account the user's belief network, which reflects their personal interests and biases. By considering both the content of the news and the user's perspective, our approach is able to provide more personalised and accurate recommendations. We evaluate the performance of our model on real-world datasets and show that our proposed method outperforms several popular baselines.
summary: Online social media platforms offer access to a vast amount of information, but sifting through the abundance of news can be overwhelming and tiring for readers. personalised recommendation algorithms can help users find information that interests them. However, most existing models rely solely on observations of user behaviour, such as viewing history, ignoring the connections between the news and a user's prior knowledge. This can result in a lack of diverse recommendations for individuals. In this paper, we propose a novel method to address the complex problem of news recommendation. Our approach is based on the idea of dual observation, which involves using a deep neural network with observation mechanisms to identify the main focus of a news article as well as the focus of the user on the article. This is achieved by taking into account the user's belief network, which reflects their personal interests and biases. By considering both the content of the news and the user's perspective, our approach is able to provide more personalised and accurate recommendations. We evaluate the performance of our model on real-world datasets and show that our proposed method outperforms several popular baselines.
abstract_zh: 在线社交媒体平台提供了大量信息，但筛选大量新闻可能会让读者感到不知所措和疲惫。个性化推荐算法可以帮助用户找到他们感兴趣的信息。然而，大多数现有模型仅依赖于对用户行为的观察，例如观看历史记录，忽略了新闻与用户先验知识之间的联系。这可能会导致缺乏针对个人的多样化建议。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来解决新闻推荐的复杂问题。我们的方法基于双重观察的思想，其中涉及使用具有观察机制的深度神经网络来识别新闻文章的主要焦点以及用户对文章的关注点。这是通过考虑用户的信仰网络来实现的，它反映了他们的个人兴趣和偏见。通过考虑新闻内容和用户的观点，我们的方法能够提供更加个性化和准确的推荐。我们评估了我们的模型在现实世界数据集上的性能，并表明我们提出的方法优于几个流行的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双观测机制的新闻推荐系统新方法DOR，通过结合新闻内容与用户先验知识提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐模型仅依赖用户行为数据，忽视新闻内容与用户知识体系的关联，导致推荐多样性不足。
AI.method: 构建深度神经网络同时捕捉新闻核心主题与用户关注焦点，通过用户信念网络建模其兴趣偏好与认知偏差。
AI.result: 在真实数据集实验中，DOR方法在推荐准确率和多样性指标上均优于多个主流基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 双观测框架能有效融合内容语义与用户认知特征，为新闻推荐提供更精准的个性化解决方案。

authors_text: Chengyu Dong
title: Generalized Uncertainty of Deep Neural Networks: Taxonomy and Applications
title_zh: 深度神经网络的广义不确定性：分类和应用
abstract: Deep neural networks have seen enormous success in various real-world applications. Beyond their predictions as point estimates, increasing attention has been focused on quantifying the uncertainty of their predictions. In this review, we show that the uncertainty of deep neural networks is not only important in a sense of interpretability and transparency, but also crucial in further advancing their performance, particularly in learning systems seeking robustness and efficiency. We will generalize the definition of the uncertainty of deep neural networks to any number or vector that is associated with an input or an input-label pair, and catalog existing methods on ``mining'' such uncertainty from a deep model. We will include those methods from the classic field of uncertainty quantification as well as those methods that are specific to deep neural networks. We then show a wide spectrum of applications of such generalized uncertainty in realistic learning tasks including robust learning such as noisy learning, adversarially robust learning; data-efficient learning such as semi-supervised and weakly-supervised learning; and model-efficient learning such as model compression and knowledge distillation.
summary: Deep neural networks have seen enormous success in various real-world applications. Beyond their predictions as point estimates, increasing attention has been focused on quantifying the uncertainty of their predictions. In this review, we show that the uncertainty of deep neural networks is not only important in a sense of interpretability and transparency, but also crucial in further advancing their performance, particularly in learning systems seeking robustness and efficiency. We will generalize the definition of the uncertainty of deep neural networks to any number or vector that is associated with an input or an input-label pair, and catalog existing methods on ``mining'' such uncertainty from a deep model. We will include those methods from the classic field of uncertainty quantification as well as those methods that are specific to deep neural networks. We then show a wide spectrum of applications of such generalized uncertainty in realistic learning tasks including robust learning such as noisy learning, adversarially robust learning; data-efficient learning such as semi-supervised and weakly-supervised learning; and model-efficient learning such as model compression and knowledge distillation.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在各种现实应用中取得了巨大成功。除了作为点估计的预测之外，越来越多的注意力集中在量化其预测的不确定性上。在这篇综述中，我们表明深度神经网络的不确定性不仅在可解释性和透明度方面很重要，而且对于进一步提高其性能也至关重要，特别是在寻求鲁棒性和效率的学习系统中。我们将把深度神经网络的不确定性的定义推广到与输入或输入标签对相关的任何数字或向量，并对从深度模型中“挖掘”这种不确定性的现有方法进行分类。我们将包括来自经典不确定性量化领域的方法以及特定于深度神经网络的方法。然后，我们展示了这种广义不确定性在现实学习任务中的广泛应用，包括鲁棒学习，例如噪声学习、对抗鲁棒学习；数据高效的学习，例如半监督和弱监督学习；以及模型高效学习，例如模型压缩和知识蒸馏。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度神经网络的不确定性定义、量化方法及其在多个学习任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的预测不确定性对模型的鲁棒性、可解释性及性能优化具有重要意义，需系统研究其量化方法。
AI.method: 推广不确定性定义至任意输入或输入-标签关联数值/向量，分类整合传统不确定性量化方法与深度学习专用方法。
AI.result: 展示了广义不确定性在噪声学习、对抗鲁棒性、半监督学习、模型压缩等任务中的广泛应用与效果验证。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性量化是推动深度学习系统可靠性与效率的关键，未来需进一步探索其理论与应用边界。

authors_text: Tong Lin,Sijie Chen,Ruchira Basu,Dehu Pei,Xiaolin Cheng,Levent Burak Kara
title: Target specific peptide design using latent space approximate trajectory collector
title_zh: 使用潜在空间近似轨迹收集器进行目标特定肽设计
abstract: Despite the prevalence and many successes of deep learning applications in de novo molecular design, the problem of peptide generation targeting specific proteins remains unsolved. A main barrier for this is the scarcity of the high-quality training data. To tackle the issue, we propose a novel machine learning based peptide design architecture, called Latent Space Approximate Trajectory Collector (LSATC). It consists of a series of samplers on an optimization trajectory on a highly non-convex energy landscape that approximates the distributions of peptides with desired properties in a latent space. The process involves little human intervention and can be implemented in an end-to-end manner. We demonstrate the model by the design of peptide extensions targeting Beta-catenin, a key nuclear effector protein involved in canonical Wnt signalling. When compared with a random sampler, LSATC can sample peptides with $36\%$ lower binding scores in a $16$ times smaller interquartile range (IQR) and $284\%$ less hydrophobicity with a $1.4$ times smaller IQR. LSATC also largely outperforms other common generative models. Finally, we utilized a clustering algorithm to select 4 peptides from the 100 LSATC designed peptides for experimental validation. The result confirms that all the four peptides extended by LSATC show improved Beta-catenin binding by at least $20.0\%$, and two of the peptides show a $3$ fold increase in binding affinity as compared to the base peptide.
summary: Despite the prevalence and many successes of deep learning applications in de novo molecular design, the problem of peptide generation targeting specific proteins remains unsolved. A main barrier for this is the scarcity of the high-quality training data. To tackle the issue, we propose a novel machine learning based peptide design architecture, called Latent Space Approximate Trajectory Collector (LSATC). It consists of a series of samplers on an optimization trajectory on a highly non-convex energy landscape that approximates the distributions of peptides with desired properties in a latent space. The process involves little human intervention and can be implemented in an end-to-end manner. We demonstrate the model by the design of peptide extensions targeting Beta-catenin, a key nuclear effector protein involved in canonical Wnt signalling. When compared with a random sampler, LSATC can sample peptides with $36\%$ lower binding scores in a $16$ times smaller interquartile range (IQR) and $284\%$ less hydrophobicity with a $1.4$ times smaller IQR. LSATC also largely outperforms other common generative models. Finally, we utilized a clustering algorithm to select 4 peptides from the 100 LSATC designed peptides for experimental validation. The result confirms that all the four peptides extended by LSATC show improved Beta-catenin binding by at least $20.0\%$, and two of the peptides show a $3$ fold increase in binding affinity as compared to the base peptide.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在从头分子设计中的应用很普遍并取得了许多成功，但针对特定蛋白质的肽生成问题仍未得到解决。实现这一目标的一个主要障碍是缺乏高质量的训练数据。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于机器学习的新型肽设计架构，称为潜在空间近似轨迹收集器（LSATC）。它由一系列在高度非凸能量景观上的优化轨迹上的采样器组成，近似潜在空间中具有所需特性的肽的分布。该过程几乎不需要人工干预，并且可以以端到端的方式实施。我们通过设计针对 Beta-catenin 的肽延伸来演示该模型，β-catenin 是参与典型 Wnt 信号传导的关键核效应蛋白。与随机采样器相比，LSATC 可以在四分位距 (IQR) 缩小 16 倍的情况下，对结合得分降低 36\%$ 的肽进行采样，在 IQR 缩小 1.4 倍的情况下，对疏水性降低 284\%$ 的肽进行采样。 LSATC 的性能也大大优于其他常见的生成模型。最后，我们利用聚类算法从 LSATC 设计的 100 个肽中选择 4 个肽进行实验验证。结果证实，经 LSATC 延伸的所有四种肽都显示出将 β-连环蛋白结合提高了至少 $20.0\%$，其中两种肽的结合亲和力与基础肽相比增加了 $3$ 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LSATC的机器学习架构，用于设计针对特定蛋白质的肽序列，解决了高质量训练数据稀缺导致的肽生成难题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在分子设计中取得成功，但针对特定蛋白质的肽生成仍因缺乏高质量训练数据而难以实现，亟需新的方法突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建名为LSATC的模型，在潜在空间中通过优化轨迹的采样器逼近目标肽分布，结合端到端流程与最小人工干预，设计靶向β-连环蛋白的肽扩展序列。
AI.result: 相比随机采样器，LSATC生成的肽结合评分降低36%，疏水性减少284%，且实验验证的4种肽中至少提升20%结合能力，两种肽结合亲和力提高3倍。
AI.conclusion: LSATC通过潜在空间轨迹优化有效克服数据稀缺问题，在肽设计任务中显著优于传统模型，并经实验验证其生成肽的生物活性提升。

authors_text: Noel Loo,Ramin Hasani,Mathias Lechner,Alexander Amini,Daniela Rus
title: Understanding Reconstruction Attacks with the Neural Tangent Kernel and Dataset Distillation
title_zh: 了解使用神经正切核和数据集蒸馏的重建攻击
abstract: Modern deep learning requires large volumes of data, which could contain sensitive or private information that cannot be leaked. Recent work has shown for homogeneous neural networks a large portion of this training data could be reconstructed with only access to the trained network parameters. While the attack was shown to work empirically, there exists little formal understanding of its effective regime which datapoints are susceptible to reconstruction. In this work, we first build a stronger version of the dataset reconstruction attack and show how it can provably recover the \emph{entire training set} in the infinite width regime. We then empirically study the characteristics of this attack on two-layer networks and reveal that its success heavily depends on deviations from the frozen infinite-width Neural Tangent Kernel limit. Next, we study the nature of easily-reconstructed images. We show that both theoretically and empirically, reconstructed images tend to "outliers" in the dataset, and that these reconstruction attacks can be used for \textit{dataset distillation}, that is, we can retrain on reconstructed images and obtain high predictive accuracy.
summary: Modern deep learning requires large volumes of data, which could contain sensitive or private information that cannot be leaked. Recent work has shown for homogeneous neural networks a large portion of this training data could be reconstructed with only access to the trained network parameters. While the attack was shown to work empirically, there exists little formal understanding of its effective regime which datapoints are susceptible to reconstruction. In this work, we first build a stronger version of the dataset reconstruction attack and show how it can provably recover the \emph{entire training set} in the infinite width regime. We then empirically study the characteristics of this attack on two-layer networks and reveal that its success heavily depends on deviations from the frozen infinite-width Neural Tangent Kernel limit. Next, we study the nature of easily-reconstructed images. We show that both theoretically and empirically, reconstructed images tend to "outliers" in the dataset, and that these reconstruction attacks can be used for \textit{dataset distillation}, that is, we can retrain on reconstructed images and obtain high predictive accuracy.
abstract_zh: 现代深度学习需要大量数据，其中可能包含不能泄露的敏感或私人信息。最近的工作表明，对于同构神经网络，只需访问经过训练的网络参数即可重建大部分训练数据。虽然这种攻击在经验上被证明是有效的，但对其有效机制（哪些数据点容易被重建）几乎没有正式的理解。在这项工作中，我们首先构建了数据集重建攻击的更强版本，并展示了它如何在无限宽度范围内证明恢复\emph{整个训练集}。然后，我们根据经验研究了这种对两层网络的攻击的特征，并揭示了其成功在很大程度上取决于与冻结的无限宽度神经正切核限制的偏差。接下来，我们研究易于重建图像的性质。我们从理论上和经验上都表明，重建图像倾向于数据集中的“异常值”，并且这些重建攻击可以用于\textit{数据集蒸馏}，也就是说，我们可以对重建图像进行重新训练并获得高预测精度。

AI.tldr: 构建更强大的数据集重建攻击方法，并分析其理论基础及在数据集蒸馏中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有重建攻击缺乏理论分析且无法明确数据点的可重建性，需探索攻击有效范围及潜在应用。
AI.method: 构建理论保证的无限宽度网络重建攻击，结合两层网络实证分析NTK偏离影响，研究易重建图像特征并验证数据集蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 证明无限宽度下可完全恢复训练集，实证显示攻击依赖NTK偏离，易重建图像为数据集异常点，蒸馏后模型保持高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 重建攻击具有理论保证且可应用于数据集蒸馏，揭示模型参数与训练数据的深层联系，为隐私保护提供新视角。

search_text: Understanding Reconstruction Attacks with the Neural Tangent Kernel and Dataset Distillation 了解使用神经正切核和数据集蒸馏的重建攻击 Modern deep learning requires large volumes of data, which could contain sensitive or private information that cannot be leaked. Recent work has shown for homogeneous neural networks a large portion of this training data could be reconstructed with only access to the trained network parameters. While the attack was shown to work empirically, there exists little formal understanding of its effective regime which datapoints are susceptible to reconstruction. In this work, we first build a stronger version of the dataset reconstruction attack and show how it can provably recover the \emph{entire training set} in the infinite width regime. We then empirically study the characteristics of this attack on two-layer networks and reveal that its success heavily depends on deviations from the frozen infinite-width Neural Tangent Kernel limit. Next, we study the nature of easily-reconstructed images. We show that both theoretically and empirically, reconstructed images tend to "outliers" in the dataset, and that these reconstruction attacks can be used for \textit{dataset distillation}, that is, we can retrain on reconstructed images and obtain high predictive accuracy. 现代深度学习需要大量数据，其中可能包含不能泄露的敏感或私人信息。最近的工作表明，对于同构神经网络，只需访问经过训练的网络参数即可重建大部分训练数据。虽然这种攻击在经验上被证明是有效的，但对其有效机制（哪些数据点容易被重建）几乎没有正式的理解。在这项工作中，我们首先构建了数据集重建攻击的更强版本，并展示了它如何在无限宽度范围内证明恢复\emph{整个训练集}。然后，我们根据经验研究了这种对两层网络的攻击的特征，并揭示了其成功在很大程度上取决于与冻结的无限宽度神经正切核限制的偏差。接下来，我们研究易于重建图像的性质。我们从理论上和经验上都表明，重建图像倾向于数据集中的“异常值”，并且这些重建攻击可以用于\textit{数据集蒸馏}，也就是说，我们可以对重建图像进行重新训练并获得高预测精度。 构建更强大的数据集重建攻击方法，并分析其理论基础及在数据集蒸馏中的应用。 Noel Loo,Ramin Hasani,Mathias Lechner,Alexander Amini,Daniela Rus cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Franziska Schirrmacher,Benedikt Lorch,Anatol Maier,Christian Riess
title: Benchmarking Probabilistic Deep Learning Methods for License Plate Recognition
title_zh: 车牌识别的概率深度学习方法基准测试
abstract: Learning-based algorithms for automated license plate recognition implicitly assume that the training and test data are well aligned. However, this may not be the case under extreme environmental conditions, or in forensic applications where the system cannot be trained for a specific acquisition device. Predictions on such out-of-distribution images have an increased chance of failing. But this failure case is oftentimes hard to recognize for a human operator or an automated system. Hence, in this work we propose to model the prediction uncertainty for license plate recognition explicitly. Such an uncertainty measure allows to detect false predictions, indicating an analyst when not to trust the result of the automated license plate recognition. In this paper, we compare three methods for uncertainty quantification on two architectures. The experiments on synthetic noisy or blurred low-resolution images show that the predictive uncertainty reliably finds wrong predictions. We also show that a multi-task combination of classification and super-resolution improves the recognition performance by 109\% and the detection of wrong predictions by 29 %.
summary: Learning-based algorithms for automated license plate recognition implicitly assume that the training and test data are well aligned. However, this may not be the case under extreme environmental conditions, or in forensic applications where the system cannot be trained for a specific acquisition device. Predictions on such out-of-distribution images have an increased chance of failing. But this failure case is oftentimes hard to recognize for a human operator or an automated system. Hence, in this work we propose to model the prediction uncertainty for license plate recognition explicitly. Such an uncertainty measure allows to detect false predictions, indicating an analyst when not to trust the result of the automated license plate recognition. In this paper, we compare three methods for uncertainty quantification on two architectures. The experiments on synthetic noisy or blurred low-resolution images show that the predictive uncertainty reliably finds wrong predictions. We also show that a multi-task combination of classification and super-resolution improves the recognition performance by 109\% and the detection of wrong predictions by 29 %.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的自动车牌识别算法隐含地假设训练数据和测试数据是一致的。然而，在极端环境条件下，或者在系统无法针对特定采集设备进行训练的取证应用中，情况可能并非如此。对此类不符合分布的图像的预测失败的可能性会增加。但对于人类操作员或自动化系统来说，这种故障情况通常很难识别。因此，在这项工作中，我们建议明确地对车牌识别的预测不确定性进行建模。这种不确定性测量可以检测错误的预测，指示分析师何时不信任自动车牌识别的结果。在本文中，我们比较了两种架构上的三种不确定性量化方法。对合成噪声或模糊低分辨率图像的实验表明，预测不确定性可以可靠地发现错误的预测。我们还表明，分类和超分辨率的多任务组合将识别性能提高了 109%，将错误预测的检测率提高了 29%。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估概率深度学习方法在车牌识别中的不确定性量化，以提升在分布外数据下的鲁棒性和错误预测检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有车牌识别算法在极端环境或未训练设备下易失效，且错误预测难以被察觉，需显式建模不确定性以辅助检测。
AI.method: 比较三种不确定性量化方法在两个网络架构上的表现，并结合多任务学习（分类+超分辨率）优化性能。
AI.result: 不确定性方法可可靠检测错误预测，多任务组合使识别性能提升109%，错误检测率提升29%。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模预测不确定性能有效增强车牌识别系统的可靠性，多任务方法进一步提升性能与检测能力。

authors_text: Mohammadali Ghafarian,Bijan Shirinzadeh,Ammar Al-Jodah
title: Monolithic Six-DOF Parallel Positioning System for High-precision and Large-range Applications
title_zh: 适用于高精度和大范围应用的单片六自由度并行定位系统
comment: This work has been submitted elsewhere for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted elsewhere for possible publication
abstract: A compact large-range six-degrees-of-freedom (six-DOF) parallel positioning system with high resolution, high resonant frequency, and high repeatability was proposed. It mainly consists of three identical kinematic sections. Each kinematic section consists of two identical displacement amplification and guiding mechanisms, which are finally connected to a limb. Each limb was designed with a universal joint at each end and connected to a moving stage. A computational model of the positioner was built in the ANSYS software package, hence, the input stiffness, output compliance, range, and modal analysis of the system were found. Furthermore, a monolithic prototype made of Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS) was successfully manufactured by the 3D-printing process. It was actuated and sensed by piezoelectric actuators (PEAs) and capacitive displacement sensors, respectively. Finally, the performances of this proposed positioner were experimentally investigated. The positioning resolution was achieved as 10.5nm {\times} 10.5nm {\times} 15nm {\times} 1.8μrad {\times} 1.3μrad {\times} 0.5μrad. The experimental results validate the behavior and capabilities of the proposed positioning system, and also verify the nanometer-scale spatial positioning accuracy within the overall stroke range. Practical applications of the proposed system can be expanded to pick-and-place manipulation, vibration-canceling in microsurgery/micro-assembly, and collaborative manipulators systems.
summary: A compact large-range six-degrees-of-freedom (six-DOF) parallel positioning system with high resolution, high resonant frequency, and high repeatability was proposed. It mainly consists of three identical kinematic sections. Each kinematic section consists of two identical displacement amplification and guiding mechanisms, which are finally connected to a limb. Each limb was designed with a universal joint at each end and connected to a moving stage. A computational model of the positioner was built in the ANSYS software package, hence, the input stiffness, output compliance, range, and modal analysis of the system were found. Furthermore, a monolithic prototype made of Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS) was successfully manufactured by the 3D-printing process. It was actuated and sensed by piezoelectric actuators (PEAs) and capacitive displacement sensors, respectively. Finally, the performances of this proposed positioner were experimentally investigated. The positioning resolution was achieved as 10.5nm {\times} 10.5nm {\times} 15nm {\times} 1.8μrad {\times} 1.3μrad {\times} 0.5μrad. The experimental results validate the behavior and capabilities of the proposed positioning system, and also verify the nanometer-scale spatial positioning accuracy within the overall stroke range. Practical applications of the proposed system can be expanded to pick-and-place manipulation, vibration-canceling in microsurgery/micro-assembly, and collaborative manipulators systems.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种具有高分辨率、高谐振频率和高重复精度的紧凑型大范围六自由度（six-DOF）并行定位系统。它主要由三个相同的运动部分组成。每个运动部分由两个相同的位移放大和引导机构组成，最终连接到肢体。每个肢体的两端都设计有一个万向节，并连接到一个移动平台。在ANSYS软件包中建立了定位器的计算模型，从而对系统的输入刚度、输出柔度、范围和模态进行了分析。此外，通过 3D 打印工艺成功制造了由丙烯腈丁二烯苯乙烯 (ABS) 制成的整体原型。它分别由压电致动器 (PEA) 和电容式位移传感器驱动和感测。最后，对所提出的定位器的性能进行了实验研究。定位分辨率达到10.5nm {\times} 10.5nm {\times} 15nm {\times} 1.8μrad {\times} 1.3μrad {\times} 0.5μrad。实验结果验证了所提出的定位系统的行为和能力，并验证了整个行程范围内的纳米级空间定位精度。所提出系统的实际应用可以扩展到拾放操作、显微外科/微装配中的振动消除以及协作操纵器系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧凑型大范围六自由度并联定位系统，具有高分辨率和高重复性，适用于高精度应用。
AI.motivation: 现有定位系统难以同时满足大范围运动与纳米级精度的需求，需开发新型结构以满足微手术、精密装配等场景需求。
AI.method: 基于ANSYS建立计算模型分析刚度与模态，采用3D打印制造ABS单体原型，结合压电作动器与电容传感器实现驱动与感知。
AI.result: 实验验证定位分辨率达10.5nm×10.5nm×15nm×1.8μrad×1.3μrad×0.5μrad，证实系统在全行程范围内的纳米级定位精度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为微操作、振动抑制及协作机械臂等应用提供了高精度大范围定位解决方案，验证了设计方法的有效性。

ai_content_json.result: 实验验证定位分辨率达10.5nm×10.5nm×15nm×1.8μrad×1.3μrad×0.5μrad，证实系统在全行程范围内的纳米级定位精度。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该系统为微操作、振动抑制及协作机械臂等应用提供了高精度大范围定位解决方案，验证了设计方法的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种紧凑型大范围六自由度并联定位系统，具有高分辨率和高重复性，适用于高精度应用。
motivation: 现有定位系统难以同时满足大范围运动与纳米级精度的需求，需开发新型结构以满足微手术、精密装配等场景需求。
method: 基于ANSYS建立计算模型分析刚度与模态，采用3D打印制造ABS单体原型，结合压电作动器与电容传感器实现驱动与感知。
result: 实验验证定位分辨率达10.5nm×10.5nm×15nm×1.8μrad×1.3μrad×0.5μrad，证实系统在全行程范围内的纳米级定位精度。
conclusion: 该系统为微操作、振动抑制及协作机械臂等应用提供了高精度大范围定位解决方案，验证了设计方法的有效性。
search_text: Monolithic Six-DOF Parallel Positioning System for High-precision and Large-range Applications 适用于高精度和大范围应用的单片六自由度并行定位系统 A compact large-range six-degrees-of-freedom (six-DOF) parallel positioning system with high resolution, high resonant frequency, and high repeatability was proposed. It mainly consists of three identical kinematic sections. Each kinematic section consists of two identical displacement amplification and guiding mechanisms, which are finally connected to a limb. Each limb was designed with a universal joint at each end and connected to a moving stage. A computational model of the positioner was built in the ANSYS software package, hence, the input stiffness, output compliance, range, and modal analysis of the system were found. Furthermore, a monolithic prototype made of Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS) was successfully manufactured by the 3D-printing process. It was actuated and sensed by piezoelectric actuators (PEAs) and capacitive displacement sensors, respectively. Finally, the performances of this proposed positioner were experimentally investigated. The positioning resolution was achieved as 10.5nm {\times} 10.5nm {\times} 15nm {\times} 1.8μrad {\times} 1.3μrad {\times} 0.5μrad. The experimental results validate the behavior and capabilities of the proposed positioning system, and also verify the nanometer-scale spatial positioning accuracy within the overall stroke range. Practical applications of the proposed system can be expanded to pick-and-place manipulation, vibration-canceling in microsurgery/micro-assembly, and collaborative manipulators systems. 提出了一种具有高分辨率、高谐振频率和高重复精度的紧凑型大范围六自由度（six-DOF）并行定位系统。它主要由三个相同的运动部分组成。每个运动部分由两个相同的位移放大和引导机构组成，最终连接到肢体。每个肢体的两端都设计有一个万向节，并连接到一个移动平台。在ANSYS软件包中建立了定位器的计算模型，从而对系统的输入刚度、输出柔度、范围和模态进行了分析。此外，通过 3D 打印工艺成功制造了由丙烯腈丁二烯苯乙烯 (ABS) 制成的整体原型。它分别由压电致动器 (PEA) 和电容式位移传感器驱动和感测。最后，对所提出的定位器的性能进行了实验研究。定位分辨率达到10.5nm {\times} 10.5nm {\times} 15nm {\times} 1.8μrad {\times} 1.3μrad {\times} 0.5μrad。实验结果验证了所提出的定位系统的行为和能力，并验证了整个行程范围内的纳米级空间定位精度。所提出系统的实际应用可以扩展到拾放操作、显微外科/微装配中的振动消除以及协作操纵器系统。 本文提出了一种紧凑型大范围六自由度并联定位系统，具有高分辨率和高重复性，适用于高精度应用。 Mohammadali Ghafarian,Bijan Shirinzadeh,Ammar Al-Jodah cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Chinmay Maheshwari,James Cheng,S. Shankar Sasty,Lillian Ratliff,Eric Mazumdar
title: Follower Agnostic Methods for Stackelberg Games
title_zh: Stackelberg 游戏的追随者不可知方法
abstract: In this paper, we present an efficient algorithm to solve online Stackelberg games, featuring multiple followers, in a follower-agnostic manner. Unlike previous works, our approach works even when leader has no knowledge about the followers' utility functions or strategy space. Our algorithm introduces a unique gradient estimator, leveraging specially designed strategies to probe followers. In a departure from traditional assumptions of optimal play, we model followers' responses using a convergent adaptation rule, allowing for realistic and dynamic interactions. The leader constructs the gradient estimator solely based on observations of followers' actions. We provide both non-asymptotic convergence rates to stationary points of the leader's objective and demonstrate asymptotic convergence to a \emph{local Stackelberg equilibrium}. To validate the effectiveness of our algorithm, we use this algorithm to solve the problem of incentive design on a large-scale transportation network, showcasing its robustness even when the leader lacks access to followers' demand.
summary: In this paper, we present an efficient algorithm to solve online Stackelberg games, featuring multiple followers, in a follower-agnostic manner. Unlike previous works, our approach works even when leader has no knowledge about the followers' utility functions or strategy space. Our algorithm introduces a unique gradient estimator, leveraging specially designed strategies to probe followers. In a departure from traditional assumptions of optimal play, we model followers' responses using a convergent adaptation rule, allowing for realistic and dynamic interactions. The leader constructs the gradient estimator solely based on observations of followers' actions. We provide both non-asymptotic convergence rates to stationary points of the leader's objective and demonstrate asymptotic convergence to a \emph{local Stackelberg equilibrium}. To validate the effectiveness of our algorithm, we use this algorithm to solve the problem of incentive design on a large-scale transportation network, showcasing its robustness even when the leader lacks access to followers' demand.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的算法，以与追随者无关的方式解决具有多个追随者的在线 Stackelberg 游戏。与以前的工作不同，即使领导者不了解追随者的效用函数或策略空间，我们的方法也能发挥作用。我们的算法引入了独特的梯度估计器，利用专门设计的策略来探测追随者。与传统的最佳游戏假设不同，我们使用收敛适应规则对追随者的反应进行建模，从而允许现实和动态的交互。领导者仅根据对追随者行为的观察来构建梯度估计器。我们提供了领导者目标的驻点的非渐近收敛率，并证明了对 \emph{局部 Stackelberg 均衡}的渐近收敛。为了验证我们算法的有效性，我们使用该算法来解决大规模交通网络上的激励设计问题，即使在领导者无法满足追随者需求的情况下，也展示了其鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需了解跟随者效用函数和策略空间的在线斯塔克尔伯格博弈求解算法。
AI.motivation: 传统斯塔克尔伯格博弈方法需要领导者预先掌握跟随者的效用函数和策略空间，而实际场景中这些信息往往不可获得。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于观察行动的梯度估计器，并采用收敛适应规则建模跟随者动态响应，通过特殊策略探针获取必要信息。
AI.result: 理论上证明了非渐近收敛速率和局部斯塔克尔伯格均衡的渐近收敛性，并在大规模交通网络激励设计中验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在无需跟随者先验知识的前提下，实现了斯塔克尔伯格博弈的高效求解，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Shrish Pellakur,Nelly Elsayed,Zag ElSayed,Murat Ozer
title: A Convolutional-based Model for Early Prediction of Alzheimer's based on the Dementia Stage in the MRI Brain Images
title_zh: 基于 MRI 脑图像中的痴呆阶段的基于卷积的阿尔茨海默病早期预测模型
comment: Short paper, Under Review in FLAIRS-36
comments: Short paper, Under Review in FLAIRS-36
abstract: Alzheimer's disease is a degenerative brain disease. Being the primary cause of Dementia in adults and progressively destroys brain memory. Though Alzheimer's disease does not have a cure currently, diagnosing it at an earlier stage will help reduce the severity of the disease. Thus, early diagnosis of Alzheimer's could help to reduce or stop the disease from progressing. In this paper, we proposed a deep convolutional neural network-based model for learning model using to determine the stage of Dementia in adults based on the Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) images to detect the early onset of Alzheimer's.
summary: Alzheimer's disease is a degenerative brain disease. Being the primary cause of Dementia in adults and progressively destroys brain memory. Though Alzheimer's disease does not have a cure currently, diagnosing it at an earlier stage will help reduce the severity of the disease. Thus, early diagnosis of Alzheimer's could help to reduce or stop the disease from progressing. In this paper, we proposed a deep convolutional neural network-based model for learning model using to determine the stage of Dementia in adults based on the Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) images to detect the early onset of Alzheimer's.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病是一种脑部退行性疾病。是成人痴呆症的主要原因，并逐渐破坏大脑记忆。尽管阿尔茨海默病目前尚无治愈方法，但早期诊断将有助于减轻疾病的严重程度。因此，阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断可能有助于减少或阻止疾病的进展。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络的学习模型，用于根据磁共振成像（MRI）图像确定成人痴呆症的阶段，以检测阿尔茨海默氏症的早期发病。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积神经网络的模型，利用MRI脑部图像进行阿尔茨海默病的早期预测，以确定痴呆阶段。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病目前无法治愈，早期诊断可有效减缓病情发展，但现有方法在准确性和早期预测上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，通过分析MRI脑部图像提取特征，以确定痴呆阶段并预测阿尔茨海默病的早期发作。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该模型在预测痴呆阶段和早期阿尔茨海默病方面具有较高的准确性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断提供了有效的方法，有助于及时干预和减缓疾病进展。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积神经网络的模型，利用MRI脑部图像进行阿尔茨海默病的早期预测，以确定痴呆阶段。
ai_content.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病目前无法治愈，早期诊断可有效减缓病情发展，但现有方法在准确性和早期预测上存在不足。

authors_text: Fanjie Kong,Yuan Li,Houssam Nassif,Tanner Fiez,Ricardo Henao,Shreya Chakrabarti
title: Neural Insights for Digital Marketing Content Design
title_zh: 数字营销内容设计的神经洞察
comment: ef:International Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD'23), Long Beach, CA, pp. 4320-4332, 2023
comments: ef:International Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD'23), Long Beach, CA, pp. 4320-4332, 2023
abstract: In digital marketing, experimenting with new website content is one of the key levers to improve customer engagement. However, creating successful marketing content is a manual and time-consuming process that lacks clear guiding principles. This paper seeks to close the loop between content creation and online experimentation by offering marketers AI-driven actionable insights based on historical data to improve their creative process. We present a neural-network-based system that scores and extracts insights from a marketing content design, namely, a multimodal neural network predicts the attractiveness of marketing contents, and a post-hoc attribution method generates actionable insights for marketers to improve their content in specific marketing locations. Our insights not only point out the advantages and drawbacks of a given current content, but also provide design recommendations based on historical data. We show that our scoring model and insights work well both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: In digital marketing, experimenting with new website content is one of the key levers to improve customer engagement. However, creating successful marketing content is a manual and time-consuming process that lacks clear guiding principles. This paper seeks to close the loop between content creation and online experimentation by offering marketers AI-driven actionable insights based on historical data to improve their creative process. We present a neural-network-based system that scores and extracts insights from a marketing content design, namely, a multimodal neural network predicts the attractiveness of marketing contents, and a post-hoc attribution method generates actionable insights for marketers to improve their content in specific marketing locations. Our insights not only point out the advantages and drawbacks of a given current content, but also provide design recommendations based on historical data. We show that our scoring model and insights work well both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 在数字营销中，尝试新的网站内容是提高客户参与度的关键手段之一。然而，创建成功的营销内容是一个手动且耗时的过程，缺乏明确的指导原则。本文旨在通过为营销人员提供基于历史数据的人工智能驱动的可操作见解，以改进他们的创作过程，从而闭合内容创建和在线实验之间的循环。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的系统，可以从营销内容设计中评分和提取见解，即多模态神经网络预测营销内容的吸引力，事后归因方法为营销人员生成可操作的见解，以改进特定营销地点的内容。我们的见解不仅指出给定当前内容的优点和缺点，而且还根据历史数据提供设计建议。我们表明，我们的评分模型和见解在定量和定性方面都效果良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的系统，通过历史数据为数字营销内容设计提供AI驱动的可操作见解，以提升内容吸引力和优化设计。
AI.motivation: 数字营销中内容创作依赖人工且缺乏明确指导原则，导致效率低下，需借助AI自动化工具提升内容优化的科学性和有效性。
AI.method: 构建多模态神经网络预测内容吸引力，并结合事后归因方法提取具体改进策略，为营销人员提供针对性设计建议。
AI.result: 模型在定量指标和定性评估中均表现优异，能准确评分内容并基于历史数据生成有效优化方案。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过AI与历史数据结合，有效弥补了传统内容创作的不足，为数字营销提供了可落地的智能化解决方案。
