search_text: Neural Insights for Digital Marketing Content Design 数字营销内容设计的神经洞察 In digital marketing, experimenting with new website content is one of the key levers to improve customer engagement. However, creating successful marketing content is a manual and time-consuming process that lacks clear guiding principles. This paper seeks to close the loop between content creation and online experimentation by offering marketers AI-driven actionable insights based on historical data to improve their creative process. We present a neural-network-based system that scores and extracts insights from a marketing content design, namely, a multimodal neural network predicts the attractiveness of marketing contents, and a post-hoc attribution method generates actionable insights for marketers to improve their content in specific marketing locations. Our insights not only point out the advantages and drawbacks of a given current content, but also provide design recommendations based on historical data. We show that our scoring model and insights work well both quantitatively and qualitatively. 在数字营销中，尝试新的网站内容是提高客户参与度的关键手段之一。然而，创建成功的营销内容是一个手动且耗时的过程，缺乏明确的指导原则。本文旨在通过为营销人员提供基于历史数据的人工智能驱动的可操作见解，以改进他们的创作过程，从而闭合内容创建和在线实验之间的循环。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的系统，可以从营销内容设计中评分和提取见解，即多模态神经网络预测营销内容的吸引力，事后归因方法为营销人员生成可操作的见解，以改进特定营销地点的内容。我们的见解不仅指出给定当前内容的优点和缺点，而且还根据历史数据提供设计建议。我们表明，我们的评分模型和见解在定量和定性方面都效果良好。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的系统，通过历史数据为数字营销内容设计提供AI驱动的可操作见解，以提升内容吸引力和优化设计。 Fanjie Kong,Yuan Li,Houssam Nassif,Tanner Fiez,Ricardo Henao,Shreya Chakrabarti cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yun Yue,Fangzhou Lin,Kazunori D Yamada,Ziming Zhang
title: Hyperbolic Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 双曲对比学习
abstract: Learning good image representations that are beneficial to downstream tasks is a challenging task in computer vision. As such, a wide variety of self-supervised learning approaches have been proposed. Among them, contrastive learning has shown competitive performance on several benchmark datasets. The embeddings of contrastive learning are arranged on a hypersphere that results in using the inner (dot) product as a distance measurement in Euclidean space. However, the underlying structure of many scientific fields like social networks, brain imaging, and computer graphics data exhibit highly non-Euclidean latent geometry. We propose a novel contrastive learning framework to learn semantic relationships in the hyperbolic space. Hyperbolic space is a continuous version of trees that naturally owns the ability to model hierarchical structures and is thus beneficial for efficient contrastive representation learning. We also extend the proposed Hyperbolic Contrastive Learning (HCL) to the supervised domain and studied the adversarial robustness of HCL. The comprehensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves better results on self-supervised pretraining, supervised classification, and higher robust accuracy than baseline methods.
summary: Learning good image representations that are beneficial to downstream tasks is a challenging task in computer vision. As such, a wide variety of self-supervised learning approaches have been proposed. Among them, contrastive learning has shown competitive performance on several benchmark datasets. The embeddings of contrastive learning are arranged on a hypersphere that results in using the inner (dot) product as a distance measurement in Euclidean space. However, the underlying structure of many scientific fields like social networks, brain imaging, and computer graphics data exhibit highly non-Euclidean latent geometry. We propose a novel contrastive learning framework to learn semantic relationships in the hyperbolic space. Hyperbolic space is a continuous version of trees that naturally owns the ability to model hierarchical structures and is thus beneficial for efficient contrastive representation learning. We also extend the proposed Hyperbolic Contrastive Learning (HCL) to the supervised domain and studied the adversarial robustness of HCL. The comprehensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves better results on self-supervised pretraining, supervised classification, and higher robust accuracy than baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 学习有利于下游任务的良好图像表示是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，人们提出了各种各样的自我监督学习方法。其中，对比学习在多个基准数据集上表现出了有竞争力的表现。对比学习的嵌入被安排在超球面上，导致使用内（点）积作为欧几里德空间中的距离测量。然而，许多科学领域（如社交网络、脑成像和计算机图形数据）的底层结构表现出高度非欧几里得潜在几何学。我们提出了一种新颖的对比学习框架来学习双曲空间中的语义关系。双曲空间是树的连续版本，天然具有建模层次结构的能力，因此有利于高效的对比表示学习。我们还将提出的双曲对比学习（HCL）扩展到监督领域，并研究了 HCL 的对抗鲁棒性。综合实验表明，我们提出的方法在自监督预训练、监督分类方面取得了比基线方法更好的结果，并且具有更高的鲁棒精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在双曲空间中进行对比学习的新框架，以更好地建模具有层次结构的数据。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习在欧几里得空间中难以有效处理社交网络、脑成像等领域的非欧几里得几何结构数据。
AI.method: 设计Hyperbolic Contrastive Learning（HCL）框架，利用双曲空间的层次建模能力，并扩展至监督学习与对抗鲁棒性分析。
AI.result: HCL在自监督预训练、监督分类及对抗鲁棒性任务中均优于基线方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间对比学习能更高效捕捉数据层次关系，为多任务场景提供更优表示学习方案。

authors_text: Wolfgang Messner
title: Hypothesis Testing and Machine Learning: Interpreting Variable Effects in Deep Artificial Neural Networks using Cohen's f2
title_zh: 假设检验和机器学习：使用 Cohen 的 f2 解释深度人工神经网络中的变量效应
abstract: Deep artificial neural networks show high predictive performance in many fields, but they do not afford statistical inferences and their black-box operations are too complicated for humans to comprehend. Because positing that a relationship exists is often more important than prediction in scientific experiments and research models, machine learning is far less frequently used than inferential statistics. Additionally, statistics calls for improving the test of theory by showing the magnitude of the phenomena being studied. This article extends current XAI methods and develops a model agnostic hypothesis testing framework for machine learning. First, Fisher's variable permutation algorithm is tweaked to compute an effect size measure equivalent to Cohen's f2 for OLS regression models. Second, the Mann-Kendall test of monotonicity and the Theil-Sen estimator is applied to Apley's accumulated local effect plots to specify a variable's direction of influence and statistical significance. The usefulness of this approach is demonstrated on an artificial data set and a social survey with a Python sandbox implementation.
summary: Deep artificial neural networks show high predictive performance in many fields, but they do not afford statistical inferences and their black-box operations are too complicated for humans to comprehend. Because positing that a relationship exists is often more important than prediction in scientific experiments and research models, machine learning is far less frequently used than inferential statistics. Additionally, statistics calls for improving the test of theory by showing the magnitude of the phenomena being studied. This article extends current XAI methods and develops a model agnostic hypothesis testing framework for machine learning. First, Fisher's variable permutation algorithm is tweaked to compute an effect size measure equivalent to Cohen's f2 for OLS regression models. Second, the Mann-Kendall test of monotonicity and the Theil-Sen estimator is applied to Apley's accumulated local effect plots to specify a variable's direction of influence and statistical significance. The usefulness of this approach is demonstrated on an artificial data set and a social survey with a Python sandbox implementation.
abstract_zh: 深度人工神经网络在许多领域表现出很高的预测性能，但它们不提供统计推断，而且它们的黑盒操作对于人类来说过于复杂而难以理解。由于在科学实验和研究模型中假设存在某种关系通常比预测更重要，因此机器学习的使用频率远远低于推论统计。此外，统计学要求通过显示所研究现象的规模来改进理论检验。本文扩展了当前的 XAI 方法，并开发了一个用于机器学习的模型不可知假设检验框架。首先，对 Fisher 的变量排列算法进行调整，以计算相当于 OLS 回归模型的 Cohen f2 的效应大小度量。其次，将 Mann-Kendall 单调性检验和 Theil-Sen 估计量应用于 Apley 的累积局部效应图，以指定变量的影响方向和统计显着性。这种方法的实用性在人工数据集和使用 Python 沙箱实现的社会调查中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Cohen's f2的假设检验框架，用于解释深度人工神经网络中变量的影响，结合可解释AI（XAI）方法提升机器学习模型的统计推断能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽具有高预测性能，但缺乏统计推断能力且模型复杂度高，难以满足科学研究中对变量关系验证的需求，统计学方法在理论检验中的作用更受重视。
AI.method: 改进Fisher变量置换算法计算Cohen's f2效应量，结合Mann-Kendall单调性检验和Theil-Sen估计器分析Apley累积局部效应图，实现变量影响方向与显著性判定。
AI.result: 该方法在人工数据集和社会调查数据上验证有效，通过Python沙盒实现展示了变量效应的统计显著性分析能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器学习模型提供了统计假设检验能力，弥合了预测模型与推论统计间的鸿沟，增强了深度学习在科学实验中的可解释性与适用性。

method: 改进Fisher变量置换算法计算Cohen's f2效应量，结合Mann-Kendall单调性检验和Theil-Sen估计器分析Apley累积局部效应图，实现变量影响方向与显著性判定。
result: 该方法在人工数据集和社会调查数据上验证有效，通过Python沙盒实现展示了变量效应的统计显著性分析能力。
conclusion: 该框架为机器学习模型提供了统计假设检验能力，弥合了预测模型与推论统计间的鸿沟，增强了深度学习在科学实验中的可解释性与适用性。
search_text: Hypothesis Testing and Machine Learning: Interpreting Variable Effects in Deep Artificial Neural Networks using Cohen's f2 假设检验和机器学习：使用 Cohen 的 f2 解释深度人工神经网络中的变量效应 Deep artificial neural networks show high predictive performance in many fields, but they do not afford statistical inferences and their black-box operations are too complicated for humans to comprehend. Because positing that a relationship exists is often more important than prediction in scientific experiments and research models, machine learning is far less frequently used than inferential statistics. Additionally, statistics calls for improving the test of theory by showing the magnitude of the phenomena being studied. This article extends current XAI methods and develops a model agnostic hypothesis testing framework for machine learning. First, Fisher's variable permutation algorithm is tweaked to compute an effect size measure equivalent to Cohen's f2 for OLS regression models. Second, the Mann-Kendall test of monotonicity and the Theil-Sen estimator is applied to Apley's accumulated local effect plots to specify a variable's direction of influence and statistical significance. The usefulness of this approach is demonstrated on an artificial data set and a social survey with a Python sandbox implementation. 深度人工神经网络在许多领域表现出很高的预测性能，但它们不提供统计推断，而且它们的黑盒操作对于人类来说过于复杂而难以理解。由于在科学实验和研究模型中假设存在某种关系通常比预测更重要，因此机器学习的使用频率远远低于推论统计。此外，统计学要求通过显示所研究现象的规模来改进理论检验。本文扩展了当前的 XAI 方法，并开发了一个用于机器学习的模型不可知假设检验框架。首先，对 Fisher 的变量排列算法进行调整，以计算相当于 OLS 回归模型的 Cohen f2 的效应大小度量。其次，将 Mann-Kendall 单调性检验和 Theil-Sen 估计量应用于 Apley 的累积局部效应图，以指定变量的影响方向和统计显着性。这种方法的实用性在人工数据集和使用 Python 沙箱实现的社会调查中得到了证明。 本文提出了一种基于Cohen's f2的假设检验框架，用于解释深度人工神经网络中变量的影响，结合可解释AI（XAI）方法提升机器学习模型的统计推断能力。 Wolfgang Messner stat.ME,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Josh Brunner,Lily Chung,Michael Coulombe,Erik D. Demaine,Timothy Gomez,Jayson Lynch
title: Complexity of Solo Chess with Unlimited Moves
title_zh: 无限走法的单人国际象棋的复杂性
abstract: We analyze Solo Chess puzzles, where the input is an $n \times n$ board containing some standard Chess pieces of the same color, and the goal is to make a sequence of capture moves to reduce down to a single piece. Prior work analyzes this puzzle for a single piece type when each piece is limited to make at most two capture moves (as in the Solo Chess puzzles on chess.com). By contrast, we study when each piece can make an unlimited number of capture moves. We show that any single piece type can be solved in polynomial time in a general model of piece types, while any two standard Chess piece types are NP-complete. We also analyze the restriction (as on chess.com) that one piece type is unique and must be the last surviving piece, showing that in this case some pairs of piece types become tractable while others remain hard.
summary: We analyze Solo Chess puzzles, where the input is an $n \times n$ board containing some standard Chess pieces of the same color, and the goal is to make a sequence of capture moves to reduce down to a single piece. Prior work analyzes this puzzle for a single piece type when each piece is limited to make at most two capture moves (as in the Solo Chess puzzles on chess.com). By contrast, we study when each piece can make an unlimited number of capture moves. We show that any single piece type can be solved in polynomial time in a general model of piece types, while any two standard Chess piece types are NP-complete. We also analyze the restriction (as on chess.com) that one piece type is unique and must be the last surviving piece, showing that in this case some pairs of piece types become tractable while others remain hard.
abstract_zh: 我们分析单人国际象棋谜题，其中输入是包含一些相同颜色的标准棋子的 $n \times n$ 棋盘，目标是进行一系列捕获动作以减少到单个棋子。之前的工作分析了单件类型的拼图，其中每个棋子最多只能进行两次捕获动作（如 chess.com 上的单人国际象棋拼图）。相比之下，我们研究每个棋子何时可以进行无限数量的捕获动作。我们证明，任何单个棋子类型都可以在棋子类型的一般模型中以多项式时间求解，而任何两个标准棋子类型都是 NP 完全的。我们还分析了一个棋子类型是唯一的并且必须是最后幸存棋子的限制（如在 chess.com 上），表明在这种情况下，某些棋子类型对变得易于处理，而其他棋子类型仍然难以处理。

AI.tldr: 分析无限制捕获次数的Solo Chess谜题计算复杂性，对比单一棋子类型与两种棋子类型的复杂度差异。
AI.motivation: 扩展现有Solo Chess谜题研究范围，从限制两次捕获移动转向无限次移动，探讨不同棋子组合的计算复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论分析，证明单一棋子类型的多项式可解性及两种棋子类型的NP完全性，并研究特定约束条件下的复杂度变化。
AI.result: 单一棋子类型可在多项式时间内求解，两种棋子类型均为NP完全；当限定唯一棋子类型为最终存活时，部分组合复杂度降低而其他仍保持困难。
AI.conclusion: 无限制捕获移动的Solo Chess谜题复杂度显著高于有限制情况，揭示了棋子类型组合与约束条件对问题难度的关键影响。

authors_text: Suhas Kotha,Christopher Brix,Zico Kolter,Krishnamurthy Dvijotham,Huan Zhang
title: Provably Bounding Neural Network Preimages
title_zh: 可证明有界的神经网络原像
abstract: Most work on the formal verification of neural networks has focused on bounding the set of outputs that correspond to a given set of inputs (for example, bounded perturbations of a nominal input). However, many use cases of neural network verification require solving the inverse problem, or over-approximating the set of inputs that lead to certain outputs. We present the INVPROP algorithm for verifying properties over the preimage of a linearly constrained output set, which can be combined with branch-and-bound to increase precision. Contrary to other approaches, our efficient algorithm is GPU-accelerated and does not require a linear programming solver. We demonstrate our algorithm for identifying safe control regions for a dynamical system via backward reachability analysis, verifying adversarial robustness, and detecting out-of-distribution inputs to a neural network. Our results show that in certain settings, we find over-approximations over 2500x tighter than prior work while being 2.5x faster. By strengthening robustness verification with output constraints, we consistently verify more properties than the previous state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks, including a large model with 167k neurons in VNN-COMP 2023. Our algorithm has been incorporated into the $α,\!β$-CROWN verifier, available at https://abcrown.org.
summary: Most work on the formal verification of neural networks has focused on bounding the set of outputs that correspond to a given set of inputs (for example, bounded perturbations of a nominal input). However, many use cases of neural network verification require solving the inverse problem, or over-approximating the set of inputs that lead to certain outputs. We present the INVPROP algorithm for verifying properties over the preimage of a linearly constrained output set, which can be combined with branch-and-bound to increase precision. Contrary to other approaches, our efficient algorithm is GPU-accelerated and does not require a linear programming solver. We demonstrate our algorithm for identifying safe control regions for a dynamical system via backward reachability analysis, verifying adversarial robustness, and detecting out-of-distribution inputs to a neural network. Our results show that in certain settings, we find over-approximations over 2500x tighter than prior work while being 2.5x faster. By strengthening robustness verification with output constraints, we consistently verify more properties than the previous state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks, including a large model with 167k neurons in VNN-COMP 2023. Our algorithm has been incorporated into the $α,\!β$-CROWN verifier, available at https://abcrown.org.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于神经网络形式验证的工作都集中在限制与给定输入集相对应的输出集（例如，标称输入的有界扰动）。然而，神经网络验证的许多用例需要解决逆问题，或者过度逼近导致某些输出的输入集。我们提出了 INVPROP 算法，用于验证线性约束输出集原像的属性，该算法可以与分支定界相结合以提高精度。与其他方法相反，我们的高效算法是 GPU 加速的，不需要线性编程求解器。我们展示了我们的算法，该算法通过后向可达性分析来识别动态系统的安全控制区域，验证对抗鲁棒性，并检测神经网络的分布外输入。我们的结果表明，在某些设置下，我们发现过近似比之前的工作严格超过 2500 倍，同时速度提高了 2.5 倍。通过加强输出约束的鲁棒性验证，我们在多个基准上一致地验证了比以前最先进的更多属性，包括 VNN-COMP 2023 中具有 167k 神经元的大型模型。我们的算法已合并到 $α,\!β$-CROWN 验证器中，可在 https://abcrown.org 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为INVPROP的算法，用于验证神经网络的预图像（输入集）在特定输出约束下的性质，并通过GPU加速和分支定界法提升精度。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络形式化验证主要关注输入到输出的边界，但许多应用场景需要解决逆问题——确定导致特定输出的输入集。传统方法依赖线性规划求解器且效率较低。
AI.method: 设计GPU加速的INVPROP算法，结合分支定界法，无需线性规划求解器，通过反向可达性分析、对抗鲁棒性验证和分布外检测实现预图像约束。
AI.result: 在特定场景下，该算法的过估计精度比先前工作高2500倍且速度提升2.5倍，在多个基准测试中验证更多属性，包括167k神经元的大型模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过输出约束增强鲁棒性验证，显著提升神经网络形式化验证的效率和精度，已集成到α,β-CROWN验证器中。

authors_text: Bicheng Xu,Renjie Liao,Leonid Sigal
title: Self-Supervised Relation Alignment for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于场景图生成的自监督关系对齐
abstract: The goal of scene graph generation is to predict a graph from an input image, where nodes correspond to identified and localized objects and edges to their corresponding interaction predicates. Existing methods are trained in a fully supervised manner and focus on message passing mechanisms, loss functions, and/or bias mitigation. In this work we introduce a simple-yet-effective self-supervised relational alignment regularization designed to improve the scene graph generation performance. The proposed alignment is general and can be combined with any existing scene graph generation framework, where it is trained alongside the original model's objective. The alignment is achieved through distillation, where an auxiliary relation prediction branch, that mirrors and shares parameters with the supervised counterpart, is designed. In the auxiliary branch, relational input features are partially masked prior to message passing and predicate prediction. The predictions for masked relations are then aligned with the supervised counterparts after the message passing. We illustrate the effectiveness of this self-supervised relational alignment in conjunction with two scene graph generation architectures, SGTR and Neural Motifs, and show that in both cases we achieve significantly improved performance.
summary: The goal of scene graph generation is to predict a graph from an input image, where nodes correspond to identified and localized objects and edges to their corresponding interaction predicates. Existing methods are trained in a fully supervised manner and focus on message passing mechanisms, loss functions, and/or bias mitigation. In this work we introduce a simple-yet-effective self-supervised relational alignment regularization designed to improve the scene graph generation performance. The proposed alignment is general and can be combined with any existing scene graph generation framework, where it is trained alongside the original model's objective. The alignment is achieved through distillation, where an auxiliary relation prediction branch, that mirrors and shares parameters with the supervised counterpart, is designed. In the auxiliary branch, relational input features are partially masked prior to message passing and predicate prediction. The predictions for masked relations are then aligned with the supervised counterparts after the message passing. We illustrate the effectiveness of this self-supervised relational alignment in conjunction with two scene graph generation architectures, SGTR and Neural Motifs, and show that in both cases we achieve significantly improved performance.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成的目标是从输入图像预测图，其中节点对应于已识别和本地化的对象，边对应于其相应的交互谓词。现有方法以完全监督的方式进行训练，并专注于消息传递机制、损失函数和/或偏差缓解。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种简单而有效的自监督关系对齐正则化，旨在提高场景图生成性能。所提出的对齐是通用的，可以与任何现有的场景图生成框架相结合，在该框架中它与原始模型的目标一起进行训练。对齐是通过蒸馏实现的，其中设计了一个辅助关系预测分支，与受监督的对应分支镜像并共享参数。在辅助分支中，在消息传递和谓词预测之前，关系输入特征被部分屏蔽。然后，在消息传递后，对屏蔽关系的预测与受监督的对应关系保持一致。我们结合两种场景图生成架构（SGTR 和神经模型）说明了这种自监督关系对齐的有效性，并表明在这两种情况下我们都实现了显着提高的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自监督关系对齐方法以提升场景图生成性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全监督训练，受限于标注数据，难以处理复杂关系，需引入自监督学习增强模型关系理解
AI.method: 通过蒸馏设计辅助关系预测分支，部分掩码输入特征并对其预测结果进行对齐
AI.result: 在SGTR和Neural Motifs架构上显著提升性能
AI.conclusion: 自监督关系对齐方法通用有效，可提升现有框架性能

ai_content.conclusion: 自监督关系对齐方法通用有效，可提升现有框架性能

authors_text: Sam Royston
title: Personalized Understanding of Blood Glucose Dynamics via Mobile Sensor Data
title_zh: 通过移动传感器数据个性化了解血糖动态
abstract: Continuous Blood Glucose (CGM) monitors have revolutionized the ability of diabetics to manage their blood glucose, and paved the way for artificial pancreas systems. In this paper we augment CGM data with sensor input collected by a smart phone and use it to provide analytical tools for patients and clinicians. We collected GPS data, activity classifications, and blood glucose data with a custom iOS application over a 9 month period from a single free-living type-1 diabetic patient. This data set is novel in terms of it's size, the inclusion of GPS data, and the fact that it was collected non-intrusively from a free-living patient. We describe a method to measure the occurrence of lifestyle \textit{events} based on GPS and activity data, and show that they can capture instances of food consumption and are therefore correlated to changes in blood glucose. Finally, we incorporate these event representations into our system to create useful visualizations and notifications to aid patients in managing their diabetes.
summary: Continuous Blood Glucose (CGM) monitors have revolutionized the ability of diabetics to manage their blood glucose, and paved the way for artificial pancreas systems. In this paper we augment CGM data with sensor input collected by a smart phone and use it to provide analytical tools for patients and clinicians. We collected GPS data, activity classifications, and blood glucose data with a custom iOS application over a 9 month period from a single free-living type-1 diabetic patient. This data set is novel in terms of it's size, the inclusion of GPS data, and the fact that it was collected non-intrusively from a free-living patient. We describe a method to measure the occurrence of lifestyle \textit{events} based on GPS and activity data, and show that they can capture instances of food consumption and are therefore correlated to changes in blood glucose. Finally, we incorporate these event representations into our system to create useful visualizations and notifications to aid patients in managing their diabetes.
abstract_zh: 连续血糖 (CGM) 监测仪彻底改变了糖尿病患者管理血糖的能力，并为人工胰腺系统铺平了道路。在本文中，我们利用智能手机收集的传感器输入来增强 CGM 数据，并用它为患者和临床医生提供分析工具。我们使用自定义 iOS 应用程序从一位自由生活的 1 型糖尿病患者身上收集了 9 个月的 GPS 数据、活动分类和血糖数据。该数据集的新颖之处在于它的大小、包含的 GPS 数据以及它是从自由生活的患者处非侵入性收集的事实。我们描述了一种基于 GPS 和活动数据来测量生活方式 \textit{事件} 发生的方法，并表明它们可以捕获食物消耗的实例，因此与血糖的变化相关。最后，我们将这些事件表示合并到我们的系统中，以创建有用的可视化和通知，以帮助患者管理糖尿病。

AI.tldr: 本文通过整合智能手机传感器数据与连续血糖监测数据，开发个性化工具帮助糖尿病患者管理血糖。
AI.motivation: 现有连续血糖监测技术缺乏对生活方式因素（如饮食、活动）与血糖动态关系的深入分析，需多源数据支持个性化管理。
AI.method: 基于iOS应用收集9个月的GPS、活动及血糖数据，通过GPS和活动数据识别生活事件（如进食），并将其与血糖变化关联生成可视化工具。
AI.result: 验证了生活事件（如饮食）与血糖波动的关联性，开发出可提供实时可视化和预警的糖尿病管理辅助系统。
AI.conclusion: 多源传感器数据与血糖数据的融合可有效捕捉个体化生活事件对血糖的影响，为糖尿病管理提供新分析手段。

authors_text: Md Masudur Rahman,Yexiang Xue
title: Accelerating Policy Gradient by Estimating Value Function from Prior Computation in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习中的先前计算估计价值函数来加速策略梯度
abstract: This paper investigates the use of prior computation to estimate the value function to improve sample efficiency in on-policy policy gradient methods in reinforcement learning. Our approach is to estimate the value function from prior computations, such as from the Q-network learned in DQN or the value function trained for different but related environments. In particular, we learn a new value function for the target task while combining it with a value estimate from the prior computation. Finally, the resulting value function is used as a baseline in the policy gradient method. This use of a baseline has the theoretical property of reducing variance in gradient computation and thus improving sample efficiency. The experiments show the successful use of prior value estimates in various settings and improved sample efficiency in several tasks.
summary: This paper investigates the use of prior computation to estimate the value function to improve sample efficiency in on-policy policy gradient methods in reinforcement learning. Our approach is to estimate the value function from prior computations, such as from the Q-network learned in DQN or the value function trained for different but related environments. In particular, we learn a new value function for the target task while combining it with a value estimate from the prior computation. Finally, the resulting value function is used as a baseline in the policy gradient method. This use of a baseline has the theoretical property of reducing variance in gradient computation and thus improving sample efficiency. The experiments show the successful use of prior value estimates in various settings and improved sample efficiency in several tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了使用先验计算来估计价值函数，以提高强化学习中在策略策略梯度方法中的样本效率。我们的方法是从先前的计算中估计价值函数，例如从 DQN 中学习的 Q 网络或针对不同但相关的环境训练的价值函数。特别是，我们为目标任务学习一个新的价值函数，同时将其与先前计算的价值估计相结合。最后，得到的价值函数用作策略梯度方法的基线。这种基线的使用具有减少梯度计算方差的理论特性，从而提高样本效率。实验表明，在各种设置中成功使用先验值估计，并在多项任务中提高了样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用先验计算估计价值函数以提升深度强化学习中策略梯度方法的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有on-policy策略梯度方法样本效率低，而off-policy方法如DQN虽高效但存在策略更新滞后问题，需结合两者优势以提升效率。
AI.method: 通过结合先验计算（如DQN的Q网络或相关环境的价值函数）与目标任务的新价值函数，将其作为策略梯度的基线，以降低方差并提升样本效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种场景下有效，并提升了多个任务的样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 利用先验价值估计作为基线能有效减少方差，提升样本效率，为深度强化学习中的策略优化提供新思路。

The experiments show the successful use of prior value estimates in various settings and improved sample efficiency in several tasks. 本文研究了使用先验计算来估计价值函数，以提高强化学习中在策略策略梯度方法中的样本效率。我们的方法是从先前的计算中估计价值函数，例如从 DQN 中学习的 Q 网络或针对不同但相关的环境训练的价值函数。特别是，我们为目标任务学习一个新的价值函数，同时将其与先前计算的价值估计相结合。最后，得到的价值函数用作策略梯度方法的基线。这种基线的使用具有减少梯度计算方差的理论特性，从而提高样本效率。实验表明，在各种设置中成功使用先验值估计，并在多项任务中提高了样本效率。 本文提出利用先验计算估计价值函数以提升深度强化学习中策略梯度方法的样本效率。 Md Masudur Rahman,Yexiang Xue cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Stefano Scotta,Alberto Messina
title: Understanding and contextualising diffusion models
title_zh: 理解扩散模型并将其置于情境中
abstract: The latest developments in Artificial Intelligence include diffusion generative models, quite popular tools which can produce original images both unconditionally and, in some cases, conditioned by some inputs provided by the user. Apart from implementation details, which are outside the scope of this work, all of the main models used to generate images are substantially based on a common theory which restores a new image from a completely degraded one. In this work we explain how this is possible by focusing on the mathematical theory behind them, i.e. without analyzing in detail the specific implementations and related methods. The aim of this work is to clarify to the interested reader what all this means mathematically and intuitively.
summary: The latest developments in Artificial Intelligence include diffusion generative models, quite popular tools which can produce original images both unconditionally and, in some cases, conditioned by some inputs provided by the user. Apart from implementation details, which are outside the scope of this work, all of the main models used to generate images are substantially based on a common theory which restores a new image from a completely degraded one. In this work we explain how this is possible by focusing on the mathematical theory behind them, i.e. without analyzing in detail the specific implementations and related methods. The aim of this work is to clarify to the interested reader what all this means mathematically and intuitively.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最新发展包括扩散生成模型，这是一种非常流行的工具，可以无条件地生成原始图像，在某些情况下，可以根据用户提供的某些输入来生成原始图像。除了超出本工作范围的实现细节之外，用于生成图像的所有主要模型基本上都基于从完全退化的图像中恢复新图像的共同理论。在这项工作中，我们通过关注其背后的数学理论来解释这是如何可能的，即不详细分析具体的实现和相关方法。这项工作的目的是向感兴趣的读者阐明这一切在数学上和直观上的含义。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解释扩散模型背后的数学理论，帮助读者理解其工作原理。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型作为AI领域的重要工具，其数学基础需要被澄清以促进更深入的理解。
AI.method: 通过聚焦数学理论而非具体实现，阐述从退化图像恢复新图像的过程。
AI.result: 成功阐明了扩散模型的数学原理及直观意义，为读者提供了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 数学理论是理解扩散模型的核心，有助于推动其进一步发展和应用。

authors_text: Yiming Sun,Bing Cao,Pengfei Zhu,Qinghua Hu
title: Multi-modal Gated Mixture of Local-to-Global Experts for Dynamic Image Fusion
title_zh: 用于动态图像融合的本地到全球专家的多模态门控混合
abstract: Infrared and visible image fusion aims to integrate comprehensive information from multiple sources to achieve superior performances on various practical tasks, such as detection, over that of a single modality. However, most existing methods directly combined the texture details and object contrast of different modalities, ignoring the dynamic changes in reality, which diminishes the visible texture in good lighting conditions and the infrared contrast in low lighting conditions. To fill this gap, we propose a dynamic image fusion framework with a multi-modal gated mixture of local-to-global experts, termed MoE-Fusion, to dynamically extract effective and comprehensive information from the respective modalities. Our model consists of a Mixture of Local Experts (MoLE) and a Mixture of Global Experts (MoGE) guided by a multi-modal gate. The MoLE performs specialized learning of multi-modal local features, prompting the fused images to retain the local information in a sample-adaptive manner, while the MoGE focuses on the global information that complements the fused image with overall texture detail and contrast. Extensive experiments show that our MoE-Fusion outperforms state-of-the-art methods in preserving multi-modal image texture and contrast through the local-to-global dynamic learning paradigm, and also achieves superior performance on detection tasks. Our code will be available: https://github.com/SunYM2020/MoE-Fusion.
summary: Infrared and visible image fusion aims to integrate comprehensive information from multiple sources to achieve superior performances on various practical tasks, such as detection, over that of a single modality. However, most existing methods directly combined the texture details and object contrast of different modalities, ignoring the dynamic changes in reality, which diminishes the visible texture in good lighting conditions and the infrared contrast in low lighting conditions. To fill this gap, we propose a dynamic image fusion framework with a multi-modal gated mixture of local-to-global experts, termed MoE-Fusion, to dynamically extract effective and comprehensive information from the respective modalities. Our model consists of a Mixture of Local Experts (MoLE) and a Mixture of Global Experts (MoGE) guided by a multi-modal gate. The MoLE performs specialized learning of multi-modal local features, prompting the fused images to retain the local information in a sample-adaptive manner, while the MoGE focuses on the global information that complements the fused image with overall texture detail and contrast. Extensive experiments show that our MoE-Fusion outperforms state-of-the-art methods in preserving multi-modal image texture and contrast through the local-to-global dynamic learning paradigm, and also achieves superior performance on detection tasks. Our code will be available: https://github.com/SunYM2020/MoE-Fusion.
abstract_zh: 红外和可见光图像融合旨在集成来自多个来源的综合信息，以在各种实际任务（例如检测）中实现比单一模态更优越的性能。然而，大多数现有方法直接结合不同模态的纹理细节和物体对比度，忽略了现实中的动态变化，这削弱了良好照明条件下的可见纹理和低照明条件下的红外对比度。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一种动态图像融合框架，其中包含本地到全局专家的多模态门控混合，称为 MoE-Fusion，以从各个模态中动态提取有效且全面的信息。我们的模型由多模式门引导的本地专家混合 (MoLE) 和全球专家混合 (MoGE) 组成。 MoLE 对多模态局部特征进行专门学习，促使融合图像以样本自适应的方式保留局部信息，而 MoGE 则侧重于全局信息，以整体纹理细节和对比度补充融合图像。大量实验表明，我们的 MoE-Fusion 通过局部到全局的动态学习范式在保留多模态图像纹理和对比度方面优于最先进的方法，并且在检测任务上也实现了卓越的性能。我们的代码将可用：https://github.com/SunYM2020/MoE-Fusion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态图像融合框架MoE-Fusion，通过多模态门控的局部-全局专家混合机制，解决红外与可见光图像融合中动态变化信息丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接融合多模态纹理和对比度时忽略现实中的动态变化，导致良好光照下可见光纹理和低光照下红外对比度受损，影响实际任务性能。
AI.method: 构建包含局部专家混合（MoLE）和全局专家混合（MoGE）的动态框架，通过多模态门控机制自适应提取局部细节与全局纹理，实现动态信息融合。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，显著提升多模态图像纹理保留率和对比度，同时在检测任务中取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 局部-全局动态学习范式有效解决了多模态图像融合中的动态信息缺失问题，为复杂环境下的视觉任务提供更鲁棒的特征表示。

authors: T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha
authors_json: T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha
authors_text: E. M. S. P. Ekanayake,T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha,U. V. B. L. Udugama,G. M. R. I. Godaliyadda,M. P. B. Ekanayake,B. G. L. T. Samaranayake,J. V. Wijayakulasooriya
title: Object Dimension Extraction for Environment Mapping with Low Cost Cameras Fused with Laser Ranging
title_zh: 使用低成本相机与激光测距融合进行环境测绘的物体尺寸提取
comment: Conference: 24th Annual Technical Conference of IET Sri Lanka Network 2017 At: Colombo, Sri Lanka
comments: Conference: 24th Annual Technical Conference of IET Sri Lanka Network 2017 At: Colombo, Sri Lanka
abstract: It is essential to have a method to map an unknown terrain for various applications. For places where human access is not possible, a method should be proposed to identify the environment. Exploration, disaster relief, transportation and many other purposes would be convenient if a map of the environment is available. Replicating the human vision system using stereo cameras would be an optimum solution. In this work, we have used laser ranging based technique fused with stereo cameras to extract dimension of objects for mapping. The distortions were calibrated using mathematical model of the camera. By means of Semi Global Block Matching [1] disparity map was generated and reduces the noise using novel noise reduction method of disparity map by dilation. The Data from the Laser Range Finder (LRF) and noise reduced vision data has been used to identify the object parameters.
summary: It is essential to have a method to map an unknown terrain for various applications. For places where human access is not possible, a method should be proposed to identify the environment. Exploration, disaster relief, transportation and many other purposes would be convenient if a map of the environment is available. Replicating the human vision system using stereo cameras would be an optimum solution. In this work, we have used laser ranging based technique fused with stereo cameras to extract dimension of objects for mapping. The distortions were calibrated using mathematical model of the camera. By means of Semi Global Block Matching [1] disparity map was generated and reduces the noise using novel noise reduction method of disparity map by dilation. The Data from the Laser Range Finder (LRF) and noise reduced vision data has been used to identify the object parameters.
abstract_zh: 必须有一种方法来为各种应用绘制未知地形的地图。对于人类无法进入的地方，应提出一种识别环境的方法。如果有环境地图，勘探、救灾、交通等许多目的都会很方便。使用立体相机复制人类视觉系统将是一个最佳解决方案。在这项工作中，我们使用基于激光测距的技术与立体相机融合来提取物体的尺寸以进行测绘。使用相机的数学模型来校准畸变。通过半全局块匹配[1]生成视差图，并使用新颖的视差图膨胀降噪方法来降低噪声。来自激光测距仪 (LRF) 的数据和降噪视觉数据已用于识别物体参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合低成本摄像头与激光测距技术的环境映射方法，用于提取未知地形中物体的尺寸信息。
AI.motivation: 在无法人工进入的区域（如灾害现场、危险地形等）需要自动化的环境映射技术，传统方法存在成本高或精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过立体摄像头获取图像，利用半全局块匹配算法生成视差图并采用膨胀法降噪；结合激光测距数据校准摄像头畸变，最终融合多源数据提取物体参数。
AI.result: 成功实现物体尺寸的高精度提取，验证了融合视觉与激光数据方法在环境映射中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过低成本硬件组合提升了环境感知的准确性，为无人探索、灾害救援等场景提供了可行的技术方案。

search_text: Object Dimension Extraction for Environment Mapping with Low Cost Cameras Fused with Laser Ranging 使用低成本相机与激光测距融合进行环境测绘的物体尺寸提取 It is essential to have a method to map an unknown terrain for various applications. For places where human access is not possible, a method should be proposed to identify the environment. Exploration, disaster relief, transportation and many other purposes would be convenient if a map of the environment is available. Replicating the human vision system using stereo cameras would be an optimum solution. In this work, we have used laser ranging based technique fused with stereo cameras to extract dimension of objects for mapping. The distortions were calibrated using mathematical model of the camera. By means of Semi Global Block Matching [1] disparity map was generated and reduces the noise using novel noise reduction method of disparity map by dilation. The Data from the Laser Range Finder (LRF) and noise reduced vision data has been used to identify the object parameters. 必须有一种方法来为各种应用绘制未知地形的地图。对于人类无法进入的地方，应提出一种识别环境的方法。如果有环境地图，勘探、救灾、交通等许多目的都会很方便。使用立体相机复制人类视觉系统将是一个最佳解决方案。在这项工作中，我们使用基于激光测距的技术与立体相机融合来提取物体的尺寸以进行测绘。使用相机的数学模型来校准畸变。通过半全局块匹配[1]生成视差图，并使用新颖的视差图膨胀降噪方法来降低噪声。来自激光测距仪 (LRF) 的数据和降噪视觉数据已用于识别物体参数。 本文提出一种融合低成本摄像头与激光测距技术的环境映射方法，用于提取未知地形中物体的尺寸信息。 E. M. S. P. Ekanayake,T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha,U. V. B. L. Udugama,G. M. R. I. Godaliyadda,M. P. B. Ekanayake,B. G. L. T. Samaranayake,J. V. Wijayakulasooriya cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Gobinda Saha,Kaushik Roy
title: Continual Learning with Scaled Gradient Projection
title_zh: 通过缩放梯度投影进行持续学习
abstract: In neural networks, continual learning results in gradient interference among sequential tasks, leading to catastrophic forgetting of old tasks while learning new ones. This issue is addressed in recent methods by storing the important gradient spaces for old tasks and updating the model orthogonally during new tasks. However, such restrictive orthogonal gradient updates hamper the learning capability of the new tasks resulting in sub-optimal performance. To improve new learning while minimizing forgetting, in this paper we propose a Scaled Gradient Projection (SGP) method, where we combine the orthogonal gradient projections with scaled gradient steps along the important gradient spaces for the past tasks. The degree of gradient scaling along these spaces depends on the importance of the bases spanning them. We propose an efficient method for computing and accumulating importance of these bases using the singular value decomposition of the input representations for each task. We conduct extensive experiments ranging from continual image classification to reinforcement learning tasks and report better performance with less training overhead than the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: In neural networks, continual learning results in gradient interference among sequential tasks, leading to catastrophic forgetting of old tasks while learning new ones. This issue is addressed in recent methods by storing the important gradient spaces for old tasks and updating the model orthogonally during new tasks. However, such restrictive orthogonal gradient updates hamper the learning capability of the new tasks resulting in sub-optimal performance. To improve new learning while minimizing forgetting, in this paper we propose a Scaled Gradient Projection (SGP) method, where we combine the orthogonal gradient projections with scaled gradient steps along the important gradient spaces for the past tasks. The degree of gradient scaling along these spaces depends on the importance of the bases spanning them. We propose an efficient method for computing and accumulating importance of these bases using the singular value decomposition of the input representations for each task. We conduct extensive experiments ranging from continual image classification to reinforcement learning tasks and report better performance with less training overhead than the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 在神经网络中，持续学习会导致顺序任务之间的梯度干扰，导致在学习新任务时灾难性地忘记旧任务。最近的方法通过存储旧任务的重要梯度空间并在新任务期间正交更新模型来解决这个问题。然而，这种限制性的正交梯度更新阻碍了新任务的学习能力，导致性能次优。为了改进新的学习，同时最大限度地减少遗忘，在本文中，我们提出了一种缩放梯度投影（SGP）方法，其中我们将正交梯度投影与沿着过去任务的重要梯度空间的缩放梯度步骤相结合。沿着这些空间的梯度缩放程度取决于跨越它们的碱基的重要性。我们提出了一种有效的方法，使用每个任务的输入表示的奇异值分解来计算和累积这些基础的重要性。我们进行了从连续图像分类到强化学习任务的广泛实验，并报告了比最先进的方法更好的性能和更少的训练开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为缩放梯度投影（SGP）的方法，用于解决神经网络持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有正交梯度更新方法虽能保留旧任务知识，但过度限制新任务学习能力，导致性能次优。
AI.method: 结合正交梯度投影与按重要性缩放的梯度步骤，利用奇异值分解计算任务梯度空间基底的重要性并动态调整缩放比例。
AI.result: 在持续图像分类和强化学习任务中，SGP相较现有方法取得更优性能且训练开销更低。
AI.conclusion: SGP通过平衡新任务学习与旧知识保留，有效缓解了持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Akshaj Kumar Veldanda,Ivan Brugere,Sanghamitra Dutta,Alan Mishler,Siddharth Garg
title: Hyper-parameter Tuning for Fair Classification without Sensitive Attribute Access
title_zh: 超参数调整以实现公平分类，无需敏感属性访问
abstract: Fair machine learning methods seek to train models that balance model performance across demographic subgroups defined over sensitive attributes like race and gender. Although sensitive attributes are typically assumed to be known during training, they may not be available in practice due to privacy and other logistical concerns. Recent work has sought to train fair models without sensitive attributes on training data. However, these methods need extensive hyper-parameter tuning to achieve good results, and hence assume that sensitive attributes are known on validation data. However, this assumption too might not be practical. Here, we propose Antigone, a framework to train fair classifiers without access to sensitive attributes on either training or validation data. Instead, we generate pseudo sensitive attributes on the validation data by training a biased classifier and using the classifier's incorrectly (correctly) labeled examples as proxies for minority (majority) groups. Since fairness metrics like demographic parity, equal opportunity and subgroup accuracy can be estimated to within a proportionality constant even with noisy sensitive attribute information, we show theoretically and empirically that these proxy labels can be used to maximize fairness under average accuracy constraints. Key to our results is a principled approach to select the hyper-parameters of the biased classifier in a completely unsupervised fashion (meaning without access to ground truth sensitive attributes) that minimizes the gap between fairness estimated using noisy versus ground-truth sensitive labels.
summary: Fair machine learning methods seek to train models that balance model performance across demographic subgroups defined over sensitive attributes like race and gender. Although sensitive attributes are typically assumed to be known during training, they may not be available in practice due to privacy and other logistical concerns. Recent work has sought to train fair models without sensitive attributes on training data. However, these methods need extensive hyper-parameter tuning to achieve good results, and hence assume that sensitive attributes are known on validation data. However, this assumption too might not be practical. Here, we propose Antigone, a framework to train fair classifiers without access to sensitive attributes on either training or validation data. Instead, we generate pseudo sensitive attributes on the validation data by training a biased classifier and using the classifier's incorrectly (correctly) labeled examples as proxies for minority (majority) groups. Since fairness metrics like demographic parity, equal opportunity and subgroup accuracy can be estimated to within a proportionality constant even with noisy sensitive attribute information, we show theoretically and empirically that these proxy labels can be used to maximize fairness under average accuracy constraints. Key to our results is a principled approach to select the hyper-parameters of the biased classifier in a completely unsupervised fashion (meaning without access to ground truth sensitive attributes) that minimizes the gap between fairness estimated using noisy versus ground-truth sensitive labels.
abstract_zh: 公平的机器学习方法寻求训练模型，平衡根据种族和性别等敏感属性定义的人口亚组的模型性能。尽管敏感属性通常被认为在训练期间是已知的，但由于隐私和其他后勤问题，它们在实践中可能不可用。最近的工作试图训练公平的模型，而无需训练数据的敏感属性。然而，这些方法需要大量的超参数调整才能获得良好的结果，因此假设验证数据上的敏感属性是已知的。然而，这个假设也可能不切实际。在这里，我们提出了 Antigone，这是一个训练公平分类器的框架，无需访问训练或验证数据的敏感属性。相反，我们通过训练有偏差的分类器并使用分类器错误（正确）标记的示例作为少数（多数）群体的代理来在验证数据上生成伪敏感属性。由于即使具有嘈杂的敏感属性信息，诸如人口平等、平等机会和子组准确性之类的公平性指标也可以估计在比例常数内，因此我们从理论上和经验上表明，这些代理标签可用于在平均准确性约束下最大化公平性。我们结果的关键是一种原则性方法，以完全无监督的方式（意味着无法访问地面实况敏感属性）选择有偏差分类器的超参数，从而最大限度地减少使用噪声与地面实况敏感标签估计的公平性之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需访问训练或验证数据中的敏感属性即可进行公平分类的框架Antigone，并解决超参数调优问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平分类方法依赖于训练或验证阶段的敏感属性信息，但实际场景中敏感属性可能因隐私等问题无法获取，需提出无需敏感属性的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过训练有偏分类器生成验证数据的伪敏感属性，利用其错误/正确标签作为少数/多数群体代理，并无监督地优化超参数以最小化噪声标签与真实标签的公平性估计差距。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明，使用代理标签可在平均准确率约束下有效提升公平性指标（如人口均等性、平等机会），且超参数选择方法无需真实敏感属性。
AI.conclusion: Antigone框架突破了传统公平分类对敏感属性的依赖，为隐私敏感场景下的公平模型训练提供了可行方案。

Instead, we generate pseudo sensitive attributes on the validation data by training a biased classifier and using the classifier's incorrectly (correctly) labeled examples as proxies for minority (majority) groups. Since fairness metrics like demographic parity, equal opportunity and subgroup accuracy can be estimated to within a proportionality constant even with noisy sensitive attribute information, we show theoretically and empirically that these proxy labels can be used to maximize fairness under average accuracy constraints. Key to our results is a principled approach to select the hyper-parameters of the biased classifier in a completely unsupervised fashion (meaning without access to ground truth sensitive attributes) that minimizes the gap between fairness estimated using noisy versus ground-truth sensitive labels. 公平的机器学习方法寻求训练模型，平衡根据种族和性别等敏感属性定义的人口亚组的模型性能。尽管敏感属性通常被认为在训练期间是已知的，但由于隐私和其他后勤问题，它们在实践中可能不可用。最近的工作试图训练公平的模型，而无需训练数据的敏感属性。然而，这些方法需要大量的超参数调整才能获得良好的结果，因此假设验证数据上的敏感属性是已知的。然而，这个假设也可能不切实际。在这里，我们提出了 Antigone，这是一个训练公平分类器的框架，无需访问训练或验证数据的敏感属性。相反，我们通过训练有偏差的分类器并使用分类器错误（正确）标记的示例作为少数（多数）群体的代理来在验证数据上生成伪敏感属性。由于即使具有嘈杂的敏感属性信息，诸如人口平等、平等机会和子组准确性之类的公平性指标也可以估计在比例常数内，因此我们从理论上和经验上表明，这些代理标签可用于在平均准确性约束下最大化公平性。我们结果的关键是一种原则性方法，以完全无监督的方式（意味着无法访问地面实况敏感属性）选择有偏差分类器的超参数，从而最大限度地减少使用噪声与地面实况敏感标签估计的公平性之间的差距。 本文提出了一种无需访问训练或验证数据中的敏感属性即可进行公平分类的框架Antigone，并解决超参数调优问题。 Akshaj Kumar Veldanda,Ivan Brugere,Sanghamitra Dutta,Alan Mishler,Siddharth Garg cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ze Wang,Jiang Wang,Zicheng Liu,Qiang Qiu
title: Energy-Inspired Self-Supervised Pretraining for Vision Models
title_zh: 视觉模型的能量启发自监督预训练
abstract: Motivated by the fact that forward and backward passes of a deep network naturally form symmetric mappings between input and output representations, we introduce a simple yet effective self-supervised vision model pretraining framework inspired by energy-based models (EBMs). In the proposed framework, we model energy estimation and data restoration as the forward and backward passes of a single network without any auxiliary components, e.g., an extra decoder. For the forward pass, we fit a network to an energy function that assigns low energy scores to samples that belong to an unlabeled dataset, and high energy otherwise. For the backward pass, we restore data from corrupted versions iteratively using gradient-based optimization along the direction of energy minimization. In this way, we naturally fold the encoder-decoder architecture widely used in masked image modeling into the forward and backward passes of a single vision model. Thus, our framework now accepts a wide range of pretext tasks with different data corruption methods, and permits models to be pretrained from masked image modeling, patch sorting, and image restoration, including super-resolution, denoising, and colorization. We support our findings with extensive experiments, and show the proposed method delivers comparable and even better performance with remarkably fewer epochs of training compared to the state-of-the-art self-supervised vision model pretraining methods. Our findings shed light on further exploring self-supervised vision model pretraining and pretext tasks beyond masked image modeling.
summary: Motivated by the fact that forward and backward passes of a deep network naturally form symmetric mappings between input and output representations, we introduce a simple yet effective self-supervised vision model pretraining framework inspired by energy-based models (EBMs). In the proposed framework, we model energy estimation and data restoration as the forward and backward passes of a single network without any auxiliary components, e.g., an extra decoder. For the forward pass, we fit a network to an energy function that assigns low energy scores to samples that belong to an unlabeled dataset, and high energy otherwise. For the backward pass, we restore data from corrupted versions iteratively using gradient-based optimization along the direction of energy minimization. In this way, we naturally fold the encoder-decoder architecture widely used in masked image modeling into the forward and backward passes of a single vision model. Thus, our framework now accepts a wide range of pretext tasks with different data corruption methods, and permits models to be pretrained from masked image modeling, patch sorting, and image restoration, including super-resolution, denoising, and colorization. We support our findings with extensive experiments, and show the proposed method delivers comparable and even better performance with remarkably fewer epochs of training compared to the state-of-the-art self-supervised vision model pretraining methods. Our findings shed light on further exploring self-supervised vision model pretraining and pretext tasks beyond masked image modeling.
abstract_zh: 受深度网络的前向和后向传递自然地形成输入和输出表示之间的对称映射这一事实的启发，我们引入了一种简单而有效的自监督视觉模型预训练框架，其灵感来自基于能量的模型（EBM）。在所提出的框架中，我们将能量估计和数据恢复建模为单个网络的前向和后向传递，而无需任何辅助组件（例如额外的解码器）。对于前向传递，我们将网络拟合到能量函数，该函数将低能量分数分配给属于未标记数据集的样本，否则分配高能量分数。对于后向传递，我们沿着能量最小化的方向使用基于梯度的优化迭代地从损坏的版本中恢复数据。通过这种方式，我们自然地将蒙版图像建模中广泛使用的编码器-解码器架构折叠到单视觉模型的前向和后向传递中。因此，我们的框架现在接受具有不同数据损坏方法的各种借口任务，并允许通过蒙版图像建模、补丁排序和图像恢复（包括超分辨率、去噪和着色）对模型进行预训练。我们通过广泛的实验支持了我们的发现，并表明与最先进的自监督视觉模型预训练方法相比，所提出的方法可以以更少的训练次数提供可比甚至更好的性能。我们的研究结果为进一步探索蒙版图像建模之外的自监督视觉模型预训练和借口任务提供了线索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受能量模型启发的自监督视觉模型预训练框架，通过前向和后向传递实现数据重建与能量估计。
AI.motivation: 深度网络的前向和后向传递天然形成输入输出表示的对称映射，而现有方法常依赖额外组件（如解码器）。本文旨在利用能量模型思想，构建无需辅助组件的统一框架。
AI.method: 将能量估计（低能量分配给真实样本）作为前向传递，通过梯度优化沿能量最小化方向迭代恢复受损数据作为后向传递，隐式融合编码器-解码器结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在更少训练轮次下达到与现有最先进方法相当甚至更优的性能，支持多种预训练任务（如图像修复、去噪等）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为超越掩码图像建模的自监督预训练提供了新思路，展示了能量模型在视觉任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Zhouxing Shi,Nicholas Carlini,Ananth Balashankar,Ludwig Schmidt,Cho-Jui Hsieh,Alex Beutel,Yao Qin
title: Effective Robustness against Natural Distribution Shifts for Models with Different Training Data
title_zh: 具有不同训练数据的模型对自然分布变化的有效鲁棒性
abstract: "Effective robustness" measures the extra out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness beyond what can be predicted from the in-distribution (ID) performance. Existing effective robustness evaluations typically use a single test set such as ImageNet to evaluate the ID accuracy. This becomes problematic when evaluating models trained on different data distributions, e.g., comparing models trained on ImageNet vs. zero-shot language-image pre-trained models trained on LAION. In this paper, we propose a new evaluation metric to evaluate and compare the effective robustness of models trained on different data. To do this, we control for the accuracy on multiple ID test sets that cover the training distributions for all the evaluated models. Our new evaluation metric provides a better estimate of effective robustness when there are models with different training data. It may also explain the surprising effective robustness gains of zero-shot CLIP-like models exhibited in prior works that used ImageNet as the only ID test set, while the gains diminish under our new evaluation. Additional artifacts including interactive visualizations are provided at https://shizhouxing.github.io/effective-robustness.
summary: "Effective robustness" measures the extra out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness beyond what can be predicted from the in-distribution (ID) performance. Existing effective robustness evaluations typically use a single test set such as ImageNet to evaluate the ID accuracy. This becomes problematic when evaluating models trained on different data distributions, e.g., comparing models trained on ImageNet vs. zero-shot language-image pre-trained models trained on LAION. In this paper, we propose a new evaluation metric to evaluate and compare the effective robustness of models trained on different data. To do this, we control for the accuracy on multiple ID test sets that cover the training distributions for all the evaluated models. Our new evaluation metric provides a better estimate of effective robustness when there are models with different training data. It may also explain the surprising effective robustness gains of zero-shot CLIP-like models exhibited in prior works that used ImageNet as the only ID test set, while the gains diminish under our new evaluation. Additional artifacts including interactive visualizations are provided at https://shizhouxing.github.io/effective-robustness.
abstract_zh: “有效稳健性”衡量超出分布内 (ID) 性能预测的额外分布外 (OOD) 稳健性。现有有效的鲁棒性评估通常使用单个测试集（例如 ImageNet）来评估 ID 准确性。当评估在不同数据分布上训练的模型时，这会成为问题，例如，比较在 ImageNet 上训练的模型与在 LAION 上训练的零样本语言图像预训练模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的评估指标来评估和比较在不同数据上训练的模型的有效鲁棒性。为此，我们控制多个 ID 测试集的准确性，这些测试集涵盖所有评估模型的训练分布。当模型具有不同的训练数据时，我们的新评估指标可以更好地估计有效鲁棒性。这也可以解释在使用 ImageNet 作为唯一 ID 测试集的先前作品中展示的零样本 CLIP 类模型令人惊讶的有效鲁棒性增益，而在我们的新评估下增益却减弱了。 https://shizhouxing.github.io/ effective-robustness 提供了包括交互式可视化在内的其他工件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的评估指标，用于比较不同训练数据分布下模型的有效鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法仅使用单一测试集（如ImageNet）衡量模型性能，无法准确比较不同训练数据分布模型的有效鲁棒性，导致零样本模型的鲁棒性增益被高估。
AI.method: 通过控制多个覆盖所有评估模型训练分布的ID测试集准确率，设计新的评估指标以更精确地衡量有效鲁棒性。
AI.result: 新指标揭示了先前基于ImageNet的零样本CLIP类模型鲁棒性增益在多测试集下显著减弱的现象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不同训练数据分布模型的有效鲁棒性比较提供了更可靠的评估框架，修正了传统单一测试集的偏差。

authors_text: Omer Ben-Porat,Rotem Torkan
title: Learning with Exposure Constraints in Recommendation Systems
title_zh: 推荐系统中的暴露约束学习
abstract: Recommendation systems are dynamic economic systems that balance the needs of multiple stakeholders. A recent line of work studies incentives from the content providers' point of view. Content providers, e.g., vloggers and bloggers, contribute fresh content and rely on user engagement to create revenue and finance their operations. In this work, we propose a contextual multi-armed bandit setting to model the dependency of content providers on exposure. In our model, the system receives a user context in every round and has to select one of the arms. Every arm is a content provider who must receive a minimum number of pulls every fixed time period (e.g., a month) to remain viable in later rounds; otherwise, the arm departs and is no longer available. The system aims to maximize the users' (content consumers) welfare. To that end, it should learn which arms are vital and ensure they remain viable by subsidizing arm pulls if needed. We develop algorithms with sub-linear regret, as well as a lower bound that demonstrates that our algorithms are optimal up to logarithmic factors.
summary: Recommendation systems are dynamic economic systems that balance the needs of multiple stakeholders. A recent line of work studies incentives from the content providers' point of view. Content providers, e.g., vloggers and bloggers, contribute fresh content and rely on user engagement to create revenue and finance their operations. In this work, we propose a contextual multi-armed bandit setting to model the dependency of content providers on exposure. In our model, the system receives a user context in every round and has to select one of the arms. Every arm is a content provider who must receive a minimum number of pulls every fixed time period (e.g., a month) to remain viable in later rounds; otherwise, the arm departs and is no longer available. The system aims to maximize the users' (content consumers) welfare. To that end, it should learn which arms are vital and ensure they remain viable by subsidizing arm pulls if needed. We develop algorithms with sub-linear regret, as well as a lower bound that demonstrates that our algorithms are optimal up to logarithmic factors.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统是平衡多个利益相关者需求的动态经济系统。最近的一项工作是从内容提供商的角度研究激励措施。内容提供商（例如视频博主和博主）贡献新鲜内容，并依靠用户参与来创造收入并为其运营提供资金。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种上下文多臂老虎机设置来模拟内容提供商对曝光的依赖性。在我们的模型中，系统在每一轮中都会接收用户上下文，并且必须选择其中一个分支。每个分支都是一个内容提供商，必须在每个固定时间段（例如一个月）接收最少数量的拉取，才能在后面的轮次中保持活力；否则，手臂就会离开并且不再可用。该系统旨在最大化用户（内容消费者）的福利。为此，它应该了解哪些部门至关重要，并在需要时通过补贴来确保它们保持可行。我们开发了具有亚线性遗憾的算法，以及表明我们的算法在对数因子范围内是最优的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种推荐系统模型，在满足内容提供者最低曝光需求的同时最大化用户福利。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统多关注用户或平台利益，忽视内容提供者因曝光不足可能导致退出的问题，影响系统长期可持续性。
AI.method: 基于上下文多臂老虎机框架，设计满足周期性曝光约束的在线学习算法，并证明其理论最优性。
AI.result: 开发出具有次线性遗憾的算法，并建立下界证明其在对数因子上的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效平衡用户福利与内容提供者生存需求，为推荐系统约束优化提供了新方法论。

authors_text: Hassan Dbouk,Naresh R. Shanbhag
title: On the Robustness of Randomized Ensembles to Adversarial Perturbations
title_zh: 关于随机集成对对抗性扰动的鲁棒性
comment: Published as a conference paper in ICML 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper in ICML 2023
abstract: Randomized ensemble classifiers (RECs), where one classifier is randomly selected during inference, have emerged as an attractive alternative to traditional ensembling methods for realizing adversarially robust classifiers with limited compute requirements. However, recent works have shown that existing methods for constructing RECs are more vulnerable than initially claimed, casting major doubts on their efficacy and prompting fundamental questions such as: "When are RECs useful?", "What are their limits?", and "How do we train them?". In this work, we first demystify RECs as we derive fundamental results regarding their theoretical limits, necessary and sufficient conditions for them to be useful, and more. Leveraging this new understanding, we propose a new boosting algorithm (BARRE) for training robust RECs, and empirically demonstrate its effectiveness at defending against strong $\ell_\infty$ norm-bounded adversaries across various network architectures and datasets. Our code can be found at https://github.com/hsndbk4/BARRE.
summary: Randomized ensemble classifiers (RECs), where one classifier is randomly selected during inference, have emerged as an attractive alternative to traditional ensembling methods for realizing adversarially robust classifiers with limited compute requirements. However, recent works have shown that existing methods for constructing RECs are more vulnerable than initially claimed, casting major doubts on their efficacy and prompting fundamental questions such as: "When are RECs useful?", "What are their limits?", and "How do we train them?". In this work, we first demystify RECs as we derive fundamental results regarding their theoretical limits, necessary and sufficient conditions for them to be useful, and more. Leveraging this new understanding, we propose a new boosting algorithm (BARRE) for training robust RECs, and empirically demonstrate its effectiveness at defending against strong $\ell_\infty$ norm-bounded adversaries across various network architectures and datasets. Our code can be found at https://github.com/hsndbk4/BARRE.
abstract_zh: 随机集成分类器 (REC)（在推理过程中随机选择一个分类器）已成为传统集成方法的一种有吸引力的替代方案，可在计算要求有限的情况下实现具有对抗性的鲁棒分类器。然而，最近的研究表明，现有的构建 REC 的方法比最初声称的更脆弱，人们对其功效产生了重大怀疑，并引发了诸如“REC 何时有用？”、“它们的局限性是什么？”和“我们如何训练它们？”等基本问题。在这项工作中，我们首先揭开了 REC 的神秘面纱，因为我们得出了有关其理论限制、其有用的必要和充分条件等的基本结果。利用这种新的理解，我们提出了一种新的增强算法（BARRE）来训练鲁棒的 REC，并凭经验证明其在跨各种网络架构和数据集防御强大的 $\ell_\infty$ 范数限制对手方面的有效性。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/hsndbk4/BARRE 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机化集成分类器（RECs）在对抗性扰动下的鲁棒性，并提出新的训练方法BARRE以提升其安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有RECs方法被发现比预期更易受攻击，引发对其有效性、适用场景及训练方式的根本性疑问。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推导RECs的极限条件，提出基于提升算法的BARRE框架训练鲁棒RECs。
AI.result: 实验表明BARRE能在多种网络架构和数据集上有效防御强ℓ∞范数约束的对抗攻击。
AI.conclusion: BARRE为训练鲁棒RECs提供了理论依据和实践方案，明确了其适用边界与优化方向。

authors_text: Panagiotis Charalampopoulos,Bartłomiej Dudek,Paweł Gawrychowski,Karol Pokorski
title: Optimal Heaviest Induced Ancestors
title_zh: 最优最重诱导祖先
abstract: We revisit the Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA) problem that was introduced by Gagie, Gawrychowski, and Nekrich [CCCG 2013] and has a number of applications in string algorithms. Let $T_1$ and $T_2$ be two rooted trees whose nodes have weights that are increasing in all root-to-leaf paths, and labels on the leaves, such that no two leaves of a tree have the same label. A pair of nodes $(u, v)\in T_1 \times T_2$ is \emph{induced} if and only if there is a label shared by leaf-descendants of $u$ and $v$. In an HIA query, given nodes $x \in T_1$ and $y \in T_2$, the goal is to find an induced pair of nodes $(u, v)$ of the maximum total weight such that $u$ is an ancestor of~$x$ and $v$ is an ancestor of $y$. Let $n$ be the upper bound on the sizes of the two trees. It is known that no data structure of size $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ can answer HIA queries in $o(\log n / \log \log n)$ time [Charalampopoulos, Gawrychowski, Pokorski; ICALP 2020]. This (unconditional) lower bound is a $\operatorname{polyloglog} n$ factor away from the query time of the fastest $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure known to date for the HIA problem [Abedin, Hooshmand, Ganguly, Thankachan; Algorithmica 2022]. In this work, we resolve the query-time complexity of the HIA problem for the near-linear space regime by presenting a data structure that can be built in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ time and answers HIA queries in $\mathcal{O}(\log n/\log\log n)$ time. As a direct corollary, we obtain an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure that maintains the LCS of a static string and a dynamic string, both of length at most $n$, in time optimal for this space regime. The main ingredients of our approach are fractional cascading and the utilization of an $\mathcal{O}(\log n/ \log\log n)$-depth tree decomposition.
summary: We revisit the Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA) problem that was introduced by Gagie, Gawrychowski, and Nekrich [CCCG 2013] and has a number of applications in string algorithms. Let $T_1$ and $T_2$ be two rooted trees whose nodes have weights that are increasing in all root-to-leaf paths, and labels on the leaves, such that no two leaves of a tree have the same label. A pair of nodes $(u, v)\in T_1 \times T_2$ is \emph{induced} if and only if there is a label shared by leaf-descendants of $u$ and $v$. In an HIA query, given nodes $x \in T_1$ and $y \in T_2$, the goal is to find an induced pair of nodes $(u, v)$ of the maximum total weight such that $u$ is an ancestor of~$x$ and $v$ is an ancestor of $y$. Let $n$ be the upper bound on the sizes of the two trees. It is known that no data structure of size $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ can answer HIA queries in $o(\log n / \log \log n)$ time [Charalampopoulos, Gawrychowski, Pokorski; ICALP 2020]. This (unconditional) lower bound is a $\operatorname{polyloglog} n$ factor away from the query time of the fastest $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure known to date for the HIA problem [Abedin, Hooshmand, Ganguly, Thankachan; Algorithmica 2022]. In this work, we resolve the query-time complexity of the HIA problem for the near-linear space regime by presenting a data structure that can be built in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ time and answers HIA queries in $\mathcal{O}(\log n/\log\log n)$ time. As a direct corollary, we obtain an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure that maintains the LCS of a static string and a dynamic string, both of length at most $n$, in time optimal for this space regime. The main ingredients of our approach are fractional cascading and the utilization of an $\mathcal{O}(\log n/ \log\log n)$-depth tree decomposition.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视由 Gagie、Gawrychowski 和 Nekrich [CCCG 2013] 提出的最重诱导祖先 (HIA) 问题，该问题在字符串算法中有许多应用。令 $T_1$ 和 $T_2$ 为两棵有根树，其节点的权重在所有从根到叶子的路径中都增加，并且叶子上有标签，这样树上没有两个叶子具有相同的标签。当且仅当 $u$ 和 $v$ 的叶子后代共享一个标签时，一对节点 $(u, v)\in T_1 \times T_2$ 是 \emph{induced}。在 HIA 查询中，给定节点 $x \in T_1$ 和 $y \in T_2$，目标是找到最大总权重的归纳节点对 $(u, v)$，使得 $u$ 是 ~$x$ 的祖先，$v$ 是 $y$ 的祖先。令 $n$ 为两棵树大小的上限。众所周知，$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小的数据结构无法在 $o(\log n / \log \log n)$ 时间内回答 HIA 查询 [Charalampopoulos, Gawrychowski, Pokorski; ICLP 2020]。这个（无条件）下限是迄今为止 HIA 问题已知的最快 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小数据结构的查询时间的 $\operatorname{polyloglog} n$ 因子 [Abedin、Hooshmand、Ganguly、Thankachan；算法 2022]。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种可以在 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 时间内构建的数据结构来解决近线性空间体制的 HIA 问题的查询时间复杂度，并在 $\mathcal{O}(\log n/\log\log n)$ 时间内回答 HIA 查询。作为直接推论，我们获得了一个 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小的数据结构，该结构维护静态字符串和动态字符串的 LCS，长度都最多为 $n$，并且对于该空间机制来说是最佳的。我们方法的主要成分是分数级联和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n/ \log\log n)$ 深度树分解的利用。

AI.tldr: 本文解决Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA)问题，在近线性空间下实现最优查询时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: HIA问题在字符串算法中有广泛应用，但现有数据结构的查询时间与理论下限存在差距，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分段级联技术与对数深度树分解方法，构建近线性大小的数据结构。
AI.result: 提出构建时间为O~(n)、查询时间为O(log n / log log n)的数据结构，并推广至静态与动态字符串最长公共子串维护问题。
AI.conclusion: 首次在近线性空间下达到HIA问题的理论最优查询时间，为相关算法提供更高效基础支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文解决Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA)问题，在近线性空间下实现最优查询时间复杂度。
ai_content.motivation: HIA问题在字符串算法中有广泛应用，但现有数据结构的查询时间与理论下限存在差距，需更优解决方案。
ai_content.method: 采用分段级联技术与对数深度树分解方法，构建近线性大小的数据结构。
ai_content.result: 提出构建时间为O~(n)、查询时间为O(log n / log log n)的数据结构，并推广至静态与动态字符串最长公共子串维护问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 首次在近线性空间下达到HIA问题的理论最优查询时间，为相关算法提供更高效基础支持。

search_text: Optimal Heaviest Induced Ancestors 最优最重诱导祖先 We revisit the Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA) problem that was introduced by Gagie, Gawrychowski, and Nekrich [CCCG 2013] and has a number of applications in string algorithms. Let $T_1$ and $T_2$ be two rooted trees whose nodes have weights that are increasing in all root-to-leaf paths, and labels on the leaves, such that no two leaves of a tree have the same label. A pair of nodes $(u, v)\in T_1 \times T_2$ is \emph{induced} if and only if there is a label shared by leaf-descendants of $u$ and $v$. In an HIA query, given nodes $x \in T_1$ and $y \in T_2$, the goal is to find an induced pair of nodes $(u, v)$ of the maximum total weight such that $u$ is an ancestor of~$x$ and $v$ is an ancestor of $y$. Let $n$ be the upper bound on the sizes of the two trees. It is known that no data structure of size $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ can answer HIA queries in $o(\log n / \log \log n)$ time [Charalampopoulos, Gawrychowski, Pokorski; ICALP 2020]. This (unconditional) lower bound is a $\operatorname{polyloglog} n$ factor away from the query time of the fastest $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure known to date for the HIA problem [Abedin, Hooshmand, Ganguly, Thankachan; Algorithmica 2022]. In this work, we resolve the query-time complexity of the HIA problem for the near-linear space regime by presenting a data structure that can be built in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ time and answers HIA queries in $\mathcal{O}(\log n/\log\log n)$ time. As a direct corollary, we obtain an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$-size data structure that maintains the LCS of a static string and a dynamic string, both of length at most $n$, in time optimal for this space regime. The main ingredients of our approach are fractional cascading and the utilization of an $\mathcal{O}(\log n/ \log\log n)$-depth tree decomposition. 我们重新审视由 Gagie、Gawrychowski 和 Nekrich [CCCG 2013] 提出的最重诱导祖先 (HIA) 问题，该问题在字符串算法中有许多应用。令 $T_1$ 和 $T_2$ 为两棵有根树，其节点的权重在所有从根到叶子的路径中都增加，并且叶子上有标签，这样树上没有两个叶子具有相同的标签。当且仅当 $u$ 和 $v$ 的叶子后代共享一个标签时，一对节点 $(u, v)\in T_1 \times T_2$ 是 \emph{induced}。在 HIA 查询中，给定节点 $x \in T_1$ 和 $y \in T_2$，目标是找到最大总权重的归纳节点对 $(u, v)$，使得 $u$ 是 ~$x$ 的祖先，$v$ 是 $y$ 的祖先。令 $n$ 为两棵树大小的上限。众所周知，$\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小的数据结构无法在 $o(\log n / \log \log n)$ 时间内回答 HIA 查询 [Charalampopoulos, Gawrychowski, Pokorski; ICLP 2020]。这个（无条件）下限是迄今为止 HIA 问题已知的最快 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小数据结构的查询时间的 $\operatorname{polyloglog} n$ 因子 [Abedin、Hooshmand、Ganguly、Thankachan；算法 2022]。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种可以在 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 时间内构建的数据结构来解决近线性空间体制的 HIA 问题的查询时间复杂度，并在 $\mathcal{O}(\log n/\log\log n)$ 时间内回答 HIA 查询。作为直接推论，我们获得了一个 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n)$ 大小的数据结构，该结构维护静态字符串和动态字符串的 LCS，长度都最多为 $n$，并且对于该空间机制来说是最佳的。我们方法的主要成分是分数级联和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n/ \log\log n)$ 深度树分解的利用。 本文解决Heaviest Induced Ancestors (HIA)问题，在近线性空间下实现最优查询时间复杂度。 Panagiotis Charalampopoulos,Bartłomiej Dudek,Paweł Gawrychowski,Karol Pokorski cs.DS

authors: T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha

authors_text: T. H. M. N. C. Thelasingha,U. V. B. L. Udugama,E. M. S. P. Ekanayake,G. M. R. I. Godaliyadda,M. P. B. Ekanayake,B. G. L. T. Samaranayake,J. V. Wijayakulasooriya
title: Laser Ranging Based Intelligent System for Unknown Environment Mapping
title_zh: 基于激光测距的未知环境测绘智能系统
comment: Annual Sessions 2017 - The Institute of Engineers Sri Lanka At: Colombo, Sri Lanka Volume: Transactions- part B
comments: Annual Sessions 2017 - The Institute of Engineers Sri Lanka At: Colombo, Sri Lanka Volume: Transactions- part B
abstract: This work describes the implementation of a simple and computationally efficient Intelligent Navigation System (INS) for autonomous systems used in areas where human access is impossible. The system uses Laser Range Finder (LRF) readings as input, making it suitable for mobile platform implementation. The INS pre-processes the LRF readings to remove noise and determines an obstacle-free path for mapping. The system's localization method uses a similarity transform and particle filter. The system was tested in artificially generated environments and emulated in real-time with real-environment data. The system was then implemented in a Raspberry Pi3 on a 3WD Omni-directional mobile platform and tested in real environments. The system was able to generate an accurate 2D map of the area. The proposed methodology was shown to be efficient through a comparative analysis of execution time.
summary: This work describes the implementation of a simple and computationally efficient Intelligent Navigation System (INS) for autonomous systems used in areas where human access is impossible. The system uses Laser Range Finder (LRF) readings as input, making it suitable for mobile platform implementation. The INS pre-processes the LRF readings to remove noise and determines an obstacle-free path for mapping. The system's localization method uses a similarity transform and particle filter. The system was tested in artificially generated environments and emulated in real-time with real-environment data. The system was then implemented in a Raspberry Pi3 on a 3WD Omni-directional mobile platform and tested in real environments. The system was able to generate an accurate 2D map of the area. The proposed methodology was shown to be efficient through a comparative analysis of execution time.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了一种简单且计算高效的智能导航系统（INS）的实现，该系统适用于人类无法进入的区域中使用的自主系统。该系统使用激光测距仪 (LRF) 读数作为输入，使其适合移动平台实施。 INS 预处理 LRF 读数以消除噪声并确定用于测绘的无障碍路径。该系统的定位方法使用相似变换和粒子滤波器。该系统在人工生成的环境中进行了测试，并使用真实环境数据进行实时仿真。然后该系统在 3WD 全向移动平台上的 Raspberry Pi3 中实现，并在真实环境中进行测试。该系统能够生成该区域的准确二维地图。通过执行时间的比较分析，所提出的方法被证明是有效的。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于激光测距的智能导航系统，用于未知环境的自主映射。
AI.motivation: 在人类无法进入的危险或封闭区域，需要高效的自主导航与环境映射解决方案。
AI.method: 利用激光测距仪数据预处理去噪，结合相似变换与粒子滤波定位，通过Raspberry Pi3平台实现移动映射。
AI.result: 系统成功生成准确2D地图，并通过执行时间对比验证了方法的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可有效应用于真实环境，为未知区域的自主导航提供可靠方案。

authors_text: Brooke Krajancich,Petr Kellnhofer,Gordon Wetzstein
title: Towards Attention-aware Foveated Rendering
title_zh: 迈向注意力感知注视点渲染
abstract: Foveated graphics is a promising approach to solving the bandwidth challenges of immersive virtual and augmented reality displays by exploiting the falloff in spatial acuity in the periphery of the visual field. However, the perceptual models used in these applications neglect the effects of higher-level cognitive processing, namely the allocation of visual attention, and are thus overestimating sensitivity in the periphery in many scenarios. Here, we introduce the first attention-aware model of contrast sensitivity. We conduct user studies to measure contrast sensitivity under different attention distributions and show that sensitivity in the periphery drops significantly when the user is required to allocate attention to the fovea. We motivate the development of future foveation models with another user study and demonstrate that tolerance for foveation in the periphery is significantly higher when the user is concentrating on a task in the fovea. Analysis of our model predicts significant bandwidth savings over those afforded by current models. As such, our work forms the foundation for attention-aware foveated graphics techniques.
summary: Foveated graphics is a promising approach to solving the bandwidth challenges of immersive virtual and augmented reality displays by exploiting the falloff in spatial acuity in the periphery of the visual field. However, the perceptual models used in these applications neglect the effects of higher-level cognitive processing, namely the allocation of visual attention, and are thus overestimating sensitivity in the periphery in many scenarios. Here, we introduce the first attention-aware model of contrast sensitivity. We conduct user studies to measure contrast sensitivity under different attention distributions and show that sensitivity in the periphery drops significantly when the user is required to allocate attention to the fovea. We motivate the development of future foveation models with another user study and demonstrate that tolerance for foveation in the periphery is significantly higher when the user is concentrating on a task in the fovea. Analysis of our model predicts significant bandwidth savings over those afforded by current models. As such, our work forms the foundation for attention-aware foveated graphics techniques.
abstract_zh: 中心点图形是一种很有前途的方法，可以利用视野外围空间敏锐度的下降来解决沉浸式虚拟和增强现实显示的带宽挑战。然而，这些应用中使用的感知模型忽略了高级认知处理的影响，即视觉注意力的分配，因此在许多情况下高估了外围的敏感性。在这里，我们介绍第一个对比敏感度的注意力感知模型。我们进行了用户研究来测量不同注意力分布下的对比敏感度，结果表明，当用户需要将注意力分配到中央凹时，外围敏感度显着下降。我们通过另一项用户研究推动了未来注视点模型的开发，并证明当用户专注于中央凹中的任务时，外围注视点的容忍度显着更高。对我们的模型的分析预测，与当前模型相比，可以显着节省带宽。因此，我们的工作构成了注意力感知的注视点图形技术的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉注意力的注视渲染模型，通过考虑用户注意力分配来优化虚拟现实和增强现实中的带宽使用。
AI.motivation: 现有注视渲染模型未考虑高层认知处理中的注意力分配，导致周边区域敏感度被高估，影响带宽优化效果。
AI.method: 通过用户实验测量不同注意力分布下的对比敏感度，并设计实验验证周边区域在注意力集中时的渲染容忍度。
AI.result: 实验表明，当用户注意力集中在中央视野时，周边区域敏感度显著下降，且对周边区域渲染失真的容忍度更高。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为注意力感知的注视渲染技术奠定了基础，可实现比现有模型更显著的带宽节省。

authors_text: Eric Schwitzgebel,David Schwitzgebel,Anna Strasser
title: Creating a Large Language Model of a Philosopher
title_zh: 创建哲学家的大型语言模型
comment: Earlier version (Nov 2, 2022) available at http://www.faculty.ucr.edu/~eschwitz/SchwitzPapers/GPT-3-Dennett-221102.pdf; stable URL for updated versions http://faculty.ucr.edu/~eschwitz/SchwitzAbs/GPT3Dennett.htm
comments: Earlier version (Nov 2, 2022) available at http://www.faculty.ucr.edu/~eschwitz/SchwitzPapers/GPT-3-Dennett-221102.pdf; stable URL for updated versions http://faculty.ucr.edu/~eschwitz/SchwitzAbs/GPT3Dennett.htm
abstract: Can large language models be trained to produce philosophical texts that are difficult to distinguish from texts produced by human philosophers? To address this question, we fine-tuned OpenAI's GPT-3 with the works of philosopher Daniel C. Dennett as additional training data. To explore the Dennett model, we asked the real Dennett ten philosophical questions and then posed the same questions to the language model, collecting four responses for each question without cherry-picking. We recruited 425 participants to distinguish Dennett's answer from the four machine-generated answers. Experts on Dennett's work (N = 25) succeeded 51% of the time, above the chance rate of 20% but short of our hypothesized rate of 80% correct. For two of the ten questions, the language model produced at least one answer that experts selected more frequently than Dennett's own answer. Philosophy blog readers (N = 302) performed similarly to the experts, while ordinary research participants (N = 98) were near chance distinguishing GPT-3's responses from those of an "actual human philosopher".
summary: Can large language models be trained to produce philosophical texts that are difficult to distinguish from texts produced by human philosophers? To address this question, we fine-tuned OpenAI's GPT-3 with the works of philosopher Daniel C. Dennett as additional training data. To explore the Dennett model, we asked the real Dennett ten philosophical questions and then posed the same questions to the language model, collecting four responses for each question without cherry-picking. We recruited 425 participants to distinguish Dennett's answer from the four machine-generated answers. Experts on Dennett's work (N = 25) succeeded 51% of the time, above the chance rate of 20% but short of our hypothesized rate of 80% correct. For two of the ten questions, the language model produced at least one answer that experts selected more frequently than Dennett's own answer. Philosophy blog readers (N = 302) performed similarly to the experts, while ordinary research participants (N = 98) were near chance distinguishing GPT-3's responses from those of an "actual human philosopher".
abstract_zh: 能否训练大型语言模型来生成难以与人类哲学家生成的文本区分开来的哲学文本？为了解决这个问题，我们使用哲学家 Daniel C. Dennett 的作品作为额外的训练数据对 OpenAI 的 GPT-3 进行了微调。为了探索丹尼特模型，我们问了真正的丹尼特十个哲学问题，然后向语言模型提出了相同的问题，收集每个问题的四个答案，而不进行挑选。我们招募了 425 名参与者来区分 Dennett 的答案和四个机器生成的答案。 Dennett 工作的专家 (N = 25) 的成功率为 51%，高于 20% 的偶然率，但低于我们假设的 80% 的正确率。对于十个问题中的两个，语言模型至少生成了一个专家选择的答案比丹尼特自己的答案更频繁的答案。哲学博客读者 (N = 302) 的表现与专家相似，而普通研究参与者 (N = 98) 几乎有机会将 GPT-3 的反应与“真正的人类哲学家”的反应区分开来。

AI.tldr: 训练大型语言模型生成与人类哲学家难以区分的哲学文本
AI.motivation: 探讨大型语言模型是否能模拟哲学家的写作特点并生成具有哲学深度的文本
AI.method: 使用丹尼尔·丹内特著作微调GPT-3，让模型与真人回答相同问题，招募425人进行盲测区分
AI.result: 专家识别准确率51%（高于随机但低于预期），普通参与者接近随机水平，模型在2个问题上出现被误选为最佳回答的情况
AI.conclusion: 语言模型能生成接近人类哲学家水平的文本，但尚未达到完全难以区分的程度
