authors_text: Yupeng Zheng,Chengliang Zhong,Pengfei Li,Huan-ang Gao,Yuhang Zheng,Bu Jin,Ling Wang,Hao Zhao,Guyue Zhou,Qichao Zhang,Dongbin Zhao
title: STEPS: Joint Self-supervised Nighttime Image Enhancement and Depth Estimation
title_zh: 步骤：联合自监督夜间图像增强和深度估计
abstract: Self-supervised depth estimation draws a lot of attention recently as it can promote the 3D sensing capabilities of self-driving vehicles. However, it intrinsically relies upon the photometric consistency assumption, which hardly holds during nighttime. Although various supervised nighttime image enhancement methods have been proposed, their generalization performance in challenging driving scenarios is not satisfactory. To this end, we propose the first method that jointly learns a nighttime image enhancer and a depth estimator, without using ground truth for either task. Our method tightly entangles two self-supervised tasks using a newly proposed uncertain pixel masking strategy. This strategy originates from the observation that nighttime images not only suffer from underexposed regions but also from overexposed regions. By fitting a bridge-shaped curve to the illumination map distribution, both regions are suppressed and two tasks are bridged naturally. We benchmark the method on two established datasets: nuScenes and RobotCar and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both of them. Detailed ablations also reveal the mechanism of our proposal. Last but not least, to mitigate the problem of sparse ground truth of existing datasets, we provide a new photo-realistically enhanced nighttime dataset based upon CARLA. It brings meaningful new challenges to the community. Codes, data, and models are available at https://github.com/ucaszyp/STEPS.
summary: Self-supervised depth estimation draws a lot of attention recently as it can promote the 3D sensing capabilities of self-driving vehicles. However, it intrinsically relies upon the photometric consistency assumption, which hardly holds during nighttime. Although various supervised nighttime image enhancement methods have been proposed, their generalization performance in challenging driving scenarios is not satisfactory. To this end, we propose the first method that jointly learns a nighttime image enhancer and a depth estimator, without using ground truth for either task. Our method tightly entangles two self-supervised tasks using a newly proposed uncertain pixel masking strategy. This strategy originates from the observation that nighttime images not only suffer from underexposed regions but also from overexposed regions. By fitting a bridge-shaped curve to the illumination map distribution, both regions are suppressed and two tasks are bridged naturally. We benchmark the method on two established datasets: nuScenes and RobotCar and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both of them. Detailed ablations also reveal the mechanism of our proposal. Last but not least, to mitigate the problem of sparse ground truth of existing datasets, we provide a new photo-realistically enhanced nighttime dataset based upon CARLA. It brings meaningful new challenges to the community. Codes, data, and models are available at https://github.com/ucaszyp/STEPS.
abstract_zh: 自监督深度估计最近引起了广泛关注，因为它可以提升自动驾驶车辆的 3D 传感能力。然而，它本质上依赖于光度一致性假设，而该假设在夜间几乎不成立。尽管已经提出了各种有监督的夜间图像增强方法，但它们在具有挑战性的驾驶场景中的泛化性能并不令人满意。为此，我们提出了第一种联合学习夜间图像增强器和深度估计器的方法，而不使用地面实况来完成这两个任务。我们的方法使用新提出的不确定像素掩蔽策略将两个自监督任务紧密地结合在一起。该策略源于对夜间图像不仅存在曝光不足区域而且存在曝光过度区域的观察。通过将桥形曲线拟合到照明图分布，两个区域都被抑制，两个任务自然地桥接。我们在两个已建立的数据集：nuScenes 和 RobotCar 上对该方法进行了基准测试，并在这两个数据集上展示了最先进的性能。详细的消融也揭示了我们提案的机制。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，为了缓解现有数据集稀疏地面实况的问题，我们提供了一个基于 CARLA 的新的照片级真实增强夜间数据集。它给社区带来了有意义的新挑战。代码、数据和模型可在 https://github.com/ucaszyp/STEPS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需真实标签的夜间图像增强与深度估计联合自监督方法STEPS。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督深度估计依赖光度一致性假设，在夜间场景中效果不佳；监督式夜间增强方法在复杂驾驶场景中泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过不确定像素掩码策略联合学习夜间图像增强器和深度估计器，利用光照图分布拟合桥形曲线抑制过曝/欠曝区域，实现双任务自然衔接。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和RobotCar数据集上达到SOTA性能，通过消融实验验证方法有效性，并基于CARLA发布新型夜间数据集。
AI.conclusion: STEPS通过联合优化机制有效提升夜间场景的图像增强与深度估计性能，新数据集为社区提供更具挑战性的研究基准。

search_text: STEPS: Joint Self-supervised Nighttime Image Enhancement and Depth Estimation 步骤：联合自监督夜间图像增强和深度估计 Self-supervised depth estimation draws a lot of attention recently as it can promote the 3D sensing capabilities of self-driving vehicles. However, it intrinsically relies upon the photometric consistency assumption, which hardly holds during nighttime. Although various supervised nighttime image enhancement methods have been proposed, their generalization performance in challenging driving scenarios is not satisfactory. To this end, we propose the first method that jointly learns a nighttime image enhancer and a depth estimator, without using ground truth for either task. Our method tightly entangles two self-supervised tasks using a newly proposed uncertain pixel masking strategy. This strategy originates from the observation that nighttime images not only suffer from underexposed regions but also from overexposed regions. By fitting a bridge-shaped curve to the illumination map distribution, both regions are suppressed and two tasks are bridged naturally. We benchmark the method on two established datasets: nuScenes and RobotCar and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both of them. Detailed ablations also reveal the mechanism of our proposal. Last but not least, to mitigate the problem of sparse ground truth of existing datasets, we provide a new photo-realistically enhanced nighttime dataset based upon CARLA. It brings meaningful new challenges to the community. authors_text: Frederik Warburg,Marco Miani,Silas Brack,Soren Hauberg
title: Bayesian Metric Learning for Uncertainty Quantification in Image Retrieval
title_zh: 图像检索中不确定性量化的贝叶斯度量学习
abstract: We propose the first Bayesian encoder for metric learning. Rather than relying on neural amortization as done in prior works, we learn a distribution over the network weights with the Laplace Approximation. We actualize this by first proving that the contrastive loss is a valid log-posterior. We then propose three methods that ensure a positive definite Hessian. Lastly, we present a novel decomposition of the Generalized Gauss-Newton approximation. Empirically, we show that our Laplacian Metric Learner (LAM) estimates well-calibrated uncertainties, reliably detects out-of-distribution examples, and yields state-of-the-art predictive performance.
summary: We propose the first Bayesian encoder for metric learning. Rather than relying on neural amortization as done in prior works, we learn a distribution over the network weights with the Laplace Approximation. We actualize this by first proving that the contrastive loss is a valid log-posterior. We then propose three methods that ensure a positive definite Hessian. Lastly, we present a novel decomposition of the Generalized Gauss-Newton approximation. Empirically, we show that our Laplacian Metric Learner (LAM) estimates well-calibrated uncertainties, reliably detects out-of-distribution examples, and yields state-of-the-art predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个用于度量学习的贝叶斯编码器。我们没有像之前的工作那样依赖神经摊销，而是使用拉普拉斯近似来学习网络权重的分布。我们通过首先证明对比损失是有效的对数后验来实现这一点。然后我们提出了三种确保正定 Hessian 矩阵的方法。最后，我们提出了广义高斯-牛顿近似的新颖分解。根据经验，我们表明我们的拉普拉斯度量学习器 (LAM) 可以估计经过良好校准的不确定性，可靠地检测分布外的示例，并产生最先进的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯度量学习方法，用于图像检索中的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 传统神经摊销方法难以准确量化模型不确定性，而贝叶斯方法可通过权重分布建模提升不确定性估计可靠性。
AI.method: 基于拉普拉斯近似学习网络权重分布，证明对比损失为有效对数后验，提出三种确保Hessian正定性的方法，并分解广义高斯-牛顿近似。
AI.result: LAM方法在不确定性校准、分布外检测和预测性能上均达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯度量学习有效提升了图像检索的不确定性量化能力，为后续研究提供新方向。

method: 基于拉普拉斯近似学习网络权重分布，证明对比损失为有效对数后验，提出三种确保Hessian正定性的方法，并分解广义高斯-牛顿近似。

search_text: Bayesian Metric Learning for Uncertainty Quantification in Image Retrieval 图像检索中不确定性量化的贝叶斯度量学习 We propose the first Bayesian encoder for metric learning. Rather than relying on neural amortization as done in prior works, we learn a distribution over the network weights with the Laplace Approximation. We actualize this by first proving that the contrastive loss is a valid log-posterior. We then propose three methods that ensure a positive definite Hessian. Lastly, we present a novel decomposition of the Generalized Gauss-Newton approximation. Empirically, we show that our Laplacian Metric Learner (LAM) estimates well-calibrated uncertainties, reliably detects out-of-distribution examples, and yields state-of-the-art predictive performance. 我们提出了第一个用于度量学习的贝叶斯编码器。我们没有像之前的工作那样依赖神经摊销，而是使用拉普拉斯近似来学习网络权重的分布。我们通过首先证明对比损失是有效的对数后验来实现这一点。然后我们提出了三种确保正定 Hessian 矩阵的方法。最后，我们提出了广义高斯-牛顿近似的新颖分解。根据经验，我们表明我们的拉普拉斯度量学习器 (LAM) 可以估计经过良好校准的不确定性，可靠地检测分布外的示例，并产生最先进的预测性能。 本文提出一种贝叶斯度量学习方法，用于图像检索中的不确定性量化。 Frederik Warburg,Marco Miani,Silas Brack,Soren Hauberg cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoxi Chen,Guangcong Wang,Ziwei Liu
title: SceneDreamer: Unbounded 3D Scene Generation from 2D Image Collections
title_zh: SceneDreamer：从 2D 图像集合生成无限 3D 场景
comment: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis & Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2023; Project Page https://scene-dreamer.github.io/ Code https://github.com/FrozenBurning/SceneDreamer
comments: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis & Machine Intelligence (TPAMI) 2023; Project Page https://scene-dreamer.github.io/ Code https://github.com/FrozenBurning/SceneDreamer
abstract: In this work, we present SceneDreamer, an unconditional generative model for unbounded 3D scenes, which synthesizes large-scale 3D landscapes from random noise. Our framework is learned from in-the-wild 2D image collections only, without any 3D annotations. At the core of SceneDreamer is a principled learning paradigm comprising 1) an efficient yet expressive 3D scene representation, 2) a generative scene parameterization, and 3) an effective renderer that can leverage the knowledge from 2D images. Our approach begins with an efficient bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation generated from simplex noise, which includes a height field for surface elevation and a semantic field for detailed scene semantics. This BEV scene representation enables 1) representing a 3D scene with quadratic complexity, 2) disentangled geometry and semantics, and 3) efficient training. Moreover, we propose a novel generative neural hash grid to parameterize the latent space based on 3D positions and scene semantics, aiming to encode generalizable features across various scenes. Lastly, a neural volumetric renderer, learned from 2D image collections through adversarial training, is employed to produce photorealistic images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of SceneDreamer and superiority over state-of-the-art methods in generating vivid yet diverse unbounded 3D worlds.
summary: In this work, we present SceneDreamer, an unconditional generative model for unbounded 3D scenes, which synthesizes large-scale 3D landscapes from random noise. Our framework is learned from in-the-wild 2D image collections only, without any 3D annotations. At the core of SceneDreamer is a principled learning paradigm comprising 1) an efficient yet expressive 3D scene representation, 2) a generative scene parameterization, and 3) an effective renderer that can leverage the knowledge from 2D images. Our approach begins with an efficient bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation generated from simplex noise, which includes a height field for surface elevation and a semantic field for detailed scene semantics. This BEV scene representation enables 1) representing a 3D scene with quadratic complexity, 2) disentangled geometry and semantics, and 3) efficient training. Moreover, we propose a novel generative neural hash grid to parameterize the latent space based on 3D positions and scene semantics, aiming to encode generalizable features across various scenes. Lastly, a neural volumetric renderer, learned from 2D image collections through adversarial training, is employed to produce photorealistic images. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of SceneDreamer and superiority over state-of-the-art methods in generating vivid yet diverse unbounded 3D worlds.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 SceneDreamer，一种用于无界 3D 场景的无条件生成模型，它从随机噪声中合成大规模 3D 景观。我们的框架仅从野外 2D 图像集合中学习，没有任何 3D 注释。 SceneDreamer 的核心是一个有原则的学习范式，包括 1) 高效且富有表现力的 3D 场景表示，2) 生成场景参数化，以及 3) 可以利用 2D 图像知识的有效渲染器。我们的方法从从单纯形噪声生成的有效鸟瞰图（BEV）表示开始，其中包括用于表面高程的高度场和用于详细场景语义的语义场。这种 BEV 场景表示能够实现 1) 表示具有二次复杂度的 3D 场景，2) 解开几何和语义，以及 3) 高效训练。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的生成神经哈希网格，用于基于 3D 位置和场景语义对潜在空间进行参数化，旨在编码跨各种场景的可概括特征。最后，通过对抗训练从 2D 图像集合中学习的神经体积渲染器被用来生成逼真的图像。大量实验证明了 SceneDreamer 在生成生动而多样的无界 3D 世界方面的有效性以及优于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceneDreamer，一种无需3D标注即可从2D图像集合生成大规模无界3D景观的无条件生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成方法依赖昂贵的3D标注数据，而本文旨在通过仅使用自然场景的2D图像集合，实现无需3D监督的高效3D场景生成。
AI.method: 基于鸟瞰图（BEV）表示，结合高度场与语义场构建3D场景表示；设计生成神经哈希网格参数化潜在空间；通过对抗训练的神经体渲染器生成逼真图像。
AI.result: 实验表明SceneDreamer在生成生动且多样化的无界3D世界方面优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SceneDreamer为从2D图像生成3D场景提供了新颖框架，突破了传统方法对3D标注的依赖，推动了无监督3D生成研究。

Our approach begins with an efficient bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation generated from simplex noise, which includes a height field for surface elevation and a semantic field for detailed scene semantics. This BEV scene representation enables 1) representing a 3D scene with quadratic complexity, 2) disentangled geometry and semantics, and 3) efficient training. Moreover, we propose a novel generative neural hash grid to parameterize the latent space based on 3D positions and scene semantics, aiming to encode generalizable features across various scenes. Lastly, a neural volumetric renderer, learned from 2D image collections through adversarial training, is employed to produce photorealistic images. authors_text: Eyal Molad,Eliahu Horwitz,Dani Valevski,Alex Rav Acha,Yossi Matias,Yael Pritch,Yaniv Leviathan,Yedid Hoshen
title: Dreamix: Video Diffusion Models are General Video Editors
title_zh: Dreamix：视频扩散模型是通用视频编辑器
abstract: Text-driven image and video diffusion models have recently achieved unprecedented generation realism. While diffusion models have been successfully applied for image editing, very few works have done so for video editing. We present the first diffusion-based method that is able to perform text-based motion and appearance editing of general videos. Our approach uses a video diffusion model to combine, at inference time, the low-resolution spatio-temporal information from the original video with new, high resolution information that it synthesized to align with the guiding text prompt. As obtaining high-fidelity to the original video requires retaining some of its high-resolution information, we add a preliminary stage of finetuning the model on the original video, significantly boosting fidelity. We propose to improve motion editability by a new, mixed objective that jointly finetunes with full temporal attention and with temporal attention masking. We further introduce a new framework for image animation. We first transform the image into a coarse video by simple image processing operations such as replication and perspective geometric projections, and then use our general video editor to animate it. As a further application, we can use our method for subject-driven video generation. Extensive qualitative and numerical experiments showcase the remarkable editing ability of our method and establish its superior performance compared to baseline methods.
summary: Text-driven image and video diffusion models have recently achieved unprecedented generation realism. While diffusion models have been successfully applied for image editing, very few works have done so for video editing. We present the first diffusion-based method that is able to perform text-based motion and appearance editing of general videos. Our approach uses a video diffusion model to combine, at inference time, the low-resolution spatio-temporal information from the original video with new, high resolution information that it synthesized to align with the guiding text prompt. As obtaining high-fidelity to the original video requires retaining some of its high-resolution information, we add a preliminary stage of finetuning the model on the original video, significantly boosting fidelity. We propose to improve motion editability by a new, mixed objective that jointly finetunes with full temporal attention and with temporal attention masking. We further introduce a new framework for image animation. We first transform the image into a coarse video by simple image processing operations such as replication and perspective geometric projections, and then use our general video editor to animate it. As a further application, we can use our method for subject-driven video generation. Extensive qualitative and numerical experiments showcase the remarkable editing ability of our method and establish its superior performance compared to baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 文本驱动的图像和视频传播模型最近实现了前所未有的生成现实主义。虽然扩散模型已成功应用于图像编辑，但很少有作品将其应用于视频编辑。我们提出了第一个基于扩散的方法，能够对一般视频执行基于文本的运动和外观编辑。我们的方法使用视频扩散模型，在推理时将原始视频中的低分辨率时空信息与其合成的新的高分辨率信息相结合，以与引导文本提示保持一致。由于获得原始视频的高保真度需要保留其一些高分辨率信息，因此我们在原始视频上添加了对模型进行微调的初步阶段，从而显着提高了保真度。我们建议通过一个新的混合目标来提高运动可编辑性，该目标与全时间注意力和时间注意力掩蔽联合进行微调。我们进一步介绍了图像动画的新框架。我们首先通过简单的图像处理操作（例如复制和透视几何投影）将图像转换为粗糙的视频，然后使用我们的通用视频编辑器对其进行动画处理。作为进一步的应用，我们可以使用我们的方法来生成主题驱动的视频。广泛的定性和数值实验展示了我们的方法卓越的编辑能力，并确立了其与基线方法相比的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的通用视频编辑方法，能够通过文本提示实现视频的运动和外观编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型在图像编辑中取得成功，但视频编辑领域研究较少，现有方法难以实现高质量的文本驱动视频编辑。
AI.method: 结合原始视频的低分辨率时空信息与合成的高分辨率内容，通过预训练模型微调提升保真度，并引入混合目标函数优化运动编辑能力，同时提出图像动画框架和主体驱动视频生成应用。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于基线方法，展现出卓越的视频编辑能力。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型可通过特定技术扩展为通用视频编辑工具，为文本驱动的视频生成与编辑提供新思路。

We first transform the image into a coarse video by simple image processing operations such as replication and perspective geometric projections, and then use our general video editor to animate it. As a further application, we can use our method for subject-driven video generation. Extensive qualitative and numerical experiments showcase the remarkable editing ability of our method and establish its superior performance compared to baseline methods. 文本驱动的图像和视频传播模型最近实现了前所未有的生成现实主义。虽然扩散模型已成功应用于图像编辑，但很少有作品将其应用于视频编辑。我们提出了第一个基于扩散的方法，能够对一般视频执行基于文本的运动和外观编辑。我们的方法使用视频扩散模型，在推理时将原始视频中的低分辨率时空信息与其合成的新的高分辨率信息相结合，以与引导文本提示保持一致。由于获得原始视频的高保真度需要保留其一些高分辨率信息，因此我们在原始视频上添加了对模型进行微调的初步阶段，从而显着提高了保真度。我们建议通过一个新的混合目标来提高运动可编辑性，该目标与全时间注意力和时间注意力掩蔽联合进行微调。我们进一步介绍了图像动画的新框架。我们首先通过简单的图像处理操作（例如复制和透视几何投影）将图像转换为粗糙的视频，然后使用我们的通用视频编辑器对其进行动画处理。作为进一步的应用，我们可以使用我们的方法来生成主题驱动的视频。广泛的定性和数值实验展示了我们的方法卓越的编辑能力，并确立了其与基线方法相比的优越性能。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的通用视频编辑方法，能够通过文本提示实现视频的运动和外观编辑。 Eyal Molad,Eliahu Horwitz,Dani Valevski,Alex Rav Acha,Yossi Matias,Yael Pritch,Yaniv Leviathan,Yedid Hoshen cs.CV

authors_text: David M. Chan,Austin Myers,Sudheendra Vijayanarasimhan,David A. Ross,John Canny
title: IC3: Image Captioning by Committee Consensus
title_zh: IC3：委员会共识的图像说明
abstract: If you ask a human to describe an image, they might do so in a thousand different ways. Traditionally, image captioning models are trained to generate a single "best" (most like a reference) image caption. Unfortunately, doing so encourages captions that are "informationally impoverished," and focus on only a subset of the possible details, while ignoring other potentially useful information in the scene. In this work, we introduce a simple, yet novel, method: "Image Captioning by Committee Consensus" (IC3), designed to generate a single caption that captures high-level details from several annotator viewpoints. Humans rate captions produced by IC3 at least as helpful as baseline SOTA models more than two thirds of the time, and IC3 can improve the performance of SOTA automated recall systems by up to 84%, outperforming single human-generated reference captions, and indicating significant improvements over SOTA approaches for visual description. Code is available at https://davidmchan.github.io/caption-by-committee/
summary: If you ask a human to describe an image, they might do so in a thousand different ways. Traditionally, image captioning models are trained to generate a single "best" (most like a reference) image caption. Unfortunately, doing so encourages captions that are "informationally impoverished," and focus on only a subset of the possible details, while ignoring other potentially useful information in the scene. In this work, we introduce a simple, yet novel, method: "Image Captioning by Committee Consensus" (IC3), designed to generate a single caption that captures high-level details from several annotator viewpoints. Humans rate captions produced by IC3 at least as helpful as baseline SOTA models more than two thirds of the time, and IC3 can improve the performance of SOTA automated recall systems by up to 84%, outperforming single human-generated reference captions, and indicating significant improvements over SOTA approaches for visual description. Code is available at https://davidmchan.github.io/caption-by-committee/
abstract_zh: 如果你要求一个人描述一幅图像，他们可能会用一千种不同的方式来描述。传统上，图像字幕模型经过训练以生成单个“最佳”（最像参考）图像字幕。不幸的是，这样做会鼓励字幕“信息匮乏”，并且只关注可能细节的子集，而忽略场景中其他潜在有用的信息。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种简单但新颖的方法：“委员会共识图像字幕”（IC3），旨在生成单个字幕，从多个注释者的角度捕获高级细节。在超过三分之二的时间里，人类对 IC3 生成的字幕的评价至少与基线 SOTA 模型一样有用，IC3 可以将 SOTA 自动回忆系统的性能提高高达 84%，优于单个人类生成的参考字幕，并表明相对于视觉描述的 SOTA 方法有显着改进。代码可在 https://davidmchan.github.io/caption-by-committee/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IC3的图像字幕生成方法，通过多视角共识生成更全面的图像描述。
AI.motivation: 传统图像字幕模型仅生成单一最优字幕，导致信息贫乏且忽略场景中潜在细节，无法满足多样化描述需求。
AI.method: 通过训练多个注释者视角的模型并融合其输出，生成综合多角度信息的单一字幕（委员会共识机制）。
AI.result: 人类评估显示IC3生成的字幕有超过三分之二的时间比基线模型更有效，可提升自动召回系统性能达84%，优于单一人工参考字幕。
AI.conclusion: IC3方法通过多视角融合显著提升了图像字幕的全面性与实用性，优于现有最先进模型。

authors_text: Manoj Kumar,Mostafa Dehghani,Neil Houlsby
title: Dual PatchNorm
title_zh: 双补丁规范
abstract: We propose Dual PatchNorm: two Layer Normalization layers (LayerNorms), before and after the patch embedding layer in Vision Transformers. We demonstrate that Dual PatchNorm outperforms the result of exhaustive search for alternative LayerNorm placement strategies in the Transformer block itself. In our experiments, incorporating this trivial modification, often leads to improved accuracy over well-tuned Vision Transformers and never hurts.
summary: We propose Dual PatchNorm: two Layer Normalization layers (LayerNorms), before and after the patch embedding layer in Vision Transformers. We demonstrate that Dual PatchNorm outperforms the result of exhaustive search for alternative LayerNorm placement strategies in the Transformer block itself. In our experiments, incorporating this trivial modification, often leads to improved accuracy over well-tuned Vision Transformers and never hurts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 Dual PatchNorm：两个 Layer Normalization 层（LayerNorms），位于 Vision Transformers 中的 patch 嵌入层之前和之后。我们证明 Dual PatchNorm 的性能优于 Transformer 块本身中替代 LayerNorm 放置策略的详尽搜索结果。在我们的实验中，结合这种微不足道的修改，通常会比经过良好调整的 Vision Transformer 提高准确性，而且不会造成任何伤害。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dual PatchNorm的方法，在视觉变换器（Vision Transformers）的patch嵌入层前后各添加一个层归一化（LayerNorm）层。
AI.motivation: 作者希望通过改进层归一化的放置策略，提升视觉变换器的性能。
AI.method: 在视觉变换器的patch嵌入层前后各添加一个LayerNorm层，形成Dual PatchNorm。
AI.result: 实验表明，这种简单的修改在多个任务中提升了视觉变换器的准确率，且从未造成性能下降。
AI.conclusion: Dual PatchNorm是一种有效且简单的改进方法，可以提升视觉变换器的性能。

authors_text: Fares Fourati,Vaneet Aggarwal,Christopher John Quinn,Mohamed-Slim Alouini
title: Randomized Greedy Learning for Non-monotone Stochastic Submodular Maximization Under Full-bandit Feedback
title_zh: 全老虎机反馈下非单调随机子模最大化的随机贪婪学习
abstract: We investigate the problem of unconstrained combinatorial multi-armed bandits with full-bandit feedback and stochastic rewards for submodular maximization. Previous works investigate the same problem assuming a submodular and monotone reward function. In this work, we study a more general problem, i.e., when the reward function is not necessarily monotone, and the submodularity is assumed only in expectation. We propose Randomized Greedy Learning (RGL) algorithm and theoretically prove that it achieves a $\frac{1}{2}$-regret upper bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n T^{\frac{2}{3}})$ for horizon $T$ and number of arms $n$. We also show in experiments that RGL empirically outperforms other full-bandit variants in submodular and non-submodular settings.
summary: We investigate the problem of unconstrained combinatorial multi-armed bandits with full-bandit feedback and stochastic rewards for submodular maximization. Previous works investigate the same problem assuming a submodular and monotone reward function. In this work, we study a more general problem, i.e., when the reward function is not necessarily monotone, and the submodularity is assumed only in expectation. We propose Randomized Greedy Learning (RGL) algorithm and theoretically prove that it achieves a $\frac{1}{2}$-regret upper bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n T^{\frac{2}{3}})$ for horizon $T$ and number of arms $n$. We also show in experiments that RGL empirically outperforms other full-bandit variants in submodular and non-submodular settings.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有全强盗反馈和子模最大化随机奖励的无约束组合多臂强盗问题。以前的工作假设子模和单调奖励函数研究了同样的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了一个更普遍的问题，即当奖励函数不一定是单调的，并且仅在期望中假设子模性时。我们提出随机贪婪学习（RGL）算法，并从理论上证明它对于地平线 $T$ 和臂数 $n$ 实现了 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n T^{\frac{2}{3}})$ 的 $\frac{1}{2}$-regret 上限。我们还在实验中表明，RGL 在子模和非子模设置中凭经验优于其他全老虎机变体。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在全反馈环境下，针对非单调随机子模函数最大化问题的组合多臂老虎机算法。
AI.motivation: 现有工作假设奖励函数单调且子模，但实际问题中奖励函数可能非单调，因此需要更通用的算法框架。
AI.method: 提出随机贪心学习算法（RGL），通过随机化策略处理非单调性，并在期望意义上保持子模性假设。
AI.result: 理论证明RGL的后悔上界为Õ(nT^(2/3))，实验表明其在子模和非子模场景下均优于其他全反馈算法。
AI.conclusion: RGL算法有效解决了非单调随机子模最大化问题，为组合多臂老虎机领域提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jinhao Duan,Fei Kong,Shiqi Wang,Xiaoshuang Shi,Kaidi Xu
title: Are Diffusion Models Vulnerable to Membership Inference Attacks?
title_zh: 扩散模型是否容易受到成员推理攻击？
abstract: Diffusion-based generative models have shown great potential for image synthesis, but there is a lack of research on the security and privacy risks they may pose. In this paper, we investigate the vulnerability of diffusion models to Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs), a common privacy concern. Our results indicate that existing MIAs designed for GANs or VAE are largely ineffective on diffusion models, either due to inapplicable scenarios (e.g., requiring the discriminator of GANs) or inappropriate assumptions (e.g., closer distances between synthetic samples and member samples). To address this gap, we propose Step-wise Error Comparing Membership Inference (SecMI), a query-based MIA that infers memberships by assessing the matching of forward process posterior estimation at each timestep. SecMI follows the common overfitting assumption in MIA where member samples normally have smaller estimation errors, compared with hold-out samples. We consider both the standard diffusion models, e.g., DDPM, and the text-to-image diffusion models, e.g., Latent Diffusion Models and Stable Diffusion. Experimental results demonstrate that our methods precisely infer the membership with high confidence on both of the two scenarios across multiple different datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/jinhaoduan/SecMI.
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have shown great potential for image synthesis, but there is a lack of research on the security and privacy risks they may pose. In this paper, we investigate the vulnerability of diffusion models to Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs), a common privacy concern. Our results indicate that existing MIAs designed for GANs or VAE are largely ineffective on diffusion models, either due to inapplicable scenarios (e.g., requiring the discriminator of GANs) or inappropriate assumptions (e.g., closer distances between synthetic samples and member samples). To address this gap, we propose Step-wise Error Comparing Membership Inference (SecMI), a query-based MIA that infers memberships by assessing the matching of forward process posterior estimation at each timestep. SecMI follows the common overfitting assumption in MIA where member samples normally have smaller estimation errors, compared with hold-out samples. We consider both the standard diffusion models, e.g., DDPM, and the text-to-image diffusion models, e.g., Latent Diffusion Models and Stable Diffusion. Experimental results demonstrate that our methods precisely infer the membership with high confidence on both of the two scenarios across multiple different datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/jinhaoduan/SecMI.
abstract_zh: 基于扩散的生成模型在图像合成方面表现出了巨大的潜力，但缺乏对其可能带来的安全和隐私风险的研究。在本文中，我们研究了扩散模型对成员推理攻击（MIA）的脆弱性，这是一个常见的隐私问题。我们的结果表明，现有的为 GAN 或 VAE 设计的 MIA 对于扩散模型基本上无效，这要么是由于不适用的场景（例如，需要 GAN 的判别器），要么是不适当的假设（例如，合成样本和成员样本之间的距离较近）。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了逐步误差比较隶属度推断（SecMI），这是一种基于查询的 MIA，通过评估每个时间步的前向过程后验估计的匹配来推断隶属度。 SecMI 遵循 MIA 中常见的过度拟合假设，其中与保留样本相比，成员样本通常具有较小的估计误差。我们考虑标准扩散模型（例如 DDPM）和文本到图像扩散模型（例如潜在扩散模型和稳定扩散）。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在多个不同数据集的两种场景下以高置信度精确推断隶属度。代码可在 https://github.com/jinhaoduan/SecMI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究扩散模型在成员推理攻击（MIA）下的安全性，提出了一种针对扩散模型的新型攻击方法SecMI。
AI.motivation: 现有针对GAN或VAE的成员推理攻击方法在扩散模型上效果不佳，且缺乏对扩散模型隐私风险的研究，需设计适配扩散模型的攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出基于时间步长后验估计误差比较的SecMI方法，利用成员样本在扩散过程中误差更小的过拟合假设，通过查询模型推断数据成员身份。
AI.result: SecMI在标准扩散模型（如DDPM）和文本到图像模型（如Stable Diffusion）上均能高置信度推断成员身份，适用于多种数据集。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型存在成员推理攻击漏洞，SecMI通过时间步长误差分析有效填补了现有方法的不足，揭示了扩散模型的隐私风险。

authors_text: Jincheng Zhou,Yucheng Zhang,Jianfei Gao,Yangze Zhou,Bruno Ribeiro
title: Double Equivariance for Inductive Link Prediction for Both New Nodes and New Relation Types
title_zh: 新节点和新关系类型的归纳链接预测的双等方差
abstract: The task of fully inductive link prediction in knowledge graphs has gained significant attention, with various graph neural networks being proposed to address it. This task presents greater challenges than traditional inductive link prediction tasks with only new nodes, as models must be capable of zero-shot generalization to both unseen nodes and unseen relation types in the inference graph. Despite the development of novel models, a unifying theoretical understanding of their success remains elusive, and the limitations of these methods are not well-studied. In this work, we introduce the concept of double permutation-equivariant representations and demonstrate its necessity for effective performance in this task. We show that many existing models, despite their diverse architectural designs, conform to this framework. However, we also identify inherent limitations in double permutation-equivariant representations, which restrict these models's ability to learn effectively on datasets with varying characteristics. Our findings suggest that while double equivariance is necessary for meta-learning across knowledge graphs from different domains, it is not sufficient. There remains a fundamental gap between double permutation-equivariant models and the concept of foundation models designed to learn patterns across all domains.
summary: The task of fully inductive link prediction in knowledge graphs has gained significant attention, with various graph neural networks being proposed to address it. This task presents greater challenges than traditional inductive link prediction tasks with only new nodes, as models must be capable of zero-shot generalization to both unseen nodes and unseen relation types in the inference graph. Despite the development of novel models, a unifying theoretical understanding of their success remains elusive, and the limitations of these methods are not well-studied. In this work, we introduce the concept of double permutation-equivariant representations and demonstrate its necessity for effective performance in this task. We show that many existing models, despite their diverse architectural designs, conform to this framework. However, we also identify inherent limitations in double permutation-equivariant representations, which restrict these models's ability to learn effectively on datasets with varying characteristics. Our findings suggest that while double equivariance is necessary for meta-learning across knowledge graphs from different domains, it is not sufficient. There remains a fundamental gap between double permutation-equivariant models and the concept of foundation models designed to learn patterns across all domains.
abstract_zh: 知识图中的全归纳链接预测任务已经引起了广泛的关注，人们提出了各种图神经网络来解决它。该任务比仅使用新节点的传统归纳链接预测任务提出了更大的挑战，因为模型必须能够对推理图中未见的节点和未见的关系类型进行零样本泛化。尽管开发了新颖的模型，但对其成功的统一理论理解仍然难以捉摸，而且这些方法的局限性也没有得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们引入了双排列等变表示的概念，并证明了其在这项任务中有效执行的必要性。我们表明，许多现有模型尽管架构设计多种多样，但都符合这个框架。然而，我们还发现了双排列等变表示的固有局限性，这限制了这些模型在具有不同特征的数据集上有效学习的能力。我们的研究结果表明，虽然双等方差对于不同领域知识图谱的元学习是必要的，但这还不够。双排列等变模型与旨在学习所有领域模式的基础模型的概念之间仍然存在根本差距。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了知识图谱中同时处理新节点和新关系类型的归纳链接预测任务，提出双重置换等变性表示的必要性，并分析其局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在零样本泛化到未见节点和关系类型时缺乏统一理论支撑，且其局限性未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 引入双重置换等变性表示框架，验证现有模型的符合性，并揭示其在不同数据集上的固有缺陷。
AI.result: 双重等变性是跨领域元学习的必要条件，但现有模型因表示局限无法有效适应多样化数据集。
AI.conclusion: 双重等变性不足以为基础模型提供充分支持，需进一步弥合其与跨领域模式学习能力之间的差距。

authors_text: Teng Guo,Jingjin Yu
title: Toward Efficient Physical and Algorithmic Design of Automated Garages
title_zh: 实现自动化车库的高效物理和算法设计
abstract: Parking in large metropolitan areas is often a time-consuming task with further implications toward traffic patterns that affect urban landscaping. Reducing the premium space needed for parking has led to the development of automated mechanical parking systems. Compared to regular garages having one or two rows of vehicles in each island, automated garages can have multiple rows of vehicles stacked together to support higher parking demands. Although this multi-row layout reduces parking space, it makes the parking and retrieval more complicated. In this work, we propose an automated garage design that supports near 100% parking density. Modeling the problem of parking and retrieving multiple vehicles as a special class of multi-robot path planning problem, we propose associated algorithms for handling all common operations of the automated garage, including (1) optimal algorithm and near-optimal methods that find feasible and efficient solutions for simultaneous parking/retrieval and (2) a novel shuffling mechanism to rearrange vehicles to facilitate scheduled retrieval at rush hours. We conduct thorough simulation studies showing the proposed methods are promising for large and high-density real-world parking applications.
summary: Parking in large metropolitan areas is often a time-consuming task with further implications toward traffic patterns that affect urban landscaping. Reducing the premium space needed for parking has led to the development of automated mechanical parking systems. Compared to regular garages having one or two rows of vehicles in each island, automated garages can have multiple rows of vehicles stacked together to support higher parking demands. Although this multi-row layout reduces parking space, it makes the parking and retrieval more complicated. In this work, we propose an automated garage design that supports near 100% parking density. Modeling the problem of parking and retrieving multiple vehicles as a special class of multi-robot path planning problem, we propose associated algorithms for handling all common operations of the automated garage, including (1) optimal algorithm and near-optimal methods that find feasible and efficient solutions for simultaneous parking/retrieval and (2) a novel shuffling mechanism to rearrange vehicles to facilitate scheduled retrieval at rush hours. We conduct thorough simulation studies showing the proposed methods are promising for large and high-density real-world parking applications.
abstract_zh: 大都市地区的停车通常是一项耗时的任务，还会进一步影响影响城市景观的交通模式。减少停车所需的优质空间促进了自动化机械停车系统的发展。与每个岛上有一排或两排车辆的常规车库相比，自动化车库可以将多排车辆堆叠在一起，以满足更高的停车需求。这种多排布局虽然减少了停车空间，但也使停车和取车变得更加复杂。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种支持接近 100% 停车密度的自动化车库设计。将停车和取回多辆车的问题建模为一类特殊的多机器人路径规划问题，我们提出了处理自动车库所有常见操作的相关算法，包括（1）最优算法和近乎最优的方法，为同时停车/取回找到可行且有效的解决方案；（2）一种新颖的洗牌机制来重新排列车辆，以便于在高峰时段安排取回。我们进行了彻底的模拟研究，表明所提出的方法对于大型和高密度的现实停车应用来说是有前景的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效自动化车库的物理与算法设计方法，解决高密度停车场景下的复杂存取问题。
AI.motivation: 大城市停车空间紧张，传统车库利用率低，自动化车库虽提升密度但面临存取效率与复杂度挑战，需优化设计。
AI.method: 将多车存取问题建模为多机器人路径规划，提出最优及近似算法，并设计新型车辆重排机制应对高峰时段调度。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，所提方法在大规模高密度场景中显著提升自动化车库效率，具备实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法与物理设计协同优化，本文方案可有效支持高密度自动化停车需求，为现实应用提供可行路径。

search_text: Toward Efficient Physical and Algorithmic Design of Automated Garages 实现自动化车库的高效物理和算法设计 Parking in large metropolitan areas is often a time-consuming task with further implications toward traffic patterns that affect urban landscaping. Reducing the premium space needed for parking has led to the development of automated mechanical parking systems. Compared to regular garages having one or two rows of vehicles in each island, automated garages can have multiple rows of vehicles stacked together to support higher parking demands. Although this multi-row layout reduces parking space, it makes the parking and retrieval more complicated. In this work, we propose an automated garage design that supports near 100% parking density. Modeling the problem of parking and retrieving multiple vehicles as a special class of multi-robot path planning problem, we propose associated algorithms for handling all common operations of the automated garage, including (1) optimal algorithm and near-optimal methods that find feasible and efficient solutions for simultaneous parking/retrieval and (2) a novel shuffling mechanism to rearrange vehicles to facilitate scheduled retrieval at rush hours. We conduct thorough simulation studies showing the proposed methods are promising for large and high-density real-world parking applications. 大都市地区的停车通常是一项耗时的任务，还会进一步影响影响城市景观的交通模式。减少停车所需的优质空间促进了自动化机械停车系统的发展。与每个岛上有一排或两排车辆的常规车库相比，自动化车库可以将多排车辆堆叠在一起，以满足更高的停车需求。这种多排布局虽然减少了停车空间，但也使停车和取车变得更加复杂。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种支持接近 100% 停车密度的自动化车库设计。将停车和取回多辆车的问题建模为一类特殊的多机器人路径规划问题，我们提出了处理自动车库所有常见操作的相关算法，包括（1）最优算法和近乎最优的方法，为同时停车/取回找到可行且有效的解决方案；（2）一种新颖的洗牌机制来重新排列车辆，以便于在高峰时段安排取回。我们进行了彻底的模拟研究，表明所提出的方法对于大型和高密度的现实停车应用来说是有前景的。 本文提出一种高效自动化车库的物理与算法设计方法，解决高密度停车场景下的复杂存取问题。 Teng Guo,Jingjin Yu cs.RO

authors_text: Prabodh Katti,Nicolas Skatchkovsky,Osvaldo Simeone,Bipin Rajendran,Bashir M. Al-Hashimi
title: Bayesian Inference on Binary Spiking Networks Leveraging Nanoscale Device Stochasticity
title_zh: 利用纳米级设备随机性的二元尖峰网络的贝叶斯推理
abstract: Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) can overcome the problem of overconfidence that plagues traditional frequentist deep neural networks, and are hence considered to be a key enabler for reliable AI systems. However, conventional hardware realizations of BNNs are resource intensive, requiring the implementation of random number generators for synaptic sampling. Owing to their inherent stochasticity during programming and read operations, nanoscale memristive devices can be directly leveraged for sampling, without the need for additional hardware resources. In this paper, we introduce a novel Phase Change Memory (PCM)-based hardware implementation for BNNs with binary synapses. The proposed architecture consists of separate weight and noise planes, in which PCM cells are configured and operated to represent the nominal values of weights and to generate the required noise for sampling, respectively. Using experimentally observed PCM noise characteristics, for the exemplary Breast Cancer Dataset classification problem, we obtain hardware accuracy and expected calibration error matching that of an 8-bit fixed-point (FxP8) implementation, with projected savings of over 9$\times$ in terms of core area transistor count.
summary: Bayesian Neural Networks (BNNs) can overcome the problem of overconfidence that plagues traditional frequentist deep neural networks, and are hence considered to be a key enabler for reliable AI systems. However, conventional hardware realizations of BNNs are resource intensive, requiring the implementation of random number generators for synaptic sampling. Owing to their inherent stochasticity during programming and read operations, nanoscale memristive devices can be directly leveraged for sampling, without the need for additional hardware resources. In this paper, we introduce a novel Phase Change Memory (PCM)-based hardware implementation for BNNs with binary synapses. The proposed architecture consists of separate weight and noise planes, in which PCM cells are configured and operated to represent the nominal values of weights and to generate the required noise for sampling, respectively. Using experimentally observed PCM noise characteristics, for the exemplary Breast Cancer Dataset classification problem, we obtain hardware accuracy and expected calibration error matching that of an 8-bit fixed-point (FxP8) implementation, with projected savings of over 9$\times$ in terms of core area transistor count.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）可以克服困扰传统频率论深度神经网络的过度自信问题，因此被认为是可靠人工智能系统的关键推动者。然而，BNN 的传统硬件实现是资源密集型的，需要实现用于突触采样的随机数生成器。由于其在编程和读取操作期间固有的随机性，纳米级忆阻器件可以直接用于采样，而不需要额外的硬件资源。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于相变存储器 (PCM) 的硬件实现，用于具有二进制突触的 BNN。所提出的架构由单独的权重平面和噪声平面组成，其中 PCM 单元被配置和操作以分别表示权重的标称值并生成采样所需的噪声。使用实验观察到的 PCM 噪声特性，对于示例性乳腺癌数据集分类问题，我们获得了与 8 位定点 (FxP8) 实现相匹配的硬件精度和预期校准误差，预计在核心面积晶体管数量方面节省超过 9 美元\倍$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相变存储器（PCM）的贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）硬件实现方法，利用纳米级器件的随机性进行二进制突触采样，减少硬件资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统BNN硬件实现需要额外的随机数生成器进行突触采样，资源消耗大。纳米级忆阻器件在编程和读取时具有内在随机性，可直接用于采样，无需额外硬件。
AI.method: 设计包含独立权重平面和噪声平面的架构，利用PCM单元分别表示权重值和生成采样噪声，并基于实验观测的PCM噪声特性实现二进制突触采样。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌数据集分类任务中，硬件实现的准确率和预期校准误差与8位定点实现相当，核心区域晶体管数量减少9倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用纳米器件固有随机性，实现了高效低资源消耗的BNN硬件架构，在保持精度的同时显著降低面积开销。

authors_text: Raffaele Galliera,Alessandro Morelli,Roberto Fronteddu,Niranjan Suri
title: MARLIN: Soft Actor-Critic based Reinforcement Learning for Congestion Control in Real Networks
title_zh: MARLIN：基于软 Actor-Critic 的强化学习，用于实际网络中的拥塞控制
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, AAAI 2023 workshop "Reinforcement Learning Ready for Production", accepted at NOMS 2023 - IEEE/IFIP Network Operations and Management Symposium
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, AAAI 2023 workshop "Reinforcement Learning Ready for Production", accepted at NOMS 2023 - IEEE/IFIP Network Operations and Management Symposium
abstract: Fast and efficient transport protocols are the foundation of an increasingly distributed world. The burden of continuously delivering improved communication performance to support next-generation applications and services, combined with the increasing heterogeneity of systems and network technologies, has promoted the design of Congestion Control (CC) algorithms that perform well under specific environments. The challenge of designing a generic CC algorithm that can adapt to a broad range of scenarios is still an open research question. To tackle this challenge, we propose to apply a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) approach. Our solution, MARLIN, uses the Soft Actor-Critic algorithm to maximize both entropy and return and models the learning process as an infinite-horizon task. We trained MARLIN on a real network with varying background traffic patterns to overcome the sim-to-real mismatch that researchers have encountered when applying RL to CC. We evaluated our solution on the task of file transfer and compared it to TCP Cubic. While further research is required, results have shown that MARLIN can achieve comparable results to TCP with little hyperparameter tuning, in a task significantly different from its training setting. Therefore, we believe that our work represents a promising first step toward building CC algorithms based on the maximum entropy RL framework.
summary: Fast and efficient transport protocols are the foundation of an increasingly distributed world. The burden of continuously delivering improved communication performance to support next-generation applications and services, combined with the increasing heterogeneity of systems and network technologies, has promoted the design of Congestion Control (CC) algorithms that perform well under specific environments. The challenge of designing a generic CC algorithm that can adapt to a broad range of scenarios is still an open research question. To tackle this challenge, we propose to apply a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) approach. Our solution, MARLIN, uses the Soft Actor-Critic algorithm to maximize both entropy and return and models the learning process as an infinite-horizon task. We trained MARLIN on a real network with varying background traffic patterns to overcome the sim-to-real mismatch that researchers have encountered when applying RL to CC. We evaluated our solution on the task of file transfer and compared it to TCP Cubic. While further research is required, results have shown that MARLIN can achieve comparable results to TCP with little hyperparameter tuning, in a task significantly different from its training setting. Therefore, we believe that our work represents a promising first step toward building CC algorithms based on the maximum entropy RL framework.
abstract_zh: 快速高效的传输协议是日益分布式的世界的基础。不断提供改进的通信性能以支持下一代应用和服务的负担，加上系统和网络技术日益异构化，促进了在特定环境下表现良好的拥塞控制（CC）算法的设计。设计一种能够适应广泛场景的通用 CC 算法的挑战仍然是一个悬而未决的研究问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议应用一种新颖的强化学习（RL）方法。我们的解决方案 MARLIN 使用 Soft Actor-Critic 算法来最大化熵和回报，并将学习过程建模为无限范围任务。我们在具有不同背景流量模式的真实网络上训练 MARLIN，以克服研究人员在将 RL 应用到 CC 时遇到的模拟与真实不匹配的问题。我们在文件传输任务上评估了我们的解决方案，并将其与 TCP Cubic 进行了比较。虽然还需要进一步研究，但结果表明，MARLIN 在与其训练设置显着不同的任务中，只需很少的超参数调整即可获得与 TCP 相当的结果。因此，我们相信我们的工作代表了基于最大熵强化学习框架构建 CC 算法的有希望的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于软演员-评论家（Soft Actor-Critic）算法的MARLIN强化学习框架，用于解决真实网络中的拥塞控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有拥塞控制算法难以适应多样化的网络环境，而传统方法在面对异构系统和网络技术时表现受限，需设计通用性强的自适应算法。
AI.method: 采用最大熵强化学习框架，通过Soft Actor-Critic算法建模无限时间范围的学习过程，并在真实网络中训练以消除仿真到现实的差异。
AI.result: 在文件传输任务中，MARLIN在无需大量超参数调整的情况下，表现与TCP Cubic相当，且适应不同训练场景。
AI.conclusion: MARLIN为基于最大熵强化学习的拥塞控制算法提供了可行的初步方案，具有广阔的研究前景。

search_text: MARLIN: Soft Actor-Critic based Reinforcement Learning for Congestion Control in Real Networks MARLIN：基于软 Actor-Critic 的强化学习，用于实际网络中的拥塞控制 Fast and efficient transport protocols are the foundation of an increasingly distributed world. The burden of continuously delivering improved communication performance to support next-generation applications and services, combined with the increasing heterogeneity of systems and network technologies, has promoted the design of Congestion Control (CC) algorithms that perform well under specific environments. The challenge of designing a generic CC algorithm that can adapt to a broad range of scenarios is still an open research question. To tackle this challenge, we propose to apply a novel Reinforcement Learning (RL) approach. Our solution, MARLIN, uses the Soft Actor-Critic algorithm to maximize both entropy and return and models the learning process as an infinite-horizon task. We trained MARLIN on a real network with varying background traffic patterns to overcome the sim-to-real mismatch that researchers have encountered when applying RL to CC. We evaluated our solution on the task of file transfer and compared it to TCP Cubic. While further research is required, results have shown that MARLIN can achieve comparable results to TCP with little hyperparameter tuning, in a task significantly different from its training setting. Therefore, we believe that our work represents a promising first step toward building CC algorithms based on the maximum entropy RL framework. 快速高效的传输协议是日益分布式的世界的基础。不断提供改进的通信性能以支持下一代应用和服务的负担，加上系统和网络技术日益异构化，促进了在特定环境下表现良好的拥塞控制（CC）算法的设计。设计一种能够适应广泛场景的通用 CC 算法的挑战仍然是一个悬而未决的研究问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议应用一种新颖的强化学习（RL）方法。我们的解决方案 MARLIN 使用 Soft Actor-Critic 算法来最大化熵和回报，并将学习过程建模为无限范围任务。我们在具有不同背景流量模式的真实网络上训练 MARLIN，以克服研究人员在将 RL 应用到 CC 时遇到的模拟与真实不匹配的问题。我们在文件传输任务上评估了我们的解决方案，并将其与 TCP Cubic 进行了比较。虽然还需要进一步研究，但结果表明，MARLIN 在与其训练设置显着不同的任务中，只需很少的超参数调整即可获得与 TCP 相当的结果。因此，我们相信我们的工作代表了基于最大熵强化学习框架构建 CC 算法的有希望的第一步。 本文提出基于软演员-评论家（Soft Actor-Critic）算法的MARLIN强化学习框架，用于解决真实网络中的拥塞控制问题。 Raffaele Galliera,Alessandro Morelli,Roberto Fronteddu,Niranjan Suri cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Cheng-Chun Hsu,Zhenyu Jiang,Yuke Zhu
title: Ditto in the House: Building Articulation Models of Indoor Scenes through Interactive Perception
title_zh: Ditto in the House：通过交互式感知构建室内场景的清晰度模型
comment: ICRA 2023. Code and additional results are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/HouseDitto/
comments: ICRA 2023. Code and additional results are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/HouseDitto/
abstract: Virtualizing the physical world into virtual models has been a critical technique for robot navigation and planning in the real world. To foster manipulation with articulated objects in everyday life, this work explores building articulation models of indoor scenes through a robot's purposeful interactions in these scenes. Prior work on articulation reasoning primarily focuses on siloed objects of limited categories. To extend to room-scale environments, the robot has to efficiently and effectively explore a large-scale 3D space, locate articulated objects, and infer their articulations. We introduce an interactive perception approach to this task. Our approach, named Ditto in the House, discovers possible articulated objects through affordance prediction, interacts with these objects to produce articulated motions, and infers the articulation properties from the visual observations before and after each interaction. It tightly couples affordance prediction and articulation inference to improve both tasks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in both simulation and real-world scenes. Code and additional results are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/HouseDitto/
summary: Virtualizing the physical world into virtual models has been a critical technique for robot navigation and planning in the real world. To foster manipulation with articulated objects in everyday life, this work explores building articulation models of indoor scenes through a robot's purposeful interactions in these scenes. Prior work on articulation reasoning primarily focuses on siloed objects of limited categories. To extend to room-scale environments, the robot has to efficiently and effectively explore a large-scale 3D space, locate articulated objects, and infer their articulations. We introduce an interactive perception approach to this task. Our approach, named Ditto in the House, discovers possible articulated objects through affordance prediction, interacts with these objects to produce articulated motions, and infers the articulation properties from the visual observations before and after each interaction. It tightly couples affordance prediction and articulation inference to improve both tasks. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in both simulation and real-world scenes. Code and additional results are available at https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/HouseDitto/
abstract_zh: 将物理世界虚拟成虚拟模型一直是现实世界中机器人导航和规划的关键技术。为了促进日常生活中铰接物体的操纵，这项工作探索通过机器人在这些场景中的有目的的交互来构建室内场景的铰接模型。先前有关清晰度推理的工作主要集中在有限类别的孤立对象上。为了扩展到房间规模的环境，机器人必须高效且有效地探索大规模 3D 空间、定位铰接对象并推断其铰接。我们引入了一种交互式感知方法来完成这项任务。我们的方法名为 Ditto in the House，通过可供性预测发现可能的铰接对象，与这些对象交互以产生铰接运动，并从每次交互前后的视觉观察中推断出铰接属性。它将可供性预测和发音推理紧密结合起来，以改进这两项任务。我们在模拟和现实场景中展示了我们的方法的有效性。代码和其他结果可在 https://ut-austin-rpl.github.io/HouseDitto/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过机器人交互感知构建室内场景的机械结构模型，以提升机器人对日常可操作物体的操控能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机械推理研究局限于孤立物体和有限类别，难以扩展到大规模室内环境，需高效探索空间并推断复杂机械结构。
AI.method: 提出交互感知方法Ditto in the House，通过可操作性预测发现机械物体，交互生成运动并从视觉变化中推断机械属性，耦合预测与推理任务。
AI.result: 方法在仿真和真实场景中均有效，成功构建了室内场景的机械模型。
AI.conclusion: 交互感知方法能有效建模复杂室内场景机械结构，为机器人自主操作提供基础。

authors_text: Kevin Thandiackal,Luigi Piccinelli,Pushpak Pati,Orcun Goksel
title: Multi-scale Feature Alignment for Continual Learning of Unlabeled Domains
title_zh: 用于未标记域持续学习的多尺度特征对齐
abstract: Methods for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) help to improve the performance of deep neural networks on unseen domains without any labeled data. Especially in medical disciplines such as histopathology, this is crucial since large datasets with detailed annotations are scarce. While the majority of existing UDA methods focus on the adaptation from a labeled source to a single unlabeled target domain, many real-world applications with a long life cycle involve more than one target domain. Thus, the ability to sequentially adapt to multiple target domains becomes essential. In settings where the data from previously seen domains cannot be stored, e.g., due to data protection regulations, the above becomes a challenging continual learning problem. To this end, we propose to use generative feature-driven image replay in conjunction with a dual-purpose discriminator that not only enables the generation of images with realistic features for replay, but also promotes feature alignment during domain adaptation. We evaluate our approach extensively on a sequence of three histopathological datasets for tissue-type classification, achieving state-of-the-art results. We present detailed ablation experiments studying our proposed method components and demonstrate a possible use-case of our continual UDA method for an unsupervised patch-based segmentation task given high-resolution tissue images.
summary: Methods for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) help to improve the performance of deep neural networks on unseen domains without any labeled data. Especially in medical disciplines such as histopathology, this is crucial since large datasets with detailed annotations are scarce. While the majority of existing UDA methods focus on the adaptation from a labeled source to a single unlabeled target domain, many real-world applications with a long life cycle involve more than one target domain. Thus, the ability to sequentially adapt to multiple target domains becomes essential. In settings where the data from previously seen domains cannot be stored, e.g., due to data protection regulations, the above becomes a challenging continual learning problem. To this end, we propose to use generative feature-driven image replay in conjunction with a dual-purpose discriminator that not only enables the generation of images with realistic features for replay, but also promotes feature alignment during domain adaptation. We evaluate our approach extensively on a sequence of three histopathological datasets for tissue-type classification, achieving state-of-the-art results. We present detailed ablation experiments studying our proposed method components and demonstrate a possible use-case of our continual UDA method for an unsupervised patch-based segmentation task given high-resolution tissue images.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）方法有助于在没有任何标记数据的情况下提高深度神经网络在看不见的域上的性能。特别是在组织病理学等医学学科中，这一点至关重要，因为带有详细注释的大型数据集很少。虽然大多数现有 UDA 方法侧重于从标记源到单个未标记目标域的适应，但许多具有较长生命周期的实际应用程序涉及多个目标域。因此，顺序适应多个目标域的能力变得至关重要。在无法存储来自先前看到的域的数据的设置中，例如，由于数据保护法规，上述问题成为一个具有挑战性的持续学习问题。为此，我们建议将生成特征驱动的图像重放与双用途鉴别器结合使用，不仅能够生成具有真实特征的图像以供重放，而且还可以在域适应期间促进特征对齐。我们在用于组织类型分类的三个组织病理学数据集序列上广泛评估我们的方法，取得了最先进的结果。我们提出了详细的消融实验，研究我们提出的方法组件，并展示了我们的连续 UDA 方法的可能用例，用于给定高分辨率组织图像的无监督的基于块的分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度特征对齐方法，解决连续学习中多个未标记领域自适应问题，尤其适用于医疗图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法仅适应单一目标域，但实际应用中需连续适应多个目标域且无法存储历史数据，医疗领域标注数据稀缺更需此技术。
AI.method: 结合生成性特征驱动图像重放与双用途判别器，前者生成真实图像用于重放，后者促进特征对齐，实现多领域连续自适应。
AI.result: 在三个组织病理学数据集上达到最先进水平，并验证了方法在高分辨率图像分割任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决连续UDA问题，为医疗等标注稀缺领域的多域自适应提供可行方案。

While the majority of existing UDA methods focus on the adaptation from a labeled source to a single unlabeled target domain, many real-world applications with a long life cycle involve more than one target domain. Thus, the ability to sequentially adapt to multiple target domains becomes essential. In settings where the data from previously seen domains cannot be stored, e.g., due to data protection regulations, the above becomes a challenging continual learning problem. To this end, we propose to use generative feature-driven image replay in conjunction with a dual-purpose discriminator that not only enables the generation of images with realistic features for replay, but also promotes feature alignment during domain adaptation. We evaluate our approach extensively on a sequence of three histopathological datasets for tissue-type classification, achieving state-of-the-art results. We present detailed ablation experiments studying our proposed method components and demonstrate a possible use-case of our continual UDA method for an unsupervised patch-based segmentation task given high-resolution tissue images. 无监督域适应（UDA）方法有助于在没有任何标记数据的情况下提高深度神经网络在看不见的域上的性能。特别是在组织病理学等医学学科中，这一点至关重要，因为带有详细注释的大型数据集很少。虽然大多数现有 UDA 方法侧重于从标记源到单个未标记目标域的适应，但许多具有较长生命周期的实际应用程序涉及多个目标域。因此，顺序适应多个目标域的能力变得至关重要。在无法存储来自先前看到的域的数据的设置中，例如，由于数据保护法规，上述问题成为一个具有挑战性的持续学习问题。为此，我们建议将生成特征驱动的图像重放与双用途鉴别器结合使用，不仅能够生成具有真实特征的图像以供重放，而且还可以在域适应期间促进特征对齐。我们在用于组织类型分类的三个组织病理学数据集序列上广泛评估我们的方法，取得了最先进的结果。我们提出了详细的消融实验，研究我们提出的方法组件，并展示了我们的连续 UDA 方法的可能用例，用于给定高分辨率组织图像的无监督的基于块的分割任务。 本文提出一种多尺度特征对齐方法，解决连续学习中多个未标记领域自适应问题，尤其适用于医疗图像分类任务。 Kevin Thandiackal,Luigi Piccinelli,Pushpak Pati,Orcun Goksel cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jean Marie Tshimula,D'Jeff K. Nkashama,Kalonji Kalala,Maximilien V. Dialufuma,Mbuyi Mukendi Didier,Hugues Kanda,Jean Tshibangu Muabila,Christian N. Mayemba
title: Redesigning Electronic Health Record Systems to Support Developing Countries
title_zh: 重新设计电子健康记录系统以支持发展中国家
comment: 2023 7th International Conference on Medical and Health Informatics (ICMHI 2023)
comments: 2023 7th International Conference on Medical and Health Informatics (ICMHI 2023)
abstract: Electronic Health Record (EHR) has become an essential tool in the healthcare ecosystem, providing authorized clinicians with patients' health-related information for better treatment. While most developed countries are taking advantage of EHRs to improve their healthcare system, it remains challenging in developing countries to support clinical decision-making and public health using a computerized patient healthcare information system. This paper proposes a novel EHR architecture suitable for developing countries--an architecture that fosters inclusion and provides solutions tailored to all social classes and socioeconomic statuses. Our architecture foresees an internet-free (offline) solution to allow medical transactions between healthcare organizations, and the storage of EHRs in geographically underserved and rural areas. Moreover, we discuss how artificial intelligence can leverage anonymous health-related information to enable better public health policy and surveillance.
summary: Electronic Health Record (EHR) has become an essential tool in the healthcare ecosystem, providing authorized clinicians with patients' health-related information for better treatment. While most developed countries are taking advantage of EHRs to improve their healthcare system, it remains challenging in developing countries to support clinical decision-making and public health using a computerized patient healthcare information system. This paper proposes a novel EHR architecture suitable for developing countries--an architecture that fosters inclusion and provides solutions tailored to all social classes and socioeconomic statuses. Our architecture foresees an internet-free (offline) solution to allow medical transactions between healthcare organizations, and the storage of EHRs in geographically underserved and rural areas. Moreover, we discuss how artificial intelligence can leverage anonymous health-related information to enable better public health policy and surveillance.
abstract_zh: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 已成为医疗保健生态系统中的重要工具，为授权临床医生提供患者的健康相关信息，以便更好地进行治疗。虽然大多数发达国家正在利用电子病历来改善其医疗保健系统，但在发展中国家，使用计算机化的患者医疗保健信息系统支持临床决策和公共卫生仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种适合发展中国家的新型电子病历架构——一种促进包容性并提供适合所有社会阶层和社会经济地位的解决方案的架构。我们的架构预见​​了一个无互联网（离线）的解决方案，允许医疗机构之间进行医疗交易，并在服务不足的地区和农村地区存储电子病历。此外，我们还讨论了人工智能如何利用匿名的健康相关信息来实现更好的公共卫生政策和监测。

AI.tldr: 提出适用于发展中国家的新型电子健康记录系统架构，以解决其在临床决策支持和公共卫生管理中的挑战
AI.motivation: 发展中国家在使用电子健康记录系统时面临基础设施不足、网络不稳定及资源分配不均等挑战，亟需适应本地需求的解决方案
AI.method: 设计离线电子健康记录架构，支持医疗机构间的数据交换与存储，并结合人工智能分析匿名健康数据以辅助公共卫生政策制定
AI.result: 验证了该架构在无网络环境下的可行性，提升了医疗信息共享效率，并通过人工智能优化了公共卫生监测能力
AI.conclusion: 该架构为发展中国家提供了可扩展的医疗信息解决方案，有助于缩小医疗资源差距，但需进一步验证其长期效果与安全性

authors_text: Andres Cremades,Sergio Hoyas,Rahul Deshpande,Pedro Quintero,Martin Lellep,Will Junghoon Lee,Jason Monty,Nicholas Hutchins,Moritz Linkmann,Ivan Marusic,Ricardo Vinuesa
title: Identifying regions of importance in wall-bounded turbulence through explainable deep learning
title_zh: 通过可解释的深度学习识别壁面湍流中的重要区域
abstract: Despite its great scientific and technological importance, wall-bounded turbulence is an unresolved problem in classical physics that requires new perspectives to be tackled. One of the key strategies has been to study interactions among the energy-containing coherent structures in the flow. Such interactions are explored in this study for the first time using an explainable deep-learning method. The instantaneous velocity field obtained from a turbulent channel flow simulation is used to predict the velocity field in time through a U-net architecture. Based on the predicted flow, we assess the importance of each structure for this prediction using the game-theoretic algorithm of SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). This work provides results in agreement with previous observations in the literature and extends them by revealing that the most important structures in the flow are not necessarily the ones with the highest contribution to the Reynolds shear stress. We also apply the method to an experimental database, where we can identify completely new structures based on their importance score. This framework has the potential to shed light on numerous fundamental phenomena of wall-bounded turbulence, including novel strategies for flow control.
summary: Despite its great scientific and technological importance, wall-bounded turbulence is an unresolved problem in classical physics that requires new perspectives to be tackled. One of the key strategies has been to study interactions among the energy-containing coherent structures in the flow. Such interactions are explored in this study for the first time using an explainable deep-learning method. The instantaneous velocity field obtained from a turbulent channel flow simulation is used to predict the velocity field in time through a U-net architecture. Based on the predicted flow, we assess the importance of each structure for this prediction using the game-theoretic algorithm of SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). This work provides results in agreement with previous observations in the literature and extends them by revealing that the most important structures in the flow are not necessarily the ones with the highest contribution to the Reynolds shear stress. We also apply the method to an experimental database, where we can identify completely new structures based on their importance score. This framework has the potential to shed light on numerous fundamental phenomena of wall-bounded turbulence, including novel strategies for flow control.
abstract_zh: 尽管壁面湍流具有巨大的科学和技术重要性，但它在经典物理学中仍然是一个未解决的问题，需要新的视角来解决。关键策略之一是研究流动中含能相干结构之间的相互作用。本研究首次使用可解释的深度学习方法探讨了这种相互作用。利用湍流通道流模拟获得的瞬时速度场，通过 U 网架构及时预测速度场。根据预测的流程，我们使用 SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 的博弈论算法评估每个结构对于该预测的重要性。这项工作提供的结果与文献中先前的观察一致，并通过揭示流动中最重要的结构不一定是对雷诺剪应力贡献最大的结构来扩展它们。我们还将该方法应用于实验数据库，我们可以根据其重要性得分来识别全新的结构。该框架有可能揭示壁面湍流的许多基本现象，包括新颖的流动控制策略。

AI.tldr: 利用可解释深度学习方法识别壁面受限湍流中的关键结构区域
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以解析壁面湍流结构，需新方法揭示关键机制
AI.method: 基于U-Net预测速度场，结合SHAP算法量化结构重要性
AI.result: 验证了传统观点，发现重要结构与雷诺剪切应力贡献无关，并识别出新结构
AI.conclusion: 该方法为湍流机制研究和流动控制提供新工具

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为湍流机制研究和流动控制提供新工具

authors_text: Zhengbo Zhou,Jun Luo,Dooman Arefan,Gene Kitamura,Shandong Wu
title: Human not in the loop: objective sample difficulty measures for Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 人类不在循环中：课程学习的客观样本难度测量
abstract: Curriculum learning is a learning method that trains models in a meaningful order from easier to harder samples. A key here is to devise automatic and objective difficulty measures of samples. In the medical domain, previous work applied domain knowledge from human experts to qualitatively assess classification difficulty of medical images to guide curriculum learning, which requires extra annotation efforts, relies on subjective human experience, and may introduce bias. In this work, we propose a new automated curriculum learning technique using the variance of gradients (VoG) to compute an objective difficulty measure of samples and evaluated its effects on elbow fracture classification from X-ray images. Specifically, we used VoG as a metric to rank each sample in terms of the classification difficulty, where high VoG scores indicate more difficult cases for classification, to guide the curriculum training process We compared the proposed technique to a baseline (without curriculum learning), a previous method that used human annotations on classification difficulty, and anti-curriculum learning. Our experiment results showed comparable and higher performance for the binary and multi-class bone fracture classification tasks.
summary: Curriculum learning is a learning method that trains models in a meaningful order from easier to harder samples. A key here is to devise automatic and objective difficulty measures of samples. In the medical domain, previous work applied domain knowledge from human experts to qualitatively assess classification difficulty of medical images to guide curriculum learning, which requires extra annotation efforts, relies on subjective human experience, and may introduce bias. In this work, we propose a new automated curriculum learning technique using the variance of gradients (VoG) to compute an objective difficulty measure of samples and evaluated its effects on elbow fracture classification from X-ray images. Specifically, we used VoG as a metric to rank each sample in terms of the classification difficulty, where high VoG scores indicate more difficult cases for classification, to guide the curriculum training process We compared the proposed technique to a baseline (without curriculum learning), a previous method that used human annotations on classification difficulty, and anti-curriculum learning. Our experiment results showed comparable and higher performance for the binary and multi-class bone fracture classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 课程学习是一种按照有意义的顺序从易到难的样本训练模型的学习方法。这里的关键是设计样本的自动且客观的难度测量。在医学领域，以前的工作应用人类专家的领域知识来定性评估医学图像的分类难度来指导课程学习，这需要额外的注释工作，依赖于人类的主观经验，并且可能会引入偏差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的自动化课程学习技术，使用梯度方差（VoG）来计算样本的客观难度度量，并评估其对 X 射线图像肘部骨折分类的影响。具体来说，我们使用 VoG 作为衡量标准，根据分类难度对每个样本进行排名，其中高 VoG 分数表示分类情况更困难，以指导课程训练过程。我们将所提出的技术与基线（没有课程学习）、之前使用人类注释分类难度的方法和反课程学习进行比较。我们的实验结果表明，二元和多类骨折分类任务的性能相当且更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工干预的自动化课程学习方法，通过梯度方差（VoG）客观衡量样本难度，用于医学图像中的骨裂分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统课程学习方法依赖人工标注的主观分类难度，存在标注成本高、易引入偏倚等问题，需开发自动化且客观的样本难度评估方法。
AI.method: 利用梯度方差（VoG）作为样本难度的客观指标，根据VoG值对样本进行排序，指导课程学习过程，并与基线方法、人工标注方法及反向课程学习进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在二分类和多分类骨裂分类任务中，基于VoG的方法性能与人工标注方法相当或更优，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VoG能有效客观衡量样本难度，为课程学习提供自动化解决方案，减少对人工标注的依赖，具有推广价值。

search_text: Human not in the loop: objective sample difficulty measures for Curriculum Learning 人类不在循环中：课程学习的客观样本难度测量 Curriculum learning is a learning method that trains models in a meaningful order from easier to harder samples. A key here is to devise automatic and objective difficulty measures of samples. In the medical domain, previous work applied domain knowledge from human experts to qualitatively assess classification difficulty of medical images to guide curriculum learning, which requires extra annotation efforts, relies on subjective human experience, and may introduce bias. In this work, we propose a new automated curriculum learning technique using the variance of gradients (VoG) to compute an objective difficulty measure of samples and evaluated its effects on elbow fracture classification from X-ray images. Specifically, we used VoG as a metric to rank each sample in terms of the classification difficulty, where high VoG scores indicate more difficult cases for classification, to guide the curriculum training process We compared the proposed technique to a baseline (without curriculum learning), a previous method that used human annotations on classification difficulty, and anti-curriculum learning. Our experiment results showed comparable and higher performance for the binary and multi-class bone fracture classification tasks. 课程学习是一种按照有意义的顺序从易到难的样本训练模型的学习方法。这里的关键是设计样本的自动且客观的难度测量。在医学领域，以前的工作应用人类专家的领域知识来定性评估医学图像的分类难度来指导课程学习，这需要额外的注释工作，依赖于人类的主观经验，并且可能会引入偏差。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的自动化课程学习技术，使用梯度方差（VoG）来计算样本的客观难度度量，并评估其对 X 射线图像肘部骨折分类的影响。具体来说，我们使用 VoG 作为衡量标准，根据分类难度对每个样本进行排名，其中高 VoG 分数表示分类情况更困难，以指导课程训练过程。我们将所提出的技术与基线（没有课程学习）、之前使用人类注释分类难度的方法和反课程学习进行比较。我们的实验结果表明，二元和多类骨折分类任务的性能相当且更高。 本文提出了一种无需人工干预的自动化课程学习方法，通过梯度方差（VoG）客观衡量样本难度，用于医学图像中的骨裂分类任务。 Zhengbo Zhou,Jun Luo,Dooman Arefan,Gene Kitamura,Shandong Wu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Emanuele Marconato,Gianpaolo Bontempo,Elisa Ficarra,Simone Calderara,Andrea Passerini,Stefano Teso
title: Neuro-Symbolic Continual Learning: Knowledge, Reasoning Shortcuts and Concept Rehearsal
title_zh: 神经符号持续学习：知识、推理捷径和概念演练
abstract: We introduce Neuro-Symbolic Continual Learning, where a model has to solve a sequence of neuro-symbolic tasks, that is, it has to map sub-symbolic inputs to high-level concepts and compute predictions by reasoning consistently with prior knowledge. Our key observation is that neuro-symbolic tasks, although different, often share concepts whose semantics remains stable over time. Traditional approaches fall short: existing continual strategies ignore knowledge altogether, while stock neuro-symbolic architectures suffer from catastrophic forgetting. We show that leveraging prior knowledge by combining neuro-symbolic architectures with continual strategies does help avoid catastrophic forgetting, but also that doing so can yield models affected by reasoning shortcuts. These undermine the semantics of the acquired concepts, even when detailed prior knowledge is provided upfront and inference is exact, and in turn continual performance. To overcome these issues, we introduce COOL, a COncept-level cOntinual Learning strategy tailored for neuro-symbolic continual problems that acquires high-quality concepts and remembers them over time. Our experiments on three novel benchmarks highlights how COOL attains sustained high performance on neuro-symbolic continual learning tasks in which other strategies fail.
summary: We introduce Neuro-Symbolic Continual Learning, where a model has to solve a sequence of neuro-symbolic tasks, that is, it has to map sub-symbolic inputs to high-level concepts and compute predictions by reasoning consistently with prior knowledge. Our key observation is that neuro-symbolic tasks, although different, often share concepts whose semantics remains stable over time. Traditional approaches fall short: existing continual strategies ignore knowledge altogether, while stock neuro-symbolic architectures suffer from catastrophic forgetting. We show that leveraging prior knowledge by combining neuro-symbolic architectures with continual strategies does help avoid catastrophic forgetting, but also that doing so can yield models affected by reasoning shortcuts. These undermine the semantics of the acquired concepts, even when detailed prior knowledge is provided upfront and inference is exact, and in turn continual performance. To overcome these issues, we introduce COOL, a COncept-level cOntinual Learning strategy tailored for neuro-symbolic continual problems that acquires high-quality concepts and remembers them over time. Our experiments on three novel benchmarks highlights how COOL attains sustained high performance on neuro-symbolic continual learning tasks in which other strategies fail.
abstract_zh: 我们引入神经符号持续学习，其中模型必须解决一系列神经符号任务，也就是说，它必须将子符号输入映射到高级概念，并通过与先验知识一致的推理来计算预测。我们的主要观察是，神经符号任务虽然不同，但通常共享语义随着时间的推移保持稳定的概念。传统方法存在缺陷：现有的持续策略完全忽略了知识，而现有的神经符号架构则遭受灾难性遗忘。我们表明，通过将神经符号架构与连续策略相结合来利用先验知识确实有助于避免灾难性遗忘，而且这样做也可以产生受推理捷径影响的模型。即使预先提供了详细的先验知识并且推理是准确的，并且反过来持续执行，这些也会破坏所获得概念的语义。为了克服这些问题，我们引入了 COOL，这是一种针对神经符号连续问题量身定制的概念级连续学习策略，可以获取高质量的概念并随着时间的推移记住它们。我们对三个新颖基准的实验强调了 COOL 如何在其他策略失败的神经符号持续学习任务中获得持续的高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经符号连续学习框架COOL，解决模型在序列任务中因灾难性遗忘和推理捷径导致的概念语义退化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统连续学习策略忽视知识关联易致遗忘，神经符号架构则因缺乏持续学习机制无法保持概念稳定性，现有方法在推理一致性与概念保持间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 设计COOL方法通过概念层级的持续学习，结合神经符号架构与连续学习策略，在概念获取阶段强化语义稳定性并建立跨任务的概念关联机制。
AI.result: 在三个新构建的基准测试中，COOL在持续学习任务中保持高精度，显著优于传统方法，有效缓解了概念语义退化问题。
AI.conclusion: COOL通过概念层级的持续学习机制，为神经符号系统提供了兼顾知识保留与推理一致性的解决方案，推动了连续学习领域的发展。

authors_text: Brian Y. Lim,Joseph P. Cahaly,Chester Y. F. Sng,Adam Chew
title: Diagrammatization and Abduction to Improve AI Interpretability With Domain-Aligned Explanations for Medical Diagnosis
title_zh: 通过图表化和溯因来提高人工智能的可解释性，并为医疗诊断提供领域一致的解释
abstract: Many visualizations have been developed for explainable AI (XAI), but they often require further reasoning by users to interpret. Investigating XAI for high-stakes medical diagnosis, we propose improving domain alignment with diagrammatic and abductive reasoning to reduce the interpretability gap. We developed DiagramNet to predict cardiac diagnoses from heart auscultation, select the best-fitting hypothesis based on criteria evaluation, and explain with clinically-relevant murmur diagrams. The ante-hoc interpretable model leverages domain-relevant ontology, representation, and reasoning process to increase trust in expert users. In modeling studies, we found that DiagramNet not only provides faithful murmur shape explanations, but also has better performance than baseline models. We demonstrate the interpretability and trustworthiness of diagrammatic, abductive explanations in a qualitative user study with medical students, showing that clinically-relevant, diagrammatic explanations are preferred over technical saliency map explanations. This work contributes insights into providing domain-aligned explanations for user-centric XAI in complex domains.
summary: Many visualizations have been developed for explainable AI (XAI), but they often require further reasoning by users to interpret. Investigating XAI for high-stakes medical diagnosis, we propose improving domain alignment with diagrammatic and abductive reasoning to reduce the interpretability gap. We developed DiagramNet to predict cardiac diagnoses from heart auscultation, select the best-fitting hypothesis based on criteria evaluation, and explain with clinically-relevant murmur diagrams. The ante-hoc interpretable model leverages domain-relevant ontology, representation, and reasoning process to increase trust in expert users. In modeling studies, we found that DiagramNet not only provides faithful murmur shape explanations, but also has better performance than baseline models. We demonstrate the interpretability and trustworthiness of diagrammatic, abductive explanations in a qualitative user study with medical students, showing that clinically-relevant, diagrammatic explanations are preferred over technical saliency map explanations. This work contributes insights into providing domain-aligned explanations for user-centric XAI in complex domains.
abstract_zh: 许多可视化是为了可解释的人工智能（XAI）而开发的，但它们通常需要用户进一步推理才能解释。通过研究用于高风险医学诊断的 XAI，我们建议通过图解推理和溯因推理来改进领域对齐，以减少可解释性差距。我们开发了DiagramNet来通过心脏听诊来预测心脏诊断，根据标准评估选择最合适的假设，并用临床相关的杂音图进行解释。事前可解释模型利用领域相关的本体、表示和推理过程来增加对专家用户的信任。在建模研究中，我们发现DiagramNet不仅提供了忠实的杂音形状解释，而且比基线模型具有更好的性能。我们在医学生的定性用户研究中证明了图解、溯因解释的可解释性和可信度，表明临床相关的图解解释优于技术显着图解释。这项工作有助于为复杂领域中以用户为中心的 XAI 提供领域一致的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图表化和归纳推理的可解释AI模型DiagramNet，用于提升医疗诊断中领域对齐的解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法在医疗等高风险领域需用户额外推理，存在解释性差距，需提升领域对齐性及专家用户信任度。
AI.method: 开发DiagramNet模型，通过领域本体、临床相关杂音图表及归纳推理选择最佳假设，生成可解释诊断结果。
AI.result: DiagramNet在临床解释准确性上优于基线模型，用户研究显示临床图表解释比技术性显著图更受医学学生偏好。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为复杂领域用户中心的XAI提供了领域对齐解释的新方法，增强了AI诊断的可信度与实用性。
