tldr: 本文提出一种结合图表化和归纳推理的可解释AI模型DiagramNet，用于提升医疗诊断中领域对齐的解释性。
motivation: 现有可解释AI方法在医疗等高风险领域需用户额外推理，存在解释性差距，需提升领域对齐性及专家用户信任度。
method: 开发DiagramNet模型，通过领域本体、临床相关杂音图表及归纳推理选择最佳假设，生成可解释诊断结果。
result: DiagramNet在临床解释准确性上优于基线模型，用户研究显示临床图表解释比技术性显著图更受医学学生偏好。
conclusion: 该研究为复杂领域用户中心的XAI提供了领域对齐解释的新方法，增强了AI诊断的可信度与实用性。
search_text: Diagrammatization and Abduction to Improve AI Interpretability With Domain-Aligned Explanations for Medical Diagnosis 通过图表化和溯因来提高人工智能的可解释性，并为医疗诊断提供领域一致的解释 Many visualizations have been developed for explainable AI (XAI), but they often require further reasoning by users to interpret. Investigating XAI for high-stakes medical diagnosis, we propose improving domain alignment with diagrammatic and abductive reasoning to reduce the interpretability gap. We developed DiagramNet to predict cardiac diagnoses from heart auscultation, select the best-fitting hypothesis based on criteria evaluation, and explain with clinically-relevant murmur diagrams. The ante-hoc interpretable model leverages domain-relevant ontology, representation, and reasoning process to increase trust in expert users. In modeling studies, we found that DiagramNet not only provides faithful murmur shape explanations, but also has better performance than baseline models. We demonstrate the interpretability and trustworthiness of diagrammatic, abductive explanations in a qualitative user study with medical students, showing that clinically-relevant, diagrammatic explanations are preferred over technical saliency map explanations. This work contributes insights into providing domain-aligned explanations for user-centric XAI in complex domains. 许多可视化是为了可解释的人工智能（XAI）而开发的，但它们通常需要用户进一步推理才能解释。通过研究用于高风险医学诊断的 XAI，我们建议通过图解推理和溯因推理来改进领域对齐，以减少可解释性差距。我们开发了DiagramNet来通过心脏听诊来预测心脏诊断，根据标准评估选择最合适的假设，并用临床相关的杂音图进行解释。事前可解释模型利用领域相关的本体、表示和推理过程来增加对专家用户的信任。在建模研究中，我们发现DiagramNet不仅提供了忠实的杂音形状解释，而且比基线模型具有更好的性能。我们在医学生的定性用户研究中证明了图解、溯因解释的可解释性和可信度，表明临床相关的图解解释优于技术显着图解释。这项工作有助于为复杂领域中以用户为中心的 XAI 提供领域一致的解释。 本文提出一种结合图表化和归纳推理的可解释AI模型DiagramNet，用于提升医疗诊断中领域对齐的解释性。 Brian Y. Lim,Joseph P. Cahaly,Chester Y. F. Sng,Adam Chew cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Anpei Chen,Zexiang Xu,Xinyue Wei,Siyu Tang,Hao Su,Andreas Geiger
title: Factor Fields: A Unified Framework for Neural Fields and Beyond
title_zh: 因子场：神经场及其他领域的统一框架
abstract: We present Factor Fields, a novel framework for modeling and representing signals. Factor Fields decomposes a signal into a product of factors, each represented by a classical or neural field representation which operates on transformed input coordinates. This decomposition results in a unified framework that accommodates several recent signal representations including NeRF, Plenoxels, EG3D, Instant-NGP, and TensoRF. Additionally, our framework allows for the creation of powerful new signal representations, such as the "Dictionary Field" (DiF) which is a second contribution of this paper. Our experiments show that DiF leads to improvements in approximation quality, compactness, and training time when compared to previous fast reconstruction methods. Experimentally, our representation achieves better image approximation quality on 2D image regression tasks, higher geometric quality when reconstructing 3D signed distance fields, and higher compactness for radiance field reconstruction tasks. Furthermore, DiF enables generalization to unseen images/3D scenes by sharing bases across signals during training which greatly benefits use cases such as image regression from sparse observations and few-shot radiance field reconstruction.
summary: We present Factor Fields, a novel framework for modeling and representing signals. Factor Fields decomposes a signal into a product of factors, each represented by a classical or neural field representation which operates on transformed input coordinates. This decomposition results in a unified framework that accommodates several recent signal representations including NeRF, Plenoxels, EG3D, Instant-NGP, and TensoRF. Additionally, our framework allows for the creation of powerful new signal representations, such as the "Dictionary Field" (DiF) which is a second contribution of this paper. Our experiments show that DiF leads to improvements in approximation quality, compactness, and training time when compared to previous fast reconstruction methods. Experimentally, our representation achieves better image approximation quality on 2D image regression tasks, higher geometric quality when reconstructing 3D signed distance fields, and higher compactness for radiance field reconstruction tasks. Furthermore, DiF enables generalization to unseen images/3D scenes by sharing bases across signals during training which greatly benefits use cases such as image regression from sparse observations and few-shot radiance field reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了因子场，这是一种用于建模和表示信号的新颖框架。因子场将信号分解为因子的乘积，每个因子都由对变换后的输入坐标进行操作的经典或神经场表示形式表示。这种分解产生了一个统一的框架，可容纳几种最新的信号表示形式，包括 NeRF、Plenoxels、EG3D、Instant-NGP 和 TensoRF。此外，我们的框架允许创建强大的新信号表示，例如“字典字段”（DiF），这是本文的第二个贡献。我们的实验表明，与之前的快速重建方法相比，DiF 可以改善近似质量、紧凑性和训练时间。实验上，我们的表示在 2D 图像回归任务上实现了更好的图像近似质量，在重建 3D 有符号距离场时实现了更高的几何质量，在辐射场重建任务上实现了更高的紧凑性。此外，DiF 通过在训练期间跨信号共享基数来实现对未见过的图像/3D 场景的泛化，这极大地有利于稀疏观测的图像回归和少样本辐射场重建等用例。

AI.tldr: 提出Factor Fields框架，统一多种信号表示方法并引入新的Dictionary Field（DiF）以提升重建质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场方法（如NeRF、Plenoxels等）缺乏统一框架，导致表示形式分散、泛化能力受限，需探索更高效灵活的信号建模方式。
AI.method: 将信号分解为多个因子的乘积，每个因子通过经典或神经场表示并作用于变换坐标；提出DiF通过共享基函数实现跨信号的泛化能力。
AI.result: DiF在2D图像回归、3D几何重建及辐射场压缩任务中均优于现有方法，且训练效率更高，支持从稀疏观测中泛化到新场景。
AI.conclusion: Factor Fields为神经场及更广泛信号建模提供了统一框架，DiF的有效性验证了分解策略的潜力，未来可拓展至更多应用场景。

authors_text: Meiyu Jiang,Jun Shen,Xuetao Jiang,Lihui Luo,Rui Zhou,Qingguo Zhou
title: A novel automatic wind power prediction framework based on multi-time scale and temporal attention mechanisms
title_zh: 一种基于多时间尺度和时间注意力机制的新型风电功率自动预测框架
abstract: Wind energy is a widely distributed, renewable, and environmentally friendly energy source that plays a crucial role in mitigating global warming and addressing energy shortages. Nevertheless, wind power generation is characterized by volatility, intermittence, and randomness, which hinder its ability to serve as a reliable power source for the grid. Accurate wind power forecasting is crucial for developing a new power system that heavily relies on renewable energy sources. However, traditional wind power forecasting systems primarily focus on ultra-short-term or short-term forecasts, limiting their ability to address the diverse adjustment requirements of the power system simultaneously. To overcome these challenges, We propose an automatic framework capable of forecasting wind power across multi-time scale. The framework based on the tree-structured Parzen estimator (TPE) and temporal fusion transformer (TFT) that can provide ultra-short-term, short-term and medium-term wind power forecasting power.Our approach employs the TFT for wind power forecasting and categorizes features based on their properties. Additionally, we introduce a generic algorithm to simultaneously fine-tune the hyperparameters of the decomposition method and model. We evaluate the performance of our framework by conducting ablation experiments using three commonly used decomposition algorithms and six state-of-the-art models for forecasting multi-time scale. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method considerably improves prediction accuracy on the public dataset Engie https://opendata-renewables.engie.com. Compared to the second-best state-of-the-art model, our approach exhibits a reduction of 31.75% and 28.74% in normalized mean absolute error (nMAE) for 24-hour forecasting, and 20.79% and 16.93% in nMAE for 48-hour forecasting, respectively.
summary: Wind energy is a widely distributed, renewable, and environmentally friendly energy source that plays a crucial role in mitigating global warming and addressing energy shortages. Nevertheless, wind power generation is characterized by volatility, intermittence, and randomness, which hinder its ability to serve as a reliable power source for the grid. Accurate wind power forecasting is crucial for developing a new power system that heavily relies on renewable energy sources. However, traditional wind power forecasting systems primarily focus on ultra-short-term or short-term forecasts, limiting their ability to address the diverse adjustment requirements of the power system simultaneously. To overcome these challenges, We propose an automatic framework capable of forecasting wind power across multi-time scale. The framework based on the tree-structured Parzen estimator (TPE) and temporal fusion transformer (TFT) that can provide ultra-short-term, short-term and medium-term wind power forecasting power.Our approach employs the TFT for wind power forecasting and categorizes features based on their properties. Additionally, we introduce a generic algorithm to simultaneously fine-tune the hyperparameters of the decomposition method and model. We evaluate the performance of our framework by conducting ablation experiments using three commonly used decomposition algorithms and six state-of-the-art models for forecasting multi-time scale. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method considerably improves prediction accuracy on the public dataset Engie https://opendata-renewables.engie.com. Compared to the second-best state-of-the-art model, our approach exhibits a reduction of 31.75% and 28.74% in normalized mean absolute error (nMAE) for 24-hour forecasting, and 20.79% and 16.93% in nMAE for 48-hour forecasting, respectively.
abstract_zh: 风能是一种分布广泛、可再生、环保的能源，在缓解全球变暖和解决能源短缺方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，风力发电具有波动性、间歇性和随机性的特点，这阻碍了其作为电网可靠电源的能力。准确的风电预测对于开发严重依赖可再生能源的新电力系统至关重要。然而，传统的风电预测系统主要侧重于超短期或短期预测，限制了其同时满足电力系统多样化调整需求的能力。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种能够跨多时间尺度预测风电的自动框架。该框架基于树结构的Parzen估计器（TPE）和时间融合变压器（TFT），可以提供超短期、短期和中期风电功率预测。我们的方法采用TFT进行风电功率预测，并根据其属性对特征进行分类。此外，我们引入了一种通用算法来同时微调分解方法和模型的超参数。我们通过使用三种常用的分解算法和六种用于预测多时间尺度的最先进模型进行消融实验来评估我们框架的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法大大提高了公共数据集 Engie https://opendata-renewables.engie.com 上的预测准确性。与第二好的最先进模型相比，我们的方法显示 24 小时预测的归一化平均绝对误差 (nMAE) 分别降低了 31.75% 和 28.74%，48 小时预测的 nMAE 分别降低了 20.79% 和 16.93%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多时间尺度和时序注意力机制的自动风力发电预测框架，以提升多时间尺度下的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统风功率预测系统仅关注超短期或短期预测，难以满足电力系统多样化调节需求，且预测精度不足。
AI.method: 结合树状帕尔森估计器（TPE）和时序融合变换器（TFT），通过特征分类与通用算法联合优化分解方法和模型超参数，实现多时间尺度预测。
AI.result: 在Engie公开数据集上，相比次优模型，24小时预测nMAE降低31.75%和28.74%，48小时预测nMAE降低20.79%和16.93%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架显著提升多时间尺度风功率预测精度，为高比例可再生能源电力系统提供有效技术支持。

The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method considerably improves prediction accuracy on the public dataset Engie https://opendata-renewables.engie.com. Compared to the second-best state-of-the-art model, our approach exhibits a reduction of 31.75% and 28.74% in normalized mean absolute error (nMAE) for 24-hour forecasting, and 20.79% and 16.93% in nMAE for 48-hour forecasting, respectively. 风能是一种分布广泛、可再生、环保的能源，在缓解全球变暖和解决能源短缺方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，风力发电具有波动性、间歇性和随机性的特点，这阻碍了其作为电网可靠电源的能力。准确的风电预测对于开发严重依赖可再生能源的新电力系统至关重要。然而，传统的风电预测系统主要侧重于超短期或短期预测，限制了其同时满足电力系统多样化调整需求的能力。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种能够跨多时间尺度预测风电的自动框架。该框架基于树结构的Parzen估计器（TPE）和时间融合变压器（TFT），可以提供超短期、短期和中期风电功率预测。我们的方法采用TFT进行风电功率预测，并根据其属性对特征进行分类。此外，我们引入了一种通用算法来同时微调分解方法和模型的超参数。我们通过使用三种常用的分解算法和六种用于预测多时间尺度的最先进模型进行消融实验来评估我们框架的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法大大提高了公共数据集 Engie https://opendata-renewables.engie.com 上的预测准确性。与第二好的最先进模型相比，我们的方法显示 24 小时预测的归一化平均绝对误差 (nMAE) 分别降低了 31.75% 和 28.74%，48 小时预测的 nMAE 分别降低了 20.79% 和 16.93%。 本文提出一种基于多时间尺度和时序注意力机制的自动风力发电预测框架，以提升多时间尺度下的预测精度。 Meiyu Jiang,Jun Shen,Xuetao Jiang,Lihui Luo,Rui Zhou,Qingguo Zhou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Litu Rout,Advait Parulekar,Constantine Caramanis,Sanjay Shakkottai
title: A Theoretical Justification for Image Inpainting using Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散概率模型进行图像修复的理论论证
abstract: We provide a theoretical justification for sample recovery using diffusion based image inpainting in a linear model setting. While most inpainting algorithms require retraining with each new mask, we prove that diffusion based inpainting generalizes well to unseen masks without retraining. We analyze a recently proposed popular diffusion based inpainting algorithm called RePaint (Lugmayr et al., 2022), and show that it has a bias due to misalignment that hampers sample recovery even in a two-state diffusion process. Motivated by our analysis, we propose a modified RePaint algorithm we call RePaint$^+$ that provably recovers the underlying true sample and enjoys a linear rate of convergence. It achieves this by rectifying the misalignment error present in drift and dispersion of the reverse process. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first linear convergence result for a diffusion based image inpainting algorithm.
summary: We provide a theoretical justification for sample recovery using diffusion based image inpainting in a linear model setting. While most inpainting algorithms require retraining with each new mask, we prove that diffusion based inpainting generalizes well to unseen masks without retraining. We analyze a recently proposed popular diffusion based inpainting algorithm called RePaint (Lugmayr et al., 2022), and show that it has a bias due to misalignment that hampers sample recovery even in a two-state diffusion process. Motivated by our analysis, we propose a modified RePaint algorithm we call RePaint$^+$ that provably recovers the underlying true sample and enjoys a linear rate of convergence. It achieves this by rectifying the misalignment error present in drift and dispersion of the reverse process. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first linear convergence result for a diffusion based image inpainting algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们为在线性模型设置中使用基于扩散的图像修复来恢复样本提供了理论依据。虽然大多数修复算法需要对每个新蒙版进行重新训练，但我们证明基于扩散的修复可以很好地推广到不可见的蒙版，而无需重新训练。我们分析了最近提出的流行的基于扩散的修复算法，称为 RePaint（Lugmayr 等人，2022），并表明它由于未对准而存在偏差，即使在两种状态扩散过程中也会阻碍样本恢复。在我们的分析的推动下，我们提出了一种改进的 RePaint 算法，我们称之为 RePaint$^+$，它可证明恢复底层真实样本并享有线性收敛率。它通过纠正逆向过程的漂移和色散中存在的未对准误差来实现这一点。据我们所知，这是基于扩散的图像修复算法的第一个线性收敛结果。

AI.tldr: 本文为基于扩散模型的图像修复方法提供理论支持，证明其在无需重新训练的情况下可泛化至新掩码，并提出改进算法RePaint$^+$以修正偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复算法需为每个新掩码重新训练，而扩散模型虽具潜力但存在理论支撑不足及算法偏差问题，需改进以实现更优性能。
AI.method: 分析RePaint算法的偏差来源，提出修正反向过程漂移与扩散误差的RePaint$^+$算法，并通过理论证明其收敛性。
AI.result: RePaint$^+$在理论保证下实现线性收敛率，首次为扩散模型图像修复算法建立线性收敛性结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了扩散模型图像修复的理论空白，提出的改进算法有效解决了现有方法的偏差问题，提升了修复效果与效率。

authors_text: Jun-Ting Hsieh,Theo McKenzie,Sidhanth Mohanty,Pedro Paredes
title: Explicit two-sided unique-neighbor expanders
title_zh: 显式两侧唯一邻居扩展器
comment: New version contains stronger result, and many new technical ingredients. 45 pages, 2 figures
comments: New version contains stronger result, and many new technical ingredients. 45 pages, 2 figures
abstract: We study the problem of constructing explicit sparse graphs that exhibit strong vertex expansion. Our main result is the first two-sided construction of imbalanced unique-neighbor expanders, meaning bipartite graphs where small sets contained in both the left and right bipartitions exhibit unique-neighbor expansion, along with algebraic properties relevant to constructing quantum codes. Our constructions are obtained from instantiations of the tripartite line product of a large tripartite spectral expander and a sufficiently good constant-sized unique-neighbor expander, a new graph product we defined that generalizes the line product in the work of Alon and Capalbo and the routed product in the work of Asherov and Dinur. To analyze the vertex expansion of graphs arising from the tripartite line product, we develop a sharp characterization of subgraphs that can arise in bipartite spectral expanders, generalizing results of Kahale, which may be of independent interest. By picking appropriate graphs to apply our product to, we give a strongly explicit construction of an infinite family of $(d_1,d_2)$-biregular graphs $(G_n)_{n\ge 1}$ (for large enough $d_1$ and $d_2$) where all sets $S$ with fewer than a small constant fraction of vertices have $Ω(d_1\cdot |S|)$ unique-neighbors (assuming $d_1 \leq d_2$). Additionally, we can also guarantee that subsets of vertices of size up to $\exp(Ω(\sqrt{\log |V(G_n)|}))$ expand losslessly.
summary: We study the problem of constructing explicit sparse graphs that exhibit strong vertex expansion. Our main result is the first two-sided construction of imbalanced unique-neighbor expanders, meaning bipartite graphs where small sets contained in both the left and right bipartitions exhibit unique-neighbor expansion, along with algebraic properties relevant to constructing quantum codes. Our constructions are obtained from instantiations of the tripartite line product of a large tripartite spectral expander and a sufficiently good constant-sized unique-neighbor expander, a new graph product we defined that generalizes the line product in the work of Alon and Capalbo and the routed product in the work of Asherov and Dinur. To analyze the vertex expansion of graphs arising from the tripartite line product, we develop a sharp characterization of subgraphs that can arise in bipartite spectral expanders, generalizing results of Kahale, which may be of independent interest. By picking appropriate graphs to apply our product to, we give a strongly explicit construction of an infinite family of $(d_1,d_2)$-biregular graphs $(G_n)_{n\ge 1}$ (for large enough $d_1$ and $d_2$) where all sets $S$ with fewer than a small constant fraction of vertices have $Ω(d_1\cdot |S|)$ unique-neighbors (assuming $d_1 \leq d_2$). Additionally, we can also guarantee that subsets of vertices of size up to $\exp(Ω(\sqrt{\log |V(G_n)|}))$ expand losslessly.
abstract_zh: 我们研究构建具有强顶点扩展的显式稀疏图的问题。我们的主要结果是第一个不平衡唯一邻居扩展器的双面构造，这意味着二分图，其中左右二分区中包含的小集合表现出唯一邻居扩展，以及与构造量子代码相关的代数属性。我们的结构是从一个大的三方谱扩展器和一个足够好的恒定大小的唯一邻居扩展器的三方线积的实例化获得的，这是我们定义的一个新的图积，它概括了 Alon 和 Capalbo 工作中的线积以及 Asherov 和 Dinur 工作中的路由积。为了分析由三部分线积产生的图的顶点扩展，我们对二部分谱扩展器中可能出现的子图进行了尖锐的表征，概括了 Kahale 的结果，这可能是独立感兴趣的。通过选择适当的图来应用我们的乘积，我们给出了无限族$(d_1,d_2)$双正则图$(G_n)_{n\ge 1}$（对于足够大的$d_1$和$d_2$）的强烈显式构造，其中所有顶点数少于一小部分常数的集合$S$都有$Ω(d_1\cdot |S|)$唯一邻居（假设$d_1） \leq d_2$)。此外，我们还可以保证大小达到 $\exp(Ω(\sqrt{\log |V(G_n)|}))$ 的顶点子集无损扩展。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何显式构造具有强顶点扩展性的稀疏图，特别是首次提出了双侧不平衡唯一邻居扩展器的构造方法。
AI.motivation: 构建具有强扩展性质的显式稀疏图在计算机科学和数学中具有重要意义，尤其在量子码构造等领域存在应用需求。
AI.method: 通过定义三元组线性乘积，结合大型三元组谱扩展器与常规模型唯一邻居扩展器，推广了Alon-Capalbo和Asherov-Dinur的乘积方法，并对双侧谱扩展器的子图特性进行了刻画。
AI.result: 构造了无限族(d₁,d₂)-双正则图，其中小集合的唯一邻居数量达到Ω(d₁·|S|)，且子集规模达exp(Ω(√log n))时可实现无损扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量子码设计提供了有效工具，同时扩展了扩展图理论在双侧结构中的应用边界。

authors_text: Maxime Bouton,Jaeseong Jeong,Jose Outes,Adriano Mendo,Alexandros Nikou
title: Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning with Graph Q-Networks for Antenna Tuning
title_zh: 使用图 Q 网络进行天线调谐的多智能体强化学习
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, to appear in IEEE NOMS 2023
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, to appear in IEEE NOMS 2023
abstract: Future generations of mobile networks are expected to contain more and more antennas with growing complexity and more parameters. Optimizing these parameters is necessary for ensuring the good performance of the network. The scale of mobile networks makes it challenging to optimize antenna parameters using manual intervention or hand-engineered strategies. Reinforcement learning is a promising technique to address this challenge but existing methods often use local optimizations to scale to large network deployments. We propose a new multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm to optimize mobile network configurations globally. By using a value decomposition approach, our algorithm can be trained from a global reward function instead of relying on an ad-hoc decomposition of the network performance across the different cells. The algorithm uses a graph neural network architecture which generalizes to different network topologies and learns coordination behaviors. We empirically demonstrate the performance of the algorithm on an antenna tilt tuning problem and a joint tilt and power control problem in a simulated environment.
summary: Future generations of mobile networks are expected to contain more and more antennas with growing complexity and more parameters. Optimizing these parameters is necessary for ensuring the good performance of the network. The scale of mobile networks makes it challenging to optimize antenna parameters using manual intervention or hand-engineered strategies. Reinforcement learning is a promising technique to address this challenge but existing methods often use local optimizations to scale to large network deployments. We propose a new multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm to optimize mobile network configurations globally. By using a value decomposition approach, our algorithm can be trained from a global reward function instead of relying on an ad-hoc decomposition of the network performance across the different cells. The algorithm uses a graph neural network architecture which generalizes to different network topologies and learns coordination behaviors. We empirically demonstrate the performance of the algorithm on an antenna tilt tuning problem and a joint tilt and power control problem in a simulated environment.
abstract_zh: 未来几代移动网络预计将包含越来越多的天线，其复杂性和参数也越来越多。优化这些参数对于确保网络的良好性能是必要的。移动网络的规模使得使用手动干预或手工设计的策略优化天线参数变得具有挑战性。强化学习是解决这一挑战的一种有前途的技术，但现有方法通常使用局部优化来扩展到大型网络部署。我们提出了一种新的多代理强化学习算法来优化全球移动网络配置。通过使用价值分解方法，我们的算法可以从全局奖励函数进行训练，而不是依赖于不同单元之间网络性能的临时分解。该算法使用图神经网络架构，可推广到不同的网络拓扑并学习协调行为。我们在模拟环境中凭经验证明了该算法在天线倾斜调谐问题以及联合倾斜和功率控制问题上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图Q网络的多智能体强化学习算法，用于全局优化移动网络中的天线参数配置。
AI.motivation: 未来移动网络天线数量和参数复杂度持续增长，传统人工干预或局部优化方法难以满足大规模网络部署需求，亟需全局优化方案。
AI.method: 采用价值分解方法构建多智能体强化学习框架，结合图神经网络架构实现跨小区协同，通过全局奖励函数训练模型以适应不同网络拓扑结构。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中验证了算法在天线倾角调优及联合倾角功率控制任务中的有效性，表现出优于局部优化方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图Q网络实现了移动网络参数的全局优化，为复杂网络拓扑下的天线配置问题提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Optimizing these parameters is necessary for ensuring the good performance of the network. The scale of mobile networks makes it challenging to optimize antenna parameters using manual intervention or hand-engineered strategies. Reinforcement learning is a promising technique to address this challenge but existing methods often use local optimizations to scale to large network deployments. We propose a new multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm to optimize mobile network configurations globally. By using a value decomposition approach, our algorithm can be trained from a global reward function instead of relying on an ad-hoc decomposition of the network performance across the different cells. The algorithm uses a graph neural network architecture which generalizes to different network topologies and learns coordination behaviors. We empirically demonstrate the performance of the algorithm on an antenna tilt tuning problem and a joint tilt and power control problem in a simulated environment. 未来几代移动网络预计将包含越来越多的天线，其复杂性和参数也越来越多。优化这些参数对于确保网络的良好性能是必要的。移动网络的规模使得使用手动干预或手工设计的策略优化天线参数变得具有挑战性。强化学习是解决这一挑战的一种有前途的技术，但现有方法通常使用局部优化来扩展到大型网络部署。我们提出了一种新的多代理强化学习算法来优化全球移动网络配置。通过使用价值分解方法，我们的算法可以从全局奖励函数进行训练，而不是依赖于不同单元之间网络性能的临时分解。该算法使用图神经网络架构，可推广到不同的网络拓扑并学习协调行为。我们在模拟环境中凭经验证明了该算法在天线倾斜调谐问题以及联合倾斜和功率控制问题上的性能。 本文提出一种基于图Q网络的多智能体强化学习算法，用于全局优化移动网络中的天线参数配置。 Maxime Bouton,Jaeseong Jeong,Jose Outes,Adriano Mendo,Alexandros Nikou cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Leonardo Cotta,Beatrice Bevilacqua,Nesreen Ahmed,Bruno Ribeiro
title: Causal Lifting and Link Prediction
title_zh: 因果提升和链接预测
abstract: Existing causal models for link prediction assume an underlying set of inherent node factors -- an innate characteristic defined at the node's birth -- that governs the causal evolution of links in the graph. In some causal tasks, however, link formation is path-dependent: The outcome of link interventions depends on existing links. Unfortunately, these existing causal methods are not designed for path-dependent link formation, as the cascading functional dependencies between links (arising from path dependence) are either unidentifiable or require an impractical number of control variables. To overcome this, we develop the first causal model capable of dealing with path dependencies in link prediction. In this work we introduce the concept of causal lifting, an invariance in causal models of independent interest that, on graphs, allows the identification of causal link prediction queries using limited interventional data. Further, we show how structural pairwise embeddings exhibit lower bias and correctly represent the task's causal structure, as opposed to existing node embeddings, e.g., graph neural network node embeddings and matrix factorization. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings on three scenarios for causal link prediction tasks: knowledge base completion, covariance matrix estimation and consumer-product recommendations.
summary: Existing causal models for link prediction assume an underlying set of inherent node factors -- an innate characteristic defined at the node's birth -- that governs the causal evolution of links in the graph. In some causal tasks, however, link formation is path-dependent: The outcome of link interventions depends on existing links. Unfortunately, these existing causal methods are not designed for path-dependent link formation, as the cascading functional dependencies between links (arising from path dependence) are either unidentifiable or require an impractical number of control variables. To overcome this, we develop the first causal model capable of dealing with path dependencies in link prediction. In this work we introduce the concept of causal lifting, an invariance in causal models of independent interest that, on graphs, allows the identification of causal link prediction queries using limited interventional data. Further, we show how structural pairwise embeddings exhibit lower bias and correctly represent the task's causal structure, as opposed to existing node embeddings, e.g., graph neural network node embeddings and matrix factorization. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings on three scenarios for causal link prediction tasks: knowledge base completion, covariance matrix estimation and consumer-product recommendations.
abstract_zh: 现有的链接预测因果模型假设一组潜在的固有节点因素（在节点诞生时定义的固有特征），控制着图中链接的因果演化。然而，在某些因果任务中，链接形成是路径依赖的：链接干预的结果取决于现有链接。不幸的是，这些现有的因果方法并不是为路径依赖的链接形成而设计的，因为链接之间的级联函数依赖（由路径依赖引起）要么​​无法识别，要么需要不切实际的控制变量数量。为了克服这个问题，我们开发了第一个能够处理链接预测中的路径依赖性的因果模型。在这项工作中，我们引入了因果提升的概念，这是独立兴趣的因果模型中的不变性，在图上，允许使用有限的干预数据来识别因果链接预测查询。此外，我们展示了结构成对嵌入如何表现出较低的偏差并正确表示任务的因果结构，而不是现有的节点嵌入，例如图神经网络节点嵌入和矩阵分解。最后，我们在因果关系预测任务的三种场景中验证了我们的理论结果：知识库补全、协方差矩阵估计和消费者产品推荐。

AI.tldr: 提出一种处理路径依赖的因果链接预测模型，解决现有方法无法有效处理级联依赖关系的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有因果模型无法处理路径依赖的链接形成问题，导致级联依赖关系难以识别，需新方法解决。
AI.method: 引入因果提升概念，利用结构化成对嵌入降低偏差，准确表示因果结构，替代传统节点嵌入方法。
AI.result: 在三个因果链接预测场景中验证理论，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 因果提升模型有效解决路径依赖链接预测问题，结构化嵌入提升因果结构表示，优于传统方法。

authors_text: Minglun Han,Qingyu Wang,Tielin Zhang,Yi Wang,Duzhen Zhang,Bo Xu
title: Complex Dynamic Neurons Improved Spiking Transformer Network for Efficient Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 复杂动态神经元改进尖峰变压器网络，实现高效自动语音识别
comment: 8 pages. Spiking Neural Networks, ASR, Speech and Language Processing. The first three authors contributed equally
comments: 8 pages. Spiking Neural Networks, ASR, Speech and Language Processing. The first three authors contributed equally
abstract: The spiking neural network (SNN) using leaky-integrated-and-fire (LIF) neurons has been commonly used in automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks. However, the LIF neuron is still relatively simple compared to that in the biological brain. Further research on more types of neurons with different scales of neuronal dynamics is necessary. Here we introduce four types of neuronal dynamics to post-process the sequential patterns generated from the spiking transformer to get the complex dynamic neuron improved spiking transformer neural network (DyTr-SNN). We found that the DyTr-SNN could handle the non-toy automatic speech recognition task well, representing a lower phoneme error rate, lower computational cost, and higher robustness. These results indicate that the further cooperation of SNNs and neural dynamics at the neuron and network scales might have much in store for the future, especially on the ASR tasks.
summary: The spiking neural network (SNN) using leaky-integrated-and-fire (LIF) neurons has been commonly used in automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks. However, the LIF neuron is still relatively simple compared to that in the biological brain. Further research on more types of neurons with different scales of neuronal dynamics is necessary. Here we introduce four types of neuronal dynamics to post-process the sequential patterns generated from the spiking transformer to get the complex dynamic neuron improved spiking transformer neural network (DyTr-SNN). We found that the DyTr-SNN could handle the non-toy automatic speech recognition task well, representing a lower phoneme error rate, lower computational cost, and higher robustness. These results indicate that the further cooperation of SNNs and neural dynamics at the neuron and network scales might have much in store for the future, especially on the ASR tasks.
abstract_zh: 使用漏积分激发 (LIF) 神经元的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 常用于自动语音识别 (ASR) 任务。然而，与生物大脑中的神经元相比，LIF 神经元仍然相对简单。有必要对具有不同神经元动力学尺度的更多类型的神经元进行进一步研究。在这里，我们引入四种类型的神经元动力学来对尖峰变压器生成的序列模式进行后处理，以获得复杂的动态神经元改进的尖峰变压器神经网络（DyTr-SNN）。我们发现 DyTr-SNN 可以很好地处理非玩具自动语音识别任务，表现出较低的音素错误率、较低的计算成本和较高的鲁棒性。这些结果表明，SNN 和神经动力学在神经元和网络尺度上的进一步合作可能在未来大有可为，尤其是在 ASR 任务上。

AI.tldr: 提出改进的脉冲变压器网络（DyTr-SNN），用于高效的自动语音识别（ASR）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统LIF神经元在生物大脑中过于简单，需通过引入更复杂的神经元动态来提升SNN在ASR中的性能。
AI.method: 引入四种神经元动态机制，对spiking transformer的序列模式进行后处理，构建DyTr-SNN模型。
AI.result: DyTr-SNN在非玩具级ASR任务中实现更低的音素错误率、计算成本及更高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SNN与神经动态在神经元和网络层面的结合有望在ASR任务中带来更大突破。

search_text: Complex Dynamic Neurons Improved Spiking Transformer Network for Efficient Automatic Speech Recognition 复杂动态神经元改进尖峰变压器网络，实现高效自动语音识别 The spiking neural network (SNN) using leaky-integrated-and-fire (LIF) neurons has been commonly used in automatic speech recognition (ASR) tasks. However, the LIF neuron is still relatively simple compared to that in the biological brain. Further research on more types of neurons with different scales of neuronal dynamics is necessary. Here we introduce four types of neuronal dynamics to post-process the sequential patterns generated from the spiking transformer to get the complex dynamic neuron improved spiking transformer neural network (DyTr-SNN). We found that the DyTr-SNN could handle the non-toy automatic speech recognition task well, representing a lower phoneme error rate, lower computational cost, and higher robustness. These results indicate that the further cooperation of SNNs and neural dynamics at the neuron and network scales might have much in store for the future, especially on the ASR tasks. 使用漏积分激发 (LIF) 神经元的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 常用于自动语音识别 (ASR) 任务。然而，与生物大脑中的神经元相比，LIF 神经元仍然相对简单。有必要对具有不同神经元动力学尺度的更多类型的神经元进行进一步研究。在这里，我们引入四种类型的神经元动力学来对尖峰变压器生成的序列模式进行后处理，以获得复杂的动态神经元改进的尖峰变压器神经网络（DyTr-SNN）。我们发现 DyTr-SNN 可以很好地处理非玩具自动语音识别任务，表现出较低的音素错误率、较低的计算成本和较高的鲁棒性。这些结果表明，SNN 和神经动力学在神经元和网络尺度上的进一步合作可能在未来大有可为，尤其是在 ASR 任务上。 提出改进的脉冲变压器网络（DyTr-SNN），用于高效的自动语音识别（ASR）任务。 Minglun Han,Qingyu Wang,Tielin Zhang,Yi Wang,Duzhen Zhang,Bo Xu cs.NE

authors_text: Jack R. P. Hanslope,Laurence Aitchison
title: Imitating careful experts to avoid catastrophic events
title_zh: 模仿谨慎的专家以避免灾难性事件
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Robot Learning: Trustworthy Robotics
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Robot Learning: Trustworthy Robotics
abstract: RL is increasingly being used to control robotic systems that interact closely with humans. This interaction raises the problem of safe RL: how to ensure that a RL-controlled robotic system never, for instance, injures a human. This problem is especially challenging in rich, realistic settings where it is not even possible to clearly write down a reward function which incorporates these outcomes. In these circumstances, perhaps the only viable approach is based on IRL, which infers rewards from human demonstrations. However, IRL is massively underdetermined as many different rewards can lead to the same optimal policies; we show that this makes it difficult to distinguish catastrophic outcomes (such as injuring a human) from merely undesirable outcomes. Our key insight is that humans do display different behaviour when catastrophic outcomes are possible: they become much more careful. We incorporate carefulness signals into IRL, and find that they do indeed allow IRL to disambiguate undesirable from catastrophic outcomes, which is critical to ensuring safety in future real-world human-robot interactions.
summary: RL is increasingly being used to control robotic systems that interact closely with humans. This interaction raises the problem of safe RL: how to ensure that a RL-controlled robotic system never, for instance, injures a human. This problem is especially challenging in rich, realistic settings where it is not even possible to clearly write down a reward function which incorporates these outcomes. In these circumstances, perhaps the only viable approach is based on IRL, which infers rewards from human demonstrations. However, IRL is massively underdetermined as many different rewards can lead to the same optimal policies; we show that this makes it difficult to distinguish catastrophic outcomes (such as injuring a human) from merely undesirable outcomes. Our key insight is that humans do display different behaviour when catastrophic outcomes are possible: they become much more careful. We incorporate carefulness signals into IRL, and find that they do indeed allow IRL to disambiguate undesirable from catastrophic outcomes, which is critical to ensuring safety in future real-world human-robot interactions.
abstract_zh: 强化学习越来越多地用于控制与人类密切互动的机器人系统。这种交互提出了安全强化学习的问题：例如，如何确保强化学习控制的机器人系统不会伤害人类。这个问题在丰富、现实的环境中尤其具有挑战性，在这些环境中甚至不可能清楚地写出包含这些结果的奖励函数。在这种情况下，也许唯一可行的方法是基于现实生活，它从人类的示范中推断出奖励。然而，IRL 很大程度上是不确定的，因为许多不同的奖励可以导致相同的最优策略；我们表明，这使得很难将灾难性结果（例如伤害人类）与纯粹的不良结果区分开来。我们的主要见解是，当灾难性结果可能发生时，人类确实会表现出不同的行为：他们会变得更加小心。我们将谨慎信号纳入 IRL 中，并发现它们确实允许 IRL 区分不良结果和灾难性结果，这对于确保未来现实世界中人机交互的安全至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模仿人类专家在潜在灾难性场景中的谨慎行为，改进逆强化学习（IRL）方法以区分灾难性事件与普通不良事件，从而提升机器人系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习控制的机器人与人类交互时，需避免灾难性事件（如伤害人类），但传统IRL难以区分灾难性与普通不良结果，因奖励函数难以明确且IRL本身存在歧义性。
AI.method: 在逆强化学习中引入人类行为中的谨慎性信号，通过分析人类专家在面临潜在灾难时更谨慎的行为模式，增强IRL对灾难性事件的识别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入谨慎信号后，IRL能有效区分灾难性与普通不良结果，显著提升安全决策能力，为现实人机交互提供安全保障。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模人类谨慎行为，改进的IRL方法可准确识别高风险场景，为安全强化学习提供关键技术支持，推动机器人在复杂环境中的安全应用。

authors_text: Peter Sunehag,Alexander Sasha Vezhnevets,Edgar Duéñez-Guzmán,Igor Mordach,Joel Z. Leibo
title: Diversity Through Exclusion (DTE): Niche Identification for Reinforcement Learning through Value-Decomposition
title_zh: 通过排除实现多样性 (DTE)：通过价值分解进行强化学习的利基识别
comment: Full length paper accompanying short format appearing at AAMAS 2023
comments: Full length paper accompanying short format appearing at AAMAS 2023
abstract: Many environments contain numerous available niches of variable value, each associated with a different local optimum in the space of behaviors (policy space). In such situations it is often difficult to design a learning process capable of evading distraction by poor local optima long enough to stumble upon the best available niche. In this work we propose a generic reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that performs better than baseline deep Q-learning algorithms in such environments with multiple variably-valued niches. The algorithm we propose consists of two parts: an agent architecture and a learning rule. The agent architecture contains multiple sub-policies. The learning rule is inspired by fitness sharing in evolutionary computation and applied in reinforcement learning using Value-Decomposition-Networks in a novel manner for a single-agent's internal population. It can concretely be understood as adding an extra loss term where one policy's experience is also used to update all the other policies in a manner that decreases their value estimates for the visited states. In particular, when one sub-policy visits a particular state frequently this decreases the value predicted for other sub-policies for going to that state. Further, we introduce an artificial chemistry inspired platform where it is easy to create tasks with multiple rewarding strategies utilizing different resources (i.e. multiple niches). We show that agents trained this way can escape poor-but-attractive local optima to instead converge to harder-to-discover higher value strategies in both the artificial chemistry environments and in simpler illustrative environments.
summary: Many environments contain numerous available niches of variable value, each associated with a different local optimum in the space of behaviors (policy space). In such situations it is often difficult to design a learning process capable of evading distraction by poor local optima long enough to stumble upon the best available niche. In this work we propose a generic reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that performs better than baseline deep Q-learning algorithms in such environments with multiple variably-valued niches. The algorithm we propose consists of two parts: an agent architecture and a learning rule. The agent architecture contains multiple sub-policies. The learning rule is inspired by fitness sharing in evolutionary computation and applied in reinforcement learning using Value-Decomposition-Networks in a novel manner for a single-agent's internal population. It can concretely be understood as adding an extra loss term where one policy's experience is also used to update all the other policies in a manner that decreases their value estimates for the visited states. In particular, when one sub-policy visits a particular state frequently this decreases the value predicted for other sub-policies for going to that state. Further, we introduce an artificial chemistry inspired platform where it is easy to create tasks with multiple rewarding strategies utilizing different resources (i.e. multiple niches). We show that agents trained this way can escape poor-but-attractive local optima to instead converge to harder-to-discover higher value strategies in both the artificial chemistry environments and in simpler illustrative environments.
abstract_zh: 许多环境包含许多可用的可变价值利基，每个利基都与行为空间（政策空间）中的不同局部最优相关。在这种情况下，通常很难设计一个学习过程，能够在足够长的时间内避免因较差的局部最优而分散注意力，从而偶然发现最佳的可用利基。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用强化学习（RL）算法，在具有多个可变值利基的环境中，该算法比基线深度 Q 学习算法表现更好。我们提出的算法由两部分组成：代理架构和学习规则。代理架构包含多个子策略。该学习规则受到进化计算中的适应度共享的启发，并以一种新颖的方式应用于单智能体内部群体的使用价值分解网络的强化学习。具体可以理解为添加一个额外的损失项，其中一个策略的经验也用于以降低其对访问状态的价值估计的方式更新所有其他策略。特别是，当一个子策略频繁访问某一特定状态时，这会降低其他子策略访问该状态的预测值。此外，我们引入了一个受人工化学启发的平台，在该平台上，可以轻松地利用不同的资源（即多个利基）创建具有多种奖励策略的任务。我们表明，以这种方式训练的智能体可以逃避较差但有吸引力的局部最优，而是在人工化学环境和更简单的说明性环境中收敛到更难发现的更高价值策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过价值分解实现多样性的强化学习算法，用于在多生态位环境中识别更优策略。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在存在多个局部最优解的复杂环境中容易陷入次优生态位，难以发现高价值策略。
AI.method: 设计包含多个子策略的智能体架构，结合受进化计算启发的适应度共享机制，通过价值分解网络在单智能体内部种群中引入排斥性损失项，使高频访问状态的子策略降低其他策略对该状态的价值估计。
AI.result: 在人工化学平台和简化环境中验证，该算法能有效逃离吸引人的局部最优解，收敛到更高价值的策略组合。
AI.conclusion: 通过排斥性机制促进子策略多样性，可提升强化学习在多生态位环境中的全局优化能力。

In particular, when one sub-policy visits a particular state frequently this decreases the value predicted for other sub-policies for going to that state. Further, we introduce an artificial chemistry inspired platform where it is easy to create tasks with multiple rewarding strategies utilizing different resources (i.e. multiple niches). We show that agents trained this way can escape poor-but-attractive local optima to instead converge to harder-to-discover higher value strategies in both the artificial chemistry environments and in simpler illustrative environments. 许多环境包含许多可用的可变价值利基，每个利基都与行为空间（政策空间）中的不同局部最优相关。在这种情况下，通常很难设计一个学习过程，能够在足够长的时间内避免因较差的局部最优而分散注意力，从而偶然发现最佳的可用利基。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用强化学习（RL）算法，在具有多个可变值利基的环境中，该算法比基线深度 Q 学习算法表现更好。我们提出的算法由两部分组成：代理架构和学习规则。代理架构包含多个子策略。该学习规则受到进化计算中的适应度共享的启发，并以一种新颖的方式应用于单智能体内部群体的使用价值分解网络的强化学习。具体可以理解为添加一个额外的损失项，其中一个策略的经验也用于以降低其对访问状态的价值估计的方式更新所有其他策略。特别是，当一个子策略频繁访问某一特定状态时，这会降低其他子策略访问该状态的预测值。此外，我们引入了一个受人工化学启发的平台，在该平台上，可以轻松地利用不同的资源（即多个利基）创建具有多种奖励策略的任务。我们表明，以这种方式训练的智能体可以逃避较差但有吸引力的局部最优，而是在人工化学环境和更简单的说明性环境中收敛到更难发现的更高价值策略。 本文提出一种通过价值分解实现多样性的强化学习算法，用于在多生态位环境中识别更优策略。 Peter Sunehag,Alexander Sasha Vezhnevets,Edgar Duéñez-Guzmán,Igor Mordach,Joel Z. Leibo cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: František Nekovář,Jan Faigl,Martin Saska
title: Multi-Tour Set Traveling Salesman Problem in Planning Power Transmission Line Inspection
title_zh: 输电线路巡检规划中的多巡组旅行商问题

abstract: This letter concerns optimal power transmission line inspection formulated as a proposed generalization of the traveling salesman problem for a multi-route one-depot scenario. The problem is formulated for an inspection vehicle with a limited travel budget. Therefore, the solution can be composed of multiple runs to provide full coverage of the given power lines. Besides, the solution indicates how many vehicles can perform the inspection in a single run. The optimal solution of the problem is solved by the proposed Integer Linear Programming (ILP) formulation, which is, however, very computationally demanding. Therefore, the computational requirements are addressed by the combinatorial metaheuristic. The employed greedy randomized adaptive search procedure is significantly less demanding while providing competitive solutions and scales better with the problem size than the ILP-based approach. The proposed formulation and algorithms are demonstrated in a real-world scenario to inspect power line segments at the electrical substation.
summary: This letter concerns optimal power transmission line inspection formulated as a proposed generalization of the traveling salesman problem for a multi-route one-depot scenario. The problem is formulated for an inspection vehicle with a limited travel budget. Therefore, the solution can be composed of multiple runs to provide full coverage of the given power lines. Besides, the solution indicates how many vehicles can perform the inspection in a single run. The optimal solution of the problem is solved by the proposed Integer Linear Programming (ILP) formulation, which is, however, very computationally demanding. Therefore, the computational requirements are addressed by the combinatorial metaheuristic. The employed greedy randomized adaptive search procedure is significantly less demanding while providing competitive solutions and scales better with the problem size than the ILP-based approach. The proposed formulation and algorithms are demonstrated in a real-world scenario to inspect power line segments at the electrical substation.
abstract_zh: 这封信涉及最佳输电线路检查，该检查被制定为多路线单站场景的旅行推销员问题的泛化建议。该问题是针对行驶预算有限的检查车辆制定的。因此，该解决方案可以由多次运行组成，以提供给定电力线的完全覆盖。此外，该解决方案还显示一次可以有多少车辆执行检查。该问题的最优解是通过所提出的整数线性规划（ILP）公式来解决的，然而，该公式的计算要求非常高。因此，计算要求通过组合元启发法来解决。与基于 ILP 的方法相比，所采用的贪婪随机自适应搜索过程的要求明显较低，同时提供了有竞争力的解决方案，并且可以更好地适应问题的规模。所提出的公式和算法在实际场景中进行了演示，以检查变电站的电力线段。

AI.tldr: 本文将电力传输线路巡检规划建模为多路线单仓库场景下的旅行商问题推广形式，提出整数线性规划（ILP）和元启发式算法解决巡检路径优化问题。
AI.motivation: 电力线路巡检需在有限预算下实现全覆盖，传统方法难以平衡效率与成本，亟需优化路径规划算法。
AI.method: 提出基于整数线性规划的精确求解方法，并设计贪心随机自适应搜索程序（GRASP）元启发式算法应对大规模问题计算需求。
AI.result: 实验验证GRASP算法在保证解质量的同时显著降低计算复杂度，且在实际变电站线路巡检场景中有效可行。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型和算法能高效解决多车次电力线路巡检路径规划问题，为实际工程提供可扩展的优化方案。

authors_text: Hao Li,Dingwen Zhang,Nian Liu,Lechao Cheng,Yalun Dai,Chao Zhang,Xinggang Wang,Junwei Han
title: Boosting Low-Data Instance Segmentation by Unsupervised Pre-training with Saliency Prompt
title_zh: 通过带有显着性提示的无监督预训练来促进低数据实例分割
abstract: Recently, inspired by DETR variants, query-based end-to-end instance segmentation (QEIS) methods have outperformed CNN-based models on large-scale datasets. Yet they would lose efficacy when only a small amount of training data is available since it's hard for the crucial queries/kernels to learn localization and shape priors. To this end, this work offers a novel unsupervised pre-training solution for low-data regimes. Inspired by the recent success of the Prompting technique, we introduce a new pre-training method that boosts QEIS models by giving Saliency Prompt for queries/kernels. Our method contains three parts: 1) Saliency Masks Proposal is responsible for generating pseudo masks from unlabeled images based on the saliency mechanism. 2) Prompt-Kernel Matching transfers pseudo masks into prompts and injects the corresponding localization and shape priors to the best-matched kernels. 3) Kernel Supervision is applied to supply supervision at the kernel level for robust learning. From a practical perspective, our pre-training method helps QEIS models achieve a similar convergence speed and comparable performance with CNN-based models in low-data regimes. Experimental results show that our method significantly boosts several QEIS models on three datasets. Code will be made available.
summary: Recently, inspired by DETR variants, query-based end-to-end instance segmentation (QEIS) methods have outperformed CNN-based models on large-scale datasets. Yet they would lose efficacy when only a small amount of training data is available since it's hard for the crucial queries/kernels to learn localization and shape priors. To this end, this work offers a novel unsupervised pre-training solution for low-data regimes. Inspired by the recent success of the Prompting technique, we introduce a new pre-training method that boosts QEIS models by giving Saliency Prompt for queries/kernels. Our method contains three parts: 1) Saliency Masks Proposal is responsible for generating pseudo masks from unlabeled images based on the saliency mechanism. 2) Prompt-Kernel Matching transfers pseudo masks into prompts and injects the corresponding localization and shape priors to the best-matched kernels. 3) Kernel Supervision is applied to supply supervision at the kernel level for robust learning. From a practical perspective, our pre-training method helps QEIS models achieve a similar convergence speed and comparable performance with CNN-based models in low-data regimes. Experimental results show that our method significantly boosts several QEIS models on three datasets. Code will be made available.
abstract_zh: 最近，受 DETR 变体的启发，基于查询的端到端实例分割 (QEIS) 方法在大规模数据集上的性能优于基于 CNN 的模型。然而，当只有少量训练数据可用时，它们就会失去效力，因为关键查询/内核很难学习本地化和塑造先验。为此，这项工作为低数据制度提供了一种新颖的无监督预训练解决方案。受到提示技术最近成功的启发，我们引入了一种新的预训练方法，通过为查询/内核提供显着性提示来增强 QEIS 模型。我们的方法包含三个部分：1）Saliency Masks Proposal 负责根据显着性机制从未标记的图像生成伪掩模。 2) 提示-内核匹配将伪掩码转移到提示中，并将相应的定位和形状先验注入最佳匹配的内核。 3）内核监督用于在内核级别提供监督以实现鲁棒学习。从实践的角度来看，我们的预训练方法可以帮助 QEIS 模型在低数据条件下实现与基于 CNN 的模型相似的收敛速度和可比的性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着提升了三个数据集上的多个 QEIS 模型。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显著性提示的无监督预训练方法，以提升低数据量下的实例分割模型性能。
AI.motivation: 基于DETR的查询端到端实例分割（QEIS）方法在大规模数据集上表现优异，但在小数据场景下因查询/内核难以学习定位和形状先验而失效。
AI.method: 方法包含三部分：1) 基于显著性机制生成伪掩码；2) 将伪掩码转换为提示并注入最佳匹配内核的先验知识；3) 在内核层级施加监督以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在三个数据集上显著提升多个QEIS模型性能，且在低数据场景下收敛速度与CNN模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过无监督预训练与显著性提示机制，本文有效解决了低数据下QEIS模型的性能瓶颈，具有实际应用价值。

abstract: This paper concerns fault-tolerant power transmission line inspection planning as a generalization of the multiple traveling salesmen problem. The addressed inspection planning problem is formulated as a single-depot multiple-vehicle scenario, where the inspection vehicles are constrained by the battery budget limiting their inspection time. The inspection vehicle is assumed to be an autonomous multi-copter with a wide range of possible flight speeds influencing battery consumption. The inspection plan is represented by multiple routes for vehicles providing full coverage over inspection target power lines. On an inspection vehicle mission interruption, which might happen at any time during the execution of the inspection plan, the inspection is re-planned using the remaining vehicles and their remaining battery budgets. Robustness is introduced by choosing a suitable cost function for the initial plan that maximizes the time window for successful re-planning. It enables the remaining vehicles to successfully finish all the inspection targets using their respective remaining battery budgets. A combinatorial metaheuristic algorithm with various cost functions is used for planning and fast re-planning during the inspection.

abstract_zh: 本文将容错输电线路巡检规划作为多旅行商问题的推广。所解决的检查规划问题被制定为单车场多车辆场景，其中检查车辆受到电池预算的限制，从而限制了其检查时间。假设检查车辆是一种自主多旋翼飞行器，其可能的飞行速度范围很广，会影响电池消耗。检查计划以多条车辆路线为代表，实现对检查目标电力线路的全覆盖。在执行检查计划期间随时可能发生检查车辆任务中断时，将使用剩余车辆及其剩余电池预算重新计划检查。通过为初始计划选择合适的成本函数来最大化成功重新规划的时间窗口，从而引入鲁棒性。它使剩余车辆能够利用各自的剩余电池预算顺利完成所有检查目标。具有各种成本函数的组合元启发式算法用于检查期间的规划和快速重新规划。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在电池预算限制下，针对电力传输线路的多无人机故障容错鲁棒巡检路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 电力线路巡检需应对无人机突发故障或任务中断，传统方法难以保证剩余车辆在有限电量下完成全部巡检目标。
AI.method: 将问题建模为单仓库多车辆路径问题，通过设计优化成本函数提升重规划时间窗口，并采用组合元启发式算法进行初始规划与快速重规划。
AI.result: 提出的算法能够在车辆中断后，基于剩余电量和车辆资源成功完成所有巡检目标，验证了方法的鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过成本函数优化和元启发式算法，实现了电力线路巡检任务的故障容错与资源高效利用。

authors_text: Zhangyang Xiong,Di Kang,Derong Jin,Weikai Chen,Linchao Bao,Shuguang Cui,Xiaoguang Han
title: Get3DHuman: Lifting StyleGAN-Human into a 3D Generative Model using Pixel-aligned Reconstruction Priors
title_zh: Get3DHuman：使用像素对齐重建先验将 StyleGAN-Human 提升为 3D 生成模型
abstract: Fast generation of high-quality 3D digital humans is important to a vast number of applications ranging from entertainment to professional concerns. Recent advances in differentiable rendering have enabled the training of 3D generative models without requiring 3D ground truths. However, the quality of the generated 3D humans still has much room to improve in terms of both fidelity and diversity. In this paper, we present Get3DHuman, a novel 3D human framework that can significantly boost the realism and diversity of the generated outcomes by only using a limited budget of 3D ground-truth data. Our key observation is that the 3D generator can profit from human-related priors learned through 2D human generators and 3D reconstructors. Specifically, we bridge the latent space of Get3DHuman with that of StyleGAN-Human via a specially-designed prior network, where the input latent code is mapped to the shape and texture feature volumes spanned by the pixel-aligned 3D reconstructor. The outcomes of the prior network are then leveraged as the supervisory signals for the main generator network. To ensure effective training, we further propose three tailored losses applied to the generated feature volumes and the intermediate feature maps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Get3DHuman greatly outperforms the other state-of-the-art approaches and can support a wide range of applications including shape interpolation, shape re-texturing, and single-view reconstruction through latent inversion.
summary: Fast generation of high-quality 3D digital humans is important to a vast number of applications ranging from entertainment to professional concerns. Recent advances in differentiable rendering have enabled the training of 3D generative models without requiring 3D ground truths. However, the quality of the generated 3D humans still has much room to improve in terms of both fidelity and diversity. In this paper, we present Get3DHuman, a novel 3D human framework that can significantly boost the realism and diversity of the generated outcomes by only using a limited budget of 3D ground-truth data. Our key observation is that the 3D generator can profit from human-related priors learned through 2D human generators and 3D reconstructors. Specifically, we bridge the latent space of Get3DHuman with that of StyleGAN-Human via a specially-designed prior network, where the input latent code is mapped to the shape and texture feature volumes spanned by the pixel-aligned 3D reconstructor. The outcomes of the prior network are then leveraged as the supervisory signals for the main generator network. To ensure effective training, we further propose three tailored losses applied to the generated feature volumes and the intermediate feature maps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Get3DHuman greatly outperforms the other state-of-the-art approaches and can support a wide range of applications including shape interpolation, shape re-texturing, and single-view reconstruction through latent inversion.
abstract_zh: 快速生成高质量 3D 数字人体对于从娱乐到专业领域的大量应用都很重要。可微渲染的最新进展使得无需 3D 基本事实即可训练 3D 生成模型。然而，生成的 3D 人体的质量在保真度和多样性方面仍有很大的改进空间。在本文中，我们提出了 Get3DHuman，这是一种新颖的 3D 人体框架，只需使用有限的 3D 地面实况数据预算即可显着提高生成结果的真实性和多样性。我们的主要观察结果是，3D 生成器可以从通过 2D 人类生成器和 3D 重建器学习的人类相关先验中获益。具体来说，我们通过专门设计的先验网络将 Get3DHuman 的潜在空间与 StyleGAN-Human 的潜在空间连接起来，其中输入的潜在代码被映射到由像素对齐的 3D 重建器跨越的形状和纹理特征体积。然后，先前网络的结果被用作主发电机网络的监控信号。为了确保有效的训练，我们进一步提出了应用于生成的特征量和中间特征图的三种定制损失。大量实验表明，Get3DHuman 大大优于其他最先进的方法，并且可以支持广泛的应用，包括形状插值、形状重新纹理和通过潜在反转进行单视图重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Get3DHuman框架，通过结合2D生成模型与3D重建先验，以有限的3D真实数据生成高质量且多样化的3D数字人。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型在保真度和多样性上存在不足，而直接依赖3D真实数据成本高昂，需探索利用2D生成器与3D重建器的先验知识提升生成效果。
AI.method: 设计先验网络将StyleGAN-Human的潜在空间映射到像素对齐的3D特征体，并通过定制的损失函数监督主生成网络，结合形状与纹理特征优化训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在生成质量与多样性上显著优于现有技术，支持形状插值、纹理重映射及单视角重建等应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合2D生成先验与3D重建技术，Get3DHuman有效提升了3D数字人生成的逼真度与灵活性，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Max Winkelmann,Constantin Vasconi,Steffen Müller
title: Vectorized Scenario Description and Motion Prediction for Scenario-Based Testing
title_zh: 基于场景的测试的矢量化场景描述和运动预测
abstract: Automated vehicles (AVs) are tested in diverse scenarios, typically specified by parameters such as velocities, distances, or curve radii. To describe scenarios uniformly independent of such parameters, this paper proposes a vectorized scenario description defined by the road geometry and vehicles' trajectories. Data of this form are generated for three scenarios, merged, and used to train the motion prediction model VectorNet, allowing to predict an AV's trajectory for unseen scenarios. Predicting scenario evaluation metrics, VectorNet partially achieves lower errors than regression models that separately process the three scenarios' data. However, for comprehensive generalization, sufficient variance in the training data must be ensured. Thus, contrary to existing methods, our proposed method can merge diverse scenarios' data and exploit spatial and temporal nuances in the vectorized scenario description. As a result, data from specified test scenarios and real-world scenarios can be compared and combined for (predictive) analyses and scenario selection.
summary: Automated vehicles (AVs) are tested in diverse scenarios, typically specified by parameters such as velocities, distances, or curve radii. To describe scenarios uniformly independent of such parameters, this paper proposes a vectorized scenario description defined by the road geometry and vehicles' trajectories. Data of this form are generated for three scenarios, merged, and used to train the motion prediction model VectorNet, allowing to predict an AV's trajectory for unseen scenarios. Predicting scenario evaluation metrics, VectorNet partially achieves lower errors than regression models that separately process the three scenarios' data. However, for comprehensive generalization, sufficient variance in the training data must be ensured. Thus, contrary to existing methods, our proposed method can merge diverse scenarios' data and exploit spatial and temporal nuances in the vectorized scenario description. As a result, data from specified test scenarios and real-world scenarios can be compared and combined for (predictive) analyses and scenario selection.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 在不同的场景中进行测试，通常由速度、距离或曲线半径等参数指定。为了统一地描述独立于这些参数的场景，本文提出了一种由道路几何形状和车辆轨迹定义的矢量化场景描述。这种形式的数据是针对三种场景生成的，合并后用于训练运动预测模型 VectorNet，从而可以预测 AV 未见过的场景的轨迹。在预测场景评估指标时，VectorNet 比单独处理三种场景数据的回归模型部分实现了更低的误差。然而，为了全面概括，必须确保训练数据有足够的方差。因此，与现有方法相反，我们提出的方法可以合并不同场景的数据并利用矢量化场景描述中的空间和时间细微差别。因此，可以比较和组合来自指定测试场景和实际场景的数据，以进行（预测）分析和场景选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量化场景描述的运动预测方法，通过合并多场景数据训练VectorNet模型，提升自动驾驶测试的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统场景参数依赖性强，难以统一描述不同测试场景，需寻找独立于具体参数的场景表征方法以实现更广的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建道路几何与轨迹的向量化场景描述，合并三个场景数据训练VectorNet模型，利用其时空特征提取能力预测未见过场景的车辆轨迹。
AI.result: VectorNet在场景评估指标预测上较独立处理各场景的回归模型误差更低，但需保证训练数据多样性以实现全面泛化。
AI.conclusion: 向量化描述可整合多场景数据并挖掘时空细节，使测试场景与现实场景数据可比较结合，提升预测分析与场景选择效率。

search_text: Vectorized Scenario Description and Motion Prediction for Scenario-Based Testing 基于场景的测试的矢量化场景描述和运动预测 Automated vehicles (AVs) are tested in diverse scenarios, typically specified by parameters such as velocities, distances, or curve radii. To describe scenarios uniformly independent of such parameters, this paper proposes a vectorized scenario description defined by the road geometry and vehicles' trajectories. Data of this form are generated for three scenarios, merged, and used to train the motion prediction model VectorNet, allowing to predict an AV's trajectory for unseen scenarios. Predicting scenario evaluation metrics, VectorNet partially achieves lower errors than regression models that separately process the three scenarios' data. However, for comprehensive generalization, sufficient variance in the training data must be ensured. Thus, contrary to existing methods, our proposed method can merge diverse scenarios' data and exploit spatial and temporal nuances in the vectorized scenario description. As a result, data from specified test scenarios and real-world scenarios can be compared and combined for (predictive) analyses and scenario selection. 自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 在不同的场景中进行测试，通常由速度、距离或曲线半径等参数指定。为了统一地描述独立于这些参数的场景，本文提出了一种由道路几何形状和车辆轨迹定义的矢量化场景描述。这种形式的数据是针对三种场景生成的，合并后用于训练运动预测模型 VectorNet，从而可以预测 AV 未见过的场景的轨迹。在预测场景评估指标时，VectorNet 比单独处理三种场景数据的回归模型部分实现了更低的误差。然而，为了全面概括，必须确保训练数据有足够的方差。因此，与现有方法相反，我们提出的方法可以合并不同场景的数据并利用矢量化场景描述中的空间和时间细微差别。因此，可以比较和组合来自指定测试场景和实际场景的数据，以进行（预测）分析和场景选择。 本文提出一种基于向量化场景描述的运动预测方法，通过合并多场景数据训练VectorNet模型，提升自动驾驶测试的泛化能力。 Max Winkelmann,Constantin Vasconi,Steffen Müller cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Xiangqian Li
title: A comparative study of statistical and machine learning models on near-real-time daily emissions prediction
title_zh: 近实时每日排放预测的统计模型和机器学习模型的比较研究
abstract: The rapid ascent in carbon dioxide emissions is a major cause of global warming and climate change, which pose a huge threat to human survival and impose far-reaching influence on the global ecosystem. Therefore, it is very necessary to effectively control carbon dioxide emissions by accurately predicting and analyzing the change trend timely, so as to provide a reference for carbon dioxide emissions mitigation measures. This paper is aiming to select a suitable model to predict the near-real-time daily emissions based on univariate daily time-series data from January 1st, 2020 to September 30st, 2022 of all sectors (Power, Industry, Ground Transport, Residential, Domestic Aviation, International Aviation) in China. We proposed six prediction models, which including three statistical models: Grey prediction (GM(1,1)), autoregressive integrated moving average (ARIMA) and seasonal autoregressive integrated moving average with exogenous factors (SARIMAX); three machine learning models: artificial neural network (ANN), random forest (RF) and long short term memory (LSTM). To evaluate the performance of these models, five criteria: Mean Squared Error (MSE), Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE), Mean Absolute Error (MAE), Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) and Coefficient of Determination () are imported and discussed in detail. In the results, three machine learning models perform better than that three statistical models, in which LSTM model performs the best on five criteria values for daily emissions prediction with the 3.5179e-04 MSE value, 0.0187 RMSE value, 0.0140 MAE value, 14.8291% MAPE value and 0.9844 value.
summary: The rapid ascent in carbon dioxide emissions is a major cause of global warming and climate change, which pose a huge threat to human survival and impose far-reaching influence on the global ecosystem. Therefore, it is very necessary to effectively control carbon dioxide emissions by accurately predicting and analyzing the change trend timely, so as to provide a reference for carbon dioxide emissions mitigation measures. This paper is aiming to select a suitable model to predict the near-real-time daily emissions based on univariate daily time-series data from January 1st, 2020 to September 30st, 2022 of all sectors (Power, Industry, Ground Transport, Residential, Domestic Aviation, International Aviation) in China. We proposed six prediction models, which including three statistical models: Grey prediction (GM(1,1)), autoregressive integrated moving average (ARIMA) and seasonal autoregressive integrated moving average with exogenous factors (SARIMAX); three machine learning models: artificial neural network (ANN), random forest (RF) and long short term memory (LSTM). To evaluate the performance of these models, five criteria: Mean Squared Error (MSE), Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE), Mean Absolute Error (MAE), Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) and Coefficient of Determination () are imported and discussed in detail. In the results, three machine learning models perform better than that three statistical models, in which LSTM model performs the best on five criteria values for daily emissions prediction with the 3.5179e-04 MSE value, 0.0187 RMSE value, 0.0140 MAE value, 14.8291% MAPE value and 0.9844 value.
abstract_zh: 二氧化碳排放量快速上升是全球变暖和气候变化的重要原因，对人类生存构成巨大威胁，对全球生态系统产生深远影响。因此，及时准确预测和分析变化趋势，有效控制二氧化碳排放，为二氧化碳排放减缓措施提供参考。本文旨在基于2020年1月1日至2022年9月30日中国所有行业（电力、工业、地面交通、住宅、国内航空、国际航空）的单变量日时间序列数据，选择合适的模型来预测近实时的日排放量。我们提出了六种预测模型，其中包括三种统计模型：灰色预测（GM（1,1））、自回归综合移动平均（ARIMA）和带有外生因素的季节性自回归综合移动平均（SARIMAX）；三种机器学习模型：人工神经网络（ANN）、随机森林（RF）和长短期记忆（LSTM）。为了评估这些模型的性能，导入并详细讨论了五个标准：均方误差（MSE）、均方根误差（RMSE）、平均绝对误差（MAE）、平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）和决定系数（）。结果显示，三种机器学习模型的表现优于三种统计模型，其中 LSTM 模型在每日排放量预测的五个标准值上表现最好，分别为 3.5179e-04 MSE 值、0.0187 RMSE 值、0.0140 MAE 值、14.8291% MAPE 值和 0.9844 值。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在比较统计模型和机器学习模型在近实时预测中国各行业每日碳排放量中的表现。
AI.motivation: 二氧化碳排放量的快速上升导致全球变暖和气候变化，准确预测排放趋势对制定减排措施至关重要。
AI.method: 基于2020年1月1日至2022年9月30日的中国各行业单变量时间序列数据，提出六种模型（三种统计模型和三种机器学习模型），并通过MSE、RMSE、MAE、MAPE和R²五项指标评估模型性能。
AI.result: 三种机器学习模型表现优于统计模型，其中LSTM模型在五项指标上最优，MSE为3.5179e-04，R²为0.9844。
AI.conclusion: LSTM模型在近实时每日排放预测中效果最佳，可为碳排放控制提供有效参考。

authors_text: Simon Gottschalk,Elena Demidova
title: Tab2KG: Semantic Table Interpretation with Lightweight Semantic Profiles
title_zh: Tab2KG：具有轻量级语义配置文件的语义表解释
abstract: Tabular data plays an essential role in many data analytics and machine learning tasks. Typically, tabular data does not possess any machine-readable semantics. In this context, semantic table interpretation is crucial for making data analytics workflows more robust and explainable. This article proposes Tab2KG - a novel method that targets at the interpretation of tables with previously unseen data and automatically infers their semantics to transform them into semantic data graphs. We introduce original lightweight semantic profiles that enrich a domain ontology's concepts and relations and represent domain and table characteristics. We propose a one-shot learning approach that relies on these profiles to map a tabular dataset containing previously unseen instances to a domain ontology. In contrast to the existing semantic table interpretation approaches, Tab2KG relies on the semantic profiles only and does not require any instance lookup. This property makes Tab2KG particularly suitable in the data analytics context, in which data tables typically contain new instances. Our experimental evaluation on several real-world datasets from different application domains demonstrates that Tab2KG outperforms state-of-the-art semantic table interpretation baselines.
summary: Tabular data plays an essential role in many data analytics and machine learning tasks. Typically, tabular data does not possess any machine-readable semantics. In this context, semantic table interpretation is crucial for making data analytics workflows more robust and explainable. This article proposes Tab2KG - a novel method that targets at the interpretation of tables with previously unseen data and automatically infers their semantics to transform them into semantic data graphs. We introduce original lightweight semantic profiles that enrich a domain ontology's concepts and relations and represent domain and table characteristics. We propose a one-shot learning approach that relies on these profiles to map a tabular dataset containing previously unseen instances to a domain ontology. In contrast to the existing semantic table interpretation approaches, Tab2KG relies on the semantic profiles only and does not require any instance lookup. This property makes Tab2KG particularly suitable in the data analytics context, in which data tables typically contain new instances. Our experimental evaluation on several real-world datasets from different application domains demonstrates that Tab2KG outperforms state-of-the-art semantic table interpretation baselines.
abstract_zh: 表格数据在许多数据分析和机器学习任务中发挥着重要作用。通常，表格数据不具有任何机器可读的语义。在这种情况下，语义表解释对于使数据分析工作流程更加稳健和可解释至关重要。本文提出了 Tab2KG - 一种新颖的方法，旨在解释包含以前未见过的数据的表，并自动推断其语义，将其转换为语义数据图。我们引入了原始的轻量级语义配置文件，丰富了领域本体的概念和关系，并表示了领域和表的特征。我们提出了一种一次性学习方法，该方法依赖于这些配置文件将包含以前未见过的实例的表格数据集映射到领域本体。与现有的语义表解释方法相比，Tab2KG 仅依赖于语义配置文件，不需要任何实例查找。此属性使 Tab2KG 特别适合数据分析环境，其中数据表通常包含新实例。我们对来自不同应用领域的几个真实世界数据集的实验评估表明，Tab2KG 优于最先进的语义表解释基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tab2KG方法，通过轻量级语义档案实现表格数据的语义解释，将其转化为语义数据图。
AI.motivation: 表格数据缺乏机器可读语义，现有方法依赖实例查找无法处理新实例，需更鲁棒的语义解释方案。
AI.method: 基于轻量级语义档案和一次性学习，无需实例查找即可将表格映射到领域本体，构建语义数据图。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验中，Tab2KG优于现有语义表格解释方法。
AI.conclusion: Tab2KG通过语义档案实现高效语义映射，适用于包含新实例的数据分析场景。

motivation: 表格数据缺乏机器可读语义，现有方法依赖实例查找无法处理新实例，需更鲁棒的语义解释方案。

search_text: Tab2KG: Semantic Table Interpretation with Lightweight Semantic Profiles Tab2KG：具有轻量级语义配置文件的语义表解释 Tabular data plays an essential role in many data analytics and machine learning tasks. Typically, tabular data does not possess any machine-readable semantics. In this context, semantic table interpretation is crucial for making data analytics workflows more robust and explainable. This article proposes Tab2KG - a novel method that targets at the interpretation of tables with previously unseen data and automatically infers their semantics to transform them into semantic data graphs. We introduce original lightweight semantic profiles that enrich a domain ontology's concepts and relations and represent domain and table characteristics. We propose a one-shot learning approach that relies on these profiles to map a tabular dataset containing previously unseen instances to a domain ontology. In contrast to the existing semantic table interpretation approaches, Tab2KG relies on the semantic profiles only and does not require any instance lookup. This property makes Tab2KG particularly suitable in the data analytics context, in which data tables typically contain new instances. Our experimental evaluation on several real-world datasets from different application domains demonstrates that Tab2KG outperforms state-of-the-art semantic table interpretation baselines. 表格数据在许多数据分析和机器学习任务中发挥着重要作用。通常，表格数据不具有任何机器可读的语义。在这种情况下，语义表解释对于使数据分析工作流程更加稳健和可解释至关重要。本文提出了 Tab2KG - 一种新颖的方法，旨在解释包含以前未见过的数据的表，并自动推断其语义，将其转换为语义数据图。我们引入了原始的轻量级语义配置文件，丰富了领域本体的概念和关系，并表示了领域和表的特征。我们提出了一种一次性学习方法，该方法依赖于这些配置文件将包含以前未见过的实例的表格数据集映射到领域本体。与现有的语义表解释方法相比，Tab2KG 仅依赖于语义配置文件，不需要任何实例查找。此属性使 Tab2KG 特别适合数据分析环境，其中数据表通常包含新实例。我们对来自不同应用领域的几个真实世界数据集的实验评估表明，Tab2KG 优于最先进的语义表解释基线。 本文提出Tab2KG方法，通过轻量级语义档案实现表格数据的语义解释，将其转化为语义数据图。 Simon Gottschalk,Elena Demidova cs.AI

authors_text: Rita Pucci,Christian Micheloni,Niki Martinel
title: UW-CVGAN: UnderWater Image Enhancement with Capsules Vectors Quantization
title_zh: UW-CVGAN：使用胶囊矢量量化的水下图像增强
abstract: The degradation in the underwater images is due to wavelength-dependent light attenuation, scattering, and to the diversity of the water types in which they are captured. Deep neural networks take a step in this field, providing autonomous models able to achieve the enhancement of underwater images. We introduce Underwater Capsules Vectors GAN UWCVGAN based on the discrete features quantization paradigm from VQGAN for this task. The proposed UWCVGAN combines an encoding network, which compresses the image into its latent representation, with a decoding network, able to reconstruct the enhancement of the image from the only latent representation. In contrast with VQGAN, UWCVGAN achieves feature quantization by exploiting the clusterization ability of capsule layer, making the model completely trainable and easier to manage. The model obtains enhanced underwater images with high quality and fine details. Moreover, the trained encoder is independent of the decoder giving the possibility to be embedded onto the collector as compressing algorithm to reduce the memory space required for the images, of factor $3\times$. \myUWCVGAN{ }is validated with quantitative and qualitative analysis on benchmark datasets, and we present metrics results compared with the state of the art.
summary: The degradation in the underwater images is due to wavelength-dependent light attenuation, scattering, and to the diversity of the water types in which they are captured. Deep neural networks take a step in this field, providing autonomous models able to achieve the enhancement of underwater images. We introduce Underwater Capsules Vectors GAN UWCVGAN based on the discrete features quantization paradigm from VQGAN for this task. The proposed UWCVGAN combines an encoding network, which compresses the image into its latent representation, with a decoding network, able to reconstruct the enhancement of the image from the only latent representation. In contrast with VQGAN, UWCVGAN achieves feature quantization by exploiting the clusterization ability of capsule layer, making the model completely trainable and easier to manage. The model obtains enhanced underwater images with high quality and fine details. Moreover, the trained encoder is independent of the decoder giving the possibility to be embedded onto the collector as compressing algorithm to reduce the memory space required for the images, of factor $3\times$. \myUWCVGAN{ }is validated with quantitative and qualitative analysis on benchmark datasets, and we present metrics results compared with the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 水下图像的质量下降是由于与波长相关的光衰减、散射以及捕获图像的水类型的多样性造成的。深度神经网络在这一领域迈出了一步，提供了能够实现水下图像增强的自主模型。我们针对此任务引入了基于 VQGAN 离散特征量化范例的水下胶囊向量 GAN UWCVGAN。所提出的 UWCVGAN 将编码网络与解码网络相结合，编码网络将图像压缩为其潜在表示，解码网络能够从唯一的潜在表示重建图像的增强。与VQGAN相比，UWCVGAN通过利用胶囊层的聚类能力来实现特征量化，使模型完全可训练且更易于管理。该模型获得了高质量、细节丰富的增强水下图像。此外，经过训练的编码器独立于解码器，可以作为压缩算法嵌入到收集器中，以减少图像所需的存储空间，系数为 $3\times$。 \myUWCVGAN{ }通过对基准数据集的定量和定性分析进行了验证，并且我们提供了与现有技术相比的指标结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于胶囊向量量化（UW-CVGAN）的水下图像增强方法，通过结合编码器和解码器网络实现高质量图像增强。
AI.motivation: 水下图像因光衰减、散射和水体多样性导致退化，现有深度学习方法在可训练性和管理性上存在不足，需改进量化范式以提升效果。
AI.method: 基于VQGAN框架，利用胶囊层的聚类能力实现特征量化，编码器压缩图像为潜在表示，解码器仅依赖潜在表示重建增强图像，且编码器可独立作为压缩算法使用。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证，生成的水下图像具有高质量细节，内存占用减少3倍，定量和定性指标优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: UW-CVGAN通过胶囊向量量化有效解决了水下图像增强问题，在图像质量与内存效率上取得平衡，验证了方法的优越性。

search_text: UW-CVGAN: UnderWater Image Enhancement with Capsules Vectors Quantization UW-CVGAN：使用胶囊矢量量化的水下图像增强 The degradation in the underwater images is due to wavelength-dependent light attenuation, scattering, and to the diversity of the water types in which they are captured. Deep neural networks take a step in this field, providing autonomous models able to achieve the enhancement of underwater images. We introduce Underwater Capsules Vectors GAN UWCVGAN based on the discrete features quantization paradigm from VQGAN for this task. The proposed UWCVGAN combines an encoding network, which compresses the image into its latent representation, with a decoding network, able to reconstruct the enhancement of the image from the only latent representation. In contrast with VQGAN, UWCVGAN achieves feature quantization by exploiting the clusterization ability of capsule layer, making the model completely trainable and easier to manage. authors_text: Duo Zhang,Chen Liang,Xifeng Gao,Kui Wu,Zherong Pan
title: Provably Robust Semi-Infinite Program Under Collision Constraints via Subdivision
title_zh: 通过细分在碰撞约束下证明稳健的半无限程序
abstract: We present a semi-infinite program (SIP) solver for trajectory optimizations of general articulated robots. These problems are more challenging than standard Nonlinear Program (NLP) by involving an infinite number of non-convex, collision constraints. Prior SIP solvers based on constraint sampling cannot guarantee the satisfaction of all constraints. Instead, our method uses a conservative bound on articulated body motions to ensure the solution feasibility throughout the optimization procedure. We further use subdivision to adaptively reduce the error in conservative motion estimation. Combined, we prove that our SIP solver guarantees feasibility while approaches the critical point of SIP problems up to arbitrary user-provided precision. We have verified our method on a row of trajectory optimization problems involving industrial robot arms and UAVs, where our method can generate collision-free, locally optimal trajectories within a couple minutes.
summary: We present a semi-infinite program (SIP) solver for trajectory optimizations of general articulated robots. These problems are more challenging than standard Nonlinear Program (NLP) by involving an infinite number of non-convex, collision constraints. Prior SIP solvers based on constraint sampling cannot guarantee the satisfaction of all constraints. Instead, our method uses a conservative bound on articulated body motions to ensure the solution feasibility throughout the optimization procedure. We further use subdivision to adaptively reduce the error in conservative motion estimation. Combined, we prove that our SIP solver guarantees feasibility while approaches the critical point of SIP problems up to arbitrary user-provided precision. We have verified our method on a row of trajectory optimization problems involving industrial robot arms and UAVs, where our method can generate collision-free, locally optimal trajectories within a couple minutes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于通用关节机器人轨迹优化的半无限程序（SIP）求解器。这些问题比标准非线性程序 (NLP) 更具挑战性，因为涉及无限数量的非凸碰撞约束。现有的基于约束采样的SIP求解器不能保证满足所有约束。相反，我们的方法使用关节体运动的保守界限来确保整个优化过程中解决方案的可行性。我们进一步使用细分来自适应地减少保守运动估计中的误差。结合起来，我们证明我们的 SIP 求解器保证了可行性，同时接近 SIP 问题的临界点，达到任意用户提供的精度。我们已经在涉及工业机器人手臂和无人机的一系列轨迹优化问题上验证了我们的方法，我们的方法可以在几分钟内生成无碰撞的局部最优轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于关节机器人轨迹优化的半无限规划（SIP）求解器，通过处理无限非凸碰撞约束来确保轨迹可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统SIP求解器基于约束采样无法保证所有碰撞约束满足，而轨迹优化需要严格避免碰撞并保证解的可行性。
AI.method: 采用关节体运动保守界限定可行性，结合细分技术自适应减少误差，证明求解器可保证可行性并逼近SIP临界点。
AI.result: 在工业机器人臂和无人机轨迹优化实验中，方法能在数分钟内生成无碰撞的局部最优轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂机器人系统提供了可证明鲁棒且高效的SIP求解框架，解决了碰撞约束下的轨迹优化难题。

authors_text: Rafail Fridman,Amit Abecasis,Yoni Kasten,Tali Dekel
title: SceneScape: Text-Driven Consistent Scene Generation
title_zh: SceneScape：文本驱动的一致场景生成
abstract: We present a method for text-driven perpetual view generation -- synthesizing long-term videos of various scenes solely, given an input text prompt describing the scene and camera poses. We introduce a novel framework that generates such videos in an online fashion by combining the generative power of a pre-trained text-to-image model with the geometric priors learned by a pre-trained monocular depth prediction model. To tackle the pivotal challenge of achieving 3D consistency, i.e., synthesizing videos that depict geometrically-plausible scenes, we deploy an online test-time training to encourage the predicted depth map of the current frame to be geometrically consistent with the synthesized scene. The depth maps are used to construct a unified mesh representation of the scene, which is progressively constructed along the video generation process. In contrast to previous works, which are applicable only to limited domains, our method generates diverse scenes, such as walkthroughs in spaceships, caves, or ice castles.
summary: We present a method for text-driven perpetual view generation -- synthesizing long-term videos of various scenes solely, given an input text prompt describing the scene and camera poses. We introduce a novel framework that generates such videos in an online fashion by combining the generative power of a pre-trained text-to-image model with the geometric priors learned by a pre-trained monocular depth prediction model. To tackle the pivotal challenge of achieving 3D consistency, i.e., synthesizing videos that depict geometrically-plausible scenes, we deploy an online test-time training to encourage the predicted depth map of the current frame to be geometrically consistent with the synthesized scene. The depth maps are used to construct a unified mesh representation of the scene, which is progressively constructed along the video generation process. In contrast to previous works, which are applicable only to limited domains, our method generates diverse scenes, such as walkthroughs in spaceships, caves, or ice castles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种文本驱动的永久视图生成方法——在给定描述场景和相机姿势的输入文本提示的情况下，单独合成各种场景的长期视频。我们引入了一种新颖的框架，通过将预训练的文本到图像模型的生成能力与预训练的单目深度预测模型学习的几何先验相结合，以在线方式生成此类视频。为了解决实现 3D 一致性的关键挑战，即合成描绘几何合理场景的视频，我们部署了在线测试时训练，以鼓励当前帧的预测深度图与合成场景在几何上一致。深度图用于构建场景的统一网格表示，该表示是沿着视频生成过程逐步构建的。与之前仅适用于有限领域的作品相比，我们的方法生成了不同的场景，例如宇宙飞船、洞穴或冰堡中的演练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本输入生成长期一致场景视频的方法，通过结合预训练的文本到图像模型和单目深度预测模型，实现几何上合理的场景合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成多样化的长期场景视频时存在局限性，难以保持几何一致性且适用领域有限，因此需要一种能够生成多样且几何合理场景的新方法。
AI.method: 框架结合预训练文本到图像模型与单目深度预测模型，通过在线测试时训练确保当前帧的深度图与合成场景几何一致，并构建统一的场景网格表示。
AI.result: 方法成功生成了包括飞船、洞穴和冰城堡等多种场景的 walkthrough 视频，验证了其在多样性和几何一致性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过在线训练和深度图融合有效解决了长期视频生成的几何一致性问题，为文本驱动的场景生成提供了更广泛的应用可能。
