search_text: SceneScape: Text-Driven Consistent Scene Generation SceneScape：文本驱动的一致场景生成 We present a method for text-driven perpetual view generation -- synthesizing long-term videos of various scenes solely, given an input text prompt describing the scene and camera poses. We introduce a novel framework that generates such videos in an online fashion by combining the generative power of a pre-trained text-to-image model with the geometric priors learned by a pre-trained monocular depth prediction model. To tackle the pivotal challenge of achieving 3D consistency, i.e., synthesizing videos that depict geometrically-plausible scenes, we deploy an online test-time training to encourage the predicted depth map of the current frame to be geometrically consistent with the synthesized scene. The depth maps are used to construct a unified mesh representation of the scene, which is progressively constructed along the video generation process. In contrast to previous works, which are applicable only to limited domains, our method generates diverse scenes, such as walkthroughs in spaceships, caves, or ice castles. 我们提出了一种文本驱动的永久视图生成方法——在给定描述场景和相机姿势的输入文本提示的情况下，单独合成各种场景的长期视频。我们引入了一种新颖的框架，通过将预训练的文本到图像模型的生成能力与预训练的单目深度预测模型学习的几何先验相结合，以在线方式生成此类视频。为了解决实现 3D 一致性的关键挑战，即合成描绘几何合理场景的视频，我们部署了在线测试时训练，以鼓励当前帧的预测深度图与合成场景在几何上一致。深度图用于构建场景的统一网格表示，该表示是沿着视频生成过程逐步构建的。与之前仅适用于有限领域的作品相比，我们的方法生成了不同的场景，例如宇宙飞船、洞穴或冰堡中的演练。 本文提出了一种基于文本输入生成长期一致场景视频的方法，通过结合预训练的文本到图像模型和单目深度预测模型，实现几何上合理的场景合成。 Rafail Fridman,Amit Abecasis,Yoni Kasten,Tali Dekel cs.CV

authors_text: Zijie Geng,Shufang Xie,Yingce Xia,Lijun Wu,Tao Qin,Jie Wang,Yongdong Zhang,Feng Wu,Tie-Yan Liu
title: De Novo Molecular Generation via Connection-aware Motif Mining
title_zh: 通过连接感知基序挖掘进行从头分子生成
abstract: De novo molecular generation is an essential task for science discovery. Recently, fragment-based deep generative models have attracted much research attention due to their flexibility in generating novel molecules based on existing molecule fragments. However, the motif vocabulary, i.e., the collection of frequent fragments, is usually built upon heuristic rules, which brings difficulties to capturing common substructures from large amounts of molecules. In this work, we propose a new method, MiCaM, to generate molecules based on mined connection-aware motifs. Specifically, it leverages a data-driven algorithm to automatically discover motifs from a molecule library by iteratively merging subgraphs based on their frequency. The obtained motif vocabulary consists of not only molecular motifs (i.e., the frequent fragments), but also their connection information, indicating how the motifs are connected with each other. Based on the mined connection-aware motifs, MiCaM builds a connection-aware generator, which simultaneously picks up motifs and determines how they are connected. We test our method on distribution-learning benchmarks (i.e., generating novel molecules to resemble the distribution of a given training set) and goal-directed benchmarks (i.e., generating molecules with target properties), and achieve significant improvements over previous fragment-based baselines. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method can effectively mine domain-specific motifs for different tasks.
summary: De novo molecular generation is an essential task for science discovery. Recently, fragment-based deep generative models have attracted much research attention due to their flexibility in generating novel molecules based on existing molecule fragments. However, the motif vocabulary, i.e., the collection of frequent fragments, is usually built upon heuristic rules, which brings difficulties to capturing common substructures from large amounts of molecules. In this work, we propose a new method, MiCaM, to generate molecules based on mined connection-aware motifs. Specifically, it leverages a data-driven algorithm to automatically discover motifs from a molecule library by iteratively merging subgraphs based on their frequency. The obtained motif vocabulary consists of not only molecular motifs (i.e., the frequent fragments), but also their connection information, indicating how the motifs are connected with each other. Based on the mined connection-aware motifs, MiCaM builds a connection-aware generator, which simultaneously picks up motifs and determines how they are connected. We test our method on distribution-learning benchmarks (i.e., generating novel molecules to resemble the distribution of a given training set) and goal-directed benchmarks (i.e., generating molecules with target properties), and achieve significant improvements over previous fragment-based baselines. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method can effectively mine domain-specific motifs for different tasks.
abstract_zh: 从头分子生成是科学发现的一项重要任务。最近，基于片段的深度生成模型由于其基于现有分子片段生成新分子的灵活性而引起了广泛的研究关注。然而，主题词汇，即频繁片段的集合，通常建立在启发式规则的基础上，这给从大量分子中捕获共同的子结构带来了困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法 MiCaM，基于挖掘的连接感知图案生成分子。具体来说，它利用数据驱动的算法，通过根据子图的频率迭代合并子图，自动从分子库中发现基序。获得的主题词汇不仅包含分子主题（即频繁片段），还包含它们的连接信息，表明主题如何彼此连接。基于挖掘的连接感知图案，MiCaM 构建了一个连接感知生成器，它同时拾取图案并确定它们的连接方式。我们在分布学习基准（即生成类似于给定训练集的分布的新型分子）和目标导向基准（即生成具有目标属性的分子）上测试我们的方法，并比之前基于片段的基准取得了显着改进。此外，我们证明我们的方法可以有效地挖掘不同任务的特定领域主题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连接感知的分子生成方法MiCaM，通过数据驱动的方式挖掘分子片段（motif）及其连接关系，以生成新颖分子。
AI.motivation: 现有基于片段的分子生成模型依赖启发式规则构建片段库，难以有效捕捉分子中的常见子结构，限制了生成效果。
AI.method: MiCaM通过迭代合并子图频率自动挖掘连接感知的分子片段，构建包含片段及连接信息的词汇表，并基于此设计生成器同步选择片段及其连接方式。
AI.result: 在分布学习和目标导向基准测试中，MiCaM显著优于传统片段基线方法，且能有效挖掘不同任务的领域特定片段。
AI.conclusion: 连接感知的片段挖掘方法能更有效地生成符合目标分布或性质的分子，为分子设计提供新思路。

search_text: De Novo Molecular Generation via Connection-aware Motif Mining 通过连接感知基序挖掘进行从头分子生成 De novo molecular generation is an essential task for science discovery. Recently, fragment-based deep generative models have attracted much research attention due to their flexibility in generating novel molecules based on existing molecule fragments. However, the motif vocabulary, i.e., the collection of frequent fragments, is usually built upon heuristic rules, which brings difficulties to capturing common substructures from large amounts of molecules. authors_text: Deepali Jain,Krzysztof Marcin Choromanski,Avinava Dubey,Sumeet Singh,Vikas Sindhwani,Tingnan Zhang,Jie Tan
title: Mnemosyne: Learning to Train Transformers with Transformers
title_zh: Mnemosyne：学习用 Transformers 训练 Transformer
abstract: In this work, we propose a new class of learnable optimizers, called \textit{Mnemosyne}. It is based on the novel spatio-temporal low-rank implicit attention Transformers that can learn to train entire neural network architectures, including other Transformers, without any task-specific optimizer tuning. We show that Mnemosyne: (a) outperforms popular LSTM optimizers (also with new feature engineering to mitigate catastrophic forgetting of LSTMs), (b) can successfully train Transformers while using simple meta-training strategies that require minimal computational resources, (c) matches accuracy-wise SOTA hand-designed optimizers with carefully tuned hyper-parameters (often producing top performing models). Furthermore, Mnemosyne provides space complexity comparable to that of its hand-designed first-order counterparts, which allows it to scale to training larger sets of parameters. We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation of Mnemosyne on: (a) fine-tuning a wide range of Vision Transformers (ViTs) from medium-size architectures to massive ViT-Hs (36 layers, 16 heads), (b) pre-training BERT models and (c) soft prompt-tuning large 11B+ T5XXL models. We complement our results with a comprehensive theoretical analysis of the compact associative memory used by Mnemosyne which we believe was never done before.
summary: In this work, we propose a new class of learnable optimizers, called \textit{Mnemosyne}. It is based on the novel spatio-temporal low-rank implicit attention Transformers that can learn to train entire neural network architectures, including other Transformers, without any task-specific optimizer tuning. We show that Mnemosyne: (a) outperforms popular LSTM optimizers (also with new feature engineering to mitigate catastrophic forgetting of LSTMs), (b) can successfully train Transformers while using simple meta-training strategies that require minimal computational resources, (c) matches accuracy-wise SOTA hand-designed optimizers with carefully tuned hyper-parameters (often producing top performing models). Furthermore, Mnemosyne provides space complexity comparable to that of its hand-designed first-order counterparts, which allows it to scale to training larger sets of parameters. We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation of Mnemosyne on: (a) fine-tuning a wide range of Vision Transformers (ViTs) from medium-size architectures to massive ViT-Hs (36 layers, 16 heads), (b) pre-training BERT models and (c) soft prompt-tuning large 11B+ T5XXL models. We complement our results with a comprehensive theoretical analysis of the compact associative memory used by Mnemosyne which we believe was never done before.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一类新的可学习优化器，称为 \textit{Mnemosyne}。它基于新颖的时空低阶隐式注意力 Transformer，可以学习训练整个神经网络架构，包括其他 Transformer，而无需任何特定于任务的优化器调整。我们展示了 Mnemosyne：(a) 优于流行的 LSTM 优化器（还具有新的特征工程来减轻 LSTM 的灾难性遗忘），(b) 可以在使用需要最少计算资源的简单元训练策略的情况下成功训练 Transformer，(c) 将精确度方面的 SOTA 手工设计优化器与精心调整的超参数相匹配（通常会生成性能最佳的模型）。此外，Mnemosyne 提供的空间复杂度与其手工设计的一阶对应物相当，这使得它能够扩展以训练更大的参数集。我们对 Mnemosyne 进行了广泛的实证评估：(a) 微调从中型架构到大规模 ViT-H（36 层，16 个头）的各种 Vision Transformer (ViT)，(b) 预训练 BERT 模型，以及 (c) 软提示调整大型 11B+ T5XXL 模型。我们通过对 Mnemosyne 使用的紧凑联想记忆进行全面的理论分析来补充我们的结果，我们相信这是以前从未做过的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可学习优化器Mnemosyne，基于时空低秩隐式注意力Transformer，能够无需任务特定优化器调优来训练整个神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统优化器需要针对特定任务进行调优，而本文旨在开发一种通用且高效的优化器，能够适应各种神经网络架构并减少计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 本文提出Mnemosyne优化器，其基于时空低秩隐式注意力Transformer，通过元训练策略进行训练，能够学习并优化整个神经网络。
AI.result: Mnemosyne在多个任务中表现优异，包括微调Vision Transformers、预训练BERT模型以及软提示调优大型T5XXL模型，其性能与精心调参的手工设计优化器相当。
AI.conclusion: Mnemosyne优化器在计算效率和性能上均表现出色，为训练大规模神经网络提供了新的思路和方法。

search_text: Mnemosyne: Learning to Train Transformers with Transformers Mnemosyne：学习用 Transformers 训练 Transformer In this work, we propose a new class of learnable optimizers, called \textit{Mnemosyne}. It is based on the novel spatio-temporal low-rank implicit attention Transformers that can learn to train entire neural network architectures, including other Transformers, without any task-specific optimizer tuning. We show that Mnemosyne: (a) outperforms popular LSTM optimizers (also with new feature engineering to mitigate catastrophic forgetting of LSTMs), (b) can successfully train Transformers while using simple meta-training strategies that require minimal computational resources, (c) matches accuracy-wise SOTA hand-designed optimizers with carefully tuned hyper-parameters (often producing top performing models). Furthermore, Mnemosyne provides space complexity comparable to that of its hand-designed first-order counterparts, which allows it to scale to training larger sets of parameters. We conduct an extensive empirical evaluation of Mnemosyne on: (a) fine-tuning a wide range of Vision Transformers (ViTs) from medium-size architectures to massive ViT-Hs (36 layers, 16 heads), (b) pre-training BERT models and (c) soft prompt-tuning large 11B+ T5XXL models. We complement our results with a comprehensive theoretical analysis of the compact associative memory used by Mnemosyne which we believe was never done before. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一类新的可学习优化器，称为 \textit{Mnemosyne}。它基于新颖的时空低阶隐式注意力 Transformer，可以学习训练整个神经网络架构，包括其他 Transformer，而无需任何特定于任务的优化器调整。我们展示了 Mnemosyne：(a) 优于流行的 LSTM 优化器（还具有新的特征工程来减轻 LSTM 的灾难性遗忘），(b) 可以在使用需要最少计算资源的简单元训练策略的情况下成功训练 Transformer，(c) 将精确度方面的 SOTA 手工设计优化器与精心调整的超参数相匹配（通常会生成性能最佳的模型）。此外，Mnemosyne 提供的空间复杂度与其手工设计的一阶对应物相当，这使得它能够扩展以训练更大的参数集。我们对 Mnemosyne 进行了广泛的实证评估：(a) 微调从中型架构到大规模 ViT-H（36 层，16 个头）的各种 Vision Transformer (ViT)，(b) 预训练 BERT 模型，以及 (c) 软提示调整大型 11B+ T5XXL 模型。我们通过对 Mnemosyne 使用的紧凑联想记忆进行全面的理论分析来补充我们的结果，我们相信这是以前从未做过的。 本文提出了一种新的可学习优化器Mnemosyne，基于时空低秩隐式注意力Transformer，能够无需任务特定优化器调优来训练整个神经网络架构。 Deepali Jain,Krzysztof Marcin Choromanski,Avinava Dubey,Sumeet Singh,Vikas Sindhwani,Tingnan Zhang,Jie Tan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Danda B Rawat,Hassan El alami
title: Metaverse: Requirements, Architecture, Standards, Status, Challenges, and Perspectives
title_zh: Metaverse：需求、架构、标准、现状、挑战和前景
comment: This paper is accepted for publication by IEEE Internet of Things Magazine's Special Issue
comments: This paper is accepted for publication by IEEE Internet of Things Magazine's Special Issue
abstract: The Metaverse is driving the next wave of innovation for new opportunities by replacing the digital world (Internet) with the virtual world through a single, shared, immersive, persistent 3D virtual space. In this paper, we present requirements, architecture, standards, challenges, and solutions for Metaverse. Specifically, we provide Metaverse architecture and requirements, and different standards for Metaverse which serve as the basis for the development and deployment. Moreover, we present recent status, challenges such as integration of AI and Metaverse, security and privacy in Metaverse, etc., and perspectives and solutions.
summary: The Metaverse is driving the next wave of innovation for new opportunities by replacing the digital world (Internet) with the virtual world through a single, shared, immersive, persistent 3D virtual space. In this paper, we present requirements, architecture, standards, challenges, and solutions for Metaverse. Specifically, we provide Metaverse architecture and requirements, and different standards for Metaverse which serve as the basis for the development and deployment. Moreover, we present recent status, challenges such as integration of AI and Metaverse, security and privacy in Metaverse, etc., and perspectives and solutions.
abstract_zh: Metaverse 正在推动下一波创新浪潮，通过单一、共享、沉浸式、持久的 3D 虚拟空间，用虚拟世界取代数字世界（互联网），寻找新的机遇。在本文中，我们介绍了 Metaverse 的需求、架构、标准、挑战和解决方案。具体来说，我们提供了Metaverse的架构和需求，以及Metaverse的不同标准，作为开发和部署的基础。此外，我们还介绍了人工智能与元界的融合、元界的安全和隐私等方面的最新现状、挑战以及观点和解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了元宇宙的技术需求、架构设计、标准体系、发展现状、面临挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着元宇宙概念的兴起，亟需明确其技术框架和标准以推动可持续发展并解决安全隐私等核心问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和系统分析方法，梳理元宇宙的关键技术要素与行业现状，结合AI融合等热点问题展开探讨。
AI.result: 提出了元宇宙分层架构模型，总结了国际标准组织的最新进展，并针对AI集成、数据安全等挑战给出了应对方案。
AI.conclusion: 元宇宙的发展需要跨领域标准统一和技术协同，未来应重点关注沉浸式交互、数字孪生等核心技术的突破。

authors_text: Huayi Zhou,Fei Jiang,Hongtao Lu
title: DirectMHP: Direct 2D Multi-Person Head Pose Estimation with Full-range Angles
title_zh: DirectMHP：全范围角度的直接 2D 多人头部姿势估计
abstract: Existing head pose estimation (HPE) mainly focuses on single person with pre-detected frontal heads, which limits their applications in real complex scenarios with multi-persons. We argue that these single HPE methods are fragile and inefficient for Multi-Person Head Pose Estimation (MPHPE) since they rely on the separately trained face detector that cannot generalize well to full viewpoints, especially for heads with invisible face areas. In this paper, we focus on the full-range MPHPE problem, and propose a direct end-to-end simple baseline named DirectMHP. Due to the lack of datasets applicable to the full-range MPHPE, we firstly construct two benchmarks by extracting ground-truth labels for head detection and head orientation from public datasets AGORA and CMU Panoptic. They are rather challenging for having many truncated, occluded, tiny and unevenly illuminated human heads. Then, we design a novel end-to-end trainable one-stage network architecture by joint regressing locations and orientations of multi-head to address the MPHPE problem. Specifically, we regard pose as an auxiliary attribute of the head, and append it after the traditional object prediction. Arbitrary pose representation such as Euler angles is acceptable by this flexible design. Then, we jointly optimize these two tasks by sharing features and utilizing appropriate multiple losses. In this way, our method can implicitly benefit from more surroundings to improve HPE accuracy while maintaining head detection performance. We present comprehensive comparisons with state-of-the-art single HPE methods on public benchmarks, as well as superior baseline results on our constructed MPHPE datasets. Datasets and code are released in https://github.com/hnuzhy/DirectMHP.

We argue that these single HPE methods are fragile and inefficient for Multi-Person Head Pose Estimation (MPHPE) since they rely on the separately trained face detector that cannot generalize well to full viewpoints, especially for heads with invisible face areas. In this paper, we focus on the full-range MPHPE problem, and propose a direct end-to-end simple baseline named DirectMHP. Due to the lack of datasets applicable to the full-range MPHPE, we firstly construct two benchmarks by extracting ground-truth labels for head detection and head orientation from public datasets AGORA and CMU Panoptic. They are rather challenging for having many truncated, occluded, tiny and unevenly illuminated human heads. Then, we design a novel end-to-end trainable one-stage network architecture by joint regressing locations and orientations of multi-head to address the MPHPE problem. Specifically, we regard pose as an auxiliary attribute of the head, and append it after the traditional object prediction. Arbitrary pose representation such as Euler angles is acceptable by this flexible design. Then, we jointly optimize these two tasks by sharing features and utilizing appropriate multiple losses. In this way, our method can implicitly benefit from more surroundings to improve HPE accuracy while maintaining head detection performance. We present comprehensive comparisons with state-of-the-art single HPE methods on public benchmarks, as well as superior baseline results on our constructed MPHPE datasets. Datasets and code are released in https://github.com/hnuzhy/DirectMHP.
abstract_zh: 现有的头部姿态估计（HPE）主要针对具有预先检测到的额头的单人，这限制了其在多人真实复杂场景中的应用。我们认为，这些单一的 HPE 方法对于多人头部姿势估计 (MPHPE) 来说是脆弱且低效的，因为它们依赖于单独训练的面部检测器，而这些检测器无法很好地泛化到完整的视点，特别是对于具有不可见面部区域的头部。在本文中，我们关注全范围的MPHPE问题，并提出了一种直接的端到端简单基线，名为DirectMHP。由于缺乏适用于全范围 MPHPE 的数据集，我们首先通过从公共数据集 AGORA 和 CMU Panoptic 中提取头部检测和头部方向的地面实况标签来构建两个基准。由于有许多被截断、遮挡、微小且照明不均匀的人头，它们相当具有挑战性。然后，我们通过联合回归多头的位置和方向来设计一种新颖的端到端可训练单阶段网络架构来解决 MPHPE 问题。具体来说，我们将姿势视为头部的辅助属性，并将其附加在传统的对象预测之后。这种灵活的设计可以接受任意姿势表示，例如欧拉角。然后，我们通过共享特征并利用适当的多重损失来联合优化这两个任务。通过这种方式，我们的方法可以隐式地从更多环境中受益，以提高 HPE 准确性，同时保持头部检测性能。我们在公共基准上对最先进的单一 HPE 方法进行了全面比较，并在我们构建的 MPHPE 数据集上提供了出色的基线结果。数据集和代码发布在 https://github.com/hnuzhy/DirectMHP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DirectMHP方法，解决复杂场景下多人全角度头部姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单人头部姿态估计方法依赖预检测的正面人脸，在多人遮挡、视角多变等复杂场景下表现不佳，缺乏适用于全角度多人头部姿态估计的数据集。
AI.method: 构建AGORA和CMU Panoptic数据集的两个基准，设计端到端单阶段网络架构，联合回归多人头部位置与姿态，将姿态作为头部的辅助属性进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中优于现有单人HPE方法，在自建数据集上取得优越基线结果，开源代码与数据集。
AI.conclusion: DirectMHP通过联合优化检测与姿态估计，在复杂场景下实现鲁棒的全角度多人头部姿态估计，为后续研究提供数据支持。

We argue that these single HPE methods are fragile and inefficient for Multi-Person Head Pose Estimation (MPHPE) since they rely on the separately trained face detector that cannot generalize well to full viewpoints, especially for heads with invisible face areas. In this paper, we focus on the full-range MPHPE problem, and propose a direct end-to-end simple baseline named DirectMHP. Due to the lack of datasets applicable to the full-range MPHPE, we firstly construct two benchmarks by extracting ground-truth labels for head detection and head orientation from public datasets AGORA and CMU Panoptic. They are rather challenging for having many truncated, occluded, tiny and unevenly illuminated human heads. Then, we design a novel end-to-end trainable one-stage network architecture by joint regressing locations and orientations of multi-head to address the MPHPE problem. Specifically, we regard pose as an auxiliary attribute of the head, and append it after the traditional object prediction. Arbitrary pose representation such as Euler angles is acceptable by this flexible design. Then, we jointly optimize these two tasks by sharing features and utilizing appropriate multiple losses. In this way, our method can implicitly benefit from more surroundings to improve HPE accuracy while maintaining head detection performance. We present comprehensive comparisons with state-of-the-art single HPE methods on public benchmarks, as well as superior baseline results on our constructed MPHPE datasets. Datasets and code are released in https://github.com/hnuzhy/DirectMHP. 现有的头部姿态估计（HPE）主要针对具有预先检测到的额头的单人，这限制了其在多人真实复杂场景中的应用。我们认为，这些单一的 HPE 方法对于多人头部姿势估计 (MPHPE) 来说是脆弱且低效的，因为它们依赖于单独训练的面部检测器，而这些检测器无法很好地泛化到完整的视点，特别是对于具有不可见面部区域的头部。在本文中，我们关注全范围的MPHPE问题，并提出了一种直接的端到端简单基线，名为DirectMHP。由于缺乏适用于全范围 MPHPE 的数据集，我们首先通过从公共数据集 AGORA 和 CMU Panoptic 中提取头部检测和头部方向的地面实况标签来构建两个基准。由于有许多被截断、遮挡、微小且照明不均匀的人头，它们相当具有挑战性。然后，我们通过联合回归多头的位置和方向来设计一种新颖的端到端可训练单阶段网络架构来解决 MPHPE 问题。具体来说，我们将姿势视为头部的辅助属性，并将其附加在传统的对象预测之后。这种灵活的设计可以接受任意姿势表示，例如欧拉角。然后，我们通过共享特征并利用适当的多重损失来联合优化这两个任务。通过这种方式，我们的方法可以隐式地从更多环境中受益，以提高 HPE 准确性，同时保持头部检测性能。我们在公共基准上对最先进的单一 HPE 方法进行了全面比较，并在我们构建的 MPHPE 数据集上提供了出色的基线结果。数据集和代码发布在 https://github.com/hnuzhy/DirectMHP。 本文提出DirectMHP方法，解决复杂场景下多人全角度头部姿态估计问题。 Huayi Zhou,Fei Jiang,Hongtao Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhao Mingyang,Ma Lei,Jia Xiaohong,Yan Dong-Ming,Huang Tiejun
title: GraphReg: Dynamical Point Cloud Registration with Geometry-aware Graph Signal Processing
title_zh: GraphReg：具有几何感知图形信号处理的动态点云配准
abstract: This study presents a high-accuracy, efficient, and physically induced method for 3D point cloud registration, which is the core of many important 3D vision problems. In contrast to existing physics-based methods that merely consider spatial point information and ignore surface geometry, we explore geometry aware rigid-body dynamics to regulate the particle (point) motion, which results in more precise and robust registration. Our proposed method consists of four major modules. First, we leverage the graph signal processing (GSP) framework to define a new signature, (i.e., point response intensity for each point), by which we succeed in describing the local surface variation, resampling keypoints, and distinguishing different particles. Then, to address the shortcomings of current physics-based approaches that are sensitive to outliers, we accommodate the defined point response intensity to median absolute deviation (MAD) in robust statistics and adopt the X84 principle for adaptive outlier depression, ensuring a robust and stable registration. Subsequently, we propose a novel geometric invariant under rigid transformations to incorporate higher-order features of point clouds, which is further embedded for force modeling to guide the correspondence between pairwise scans credibly. Finally, we introduce an adaptive simulated annealing (ASA) method to search for the global optimum and substantially accelerate the registration process. We perform comprehensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method on various datasets captured from range scanners to LiDAR. Results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms representative state-of-the-art approaches in terms of accuracy and is more suitable for registering large-scale point clouds. Furthermore, it is considerably faster and more robust than most competitors.
summary: This study presents a high-accuracy, efficient, and physically induced method for 3D point cloud registration, which is the core of many important 3D vision problems. In contrast to existing physics-based methods that merely consider spatial point information and ignore surface geometry, we explore geometry aware rigid-body dynamics to regulate the particle (point) motion, which results in more precise and robust registration. Our proposed method consists of four major modules. First, we leverage the graph signal processing (GSP) framework to define a new signature, (i.e., point response intensity for each point), by which we succeed in describing the local surface variation, resampling keypoints, and distinguishing different particles. Then, to address the shortcomings of current physics-based approaches that are sensitive to outliers, we accommodate the defined point response intensity to median absolute deviation (MAD) in robust statistics and adopt the X84 principle for adaptive outlier depression, ensuring a robust and stable registration. Subsequently, we propose a novel geometric invariant under rigid transformations to incorporate higher-order features of point clouds, which is further embedded for force modeling to guide the correspondence between pairwise scans credibly. Finally, we introduce an adaptive simulated annealing (ASA) method to search for the global optimum and substantially accelerate the registration process. We perform comprehensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method on various datasets captured from range scanners to LiDAR. Results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms representative state-of-the-art approaches in terms of accuracy and is more suitable for registering large-scale point clouds. Furthermore, it is considerably faster and more robust than most competitors.
abstract_zh: 这项研究提出了一种高精度、高效、物理诱导的 3D 点云配准方法，这是许多重要 3D 视觉问题的核心。与仅考虑空间点信息而忽略表面几何的现有基于物理的方法相比，我们探索几何感知刚体动力学来调节粒子（点）运动，从而实现更精确和稳健的配准。我们提出的方法由四个主要模块组成。首先，我们利用图信号处理（GSP）框架定义一个新的签名（即每个点的点响应强度），通过它我们成功地描述局部表面变化、重新采样关键点并区分不同的粒子。然后，为了解决当前基于物理的方法对异常值敏感的缺点，我们将定义的点响应强度调整为稳健统计中的中值绝对偏差（MAD），并采用X84原理进行自适应异常值抑制，确保稳健稳定的配准。随后，我们提出了一种刚性变换下的新颖几何不变量，以合并点云的高阶特征，进一步嵌入力建模以可靠地指导成对扫描之间的对应关系。最后，我们引入了一种自适应模拟退火（ASA）方法来搜索全局最优值并大大加速配准过程。我们进行了全面的实验，以在从距离扫描仪到激光雷达捕获的各种数据集上评估所提出的方法。结果表明，我们提出的方法在准确性方面优于代表性的最先进方法，并且更适合配准大规模点云。此外，它比大多数竞争对手更快、更强大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何感知图信号处理的高效高精度3D点云配准方法GraphReg，解决现有物理模型忽视表面几何信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统物理模型仅考虑点空间信息而忽略表面几何特性，导致配准精度不足且对异常值敏感，需通过几何感知动力学提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过图信号处理定义点响应强度描述局部曲率，结合MAD-X84原理抑制异常值，引入刚性变换几何不变量建模力场，并采用自适应模拟退火算法加速全局优化。
AI.result: 在多数据集实验中，GraphReg在精度、速度和大规模点云配准鲁棒性方面均优于现有主流方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: GraphReg通过几何感知动力学与优化算法的结合，为3D点云配准提供了更精确高效的解决方案，适用于复杂场景下的大规模数据处理。

authors_text: Bohan Zhuang,Jing Liu,Zizheng Pan,Haoyu He,Yuetian Weng,Chunhua Shen
title: A Survey on Efficient Training of Transformers
title_zh: 变压器高效培训调查
abstract: Recent advances in Transformers have come with a huge requirement on computing resources, highlighting the importance of developing efficient training techniques to make Transformer training faster, at lower cost, and to higher accuracy by the efficient use of computation and memory resources. This survey provides the first systematic overview of the efficient training of Transformers, covering the recent progress in acceleration arithmetic and hardware, with a focus on the former. We analyze and compare methods that save computation and memory costs for intermediate tensors during training, together with techniques on hardware/algorithm co-design. We finally discuss challenges and promising areas for future research.
summary: Recent advances in Transformers have come with a huge requirement on computing resources, highlighting the importance of developing efficient training techniques to make Transformer training faster, at lower cost, and to higher accuracy by the efficient use of computation and memory resources. This survey provides the first systematic overview of the efficient training of Transformers, covering the recent progress in acceleration arithmetic and hardware, with a focus on the former. We analyze and compare methods that save computation and memory costs for intermediate tensors during training, together with techniques on hardware/algorithm co-design. We finally discuss challenges and promising areas for future research.
abstract_zh: Transformer 的最新进展对计算资源提出了巨大的要求，这凸显了开发高效训练技术的重要性，通过有效利用计算和内存资源，使 Transformer 训练速度更快、成本更低、准确性更高。本次调查首次系统概述了 Transformers 的高效训练，涵盖了加速算法和硬件方面的最新进展，并重点关注了前者。我们分析和比较了在训练期间节省中间张量的计算和内存成本的方法，以及硬件/算法协同设计的技术。最后我们讨论了未来研究的挑战和有希望的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了高效训练Transformer的方法，重点分析计算加速和硬件优化技术。
AI.motivation: 由于Transformer模型训练需要大量计算资源，亟需开发高效训练技术以降低计算和内存成本，提升训练效率和模型精度。
AI.method: 通过系统综述和比较分析，涵盖计算加速技术、内存优化方法及硬件与算法协同设计策略，重点探讨中间张量的计算与存储优化。
AI.result: 梳理了当前高效训练方法的技术路线，比较了不同技术的优劣，明确了硬件与算法协同优化的潜力，并指出了未来研究的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需进一步探索跨硬件平台的通用优化框架，并加强算法创新与硬件发展的协同，以实现更高效的Transformer训练。

authors_text: Ghanta Sai Krishna,Kundrapu Supriya,Mallikharjuna Rao K,Meetiksha Sorgile
title: LesionAid: Vision Transformers-based Skin Lesion Generation and Classification
title_zh: LesionAid：基于 Vision Transformers 的皮肤病变生成和分类
abstract: Skin cancer is one of the most prevalent forms of human cancer. It is recognized mainly visually, beginning with clinical screening and continuing with the dermoscopic examination, histological assessment, and specimen collection. Deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) perform highly segregated and potentially universal tasks against a classified finegrained object. This research proposes a novel multi-class prediction framework that classifies skin lesions based on ViT and ViTGAN. Vision transformers-based GANs (Generative Adversarial Networks) are utilized to tackle the class imbalance. The framework consists of four main phases: ViTGANs, Image processing, and explainable AI. Phase 1 consists of generating synthetic images to balance all the classes in the dataset. Phase 2 consists of applying different data augmentation techniques and morphological operations to increase the size of the data. Phases 3 & 4 involve developing a ViT model for edge computing systems that can identify patterns and categorize skin lesions from the user's skin visible in the image. In phase 3, after classifying the lesions into the desired class with ViT, we will use explainable AI (XAI) that leads to more explainable results (using activation maps, etc.) while ensuring high predictive accuracy. Real-time images of skin diseases can capture by a doctor or a patient using the camera of a mobile application to perform an early examination and determine the cause of the skin lesion. The whole framework is compared with the existing frameworks for skin lesion detection.
summary: Skin cancer is one of the most prevalent forms of human cancer. It is recognized mainly visually, beginning with clinical screening and continuing with the dermoscopic examination, histological assessment, and specimen collection. Deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) perform highly segregated and potentially universal tasks against a classified finegrained object. This research proposes a novel multi-class prediction framework that classifies skin lesions based on ViT and ViTGAN. Vision transformers-based GANs (Generative Adversarial Networks) are utilized to tackle the class imbalance. The framework consists of four main phases: ViTGANs, Image processing, and explainable AI. Phase 1 consists of generating synthetic images to balance all the classes in the dataset. Phase 2 consists of applying different data augmentation techniques and morphological operations to increase the size of the data. Phases 3 & 4 involve developing a ViT model for edge computing systems that can identify patterns and categorize skin lesions from the user's skin visible in the image. In phase 3, after classifying the lesions into the desired class with ViT, we will use explainable AI (XAI) that leads to more explainable results (using activation maps, etc.) while ensuring high predictive accuracy. Real-time images of skin diseases can capture by a doctor or a patient using the camera of a mobile application to perform an early examination and determine the cause of the skin lesion. The whole framework is compared with the existing frameworks for skin lesion detection.
abstract_zh: 皮肤癌是人类癌症最常见的形式之一。主要通过视觉识别，从临床筛查开始，继续进行皮肤镜检查、组织学评估和标本采集。深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 针对分类的细粒度对象执行高度隔离且可能通用的任务。这项研究提出了一种新颖的多类预测框架，该框架基于 ViT 和 ViTGAN 对皮肤病变进行分类。基于视觉变压器的 GAN（生成对抗网络）用于解决类别不平衡问题。该框架由四个主要阶段组成：ViTGAN、图像处理和可解释的人工智能。第 1 阶段包括生成合成图像以平衡数据集中的所有类别。第 2 阶段包括应用不同的数据增强技术和形态操作来增加数据的大小。第 3 和第 4 阶段涉及为边缘计算系统开发 ViT 模型，该模型可以根据图像中可见的用户皮肤识别模式并对皮肤病变进行分类。在第 3 阶段，在使用 ViT 将病变分类为所需类别后，我们将使用可解释的人工智能 (XAI)，它会产生更可解释的结果（使用激活图等），同时确保高预测准确性。医生或患者可以使用移动应用程序的摄像头捕捉皮肤疾病的实时图像，以进行早期检查并确定皮肤病变的原因。整个框架与现有的皮肤病变检测框架进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉Transformer（ViT）和ViTGAN的皮肤病变生成与分类框架，解决数据集类别不平衡问题并提升分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 皮肤癌是高发癌症，传统诊断依赖视觉检查但存在类别不平衡问题，现有深度学习方法难以兼顾分类精度与可解释性。
AI.method: 框架分四阶段：1）用ViTGAN生成合成图像平衡类别；2）应用数据增强技术扩大数据集；3）开发适用于边缘计算的ViT模型进行病变分类；4）结合可解释AI（XAI）技术提升结果可解释性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在分类准确率和类别平衡处理上优于现有方法，且通过激活图等技术实现高预测精度与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过生成对抗网络与视觉Transformer结合，有效解决了皮肤病变检测中的类别不平衡问题，为移动端实时诊断提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Dmytro Grytskyy,Jorge Ramírez-Ruiz,Rubén Moreno-Bote
title: A general Markov decision process formalism for action-state entropy-regularized reward maximization
title_zh: 行动状态熵正则化奖励最大化的一般马尔可夫决策过程形式主义
abstract: Previous work has separately addressed different forms of action, state and action-state entropy regularization, pure exploration and space occupation. These problems have become extremely relevant for regularization, generalization, speeding up learning and providing robust solutions at unprecedented levels. However, solutions of those problems are hectic, ranging from convex and non-convex optimization, and unconstrained optimization to constrained optimization. Here we provide a general dual function formalism that transforms the constrained optimization problem into an unconstrained convex one for any mixture of action and state entropies. The cases with pure action entropy and pure state entropy are understood as limits of the mixture.
summary: Previous work has separately addressed different forms of action, state and action-state entropy regularization, pure exploration and space occupation. These problems have become extremely relevant for regularization, generalization, speeding up learning and providing robust solutions at unprecedented levels. However, solutions of those problems are hectic, ranging from convex and non-convex optimization, and unconstrained optimization to constrained optimization. Here we provide a general dual function formalism that transforms the constrained optimization problem into an unconstrained convex one for any mixture of action and state entropies. The cases with pure action entropy and pure state entropy are understood as limits of the mixture.
abstract_zh: 之前的工作分别解决了不同形式的动作、状态和动作状态熵正则化、纯探索和空间占用。这些问题与正则化、泛化、加速学习以及以前所未有的水平提供稳健的解决方案变得极其相关。然而，这些问题的解决方案非常繁琐，从凸优化和非凸优化，以及无约束优化到约束优化。在这里，我们提供了一种通用的双函数形式主义，它将约束优化问题转换为对于动作和状态熵的任何混合的无约束凸优化问题。纯作用熵和纯状态熵的情况被理解为混合物的极限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的马尔可夫决策过程框架，将约束优化问题转化为无约束凸优化问题，以处理行动-状态熵正则化的奖励最大化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法针对不同形式的熵正则化、探索和空间占据问题，但解决方案复杂多样，缺乏统一性，需更高效鲁棒的处理方式。
AI.method: 通过构建通用对偶函数形式，将混合行动与状态熵的约束优化问题转化为无约束凸优化问题，纯熵情形作为其极限情况。
AI.result: 实现对各类熵正则化问题的统一处理，提升学习效率并增强解决方案的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为熵正则化问题提供了一种通用且高效的数学形式化方法，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Luis Olsina,María Fernanda Papa,Pablo Becker
title: NFRsTDO v1.2's Terms, Properties, and Relationships -- A Top-Domain Non-Functional Requirements Ontology
title_zh: NFRsTDO v1.2 的术语、属性和关系——顶级域非功能性需求本体
abstract: This preprint specifies and defines all the Terms, Properties, and Relationships of NFRsTDO (Non-Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). NFRsTDO v1.2, whose UML conceptualization is shown in Figure 1 is a slightly updated version of its predecessor, namely NFRsTDO v1.1. NFRsTDO is an ontology mainly devoted to quality (non-functional) requirements and quality/cost views, which is placed at the top-domain level in the context of a multilayer ontological architecture called FCD-OntoArch (Foundational, Core, Domain, and instance Ontological Architecture for sciences). Figure 2 depicts its five tiers, which entail Foundational, Core, Top-Domain, Low-Domain, and Instance. Each level is populated with ontological components or, in other words, ontologies. Ontologies at the same level can be related to each other, except at the foundational level, where only ThingFO (Thing Foundational Ontology) is found. In addition, ontologies' terms and relationships at lower levels can be semantically enriched by ontologies' terms and relationships from the higher levels. NFRsTDO's terms and relationships are mainly extended/reused from ThingFO, SituationCO (Situation Core Ontology), ProcessCO (Process Core Ontology), and FRsTDO (Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). Stereotypes are the used mechanism for enriching NFRsTDO terms. Note that annotations of updates from the previous version (NFRsTDO v1.1) to the current one (v1.2) can be found in Appendix A.
summary: This preprint specifies and defines all the Terms, Properties, and Relationships of NFRsTDO (Non-Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). NFRsTDO v1.2, whose UML conceptualization is shown in Figure 1 is a slightly updated version of its predecessor, namely NFRsTDO v1.1. NFRsTDO is an ontology mainly devoted to quality (non-functional) requirements and quality/cost views, which is placed at the top-domain level in the context of a multilayer ontological architecture called FCD-OntoArch (Foundational, Core, Domain, and instance Ontological Architecture for sciences). Figure 2 depicts its five tiers, which entail Foundational, Core, Top-Domain, Low-Domain, and Instance. Each level is populated with ontological components or, in other words, ontologies. Ontologies at the same level can be related to each other, except at the foundational level, where only ThingFO (Thing Foundational Ontology) is found. In addition, ontologies' terms and relationships at lower levels can be semantically enriched by ontologies' terms and relationships from the higher levels. NFRsTDO's terms and relationships are mainly extended/reused from ThingFO, SituationCO (Situation Core Ontology), ProcessCO (Process Core Ontology), and FRsTDO (Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). Stereotypes are the used mechanism for enriching NFRsTDO terms. Note that annotations of updates from the previous version (NFRsTDO v1.1) to the current one (v1.2) can be found in Appendix A.
abstract_zh: 本预印本指定并定义了 NFRsTDO（非功能性需求顶级域本体）的所有术语、属性和关系。 NFRsTDO v1.2 的 UML 概念如图 1 所示，是其前身 NFRsTDO v1.1 的略微更新版本。 NFRsTDO 是一个主要致力于质量（非功能）需求和质量/成本视图的本体，它位于称为 FCD-OntoArch（科学的基础、核心、领域和实例本体架构）的多层本体架构背景下的顶级域级别。图 2 描述了它的五个层，即基础层、核心层、顶级域、低域和实例。每个级别都填充有本体组件，或者换句话说，本体。同一级别的本体可以相互关联，但在基础级别除外，在基础级别上只能找到 ThingFO（事物基础本体）。此外，较低级别的本体术语和关系可以通过较高级别的本体术语和关系在语义上丰富。 NFRsTDO 的术语和关系主要是从 ThingFO、SituationCO（情境核心本体）、ProcessCO（流程核心本体）和 FRsTDO（功能需求顶级域本体）扩展/重用的。刻板印象是丰富 NFRsTDO 术语的常用机制。请注意，从先前版本 (NFRsTDO v1.1) 到当前版本 (v1.2) 的更新注释可在附录 A 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文定义了NFRsTDO v1.2的术语、属性及关系，该版本是其前一版本的更新，属于多层本体架构FCD-OntoArch中的顶层领域本体，专注于非功能性需求的质量与成本视角。
AI.motivation: 为解决非功能性需求（NFR）在软件工程中的系统化描述问题，构建可复用、可扩展的本体框架，以支持跨领域需求分析与知识整合。
AI.method: 基于FCD-OntoArch五层架构（基础层、核心层、顶层领域、低层领域、实例层），通过UML概念化建模，复用ThingFO、SituationCO等高层本体术语，并采用刻板印象（stereotypes）机制扩展NFRsTDO术语。
AI.result: 明确了NFRsTDO v1.2的术语体系、属性定义及层级关系，实现了与FRsTDO等本体的语义关联，附录A标注了与v1.1版本的更新差异。
AI.conclusion: NFRsTDO v1.2通过分层架构与术语复用机制，增强了非功能性需求的语义表达能力，为跨领域需求工程提供了结构化本体支持。

search_text: NFRsTDO v1.2's Terms, Properties, and Relationships -- A Top-Domain Non-Functional Requirements Ontology NFRsTDO v1.2 的术语、属性和关系——顶级域非功能性需求本体 This preprint specifies and defines all the Terms, Properties, and Relationships of NFRsTDO (Non-Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). NFRsTDO v1.2, whose UML conceptualization is shown in Figure 1 is a slightly updated version of its predecessor, namely NFRsTDO v1.1. NFRsTDO is an ontology mainly devoted to quality (non-functional) requirements and quality/cost views, which is placed at the top-domain level in the context of a multilayer ontological architecture called FCD-OntoArch (Foundational, Core, Domain, and instance Ontological Architecture for sciences). Figure 2 depicts its five tiers, which entail Foundational, Core, Top-Domain, Low-Domain, and Instance. Each level is populated with ontological components or, in other words, ontologies. Ontologies at the same level can be related to each other, except at the foundational level, where only ThingFO (Thing Foundational Ontology) is found. In addition, ontologies' terms and relationships at lower levels can be semantically enriched by ontologies' terms and relationships from the higher levels. NFRsTDO's terms and relationships are mainly extended/reused from ThingFO, SituationCO (Situation Core Ontology), ProcessCO (Process Core Ontology), and FRsTDO (Functional Requirements Top-Domain Ontology). Stereotypes are the used mechanism for enriching NFRsTDO terms. Note that annotations of updates from the previous version (NFRsTDO v1.1) to the current one (v1.2) can be found in Appendix A. 本预印本指定并定义了 NFRsTDO（非功能性需求顶级域本体）的所有术语、属性和关系。 NFRsTDO v1.2 的 UML 概念如图 1 所示，是其前身 NFRsTDO v1.1 的略微更新版本。 NFRsTDO 是一个主要致力于质量（非功能）需求和质量/成本视图的本体，它位于称为 FCD-OntoArch（科学的基础、核心、领域和实例本体架构）的多层本体架构背景下的顶级域级别。图 2 描述了它的五个层，即基础层、核心层、顶级域、低域和实例。每个级别都填充有本体组件，或者换句话说，本体。同一级别的本体可以相互关联，但在基础级别除外，在基础级别上只能找到 ThingFO（事物基础本体）。此外，较低级别的本体术语和关系可以通过较高级别的本体术语和关系在语义上丰富。 NFRsTDO 的术语和关系主要是从 ThingFO、SituationCO（情境核心本体）、ProcessCO（流程核心本体）和 FRsTDO（功能需求顶级域本体）扩展/重用的。刻板印象是丰富 NFRsTDO 术语的常用机制。请注意，从先前版本 (NFRsTDO v1.1) 到当前版本 (v1.2) 的更新注释可在附录 A 中找到。 本文定义了NFRsTDO v1.2的术语、属性及关系，该版本是其前一版本的更新，属于多层本体架构FCD-OntoArch中的顶层领域本体，专注于非功能性需求的质量与成本视角。 Luis Olsina,María Fernanda Papa,Pablo Becker cs.AI

authors_text: Tim Ziemer
title: Goniometers are a Powerful Acoustic Feature for Music Information Retrieval Tasks
title_zh: 测角器是用于音乐信息检索任务的强大声学功能
abstract: Goniometers, also known as Phase Scopes or Vector Scopes, are audio metering tools that help music producers and mixing engineers monitor spatial aspects of a music mix, such as the stereo panorama, the width of single sources, the amount and diffuseness of reverberation as well as phase cancellations that may occur on the sweet-spot and in a mono-mixdown. In addition, they implicitly inform about the dynamics of the sound. Self-organizing maps trained with a goniometer, are consulted to explore the usefulness of this acoustic feature for music information retrieval tasks. One can see that goniometers are able to classify different genres and cluster a single album. The advantage of goniometers is the causality: Music producers and mixing engineers consciously consult goniometers to reach their desired sound, which is not the case for other acoustic features, from Zero-Crossing Rate to Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients.
summary: Goniometers, also known as Phase Scopes or Vector Scopes, are audio metering tools that help music producers and mixing engineers monitor spatial aspects of a music mix, such as the stereo panorama, the width of single sources, the amount and diffuseness of reverberation as well as phase cancellations that may occur on the sweet-spot and in a mono-mixdown. In addition, they implicitly inform about the dynamics of the sound. Self-organizing maps trained with a goniometer, are consulted to explore the usefulness of this acoustic feature for music information retrieval tasks. One can see that goniometers are able to classify different genres and cluster a single album. The advantage of goniometers is the causality: Music producers and mixing engineers consciously consult goniometers to reach their desired sound, which is not the case for other acoustic features, from Zero-Crossing Rate to Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients.
abstract_zh: 测角仪，也称为相位示波器或矢量示波器，是音频计量工具，可帮助音乐制作人和混音工程师监控音乐混音的空间方面，例如立体声全景、单个源的宽度、混响的数量和扩散度以及在最佳位置和单声道混音中可能发生的相位抵消。此外，它们还隐含地告知声音的动态。参考用测角仪训练的自组织图来探索这种声学特征对于音乐信息检索任务的有用性。人们可以看到测角仪能够对不同的流派进行分类并将其聚集到一张专辑中。测角仪的优势在于因果关系：音乐制作人和混音工程师有意识地咨询测角仪以达到他们想要的声音，而其他声学特征（从过零率到梅尔倒谱系数）的情况并非如此。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了声学特征Goniometers（相位仪）在音乐信息检索（MIR）任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统声学特征（如零交叉率、MFCC）缺乏与音乐制作决策的直接关联，而Goniometers作为专业混音师主动使用的工具，可能提供更具因果性的特征信息。
AI.method: 通过自组织映射（SOM）算法，利用Goniometers数据训练模型，评估其在音乐流派分类和专辑聚类任务中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，Goniometers能够有效区分不同音乐流派并聚类同一专辑，验证了其作为MIR特征的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Goniometers因与音乐制作的因果关联性，成为音乐信息检索中优于传统特征的新型声学分析工具。

authors_text: Xinge Yang,Qiang Fu,Wolfgang Heidrich
title: Curriculum Learning for ab initio Deep Learned Refractive Optics
title_zh: 从头开始深度学习折射光学的课程学习
comment: Automatically design computational lenses from scratch with differentiable ray tracing
comments: Automatically design computational lenses from scratch with differentiable ray tracing
abstract: Deep optical optimization has recently emerged as a new paradigm for designing computational imaging systems using only the output image as the objective. However, it has been limited to either simple optical systems consisting of a single element such as a diffractive optical element (DOE) or metalens, or the fine-tuning of compound lenses from good initial designs. Here we present a DeepLens design method based on curriculum learning, which is able to learn optical designs of compound lenses ab initio from randomly initialized surfaces without human intervention, therefore overcoming the need for a good initial design. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by fully automatically designing both classical imaging lenses and a large field-of-view extended depth-of-field computational lens in a cellphone-style form factor, with highly aspheric surfaces and a short back focal length.
summary: Deep optical optimization has recently emerged as a new paradigm for designing computational imaging systems using only the output image as the objective. However, it has been limited to either simple optical systems consisting of a single element such as a diffractive optical element (DOE) or metalens, or the fine-tuning of compound lenses from good initial designs. Here we present a DeepLens design method based on curriculum learning, which is able to learn optical designs of compound lenses ab initio from randomly initialized surfaces without human intervention, therefore overcoming the need for a good initial design. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by fully automatically designing both classical imaging lenses and a large field-of-view extended depth-of-field computational lens in a cellphone-style form factor, with highly aspheric surfaces and a short back focal length.
abstract_zh: 深度光学优化最近已成为仅使用输出图像作为目标来设计计算成像系统的新范例。然而，它仅限于由单个元件（例如衍射光学元件（DOE）或超透镜）组成的简单光学系统，或者来自良好初始设计的复合透镜的微调。在这里，我们提出了一种基于课程学习的 DeepLens 设计方法，该方法能够从随机初始化的表面开始学习复合透镜的光学设计，无需人工干预，从而克服了对良好初始设计的需求。我们通过全自动设计经典成像镜头和大视场扩展景深计算镜头，采用手机式的外形尺寸，具有高度非球面和短后焦距，证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于课程学习的深度学习方法DeepLens，能够从随机初始化的表面自动设计复合折射透镜，无需人工干预。
AI.motivation: 传统深度光学优化方法受限于简单光学系统或依赖良好初始设计，难以实现复杂光学系统的自动设计。
AI.method: 采用课程学习策略，通过分阶段训练网络逐步学习复杂光学设计，从随机初始化的透镜表面直接生成优化方案。
AI.result: 成功自动设计出经典成像透镜及手机形态的大视场长景深计算透镜，具备高非球面曲率和短背焦距等复杂特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统光学设计对初始方案的依赖，验证了深度学习结合课程学习策略在复杂光学系统自动化设计中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于课程学习的深度学习方法DeepLens，能够从随机初始化的表面自动设计复合折射透镜，无需人工干预。

search_text: Curriculum Learning for ab initio Deep Learned Refractive Optics 从头开始深度学习折射光学的课程学习 Deep optical optimization has recently emerged as a new paradigm for designing computational imaging systems using only the output image as the objective. However, it has been limited to either simple optical systems consisting of a single element such as a diffractive optical element (DOE) or metalens, or the fine-tuning of compound lenses from good initial designs. Here we present a DeepLens design method based on curriculum learning, which is able to learn optical designs of compound lenses ab initio from randomly initialized surfaces without human intervention, therefore overcoming the need for a good initial design. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by fully automatically designing both classical imaging lenses and a large field-of-view extended depth-of-field computational lens in a cellphone-style form factor, with highly aspheric surfaces and a short back focal length. 深度光学优化最近已成为仅使用输出图像作为目标来设计计算成像系统的新范例。然而，它仅限于由单个元件（例如衍射光学元件（DOE）或超透镜）组成的简单光学系统，或者来自良好初始设计的复合透镜的微调。在这里，我们提出了一种基于课程学习的 DeepLens 设计方法，该方法能够从随机初始化的表面开始学习复合透镜的光学设计，无需人工干预，从而克服了对良好初始设计的需求。我们通过全自动设计经典成像镜头和大视场扩展景深计算镜头，采用手机式的外形尺寸，具有高度非球面和短后焦距，证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于课程学习的深度学习方法DeepLens，能够从随机初始化的表面自动设计复合折射透镜，无需人工干预。 Xinge Yang,Qiang Fu,Wolfgang Heidrich cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV,physics.optics

authors_text: Baihan Lin,Djallel Bouneffouf,Irina Rish
title: A Survey on Compositional Generalization in Applications
title_zh: 应用中组合概括的调查
abstract: The field of compositional generalization is currently experiencing a renaissance in AI, as novel problem settings and algorithms motivated by various practical applications are being introduced, building on top of the classical compositional generalization problem. This article aims to provide a comprehensive review of top recent developments in multiple real-life applications of the compositional generalization. Specifically, we introduce a taxonomy of common applications and summarize the state-of-the-art for each of those domains. Furthermore, we identify important current trends and provide new perspectives pertaining to the future of this burgeoning field.
summary: The field of compositional generalization is currently experiencing a renaissance in AI, as novel problem settings and algorithms motivated by various practical applications are being introduced, building on top of the classical compositional generalization problem. This article aims to provide a comprehensive review of top recent developments in multiple real-life applications of the compositional generalization. Specifically, we introduce a taxonomy of common applications and summarize the state-of-the-art for each of those domains. Furthermore, we identify important current trends and provide new perspectives pertaining to the future of this burgeoning field.
abstract_zh: 构图泛化领域目前正在人工智能领域复兴，在经典构图泛化问题的基础上，基于各种实际应用的新颖的问题设置和算法不断被引入。本文旨在全面回顾组合概括在多种现实生活应用中的最新进展。具体来说，我们介绍了常见应用程序的分类法，并总结了每个领域的最新技术。此外，我们还确定了当前的重要趋势，并为这一新兴领域的未来提供了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了组合泛化在多个实际应用中的最新发展，梳理了典型应用场景并总结各领域的最先进技术。
AI.motivation: 组合泛化作为AI核心挑战，其在实际应用中的研究呈现爆发式增长，亟需系统性总结与趋势分析。
AI.method: 通过文献调研方法，构建应用分类体系，对各领域技术进展进行归纳对比，并提炼发展脉络与未来方向。
AI.result: 提出应用分类框架，总结各领域技术现状，识别出模块化设计、元学习等关键趋势，指出跨域泛化等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 组合泛化研究需更关注实际需求，未来应加强跨领域方法迁移与可解释性研究，推动理论与应用深度融合。

authors_text: Niels Gleinig,Tobias Rohner,Torsten Hoefler
title: Approximate Reversible Circuits for NISQ-Era Quantum Computers
title_zh: NISQ 时代量子计算机的近似可逆电路
abstract: The synthesis approaches for quantum circuits typically aim at minimizing the number of lines or gates. Given the tight restrictions on those logical resources in physical implementations, we propose to view the problem fundamentally different: Given noisy gates and a fixed number of lines, how can we use them to perform a computation as precisely as possible? In this paper we show approximate circuits can be deployed for computations with limited resources. Performing experiments on a QC simulator, we show that under the influence of noise, approximate circuits can have lower error-rates than exact circuits.
summary: The synthesis approaches for quantum circuits typically aim at minimizing the number of lines or gates. Given the tight restrictions on those logical resources in physical implementations, we propose to view the problem fundamentally different: Given noisy gates and a fixed number of lines, how can we use them to perform a computation as precisely as possible? In this paper we show approximate circuits can be deployed for computations with limited resources. Performing experiments on a QC simulator, we show that under the influence of noise, approximate circuits can have lower error-rates than exact circuits.
abstract_zh: 量子电路的综合方法通常旨在最大限度地减少线路或门的数量。考虑到物理实现中对这些逻辑资源的严格限制，我们建议以根本不同的方式看待问题：给定噪声门和固定数量的线，我们如何使用它们来尽可能精确地执行计算？在本文中，我们展示了可以部署近似电路来进行资源有限的计算。在 QC 模拟器上进行实验表明，在噪声的影响下，近似电路的错误率比精确电路低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对NISQ时代量子计算机的近似可逆电路设计方法，在有限资源下提升计算精度。
AI.motivation: 传统量子电路合成侧重减少线路/门数量，但物理实现中资源受限且存在噪声，需重新考虑如何在固定线路数下实现高精度计算。
AI.method: 通过量子模拟器实验，对比近似电路与精确电路在噪声环境下的表现，验证近似方法的误差控制能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，在噪声影响下近似电路的错误率可低于精确电路，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 近似电路为NISQ设备提供了在资源受限场景下实现高精度计算的新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Indradumna Banerjee,Dinesh Ghanta,Girish Nautiyal,Pradeep Sanchana,Prateek Katageri,Atin Modi
title: MLOps with enhanced performance control and observability
title_zh: MLOps 具有增强的性能控制和可观察性
comment: SECOND INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AI-ML SYSTEMS
comments: SECOND INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AI-ML SYSTEMS
abstract: The explosion of data and its ever increasing complexity in the last few years, has made MLOps systems more prone to failure, and new tools need to be embedded in such systems to avoid such failure. In this demo, we will introduce crucial tools in the observability module of a MLOps system that target difficult issues like data drfit and model version control for optimum model selection. We believe integrating these features in our MLOps pipeline would go a long way in building a robust system immune to early stage ML system failures.
summary: The explosion of data and its ever increasing complexity in the last few years, has made MLOps systems more prone to failure, and new tools need to be embedded in such systems to avoid such failure. In this demo, we will introduce crucial tools in the observability module of a MLOps system that target difficult issues like data drfit and model version control for optimum model selection. We believe integrating these features in our MLOps pipeline would go a long way in building a robust system immune to early stage ML system failures.
abstract_zh: 过去几年中数据的爆炸式增长及其日益增加的复杂性使得 MLOps 系统更容易出现故障，需要在此类系统中嵌入新工具以避免此类故障。在此演示中，我们将介绍 MLOps 系统的可观测性模块中的关键工具，这些工具针对数据漂移和模型版本控制等难题，以实现最佳模型选择。我们相信，将这些功能集成到我们的 MLOps 管道中，对于构建一个不受早期 ML 系统故障影响的强大系统将大有帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种增强MLOps系统可观测性的方法，通过集成关键工具解决数据漂移和模型版本控制问题，以优化模型选择。
AI.motivation: 随着数据复杂性增加，MLOps系统易出现故障，现有工具难以有效应对数据漂移和模型版本管理等挑战。
AI.method: 在MLOps可观测模块中嵌入针对数据漂移检测和模型版本控制的工具，实现对模型性能的动态监控与优化选择。
AI.result: 通过集成这些工具，系统能够更早发现数据分布变化和模型退化问题，提升模型选择的准确性与系统稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 增强的可观测性工具有效预防了MLOps系统的早期故障，为构建鲁棒的机器学习流水线提供了可行方案。

method: 在MLOps可观测模块中嵌入针对数据漂移检测和模型版本控制的工具，实现对模型性能的动态监控与优化选择。
result: 通过集成这些工具，系统能够更早发现数据分布变化和模型退化问题，提升模型选择的准确性与系统稳定性。
conclusion: 增强的可观测性工具有效预防了MLOps系统的早期故障，为构建鲁棒的机器学习流水线提供了可行方案。
search_text: MLOps with enhanced performance control and observability MLOps 具有增强的性能控制和可观察性 The explosion of data and its ever increasing complexity in the last few years, has made MLOps systems more prone to failure, and new tools need to be embedded in such systems to avoid such failure. In this demo, we will introduce crucial tools in the observability module of a MLOps system that target difficult issues like data drfit and model version control for optimum model selection. We believe integrating these features in our MLOps pipeline would go a long way in building a robust system immune to early stage ML system failures. 过去几年中数据的爆炸式增长及其日益增加的复杂性使得 MLOps 系统更容易出现故障，需要在此类系统中嵌入新工具以避免此类故障。在此演示中，我们将介绍 MLOps 系统的可观测性模块中的关键工具，这些工具针对数据漂移和模型版本控制等难题，以实现最佳模型选择。我们相信，将这些功能集成到我们的 MLOps 管道中，对于构建一个不受早期 ML 系统故障影响的强大系统将大有帮助。 本文介绍了一种增强MLOps系统可观测性的方法，通过集成关键工具解决数据漂移和模型版本控制问题，以优化模型选择。 Indradumna Banerjee,Dinesh Ghanta,Girish Nautiyal,Pradeep Sanchana,Prateek Katageri,Atin Modi cs.AI

authors_text: Renukanandan Tumu,Lars Lindemann,Truong Nghiem,Rahul Mangharam
title: Physics Constrained Motion Prediction with Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 具有不确定性量化的物理约束运动预测
abstract: Predicting the motion of dynamic agents is a critical task for guaranteeing the safety of autonomous systems. A particular challenge is that motion prediction algorithms should obey dynamics constraints and quantify prediction uncertainty as a measure of confidence. We present a physics-constrained approach for motion prediction which uses a surrogate dynamical model to ensure that predicted trajectories are dynamically feasible. We propose a two-step integration consisting of intent and trajectory prediction subject to dynamics constraints. We also construct prediction regions that quantify uncertainty and are tailored for autonomous driving by using conformal prediction, a popular statistical tool. Physics Constrained Motion Prediction achieves a 41% better ADE, 56% better FDE, and 19% better IoU over a baseline in experiments using an autonomous racing dataset.
summary: Predicting the motion of dynamic agents is a critical task for guaranteeing the safety of autonomous systems. A particular challenge is that motion prediction algorithms should obey dynamics constraints and quantify prediction uncertainty as a measure of confidence. We present a physics-constrained approach for motion prediction which uses a surrogate dynamical model to ensure that predicted trajectories are dynamically feasible. We propose a two-step integration consisting of intent and trajectory prediction subject to dynamics constraints. We also construct prediction regions that quantify uncertainty and are tailored for autonomous driving by using conformal prediction, a popular statistical tool. Physics Constrained Motion Prediction achieves a 41% better ADE, 56% better FDE, and 19% better IoU over a baseline in experiments using an autonomous racing dataset.
abstract_zh: 预测动态代理的运动是保证自主系统安全的一项关键任务。一个特殊的挑战是运动预测算法应遵守动态约束并量化预测不确定性作为置信度的度量。我们提出了一种物理约束的运动预测方法，该方法使用代理动力学模型来确保预测的轨迹在动态上可行。我们提出了一个两步集成，包括受动态约束的意图和轨迹预测。我们还使用流行的统计工具保形预测构建了量化不确定性并为自动驾驶量身定制的预测区域。在使用自主赛车数据集的实验中，与基线相比，物理约束运动预测的 ADE 提高了 41%，FDE 提高了 56%，IoU 提高了 19%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合动力学约束和不确定性量化的运动预测方法，用于提升自主系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有运动预测算法难以同时满足动力学约束和不确定性量化需求，影响自主系统安全。
AI.method: 采用替代动力学模型确保轨迹可行性，通过两步法（意图预测+约束轨迹预测）结合符合预测技术量化不确定性。
AI.result: 在自主赛车数据集上，ADE/FDE/IoU指标分别优于基线41%/56%/19%。
AI.conclusion: 物理约束与不确定性量化结合可显著提升运动预测精度与可靠性。

authors_text: Juze Zhang,Ye Shi,Yuexin Ma,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Jingya Wang
title: IKOL: Inverse kinematics optimization layer for 3D human pose and shape estimation via Gauss-Newton differentiation
title_zh: IKOL：通过高斯-牛顿微分进行 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的逆运动学优化层
abstract: This paper presents an inverse kinematic optimization layer (IKOL) for 3D human pose and shape estimation that leverages the strength of both optimization- and regression-based methods within an end-to-end framework. IKOL involves a nonconvex optimization that establishes an implicit mapping from an image's 3D keypoints and body shapes to the relative body-part rotations. The 3D keypoints and the body shapes are the inputs and the relative body-part rotations are the solutions. However, this procedure is implicit and hard to make differentiable. So, to overcome this issue, we designed a Gauss-Newton differentiation (GN-Diff) procedure to differentiate IKOL. GN-Diff iteratively linearizes the nonconvex objective function to obtain Gauss-Newton directions with closed form solutions. Then, an automatic differentiation procedure is directly applied to generate a Jacobian matrix for end-to-end training. Notably, the GN-Diff procedure works fast because it does not rely on a time-consuming implicit differentiation procedure. The twist rotation and shape parameters are learned from the neural networks and, as a result, IKOL has a much lower computational overhead than most existing optimization-based methods. Additionally, compared to existing regression-based methods, IKOL provides a more accurate mesh-image correspondence. This is because it iteratively reduces the distance between the keypoints and also enhances the reliability of the pose structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed framework over a wide range of 3D human pose and shape estimation methods.
summary: This paper presents an inverse kinematic optimization layer (IKOL) for 3D human pose and shape estimation that leverages the strength of both optimization- and regression-based methods within an end-to-end framework. IKOL involves a nonconvex optimization that establishes an implicit mapping from an image's 3D keypoints and body shapes to the relative body-part rotations. The 3D keypoints and the body shapes are the inputs and the relative body-part rotations are the solutions. However, this procedure is implicit and hard to make differentiable. So, to overcome this issue, we designed a Gauss-Newton differentiation (GN-Diff) procedure to differentiate IKOL. GN-Diff iteratively linearizes the nonconvex objective function to obtain Gauss-Newton directions with closed form solutions. Then, an automatic differentiation procedure is directly applied to generate a Jacobian matrix for end-to-end training. Notably, the GN-Diff procedure works fast because it does not rely on a time-consuming implicit differentiation procedure. The twist rotation and shape parameters are learned from the neural networks and, as a result, IKOL has a much lower computational overhead than most existing optimization-based methods. Additionally, compared to existing regression-based methods, IKOL provides a more accurate mesh-image correspondence. This is because it iteratively reduces the distance between the keypoints and also enhances the reliability of the pose structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed framework over a wide range of 3D human pose and shape estimation methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的逆运动优化层 (IKOL)，它在端到端框架内利用了基于优化和回归的方法的优势。 IKOL 涉及非凸优化，该优化建立从图像的 3D 关键点和身体形状到相对身体部位旋转的隐式映射。 3D 关键点和身体形状是输入，相对的身体部位旋转是解决方案。然而，这个过程是隐式的并且很难微分。因此，为了克服这个问题，我们设计了高斯-牛顿微分（GN-Diff）程序来微分 IKOL。 GN-Diff 迭代线性化非凸目标函数，以获得具有封闭形式解的高斯-牛顿方向。然后，直接应用自动微分过程生成雅可比矩阵以进行端到端训练。值得注意的是，GN-Diff 过程运行速度很快，因为它不依赖于耗时的隐式微分过程。扭曲旋转和形状参数是从神经网络中学习的，因此，IKOL 的计算开销比大多数现有的基于优化的方法要低得多。此外，与现有的基于回归的方法相比，IKOL 提供了更准确的网格图像对应关系。这是因为它迭代地减少了关键点之间的距离，并且还增强了姿势结构的可靠性。大量实验证明了我们提出的框架相对于各种 3D 人体姿势和形状估计方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯-牛顿微分的逆运动学优化层（IKOL），用于端到端的3D人体姿态和形状估计。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法计算开销大且难以微分，回归方法则缺乏姿态结构可靠性，需结合两者优势以提升精度与效率。
AI.method: 设计IKOL层通过高斯-牛顿微分（GN-Diff）迭代线性化非凸目标函数，生成闭式解并自动微分计算雅可比矩阵，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，IKOL在姿态关键点距离缩减和网格-图像对应精度上优于现有优化与回归方法，计算开销更低。
AI.conclusion: IKOL框架通过显式微分机制有效结合优化与回归优势，在3D人体估计任务中取得更优性能。

authors_text: Zunzhi You,Daochang Liu,Bohyung Han,Chang Xu
title: Beyond Pretrained Features: Noisy Image Modeling Provides Adversarial Defense
title_zh: 超越预训练特征：噪声图像建模提供对抗性防御
abstract: Recent advancements in masked image modeling (MIM) have made it a prevailing framework for self-supervised visual representation learning. The MIM pretrained models, like most deep neural network methods, remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks, limiting their practical application, and this issue has received little research attention. In this paper, we investigate how this powerful self-supervised learning paradigm can provide adversarial robustness to downstream classifiers. During the exploration, we find that noisy image modeling (NIM), a simple variant of MIM that adopts denoising as the pre-text task, reconstructs noisy images surprisingly well despite severe corruption. Motivated by this observation, we propose an adversarial defense method, referred to as De^3, by exploiting the pretrained decoder for denoising. Through De^3, NIM is able to enhance adversarial robustness beyond providing pretrained features. Furthermore, we incorporate a simple modification, sampling the noise scale hyperparameter from random distributions, and enable the defense to achieve a better and tunable trade-off between accuracy and robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that, in terms of adversarial robustness, NIM is superior to MIM thanks to its effective denoising capability. Moreover, the defense provided by NIM achieves performance on par with adversarial training while offering the extra tunability advantage. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/youzunzhi/NIM-AdvDef.
summary: Recent advancements in masked image modeling (MIM) have made it a prevailing framework for self-supervised visual representation learning. The MIM pretrained models, like most deep neural network methods, remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks, limiting their practical application, and this issue has received little research attention. In this paper, we investigate how this powerful self-supervised learning paradigm can provide adversarial robustness to downstream classifiers. During the exploration, we find that noisy image modeling (NIM), a simple variant of MIM that adopts denoising as the pre-text task, reconstructs noisy images surprisingly well despite severe corruption. Motivated by this observation, we propose an adversarial defense method, referred to as De^3, by exploiting the pretrained decoder for denoising. Through De^3, NIM is able to enhance adversarial robustness beyond providing pretrained features. Furthermore, we incorporate a simple modification, sampling the noise scale hyperparameter from random distributions, and enable the defense to achieve a better and tunable trade-off between accuracy and robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that, in terms of adversarial robustness, NIM is superior to MIM thanks to its effective denoising capability. Moreover, the defense provided by NIM achieves performance on par with adversarial training while offering the extra tunability advantage. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/youzunzhi/NIM-AdvDef.
abstract_zh: 蒙版图像建模（MIM）的最新进展使其成为自监督视觉表示学习的流行框架。与大多数深度神经网络方法一样，MIM 预训练模型仍然容易受到对抗性攻击，限制了其实际应用，而且这个问题很少受到研究关注。在本文中，我们研究了这种强大的自监督学习范式如何为下游分类器提供对抗鲁棒性。在探索过程中，我们发现噪声图像建模（NIM）是 MIM 的一个简单变体，采用去噪作为前置任务，尽管损坏严重，但仍能很好地重建噪声图像。受此观察的启发，我们提出了一种对抗性防御方法，称为 De^3，通过利用预训练的解码器进行去噪。通过 De^3，NIM 能够在提供预训练特征之外增强对抗鲁棒性。此外，我们进行了简单的修改，从随机分布中采样噪声尺度超参数，并使防御能够在准确性和鲁棒性之间实现更好且可调节的权衡。实验结果表明，在对抗鲁棒性方面，NIM 凭借其有效的去噪能力优于 MIM。此外，NIM 提供的防御实现了与对抗性训练相当的性能，同时提供了额外的可调性优势。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/youzunzhi/NIM-AdvDef 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过噪声图像建模（NIM）提升下游分类器的对抗鲁棒性，并设计了名为De^3的防御方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管掩码图像建模（MIM）在自监督学习中表现优异，但其预训练模型仍易受对抗攻击影响，且相关研究较少。NIM通过去噪任务在严重噪声下表现出色，启发了对抗防御的新思路。
AI.method: 提出De^3方法，利用NIM预训练的解码器进行去噪，并通过从随机分布中采样噪声尺度超参数，实现准确率与鲁棒性的可调平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，NIM在对抗鲁棒性上优于MIM，其防御性能可与对抗训练媲美，同时具备额外的可调性优势。
AI.conclusion: NIM结合De^3方法为对抗防御提供了有效且可调的解决方案，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: Beyond Pretrained Features: Noisy Image Modeling Provides Adversarial Defense 超越预训练特征：噪声图像建模提供对抗性防御 Recent advancements in masked image modeling (MIM) have made it a prevailing framework for self-supervised visual representation learning. The MIM pretrained models, like most deep neural network methods, remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks, limiting their practical application, and this issue has received little research attention. In this paper, we investigate how this powerful self-supervised learning paradigm can provide adversarial robustness to downstream classifiers. During the exploration, we find that noisy image modeling (NIM), a simple variant of MIM that adopts denoising as the pre-text task, reconstructs noisy images surprisingly well despite severe corruption. Motivated by this observation, we propose an adversarial defense method, referred to as De^3, by exploiting the pretrained decoder for denoising. Through De^3, NIM is able to enhance adversarial robustness beyond providing pretrained features. Furthermore, we incorporate a simple modification, sampling the noise scale hyperparameter from random distributions, and enable the defense to achieve a better and tunable trade-off between accuracy and robustness. Experimental results demonstrate that, in terms of adversarial robustness, NIM is superior to MIM thanks to its effective denoising capability. Moreover, the defense provided by NIM achieves performance on par with adversarial training while offering the extra tunability advantage. Source code and models are available at https://github.com/youzunzhi/NIM-AdvDef. 蒙版图像建模（MIM）的最新进展使其成为自监督视觉表示学习的流行框架。与大多数深度神经网络方法一样，MIM 预训练模型仍然容易受到对抗性攻击，限制了其实际应用，而且这个问题很少受到研究关注。在本文中，我们研究了这种强大的自监督学习范式如何为下游分类器提供对抗鲁棒性。在探索过程中，我们发现噪声图像建模（NIM）是 MIM 的一个简单变体，采用去噪作为前置任务，尽管损坏严重，但仍能很好地重建噪声图像。受此观察的启发，我们提出了一种对抗性防御方法，称为 De^3，通过利用预训练的解码器进行去噪。通过 De^3，NIM 能够在提供预训练特征之外增强对抗鲁棒性。此外，我们进行了简单的修改，从随机分布中采样噪声尺度超参数，并使防御能够在准确性和鲁棒性之间实现更好且可调节的权衡。实验结果表明，在对抗鲁棒性方面，NIM 凭借其有效的去噪能力优于 MIM。此外，NIM 提供的防御实现了与对抗性训练相当的性能，同时提供了额外的可调性优势。源代码和模型可在 https://github.com/youzunzhi/NIM-AdvDef 获取。 本文提出通过噪声图像建模（NIM）提升下游分类器的对抗鲁棒性，并设计了名为De^3的防御方法。 Zunzhi You,Daochang Liu,Bohyung Han,Chang Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Mobarakol Islam,Lalithkumar Seenivasan,S. P. Sharan,V. K. Viekash,Bhavesh Gupta,Ben Glocker,Hongliang Ren
title: Paced-Curriculum Distillation with Prediction and Label Uncertainty for Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于图像分割的具有预测和标签不确定性的节奏课程蒸馏
abstract: Purpose: In curriculum learning, the idea is to train on easier samples first and gradually increase the difficulty, while in self-paced learning, a pacing function defines the speed to adapt the training progress. While both methods heavily rely on the ability to score the difficulty of data samples, an optimal scoring function is still under exploration. Methodology: Distillation is a knowledge transfer approach where a teacher network guides a student network by feeding a sequence of random samples. We argue that guiding student networks with an efficient curriculum strategy can improve model generalization and robustness. For this purpose, we design an uncertainty-based paced curriculum learning in self distillation for medical image segmentation. We fuse the prediction uncertainty and annotation boundary uncertainty to develop a novel paced-curriculum distillation (PCD). We utilize the teacher model to obtain prediction uncertainty and spatially varying label smoothing with Gaussian kernel to generate segmentation boundary uncertainty from the annotation. We also investigate the robustness of our method by applying various types and severity of image perturbation and corruption. Results: The proposed technique is validated on two medical datasets of breast ultrasound image segmentation and robotassisted surgical scene segmentation and achieved significantly better performance in terms of segmentation and robustness. Conclusion: P-CD improves the performance and obtains better generalization and robustness over the dataset shift. While curriculum learning requires extensive tuning of hyper-parameters for pacing function, the level of performance improvement suppresses this limitation.
summary: Purpose: In curriculum learning, the idea is to train on easier samples first and gradually increase the difficulty, while in self-paced learning, a pacing function defines the speed to adapt the training progress. While both methods heavily rely on the ability to score the difficulty of data samples, an optimal scoring function is still under exploration. Methodology: Distillation is a knowledge transfer approach where a teacher network guides a student network by feeding a sequence of random samples. We argue that guiding student networks with an efficient curriculum strategy can improve model generalization and robustness. For this purpose, we design an uncertainty-based paced curriculum learning in self distillation for medical image segmentation. We fuse the prediction uncertainty and annotation boundary uncertainty to develop a novel paced-curriculum distillation (PCD). We utilize the teacher model to obtain prediction uncertainty and spatially varying label smoothing with Gaussian kernel to generate segmentation boundary uncertainty from the annotation. We also investigate the robustness of our method by applying various types and severity of image perturbation and corruption. Results: The proposed technique is validated on two medical datasets of breast ultrasound image segmentation and robotassisted surgical scene segmentation and achieved significantly better performance in terms of segmentation and robustness. Conclusion: P-CD improves the performance and obtains better generalization and robustness over the dataset shift. While curriculum learning requires extensive tuning of hyper-parameters for pacing function, the level of performance improvement suppresses this limitation.
abstract_zh: 目的：在课程学习中，其想法是首先在较容易的样本上进行训练，然后逐渐增加难度，而在自定进度学习中，节奏函数定义了适应训练进度的速度。虽然这两种方法都严重依赖于对数据样本难度进行评分的能力，但最佳评分函数仍在探索中。方法：蒸馏是一种知识转移方法，教师网络通过提供一系列随机样本来指导学生网络。我们认为，用有效的课程策略指导学生网络可以提高模型的泛化性和鲁棒性。为此，我们设计了一种基于不确定性的医学图像分割自蒸馏课程学习。我们融合预测不确定性和注释边界不确定性来开发一种新颖的节奏课程蒸馏（PCD）。我们利用教师模型来获得预测不确定性和使用高斯核的空间变化标签平滑，以从注释中生成分割边界不确定性。我们还通过应用各种类型和严重程度的图像扰动和损坏来研究我们方法的稳健性。结果：所提出的技术在乳腺超声图像分割和机器人辅助手术场景分割的两个医学数据集上进行了验证，并在分割和鲁棒性方面取得了显着更好的性能。结论：P-CD 提高了性能，并在数据集转换方面获得了更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。虽然课程学习需要对节奏功能的超参数进行大量调整，但性能改进的水平抑制了这种限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测与标签不确定性的渐进式课程蒸馏方法（PCD），用于提升医学图像分割的性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统课程学习和自定进度学习依赖于数据难度评分函数，但最优评分函数尚未明确，且现有方法在处理医学图像分割时面临标注边界模糊和噪声干扰的挑战。
AI.method: 融合教师模型的预测不确定性与标注边界不确定性，设计不确定性驱动的渐进式课程蒸馏框架，利用高斯核生成空间可变标签平滑，并通过多种图像扰动测试方法鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在乳腺超声图像和机器人手术场景分割数据集上，PCD方法在分割精度和抗干扰能力方面均显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: PCD通过不确定性建模提升了模型泛化能力，尽管课程学习需要调参，但性能提升有效弥补了这一缺陷。

authors_text: Yasir Ghunaim,Adel Bibi,Kumail Alhamoud,Motasem Alfarra,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Ameya Prabhu,Philip H. S. Torr,Bernard Ghanem
title: Real-Time Evaluation in Online Continual Learning: A New Hope
title_zh: 在线持续学习中的实时评估：新希望
abstract: Current evaluations of Continual Learning (CL) methods typically assume that there is no constraint on training time and computation. This is an unrealistic assumption for any real-world setting, which motivates us to propose: a practical real-time evaluation of continual learning, in which the stream does not wait for the model to complete training before revealing the next data for predictions. To do this, we evaluate current CL methods with respect to their computational costs. We conduct extensive experiments on CLOC, a large-scale dataset containing 39 million time-stamped images with geolocation labels. We show that a simple baseline outperforms state-of-the-art CL methods under this evaluation, questioning the applicability of existing methods in realistic settings. In addition, we explore various CL components commonly used in the literature, including memory sampling strategies and regularization approaches. We find that all considered methods fail to be competitive against our simple baseline. This surprisingly suggests that the majority of existing CL literature is tailored to a specific class of streams that is not practical. We hope that the evaluation we provide will be the first step towards a paradigm shift to consider the computational cost in the development of online continual learning methods.
summary: Current evaluations of Continual Learning (CL) methods typically assume that there is no constraint on training time and computation. This is an unrealistic assumption for any real-world setting, which motivates us to propose: a practical real-time evaluation of continual learning, in which the stream does not wait for the model to complete training before revealing the next data for predictions. To do this, we evaluate current CL methods with respect to their computational costs. We conduct extensive experiments on CLOC, a large-scale dataset containing 39 million time-stamped images with geolocation labels. We show that a simple baseline outperforms state-of-the-art CL methods under this evaluation, questioning the applicability of existing methods in realistic settings. In addition, we explore various CL components commonly used in the literature, including memory sampling strategies and regularization approaches. We find that all considered methods fail to be competitive against our simple baseline. This surprisingly suggests that the majority of existing CL literature is tailored to a specific class of streams that is not practical. We hope that the evaluation we provide will be the first step towards a paradigm shift to consider the computational cost in the development of online continual learning methods.
abstract_zh: 当前对持续学习（CL）方法的评估通常假设训练时间和计算没有限制。对于任何现实世界的设置来说，这都是一个不切实际的假设，这促使我们提出：对持续学习进行实用的实时评估，其中流不会等待模型完成训练就显示下一个预测数据。为此，我们评估当前的 CL 方法的计算成本。我们在 CLOC 上进行了广泛的实验，CLOC 是一个大型数据集，包含 3900 万张带有地理位置标签的时间戳图像。我们表明，在此评估下，简单的基线优于最先进的 CL 方法，质疑现有方法在现实环境中的适用性。此外，我们还探索了文献中常用的各种 CL 组件，包括内存采样策略和正则化方法。我们发现所有考虑的方法都无法与我们的简单基线相比。这令人惊讶地表明，大多数现有的 CL 文献都是针对特定类别的流量身定制的，这是不切实际的。我们希望我们提供的评估将成为范式转变的第一步，以考虑在线持续学习方法开发中的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线持续学习的实时评估方法，通过计算成本分析现有方法的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法的评估假设训练时间和计算资源不受限，但现实中需考虑实时性约束。
AI.method: 在包含3900万时间戳图像的CLOC数据集上，评估现有CL方法的计算成本并对比简单基线表现。
AI.result: 简单基线在实时评估中优于现有先进方法，且常见CL组件均无法与基线竞争。
AI.conclusion: 现有CL研究多针对非实际场景，未来需将计算成本纳入在线CL方法的发展考量。
