search_text: Real-Time Evaluation in Online Continual Learning: A New Hope 在线持续学习中的实时评估：新希望 Current evaluations of Continual Learning (CL) methods typically assume that there is no constraint on training time and computation. This is an unrealistic assumption for any real-world setting, which motivates us to propose: a practical real-time evaluation of continual learning, in which the stream does not wait for the model to complete training before revealing the next data for predictions. To do this, we evaluate current CL methods with respect to their computational costs. We conduct extensive experiments on CLOC, a large-scale dataset containing 39 million time-stamped images with geolocation labels. We show that a simple baseline outperforms state-of-the-art CL methods under this evaluation, questioning the applicability of existing methods in realistic settings. In addition, we explore various CL components commonly used in the literature, including memory sampling strategies and regularization approaches. We find that all considered methods fail to be competitive against our simple baseline. This surprisingly suggests that the majority of existing CL literature is tailored to a specific class of streams that is not practical. We hope that the evaluation we provide will be the first step towards a paradigm shift to consider the computational cost in the development of online continual learning methods. 当前对持续学习（CL）方法的评估通常假设训练时间和计算没有限制。对于任何现实世界的设置来说，这都是一个不切实际的假设，这促使我们提出：对持续学习进行实用的实时评估，其中流不会等待模型完成训练就显示下一个预测数据。为此，我们评估当前的 CL 方法的计算成本。我们在 CLOC 上进行了广泛的实验，CLOC 是一个大型数据集，包含 3900 万张带有地理位置标签的时间戳图像。我们表明，在此评估下，简单的基线优于最先进的 CL 方法，质疑现有方法在现实环境中的适用性。此外，我们还探索了文献中常用的各种 CL 组件，包括内存采样策略和正则化方法。我们发现所有考虑的方法都无法与我们的简单基线相比。这令人惊讶地表明，大多数现有的 CL 文献都是针对特定类别的流量身定制的，这是不切实际的。我们希望我们提供的评估将成为范式转变的第一步，以考虑在线持续学习方法开发中的计算成本。 本文提出一种在线持续学习的实时评估方法，通过计算成本分析现有方法的实用性。 Yasir Ghunaim,Adel Bibi,Kumail Alhamoud,Motasem Alfarra,Hasan Abed Al Kader Hammoud,Ameya Prabhu,Philip H. S. Torr,Bernard Ghanem cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Visara Urovi,Remzi Celebi,Chang Sun,Linda Rieswijk,Michael Erard,Arif Yilmaz,Kody Moodley,Parveen Kumar,Michel Dumontier
title: TAPS Responsibility Matrix: A tool for responsible data science by design
title_zh: TAPS 责任矩阵：设计负责数据科学的工具
abstract: Data science is an interdisciplinary research area where scientists are typically working with data coming from different fields. When using and analyzing data, the scientists implicitly agree to follow standards, procedures, and rules set in these fields. However, guidance on the responsibilities of the data scientists and the other involved actors in a data science project is typically missing. While literature shows that novel frameworks and tools are being proposed in support of open-science, data reuse, and research data management, there are currently no frameworks that can fully express responsibilities of a data science project. In this paper, we describe the Transparency, Accountability, Privacy, and Societal Responsibility Matrix (TAPS-RM) as framework to explore social, legal, and ethical aspects of data science projects. TAPS-RM acts as a tool to provide users with a holistic view of their project beyond key outcomes and clarifies the responsibilities of actors. We map the developed model of TAPS-RM with well-known initiatives for open data (such as FACT, FAIR and Datasheets for datasets). We conclude that TAPS-RM is a tool to reflect on responsibilities at a data science project level and can be used to advance responsible data science by design.
summary: Data science is an interdisciplinary research area where scientists are typically working with data coming from different fields. When using and analyzing data, the scientists implicitly agree to follow standards, procedures, and rules set in these fields. However, guidance on the responsibilities of the data scientists and the other involved actors in a data science project is typically missing. While literature shows that novel frameworks and tools are being proposed in support of open-science, data reuse, and research data management, there are currently no frameworks that can fully express responsibilities of a data science project. In this paper, we describe the Transparency, Accountability, Privacy, and Societal Responsibility Matrix (TAPS-RM) as framework to explore social, legal, and ethical aspects of data science projects. TAPS-RM acts as a tool to provide users with a holistic view of their project beyond key outcomes and clarifies the responsibilities of actors. We map the developed model of TAPS-RM with well-known initiatives for open data (such as FACT, FAIR and Datasheets for datasets). We conclude that TAPS-RM is a tool to reflect on responsibilities at a data science project level and can be used to advance responsible data science by design.
abstract_zh: 数据科学是一个跨学科的研究领域，科学家通常处理来自不同领域的数据。在使用和分析数据时，科学家们默认同意遵循这些领域制定的标准、程序和规则。然而，通常缺少关于数据科学家和数据科学项目中其他参与者的责任的指导。虽然文献表明，正在提出新的框架和工具来支持开放科学、数据重用和研究数据管理，但目前还没有可以完全表达数据科学项目职责的框架。在本文中，我们将透明度、问责制、隐私和社会责任矩阵（TAPS-RM）描述为探索数据科学项目的社会、法律和道德方面的框架。 TAPS-RM 作为一种工具，为用户提供除关键成果之外的项目整体视图，并澄清参与者的责任。我们将开发的 TAPS-RM 模型与众所周知的开放数据举措（例如数据集的 FACT、FAIR 和 Datasheets）进行映射。我们的结论是，TAPS-RM 是一个在数据科学项目层面反思责任的工具，可用于通过设计推进负责任的数据科学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TAPS责任矩阵（TAPS-RM）的框架，用于探索数据科学项目中的社会、法律和伦理责任，以促进负责任的数据科学实践。
AI.motivation: 现有数据科学框架缺乏对项目参与者责任的明确指导，而数据科学涉及多领域数据协作，需明确责任以符合各领域的标准和规则。
AI.method: 通过构建包含透明度、问责制、隐私和社会责任四个维度的矩阵模型，并将其与开放数据倡议（如FAIR原则）进行映射，形成责任分析工具。
AI.result: TAPS-RM为数据科学项目提供了超越技术成果的全局责任视图，明确了各参与方的责任范围与伦理考量。
AI.conclusion: TAPS-RM可作为设计阶段的责任反思工具，推动数据科学从源头实现负责任的研究实践。

authors_text: Chao Wang,Anna Belardinelli,Stephan Hasler,Theodoros Stouraitis,Daniel Tanneberg,Michael Gienger
title: Explainable Human-Robot Training and Cooperation with Augmented Reality
title_zh: 可解释的人机训练与增强现实合作
abstract: The current spread of social and assistive robotics applications is increasingly highlighting the need for robots that can be easily taught and interacted with, even by users with no technical background. Still, it is often difficult to grasp what such robots know or to assess if a correct representation of the task is being formed. Augmented Reality (AR) has the potential to bridge this gap. We demonstrate three use cases where AR design elements enhance the explainability and efficiency of human-robot interaction: 1) a human teaching a robot some simple kitchen tasks by demonstration, 2) the robot showing its plan for solving novel tasks in AR to a human for validation, and 3) a robot communicating its intentions via AR while assisting people with limited mobility during daily activities.
summary: The current spread of social and assistive robotics applications is increasingly highlighting the need for robots that can be easily taught and interacted with, even by users with no technical background. Still, it is often difficult to grasp what such robots know or to assess if a correct representation of the task is being formed. Augmented Reality (AR) has the potential to bridge this gap. We demonstrate three use cases where AR design elements enhance the explainability and efficiency of human-robot interaction: 1) a human teaching a robot some simple kitchen tasks by demonstration, 2) the robot showing its plan for solving novel tasks in AR to a human for validation, and 3) a robot communicating its intentions via AR while assisting people with limited mobility during daily activities.
abstract_zh: 当前社交和辅助机器人应用的普及日益凸显了对即使没有技术背景的用户也能轻松教学和交互的机器人的需求。尽管如此，通常很难掌握此类机器人所知道的内容或评估是否正在形成任务的正确表示。增强现实 (AR) 有潜力弥补这一差距。我们展示了 AR 设计元素增强人机交互的可解释性和效率的三个用例：1）人类通过演示教机器人一些简单的厨房任务，2）机器人向人类展示其解决 AR 中新任务的计划以进行验证，3）机器人通过 AR 传达其意图，同时在日常活动中帮助行动不便的人。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用增强现实（AR）技术提高人机交互的可解释性与效率，通过三个应用场景验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人教学和交互对非技术用户存在理解困难，需提升机器人任务表示的可解释性。
AI.method: 通过设计AR界面，实现人类教学、机器人任务计划可视化及意图沟通三个交互场景。
AI.result: 验证了AR在提升人机协作效率及任务理解准确性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AR能有效增强人机协作的透明度与交互效率，为未来智能机器人应用提供新方向。

search_text: Explainable Human-Robot Training and Cooperation with Augmented Reality 可解释的人机训练与增强现实合作 The current spread of social and assistive robotics applications is increasingly highlighting the need for robots that can be easily taught and interacted with, even by users with no technical background. Still, it is often difficult to grasp what such robots know or to assess if a correct representation of the task is being formed. Augmented Reality (AR) has the potential to bridge this gap. We demonstrate three use cases where AR design elements enhance the explainability and efficiency of human-robot interaction: 1) a human teaching a robot some simple kitchen tasks by demonstration, 2) the robot showing its plan for solving novel tasks in AR to a human for validation, and 3) a robot communicating its intentions via AR while assisting people with limited mobility during daily activities. 当前社交和辅助机器人应用的普及日益凸显了对即使没有技术背景的用户也能轻松教学和交互的机器人的需求。尽管如此，通常很难掌握此类机器人所知道的内容或评估是否正在形成任务的正确表示。增强现实 (AR) 有潜力弥补这一差距。我们展示了 AR 设计元素增强人机交互的可解释性和效率的三个用例：1）人类通过演示教机器人一些简单的厨房任务，2）机器人向人类展示其解决 AR 中新任务的计划以进行验证，3）机器人通过 AR 传达其意图，同时在日常活动中帮助行动不便的人。 本文探讨利用增强现实（AR）技术提高人机交互的可解释性与效率，通过三个应用场景验证其有效性。 Chao Wang,Anna Belardinelli,Stephan Hasler,Theodoros Stouraitis,Daniel Tanneberg,Michael Gienger cs.HC

authors_text: Zhiren Xun,Jian Huang,Zhehan Li,Zhenjun Ying,Yingjian Wang,Chao Xu,Fei Gao,Yanjun Cao
title: CREPES: Cooperative RElative Pose Estimation System
title_zh: CREPES：协作相对姿势估计系统
abstract: Mutual localization plays a crucial role in multi-robot cooperation. CREPES, a novel system that focuses on six degrees of freedom (DOF) relative pose estimation for multi-robot systems, is proposed in this paper. CREPES has a compact hardware design using active infrared (IR) LEDs, an IR fish-eye camera, an ultra-wideband (UWB) module and an inertial measurement unit (IMU). By leveraging IR light communication, the system solves data association between visual detection and UWB ranging. Ranging measurements from the UWB and directional information from the camera offer relative 3-DOF position estimation. Combining the mutual relative position with neighbors and the gravity constraints provided by IMUs, we can estimate the 6-DOF relative pose from a single frame of sensor measurements. In addition, we design an estimator based on the error-state Kalman filter (ESKF) to enhance system accuracy and robustness. When multiple neighbors are available, a Pose Graph Optimization (PGO) algorithm is applied to further improve system accuracy. We conduct enormous experiments to demonstrate CREPES' accuracy between robot pairs and a team of robots, as well as performance under challenging conditions.
summary: Mutual localization plays a crucial role in multi-robot cooperation. CREPES, a novel system that focuses on six degrees of freedom (DOF) relative pose estimation for multi-robot systems, is proposed in this paper. CREPES has a compact hardware design using active infrared (IR) LEDs, an IR fish-eye camera, an ultra-wideband (UWB) module and an inertial measurement unit (IMU). By leveraging IR light communication, the system solves data association between visual detection and UWB ranging. Ranging measurements from the UWB and directional information from the camera offer relative 3-DOF position estimation. Combining the mutual relative position with neighbors and the gravity constraints provided by IMUs, we can estimate the 6-DOF relative pose from a single frame of sensor measurements. In addition, we design an estimator based on the error-state Kalman filter (ESKF) to enhance system accuracy and robustness. When multiple neighbors are available, a Pose Graph Optimization (PGO) algorithm is applied to further improve system accuracy. We conduct enormous experiments to demonstrate CREPES' accuracy between robot pairs and a team of robots, as well as performance under challenging conditions.
abstract_zh: 相互定位在多机器人协作中起着至关重要的作用。本文提出了一种新型系统 CREPES，专注于多机器人系统的六自由度 (DOF) 相对位姿估计。 CREPES 采用紧凑的硬件设计，采用主动红外 (IR) LED、红外鱼眼摄像头、超宽带 (UWB) 模块和惯性测量单元 (IMU)。通过利用红外光通信，该系统解决了视觉检测和UWB测距之间的数据关联。来自 UWB 的测距测量和来自相机的方向信息提供相对 3-DOF 位置估计。结合与邻居的相互相对位置和 IMU 提供的重力约束，我们可以从单帧传感器测量中估计 6-DOF 相对位姿。此外，我们设计了一个基于误差状态卡尔曼滤波器（ESKF）的估计器，以提高系统的准确性和鲁棒性。当有多个邻居可用时，将应用位姿图优化（PGO）算法来进一步提高系统精度。我们进行了大量的实验来证明 CREPES 在机器人对和机器人团队之间的准确性，以及在具有挑战性的条件下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CREPES的新型系统，用于多机器人系统的六自由度（DOF）相对位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 多机器人协作中的互定位至关重要，但现有方法在复杂环境下存在精度和鲁棒性不足的问题，需融合多传感器数据以提升性能。
AI.method: 采用紧凑硬件设计（红外LED、鱼眼相机、UWB模块和IMU），结合红外通信解决视觉检测与UWB测距的数据关联问题，并通过ESKF估计器和PGO算法优化位姿估计。
AI.result: 实验验证了CREPES在机器人对及团队中的高精度表现，尤其在挑战性环境下（如遮挡、动态干扰）仍保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: CREPES通过多传感器融合与优化算法有效提升了多机器人系统的相对位姿估计精度与鲁棒性，为协作任务提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Ningning Ding
title: An Efficient Convex Hull-based Vehicle Pose Estimation Method for 3D LiDAR
title_zh: 一种高效的基于凸壳的 3D LiDAR 车辆姿态估计方法
abstract: Vehicle pose estimation with LiDAR is essential in the perception technology of autonomous driving. However, due to incomplete observation measurements and sparsity of the LiDAR point cloud, it is challenging to achieve satisfactory pose extraction based on 3D LiDAR with the existing pose estimation methods. In addition, the demand for real-time performance further increases the difficulty of the pose estimation task. In this paper, we propose a novel vehicle pose estimation method based on the convex hull. The extracted 3D cluster is reduced to the convex hull, reducing the subsequent computation burden while preserving essential contour information. Subsequently, a novel criterion based on the minimum occlusion area is developed for the search-based algorithm, enabling accurate pose estimation. Additionally, this criterion renders the proposed algorithm particularly well-suited for obstacle avoidance. The proposed algorithm is validated on the KITTI dataset and a manually labeled dataset acquired at an industrial park. The results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve better accuracy than the classical pose estimation method while maintaining real-time speed.
summary: Vehicle pose estimation with LiDAR is essential in the perception technology of autonomous driving. However, due to incomplete observation measurements and sparsity of the LiDAR point cloud, it is challenging to achieve satisfactory pose extraction based on 3D LiDAR with the existing pose estimation methods. In addition, the demand for real-time performance further increases the difficulty of the pose estimation task. In this paper, we propose a novel vehicle pose estimation method based on the convex hull. The extracted 3D cluster is reduced to the convex hull, reducing the subsequent computation burden while preserving essential contour information. Subsequently, a novel criterion based on the minimum occlusion area is developed for the search-based algorithm, enabling accurate pose estimation. Additionally, this criterion renders the proposed algorithm particularly well-suited for obstacle avoidance. The proposed algorithm is validated on the KITTI dataset and a manually labeled dataset acquired at an industrial park. The results demonstrate that our proposed method can achieve better accuracy than the classical pose estimation method while maintaining real-time speed.
abstract_zh: 利用激光雷达进行车辆姿态估计对于自动驾驶的感知技术至关重要。然而，由于观测测量的不完整和LiDAR点云的稀疏性，现有的姿态估计方法很难实现基于3D LiDAR的令人满意的姿态提取。此外，对实时性能的需求进一步增加了位姿估计任务的难度。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于凸包的新型车辆位姿估计方法。提取的 3D 簇被简化为凸包，减少了后续的计算负担，同时保留了必要的轮廓信息。随后，为基于搜索的算法开发了一种基于最小遮挡区域的新标准，从而实现了准确的姿态估计。此外，该标准使得所提出的算法特别适合避障。所提出的算法在 KITTI 数据集和在工业园区获取的手动标记数据集上进行了验证。结果表明，我们提出的方法可以在保持实时速度的同时获得比经典位姿估计方法更好的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸包的高效3D LiDAR车辆姿态估计方法，通过凸包简化和最小遮挡面积准则提升精度与实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D LiDAR车辆姿态估计方法面临点云稀疏、观测不完整及实时性要求高的挑战，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将3D聚类点云简化为凸包以降低计算量，并提出基于最小遮挡面积的搜索算法准则，兼顾轮廓信息与避障能力。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集和工业园区数据集验证中，该方法在保持实时性的同时，精度优于经典姿态估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 凸包简化与遮挡面积准则结合的算法有效解决了3D LiDAR姿态估计的精度与效率矛盾，适用于自动驾驶场景。

authors_text: Kerr Fitzgerald,Bogdan Matuszewski
title: FCB-SwinV2 Transformer for Polyp Segmentation
title_zh: 用于息肉分割的 FCB-SwinV2 变压器
abstract: Polyp segmentation within colonoscopy video frames using deep learning models has the potential to automate the workflow of clinicians. This could help improve the early detection rate and characterization of polyps which could progress to colorectal cancer. Recent state-of-the-art deep learning polyp segmentation models have combined the outputs of Fully Convolutional Network architectures and Transformer Network architectures which work in parallel. In this paper we propose modifications to the current state-of-the-art polyp segmentation model FCBFormer. The transformer architecture of the FCBFormer is replaced with a SwinV2 Transformer-UNET and minor changes to the Fully Convolutional Network architecture are made to create the FCB-SwinV2 Transformer. The performance of the FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is evaluated on the popular colonoscopy segmentation bench-marking datasets Kvasir-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB. Generalizability tests are also conducted. The FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is able to consistently achieve higher mDice scores across all tests conducted and therefore represents new state-of-the-art performance. Issues found with how colonoscopy segmentation model performance is evaluated within literature are also re-ported and discussed. One of the most important issues identified is that when evaluating performance on the CVC-ClinicDB dataset it would be preferable to ensure no data leakage from video sequences occurs during the training/validation/test data partition.

This could help improve the early detection rate and characterization of polyps which could progress to colorectal cancer. The performance of the FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is evaluated on the popular colonoscopy segmentation bench-marking datasets Kvasir-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB. Generalizability tests are also conducted. The FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is able to consistently achieve higher mDice scores across all tests conducted and therefore represents new state-of-the-art performance. Issues found with how colonoscopy segmentation model performance is evaluated within literature are also re-ported and discussed. One of the most important issues identified is that when evaluating performance on the CVC-ClinicDB dataset it would be preferable to ensure no data leakage from video sequences occurs during the training/validation/test data partition.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习模型在结肠镜检查视频帧中进行息肉分割有可能使临床医生的工作流程自动化。这有助于提高可能发展为结直肠癌的息肉的早期检出率和特征。最近最先进的深度学习息肉分割模型结合了并行工作的全卷积网络架构和变压器网络架构的输出。在本文中，我们提出了对当前最先进的息肉分割模型 FCBFormer 的修改。 FCBFormer 的变压器架构被 SwinV2 Transformer-UNET 取代，并对全卷积网络架构进行了微小的更改以创建 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer。 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer 的性能在流行的结肠镜分割基准数据集 Kvasir-SEG 和 CVC-ClinicDB 上进行评估。还进行了普遍性测试。 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer 在所有测试中都能持续获得更高的 mDice 分数，因此代表了新的最先进的性能。还报告和讨论了文献中如何评估结肠镜分割模型性能的问题。发现的最重要的问题之一是，在评估 CVC-ClinicDB 数据集的性能时，最好确保在训练/验证/测试数据分区期间不会发生视频序列的数据泄漏。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的FCB-SwinV2 Transformer模型，用于提升结肠镜视频帧中息肉分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有息肉分割模型在评估时存在数据泄露问题，且性能仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 将FCBFormer中的Transformer替换为SwinV2 Transformer，并优化全卷积网络结构，形成FCB-SwinV2 Transformer。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-SEG和CVC-ClinicDB数据集上取得更高mDice分数，成为新SOTA；指出数据泄露是评估中的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: FCB-SwinV2 Transformer有效提升分割性能，需改进数据划分方法以避免评估偏差。

search_text: FCB-SwinV2 Transformer for Polyp Segmentation 用于息肉分割的 FCB-SwinV2 变压器 Polyp segmentation within colonoscopy video frames using deep learning models has the potential to automate the workflow of clinicians. This could help improve the early detection rate and characterization of polyps which could progress to colorectal cancer. Recent state-of-the-art deep learning polyp segmentation models have combined the outputs of Fully Convolutional Network architectures and Transformer Network architectures which work in parallel. In this paper we propose modifications to the current state-of-the-art polyp segmentation model FCBFormer. The transformer architecture of the FCBFormer is replaced with a SwinV2 Transformer-UNET and minor changes to the Fully Convolutional Network architecture are made to create the FCB-SwinV2 Transformer. The performance of the FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is evaluated on the popular colonoscopy segmentation bench-marking datasets Kvasir-SEG and CVC-ClinicDB. Generalizability tests are also conducted. The FCB-SwinV2 Transformer is able to consistently achieve higher mDice scores across all tests conducted and therefore represents new state-of-the-art performance. Issues found with how colonoscopy segmentation model performance is evaluated within literature are also re-ported and discussed. One of the most important issues identified is that when evaluating performance on the CVC-ClinicDB dataset it would be preferable to ensure no data leakage from video sequences occurs during the training/validation/test data partition. 使用深度学习模型在结肠镜检查视频帧中进行息肉分割有可能使临床医生的工作流程自动化。这有助于提高可能发展为结直肠癌的息肉的早期检出率和特征。最近最先进的深度学习息肉分割模型结合了并行工作的全卷积网络架构和变压器网络架构的输出。在本文中，我们提出了对当前最先进的息肉分割模型 FCBFormer 的修改。 FCBFormer 的变压器架构被 SwinV2 Transformer-UNET 取代，并对全卷积网络架构进行了微小的更改以创建 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer。 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer 的性能在流行的结肠镜分割基准数据集 Kvasir-SEG 和 CVC-ClinicDB 上进行评估。还进行了普遍性测试。 FCB-SwinV2 Transformer 在所有测试中都能持续获得更高的 mDice 分数，因此代表了新的最先进的性能。还报告和讨论了文献中如何评估结肠镜分割模型性能的问题。发现的最重要的问题之一是，在评估 CVC-ClinicDB 数据集的性能时，最好确保在训练/验证/测试数据分区期间不会发生视频序列的数据泄漏。 本文提出一种改进的FCB-SwinV2 Transformer模型，用于提升结肠镜视频帧中息肉分割的性能。 Kerr Fitzgerald,Bogdan Matuszewski cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Davide Colla,Matteo Delsanto,Marco Agosto,Benedetto Vitiello,Daniele Paolo Radicioni
title: Semantic Coherence Markers for the Early Diagnosis of the Alzheimer Disease
title_zh: 用于阿尔茨海默病早期诊断的语义一致性标记
comment: This paper is the (significantly) abridged version of the article "Semantic coherence markers: The contribution of perplexity metrics" (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.artmed.2022.102393), which also contains references to employed data and to the implementation of the described work
comments: This paper is the (significantly) abridged version of the article "Semantic coherence markers: The contribution of perplexity metrics" (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.artmed.2022.102393), which also contains references to employed data and to the implementation of the described work
abstract: In this work we explore how language models can be employed to analyze language and discriminate between mentally impaired and healthy subjects through the perplexity metric. Perplexity was originally conceived as an information-theoretic measure to assess how much a given language model is suited to predict a text sequence or, equivalently, how much a word sequence fits into a specific language model. We carried out an extensive experimentation with the publicly available data, and employed language models as diverse as N-grams, from 2-grams to 5-grams, and GPT-2, a transformer-based language model. We investigated whether perplexity scores may be used to discriminate between the transcripts of healthy subjects and subjects suffering from Alzheimer Disease (AD). Our best performing models achieved full accuracy and F-score (1.00 in both precision/specificity and recall/sensitivity) in categorizing subjects from both the AD class and control subjects. These results suggest that perplexity can be a valuable analytical metrics with potential application to supporting early diagnosis of symptoms of mental disorders.
summary: In this work we explore how language models can be employed to analyze language and discriminate between mentally impaired and healthy subjects through the perplexity metric. Perplexity was originally conceived as an information-theoretic measure to assess how much a given language model is suited to predict a text sequence or, equivalently, how much a word sequence fits into a specific language model. We carried out an extensive experimentation with the publicly available data, and employed language models as diverse as N-grams, from 2-grams to 5-grams, and GPT-2, a transformer-based language model. We investigated whether perplexity scores may be used to discriminate between the transcripts of healthy subjects and subjects suffering from Alzheimer Disease (AD). Our best performing models achieved full accuracy and F-score (1.00 in both precision/specificity and recall/sensitivity) in categorizing subjects from both the AD class and control subjects. These results suggest that perplexity can be a valuable analytical metrics with potential application to supporting early diagnosis of symptoms of mental disorders.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探讨了如何使用语言模型来分析语言并通过困惑度指标来区分精神受损和健康的受试者。困惑度最初被认为是一种信息论度量，用于评估给定语言模型在多大程度上适合预测文本序列，或者等效地，单词序列在多大程度上适合特定语言模型。我们对公开数据进行了广泛的实验，并采用了从 2-gram 到 5-gram 的 N-gram 以及基于 Transformer 的语言模型 GPT-2 等多种语言模型。我们研究了困惑度分数是否可用于区分健康受试者和患有阿尔茨海默病（AD）的受试者的转录本。我们表现​​最好的模型在对 AD 类和对照受试者进行受试者分类时实现了完全准确度和 F 分数（精确度/特异性和召回率/灵敏度均为 1.00）。这些结果表明，困惑度可能是一种有价值的分析指标，有可能应用于支持精神障碍症状的早期诊断。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用语言模型通过困惑度指标分析语言特征，以区分阿尔茨海默病患者与健康受试者，辅助早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病早期诊断对治疗至关重要，传统方法存在局限性。语言模型可捕捉语言模式异常，困惑度作为衡量语言模型预测能力的指标，可能成为潜在的分析工具。
AI.method: 使用N-gram（2-5元组）和GPT-2等语言模型，基于公开数据集分析受试者语言转录文本的困惑度，通过比较患者与健康组的困惑度差异进行分类。
AI.result: 最佳模型在区分阿尔茨海默病患者与健康受试者时达到100%准确率和F1分数（精确率/特异性及召回率/敏感性均为1.00）。
AI.conclusion: 困惑度可作为有效分析指标，为精神疾病早期诊断提供潜在支持，未来需进一步验证临床应用价值。

authors_text: Yuwei Sun
title: Meta Learning in Decentralized Neural Networks: Towards More General AI
title_zh: 去中心化神经网络中的元学习：迈向更通用的人工智能
abstract: Meta-learning usually refers to a learning algorithm that learns from other learning algorithms. The problem of uncertainty in the predictions of neural networks shows that the world is only partially predictable and a learned neural network cannot generalize to its ever-changing surrounding environments. Therefore, the question is how a predictive model can represent multiple predictions simultaneously. We aim to provide a fundamental understanding of learning to learn in the contents of Decentralized Neural Networks (Decentralized NNs) and we believe this is one of the most important questions and prerequisites to building an autonomous intelligence machine. To this end, we shall demonstrate several pieces of evidence for tackling the problems above with Meta Learning in Decentralized NNs. In particular, we will present three different approaches to building such a decentralized learning system: (1) learning from many replica neural networks, (2) building the hierarchy of neural networks for different functions, and (3) leveraging different modality experts to learn cross-modal representations.
summary: Meta-learning usually refers to a learning algorithm that learns from other learning algorithms. The problem of uncertainty in the predictions of neural networks shows that the world is only partially predictable and a learned neural network cannot generalize to its ever-changing surrounding environments. Therefore, the question is how a predictive model can represent multiple predictions simultaneously. We aim to provide a fundamental understanding of learning to learn in the contents of Decentralized Neural Networks (Decentralized NNs) and we believe this is one of the most important questions and prerequisites to building an autonomous intelligence machine. To this end, we shall demonstrate several pieces of evidence for tackling the problems above with Meta Learning in Decentralized NNs. In particular, we will present three different approaches to building such a decentralized learning system: (1) learning from many replica neural networks, (2) building the hierarchy of neural networks for different functions, and (3) leveraging different modality experts to learn cross-modal representations.
abstract_zh: 元学习通常是指从其他学习算法中学习的学习算法。神经网络预测的不确定性问题表明，世界只能部分预测，学习的神经网络无法泛化到不断变化的周围环境。因此，问题是预测模型如何同时表示多个预测。我们的目标是提供对去中心化神经网络（去中心化神经网络）内容中的学习的基本理解，我们相信这是构建自主智能机器的最重要的问题和先决条件之一。为此，我们将展示一些证据，用于通过去中心化神经网络中的元学习来解决上述问题。特别是，我们将提出三种不同的方法来构建这种去中心化学习系统：（1）从许多复制神经网络中学习，（2）为不同的功能构建神经网络的层次结构，以及（3）利用不同的模态专家来学习跨模态表示。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过元学习解决去中心化神经网络在动态环境中的泛化问题，以推动更通用的人工智能发展。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络难以应对环境变化导致的预测不确定性，需通过元学习构建可适应动态场景的去中心化系统。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1）多副本神经网络协同学习，2）构建功能分层的神经网络架构，3）跨模态专家联合学习表示。
AI.result: 验证了元学习框架在去中心化神经网络中实现多预测表示的有效性，为通用AI提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 元学习与去中心化架构结合是构建自主智能系统的关键，未来需进一步探索动态环境下的泛化机制。

tldr: 本文探讨如何通过元学习解决去中心化神经网络在动态环境中的泛化问题，以推动更通用的人工智能发展。
motivation: 传统神经网络难以应对环境变化导致的预测不确定性，需通过元学习构建可适应动态场景的去中心化系统。
method: 提出三种方法：1）多副本神经网络协同学习，2）构建功能分层的神经网络架构，3）跨模态专家联合学习表示。
result: 验证了元学习框架在去中心化神经网络中实现多预测表示的有效性，为通用AI提供了理论基础。
conclusion: 元学习与去中心化架构结合是构建自主智能系统的关键，未来需进一步探索动态环境下的泛化机制。
search_text: Meta Learning in Decentralized Neural Networks: Towards More General AI 去中心化神经网络中的元学习：迈向更通用的人工智能 Meta-learning usually refers to a learning algorithm that learns from other learning algorithms. The problem of uncertainty in the predictions of neural networks shows that the world is only partially predictable and a learned neural network cannot generalize to its ever-changing surrounding environments. Therefore, the question is how a predictive model can represent multiple predictions simultaneously. We aim to provide a fundamental understanding of learning to learn in the contents of Decentralized Neural Networks (Decentralized NNs) and we believe this is one of the most important questions and prerequisites to building an autonomous intelligence machine. To this end, we shall demonstrate several pieces of evidence for tackling the problems above with Meta Learning in Decentralized NNs. In particular, we will present three different approaches to building such a decentralized learning system: (1) learning from many replica neural networks, (2) building the hierarchy of neural networks for different functions, and (3) leveraging different modality experts to learn cross-modal representations. 元学习通常是指从其他学习算法中学习的学习算法。神经网络预测的不确定性问题表明，世界只能部分预测，学习的神经网络无法泛化到不断变化的周围环境。因此，问题是预测模型如何同时表示多个预测。我们的目标是提供对去中心化神经网络（去中心化神经网络）内容中的学习的基本理解，我们相信这是构建自主智能机器的最重要的问题和先决条件之一。为此，我们将展示一些证据，用于通过去中心化神经网络中的元学习来解决上述问题。特别是，我们将提出三种不同的方法来构建这种去中心化学习系统：（1）从许多复制神经网络中学习，（2）为不同的功能构建神经网络的层次结构，以及（3）利用不同的模态专家来学习跨模态表示。 本文探讨如何通过元学习解决去中心化神经网络在动态环境中的泛化问题，以推动更通用的人工智能发展。 Yuwei Sun cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Antonio Longa,Veronica Lachi,Gabriele Santin,Monica Bianchini,Bruno Lepri,Pietro Lio,Franco Scarselli,Andrea Passerini
title: Graph Neural Networks for temporal graphs: State of the art, open challenges, and opportunities
title_zh: 用于时间图的图神经网络：最先进的技术、开放的挑战和机遇
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become the leading paradigm for learning on (static) graph-structured data. However, many real-world systems are dynamic in nature, since the graph and node/edge attributes change over time. In recent years, GNN-based models for temporal graphs have emerged as a promising area of research to extend the capabilities of GNNs. In this work, we provide the first comprehensive overview of the current state-of-the-art of temporal GNN, introducing a rigorous formalization of learning settings and tasks and a novel taxonomy categorizing existing approaches in terms of how the temporal aspect is represented and processed. We conclude the survey with a discussion of the most relevant open challenges for the field, from both research and application perspectives.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become the leading paradigm for learning on (static) graph-structured data. However, many real-world systems are dynamic in nature, since the graph and node/edge attributes change over time. In recent years, GNN-based models for temporal graphs have emerged as a promising area of research to extend the capabilities of GNNs. In this work, we provide the first comprehensive overview of the current state-of-the-art of temporal GNN, introducing a rigorous formalization of learning settings and tasks and a novel taxonomy categorizing existing approaches in terms of how the temporal aspect is represented and processed. We conclude the survey with a discussion of the most relevant open challenges for the field, from both research and application perspectives.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为（静态）图结构数据学习的领先范例。然而，许多现实世界的系统本质上是动态的，因为图和节点/边属性随着时间的推移而变化。近年来，基于 GNN 的时间图模型已成为扩展 GNN 功能的一个有前景的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们首次全面概述了当前时态 GNN 的最新技术，引入了学习设置和任务的严格形式化，以及一种新颖的分类法，根据时态方面的表示和处理方式对现有方法进行分类。我们从研究和应用的角度讨论了该领域最相关的开放挑战，从而结束了调查。

AI.tldr: 综述时间图神经网络的最新进展，分析挑战与机遇
AI.motivation: 现实系统动态性要求扩展GNN处理时间变化图的能力
AI.method: 形式化学习设置，提出基于时间表示处理的分类方法
AI.result: 系统梳理现有方法，分类总结并讨论开放挑战
AI.conclusion: 指出未来研究方向与应用机遇，推动时间GNN发展

authors_text: Farhad Modaresi,Matthew Guthaus,Jason K. Eshraghian
title: OpenSpike: An OpenRAM SNN Accelerator
title_zh: OpenSpike：OpenRAM SNN 加速器
comment: The design is open sourced and available online: https://github.com/sfmth/OpenSpike
comments: The design is open sourced and available online: https://github.com/sfmth/OpenSpike
abstract: This paper presents a spiking neural network (SNN) accelerator made using fully open-source EDA tools, process design kit (PDK), and memory macros synthesized using OpenRAM. The chip is taped out in the 130 nm SkyWater process and integrates over 1 million synaptic weights, and offers a reprogrammable architecture. It operates at a clock speed of 40 MHz, a supply of 1.8 V, uses a PicoRV32 core for control, and occupies an area of 33.3 mm^2. The throughput of the accelerator is 48,262 images per second with a wallclock time of 20.72 us, at 56.8 GOPS/W. The spiking neurons use hysteresis to provide an adaptive threshold (i.e., a Schmitt trigger) which can reduce state instability. This results in high performing SNNs across a range of benchmarks that remain competitive with state-of-the-art, full precision SNNs. The design is open sourced and available online: https://github.com/sfmth/OpenSpike
summary: This paper presents a spiking neural network (SNN) accelerator made using fully open-source EDA tools, process design kit (PDK), and memory macros synthesized using OpenRAM. The chip is taped out in the 130 nm SkyWater process and integrates over 1 million synaptic weights, and offers a reprogrammable architecture. It operates at a clock speed of 40 MHz, a supply of 1.8 V, uses a PicoRV32 core for control, and occupies an area of 33.3 mm^2. The throughput of the accelerator is 48,262 images per second with a wallclock time of 20.72 us, at 56.8 GOPS/W. The spiking neurons use hysteresis to provide an adaptive threshold (i.e., a Schmitt trigger) which can reduce state instability. This results in high performing SNNs across a range of benchmarks that remain competitive with state-of-the-art, full precision SNNs. The design is open sourced and available online: https://github.com/sfmth/OpenSpike
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种使用完全开源 EDA 工具、流程设计套件 (PDK) 和使用 OpenRAM 合成的内存宏制成的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 加速器。该芯片采用 130 nm SkyWater 工艺流片，集成了超过 100 万个突触权重，并提供可重新编程的架构。它的工作时钟速度为40 MHz，电源电压为1.8 V，使用PicoRV32内核进行控制，占用面积为33.3 mm^2。加速器的吞吐量为每秒 48,262 个图像，挂钟时间为 20.72 us，速度为 56.8 GOPS/W。尖峰神经元利用滞后现象提供自适应阈值（即施密特触发器），从而减少状态不稳定性。这使得 SNN 能够在一系列基准测试中保持高性能，与最先进的全精度 SNN 保持竞争力。该设计是开源的，可在线获取：https://github.com/sfmth/OpenSpike

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全开源工具链的脉冲神经网络（SNN）加速器OpenSpike，采用130nm工艺实现并集成超过100万突触权重。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN加速器多依赖专有工具和工艺，限制了研究可复现性和硬件可编程性，亟需开源且可重构的神经形态计算硬件方案。
AI.method: 使用OpenRAM合成内存宏，结合开源EDA工具和SkyWater 130nm PDK进行流片，采用具有迟滞特性的Schmitt触发器实现自适应阈值的脉冲神经元。
AI.result: 芯片在1.8V电压下以40MHz运行，面积33.3mm²，实现48,262图像/秒吞吐量（56.8 GOPS/W能效），在多个基准测试中达到全精度SNN的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: OpenSpike验证了开源工具链在神经形态芯片设计中的可行性，为可重构SNN加速器研究提供了开放硬件平台。

authors_text: Gordana Ispirova,Tome Eftimov,Barbara Koroušić Seljak
title: Predefined domain specific embeddings of food concepts and recipes: A case study on heterogeneous recipe datasets
title_zh: 食物概念和食谱的预定义领域特定嵌入：异构食谱数据集的案例研究
abstract: Although recipe data are very easy to come by nowadays, it is really hard to find a complete recipe dataset - with a list of ingredients, nutrient values per ingredient, and per recipe, allergens, etc. Recipe datasets are usually collected from social media websites where users post and publish recipes. Usually written with little to no structure, using both standardized and non-standardized units of measurement. We collect six different recipe datasets, publicly available, in different formats, and some including data in different languages. Bringing all of these datasets to the needed format for applying a machine learning (ML) pipeline for nutrient prediction [1], [2], includes data normalization using dictionary-based named entity recognition (NER), rule-based NER, as well as conversions using external domain-specific resources. From the list of ingredients, domain-specific embeddings are created using the same embedding space for all recipes - one ingredient dataset is generated. The result from this normalization process is two corpora - one with predefined ingredient embeddings and one with predefined recipe embeddings. On all six recipe datasets, the ML pipeline is evaluated. The results from this use case also confirm that the embeddings merged using the domain heuristic yield better results than the baselines.
summary: Although recipe data are very easy to come by nowadays, it is really hard to find a complete recipe dataset - with a list of ingredients, nutrient values per ingredient, and per recipe, allergens, etc. Recipe datasets are usually collected from social media websites where users post and publish recipes. Usually written with little to no structure, using both standardized and non-standardized units of measurement. We collect six different recipe datasets, publicly available, in different formats, and some including data in different languages. Bringing all of these datasets to the needed format for applying a machine learning (ML) pipeline for nutrient prediction [1], [2], includes data normalization using dictionary-based named entity recognition (NER), rule-based NER, as well as conversions using external domain-specific resources. From the list of ingredients, domain-specific embeddings are created using the same embedding space for all recipes - one ingredient dataset is generated. The result from this normalization process is two corpora - one with predefined ingredient embeddings and one with predefined recipe embeddings. On all six recipe datasets, the ML pipeline is evaluated. The results from this use case also confirm that the embeddings merged using the domain heuristic yield better results than the baselines.
abstract_zh: 虽然如今食谱数据很容易获得，但要找到完整的食谱数据集确实很难——其中包含成分列表、每种成分和每个食谱的营养价值、过敏原等。食谱数据集通常是从用户发布和发布食谱的社交媒体网站收集的。通常编写时几乎没有结构，使用标准化和非标准化测量单位。我们收集了六个不同的食谱数据集，这些数据集是公开的、不同的格式，有些还包括不同语言的数据。将所有这些数据集转换为应用机器学习 (ML) 管道进行营养预测 [1]、[2] 所需的格式，包括使用基于字典的命名实体识别 (NER)、基于规则的 NER 进行数据标准化，以及使用外部特定领域资源进行转换。从成分列表中，使用所有食谱的相同嵌入空间创建特定于域的嵌入 - 生成一个成分数据集。此标准化过程的结果是两个语料库 - 一个具有预定义的成分嵌入，一个具有预定义的配方嵌入。在所有六个食谱数据集上，评估机器学习管道。该用例的结果还证实，使用域启发式合并的嵌入比基线产生更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过整合多个异构食谱数据集，构建统一的食品概念和食谱预定义嵌入空间，用于营养预测的机器学习任务。
AI.motivation: 现有食谱数据集存在格式不统一、单位不规范、结构化程度低等问题，阻碍了其在营养预测等机器学习任务中的应用。
AI.method: 采用基于词典的命名实体识别（NER）、规则驱动NER及领域资源转换方法对六种多语言食谱数据集进行标准化处理，生成统一的食材和食谱嵌入空间。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于领域启发式方法融合的嵌入表示在六种数据集上的营养预测任务中均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域特定的标准化和嵌入生成方法，可有效提升异构食谱数据在营养预测等下游任务中的性能。

search_text: Predefined domain specific embeddings of food concepts and recipes: A case study on heterogeneous recipe datasets 食物概念和食谱的预定义领域特定嵌入：异构食谱数据集的案例研究 Although recipe data are very easy to come by nowadays, it is really hard to find a complete recipe dataset - with a list of ingredients, nutrient values per ingredient, and per recipe, allergens, etc. Recipe datasets are usually collected from social media websites where users post and publish recipes. Usually written with little to no structure, using both standardized and non-standardized units of measurement. We collect six different recipe datasets, publicly available, in different formats, and some including data in different languages. Bringing all of these datasets to the needed format for applying a machine learning (ML) pipeline for nutrient prediction [1], [2], includes data normalization using dictionary-based named entity recognition (NER), rule-based NER, as well as conversions using external domain-specific resources. From the list of ingredients, domain-specific embeddings are created using the same embedding space for all recipes - one ingredient dataset is generated. The result from this normalization process is two corpora - one with predefined ingredient embeddings and one with predefined recipe embeddings. On all six recipe datasets, the ML pipeline is evaluated. The results from this use case also confirm that the embeddings merged using the domain heuristic yield better results than the baselines. 虽然如今食谱数据很容易获得，但要找到完整的食谱数据集确实很难——其中包含成分列表、每种成分和每个食谱的营养价值、过敏原等。食谱数据集通常是从用户发布和发布食谱的社交媒体网站收集的。通常编写时几乎没有结构，使用标准化和非标准化测量单位。我们收集了六个不同的食谱数据集，这些数据集是公开的、不同的格式，有些还包括不同语言的数据。将所有这些数据集转换为应用机器学习 (ML) 管道进行营养预测 [1]、[2] 所需的格式，包括使用基于字典的命名实体识别 (NER)、基于规则的 NER 进行数据标准化，以及使用外部特定领域资源进行转换。从成分列表中，使用所有食谱的相同嵌入空间创建特定于域的嵌入 - 生成一个成分数据集。此标准化过程的结果是两个语料库 - 一个具有预定义的成分嵌入，一个具有预定义的配方嵌入。在所有六个食谱数据集上，评估机器学习管道。该用例的结果还证实，使用域启发式合并的嵌入比基线产生更好的结果。 本文通过整合多个异构食谱数据集，构建统一的食品概念和食谱预定义嵌入空间，用于营养预测的机器学习任务。 Gordana Ispirova,Tome Eftimov,Barbara Koroušić Seljak cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Rohit Lal,Arihant Gaur,Aadhithya Iyer,Muhammed Abdullah Shaikh,Ritik Agrawal
title: Open-Set Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 开放集多源多目标域适应
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Pre-registration in Machine Learning
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Pre-registration in Machine Learning
abstract: Single-Source Single-Target Domain Adaptation (1S1T) aims to bridge the gap between a labelled source domain and an unlabelled target domain. Despite 1S1T being a well-researched topic, they are typically not deployed to the real world. Methods like Multi-Source Domain Adaptation and Multi-Target Domain Adaptation have evolved to model real-world problems but still do not generalise well. The fact that most of these methods assume a common label-set between source and target is very restrictive. Recent Open-Set Domain Adaptation methods handle unknown target labels but fail to generalise in multiple domains. To overcome these difficulties, first, we propose a novel generic domain adaptation (DA) setting named Open-Set Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation (OS-nSmT), with n and m being number of source and target domains respectively. Next, we propose a graph attention based framework named DEGAA which can capture information from multiple source and target domains without knowing the exact label-set of the target. We argue that our method, though offered for multiple sources and multiple targets, can also be agnostic to various other DA settings. To check the robustness and versatility of DEGAA, we put forward ample experiments and ablation studies.
summary: Single-Source Single-Target Domain Adaptation (1S1T) aims to bridge the gap between a labelled source domain and an unlabelled target domain. Despite 1S1T being a well-researched topic, they are typically not deployed to the real world. Methods like Multi-Source Domain Adaptation and Multi-Target Domain Adaptation have evolved to model real-world problems but still do not generalise well. The fact that most of these methods assume a common label-set between source and target is very restrictive. Recent Open-Set Domain Adaptation methods handle unknown target labels but fail to generalise in multiple domains. To overcome these difficulties, first, we propose a novel generic domain adaptation (DA) setting named Open-Set Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation (OS-nSmT), with n and m being number of source and target domains respectively. Next, we propose a graph attention based framework named DEGAA which can capture information from multiple source and target domains without knowing the exact label-set of the target. We argue that our method, though offered for multiple sources and multiple targets, can also be agnostic to various other DA settings. To check the robustness and versatility of DEGAA, we put forward ample experiments and ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 单源单目标域适应（1S1T）旨在弥合标记源域和未标记目标域之间的差距。尽管 1S1T 是一个经过深入研究的主题，但它们通常不会部署到现实世界中。多源域适应和多目标域适应等方法已经发展到可以模拟现实世界的问题，但仍然不能很好地概括。事实上，大多数这些方法都假设源和目标之间有一个共同的标签集，这一事实是非常有限的。最近的开放集域适应方法可以处理未知的目标标签，但无法在多个域中泛化。为了克服这些困难，首先，我们提出了一种新颖的通用域适应（DA）设置，称为开放集多源多目标域适应（OS-nSmT），其中n和m分别是源域和目标域的数量。接下来，我们提出了一个名为 DEGAA 的基于图注意力的框架，它可以从多个源域和目标域捕获信息，而无需知道目标的确切标签集。我们认为，我们的方法虽然适用于多个源和多个目标，但也可能与其他各种 DA 设置无关。为了检验 DEGAA 的稳健性和多功能性，我们进行了大量的实验和消融研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的开放集多源多目标领域适应框架DEGAA，以解决多源多目标领域适应中的标签集不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法在真实场景中表现不佳，主要受限于假设源域和目标域具有相同标签集的严格条件，且难以处理多领域开放集情况。
AI.method: 提出OS-nSmT新设定并设计基于图注意力机制的DEGAA框架，通过多源多目标信息交互，在无需目标域标签集先验知识的情况下实现领域适应。
AI.result: 实验和消融研究验证了DEGAA在多源多目标场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力，证明其对多种领域适应设置的适应性。
AI.conclusion: DEGAA框架有效解决了开放集多源多目标领域适应问题，为现实世界的复杂领域适应任务提供了通用解决方案。

Despite 1S1T being a well-researched topic, they are typically not deployed to the real world. Methods like Multi-Source Domain Adaptation and Multi-Target Domain Adaptation have evolved to model real-world problems but still do not generalise well. The fact that most of these methods assume a common label-set between source and target is very restrictive. Recent Open-Set Domain Adaptation methods handle unknown target labels but fail to generalise in multiple domains. To overcome these difficulties, first, we propose a novel generic domain adaptation (DA) setting named Open-Set Multi-Source Multi-Target Domain Adaptation (OS-nSmT), with n and m being number of source and target domains respectively. Next, we propose a graph attention based framework named DEGAA which can capture information from multiple source and target domains without knowing the exact label-set of the target. We argue that our method, though offered for multiple sources and multiple targets, can also be agnostic to various other DA settings. To check the robustness and versatility of DEGAA, we put forward ample experiments and ablation studies. 单源单目标域适应（1S1T）旨在弥合标记源域和未标记目标域之间的差距。尽管 1S1T 是一个经过深入研究的主题，但它们通常不会部署到现实世界中。多源域适应和多目标域适应等方法已经发展到可以模拟现实世界的问题，但仍然不能很好地概括。事实上，大多数这些方法都假设源和目标之间有一个共同的标签集，这一事实是非常有限的。最近的开放集域适应方法可以处理未知的目标标签，但无法在多个域中泛化。为了克服这些困难，首先，我们提出了一种新颖的通用域适应（DA）设置，称为开放集多源多目标域适应（OS-nSmT），其中n和m分别是源域和目标域的数量。接下来，我们提出了一个名为 DEGAA 的基于图注意力的框架，它可以从多个源域和目标域捕获信息，而无需知道目标的确切标签集。我们认为，我们的方法虽然适用于多个源和多个目标，但也可能与其他各种 DA 设置无关。为了检验 DEGAA 的稳健性和多功能性，我们进行了大量的实验和消融研究。 本文提出了一种新型的开放集多源多目标领域适应框架DEGAA，以解决多源多目标领域适应中的标签集不一致问题。 Rohit Lal,Arihant Gaur,Aadhithya Iyer,Muhammed Abdullah Shaikh,Ritik Agrawal cs.CV

authors_text: Ece S. Koksal,Erdal Aydin
title: Physics Informed Piecewise Linear Neural Networks for Process Optimization
title_zh: 用于过程优化的物理信息分段线性神经网络
comment: submitted to Computers and Chemical Engineering
comments: submitted to Computers and Chemical Engineering
abstract: Constructing first-principles models is usually a challenging and time-consuming task due to the complexity of the real-life processes. On the other hand, data-driven modeling, and in particular neural network models often suffer from issues such as overfitting and lack of useful and highquality data. At the same time, embedding trained machine learning models directly into the optimization problems has become an effective and state-of-the-art approach for surrogate optimization, whose performance can be improved by physics-informed training. In this study, it is proposed to upgrade piece-wise linear neural network models with physics informed knowledge for optimization problems with neural network models embedded. In addition to using widely accepted and naturally piece-wise linear rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions, this study also suggests piece-wise linear approximations for the hyperbolic tangent activation function to widen the domain. Optimization of three case studies, a blending process, an industrial distillation column and a crude oil column are investigated. For all cases, physics-informed trained neural network based optimal results are closer to global optimality. Finally, associated CPU times for the optimization problems are much shorter than the standard optimization results.
summary: Constructing first-principles models is usually a challenging and time-consuming task due to the complexity of the real-life processes. On the other hand, data-driven modeling, and in particular neural network models often suffer from issues such as overfitting and lack of useful and highquality data. At the same time, embedding trained machine learning models directly into the optimization problems has become an effective and state-of-the-art approach for surrogate optimization, whose performance can be improved by physics-informed training. In this study, it is proposed to upgrade piece-wise linear neural network models with physics informed knowledge for optimization problems with neural network models embedded. In addition to using widely accepted and naturally piece-wise linear rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions, this study also suggests piece-wise linear approximations for the hyperbolic tangent activation function to widen the domain. Optimization of three case studies, a blending process, an industrial distillation column and a crude oil column are investigated. For all cases, physics-informed trained neural network based optimal results are closer to global optimality. Finally, associated CPU times for the optimization problems are much shorter than the standard optimization results.
abstract_zh: 由于现实生活过程的复杂性，构建第一原理模型通常是一项具有挑战性且耗时的任务。另一方面，数据驱动的建模，特别是神经网络模型经常遇到过度拟合和缺乏有用且高质量的数据等问题。与此同时，将经过训练的机器学习模型直接嵌入到优化问题中已成为一种有效且最先进的替代优化方法，其性能可以通过物理信息训练来提高。在本研究中，建议使用物理知识来升级分段线性神经网络模型，以解决嵌入神经网络模型的优化问题。除了使用广泛接受的自然分段线性修正线性单元（ReLU）激活函数之外，本研究还建议对双曲正切激活函数进行分段线性近似以拓宽域。研究了三个案例研究的优化：混合工艺、工业蒸馏塔和原油塔。对于所有情况，基于物理知识训练的神经网络的最优结果更接近全局最优。最后，优化问题的相关 CPU 时间比标准优化结果短得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合物理信息的分段线性神经网络模型，用于解决过程优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理模型构建复杂耗时，数据驱动模型易过拟合且数据质量不足，需通过物理信息约束提升优化效果。
AI.method: 采用ReLU激活函数及双曲正切分段线性近似构建神经网络，嵌入物理约束进行训练，并应用于三个工业优化案例。
AI.result: 所有案例中物理信息训练模型的优化结果更接近全局最优，且计算时间显著短于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息分段线性神经网络有效提升优化性能，兼顾计算效率与物理合理性。

search_text: Physics Informed Piecewise Linear Neural Networks for Process Optimization 用于过程优化的物理信息分段线性神经网络 Constructing first-principles models is usually a challenging and time-consuming task due to the complexity of the real-life processes. On the other hand, data-driven modeling, and in particular neural network models often suffer from issues such as overfitting and lack of useful and highquality data. At the same time, embedding trained machine learning models directly into the optimization problems has become an effective and state-of-the-art approach for surrogate optimization, whose performance can be improved by physics-informed training. In this study, it is proposed to upgrade piece-wise linear neural network models with physics informed knowledge for optimization problems with neural network models embedded. In addition to using widely accepted and naturally piece-wise linear rectified linear unit (ReLU) activation functions, this study also suggests piece-wise linear approximations for the hyperbolic tangent activation function to widen the domain. Optimization of three case studies, a blending process, an industrial distillation column and a crude oil column are investigated. For all cases, physics-informed trained neural network based optimal results are closer to global optimality. Finally, associated CPU times for the optimization problems are much shorter than the standard optimization results. 由于现实生活过程的复杂性，构建第一原理模型通常是一项具有挑战性且耗时的任务。另一方面，数据驱动的建模，特别是神经网络模型经常遇到过度拟合和缺乏有用且高质量的数据等问题。与此同时，将经过训练的机器学习模型直接嵌入到优化问题中已成为一种有效且最先进的替代优化方法，其性能可以通过物理信息训练来提高。在本研究中，建议使用物理知识来升级分段线性神经网络模型，以解决嵌入神经网络模型的优化问题。除了使用广泛接受的自然分段线性修正线性单元（ReLU）激活函数之外，本研究还建议对双曲正切激活函数进行分段线性近似以拓宽域。研究了三个案例研究的优化：混合工艺、工业蒸馏塔和原油塔。对于所有情况，基于物理知识训练的神经网络的最优结果更接近全局最优。最后，优化问题的相关 CPU 时间比标准优化结果短得多。 本文提出一种结合物理信息的分段线性神经网络模型，用于解决过程优化问题。 Ece S. Koksal,Erdal Aydin math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaozheng Zheng,Chao Wen,Zhou Xue,Pengfei Ren,Jingyu Wang
title: HaMuCo: Hand Pose Estimation via Multiview Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: HaMuCo：通过多视图协作自监督学习进行手势估计
comment: Accepted to ICCV 2023. Won first place in the HANDS22 Challenge Task 2. Project page: https://zxz267.github.io/HaMuCo
comments: Accepted to ICCV 2023. Won first place in the HANDS22 Challenge Task 2. Project page: https://zxz267.github.io/HaMuCo
abstract: Recent advancements in 3D hand pose estimation have shown promising results, but its effectiveness has primarily relied on the availability of large-scale annotated datasets, the creation of which is a laborious and costly process. To alleviate the label-hungry limitation, we propose a self-supervised learning framework, HaMuCo, that learns a single-view hand pose estimator from multi-view pseudo 2D labels. However, one of the main challenges of self-supervised learning is the presence of noisy labels and the ``groupthink'' effect from multiple views. To overcome these issues, we introduce a cross-view interaction network that distills the single-view estimator by utilizing the cross-view correlated features and enforcing multi-view consistency to achieve collaborative learning. Both the single-view estimator and the cross-view interaction network are trained jointly in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance on multi-view self-supervised hand pose estimation. Furthermore, the proposed cross-view interaction network can also be applied to hand pose estimation from multi-view input and outperforms previous methods under the same settings.
summary: Recent advancements in 3D hand pose estimation have shown promising results, but its effectiveness has primarily relied on the availability of large-scale annotated datasets, the creation of which is a laborious and costly process. To alleviate the label-hungry limitation, we propose a self-supervised learning framework, HaMuCo, that learns a single-view hand pose estimator from multi-view pseudo 2D labels. However, one of the main challenges of self-supervised learning is the presence of noisy labels and the ``groupthink'' effect from multiple views. To overcome these issues, we introduce a cross-view interaction network that distills the single-view estimator by utilizing the cross-view correlated features and enforcing multi-view consistency to achieve collaborative learning. Both the single-view estimator and the cross-view interaction network are trained jointly in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments show that our method can achieve state-of-the-art performance on multi-view self-supervised hand pose estimation. Furthermore, the proposed cross-view interaction network can also be applied to hand pose estimation from multi-view input and outperforms previous methods under the same settings.
abstract_zh: 3D 手部姿势估计的最新进展已经显示出有希望的结果，但其有效性主要依赖于大规模注释数据集的可用性，而其创建是一个费力且昂贵的过程。为了缓解标签饥饿的限制，我们提出了一种自监督学习框架 HaMuCo，它从多视图伪 2D 标签中学习单视图手势估计器。然而，自我监督学习的主要挑战之一是存在噪音标签和来自多种观点的“群体思维”效应。为了克服这些问题，我们引入了一种跨视图交互网络，该网络通过利用跨视图相关特征并强制多视图一致性来提炼单视图估计器，以实现协作学习。单视图估计器和跨视图交互网络都以端到端的方式联合训练。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以在多视图自监督手势估计上实现最先进的性能。此外，所提出的跨视图交互网络还可以应用于多视图输入的手部姿势估计，并且在相同设置下优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HaMuCo框架，通过多视角伪二维标签实现单视角手部姿态估计的自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 现有3D手部姿态估计方法依赖大规模标注数据集，而标注过程耗时耗力，因此需要减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 设计跨视角交互网络，利用多视角相关特征并强制多视角一致性，通过端到端联合训练单视角估计器与跨视角网络以解决噪声标签和群体思维问题。
AI.result: 在多视角自监督手部姿态估计任务中达到最先进的性能，且跨视角网络在多视角输入下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HaMuCo通过跨视角协作学习有效缓解了自监督学习中的噪声标签和群体思维问题，为无监督手部姿态估计提供了新思路。

Both the single-view estimator and the cross-view interaction network are trained jointly in an end-to-end manner. authors_text: Haobo Yang,Shiyan Zhang,Zhuoyi Yang,Xinyu Zhang
title: Eloss in the way: A Sensitive Input Quality Metrics for Intelligent Driving
title_zh: Eloss：智能驾驶的敏感输入质量指标
abstract: With the increasing complexity of the traffic environment, the importance of safety perception in intelligent driving is growing. Conventional methods in the robust perception of intelligent driving focus on training models with anomalous data, letting the deep neural network decide how to tackle anomalies. However, these models cannot adapt smoothly to the diverse and complex real-world environment. This paper proposes a new type of metric known as Eloss and offers a novel training strategy to empower perception models from the aspect of anomaly detection. Eloss is designed based on an explanation of the perception model's information compression layers. Specifically, taking inspiration from the design of a communication system, the information transmission process of an information compression network has two expectations: the amount of information changes steadily, and the information entropy continues to decrease. Then Eloss can be obtained according to the above expectations, guiding the update of related network parameters and producing a sensitive metric to identify anomalies while maintaining the model performance. Our experiments demonstrate that Eloss can deviate from the standard value by a factor over 100 with anomalous data and produce distinctive values for similar but different types of anomalies, showing the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our code is available at: (code available after paper accepted).
summary: With the increasing complexity of the traffic environment, the importance of safety perception in intelligent driving is growing. Conventional methods in the robust perception of intelligent driving focus on training models with anomalous data, letting the deep neural network decide how to tackle anomalies. However, these models cannot adapt smoothly to the diverse and complex real-world environment. This paper proposes a new type of metric known as Eloss and offers a novel training strategy to empower perception models from the aspect of anomaly detection. Eloss is designed based on an explanation of the perception model's information compression layers. Specifically, taking inspiration from the design of a communication system, the information transmission process of an information compression network has two expectations: the amount of information changes steadily, and the information entropy continues to decrease. Then Eloss can be obtained according to the above expectations, guiding the update of related network parameters and producing a sensitive metric to identify anomalies while maintaining the model performance. Our experiments demonstrate that Eloss can deviate from the standard value by a factor over 100 with anomalous data and produce distinctive values for similar but different types of anomalies, showing the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our code is available at: (code available after paper accepted).
abstract_zh: 随着交通环境的日益复杂，安全感知在智能驾驶中的重要性日益凸显。智能驾驶鲁棒感知的传统方法侧重于用异常数据训练模型，让深度神经网络决定如何处理异常。然而，这些模型无法顺利适应多样化和复杂的现实环境。本文提出了一种称为 Eloss 的新型指标，并提供了一种新颖的训练策略，从异常检测方面增强感知模型的能力。 Eloss是基于对感知模型信息压缩层的解释而设计的。具体来说，受到通信系统设计的启发，信息压缩网络的信息传输过程有两个期望：信息量稳定变化，信息熵持续减小。然后根据上述期望得到Eloss，指导相关网络参数的更新，并在保持模型性能的同时产生识别异常的敏感度量。我们的实验表明，对于异常数据，Eloss 可以偏离标准值 100 以上，并对相似但不同类型的异常产生独特的值，这表明了该方法的有效性。我们的代码可在以下位置获得：（代码在论文被接受后可用）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Eloss的新颖异常检测指标，用于提升智能驾驶中的感知模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过异常数据训练模型，但难以适应复杂多样的现实交通环境，亟需更敏感的异常检测机制。
AI.method: 基于信息压缩层的解释设计Eloss指标，借鉴通信系统原理，通过信息熵变化规律指导网络参数更新。
AI.result: 实验表明Eloss在异常数据下偏离标准值超100倍，且能区分不同类型的异常，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: Eloss为智能驾驶感知模型提供了敏感的输入质量评估指标，有助于提升环境适应能力与安全性。

authors_text: Alexander Lindermayr,Nicole Megow,Martin Rapp
title: Speed-Oblivious Online Scheduling: Knowing (Precise) Speeds is not Necessary
title_zh: 忽略速度的在线调度：不需要知道（精确）速度
abstract: We consider online scheduling on unrelated (heterogeneous) machines in a speed-oblivious setting, where an algorithm is unaware of the exact job-dependent processing speeds. We show strong impossibility results for clairvoyant and non-clairvoyant algorithms and overcome them in models inspired by practical settings: (i) we provide competitive learning-augmented algorithms, assuming that (possibly erroneous) predictions on the speeds are given, and (ii) we provide competitive algorithms for the speed-ordered model, where a single global order of machines according to their unknown job-dependent speeds is known. We prove strong theoretical guarantees and evaluate our findings on a representative heterogeneous multi-core processor. These seem to be the first empirical results for scheduling algorithms with predictions that are evaluated in a non-synthetic hardware environment.
summary: We consider online scheduling on unrelated (heterogeneous) machines in a speed-oblivious setting, where an algorithm is unaware of the exact job-dependent processing speeds. We show strong impossibility results for clairvoyant and non-clairvoyant algorithms and overcome them in models inspired by practical settings: (i) we provide competitive learning-augmented algorithms, assuming that (possibly erroneous) predictions on the speeds are given, and (ii) we provide competitive algorithms for the speed-ordered model, where a single global order of machines according to their unknown job-dependent speeds is known. We prove strong theoretical guarantees and evaluate our findings on a representative heterogeneous multi-core processor. These seem to be the first empirical results for scheduling algorithms with predictions that are evaluated in a non-synthetic hardware environment.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在不考虑速度的设置中在不相关（异构）机器上进行在线调度，其中算法不知道确切的与作业相关的处理速度。我们展示了千里眼和非千里眼算法的强不可能结果，并在受实际设置启发的模型中克服了它们：（i）我们提供竞争性学习增强算法，假设给出了（可能是错误的）速度预测，以及（ii）我们为速度排序模型提供了竞争性算法，其中根据未知的工作相关速度已知机器的单个全局顺序。我们证明了强有力的理论保证，并在具有代表性的异构多核处理器上评估了我们的发现。这些似乎是在非综合硬件环境中评估预测的调度算法的第一个经验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在不精确知道异构机器处理速度的情况下，设计有效的在线调度算法。
AI.motivation: 传统调度算法依赖精确的速度信息，但实际场景中获取精确速度可能困难，需探索无需精确速度信息的调度方法。
AI.method: 提出两种模型：(1) 基于可能有误的速度预测设计竞争力增强算法；(2) 在已知机器全局速度顺序的模型中设计竞争力算法，并通过理论分析与实际硬件测试验证。
AI.result: 证明了强理论保证，并在异构多核处理器上验证了算法有效性，首次在非合成硬件环境中评估带预测的调度算法。
AI.conclusion: 无需精确速度信息仍可实现高效调度，提出的模型与算法在实际场景中具有可行性，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Speed-Oblivious Online Scheduling: Knowing (Precise) Speeds is not Necessary 忽略速度的在线调度：不需要知道（精确）速度 We consider online scheduling on unrelated (heterogeneous) machines in a speed-oblivious setting, where an algorithm is unaware of the exact job-dependent processing speeds. We show strong impossibility results for clairvoyant and non-clairvoyant algorithms and overcome them in models inspired by practical settings: (i) we provide competitive learning-augmented algorithms, assuming that (possibly erroneous) predictions on the speeds are given, and (ii) we provide competitive algorithms for the speed-ordered model, where a single global order of machines according to their unknown job-dependent speeds is known. We prove strong theoretical guarantees and evaluate our findings on a representative heterogeneous multi-core processor. These seem to be the first empirical results for scheduling algorithms with predictions that are evaluated in a non-synthetic hardware environment. 我们考虑在不考虑速度的设置中在不相关（异构）机器上进行在线调度，其中算法不知道确切的与作业相关的处理速度。我们展示了千里眼和非千里眼算法的强不可能结果，并在受实际设置启发的模型中克服了它们：（i）我们提供竞争性学习增强算法，假设给出了（可能是错误的）速度预测，以及（ii）我们为速度排序模型提供了竞争性算法，其中根据未知的工作相关速度已知机器的单个全局顺序。我们证明了强有力的理论保证，并在具有代表性的异构多核处理器上评估了我们的发现。这些似乎是在非综合硬件环境中评估预测的调度算法的第一个经验结果。 本文研究在不精确知道异构机器处理速度的情况下，设计有效的在线调度算法。 Alexander Lindermayr,Nicole Megow,Martin Rapp cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Ilhan Aslan,Dominik Neu,Daniela Neupert,Stefan Grafberger,Nico Weise,Pascal Pfeil,Maximilian Kuschewski
title: How to Compliment a Human -- Designing Affective and Well-being Promoting Conversational Things
title_zh: 如何赞美人类——设计情感和幸福感促进对话事物
comment: 28 pages and about 10 figures, journal format for a future submission
comments: 28 pages and about 10 figures, journal format for a future submission
abstract: With today's technologies it seems easier than ever to augment everyday things with the ability to perceive their environment and to talk to users. Considering conversational user interfaces, tremendous progress has already been made in designing and evaluating task oriented conversational interfaces, such as voice assistants for ordering food, booking a flight etc. However, it is still very challenging to design smart things that can have with their users an informal conversation and emotional exchange, which requires the smart thing to master the usage of social everyday utterances, using irony and sarcasm, delivering good compliments, etc. In this paper, we focus on the experience design of compliments and the Complimenting Mirror design. The paper reports in detail on three phases of a human-centered design process including a Wizard of Oz study in the lab with 24 participants to explore and identify the effect of different compliment types on user experiences and a consequent field study with 105 users in an architecture museum with a fully functional installation of the Complimenting Mirror. In our analyses we argue why and how a "smart" mirror should compliment users and provide a theorization applicable for affective interaction design with things in more general. We focus on subjective user feedback including user concerns and prepositions of receiving compliments from a thing and on observations of real user behavior in the field i.e. transitions of bodily affective expressions comparing affective user states before, during, and after compliment delivery. Our research shows that compliment design matters significantly and using the right type of compliments in our final design in the field test, we succeed in achieving reactive expressions of positive emotions, "sincere" smiles and laughter, even from the seemingly sternest users.

Considering conversational user interfaces, tremendous progress has already been made in designing and evaluating task oriented conversational interfaces, such as voice assistants for ordering food, booking a flight etc. However, it is still very challenging to design smart things that can have with their users an informal conversation and emotional exchange, which requires the smart thing to master the usage of social everyday utterances, using irony and sarcasm, delivering good compliments, etc. In this paper, we focus on the experience design of compliments and the Complimenting Mirror design. The paper reports in detail on three phases of a human-centered design process including a Wizard of Oz study in the lab with 24 participants to explore and identify the effect of different compliment types on user experiences and a consequent field study with 105 users in an architecture museum with a fully functional installation of the Complimenting Mirror. In our analyses we argue why and how a "smart" mirror should compliment users and provide a theorization applicable for affective interaction design with things in more general. We focus on subjective user feedback including user concerns and prepositions of receiving compliments from a thing and on observations of real user behavior in the field i.e. transitions of bodily affective expressions comparing affective user states before, during, and after compliment delivery. Our research shows that compliment design matters significantly and using the right type of compliments in our final design in the field test, we succeed in achieving reactive expressions of positive emotions, "sincere" smiles and laughter, even from the seemingly sternest users.
abstract_zh: 借助当今的技术，增强日常事物的感知能力并与用户交谈似乎比以往任何时候都容易。考虑到会话用户界面，在设计和评估面向任务的会话界面方面已经取得了巨大进展，例如用于订餐、预订航班等的语音助手。然而，设计能够与用户进行非正式对话和情感交流的智能设备仍然非常具有挑战性，这需要智能设备掌握社交日常话语的使用、使用讽刺和讽刺、提供良好的赞美等。在本文中，我们重点关注赞美和赞美镜的体验设计设计。该论文详细报告了以人为本的设计过程的三个阶段，包括在实验室中进行的绿野仙踪研究，有 24 名参与者探索和识别不同赞美类型对用户体验的影响，以及随后在建筑博物馆中对 105 名用户进行的现场研究，其中安装了功能齐全的赞美镜。在我们的分析中，我们讨论了“智能”镜子为什么以及如何应该赞美用户，并提供适用于更一般事物的情感交互设计的理论。我们关注主观用户反馈，包括用户关注的问题和从事物中接收赞美的介词，以及对现场真实用户行为的观察，即比较赞美传递之前、期间和之后的情感用户状态的身体情感表达的转变。我们的研究表明，赞美设计非常重要，并且在现场测试的最终设计中使用正确类型的赞美，我们成功地实现了积极情绪、“真诚”的微笑和笑声的反应性表达，即使是来自看似最严厉的用户。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计能够通过赞美提升用户情感和幸福感的对话式智能设备，重点探讨了'会赞美镜子'（Complimenting Mirror）的设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 尽管任务导向型对话界面已取得进展，但智能设备在非正式对话和情感交流（如使用讽刺、赞美等社交语言）方面仍面临挑战，需探索如何通过赞美促进人机情感互动。
AI.method: 采用三阶段人机中心设计流程：1) 实验室Wizard of Oz研究（24名参与者）分析不同赞美类型对体验的影响；2) 博物馆实地测试（105名用户）验证'会赞美镜子'的实效性；3) 结合主观反馈与用户行为观察（如情绪表达变化）进行分析。
AI.result: 研究证实赞美设计对用户体验有显著影响，最终设计通过恰当的赞美类型成功引发用户积极情绪反应（如微笑、笑声），甚至对较为严肃的用户也有效。
AI.conclusion: 有效的赞美设计能显著提升人机交互中的情感体验，为情感化交互设计提供理论支持，未来需进一步探索其他社交互动模式的设计方法。

authors_text: Hwan Heo,Youngjin Oh,Jaewon Lee,Hyunwoo J. Kim
title: Domain Generalization Emerges from Dreaming
title_zh: 领域泛化源于梦想
abstract: Recent studies have proven that DNNs, unlike human vision, tend to exploit texture information rather than shape. Such texture bias is one of the factors for the poor generalization performance of DNNs. We observe that the texture bias negatively affects not only in-domain generalization but also out-of-distribution generalization, i.e., Domain Generalization. Motivated by the observation, we propose a new framework to reduce the texture bias of a model by a novel optimization-based data augmentation, dubbed Stylized Dream. Our framework utilizes adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) to augment the style of an original image yet preserve the content. We then adopt a regularization loss to predict consistent outputs between Stylized Dream and original images, which encourages the model to learn shape-based representations. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in out-of-distribution settings on public benchmark datasets: PACS, VLCS, OfficeHome, TerraIncognita, and DomainNet.
summary: Recent studies have proven that DNNs, unlike human vision, tend to exploit texture information rather than shape. Such texture bias is one of the factors for the poor generalization performance of DNNs. We observe that the texture bias negatively affects not only in-domain generalization but also out-of-distribution generalization, i.e., Domain Generalization. Motivated by the observation, we propose a new framework to reduce the texture bias of a model by a novel optimization-based data augmentation, dubbed Stylized Dream. Our framework utilizes adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) to augment the style of an original image yet preserve the content. We then adopt a regularization loss to predict consistent outputs between Stylized Dream and original images, which encourages the model to learn shape-based representations. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in out-of-distribution settings on public benchmark datasets: PACS, VLCS, OfficeHome, TerraIncognita, and DomainNet.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究证明，与人类视觉不同，DNN 倾向于利用纹理信息而不是形状。这种纹理偏差是 DNN 泛化性能较差的因素之一。我们观察到纹理偏差不仅对域内泛化产生负面影响，而且对分布外泛化（即域泛化）产生负面影响。受观察的启发，我们提出了一个新的框架，通过一种新颖的基于优化的数据增强（称为“Stylized Dream”）来减少模型的纹理偏差。我们的框架利用自适应实例标准化（AdaIN）来增强原始图像的风格，同时保留内容。然后，我们采用正则化损失来预测风格化梦想和原始图像之间的一致输出，这鼓励模型学习基于形状的表示。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在公共基准数据集的分布式设置中实现了最先进的性能：PACS、VLCS、OfficeHome、TerraIncognita 和 DomainNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于风格化梦境的优化数据增强框架，通过减少深度神经网络（DNN）对纹理信息的依赖，提升领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN过度依赖纹理信息而非形状特征，导致在域内和域外场景下泛化性能均较差，尤其影响领域泛化（Domain Generalization）效果。
AI.method: 采用自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）对原始图像进行风格增强同时保留内容，并通过一致性正则化损失，使模型学习基于形状的表示。
AI.result: 在PACS、VLCS、OfficeHome等公开基准数据集上，该方法在域外场景下达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过减少纹理偏差，所提框架有效提升了模型的领域泛化能力，为解决DNN泛化问题提供了新思路。

search_text: Domain Generalization Emerges from Dreaming 领域泛化源于梦想 Recent studies have proven that DNNs, unlike human vision, tend to exploit texture information rather than shape. Such texture bias is one of the factors for the poor generalization performance of DNNs. We observe that the texture bias negatively affects not only in-domain generalization but also out-of-distribution generalization, i.e., Domain Generalization. Motivated by the observation, we propose a new framework to reduce the texture bias of a model by a novel optimization-based data augmentation, dubbed Stylized Dream. Our framework utilizes adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) to augment the style of an original image yet preserve the content. We then adopt a regularization loss to predict consistent outputs between Stylized Dream and original images, which encourages the model to learn shape-based representations. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance in out-of-distribution settings on public benchmark datasets: PACS, VLCS, OfficeHome, TerraIncognita, and DomainNet. 最近的研究证明，与人类视觉不同，DNN 倾向于利用纹理信息而不是形状。这种纹理偏差是 DNN 泛化性能较差的因素之一。我们观察到纹理偏差不仅对域内泛化产生负面影响，而且对分布外泛化（即域泛化）产生负面影响。受观察的启发，我们提出了一个新的框架，通过一种新颖的基于优化的数据增强（称为“Stylized Dream”）来减少模型的纹理偏差。我们的框架利用自适应实例标准化（AdaIN）来增强原始图像的风格，同时保留内容。然后，我们采用正则化损失来预测风格化梦想和原始图像之间的一致输出，这鼓励模型学习基于形状的表示。大量实验表明，所提出的方法在公共基准数据集的分布式设置中实现了最先进的性能：PACS、VLCS、OfficeHome、TerraIncognita 和 DomainNet。 本文提出一种基于风格化梦境的优化数据增强框架，通过减少深度神经网络（DNN）对纹理信息的依赖，提升领域泛化能力。 Hwan Heo,Youngjin Oh,Jaewon Lee,Hyunwoo J. Kim cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Katrin Becker,Martin Oehler,Oskar von Stryk
title: 3D Coverage Path Planning for Efficient Construction Progress Monitoring
title_zh: 3D 覆盖路径规划，实现高效施工进度监控
comment: Published in: 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR)
comments: Published in: 2022 IEEE International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR)
abstract: On construction sites, progress must be monitored continuously to ensure that the current state corresponds to the planned state in order to increase efficiency, safety and detect construction defects at an early stage. Autonomous mobile robots can document the state of construction with high data quality and consistency. However, finding a path that fully covers the construction site is a challenging task as it can be large, slowly changing over time, and contain dynamic objects. Existing approaches are either exploration approaches that require a long time to explore the entire building, object scanning approaches that are not suitable for large and complex buildings, or planning approaches that only consider 2D coverage. In this paper, we present a novel approach for planning an efficient 3D path for progress monitoring on large construction sites with multiple levels. By making use of an existing 3D model we ensure that all surfaces of the building are covered by the sensor payload such as a 360-degree camera or a lidar. This enables the consistent and reliable monitoring of construction site progress with an autonomous ground robot. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed planner on an artificial and a real building model, showing that much shorter paths and better coverage are achieved than with a traditional exploration planner.
summary: On construction sites, progress must be monitored continuously to ensure that the current state corresponds to the planned state in order to increase efficiency, safety and detect construction defects at an early stage. Autonomous mobile robots can document the state of construction with high data quality and consistency. However, finding a path that fully covers the construction site is a challenging task as it can be large, slowly changing over time, and contain dynamic objects. Existing approaches are either exploration approaches that require a long time to explore the entire building, object scanning approaches that are not suitable for large and complex buildings, or planning approaches that only consider 2D coverage. In this paper, we present a novel approach for planning an efficient 3D path for progress monitoring on large construction sites with multiple levels. By making use of an existing 3D model we ensure that all surfaces of the building are covered by the sensor payload such as a 360-degree camera or a lidar. This enables the consistent and reliable monitoring of construction site progress with an autonomous ground robot. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed planner on an artificial and a real building model, showing that much shorter paths and better coverage are achieved than with a traditional exploration planner.
abstract_zh: 在施工现场，必须持续监控进度，确保当前状态与计划状态相符，从而提高效率、安全性并及早发现施工缺陷。自主移动机器人可以以高数据质量和一致性记录施工状态。然而，找到一条完全覆盖建筑工地的路径是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它可能很大，随着时间的推移缓慢变化，并且包含动态对象。现有的方法要么是需要长时间探索整个建筑的探索方法，要么是不适合大型复杂建筑的对象扫描方法，要么是只考虑2D覆盖的规划方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，用于规划高效的 3D 路径，以对多层大型建筑工地的进度进行监控。通过利用现有的 3D 模型，我们确保建筑物的所有表面都被传感器有效负载（例如 360 度相机或激光雷达）覆盖。这样可以使用自主地面机器人对施工现场进度进行一致且可靠的监控。我们在人工和真实建筑模型上证明了所提出的规划器的有效性，表明与传统的勘探规划器相比，可以实现更短的路径和更好的覆盖范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于大型建筑工地的高效3D路径规划方法，以实现施工进度的监控。
AI.motivation: 施工进度需要持续监控以确保当前状态与计划状态一致，但现有方法存在覆盖不全、效率低或仅考虑2D覆盖的问题。
AI.method: 利用现有的3D模型，规划出能够覆盖建筑所有表面的3D路径，以确保传感器如360度摄像头或激光雷达能够有效监控施工进度。
AI.result: 在人工和真实建筑模型上验证了该方法的有效性，结果显示路径更短且覆盖效果更好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大型复杂建筑工地提供了更高效、可靠的施工进度监控方案。

authors_text: Yinlena Xu,Silverio Martínez-Fernández,Matias Martinez,Xavier Franch
title: Energy Efficiency of Training Neural Network Architectures: An Empirical Study
title_zh: 训练神经网络架构的能源效率：实证研究
comment: Accepted in HICSS 2023. For its published version refer to the Proceedings of the 56th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences; URI https://hdl.handle.net/10125/102727
comments: Accepted in HICSS 2023. For its published version refer to the Proceedings of the 56th Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences; URI https://hdl.handle.net/10125/102727
abstract: The evaluation of Deep Learning models has traditionally focused on criteria such as accuracy, F1 score, and related measures. The increasing availability of high computational power environments allows the creation of deeper and more complex models. However, the computations needed to train such models entail a large carbon footprint. In this work, we study the relations between DL model architectures and their environmental impact in terms of energy consumed and CO$_2$ emissions produced during training by means of an empirical study using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks. Concretely, we study: (i) the impact of the architecture and the location where the computations are hosted on the energy consumption and emissions produced; (ii) the trade-off between accuracy and energy efficiency; and (iii) the difference on the method of measurement of the energy consumed using software-based and hardware-based tools.
summary: The evaluation of Deep Learning models has traditionally focused on criteria such as accuracy, F1 score, and related measures. The increasing availability of high computational power environments allows the creation of deeper and more complex models. However, the computations needed to train such models entail a large carbon footprint. In this work, we study the relations between DL model architectures and their environmental impact in terms of energy consumed and CO$_2$ emissions produced during training by means of an empirical study using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks. Concretely, we study: (i) the impact of the architecture and the location where the computations are hosted on the energy consumption and emissions produced; (ii) the trade-off between accuracy and energy efficiency; and (iii) the difference on the method of measurement of the energy consumed using software-based and hardware-based tools.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的评估传统上侧重于准确性、F1 分数和相关度量等标准。高计算能力环境的可用性不断增加，允许创建更深、更复杂的模型。然而，训练此类模型所需的计算需要大量的碳足迹。在这项工作中，我们通过使用深度卷积神经网络的实证研究，研究了深度学习模型架构与其在训练过程中消耗的能源和产生的 CO$_2$ 排放方面的环境影响之间的关系。具体来说，我们研究：（i）架构和计算所在位置对能源消耗和排放的影响； (ii) 准确性和能源效率之间的权衡； (iii) 使用基于软件和基于硬件的工具测量能源消耗的方法的差异。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过实证研究分析不同神经网络架构在训练过程中的能源效率，探讨其能耗和碳排放情况。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型复杂度提升，训练过程的高能耗和碳排放问题日益突出，但现有研究多关注模型准确性而忽视环境影响。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络，通过实证研究分析架构设计、计算位置对能耗的影响，对比软件与硬件工具的测量差异，并评估准确率与能效的权衡关系。
AI.result: 发现模型架构和计算位置显著影响能耗及碳排放，准确率与能效存在权衡，软件工具与硬件工具的测量结果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 需在模型设计中综合考虑能效与准确率，建议采用更环保的训练策略，并重视测量工具的准确性以评估真实环境影响。
