motivation: 随着深度学习模型复杂度提升，训练过程的高能耗和碳排放问题日益突出，但现有研究多关注模型准确性而忽视环境影响。
method: 采用深度卷积神经网络，通过实证研究分析架构设计、计算位置对能耗的影响，对比软件与硬件工具的测量差异，并评估准确率与能效的权衡关系。
result: 发现模型架构和计算位置显著影响能耗及碳排放，准确率与能效存在权衡，软件工具与硬件工具的测量结果存在差异。
conclusion: 需在模型设计中综合考虑能效与准确率，建议采用更环保的训练策略，并重视测量工具的准确性以评估真实环境影响。
search_text: Energy Efficiency of Training Neural Network Architectures: An Empirical Study 训练神经网络架构的能源效率：实证研究 The evaluation of Deep Learning models has traditionally focused on criteria such as accuracy, F1 score, and related measures. The increasing availability of high computational power environments allows the creation of deeper and more complex models. However, the computations needed to train such models entail a large carbon footprint. In this work, we study the relations between DL model architectures and their environmental impact in terms of energy consumed and CO$_2$ emissions produced during training by means of an empirical study using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks. Concretely, we study: (i) the impact of the architecture and the location where the computations are hosted on the energy consumption and emissions produced; (ii) the trade-off between accuracy and energy efficiency; and (iii) the difference on the method of measurement of the energy consumed using software-based and hardware-based tools. 深度学习模型的评估传统上侧重于准确性、F1 分数和相关度量等标准。高计算能力环境的可用性不断增加，允许创建更深、更复杂的模型。然而，训练此类模型所需的计算需要大量的碳足迹。在这项工作中，我们通过使用深度卷积神经网络的实证研究，研究了深度学习模型架构与其在训练过程中消耗的能源和产生的 CO$_2$ 排放方面的环境影响之间的关系。具体来说，我们研究：（i）架构和计算所在位置对能源消耗和排放的影响； (ii) 准确性和能源效率之间的权衡； (iii) 使用基于软件和基于硬件的工具测量能源消耗的方法的差异。 本论文通过实证研究分析不同神经网络架构在训练过程中的能源效率，探讨其能耗和碳排放情况。 Yinlena Xu,Silverio Martínez-Fernández,Matias Martinez,Xavier Franch cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Minghuan Liu,Tairan He,Weinan Zhang,Shuicheng Yan,Zhongwen Xu
title: Visual Imitation Learning with Patch Rewards
title_zh: 带有补丁奖励的视觉模仿学习
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. 18 pages, 14 figures, 2 tables. Codes are available at https://github.com/sail-sg/PatchAIL
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. 18 pages, 14 figures, 2 tables. Codes are available at https://github.com/sail-sg/PatchAIL
abstract: Visual imitation learning enables reinforcement learning agents to learn to behave from expert visual demonstrations such as videos or image sequences, without explicit, well-defined rewards. Previous research either adopted supervised learning techniques or induce simple and coarse scalar rewards from pixels, neglecting the dense information contained in the image demonstrations. In this work, we propose to measure the expertise of various local regions of image samples, or called \textit{patches}, and recover multi-dimensional \textit{patch rewards} accordingly. Patch reward is a more precise rewarding characterization that serves as a fine-grained expertise measurement and visual explainability tool. Specifically, we present Adversarial Imitation Learning with Patch Rewards (PatchAIL), which employs a patch-based discriminator to measure the expertise of different local parts from given images and provide patch rewards. The patch-based knowledge is also used to regularize the aggregated reward and stabilize the training. We evaluate our method on DeepMind Control Suite and Atari tasks. The experiment results have demonstrated that PatchAIL outperforms baseline methods and provides valuable interpretations for visual demonstrations.
summary: Visual imitation learning enables reinforcement learning agents to learn to behave from expert visual demonstrations such as videos or image sequences, without explicit, well-defined rewards. Previous research either adopted supervised learning techniques or induce simple and coarse scalar rewards from pixels, neglecting the dense information contained in the image demonstrations. In this work, we propose to measure the expertise of various local regions of image samples, or called \textit{patches}, and recover multi-dimensional \textit{patch rewards} accordingly. Patch reward is a more precise rewarding characterization that serves as a fine-grained expertise measurement and visual explainability tool. Specifically, we present Adversarial Imitation Learning with Patch Rewards (PatchAIL), which employs a patch-based discriminator to measure the expertise of different local parts from given images and provide patch rewards. The patch-based knowledge is also used to regularize the aggregated reward and stabilize the training. We evaluate our method on DeepMind Control Suite and Atari tasks. The experiment results have demonstrated that PatchAIL outperforms baseline methods and provides valuable interpretations for visual demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 视觉模仿学习使强化学习代理能够从视频或图像序列等专家视觉演示中学习行为，而无需明确的、明确定义的奖励。以前的研究要么采用监督学习技术，要么从像素中引入简单和粗略的标量奖励，忽略了图像演示中包含的密集信息。在这项工作中，我们建议测量图像样本的各个局部区域的专业知识，或称为 \textit{patches}，并相应地恢复多维 \textit{patch 奖励}。补丁奖励是一种更精确的奖励特征，可作为细粒度的专业知识测量和视觉可解释性工具。具体来说，我们提出了带有补丁奖励的对抗性模仿学习（PatchAIL），它采用基于补丁的鉴别器来衡量给定图像中不同局部部分的专业知识并提供补丁奖励。基于补丁的知识还用于规范聚合奖励并稳定训练。我们在 DeepMind Control Suite 和 Atari 任务上评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，PatchAIL 优于基线方法，并为视觉演示提供了有价值的解释。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于图像局部区域奖励的视觉模仿学习方法，通过细粒度奖励提升强化学习代理的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉模仿学习方法依赖监督学习或粗粒度标量奖励，未能有效利用图像中密集的局部信息，导致奖励特征粗糙且缺乏解释性。
AI.method: 提出Adversarial Imitation Learning with Patch Rewards（PatchAIL），利用基于图像块的判别器生成多维块奖励，通过局部区域专家水平衡量实现细粒度奖励，并用于正则化聚合奖励以稳定训练。
AI.result: 在DeepMind Control Suite和Atari任务中，PatchAIL优于基线方法，且能为视觉示范提供可解释的局部区域奖励分析。
AI.conclusion: 块奖励机制有效提升了视觉模仿学习的性能与可解释性，未来可探索更复杂的块特征建模与跨任务迁移应用。

authors_text: Jianqing Zhu,Juncai He,Lian Zhang,Jinchao Xu
title: FV-MgNet: Fully Connected V-cycle MgNet for Interpretable Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: FV-MgNet：用于可解释时间序列预测的全连接 V 循环 MgNet
abstract: By investigating iterative methods for a constrained linear model, we propose a new class of fully connected V-cycle MgNet for long-term time series forecasting, which is one of the most difficult tasks in forecasting. MgNet is a CNN model that was proposed for image classification based on the multigrid (MG) methods for solving discretized partial differential equations (PDEs). We replace the convolutional operations with fully connected operations in the existing MgNet and then apply them to forecasting problems. Motivated by the V-cycle structure in MG, we further propose the FV-MgNet, a V-cycle version of the fully connected MgNet, to extract features hierarchically. By evaluating the performance of FV-MgNet on popular data sets and comparing it with state-of-the-art models, we show that the FV-MgNet achieves better results with less memory usage and faster inference speed. In addition, we develop ablation experiments to demonstrate that the structure of FV-MgNet is the best choice among the many variants.
summary: By investigating iterative methods for a constrained linear model, we propose a new class of fully connected V-cycle MgNet for long-term time series forecasting, which is one of the most difficult tasks in forecasting. MgNet is a CNN model that was proposed for image classification based on the multigrid (MG) methods for solving discretized partial differential equations (PDEs). We replace the convolutional operations with fully connected operations in the existing MgNet and then apply them to forecasting problems. Motivated by the V-cycle structure in MG, we further propose the FV-MgNet, a V-cycle version of the fully connected MgNet, to extract features hierarchically. By evaluating the performance of FV-MgNet on popular data sets and comparing it with state-of-the-art models, we show that the FV-MgNet achieves better results with less memory usage and faster inference speed. In addition, we develop ablation experiments to demonstrate that the structure of FV-MgNet is the best choice among the many variants.
abstract_zh: 通过研究约束线性模型的迭代方法，我们提出了一类新型全连接 V 循环 MgNet，用于长期时间序列预测，这是预测中最困难的任务之一。 MgNet 是一种基于多重网格 (MG) 方法求解离散偏微分方程 (PDE) 的图像分类 CNN 模型。我们用现有 MgNet 中的全连接运算替换卷积运算，然后将其应用于预测问题。受 MG 中 V 循环结构的启发，我们进一步提出了 FV-MgNet，这是全连接 MgNet 的 V 循环版本，用于分层提取特征。通过评估 FV-MgNet 在流行数据集上的性能并将其与最先进的模型进行比较，我们表明 FV-MgNet 以更少的内存使用和更快的推理速度取得了更好的结果。此外，我们还开展了消融实验，以证明 FV-MgNet 的结构是众多变体中的最佳选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全连接V循环结构的MgNet模型（FV-MgNet），用于可解释的长期时间序列预测。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测模型在长期预测中表现不足，而MgNet虽基于多网格方法有效，但其卷积结构限制了适用性。为提升预测性能并降低计算资源消耗，需设计更高效的全连接结构。
AI.method: 将MgNet的卷积操作替换为全连接操作，并引入V循环多网格结构实现分层特征提取，构建FV-MgNet模型。通过消融实验验证结构有效性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，FV-MgNet相较先进模型取得更优预测结果，同时内存占用更低且推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: FV-MgNet通过全连接V循环结构有效解决了长期时间序列预测难题，其设计在性能与效率上均优于其他变体。

authors_text: Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Teli Ma,Mingbao Lin,Hao Dong,Baochang Zhang,Peng Gao,Jinhu Lv
title: Resilient Binary Neural Network
title_zh: 弹性二元神经网络
abstract: Binary neural networks (BNNs) have received ever-increasing popularity for their great capability of reducing storage burden as well as quickening inference time. However, there is a severe performance drop compared with real-valued networks, due to its intrinsic frequent weight oscillation during training. In this paper, we introduce a Resilient Binary Neural Network (ReBNN) to mitigate the frequent oscillation for better BNNs' training. We identify that the weight oscillation mainly stems from the non-parametric scaling factor. To address this issue, we propose to parameterize the scaling factor and introduce a weighted reconstruction loss to build an adaptive training objective. For the first time, we show that the weight oscillation is controlled by the balanced parameter attached to the reconstruction loss, which provides a theoretical foundation to parameterize it in back propagation. Based on this, we learn our ReBNN by calculating the balanced parameter based on its maximum magnitude, which can effectively mitigate the weight oscillation with a resilient training process. Extensive experiments are conducted upon various network models, such as ResNet and Faster-RCNN for computer vision, as well as BERT for natural language processing. The results demonstrate the overwhelming performance of our ReBNN over prior arts. For example, our ReBNN achieves 66.9% Top-1 accuracy with ResNet-18 backbone on the ImageNet dataset, surpassing existing state-of-the-arts by a significant margin. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/SteveTsui/ReBNN.
summary: Binary neural networks (BNNs) have received ever-increasing popularity for their great capability of reducing storage burden as well as quickening inference time. However, there is a severe performance drop compared with real-valued networks, due to its intrinsic frequent weight oscillation during training. In this paper, we introduce a Resilient Binary Neural Network (ReBNN) to mitigate the frequent oscillation for better BNNs' training. We identify that the weight oscillation mainly stems from the non-parametric scaling factor. To address this issue, we propose to parameterize the scaling factor and introduce a weighted reconstruction loss to build an adaptive training objective. For the first time, we show that the weight oscillation is controlled by the balanced parameter attached to the reconstruction loss, which provides a theoretical foundation to parameterize it in back propagation. Based on this, we learn our ReBNN by calculating the balanced parameter based on its maximum magnitude, which can effectively mitigate the weight oscillation with a resilient training process. Extensive experiments are conducted upon various network models, such as ResNet and Faster-RCNN for computer vision, as well as BERT for natural language processing. The results demonstrate the overwhelming performance of our ReBNN over prior arts. For example, our ReBNN achieves 66.9% Top-1 accuracy with ResNet-18 backbone on the ImageNet dataset, surpassing existing state-of-the-arts by a significant margin. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/SteveTsui/ReBNN.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络（BNN）因其减轻存储负担和加快推理时间的强大能力而越来越受欢迎。然而，由于训练过程中固有的频繁权重波动，与实值网络相比，性能严重下降。在本文中，我们引入了弹性二元神经网络（ReBNN）来减轻频繁振荡，从而实现更好的 BNN 训练。我们发现权重振荡主要源于非参数缩放因子。为了解决这个问题，我们建议参数化缩放因子并引入加权重建损失来构建自适应训练目标。我们首次证明权重振荡是由附加到重建损失的平衡参数控制的，这为反向传播中的参数化提供了理论基础。基于此，我们通过根据其最大幅度计算平衡参数来学习我们的ReBNN，这可以通过弹性训练过程有效地减轻权重振荡。对各种网络模型进行了大量实验，例如用于计算机视觉的 ResNet 和 Faster-RCNN，以及用于自然语言处理的 BERT。结果表明，我们的 ReBNN 相对于现有技术具有压倒性的性能。例如，我们的 ReBNN 在 ImageNet 数据集上使用 ResNet-18 主干网实现了 66.9% 的 Top-1 准确率，大大超过了现有的最先进技术。我们的代码在 https://github.com/SteveTsui/ReBNN 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ReBNN的二值神经网络，旨在通过缓解训练中的权重震荡问题来提升二值网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 二值神经网络（BNN）虽具高效推理优势，但因训练过程中权重频繁震荡导致性能显著下降，现有方法未能有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过参数化非参数缩放因子并引入加权重建损失，构建自适应训练目标，利用平衡参数控制权重震荡，实现鲁棒训练过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，基于ResNet-18的ReBNN达到66.9% Top-1准确率，优于现有最先进方法；并在多个模型和任务中验证了优越性能。
AI.conclusion: ReBNN通过理论分析与参数化设计有效抑制权重震荡，为二值神经网络的训练提供了新思路和实用方案。

authors_text: Sajad Sotudeh,Nazli Goharian,Hanieh Deilamsalehy,Franck Dernoncourt
title: Curriculum-guided Abstractive Summarization for Mental Health Online Posts
title_zh: 课程引导的心理健康在线帖子抽象总结
comment: 4 pages, short paper, accepted to The 13th International Workshop on Health Text Mining and Information Analysis (LOUHI 2022)
comments: 4 pages, short paper, accepted to The 13th International Workshop on Health Text Mining and Information Analysis (LOUHI 2022)
abstract: Automatically generating short summaries from users' online mental health posts could save counselors' reading time and reduce their fatigue so that they can provide timely responses to those seeking help for improving their mental state. Recent Transformers-based summarization models have presented a promising approach to abstractive summarization. They go beyond sentence selection and extractive strategies to deal with more complicated tasks such as novel word generation and sentence paraphrasing. Nonetheless, these models have a prominent shortcoming; their training strategy is not quite efficient, which restricts the model's performance. In this paper, we include a curriculum learning approach to reweigh the training samples, bringing about an efficient learning procedure. We apply our model on extreme summarization dataset of MentSum posts -- a dataset of mental health related posts from Reddit social media. Compared to the state-of-the-art model, our proposed method makes substantial gains in terms of Rouge and Bertscore evaluation metrics, yielding 3.5% (Rouge-1), 10.4% (Rouge-2), and 4.7% (Rouge-L), 1.5% (Bertscore) relative improvements.
summary: Automatically generating short summaries from users' online mental health posts could save counselors' reading time and reduce their fatigue so that they can provide timely responses to those seeking help for improving their mental state. Recent Transformers-based summarization models have presented a promising approach to abstractive summarization. They go beyond sentence selection and extractive strategies to deal with more complicated tasks such as novel word generation and sentence paraphrasing. Nonetheless, these models have a prominent shortcoming; their training strategy is not quite efficient, which restricts the model's performance. In this paper, we include a curriculum learning approach to reweigh the training samples, bringing about an efficient learning procedure. We apply our model on extreme summarization dataset of MentSum posts -- a dataset of mental health related posts from Reddit social media. Compared to the state-of-the-art model, our proposed method makes substantial gains in terms of Rouge and Bertscore evaluation metrics, yielding 3.5% (Rouge-1), 10.4% (Rouge-2), and 4.7% (Rouge-L), 1.5% (Bertscore) relative improvements.
abstract_zh: 自动从用户的在线心理健康帖子中生成简短的摘要可以节省咨询师的阅读时间并减少他们的疲劳，以便他们能够及时回复那些寻求帮助以改善心理状态的人。最近基于 Transformers 的摘要模型提出了一种有前途的抽象摘要方法。它们超越了句子选择和提取策略来处理更复杂的任务，例如新词生成和句子释义。尽管如此，这些模型都有一个突出的缺点：他们的训练策略不太有效，这限制了模型的性能。在本文中，我们采用了一种课程学习方法来重新权衡训练样本，从而实现高效的学习过程。我们将我们的模型应用于 MentSum 帖子的极端总结数据集——来自 Reddit 社交媒体的心理健康相关帖子的数据集。与最先进的模型相比，我们提出的方法在 Rouge 和 Bertscore 评估指标方面取得了实质性进展，相对提高了 3.5% (Rouge-1)、10.4% (Rouge-2) 和 4.7% (Rouge-L)、1.5% (Bertscore)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于课程学习的抽象摘要方法，用于生成心理健康相关在线帖子的短摘要，以提高咨询师的工作效率。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer摘要模型训练效率低下，难以有效处理心理健康领域复杂多变的文本内容，需改进训练策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 引入课程学习机制对训练样本进行动态加权，结合MentSum数据集（来自Reddit的心理健康帖子）进行模型训练与优化。
AI.result: 在Rouge-1/Rouge-2/Rouge-L/Bertscore指标上分别实现3.5%/10.4%/4.7%/1.5%的相对提升，优于当前最优模型。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习策略能有效提升心理健康文本摘要质量，为咨询师提供更高效、准确的文本处理工具。

authors_text: Meng Zhao,Yifan Hu,Ruixuan Jiang,Yuanli Zhao,Dong Zhang,Yan Zhang,Rong Wang,Yong Cao,Qian Zhang,Yonggang Ma,Jiaxi Li,Shaochen Yu,Wenjie Li,Ran Zhang,Yefeng Zheng,Shuo Wang,Jizong Zhao
title: Deep-Learning Tool for Early Identifying Non-Traumatic Intracranial Hemorrhage Etiology based on CT Scan
title_zh: 基于CT扫描早期识别非外伤性颅内出血病因的深度学习工具
abstract: Background: To develop an artificial intelligence system that can accurately identify acute non-traumatic intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) etiology based on non-contrast CT (NCCT) scans and investigate whether clinicians can benefit from it in a diagnostic setting. Materials and Methods: The deep learning model was developed with 1868 eligible NCCT scans with non-traumatic ICH collected between January 2011 and April 2018. We tested the model on two independent datasets (TT200 and SD 98) collected after April 2018. The model's diagnostic performance was compared with clinicians's performance. We further designed a simulated study to compare the clinicians's performance with and without the deep learning system augmentation. Results: The proposed deep learning system achieved area under the receiver operating curve of 0.986 (95% CI 0.967-1.000) on aneurysms, 0.952 (0.917-0.987) on hypertensive hemorrhage, 0.950 (0.860-1.000) on arteriovenous malformation (AVM), 0.749 (0.586-0.912) on Moyamoya disease (MMD), 0.837 (0.704-0.969) on cavernous malformation (CM), and 0.839 (0.722-0.959) on other causes in TT200 dataset. Given a 90% specificity level, the sensitivities of our model were 97.1% and 90.9% for aneurysm and AVM diagnosis, respectively. The model also shows an impressive generalizability in an independent dataset SD98. The clinicians achieve significant improvements in the sensitivity, specificity, and accuracy of diagnoses of certain hemorrhage etiologies with proposed system augmentation. Conclusions: The proposed deep learning algorithms can be an effective tool for early identification of hemorrhage etiologies based on NCCT scans. It may also provide more information for clinicians for triage and further imaging examination selection.

Conclusions: The proposed deep learning algorithms can be an effective tool for early identification of hemorrhage etiologies based on NCCT scans. It may also provide more information for clinicians for triage and further imaging examination selection.
abstract_zh: 背景：开发一种人工智能系统，能够基于非增强 CT (NCCT) 扫描准确识别急性非外伤性颅内出血 (ICH) 病因，并研究临床医生是否可以在诊断环境中从中受益。材料和方法：深度学习模型是利用 2011 年 1 月至 2018 年 4 月期间收集的 1868 份符合条件的非创伤性 ICH NCCT 扫描开发的。我们在 2018 年 4 月后收集的两个独立数据集（TT200 和 SD 98）上测试了该模型。将该模型的诊断性能与临床医生的表现进行了比较。我们进一步设计了一项模拟研究，以比较临床医生在使用和不使用深度学习系统增强的情况下的表现。结果：所提出的深度学习系统在动脉瘤方面的受试者工作曲线下面积为 0.986 (95% CI 0.967-1.000)，在高血压出血方面为 0.952 (0.917-0.987)，在动静脉畸形 (AVM) 方面为 0.950 (0.860-1.000)，在动静脉畸形 (AVM) 方面为 0.749 TT200 数据集中，烟雾病 (MMD) 为 (0.586-0.912)，海绵状血管瘤 (CM) 为 0.837 (0.704-0.969)，其他原因为 0.839 (0.722-0.959)。鉴于 90% 的特异性水平，我们的模型对动脉瘤和 AVM 诊断的敏感性分别为 97.1% 和 90.9%。该模型还在独立数据集 SD98 中显示出令人印象深刻的通用性。通过所提出的系统增强，临床医生可以显着提高某些出血病因诊断的敏感性、特异性和准确性。结论：所提出的深度学习算法可以成为基于 NCCT 扫描早期识别出血病因的有效工具。它还可以为临床医生进行分类和进一步影像检查选择提供更多信息。

AI.tldr: 开发基于非增强CT扫描的深度学习系统，用于早期识别非创伤性颅内出血病因，并评估其在临床诊断中的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 非创伤性颅内出血病因复杂，传统诊断依赖医生经验且耗时，亟需高效准确的辅助工具以提升诊疗效率和患者预后。
AI.method: 使用2011-2018年间1868例非创伤性颅内出血的NCCT扫描数据训练深度学习模型，于2018年后独立数据集TT200和SD98验证性能，并通过模拟研究对比医生使用与不使用该系统时的诊断表现。
AI.result: 模型在TT200数据集上对动脉瘤、高血压性出血、动静脉畸形等病因的AUC分别达0.986、0.952、0.950，临床医生使用系统后敏感度、特异度及准确率均显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习算法可有效辅助早期识别颅内出血病因，为临床分诊及后续影像检查提供可靠依据。

search_text: Deep-Learning Tool for Early Identifying Non-Traumatic Intracranial Hemorrhage Etiology based on CT Scan 基于CT扫描早期识别非外伤性颅内出血病因的深度学习工具 Background: To develop an artificial intelligence system that can accurately identify acute non-traumatic intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) etiology based on non-contrast CT (NCCT) scans and investigate whether clinicians can benefit from it in a diagnostic setting. Materials and Methods: The deep learning model was developed with 1868 eligible NCCT scans with non-traumatic ICH collected between January 2011 and April 2018. We tested the model on two independent datasets (TT200 and SD 98) collected after April 2018. The model's diagnostic performance was compared with clinicians's performance. We further designed a simulated study to compare the clinicians's performance with and without the deep learning system augmentation. Results: The proposed deep learning system achieved area under the receiver operating curve of 0.986 (95% CI 0.967-1.000) on aneurysms, 0.952 (0.917-0.987) on hypertensive hemorrhage, 0.950 (0.860-1.000) on arteriovenous malformation (AVM), 0.749 (0.586-0.912) on Moyamoya disease (MMD), 0.837 (0.704-0.969) on cavernous malformation (CM), and 0.839 (0.722-0.959) on other causes in TT200 dataset. Given a 90% specificity level, the sensitivities of our model were 97.1% and 90.9% for aneurysm and AVM diagnosis, respectively. The model also shows an impressive generalizability in an independent dataset SD98. The clinicians achieve significant improvements in the sensitivity, specificity, and accuracy of diagnoses of certain hemorrhage etiologies with proposed system augmentation. Conclusions: The proposed deep learning algorithms can be an effective tool for early identification of hemorrhage etiologies based on NCCT scans. It may also provide more information for clinicians for triage and further imaging examination selection. 背景：开发一种人工智能系统，能够基于非增强 CT (NCCT) 扫描准确识别急性非外伤性颅内出血 (ICH) 病因，并研究临床医生是否可以在诊断环境中从中受益。材料和方法：深度学习模型是利用 2011 年 1 月至 2018 年 4 月期间收集的 1868 份符合条件的非创伤性 ICH NCCT 扫描开发的。我们在 2018 年 4 月后收集的两个独立数据集（TT200 和 SD 98）上测试了该模型。将该模型的诊断性能与临床医生的表现进行了比较。我们进一步设计了一项模拟研究，以比较临床医生在使用和不使用深度学习系统增强的情况下的表现。结果：所提出的深度学习系统在动脉瘤方面的受试者工作曲线下面积为 0.986 (95% CI 0.967-1.000)，在高血压出血方面为 0.952 (0.917-0.987)，在动静脉畸形 (AVM) 方面为 0.950 (0.860-1.000)，在动静脉畸形 (AVM) 方面为 0.749 TT200 数据集中，烟雾病 (MMD) 为 (0.586-0.912)，海绵状血管瘤 (CM) 为 0.837 (0.704-0.969)，其他原因为 0.839 (0.722-0.959)。鉴于 90% 的特异性水平，我们的模型对动脉瘤和 AVM 诊断的敏感性分别为 97.1% 和 90.9%。该模型还在独立数据集 SD98 中显示出令人印象深刻的通用性。通过所提出的系统增强，临床医生可以显着提高某些出血病因诊断的敏感性、特异性和准确性。结论：所提出的深度学习算法可以成为基于 NCCT 扫描早期识别出血病因的有效工具。它还可以为临床医生进行分类和进一步影像检查选择提供更多信息。 开发基于非增强CT扫描的深度学习系统，用于早期识别非创伤性颅内出血病因，并评估其在临床诊断中的应用价值。 Meng Zhao,Yifan Hu,Ruixuan Jiang,Yuanli Zhao,Dong Zhang,Yan Zhang,Rong Wang,Yong Cao,Qian Zhang,Yonggang Ma,Jiaxi Li,Shaochen Yu,Wenjie Li,Ran Zhang,Yefeng Zheng,Shuo Wang,Jizong Zhao eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Weimin Shi,Mingchen Zhuge,Dehong Gao,Zhong Zhou,Ming-Ming Cheng,Deng-Ping Fan
title: QR-CLIP: Introducing Explicit Open-World Knowledge for Location and Time Reasoning
title_zh: QR-CLIP：引入显式开放世界知识进行位置和时间推理
abstract: Daily images may convey abstract meanings that require us to memorize and infer profound information from them. To encourage such human-like reasoning, in this work, we teach machines to predict where and when it was taken rather than performing basic tasks like traditional segmentation or classification. Inspired by Horn's QR theory, we designed a novel QR-CLIP model consisting of two components: 1) the Quantity module first retrospects more open-world knowledge as the candidate language inputs; 2) the Relevance module carefully estimates vision and language cues and infers the location and time. Experiments show our QR-CLIP's effectiveness, and it outperforms the previous SOTA on each task by an average of about 10% and 130% relative lift in terms of location and time reasoning. This study lays a technical foundation for location and time reasoning and suggests that effectively introducing open-world knowledge is one of the panaceas for the tasks.
summary: Daily images may convey abstract meanings that require us to memorize and infer profound information from them. To encourage such human-like reasoning, in this work, we teach machines to predict where and when it was taken rather than performing basic tasks like traditional segmentation or classification. Inspired by Horn's QR theory, we designed a novel QR-CLIP model consisting of two components: 1) the Quantity module first retrospects more open-world knowledge as the candidate language inputs; 2) the Relevance module carefully estimates vision and language cues and infers the location and time. Experiments show our QR-CLIP's effectiveness, and it outperforms the previous SOTA on each task by an average of about 10% and 130% relative lift in terms of location and time reasoning. This study lays a technical foundation for location and time reasoning and suggests that effectively introducing open-world knowledge is one of the panaceas for the tasks.
abstract_zh: 日常图像可能传达抽象的含义，需要我们记忆并从中推断出深刻的信息。为了鼓励这种类人推理，在这项工作中，我们教机器预测拍摄地点和时间，而不是执行传统分割或分类等基本任务。受 Horn 的 QR 理论的启发，我们设计了一种新颖的 QR-CLIP 模型，由两个部分组成：1）Quantity 模块首先回顾更多开放世界的知识作为候选语言输入； 2）相关性模块仔细估计视觉和语言线索并推断位置和时间。实验证明了我们的 QR-CLIP 的有效性，并且在位置和时间推理方面，它在每项任务上都比之前的 SOTA 平均提升了约 10% 和 130% 的相对提升。这项研究为位置和时间推理奠定了技术基础，并表明有效引入开放世界知识是完成该任务的灵丹妙药之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QR-CLIP模型，通过引入显式开放世界知识，解决图像中位置和时间推理任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图像任务聚焦于分割或分类，但人类能从日常图像中推理抽象信息。作者希望机器具备类似能力，需结合开放世界知识进行位置和时间推理。
AI.method: 基于Horn的QR理论设计QR-CLIP模型：1) 量模块回顾开放世界知识作为语言输入候选；2) 相关性模块分析视觉与语言线索，推理位置和时间。
AI.result: 在位置和时间推理任务中，QR-CLIP分别平均超越现有最优方法10%和130%相对提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为位置和时间推理奠定技术基础，证明有效引入开放世界知识是解决此类任务的关键方法。

authors_text: Ji Qiu,Hongmei Shi,Yu Hen Hu,Zujun Yu
title: An optimization method for out-of-distribution anomaly detection models
title_zh: 一种超分布异常检测模型的优化方法
abstract: Frequent false alarms impede the promotion of unsupervised anomaly detection algorithms in industrial applications. Potential characteristics of false alarms depending on the trained detector are revealed by investigating density probability distributions of prediction scores in the out-of-distribution anomaly detection tasks. An SVM-based classifier is exploited as a post-processing module to identify false alarms from the anomaly map at the object level. Besides, a sample synthesis strategy is devised to incorporate fuzzy prior knowledge on the specific application in the anomaly-free training dataset. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed method comprehensively improves the performances of two segmentation models at both image and pixel levels on two industrial applications.
summary: Frequent false alarms impede the promotion of unsupervised anomaly detection algorithms in industrial applications. Potential characteristics of false alarms depending on the trained detector are revealed by investigating density probability distributions of prediction scores in the out-of-distribution anomaly detection tasks. An SVM-based classifier is exploited as a post-processing module to identify false alarms from the anomaly map at the object level. Besides, a sample synthesis strategy is devised to incorporate fuzzy prior knowledge on the specific application in the anomaly-free training dataset. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed method comprehensively improves the performances of two segmentation models at both image and pixel levels on two industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 频繁的误报阻碍了无监督异常检测算法在工业应用中的推广。通过研究分布异常检测任务中预测分数的密度概率分布，揭示了取决于受过训练的检测器的误报的潜在特征。基于 SVM 的分类器被用作后处理模块，用于从对象级别的异常图中识别错误警报。此外，还设计了样本合成策略，以将关于特定应用的模糊先验知识纳入无异常训练数据集中。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在两个工业应用中全面提高了两种分割模型在图像和像素级别的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种优化方法以减少分布外异常检测中的误报，提升工业应用中的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 无监督异常检测算法在工业中因频繁误报而难以推广，需改进检测准确性。
AI.method: 采用SVM分类器作为后处理模块识别误报，并设计样本合成策略整合应用先验知识到训练数据中。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在两个工业场景的图像和像素层级上显著提升了分割模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效减少误报，提升模型在工业应用中的检测准确性和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种优化方法以减少分布外异常检测中的误报，提升工业应用中的检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 无监督异常检测算法在工业中因频繁误报而难以推广，需改进检测准确性。
ai_content.method: 采用SVM分类器作为后处理模块识别误报，并设计样本合成策略整合应用先验知识到训练数据中。

search_text: An optimization method for out-of-distribution anomaly detection models 一种超分布异常检测模型的优化方法 Frequent false alarms impede the promotion of unsupervised anomaly detection algorithms in industrial applications. Potential characteristics of false alarms depending on the trained detector are revealed by investigating density probability distributions of prediction scores in the out-of-distribution anomaly detection tasks. An SVM-based classifier is exploited as a post-processing module to identify false alarms from the anomaly map at the object level. Besides, a sample synthesis strategy is devised to incorporate fuzzy prior knowledge on the specific application in the anomaly-free training dataset. Experimental results illustrate that the proposed method comprehensively improves the performances of two segmentation models at both image and pixel levels on two industrial applications. 频繁的误报阻碍了无监督异常检测算法在工业应用中的推广。通过研究分布异常检测任务中预测分数的密度概率分布，揭示了取决于受过训练的检测器的误报的潜在特征。基于 SVM 的分类器被用作后处理模块，用于从对象级别的异常图中识别错误警报。此外，还设计了样本合成策略，以将关于特定应用的模糊先验知识纳入无异常训练数据集中。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在两个工业应用中全面提高了两种分割模型在图像和像素级别的性能。 提出一种优化方法以减少分布外异常检测中的误报，提升工业应用中的检测性能。 Ji Qiu,Hongmei Shi,Yu Hen Hu,Zujun Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Jianqing Zhu,Juncai He,Qiumei Huang
title: An Enhanced V-cycle MgNet Model for Operator Learning in Numerical Partial Differential Equations
title_zh: 用于数值偏微分方程算子学习的增强型 V 循环 MgNet 模型
abstract: This study used a multigrid-based convolutional neural network architecture known as MgNet in operator learning to solve numerical partial differential equations (PDEs). Given the property of smoothing iterations in multigrid methods where low-frequency errors decay slowly, we introduced a low-frequency correction structure for residuals to enhance the standard V-cycle MgNet. The enhanced MgNet model can capture the low-frequency features of solutions considerably better than the standard V-cycle MgNet. The numerical results obtained using some standard operator learning tasks are better than those obtained using many state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the efficiency of our model.Moreover, numerically, our new model is more robust in case of low- and high-resolution data during training and testing, respectively.
summary: This study used a multigrid-based convolutional neural network architecture known as MgNet in operator learning to solve numerical partial differential equations (PDEs). Given the property of smoothing iterations in multigrid methods where low-frequency errors decay slowly, we introduced a low-frequency correction structure for residuals to enhance the standard V-cycle MgNet. The enhanced MgNet model can capture the low-frequency features of solutions considerably better than the standard V-cycle MgNet. The numerical results obtained using some standard operator learning tasks are better than those obtained using many state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the efficiency of our model.Moreover, numerically, our new model is more robust in case of low- and high-resolution data during training and testing, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本研究在算子学习中使用了基于多重网格的卷积神经网络架构（称为 MgNet）来求解数值偏微分方程 (PDE)。鉴于多重网格方法中低频误差衰减缓慢的平滑迭代特性，我们引入了残差的低频校正结构以增强标准 V 循环 MgNet。增强的 MgNet 模型可以比标准 V 循环 MgNet 更好地捕获解决方案的低频特征。使用一些标准算子学习任务获得的数值结果优于使用许多最先进的方法获得的数值结果，证明了我们模型的效率。此外，从数值上看，我们的新模型在训练和测试过程中分别在低分辨率和高分辨率数据的情况下更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种改进的V-cycle MgNet模型，用于数值偏微分方程（PDEs）中的算子学习任务。
AI.motivation: 多网格方法中低频误差衰减缓慢的问题导致标准MgNet模型难以有效捕捉解的低频特征，需改进以提升性能。
AI.method: 在标准V-cycle MgNet中引入低频校正结构，增强残差处理能力以更好捕捉低频特征。
AI.result: 改进模型在多个标准算子学习任务中表现优于现有方法，且在低/高分辨率数据下均具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 增强的MgNet模型通过低频校正有效提升了算子学习效率与稳定性，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Tadashi Nomoto
title: The Fewer Splits are Better: Deconstructing Readability in Sentence Splitting
title_zh: 拆分越少越好：解构句子拆分的可读性
comment: ef:The Proceedings of the Workshop on Text Simplification, Accessibility, and Readability (TSAR-2022)
comments: ef:The Proceedings of the Workshop on Text Simplification, Accessibility, and Readability (TSAR-2022)
abstract: In this work, we focus on sentence splitting, a subfield of text simplification, motivated largely by an unproven idea that if you divide a sentence in pieces, it should become easier to understand. Our primary goal in this paper is to find out whether this is true. In particular, we ask, does it matter whether we break a sentence into two or three? We report on our findings based on Amazon Mechanical Turk. More specifically, we introduce a Bayesian modeling framework to further investigate to what degree a particular way of splitting the complex sentence affects readability, along with a number of other parameters adopted from diverse perspectives, including clinical linguistics, and cognitive linguistics. The Bayesian modeling experiment provides clear evidence that bisecting the sentence leads to enhanced readability to a degree greater than what we create by trisection.
summary: In this work, we focus on sentence splitting, a subfield of text simplification, motivated largely by an unproven idea that if you divide a sentence in pieces, it should become easier to understand. Our primary goal in this paper is to find out whether this is true. In particular, we ask, does it matter whether we break a sentence into two or three? We report on our findings based on Amazon Mechanical Turk. More specifically, we introduce a Bayesian modeling framework to further investigate to what degree a particular way of splitting the complex sentence affects readability, along with a number of other parameters adopted from diverse perspectives, including clinical linguistics, and cognitive linguistics. The Bayesian modeling experiment provides clear evidence that bisecting the sentence leads to enhanced readability to a degree greater than what we create by trisection.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于句子分割，这是文本简化的一个子领域，其动机主要是一个未经证实的想法，即如果将句子分成几部分，它应该会变得更容易理解。我们本文的主要目标是查明这是否属实。我们特别要问，将一个句子分成两个或三个有什么关系吗？我们根据 Amazon Mechanical Turk 报告我们的发现。更具体地说，我们引入了贝叶斯建模框架，以进一步研究分割复杂句子的特定方式对可读性的影响程度，以及从不同角度（包括临床语言学和认知语言学）采用的许多其他参数。贝叶斯建模实验提供了明确的证据，表明将句子一分为二比三等分所带来的可读性更高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究句子分割对可读性的影响，比较二分与三分效果差异。
AI.motivation: 基于未被验证的假设：分割复杂句子可能提升可读性，需验证此假设并量化分割方式的影响程度。
AI.method: 通过Amazon Mechanical Turk进行实验，结合贝叶斯模型框架，引入临床语言学与认知语言学参数分析分割方式对可读性的具体影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，二分法比三分法更显著提升句子可读性。
AI.conclusion: 减少句子分割次数（二分优于三分）能更有效增强文本可读性。

authors_text: Haichao Zhang,We Xu,Haonan Yu
title: Policy Expansion for Bridging Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 连接线下和线上强化学习的政策扩展
abstract: Pre-training with offline data and online fine-tuning using reinforcement learning is a promising strategy for learning control policies by leveraging the best of both worlds in terms of sample efficiency and performance. One natural approach is to initialize the policy for online learning with the one trained offline. In this work, we introduce a policy expansion scheme for this task. After learning the offline policy, we use it as one candidate policy in a policy set. We then expand the policy set with another policy which will be responsible for further learning. The two policies will be composed in an adaptive manner for interacting with the environment. With this approach, the policy previously learned offline is fully retained during online learning, thus mitigating the potential issues such as destroying the useful behaviors of the offline policy in the initial stage of online learning while allowing the offline policy participate in the exploration naturally in an adaptive manner. Moreover, new useful behaviors can potentially be captured by the newly added policy through learning. Experiments are conducted on a number of tasks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/Haichao-Zhang/PEX
summary: Pre-training with offline data and online fine-tuning using reinforcement learning is a promising strategy for learning control policies by leveraging the best of both worlds in terms of sample efficiency and performance. One natural approach is to initialize the policy for online learning with the one trained offline. In this work, we introduce a policy expansion scheme for this task. After learning the offline policy, we use it as one candidate policy in a policy set. We then expand the policy set with another policy which will be responsible for further learning. The two policies will be composed in an adaptive manner for interacting with the environment. With this approach, the policy previously learned offline is fully retained during online learning, thus mitigating the potential issues such as destroying the useful behaviors of the offline policy in the initial stage of online learning while allowing the offline policy participate in the exploration naturally in an adaptive manner. Moreover, new useful behaviors can potentially be captured by the newly added policy through learning. Experiments are conducted on a number of tasks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/Haichao-Zhang/PEX
abstract_zh: 使用离线数据进行预训练并使用强化学习进行在线微调是一种很有前景的学习控制策略策略，它可以充分利用样本效率和性能方面的优点。一种自然的方法是用离线训练的策略来初始化在线学习的策略。在这项工作中，我们为此任务引入了政策扩展方案。学习完离线策略后，我们将其用作策略集中的一个候选策略。然后，我们用另一个负责进一步学习的策略来扩展策略集。这两项政策将以自适应方式组成，以便与环境互动。通过这种方法，在线学习期间可以完全保留之前离线学习的策略，从而减轻在线学习初始阶段破坏离线策略的有用行为等潜在问题，同时允许离线策略以自适应方式自然地参与探索。此外，新添加的策略可以通过学习来捕获新的有用行为。对许多任务进行了实验，结果证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Haichao-Zhang/PEX 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种策略扩展方案，用于结合离线数据预训练和在线强化学习微调，以提升策略学习的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 离线数据预训练与在线学习结合虽具潜力，但初始阶段在线学习可能破坏离线策略的有效行为，且探索效率不足。
AI.method: 在离线策略基础上构建策略集合，新增策略负责进一步学习，通过自适应组合实现环境交互，保留离线策略并促进探索。
AI.result: 在多个任务实验中验证了该方法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了在线学习初期对离线策略的破坏，同时通过新增策略捕捉新行为，提升了整体性能。

ai_content_json.method: 在离线策略基础上构建策略集合，新增策略负责进一步学习，通过自适应组合实现环境交互，保留离线策略并促进探索。
ai_content_json.result: 在多个任务实验中验证了该方法的有效性，代码已开源。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了在线学习初期对离线策略的破坏，同时通过新增策略捕捉新行为，提升了整体性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种策略扩展方案，用于结合离线数据预训练和在线强化学习微调，以提升策略学习的效率与性能。

method: 在离线策略基础上构建策略集合，新增策略负责进一步学习，通过自适应组合实现环境交互，保留离线策略并促进探索。

search_text: Policy Expansion for Bridging Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning 连接线下和线上强化学习的政策扩展 Pre-training with offline data and online fine-tuning using reinforcement learning is a promising strategy for learning control policies by leveraging the best of both worlds in terms of sample efficiency and performance. One natural approach is to initialize the policy for online learning with the one trained offline. In this work, we introduce a policy expansion scheme for this task. After learning the offline policy, we use it as one candidate policy in a policy set. We then expand the policy set with another policy which will be responsible for further learning. The two policies will be composed in an adaptive manner for interacting with the environment. With this approach, the policy previously learned offline is fully retained during online learning, thus mitigating the potential issues such as destroying the useful behaviors of the offline policy in the initial stage of online learning while allowing the offline policy participate in the exploration naturally in an adaptive manner. Moreover, new useful behaviors can potentially be captured by the newly added policy through learning. Experiments are conducted on a number of tasks and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Code is available at https://github.com/Haichao-Zhang/PEX 使用离线数据进行预训练并使用强化学习进行在线微调是一种很有前景的学习控制策略策略，它可以充分利用样本效率和性能方面的优点。一种自然的方法是用离线训练的策略来初始化在线学习的策略。在这项工作中，我们为此任务引入了政策扩展方案。学习完离线策略后，我们将其用作策略集中的一个候选策略。然后，我们用另一个负责进一步学习的策略来扩展策略集。这两项政策将以自适应方式组成，以便与环境互动。通过这种方法，在线学习期间可以完全保留之前离线学习的策略，从而减轻在线学习初始阶段破坏离线策略的有用行为等潜在问题，同时允许离线策略以自适应方式自然地参与探索。此外，新添加的策略可以通过学习来捕获新的有用行为。对许多任务进行了实验，结果证明了所提出方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Haichao-Zhang/PEX 获取 本文提出了一种策略扩展方案，用于结合离线数据预训练和在线强化学习微调，以提升策略学习的效率与性能。 Haichao Zhang,We Xu,Haonan Yu cs.AI

authors_text: Konstantin Sergeev,Anastasiya Runnova,Maxim Zhuravlev,Evgenia Sitnikova,Elizaveta Rutskova,Kirill Smirnov,Andrei Slepnev,Nadezhda Semenova
title: Simple method for detecting sleep episodes in rats ECoG using machine learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习检测大鼠 ECoG 睡眠发作的简单方法
comment: Supplementary materials are given in pp.8--9. 4 figures in the main text and 1 figure in supplementary materials. The manuscript is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: Supplementary materials are given in pp.8--9. 4 figures in the main text and 1 figure in supplementary materials. The manuscript is under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: In this paper we propose a new method for the automatic recognition of the state of behavioral sleep (BS) and waking state (WS) in freely moving rats using their electrocorticographic (ECoG) data. Three-channels ECoG signals were recorded from frontal left, frontal right and occipital right cortical areas. We employed a simple artificial neural network (ANN), in which the mean values and standard deviations of ECoG signals from two or three channels were used as inputs for the ANN. Results of wavelet-based recognition of BS/WS in the same data were used to train the ANN and evaluate correctness of our classifier. We tested different combinations of ECoG channels for detecting BS/WS. Our results showed that the accuracy of ANN classification did not depend on ECoG-channel. For any ECoG-channel, networks were trained on one rat and applied to another rat with an accuracy of at least 80~\%. Itis important that we used a very simple network topology to achieve a relatively high accuracy of classification. Our classifier was based on a simple linear combination of input signals with some weights, and these weights could be replaced by the averaged weights of all trained ANNs without decreases in classification accuracy. In all, we introduce a new sleep recognition method that does not require additional network training. It is enough to know the coefficients and the equations suggested in this paper. The proposed method showed very fast performance and simple computations, therefore it could be used in real time experiments. It might be of high demand in preclinical studies in rodents that require vigilance control or monitoring of sleep-wake patterns.
summary: In this paper we propose a new method for the automatic recognition of the state of behavioral sleep (BS) and waking state (WS) in freely moving rats using their electrocorticographic (ECoG) data. Three-channels ECoG signals were recorded from frontal left, frontal right and occipital right cortical areas. We employed a simple artificial neural network (ANN), in which the mean values and standard deviations of ECoG signals from two or three channels were used as inputs for the ANN. Results of wavelet-based recognition of BS/WS in the same data were used to train the ANN and evaluate correctness of our classifier. We tested different combinations of ECoG channels for detecting BS/WS. Our results showed that the accuracy of ANN classification did not depend on ECoG-channel. For any ECoG-channel, networks were trained on one rat and applied to another rat with an accuracy of at least 80~\%. Itis important that we used a very simple network topology to achieve a relatively high accuracy of classification. Our classifier was based on a simple linear combination of input signals with some weights, and these weights could be replaced by the averaged weights of all trained ANNs without decreases in classification accuracy. In all, we introduce a new sleep recognition method that does not require additional network training. It is enough to know the coefficients and the equations suggested in this paper. The proposed method showed very fast performance and simple computations, therefore it could be used in real time experiments. It might be of high demand in preclinical studies in rodents that require vigilance control or monitoring of sleep-wake patterns.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用皮层电图（ECoG）数据自动识别自由活动大鼠的行为睡眠（BS）和清醒状态（WS）状态的新方法。从左额叶、右额叶和右枕叶皮质区域记录三通道 ECoG 信号。我们采用了一个简单的人工神经网络 (ANN)，其中来自两个或三个通道的 ECoG 信号的平均值和标准差用作 ANN 的输入。相同数据中基于小波的 BS/WS 识别结果用于训练 ANN 并评估我们分类器的正确性。我们测试了用于检测 BS/WS 的 ECoG 通道的不同组合。我们的结果表明，ANN 分类的准确性不依赖于 ECoG 通道。对于任何 ECoG 通道，网络在一只老鼠上进行训练并应用于另一只老鼠，准确率至少为 80%%。重要的是，我们使用非常简单的网络拓扑来实现相对较高的分类精度。我们的分类器基于输入信号与某些权重的简单线性组合，并且这些权重可以替换为所有经过训练的 ANN 的平均权重，而不会降低分类精度。总之，我们引入了一种新的睡眠识别方法，不需要额外的网络训练。知道本文提出的系数和方程就足够了。该方法表现出非常快的性能和简单的计算，因此可以用于实时实验。在需要警惕控制或监测睡眠-觉醒模式的啮齿动物临床前研究中，它可能有很高的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的简单方法，用于通过大鼠的皮层脑电图（ECoG）数据自动识别其行为睡眠（BS）和清醒状态（WS）。
AI.motivation: 现有睡眠状态识别方法可能复杂或需额外训练，本文旨在开发一种高精度、低计算量的实时分类方法，适用于啮齿类动物的预临床研究。
AI.method: 采用三通道ECoG信号（额叶左、右及枕叶右），提取信号均值和标准差作为人工神经网络（ANN）输入。利用小波分析结果训练ANN，并测试不同通道组合对分类效果的影响。
AI.result: ANN分类准确率不低于80%，且不受ECoG通道影响；通过平均所有训练ANN的权重可替代单个网络，无需额外训练即可实现高精度分类。
AI.conclusion: 该方法计算简单、实时性强，可作为啮齿类动物睡眠-觉醒模式监测的有效工具，适用于需要实时警觉控制的预临床实验。

authors_text: Junbo Zhao,Xuefei Ning,Enshu Liu,Binxin Ru,Zixuan Zhou,Tianchen Zhao,Chen Chen,Jiajin Zhang,Qingmin Liao,Yu Wang
title: Dynamic Ensemble of Low-fidelity Experts: Mitigating NAS "Cold-Start"
title_zh: 低保真专家的动态集合：缓解 NAS“冷启动”
abstract: Predictor-based Neural Architecture Search (NAS) employs an architecture performance predictor to improve the sample efficiency. However, predictor-based NAS suffers from the severe ``cold-start'' problem, since a large amount of architecture-performance data is required to get a working predictor. In this paper, we focus on exploiting information in cheaper-to-obtain performance estimations (i.e., low-fidelity information) to mitigate the large data requirements of predictor training. Despite the intuitiveness of this idea, we observe that using inappropriate low-fidelity information even damages the prediction ability and different search spaces have different preferences for low-fidelity information types. To solve the problem and better fuse beneficial information provided by different types of low-fidelity information, we propose a novel dynamic ensemble predictor framework that comprises two steps. In the first step, we train different sub-predictors on different types of available low-fidelity information to extract beneficial knowledge as low-fidelity experts. In the second step, we learn a gating network to dynamically output a set of weighting coefficients conditioned on each input neural architecture, which will be used to combine the predictions of different low-fidelity experts in a weighted sum. The overall predictor is optimized on a small set of actual architecture-performance data to fuse the knowledge from different low-fidelity experts to make the final prediction. We conduct extensive experiments across five search spaces with different architecture encoders under various experimental settings. Our method can easily be incorporated into existing predictor-based NAS frameworks to discover better architectures.
summary: Predictor-based Neural Architecture Search (NAS) employs an architecture performance predictor to improve the sample efficiency. However, predictor-based NAS suffers from the severe ``cold-start'' problem, since a large amount of architecture-performance data is required to get a working predictor. In this paper, we focus on exploiting information in cheaper-to-obtain performance estimations (i.e., low-fidelity information) to mitigate the large data requirements of predictor training. Despite the intuitiveness of this idea, we observe that using inappropriate low-fidelity information even damages the prediction ability and different search spaces have different preferences for low-fidelity information types. To solve the problem and better fuse beneficial information provided by different types of low-fidelity information, we propose a novel dynamic ensemble predictor framework that comprises two steps. In the first step, we train different sub-predictors on different types of available low-fidelity information to extract beneficial knowledge as low-fidelity experts. In the second step, we learn a gating network to dynamically output a set of weighting coefficients conditioned on each input neural architecture, which will be used to combine the predictions of different low-fidelity experts in a weighted sum. The overall predictor is optimized on a small set of actual architecture-performance data to fuse the knowledge from different low-fidelity experts to make the final prediction. We conduct extensive experiments across five search spaces with different architecture encoders under various experimental settings. Our method can easily be incorporated into existing predictor-based NAS frameworks to discover better architectures.
abstract_zh: 基于预测器的神经架构搜索（NAS）采用架构性能预测器来提高样本效率。然而，基于预测器的 NAS 面临着严重的“冷启动”问题，因为需要大量的架构性能数据才能获得有效的预测器。在本文中，我们专注于利用以更便宜的方式获得性能估计的信息（即低保真度信息）来减轻预测器训练的大数据要求。尽管这个想法很直观，但我们观察到使用不适当的低保真信息甚至会损害预测能力，并且不同的搜索空间对低保真信息类型有不同的偏好。为了解决该问题并更好地融合不同类型的低保真信息提供的有益信息，我们提出了一种新颖的动态集成预测器框架，该框架包括两个步骤。第一步，我们根据不同类型的可用低保真信息训练不同的子预测器，以提取作为低保真专家的有益知识。在第二步中，我们学习门网络来动态输出一组以每个输入神经架构为条件的加权系数，这些系数将用于将不同低保真度专家的预测组合成加权和。整体预测器针对一小组实际架构性能数据进行优化，以融合不同低保真度专家的知识来做出最终预测。我们在不同的实验设置下使用不同架构的编码器在五个搜索空间中进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法可以轻松地合并到现有的基于预测器的 NAS 框架中，以发现更好的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态集成低保真专家的框架，通过利用易获取的低保真性能估计信息，缓解基于预测器的神经架构搜索（NAS）在冷启动阶段对大量高保真数据的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统预测器型NAS需大量高保真架构-性能数据训练预测模型，而低保真信息虽易获取但使用不当会损害预测效果，且不同搜索空间对低保真信息的偏好存在差异。
AI.method: 构建双阶段动态集成框架：1）训练多类低保真子预测器作为专家；2）设计门控网络根据输入架构动态分配权重，加权融合各专家预测结果，并在少量高保真数据上优化整体预测器。
AI.result: 在五个不同架构编码器的搜索空间中验证，方法有效提升预测性能，且可无缝集成至现有预测器型NAS框架中，显著降低冷启动阶段的数据需求。
AI.conclusion: 动态集成低保真专家框架通过自适应融合多源信息，有效缓解NAS冷启动问题，在保证搜索效率的同时提升架构发现能力，为资源受限场景提供可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种动态集成低保真专家的框架，通过利用易获取的低保真性能估计信息，缓解基于预测器的神经架构搜索（NAS）在冷启动阶段对大量高保真数据的依赖问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统预测器型NAS需大量高保真架构-性能数据训练预测模型，而低保真信息虽易获取但使用不当会损害预测效果，且不同搜索空间对低保真信息的偏好存在差异。
ai_content.method: 构建双阶段动态集成框架：1）训练多类低保真子预测器作为专家；2）设计门控网络根据输入架构动态分配权重，加权融合各专家预测结果，并在少量高保真数据上优化整体预测器。
ai_content.result: 在五个不同架构编码器的搜索空间中验证，方法有效提升预测性能，且可无缝集成至现有预测器型NAS框架中，显著降低冷启动阶段的数据需求。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态集成低保真专家框架通过自适应融合多源信息，有效缓解NAS冷启动问题，在保证搜索效率的同时提升架构发现能力，为资源受限场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Dynamic Ensemble of Low-fidelity Experts: Mitigating NAS "Cold-Start" 低保真专家的动态集合：缓解 NAS“冷启动” Predictor-based Neural Architecture Search (NAS) employs an architecture performance predictor to improve the sample efficiency. However, predictor-based NAS suffers from the severe ``cold-start'' problem, since a large amount of architecture-performance data is required to get a working predictor. In this paper, we focus on exploiting information in cheaper-to-obtain performance estimations (i.e., low-fidelity information) to mitigate the large data requirements of predictor training. Despite the intuitiveness of this idea, we observe that using inappropriate low-fidelity information even damages the prediction ability and different search spaces have different preferences for low-fidelity information types. To solve the problem and better fuse beneficial information provided by different types of low-fidelity information, we propose a novel dynamic ensemble predictor framework that comprises two steps. In the first step, we train different sub-predictors on different types of available low-fidelity information to extract beneficial knowledge as low-fidelity experts. In the second step, we learn a gating network to dynamically output a set of weighting coefficients conditioned on each input neural architecture, which will be used to combine the predictions of different low-fidelity experts in a weighted sum. The overall predictor is optimized on a small set of actual architecture-performance data to fuse the knowledge from different low-fidelity experts to make the final prediction. We conduct extensive experiments across five search spaces with different architecture encoders under various experimental settings. Our method can easily be incorporated into existing predictor-based NAS frameworks to discover better architectures. 基于预测器的神经架构搜索（NAS）采用架构性能预测器来提高样本效率。然而，基于预测器的 NAS 面临着严重的“冷启动”问题，因为需要大量的架构性能数据才能获得有效的预测器。在本文中，我们专注于利用以更便宜的方式获得性能估计的信息（即低保真度信息）来减轻预测器训练的大数据要求。尽管这个想法很直观，但我们观察到使用不适当的低保真信息甚至会损害预测能力，并且不同的搜索空间对低保真信息类型有不同的偏好。为了解决该问题并更好地融合不同类型的低保真信息提供的有益信息，我们提出了一种新颖的动态集成预测器框架，该框架包括两个步骤。第一步，我们根据不同类型的可用低保真信息训练不同的子预测器，以提取作为低保真专家的有益知识。在第二步中，我们学习门网络来动态输出一组以每个输入神经架构为条件的加权系数，这些系数将用于将不同低保真度专家的预测组合成加权和。整体预测器针对一小组实际架构性能数据进行优化，以融合不同低保真度专家的知识来做出最终预测。我们在不同的实验设置下使用不同架构的编码器在五个搜索空间中进行了广泛的实验。我们的方法可以轻松地合并到现有的基于预测器的 NAS 框架中，以发现更好的架构。 本文提出一种动态集成低保真专家的框架，通过利用易获取的低保真性能估计信息，缓解基于预测器的神经架构搜索（NAS）在冷启动阶段对大量高保真数据的依赖问题。 Junbo Zhao,Xuefei Ning,Enshu Liu,Binxin Ru,Zixuan Zhou,Tianchen Zhao,Chen Chen,Jiajin Zhang,Qingmin Liao,Yu Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xingping Dong,Jianbing Shen,Fatih Porikli,Jiebo Luo,Ling Shao
title: Adaptive Siamese Tracking with a Compact Latent Network
title_zh: 具有紧凑潜在网络的自适应连体跟踪
abstract: In this paper, we provide an intuitive viewing to simplify the Siamese-based trackers by converting the tracking task to a classification. Under this viewing, we perform an in-depth analysis for them through visual simulations and real tracking examples, and find that the failure cases in some challenging situations can be regarded as the issue of missing decisive samples in offline training. Since the samples in the initial (first) frame contain rich sequence-specific information, we can regard them as the decisive samples to represent the whole sequence. To quickly adapt the base model to new scenes, a compact latent network is presented via fully using these decisive samples. Specifically, we present a statistics-based compact latent feature for fast adjustment by efficiently extracting the sequence-specific information. Furthermore, a new diverse sample mining strategy is designed for training to further improve the discrimination ability of the proposed compact latent network. Finally, a conditional updating strategy is proposed to efficiently update the basic models to handle scene variation during the tracking phase. To evaluate the generalization ability and effectiveness and of our method, we apply it to adjust three classical Siamese-based trackers, namely SiamRPN++, SiamFC, and SiamBAN. Extensive experimental results on six recent datasets demonstrate that all three adjusted trackers obtain the superior performance in terms of the accuracy, while having high running speed.
summary: In this paper, we provide an intuitive viewing to simplify the Siamese-based trackers by converting the tracking task to a classification. Under this viewing, we perform an in-depth analysis for them through visual simulations and real tracking examples, and find that the failure cases in some challenging situations can be regarded as the issue of missing decisive samples in offline training. Since the samples in the initial (first) frame contain rich sequence-specific information, we can regard them as the decisive samples to represent the whole sequence. To quickly adapt the base model to new scenes, a compact latent network is presented via fully using these decisive samples. Specifically, we present a statistics-based compact latent feature for fast adjustment by efficiently extracting the sequence-specific information. Furthermore, a new diverse sample mining strategy is designed for training to further improve the discrimination ability of the proposed compact latent network. Finally, a conditional updating strategy is proposed to efficiently update the basic models to handle scene variation during the tracking phase. To evaluate the generalization ability and effectiveness and of our method, we apply it to adjust three classical Siamese-based trackers, namely SiamRPN++, SiamFC, and SiamBAN. Extensive experimental results on six recent datasets demonstrate that all three adjusted trackers obtain the superior performance in terms of the accuracy, while having high running speed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过将跟踪任务转换为分类来提供直观的视图来简化基于 Siamese 的跟踪器。在此视角下，我们通过视觉模拟和真实跟踪示例对它们进行了深入分析，发现一些具有挑战性的情况下的失败案例可以视为离线训练中丢失决定性样本的问题。由于初始（第一）帧中的样本包含丰富的序列特定信息，因此我们可以将它们视为代表整个序列的决定性样本。为了使基础模型快速适应新场景，充分利用这些决定性样本，提出了一个紧凑的潜在网络。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于统计的紧凑潜在特征，通过有效提取序列特定信息来快速调整。此外，设计了一种新的多样化样本挖掘策略用于训练，以进一步提高所提出的紧凑潜在网络的辨别能力。最后，提出了一种条件更新策略，以有效更新基本模型以处理跟踪阶段的场景变化。为了评估我们的方法的泛化能力和有效性，我们应用它来调整三个经典的基于 Siamese 的跟踪器，即 SiamRPN++、SiamFC 和 SiamBAN。对最近六个数据集的广泛实验结果表明，所有三种调整后的跟踪器都在准确性方面获得了优越的性能，同时具有较高的运行速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于紧凑潜层网络的自适应Siamese跟踪方法，通过利用初始帧的关键样本和统计特征提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Siamese跟踪器在复杂场景中因训练阶段缺乏关键样本导致性能下降，需通过快速适应新场景的机制提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计紧凑潜层网络提取序列特异性信息，结合统计特征进行快速调整，并引入多样化样本挖掘策略与条件更新策略优化模型适应性。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上调整后的SiamRPN++、SiamFC和SiamBAN跟踪器均取得更高的精度与运行速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过关键样本利用与网络优化有效提升了Siamese跟踪器的泛化能力与实时性能。

search_text: Adaptive Siamese Tracking with a Compact Latent Network 具有紧凑潜在网络的自适应连体跟踪 In this paper, we provide an intuitive viewing to simplify the Siamese-based trackers by converting the tracking task to a classification. Under this viewing, we perform an in-depth analysis for them through visual simulations and real tracking examples, and find that the failure cases in some challenging situations can be regarded as the issue of missing decisive samples in offline training. Since the samples in the initial (first) frame contain rich sequence-specific information, we can regard them as the decisive samples to represent the whole sequence. To quickly adapt the base model to new scenes, a compact latent network is presented via fully using these decisive samples. Specifically, we present a statistics-based compact latent feature for fast adjustment by efficiently extracting the sequence-specific information. Furthermore, a new diverse sample mining strategy is designed for training to further improve the discrimination ability of the proposed compact latent network. Finally, a conditional updating strategy is proposed to efficiently update the basic models to handle scene variation during the tracking phase. To evaluate the generalization ability and effectiveness and of our method, we apply it to adjust three classical Siamese-based trackers, namely SiamRPN++, SiamFC, and SiamBAN. Extensive experimental results on six recent datasets demonstrate that all three adjusted trackers obtain the superior performance in terms of the accuracy, while having high running speed. 在本文中，我们通过将跟踪任务转换为分类来提供直观的视图来简化基于 Siamese 的跟踪器。在此视角下，我们通过视觉模拟和真实跟踪示例对它们进行了深入分析，发现一些具有挑战性的情况下的失败案例可以视为离线训练中丢失决定性样本的问题。由于初始（第一）帧中的样本包含丰富的序列特定信息，因此我们可以将它们视为代表整个序列的决定性样本。为了使基础模型快速适应新场景，充分利用这些决定性样本，提出了一个紧凑的潜在网络。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于统计的紧凑潜在特征，通过有效提取序列特定信息来快速调整。此外，设计了一种新的多样化样本挖掘策略用于训练，以进一步提高所提出的紧凑潜在网络的辨别能力。最后，提出了一种条件更新策略，以有效更新基本模型以处理跟踪阶段的场景变化。为了评估我们的方法的泛化能力和有效性，我们应用它来调整三个经典的基于 Siamese 的跟踪器，即 SiamRPN++、SiamFC 和 SiamBAN。对最近六个数据集的广泛实验结果表明，所有三种调整后的跟踪器都在准确性方面获得了优越的性能，同时具有较高的运行速度。 本文提出一种基于紧凑潜层网络的自适应Siamese跟踪方法，通过利用初始帧的关键样本和统计特征提升跟踪性能。 Xingping Dong,Jianbing Shen,Fatih Porikli,Jiebo Luo,Ling Shao cs.CV

authors_text: Shinsaku Sakaue,Taihei Oki
title: Rethinking Warm-Starts with Predictions: Learning Predictions Close to Sets of Optimal Solutions for Faster $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-Convex Function Minimization
title_zh: 重新思考预测的热启动：学习接近最优解集的预测，以实现更快的$\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-凸函数最小化
abstract: An emerging line of work has shown that machine-learned predictions are useful to warm-start algorithms for discrete optimization problems, such as bipartite matching. Previous studies have shown time complexity bounds proportional to some distance between a prediction and an optimal solution, which we can approximately minimize by learning predictions from past optimal solutions. However, such guarantees may not be meaningful when multiple optimal solutions exist. Indeed, the dual problem of bipartite matching and, more generally, $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-convex function minimization have arbitrarily many optimal solutions, making such prediction-dependent bounds arbitrarily large. To resolve this theoretically critical issue, we present a new warm-start-with-prediction framework for $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-convex function minimization. Our framework offers time complexity bounds proportional to the distance between a prediction and the set of all optimal solutions. The main technical difficulty lies in learning predictions that are provably close to sets of all optimal solutions, for which we present an online-gradient-descent-based method. We thus give the first polynomial-time learnability of predictions that can provably warm-start algorithms regardless of multiple optimal solutions.
summary: An emerging line of work has shown that machine-learned predictions are useful to warm-start algorithms for discrete optimization problems, such as bipartite matching. Previous studies have shown time complexity bounds proportional to some distance between a prediction and an optimal solution, which we can approximately minimize by learning predictions from past optimal solutions. However, such guarantees may not be meaningful when multiple optimal solutions exist. Indeed, the dual problem of bipartite matching and, more generally, $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-convex function minimization have arbitrarily many optimal solutions, making such prediction-dependent bounds arbitrarily large. To resolve this theoretically critical issue, we present a new warm-start-with-prediction framework for $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-convex function minimization. Our framework offers time complexity bounds proportional to the distance between a prediction and the set of all optimal solutions. The main technical difficulty lies in learning predictions that are provably close to sets of all optimal solutions, for which we present an online-gradient-descent-based method. We thus give the first polynomial-time learnability of predictions that can provably warm-start algorithms regardless of multiple optimal solutions.
abstract_zh: 一项新兴的工作表明，机器学习预测对于离散优化问题（例如二分匹配）的热启动算法很有用。先前的研究表明，时间复杂度范围与预测和最优解之间的距离成正比，我们可以通过学习过去最优解的预测来近似最小化该距离。然而，当存在多个最优解时，这种保证可能没有意义。事实上，二分匹配的对偶问题，以及更一般的 $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-凸函数最小化问题具有任意多个最优解，使得这种依赖于预测的边界任意大。为了解决这个理论上的关键问题，我们提出了一种新的预测热启动框架，用于 $\text{L}$-/$\text{L}^\natural$-凸函数最小化。我们的框架提供的时间复杂度范围与预测和所有最优解决方案集之间的距离成正比。主要的技术困难在于学习可证明接近所有最优解集的预测，为此我们提出了一种基于在线梯度下降的方法。因此，我们给出了第一个多项式时间的预测可学习性，无论有多个最优解如何，都可以证明热启动算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于预测的预启动框架，用于解决存在多个最优解的L/Lⁿatural-凸函数最小化问题，通过学习接近所有最优解集合的预测来提升算法效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究中，预测与单个最优解的距离决定了预启动算法的时间复杂度，但当问题存在多个最优解时，此类保证失效。本文旨在解决这一理论关键问题，确保预启动方法在多最优解场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于在线梯度下降的学习方法，通过最小化预测与所有最优解集合之间的距离，构建新的预启动框架，从而获得与集合距离相关的多项式时间复杂度界。
AI.result: 首次实现了多项式时间可学习的预测方法，能够保证预启动算法在存在任意数量最优解的情况下仍具备理论效率保障。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为处理多最优解的凸函数最小化问题提供了理论支持，显著提升了预启动方法的适用性与鲁棒性。

search_text:
Rethinking Warm-Starts with Predictions: Learning Predictions Close to Sets of Optimal Solutions for Faster $	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-Convex Function Minimization 重新思考预测的热启动：学习接近最优解集的预测，以实现更快的$	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-凸函数最小化 An emerging line of work has shown that machine-learned predictions are useful to warm-start algorithms for discrete optimization problems, such as bipartite matching. Previous studies have shown time complexity bounds proportional to some distance between a prediction and an optimal solution, which we can approximately minimize by learning predictions from past optimal solutions. However, such guarantees may not be meaningful when multiple optimal solutions exist. Indeed, the dual problem of bipartite matching and, more generally, $	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-convex function minimization have arbitrarily many optimal solutions, making such prediction-dependent bounds arbitrarily large. To resolve this theoretically critical issue, we present a new warm-start-with-prediction framework for $	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-convex function minimization. Our framework offers time complexity bounds proportional to the distance between a prediction and the set of all optimal solutions. The main technical difficulty lies in learning predictions that are provably close to sets of all optimal solutions, for which we present an online-gradient-descent-based method. We thus give the first polynomial-time learnability of predictions that can provably warm-start algorithms regardless of multiple optimal solutions. 一项新兴的工作表明，机器学习预测对于离散优化问题（例如二分匹配）的热启动算法很有用。先前的研究表明，时间复杂度范围与预测和最优解之间的距离成正比，我们可以通过学习过去最优解的预测来近似最小化该距离。然而，当存在多个最优解时，这种保证可能没有意义。事实上，二分匹配的对偶问题，以及更一般的 $	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-凸函数最小化问题具有任意多个最优解，使得这种依赖于预测的边界任意大。为了解决这个理论上的关键问题，我们提出了一种新的预测热启动框架，用于 $	ext{L}$-/$	ext{L}^
atural$-凸函数最小化。我们的框架提供的时间复杂度范围与预测和所有最优解决方案集之间的距离成正比。主要的技术困难在于学习可证明接近所有最优解集的预测，为此我们提出了一种基于在线梯度下降的方法。因此，我们给出了第一个多项式时间的预测可学习性，无论有多个最优解如何，都可以证明热启动算法。 本文提出了一种新的基于预测的预启动框架，用于解决存在多个最优解的L/Lⁿatural-凸函数最小化问题，通过学习接近所有最优解集合的预测来提升算法效率。 Shinsaku Sakaue,Taihei Oki cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Zhuosheng Zhang,Aston Zhang,Mu Li,Hai Zhao,George Karypis,Alex Smola
title: Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning in Language Models
title_zh: 语言模型中的多模态思维链推理
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on complex reasoning by leveraging chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting to generate intermediate reasoning chains as the rationale to infer the answer. However, existing CoT studies have primarily focused on the language modality. We propose Multimodal-CoT that incorporates language (text) and vision (images) modalities into a two-stage framework that separates rationale generation and answer inference. In this way, answer inference can leverage better generated rationales that are based on multimodal information. Experimental results on ScienceQA and A-OKVQA benchmark datasets show the effectiveness of our proposed approach. With Multimodal-CoT, our model under 1 billion parameters achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ScienceQA benchmark. Our analysis indicates that Multimodal-CoT offers the advantages of mitigating hallucination and enhancing convergence speed. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/amazon-science/mm-cot.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on complex reasoning by leveraging chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting to generate intermediate reasoning chains as the rationale to infer the answer. However, existing CoT studies have primarily focused on the language modality. We propose Multimodal-CoT that incorporates language (text) and vision (images) modalities into a two-stage framework that separates rationale generation and answer inference. In this way, answer inference can leverage better generated rationales that are based on multimodal information. Experimental results on ScienceQA and A-OKVQA benchmark datasets show the effectiveness of our proposed approach. With Multimodal-CoT, our model under 1 billion parameters achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ScienceQA benchmark. Our analysis indicates that Multimodal-CoT offers the advantages of mitigating hallucination and enhancing convergence speed. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/amazon-science/mm-cot.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 通过利用思维链 (CoT) 提示生成中间推理链作为推断答案的基本原理，在复杂推理方面表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，现有的 CoT 研究主要集中在语言情态上。我们提出了 Multimodal-CoT，它将语言（文本）和视觉（图像）模态合并到一个两阶段框架中，将基本原理生成和答案推理分开。通过这种方式，答案推理可以更好地利用基于多模态信息生成的基本原理。 ScienceQA 和 A-OKVQA 基准数据集上的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。借助 Multimodal-CoT，我们的模型在 10 亿个参数下在 ScienceQA 基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的分析表明，Multimodal-CoT 具有减轻幻觉和提高收敛速度的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/amazon-science/mm-cot 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合文本和视觉模态的多模态链式推理框架（Multimodal-CoT），用于提升语言模型在复杂推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有链式推理（CoT）方法主要依赖文本模态，未能有效利用视觉等多模态信息，限制了模型的推理能力。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段生成基于多模态信息的推理链，第二阶段基于推理链推导答案，通过ScienceQA和A-OKVQA数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在ScienceQA基准测试中，10亿参数模型达到最先进水平，分析表明该方法能减少幻觉并加速收敛。
AI.conclusion: 多模态链式推理通过整合多模态信息有效提升了语言模型的推理能力，代码已开源。

authors_text: Xianyun Sun,Beibei Dong,Caiyong Wang,Bo Peng,Jing Dong
title: Visual Realism Assessment for Face-swap Videos
title_zh: 换脸视频的视觉真实感评估
abstract: Deep-learning based face-swap videos, also known as deep fakes, are becoming more and more realistic and deceiving. The malicious usage of these face-swap videos has caused wide concerns. The research community has been focusing on the automatic detection of these fake videos, but the assessment of their visual realism, as perceived by human eyes, is still an unexplored dimension. Visual realism assessment, or VRA, is essential for assessing the potential impact that may be brought by a specific face-swap video, and it is also important as a quality assessment metric to compare different face-swap methods. In this paper, we make a small step towards this new VRA direction by building a benchmark for evaluating the effectiveness of different automatic VRA models, which range from using traditional hand-crafted features to different kinds of deep-learning features. The evaluations are based on a recent competition dataset named DFGC 2022, which contains 1400 diverse face-swap videos that are annotated with Mean Opinion Scores (MOS) on visual realism. Comprehensive experiment results using 11 models and 3 protocols are shown and discussed. We demonstrate the feasibility of devising effective VRA models for assessing face-swap videos and methods. The particular usefulness of existing deepfake detection features for VRA is also noted. The code can be found at https://github.com/XianyunSun/VRA.git.
summary: Deep-learning based face-swap videos, also known as deep fakes, are becoming more and more realistic and deceiving. The malicious usage of these face-swap videos has caused wide concerns. The research community has been focusing on the automatic detection of these fake videos, but the assessment of their visual realism, as perceived by human eyes, is still an unexplored dimension. Visual realism assessment, or VRA, is essential for assessing the potential impact that may be brought by a specific face-swap video, and it is also important as a quality assessment metric to compare different face-swap methods. In this paper, we make a small step towards this new VRA direction by building a benchmark for evaluating the effectiveness of different automatic VRA models, which range from using traditional hand-crafted features to different kinds of deep-learning features. The evaluations are based on a recent competition dataset named DFGC 2022, which contains 1400 diverse face-swap videos that are annotated with Mean Opinion Scores (MOS) on visual realism. Comprehensive experiment results using 11 models and 3 protocols are shown and discussed. We demonstrate the feasibility of devising effective VRA models for assessing face-swap videos and methods. The particular usefulness of existing deepfake detection features for VRA is also noted. The code can be found at https://github.com/XianyunSun/VRA.git.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的换脸视频，也称为深度伪造，变得越来越真实和具有欺骗性。这些换脸视频的恶意使用引起了广泛关注。研究界一直致力于自动检测这些虚假视频，但评估人眼感知的视觉真实感仍然是一个尚未探索的领域。视觉真实感评估（VRA）对于评估特定换脸视频可能带来的潜在影响至关重要，并且作为质量评估指标来比较不同的换脸方法也很重要。在本文中，我们通过建立一个评估不同自动 VRA 模型有效性的基准，朝着这个新的 VRA 方向迈出了一小步，这些模型的范围从使用传统的手工特征到不同类型的深度学习特征。评估基于最近名为 DFGC 2022 的竞赛数据集，其中包含 1400 个不同的换脸视频，并用视觉真实感的平均意见得分 (MOS) 进行注释。显示并讨论了使用 11 个模型和 3 个协议的综合实验结果。我们证明了设计有效的 VRA 模型来评估换脸视频和方法的可行性。还指出了现有的 VRA 深度伪造检测功能的特别有用性。代码可以在https://github.com/XianyunSun/VRA.git找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了一个基准测试平台，用于评估不同自动视觉真实感评估（VRA）模型在换脸视频中的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管研究界关注换脸视频的自动检测，但其视觉真实感的评估仍属空白。该研究旨在填补这一空白，为评估换脸视频潜在影响提供关键指标。
AI.method: 基于DFGC 2022数据集（含1400个标注MOS分数的换脸视频），对比11种模型和3种评估协议，涵盖传统特征与深度学习特征方法。
AI.result: 实验验证了设计有效VRA模型的可行性，发现现有深度伪造检测特征对VRA具有显著价值，并公开了代码仓库。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建基准测试，论文推动了换脸视频视觉真实感评估的发展，为不同方法的比较和影响评估提供了基础。

method: 基于DFGC 2022数据集（含1400个标注MOS分数的换脸视频），对比11种模型和3种评估协议，涵盖传统特征与深度学习特征方法。
result: 实验验证了设计有效VRA模型的可行性，发现现有深度伪造检测特征对VRA具有显著价值，并公开了代码仓库。
conclusion: 通过构建基准测试，论文推动了换脸视频视觉真实感评估的发展，为不同方法的比较和影响评估提供了基础。
search_text: Visual Realism Assessment for Face-swap Videos 换脸视频的视觉真实感评估 Deep-learning based face-swap videos, also known as deep fakes, are becoming more and more realistic and deceiving. The malicious usage of these face-swap videos has caused wide concerns. The research community has been focusing on the automatic detection of these fake videos, but the assessment of their visual realism, as perceived by human eyes, is still an unexplored dimension. Visual realism assessment, or VRA, is essential for assessing the potential impact that may be brought by a specific face-swap video, and it is also important as a quality assessment metric to compare different face-swap methods. In this paper, we make a small step towards this new VRA direction by building a benchmark for evaluating the effectiveness of different automatic VRA models, which range from using traditional hand-crafted features to different kinds of deep-learning features. The evaluations are based on a recent competition dataset named DFGC 2022, which contains 1400 diverse face-swap videos that are annotated with Mean Opinion Scores (MOS) on visual realism. Comprehensive experiment results using 11 models and 3 protocols are shown and discussed. We demonstrate the feasibility of devising effective VRA models for assessing face-swap videos and methods. The particular usefulness of existing deepfake detection features for VRA is also noted. The code can be found at https://github.com/XianyunSun/VRA.git. 基于深度学习的换脸视频，也称为深度伪造，变得越来越真实和具有欺骗性。这些换脸视频的恶意使用引起了广泛关注。研究界一直致力于自动检测这些虚假视频，但评估人眼感知的视觉真实感仍然是一个尚未探索的领域。视觉真实感评估（VRA）对于评估特定换脸视频可能带来的潜在影响至关重要，并且作为质量评估指标来比较不同的换脸方法也很重要。在本文中，我们通过建立一个评估不同自动 VRA 模型有效性的基准，朝着这个新的 VRA 方向迈出了一小步，这些模型的范围从使用传统的手工特征到不同类型的深度学习特征。评估基于最近名为 DFGC 2022 的竞赛数据集，其中包含 1400 个不同的换脸视频，并用视觉真实感的平均意见得分 (MOS) 进行注释。显示并讨论了使用 11 个模型和 3 个协议的综合实验结果。我们证明了设计有效的 VRA 模型来评估换脸视频和方法的可行性。还指出了现有的 VRA 深度伪造检测功能的特别有用性。代码可以在https://github.com/XianyunSun/VRA.git找到。 该论文构建了一个基准测试平台，用于评估不同自动视觉真实感评估（VRA）模型在换脸视频中的效果。 Xianyun Sun,Beibei Dong,Caiyong Wang,Bo Peng,Jing Dong cs.CV

authors_text: Gerasimos Arvanitis,Nikolaos Stagakis,Evangelia I. Zacharaki,Konstantinos Moustakas
title: Cooperative Saliency-based Obstacle Detection and AR Rendering for Increased Situational Awareness
title_zh: 基于协作显着性的障碍物检测和 AR 渲染可增强态势感知
abstract: Autonomous vehicles are expected to operate safely in real-life road conditions in the next years. Nevertheless, unanticipated events such as the existence of unexpected objects in the range of the road, can put safety at risk. The advancement of sensing and communication technologies and Internet of Things may facilitate the recognition of hazardous situations and information exchange in a cooperative driving scheme, providing new opportunities for the increase of collaborative situational awareness. Safe and unobtrusive visualization of the obtained information may nowadays be enabled through the adoption of novel Augmented Reality (AR) interfaces in the form of windshields. Motivated by these technological opportunities, we propose in this work a saliency-based distributed, cooperative obstacle detection and rendering scheme for increasing the driver's situational awareness through (i) automated obstacle detection, (ii) AR visualization and (iii) information sharing (upcoming potential dangers) with other connected vehicles or road infrastructure. An extensive evaluation study using a variety of real datasets for pothole detection showed that the proposed method provides favorable results and features compared to other recent and relevant approaches.
summary: Autonomous vehicles are expected to operate safely in real-life road conditions in the next years. Nevertheless, unanticipated events such as the existence of unexpected objects in the range of the road, can put safety at risk. The advancement of sensing and communication technologies and Internet of Things may facilitate the recognition of hazardous situations and information exchange in a cooperative driving scheme, providing new opportunities for the increase of collaborative situational awareness. Safe and unobtrusive visualization of the obtained information may nowadays be enabled through the adoption of novel Augmented Reality (AR) interfaces in the form of windshields. Motivated by these technological opportunities, we propose in this work a saliency-based distributed, cooperative obstacle detection and rendering scheme for increasing the driver's situational awareness through (i) automated obstacle detection, (ii) AR visualization and (iii) information sharing (upcoming potential dangers) with other connected vehicles or road infrastructure. An extensive evaluation study using a variety of real datasets for pothole detection showed that the proposed method provides favorable results and features compared to other recent and relevant approaches.
abstract_zh: 预计自动驾驶汽车将在未来几年在现实道路条件下安全运行。然而，意外事件（例如道路范围内存在意外物体）可能会危及安全。传感和通信技术以及物联网的进步可以促进协作驾驶方案中危险情况的识别和信息交换，为增强协作态势感知提供新的机会。如今，通过采用挡风玻璃形式的新型增强现实 (AR) 界面，可以实现所获取信息的安全且不显眼的可视化。受这些技术机会的推动，我们在这项工作中提出了一种基于显着性的分布式、协作障碍物检测和渲染方案，通过（i）自动障碍物检测、（ii）AR可视化和（iii）与其他联网车辆或道路基础设施共享信息（即将到来的潜在危险）来提高驾驶员的态势感知。使用各种真实数据集进行坑洞检测的广泛评估研究表明，与其他最近的相关方法相比，所提出的方法提供了有利的结果和特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显著性检测的协同障碍物识别与AR渲染方案，以提升自动驾驶车辆的态势感知能力。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在真实道路环境中面临突发障碍物带来的安全风险，需通过协同感知与增强现实技术实现危险信息的可视化共享。
AI.method: 采用分布式协同架构，结合显著性检测算法实现障碍物自动识别，通过AR风挡界面进行无干扰可视化渲染，并与联网车辆/基础设施共享潜在危险信息。
AI.result: 基于多种真实数据集的坑洞检测实验表明，该方法在检测准确率和实时性方面优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方案有效提升了驾驶态势感知能力，验证了协同感知与AR可视化在智能交通系统中的应用潜力。
