search_text: Molecular Geometry-aware Transformer for accurate 3D Atomic System modeling 用于精确 3D 原子系统建模的分子几何感知 Transformer Molecular dynamic simulations are important in computational physics, chemistry, material, and biology. Machine learning-based methods have shown strong abilities in predicting molecular energy and properties and are much faster than DFT calculations. Molecular energy is at least related to atoms, bonds, bond angles, torsion angles, and nonbonding atom pairs. Previous Transformer models only use atoms as inputs which lack explicit modeling of the aforementioned factors. To alleviate this limitation, we propose Moleformer, a novel Transformer architecture that takes nodes (atoms) and edges (bonds and nonbonding atom pairs) as inputs and models the interactions among them using rotational and translational invariant geometry-aware spatial encoding. Proposed spatial encoding calculates relative position information including distances and angles among nodes and edges. We benchmark Moleformer on OC20 and QM9 datasets, and our model achieves state-of-the-art on the initial state to relaxed energy prediction of OC20 and is very competitive in QM9 on predicting quantum chemical properties compared to other Transformer and Graph Neural Network (GNN) methods which proves the effectiveness of the proposed geometry-aware spatial encoding in Moleformer. 分子动力学模拟在计算物理、化学、材料和生物学中非常重要。基于机器学习的方法在预测分子能量和性质方面表现出强大的能力，并且比 DFT 计算快得多。分子能量至少与原子、键、键角、扭转角和非键合原子对有关。以前的 Transformer 模型仅使用原子作为输入，缺乏对上述因素的明确建模。为了缓解这一限制，我们提出了 Moleformer，一种新颖的 Transformer 架构，它将节点（原子）和边缘（键和非键原子对）作为输入，并使用旋转和平移不变几何感知空间编码对它们之间的相互作用进行建模。提出的空间编码计算相对位置信息，包括节点和边缘之间的距离和角度。我们在 OC20 和 QM9 数据集上对 Moleformer 进行基准测试，我们的模型在 OC20 的初始状态到松弛能量预测方面实现了最先进的水平，并且与其他 Transformer 和图神经网络 (GNN) 方法相比，在 QM9 中预测量子化学性质方面非常有竞争力，这证明了 Moleformer 中提出的几何感知空间编码的有效性。 开发一种基于几何感知的Transformer模型，用于精确建模3D原子系统，以预测分子能量和量子化学性质。 Zheng Yuan,Yaoyun Zhang,Chuanqi Tan,Wei Wang,Fei Huang,Songfang Huang q-bio.MN,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Michael Timothy Bennett
title: Computational Dualism and Objective Superintelligence
title_zh: 计算二元论和客观超级智能
comment: Awarded "Best Student Paper" at the 17th Conference on Artificial General Intelligence, 2024
comments: Awarded "Best Student Paper" at the 17th Conference on Artificial General Intelligence, 2024
abstract: The concept of intelligent software is flawed. The behaviour of software is determined by the hardware that "interprets" it. This undermines claims regarding the behaviour of theorised, software superintelligence. Here we characterise this problem as "computational dualism", where instead of mental and physical substance, we have software and hardware. We argue that to make objective claims regarding performance we must avoid computational dualism. We propose a pancomputational alternative wherein every aspect of the environment is a relation between irreducible states. We formalise systems as behaviour (inputs and outputs), and cognition as embodied, embedded, extended and enactive. The result is cognition formalised as a part of the environment, rather than as a disembodied policy interacting with the environment through an interpreter. This allows us to make objective claims regarding intelligence, which we argue is the ability to "generalise", identify causes and adapt. We then establish objective upper bounds for intelligent behaviour. This suggests AGI will be safer, but more limited, than theorised.
summary: The concept of intelligent software is flawed. The behaviour of software is determined by the hardware that "interprets" it. This undermines claims regarding the behaviour of theorised, software superintelligence. Here we characterise this problem as "computational dualism", where instead of mental and physical substance, we have software and hardware. We argue that to make objective claims regarding performance we must avoid computational dualism. We propose a pancomputational alternative wherein every aspect of the environment is a relation between irreducible states. We formalise systems as behaviour (inputs and outputs), and cognition as embodied, embedded, extended and enactive. The result is cognition formalised as a part of the environment, rather than as a disembodied policy interacting with the environment through an interpreter. This allows us to make objective claims regarding intelligence, which we argue is the ability to "generalise", identify causes and adapt. We then establish objective upper bounds for intelligent behaviour. This suggests AGI will be safer, but more limited, than theorised.
abstract_zh: 智能软件的概念是有缺陷的。软件的行为由“解释”它的硬件决定。这破坏了有关理论化软件超级智能行为的主张。在这里，我们将这个问题描述为“计算二元论”，即我们拥有软件和硬件，而不是精神和物理实体。我们认为，为了对性能做出客观的主张，我们必须避免计算二元论。我们提出了一种泛计算替代方案，其中环境的每个方面都是不可约状态之间的关系。我们将系统形式化为行为（输入和输出），将认知形式化为体现的、嵌入的、扩展的和活跃的。结果是将认知形式化为环境的一部分，而不是通过解释器与环境互动的无形政策。这使我们能够对智力做出客观的主张，我们认为智力是“概括”、识别原因和适应的能力。然后我们为智能行为建立客观的上限。这表明通用人工智能将比理论上更安全，但也更受限制。

AI.tldr: 本文批判传统软件超级智能理论，提出计算二元论的缺陷，并构建泛计算框架以客观定义智能。
AI.motivation: 现有软件智能理论因忽视硬件对行为的决定性作用而缺乏客观性，需建立脱离计算二元论的智能评估体系。
AI.method: 通过将环境视为不可约状态关系，将认知定义为环境嵌入行为，替代传统解释器模型的智能分析范式。
AI.result: 确立智能行为的客观上限，证明AGI将比理论预期更安全但能力受限。
AI.conclusion: 泛计算框架使智能评估客观化，推动对AGI潜力的理性认知。

authors_text: Dhiraj Neupane,Aashish Bhattarai,Sunil Aryal,Mohamed Reda Bouadjenek,Uk-Min Seok,Jongwon Seok
title: SHINE: Deep Learning-Based Accessible Parking Management System
title_zh: SHINE：基于深度学习的无障碍停车管理系统
abstract: The ongoing expansion of urban areas facilitated by advancements in science and technology has resulted in a considerable increase in the number of privately owned vehicles worldwide, including in South Korea. However, this gradual increment in the number of vehicles has inevitably led to parking-related issues, including the abuse of disabled parking spaces (hereafter referred to as accessible parking spaces) designated for individuals with disabilities. Traditional license plate recognition (LPR) systems have proven inefficient in addressing such a problem in real-time due to the high frame rate of surveillance cameras, the presence of natural and artificial noise, and variations in lighting and weather conditions that impede detection and recognition by these systems. With the growing concept of parking 4.0, many sensors, IoT and deep learning-based approaches have been applied to automatic LPR and parking management systems. Nonetheless, the studies show a need for a robust and efficient model for managing accessible parking spaces in South Korea. To address this, we have proposed a novel system called, Shine, which uses the deep learning-based object detection algorithm for detecting the vehicle, license plate, and disability badges (referred to as cards, badges, or access badges hereafter) and verifies the rights of the driver to use accessible parking spaces by coordinating with the central server. Our model, which achieves a mean average precision of 92.16%, is expected to address the issue of accessible parking space abuse and contributes significantly towards efficient and effective parking management in urban environments.
summary: The ongoing expansion of urban areas facilitated by advancements in science and technology has resulted in a considerable increase in the number of privately owned vehicles worldwide, including in South Korea. However, this gradual increment in the number of vehicles has inevitably led to parking-related issues, including the abuse of disabled parking spaces (hereafter referred to as accessible parking spaces) designated for individuals with disabilities. Traditional license plate recognition (LPR) systems have proven inefficient in addressing such a problem in real-time due to the high frame rate of surveillance cameras, the presence of natural and artificial noise, and variations in lighting and weather conditions that impede detection and recognition by these systems. With the growing concept of parking 4.0, many sensors, IoT and deep learning-based approaches have been applied to automatic LPR and parking management systems. Nonetheless, the studies show a need for a robust and efficient model for managing accessible parking spaces in South Korea. To address this, we have proposed a novel system called, Shine, which uses the deep learning-based object detection algorithm for detecting the vehicle, license plate, and disability badges (referred to as cards, badges, or access badges hereafter) and verifies the rights of the driver to use accessible parking spaces by coordinating with the central server. Our model, which achieves a mean average precision of 92.16%, is expected to address the issue of accessible parking space abuse and contributes significantly towards efficient and effective parking management in urban environments.
abstract_zh: 科学技术进步推动城市地区不断扩张，导致全球（包括韩国）私家车数量大幅增加。然而，车辆数量的逐渐增加不可避免地导致了与停车相关的问题，包括滥用为残疾人指定的残疾人停车位（以下简称无障碍停车位）。事实证明，传统车牌识别 (LPR) 系统在实时解决此类问题方面效率低下，因为监控摄像头的高帧速率、自然和人工噪声的存在以及照明和天气条件的变化阻碍了这些系统的检测和识别。随着停车4.0概念的不断发展，许多传感器、物联网和基于深度学习的方法已应用于自动车牌识别和停车管理系统。尽管如此，研究表明韩国需要一个强大而有效的模型来管理无障碍停车位。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 Shine 的新颖系统，它使用基于深度学习的物体检测算法来检测车辆、车牌和残疾人证（以下简称卡、证或通行证），并通过与中央服务器协调来验证驾驶员使用无障碍停车位的权利。我们的模型平均精度达到 92.16%，有望解决无障碍停车位滥用问题，并为城市环境中高效且有效的停车管理做出重大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的SHINE系统，用于管理无障碍停车位，通过检测车辆、车牌和残疾徽章来防止滥用。
AI.motivation: 随着城市车辆数量增加，无障碍停车位被滥用的问题日益严重，传统车牌识别系统因环境噪声和光照条件限制难以高效解决该问题。
AI.method: 采用深度学习目标检测算法，结合中央服务器验证驾驶员使用无障碍停车位的权限，实现车辆、车牌及残疾徽章的联合检测。
AI.result: 该模型在测试中达到92.16%的平均精度，有效解决了无障碍停车位滥用问题。
AI.conclusion: SHINE系统为韩国城市环境下的高效停车管理提供了可靠方案，显著提升了无障碍停车位的监管效率。

search_text: SHINE: Deep Learning-Based Accessible Parking Management System SHINE：基于深度学习的无障碍停车管理系统 The ongoing expansion of urban areas facilitated by advancements in science and technology has resulted in a considerable increase in the number of privately owned vehicles worldwide, including in South Korea. However, this gradual increment in the number of vehicles has inevitably led to parking-related issues, including the abuse of disabled parking spaces (hereafter referred to as accessible parking spaces) designated for individuals with disabilities. Traditional license plate recognition (LPR) systems have proven inefficient in addressing such a problem in real-time due to the high frame rate of surveillance cameras, the presence of natural and artificial noise, and variations in lighting and weather conditions that impede detection and recognition by these systems. With the growing concept of parking 4.0, many sensors, IoT and deep learning-based approaches have been applied to automatic LPR and parking management systems. Nonetheless, the studies show a need for a robust and efficient model for managing accessible parking spaces in South Korea. To address this, we have proposed a novel system called, Shine, which uses the deep learning-based object detection algorithm for detecting the vehicle, license plate, and disability badges (referred to as cards, badges, or access badges hereafter) and verifies the rights of the driver to use accessible parking spaces by coordinating with the central server. Our model, which achieves a mean average precision of 92.16%, is expected to address the issue of accessible parking space abuse and contributes significantly towards efficient and effective parking management in urban environments. 科学技术进步推动城市地区不断扩张，导致全球（包括韩国）私家车数量大幅增加。然而，车辆数量的逐渐增加不可避免地导致了与停车相关的问题，包括滥用为残疾人指定的残疾人停车位（以下简称无障碍停车位）。事实证明，传统车牌识别 (LPR) 系统在实时解决此类问题方面效率低下，因为监控摄像头的高帧速率、自然和人工噪声的存在以及照明和天气条件的变化阻碍了这些系统的检测和识别。随着停车4.0概念的不断发展，许多传感器、物联网和基于深度学习的方法已应用于自动车牌识别和停车管理系统。尽管如此，研究表明韩国需要一个强大而有效的模型来管理无障碍停车位。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 Shine 的新颖系统，它使用基于深度学习的物体检测算法来检测车辆、车牌和残疾人证（以下简称卡、证或通行证），并通过与中央服务器协调来验证驾驶员使用无障碍停车位的权利。我们的模型平均精度达到 92.16%，有望解决无障碍停车位滥用问题，并为城市环境中高效且有效的停车管理做出重大贡献。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的SHINE系统，用于管理无障碍停车位，通过检测车辆、车牌和残疾徽章来防止滥用。 Dhiraj Neupane,Aashish Bhattarai,Sunil Aryal,Mohamed Reda Bouadjenek,Uk-Min Seok,Jongwon Seok cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: HoLam Chung,Junan Li,Pengfei Liu1,Wai-Kim Leung,Xixin Wu,Helen Meng
title: Improving Rare Words Recognition through Homophone Extension and Unified Writing for Low-resource Cantonese Speech Recognition
title_zh: 通过同音词扩展和统一书写提高稀有词识别资源的粤语语音识别
comment: The 13th International Symposium on Chinese Spoken Language Processing (ISCSLP 2022)
comments: The 13th International Symposium on Chinese Spoken Language Processing (ISCSLP 2022)
abstract: Homophone characters are common in tonal syllable-based languages, such as Mandarin and Cantonese. The data-intensive end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are more likely to mis-recognize homophone characters and rare words under low-resource settings. For the problem of lowresource Cantonese speech recognition, this paper presents a novel homophone extension method to integrate human knowledge of the homophone lexicon into the beam search decoding process with language model re-scoring. Besides, we propose an automatic unified writing method to merge the variants of Cantonese characters and standardize speech annotation guidelines, which enables more efficient utilization of labeled utterances by providing more samples for the merged characters. We empirically show that both homophone extension and unified writing improve the recognition performance significantly on both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets, with an absolute Character Error Rate (CER) decrease of around 5% and 18%.
summary: Homophone characters are common in tonal syllable-based languages, such as Mandarin and Cantonese. The data-intensive end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems are more likely to mis-recognize homophone characters and rare words under low-resource settings. For the problem of lowresource Cantonese speech recognition, this paper presents a novel homophone extension method to integrate human knowledge of the homophone lexicon into the beam search decoding process with language model re-scoring. Besides, we propose an automatic unified writing method to merge the variants of Cantonese characters and standardize speech annotation guidelines, which enables more efficient utilization of labeled utterances by providing more samples for the merged characters. We empirically show that both homophone extension and unified writing improve the recognition performance significantly on both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets, with an absolute Character Error Rate (CER) decrease of around 5% and 18%.
abstract_zh: 同音字符在基于声调音节的语言中很常见，例如普通话和粤语。数据密集型端到端自动语音识别（ASR）系统在资源不足的情况下更容易误识别同音字和生僻字。针对粤语语音识别资源匮乏的问题，本文提出了一种新颖的同音词扩展方法，将人类对同音词词典的知识整合到带有语言模型重新评分的波束搜索解码过程中。此外，我们提出了一种自动统一书写方法来合并粤语字符的变体并标准化语音注释指南，通过为合并的字符提供更多样本来更有效地利用标记的话语。我们的经验表明，同音字扩展和统一书写在域内和域外测试集上都显着提高了识别性能，绝对字符错误率 (CER) 降低了约 5% 和 18%。

AI.tldr: 解决低资源粤语语音识别中同音字和罕见词识别问题
AI.motivation: 低资源环境下ASR系统易误识别同音字和罕见词，需整合人类知识与统一书写提升识别准确率

AI.conclusion: 同音字扩展与统一书写有效提升低资源粤语语音识别性能

authors_text: Jonathan W. Siegel
title: Sharp Lower Bounds on Interpolation by Deep ReLU Neural Networks at Irregularly Spaced Data
title_zh: 深度 ReLU 神经网络在不规则间隔数据上的插值的急剧下限
abstract: We study the interpolation power of deep ReLU neural networks. Specifically, we consider the question of how efficiently, in terms of the number of parameters, deep ReLU networks can interpolate values at $N$ datapoints in the unit ball which are separated by a distance $δ$. We show that $Ω(N)$ parameters are required in the regime where $δ$ is exponentially small in $N$, which gives the sharp result in this regime since $O(N)$ parameters are always sufficient. This also shows that the bit-extraction technique used to prove lower bounds on the VC dimension cannot be applied to irregularly spaced datapoints. Finally, as an application we give a lower bound on the approximation rates that deep ReLU neural networks can achieve for Sobolev spaces at the embedding endpoint.
summary: We study the interpolation power of deep ReLU neural networks. Specifically, we consider the question of how efficiently, in terms of the number of parameters, deep ReLU networks can interpolate values at $N$ datapoints in the unit ball which are separated by a distance $δ$. We show that $Ω(N)$ parameters are required in the regime where $δ$ is exponentially small in $N$, which gives the sharp result in this regime since $O(N)$ parameters are always sufficient. This also shows that the bit-extraction technique used to prove lower bounds on the VC dimension cannot be applied to irregularly spaced datapoints. Finally, as an application we give a lower bound on the approximation rates that deep ReLU neural networks can achieve for Sobolev spaces at the embedding endpoint.
abstract_zh: 我们研究深度 ReLU 神经网络的插值能力。具体来说，我们考虑的问题是，就参数数量而言，深度 ReLU 网络如何在单位球中的 $N$ 个数据点处插值，这些数据点之间的距离为 $δ$。我们证明，在 $δ$ 在 $N$ 中指数小的情况下需要 $Ω(N)$ 参数，这在该情况下给出了尖锐的结果，因为 $O(N)$ 参数总是足够的。这也表明用于证明 VC 维下界的比特提取技术不能应用于不规则间隔的数据点。最后，作为一个应用，我们给出了深度 ReLU 神经网络在嵌入端点处对 Sobolev 空间可以实现的逼近率的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度ReLU神经网络在不规则间隔数据点上的插值能力，分析其参数效率的下界。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络在处理不规则分布数据时的插值效率及参数需求，填补现有理论分析的空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和下界证明，结合Sobolev空间嵌入端点的近似率分析，推导参数复杂度的紧致下界。
AI.result: 证明当数据点间距δ呈指数级衰减时，需Ω(N)参数才能实现插值，且该结果与O(N)上界匹配，同时指出VC维下界证明方法不适用于不规则数据。
AI.conclusion: 建立了深度ReLU网络插值能力的紧致参数下界，揭示了不规则数据分布对网络复杂度的影响，并为Sobolev空间近似率研究提供了新视角。

authors_text: Sara Sabour,Suhani Vora,Daniel Duckworth,Ivan Krasin,David J. Fleet,Andrea Tagliasacchi
title: RobustNeRF: Ignoring Distractors with Robust Losses
title_zh: RobustNeRF：忽略具有稳健损失的干扰因素
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) excel at synthesizing new views given multi-view, calibrated images of a static scene. When scenes include distractors, which are not persistent during image capture (moving objects, lighting variations, shadows), artifacts appear as view-dependent effects or 'floaters'. To cope with distractors, we advocate a form of robust estimation for NeRF training, modeling distractors in training data as outliers of an optimization problem. Our method successfully removes outliers from a scene and improves upon our baselines, on synthetic and real-world scenes. Our technique is simple to incorporate in modern NeRF frameworks, with few hyper-parameters. It does not assume a priori knowledge of the types of distractors, and is instead focused on the optimization problem rather than pre-processing or modeling transient objects. More results on our page https://robustnerf.github.io.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) excel at synthesizing new views given multi-view, calibrated images of a static scene. When scenes include distractors, which are not persistent during image capture (moving objects, lighting variations, shadows), artifacts appear as view-dependent effects or 'floaters'. To cope with distractors, we advocate a form of robust estimation for NeRF training, modeling distractors in training data as outliers of an optimization problem. Our method successfully removes outliers from a scene and improves upon our baselines, on synthetic and real-world scenes. Our technique is simple to incorporate in modern NeRF frameworks, with few hyper-parameters. It does not assume a priori knowledge of the types of distractors, and is instead focused on the optimization problem rather than pre-processing or modeling transient objects. More results on our page https://robustnerf.github.io.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 擅长在给定静态场景的多视图、校准图像的情况下合成新视图。当场景包含在图像捕捉过程中不持久的干扰物（移动物体、光照变化、阴影）时，伪影会显示为与视图相关的效果或“漂浮物”。为了应对干扰因素，我们提倡对 NeRF 训练进行稳健估计，将训练数据中的干扰因素建模为优化问题的异常值。我们的方法成功地从场景中删除了异常值，并改进了合成场景和真实场景的基线。我们的技术很容易融入现代 NeRF 框架，几乎不需要超参数。它不假设干扰因素类型的先验知识，而是专注于优化问题，而不是预处理或建模瞬态对象。更多结果请参见我们的页面 https://robustnerf.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobustNeRF方法，通过鲁棒损失函数解决NeRF在存在动态干扰物（如移动物体、光影变化）时产生的伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在处理包含非静态干扰物的场景时，会因光照变化、阴影或移动物体产生视图依赖的伪影，现有方法依赖预处理或先验知识，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 将干扰物建模为优化问题的异常值，设计鲁棒损失函数在训练过程中自动过滤异常点，无需预处理或先验干扰物类型。
AI.result: 在合成与真实场景中有效去除干扰物伪影，优于基线方法，且参数量少，可无缝集成现代NeRF框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化问题建模干扰物，提出通用且简洁的鲁棒损失函数，显著提升NeRF在复杂场景下的重建质量。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出RobustNeRF方法，通过鲁棒损失函数解决NeRF在存在动态干扰物（如移动物体、光影变化）时产生的伪影问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统NeRF在处理包含非静态干扰物的场景时，会因光照变化、阴影或移动物体产生视图依赖的伪影，现有方法依赖预处理或先验知识，缺乏通用性。
ai_content.method: 将干扰物建模为优化问题的异常值，设计鲁棒损失函数在训练过程中自动过滤异常点，无需预处理或先验干扰物类型。
ai_content.result: 在合成与真实场景中有效去除干扰物伪影，优于基线方法，且参数量少，可无缝集成现代NeRF框架。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过优化问题建模干扰物，提出通用且简洁的鲁棒损失函数，显著提升NeRF在复杂场景下的重建质量。

search_text: RobustNeRF: Ignoring Distractors with Robust Losses RobustNeRF：忽略具有稳健损失的干扰因素 Neural radiance fields (NeRF) excel at synthesizing new views given multi-view, calibrated images of a static scene. When scenes include distractors, which are not persistent during image capture (moving objects, lighting variations, shadows), artifacts appear as view-dependent effects or 'floaters'. To cope with distractors, we advocate a form of robust estimation for NeRF training, modeling distractors in training data as outliers of an optimization problem. Our method successfully removes outliers from a scene and improves upon our baselines, on synthetic and real-world scenes. Our technique is simple to incorporate in modern NeRF frameworks, with few hyper-parameters. It does not assume a priori knowledge of the types of distractors, and is instead focused on the optimization problem rather than pre-processing or modeling transient objects. More results on our page https://robustnerf.github.io. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 擅长在给定静态场景的多视图、校准图像的情况下合成新视图。当场景包含在图像捕捉过程中不持久的干扰物（移动物体、光照变化、阴影）时，伪影会显示为与视图相关的效果或“漂浮物”。为了应对干扰因素，我们提倡对 NeRF 训练进行稳健估计，将训练数据中的干扰因素建模为优化问题的异常值。我们的方法成功地从场景中删除了异常值，并改进了合成场景和真实场景的基线。我们的技术很容易融入现代 NeRF 框架，几乎不需要超参数。它不假设干扰因素类型的先验知识，而是专注于优化问题，而不是预处理或建模瞬态对象。更多结果请参见我们的页面 https://robustnerf.github.io。 本文提出RobustNeRF方法，通过鲁棒损失函数解决NeRF在存在动态干扰物（如移动物体、光影变化）时产生的伪影问题。 Sara Sabour,Suhani Vora,Daniel Duckworth,Ivan Krasin,David J. Fleet,Andrea Tagliasacchi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziang Xiao,Tiffany Wenting Li,Karrie Karahalios,Hari Sundaram
title: Inform the uninformed: Improving Online Informed Consent Reading with an AI-Powered Chatbot
title_zh: 告知不知情者：利用人工智能聊天机器人改进在线知情同意书阅读
abstract: Informed consent is a core cornerstone of ethics in human subject research. Through the informed consent process, participants learn about the study procedure, benefits, risks, and more to make an informed decision. However, recent studies showed that current practices might lead to uninformed decisions and expose participants to unknown risks, especially in online studies. Without the researcher's presence and guidance, online participants must read a lengthy form on their own with no answers to their questions. In this paper, we examined the role of an AI-powered chatbot in improving informed consent online. By comparing the chatbot with form-based interaction, we found the chatbot improved consent form reading, promoted participants' feelings of agency, and closed the power gap between the participant and the researcher. Our exploratory analysis further revealed the altered power dynamic might eventually benefit study response quality. We discussed design implications for creating AI-powered chatbots to offer effective informed consent in broader settings.
summary: Informed consent is a core cornerstone of ethics in human subject research. Through the informed consent process, participants learn about the study procedure, benefits, risks, and more to make an informed decision. However, recent studies showed that current practices might lead to uninformed decisions and expose participants to unknown risks, especially in online studies. Without the researcher's presence and guidance, online participants must read a lengthy form on their own with no answers to their questions. In this paper, we examined the role of an AI-powered chatbot in improving informed consent online. By comparing the chatbot with form-based interaction, we found the chatbot improved consent form reading, promoted participants' feelings of agency, and closed the power gap between the participant and the researcher. Our exploratory analysis further revealed the altered power dynamic might eventually benefit study response quality. We discussed design implications for creating AI-powered chatbots to offer effective informed consent in broader settings.
abstract_zh: 知情同意是人类受试者研究伦理的核心基石。通过知情同意流程，参与者了解研究程序、益处、风险等，以做出明智的决定。然而，最近的研究表明，当前的做法可能会导致不知情的决定，并使参与者面临未知的风险，尤其是在在线研究中。在没有研究人员在场和指导的情况下，在线参与者必须自己阅读一份冗长的表格，并且无法回答他们的问题。在本文中，我们研究了人工智能驱动的聊天机器人在改善在线知情同意方面的作用。通过将聊天机器人与基于表单的交互进行比较，我们发现聊天机器人改善了同意书的阅读，提升了参与者的代理感，并缩小了参与者和研究人员之间的权力差距。我们的探索性分析进一步揭示了改变的功率动态可能最终有利于研究响应质量。我们讨论了创建人工智能驱动的聊天机器人的设计含义，以在更广泛的环境中提供有效的知情同意。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用AI聊天机器人改进在线知情同意流程的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前在线研究中，参与者因缺乏研究者指导而难以充分理解知情同意书，可能导致决策不充分。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，将AI聊天机器人与传统表单式知情同意流程进行效果对比分析。
AI.result: 聊天机器人提升了参与者对同意书的理解程度，增强了其自主感，并缩小了参与者与研究者之间的权力差距。
AI.conclusion: AI聊天机器人可作为改进知情同意流程的有效工具，未来需进一步优化其设计以适应更广泛的应用场景。

authors_text: Syeda Nyma Ferdous,Xin Li,Kamalakanta Sahoo,Richard Bergman
title: Analysis of Biomass Sustainability Indicators from a Machine Learning Perspective
title_zh: 从机器学习角度分析生物质可持续性指标
abstract: Plant biomass estimation is critical due to the variability of different environmental factors and crop management practices associated with it. The assessment is largely impacted by the accurate prediction of different environmental sustainability indicators. A robust model to predict sustainability indicators is a must for the biomass community. This study proposes a robust model for biomass sustainability prediction by analyzing sustainability indicators using machine learning models. The prospect of ensemble learning was also investigated to analyze the regression problem. All experiments were carried out on a crop residue data from the Ohio state. Ten machine learning models, namely, linear regression, ridge regression, multilayer perceptron, k-nearest neighbors, support vector machine, decision tree, gradient boosting, random forest, stacking and voting, were analyzed to estimate three biomass sustainability indicators, namely soil erosion factor, soil conditioning index, and organic matter factor. The performance of the model was assessed using cross-correlation (R2), root mean squared error and mean absolute error metrics. The results showed that Random Forest was the best performing model to assess sustainability indicators. The analyzed model can now serve as a guide for assessing sustainability indicators in real time.
summary: Plant biomass estimation is critical due to the variability of different environmental factors and crop management practices associated with it. The assessment is largely impacted by the accurate prediction of different environmental sustainability indicators. A robust model to predict sustainability indicators is a must for the biomass community. This study proposes a robust model for biomass sustainability prediction by analyzing sustainability indicators using machine learning models. The prospect of ensemble learning was also investigated to analyze the regression problem. All experiments were carried out on a crop residue data from the Ohio state. Ten machine learning models, namely, linear regression, ridge regression, multilayer perceptron, k-nearest neighbors, support vector machine, decision tree, gradient boosting, random forest, stacking and voting, were analyzed to estimate three biomass sustainability indicators, namely soil erosion factor, soil conditioning index, and organic matter factor. The performance of the model was assessed using cross-correlation (R2), root mean squared error and mean absolute error metrics. The results showed that Random Forest was the best performing model to assess sustainability indicators. The analyzed model can now serve as a guide for assessing sustainability indicators in real time.
abstract_zh: 由于不同环境因素和与之相关的作物管理实践的可变性，植物生物量估算至关重要。评估很大程度上受到不同环境可持续性指标准确预测的影响。预测可持续性指标的稳健模型对于生物质界来说是必须的。本研究通过使用机器学习模型分析可持续性指标，提出了一个稳健的生物质可持续性预测模型。还研究了集成学习的前景来分析回归问题。所有实验都是根据俄亥俄州的农作物残留物数据进行的。分析了线性回归、岭回归、多层感知器、k近邻、支持向量机、决策树、梯度提升、随机森林、堆叠和投票等十种机器学习模型，以估计三个生物量可持续性指标，即土壤侵蚀因子、土壤调理指数和有机质因子。使用互相关 (R2)、均方根误差和平均绝对误差指标来评估模型的性能。结果表明，随机森林是评估可持续性指标的最佳模型。分析后的模型现在可以作为实时评估可持续性指标的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文从机器学习角度分析生物量可持续性指标，提出预测模型以评估土壤侵蚀因子、土壤调理指数和有机质因子。
AI.motivation: 生物量估算受环境因素和耕作管理实践影响显著，准确预测可持续性指标对生物量社区至关重要。
AI.method: 基于俄亥俄州作物残渣数据，采用线性回归、随机森林等10种机器学习模型，通过R²、RMSE和MAE指标评估回归性能。
AI.result: 随机森林模型在预测生物量可持续性指标中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可为实时评估可持续性指标提供指导。

authors_text: Trupti Mahendrakar,Ryan T. White,Markus Wilde,Madhur Tiwari
title: SpaceYOLO: A Human-Inspired Model for Real-time, On-board Spacecraft Feature Detection
title_zh: SpaceYOLO：一种用于实时星载航天器特征检测的受人类启发的模型
comment: Accepted at IEEE Aerospace Conference 2023, 11 pages, 21 figures
comments: Accepted at IEEE Aerospace Conference 2023, 11 pages, 21 figures
abstract: The rapid proliferation of non-cooperative spacecraft and space debris in orbit has precipitated a surging demand for on-orbit servicing and space debris removal at a scale that only autonomous missions can address, but the prerequisite autonomous navigation and flightpath planning to safely capture an unknown, non-cooperative, tumbling space object is an open problem. This requires algorithms for real-time, automated spacecraft feature recognition to pinpoint the locations of collision hazards (e.g. solar panels or antennas) and safe docking features (e.g. satellite bodies or thrusters) so safe, effective flightpaths can be planned. Prior work in this area reveals the performance of computer vision models are highly dependent on the training dataset and its coverage of scenarios visually similar to the real scenarios that occur in deployment. Hence, the algorithm may have degraded performance under certain lighting conditions even when the rendezvous maneuver conditions of the chaser to the target spacecraft are the same. This work delves into how humans perform these tasks through a survey of how aerospace engineering students experienced with spacecraft shapes and components recognize features of the three spacecraft: Landsat, Envisat, Anik, and the orbiter Mir. The survey reveals that the most common patterns in the human detection process were to consider the shape and texture of the features: antennas, solar panels, thrusters, and satellite bodies. This work introduces a novel algorithm SpaceYOLO, which fuses a state-of-the-art object detector YOLOv5 with a separate neural network based on these human-inspired decision processes exploiting shape and texture. Performance in autonomous spacecraft detection of SpaceYOLO is compared to ordinary YOLOv5 in hardware-in-the-loop experiments under different lighting and chaser maneuver conditions at the ORION Laboratory at Florida Tech.

abstract_zh: 轨道上非合作航天器和空间碎片的迅速扩散引发了对在轨服务和空间碎片清除的需求激增，其规模只有自主任务才能满足，但安全捕获未知、非合作、翻滚空间物体的先决条件自主导航和飞行路径规划是一个悬而未决的问题。这需要实时、自动化的航天器特征识别算法来查明碰撞危险的位置（例如太阳能电池板或天线）和安全对接特征（例如卫星体或推进器），以便规划安全、有效的飞行路径。该领域的先前工作表明，计算机视觉模型的性能高度依赖于训练数据集及其视觉上与部署中发生的真实场景类似的场景覆盖范围。因此，即使追踪器与目标航天器的交会机动条件相同，该算法在某些照明条件下也可能会降低性能。这项工作通过调查了解航天器形状和组件经验的航空航天工程学生如何识别陆地卫星、环境卫星、Anik 和和平号轨道飞行器这三种航天器的特征，深入探讨了人类如何执行这些任务。调查显示，人类检测过程中最常见的模式是考虑特征的形状和纹理：天线、太阳能电池板、推进器和卫星本体。这项工作引入了一种新颖的算法 SpaceYOLO，它将最先进的对象检测器 YOLOv5 与基于这些利用形状和纹理的人类启发决策过程的独立神经网络融合在一起。在佛罗里达理工学院 ORION 实验室不同照明和追踪机动条件下的硬件在环实验中，将 SpaceYOLO 的自主航天器检测性能与普通 YOLOv5 进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpaceYOLO模型，通过融合YOLOv5与人类启发的形状纹理分析方法，实现实时在轨航天器特征检测。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机视觉模型在光照条件变化时性能下降，而自主航天任务需要可靠的目标识别来规划安全路径。
AI.method: 基于航天工程学生对航天器特征识别的调研，提取形状和纹理特征，将其与YOLOv5检测器结合构建SpaceYOLO，并在硬件在环实验中验证。
AI.result: SpaceYOLO在不同光照和追逐器机动条件下均优于普通YOLOv5，检测鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 人类启发的形状纹理分析有效增强模型性能，为实时在轨航天器特征检测提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yuchen Xu,Andrew M. Thomas,Peter A. Crozier,David S. Matteson
title: Dynamic Atomic Column Detection in Transmission Electron Microscopy Videos via Ridge Estimation
title_zh: 通过脊估计进行透射电子显微镜视频中的动态原子柱检测
abstract: Ridge detection is a classical tool to extract curvilinear features in image processing. As such, it has great promise in applications to material science problems; specifically, for trend filtering relatively stable atom-shaped objects in image sequences, such as Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM) videos. Standard analysis of TEM videos is limited to frame-by-frame object recognition. We instead harness temporal correlation across frames through simultaneous analysis of long image sequences, specified as a spatio-temporal image tensor. We define new ridge detection algorithms to non-parametrically estimate explicit trajectories of atomic-level object locations as a continuous function of time. Our approach is specially tailored to handle temporal analysis of objects that seemingly stochastically disappear and subsequently reappear throughout a sequence. We demonstrate that the proposed method is highly effective and efficient in simulation scenarios, and delivers notable performance improvements in TEM experiments compared to other material science benchmarks.
summary: Ridge detection is a classical tool to extract curvilinear features in image processing. As such, it has great promise in applications to material science problems; specifically, for trend filtering relatively stable atom-shaped objects in image sequences, such as Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM) videos. Standard analysis of TEM videos is limited to frame-by-frame object recognition. We instead harness temporal correlation across frames through simultaneous analysis of long image sequences, specified as a spatio-temporal image tensor. We define new ridge detection algorithms to non-parametrically estimate explicit trajectories of atomic-level object locations as a continuous function of time. Our approach is specially tailored to handle temporal analysis of objects that seemingly stochastically disappear and subsequently reappear throughout a sequence. We demonstrate that the proposed method is highly effective and efficient in simulation scenarios, and delivers notable performance improvements in TEM experiments compared to other material science benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 脊线检测是图像处理中提取曲线特征的经典工具。因此，它在材料科学问题的应用中具有巨大的前景。具体来说，用于趋势过滤图像序列中相对稳定的原子形物体，例如透射电子显微镜（TEM）视频。 TEM 视频的标准分析仅限于逐帧对象识别。相反，我们通过同时分析长图像序列（指定为时空图像张量）来利用跨帧的时间相关性。我们定义了新的脊检测算法，以非参数方式估计原子级物体位置的显式轨迹作为时间的连续函数。我们的方法专门用于处理看似随机消失并随后在整个序列中重新出现的对象的时间分析。我们证明，所提出的方法在模拟场景中非常有效和高效，并且与其他材料科学基准相比，在 TEM 实验中提供了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脊估计的方法，在透射电镜（TEM）视频中动态检测原子列，通过时空张量分析实现原子位置的连续时间轨迹估计。
AI.motivation: 传统TEM视频分析依赖逐帧识别，难以处理动态变化的原子结构及随机消失/重现的物体，需更高效的时序分析方法。
AI.method: 设计新的非参数脊检测算法，对长时序TEM图像（时空张量）进行联合分析，估计原子位置随时间变化的连续轨迹函数。
AI.result: 方法在模拟数据和真实TEM实验中均表现出高效率和准确性，相比现有材料科学基准方法有显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态原子结构跟踪难题，为材料科学中的时序TEM数据分析提供了新工具。

authors_text: Yuzhen Qin,Yingcong Li,Fabio Pasqualetti,Maryam Fazel,Samet Oymak
title: Stochastic Contextual Bandits with Long Horizon Rewards
title_zh: 具有长期奖励的随机上下文强盗
abstract: The growing interest in complex decision-making and language modeling problems highlights the importance of sample-efficient learning over very long horizons. This work takes a step in this direction by investigating contextual linear bandits where the current reward depends on at most $s$ prior actions and contexts (not necessarily consecutive), up to a time horizon of $h$. In order to avoid polynomial dependence on $h$, we propose new algorithms that leverage sparsity to discover the dependence pattern and arm parameters jointly. We consider both the data-poor ($T<h$) and data-rich ($T\ge h$) regimes, and derive respective regret upper bounds $\tilde O(d\sqrt{sT} +\min\{ q, T\})$ and $\tilde O(\sqrt{sdT})$, with sparsity $s$, feature dimension $d$, total time horizon $T$, and $q$ that is adaptive to the reward dependence pattern. Complementing upper bounds, we also show that learning over a single trajectory brings inherent challenges: While the dependence pattern and arm parameters form a rank-1 matrix, circulant matrices are not isometric over rank-1 manifolds and sample complexity indeed benefits from the sparse reward dependence structure. Our results necessitate a new analysis to address long-range temporal dependencies across data and avoid polynomial dependence on the reward horizon $h$. Specifically, we utilize connections to the restricted isometry property of circulant matrices formed by dependent sub-Gaussian vectors and establish new guarantees that are also of independent interest.

Our results necessitate a new analysis to address long-range temporal dependencies across data and avoid polynomial dependence on the reward horizon $h$. Specifically, we utilize connections to the restricted isometry property of circulant matrices formed by dependent sub-Gaussian vectors and establish new guarantees that are also of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 人们对复杂决策和语言建模问题日益增长的兴趣凸显了长期样本高效学习的重要性。这项工作通过调查上下文线性老虎机朝这个方向迈出了一步，其中当前奖励最多取决于 $s$ 之前的动作和上下文（不一定是连续的），直到 $h$ 的时间范围。为了避免对 $h$ 的多项式依赖，我们提出了利用稀疏性来联合发现依赖模式和臂参数的新算法。我们考虑数据贫乏（$T<h$）和数据丰富（$T\ge h$）两种情况，并推导各自的后悔上限$\tilde O(d\sqrt{sT} +\min\{ q, T\})$和$\tilde O(\sqrt{sdT})$，稀疏性$s$、特征维度$d$、总时间范围$T$和适应奖励依赖模式的$q$。作为上限的补充，我们还表明，学习单个轨迹带来了固有的挑战：虽然依赖模式和臂参数形成了 1 阶矩阵，但循环矩阵在 1 阶流形上并不是等距的，并且样本复杂性确实受益于稀疏奖励依赖结构。我们的结果需要进行新的分析来解决数据之间的长期时间依赖性，并避免对奖励范围 $h$ 的多项式依赖性。具体来说，我们利用与由相关亚高斯向量形成的循环矩阵的受限等距属性的连接，并建立也具有独立意义的新保证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有长时域奖励的随机上下文老虎机问题，提出利用稀疏性联合发现依赖模式和臂参数的新算法。
AI.motivation: 复杂决策和语言建模问题需要在长时域上实现样本高效的强化学习，传统方法存在对时间跨度h的多项式依赖问题。
AI.method: 设计基于稀疏性的联合学习算法，结合循环矩阵的限制等距性质，分别处理数据贫乏（T<h）和数据丰富（T≥h）场景。
AI.result: 在数据贫乏和丰富场景下分别获得 regrets 上界 $\tilde O(d\\sqrt{sT} +\\min\{ q, T\})$ 和 $\tilde O(\\sqrt{sdT})$，并证明稀疏依赖结构能降低样本复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 通过循环矩阵理论分析，提出的新方法有效解决了长时序依赖问题，避免了对时间跨度h的多项式依赖，具有独立理论价值。

search_text: Stochastic Contextual Bandits with Long Horizon Rewards 具有长期奖励的随机上下文强盗 The growing interest in complex decision-making and language modeling problems highlights the importance of sample-efficient learning over very long horizons. This work takes a step in this direction by investigating contextual linear bandits where the current reward depends on at most $s$ prior actions and contexts (not necessarily consecutive), up to a time horizon of $h$. In order to avoid polynomial dependence on $h$, we propose new algorithms that leverage sparsity to discover the dependence pattern and arm parameters jointly. We consider both the data-poor ($T<h$) and data-rich ($T\ge h$) regimes, and derive respective regret upper bounds $\tilde O(d\sqrt{sT} +\min\{ q, T\})$ and $\tilde O(\sqrt{sdT})$, with sparsity $s$, feature dimension $d$, total time horizon $T$, and $q$ that is adaptive to the reward dependence pattern. Complementing upper bounds, we also show that learning over a single trajectory brings inherent challenges: While the dependence pattern and arm parameters form a rank-1 matrix, circulant matrices are not isometric over rank-1 manifolds and sample complexity indeed benefits from the sparse reward dependence structure. Our results necessitate a new analysis to address long-range temporal dependencies across data and avoid polynomial dependence on the reward horizon $h$. Specifically, we utilize connections to the restricted isometry property of circulant matrices formed by dependent sub-Gaussian vectors and establish new guarantees that are also of independent interest. 人们对复杂决策和语言建模问题日益增长的兴趣凸显了长期样本高效学习的重要性。这项工作通过调查上下文线性老虎机朝这个方向迈出了一步，其中当前奖励最多取决于 $s$ 之前的动作和上下文（不一定是连续的），直到 $h$ 的时间范围。为了避免对 $h$ 的多项式依赖，我们提出了利用稀疏性来联合发现依赖模式和臂参数的新算法。我们考虑数据贫乏（$T<h$）和数据丰富（$T\ge h$）两种情况，并推导各自的后悔上限$\tilde O(d\sqrt{sT} +\min\{ q, T\})$和$\tilde O(\sqrt{sdT})$，稀疏性$s$、特征维度$d$、总时间范围$T$和适应奖励依赖模式的$q$。作为上限的补充，我们还表明，学习单个轨迹带来了固有的挑战：虽然依赖模式和臂参数形成了 1 阶矩阵，但循环矩阵在 1 阶流形上并不是等距的，并且样本复杂性确实受益于稀疏奖励依赖结构。我们的结果需要进行新的分析来解决数据之间的长期时间依赖性，并避免对奖励范围 $h$ 的多项式依赖性。具体来说，我们利用与由相关亚高斯向量形成的循环矩阵的受限等距属性的连接，并建立也具有独立意义的新保证。 本文研究具有长时域奖励的随机上下文老虎机问题，提出利用稀疏性联合发现依赖模式和臂参数的新算法。 Yuzhen Qin,Yingcong Li,Fabio Pasqualetti,Maryam Fazel,Samet Oymak cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Malek Mechergui,Sarath Sreedharan
title: Goal Alignment: A Human-Aware Account of Value Alignment Problem
title_zh: 目标一致：对价值一致问题的人类意识解释
abstract: Value alignment problems arise in scenarios where the specified objectives of an AI agent don't match the true underlying objective of its users. The problem has been widely argued to be one of the central safety problems in AI. Unfortunately, most existing works in value alignment tend to focus on issues that are primarily related to the fact that reward functions are an unintuitive mechanism to specify objectives. However, the complexity of the objective specification mechanism is just one of many reasons why the user may have misspecified their objective. A foundational cause for misalignment that is being overlooked by these works is the inherent asymmetry in human expectations about the agent's behavior and the behavior generated by the agent for the specified objective. To address this lacuna, we propose a novel formulation for the value alignment problem, named goal alignment that focuses on a few central challenges related to value alignment. In doing so, we bridge the currently disparate research areas of value alignment and human-aware planning. Additionally, we propose a first-of-its-kind interactive algorithm that is capable of using information generated under incorrect beliefs about the agent, to determine the true underlying goal of the user.
summary: Value alignment problems arise in scenarios where the specified objectives of an AI agent don't match the true underlying objective of its users. The problem has been widely argued to be one of the central safety problems in AI. Unfortunately, most existing works in value alignment tend to focus on issues that are primarily related to the fact that reward functions are an unintuitive mechanism to specify objectives. However, the complexity of the objective specification mechanism is just one of many reasons why the user may have misspecified their objective. A foundational cause for misalignment that is being overlooked by these works is the inherent asymmetry in human expectations about the agent's behavior and the behavior generated by the agent for the specified objective. To address this lacuna, we propose a novel formulation for the value alignment problem, named goal alignment that focuses on a few central challenges related to value alignment. In doing so, we bridge the currently disparate research areas of value alignment and human-aware planning. Additionally, we propose a first-of-its-kind interactive algorithm that is capable of using information generated under incorrect beliefs about the agent, to determine the true underlying goal of the user.
abstract_zh: 当人工智能代理的指定目标与其用户的真正基本目标不匹配时，就会出现价值对齐问题。这个问题被广泛认为是人工智能的核心安全问题之一。不幸的是，大多数现有的价值调整工作往往集中于主要与奖励函数是一种不直观的指定目标机制这一事实相关的问题。然而，目标指定机制的复杂性只是用户可能错误指定其目标的众多原因之一。这些工作所忽视的失调的一个根本原因是人类对智能体行为的期望以及智能体为特定目标生成的行为的固有不对称性。为了解决这个缺陷，我们提出了一种新的价值对齐问题的表述，称为目标对齐，重点关注与价值对齐相关的一些核心挑战。在此过程中，我们弥合了当前不同的价值调整和人性化规划研究领域。此外，我们提出了一种首创的交互式算法，该算法能够使用在对代理的错误信念下生成的信息来确定用户的真正潜在目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'目标对齐'的新价值对齐问题框架，通过关注人类预期与智能体行为之间的不对称性，结合人类感知规划领域，解决AI目标错位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有价值对齐研究过度关注奖励函数机制复杂性，忽视了人类对智能体行为预期与实际行为生成之间的根本性不对称性这一核心问题。
AI.method: 提出交互式算法，利用基于错误信念生成的信息反推用户真实目标，建立人类感知规划与价值对齐的理论桥梁。
AI.result: 构建了目标对齐理论框架，实现了跨领域研究整合，并开发出首个能利用错误信念信息进行目标推断的交互算法。
AI.conclusion: 目标对齐理论为AI安全发展提供了新的分析视角，通过考虑人类认知偏差，有望解决传统价值对齐方法难以处理的深层对齐问题。

authors_text: Akhil Agnihotri,Rahul Jain,Haipeng Luo
title: ACPO: A Policy Optimization Algorithm for Average MDPs with Constraints
title_zh: ACPO：带约束的平均 MDP 策略优化算法
comment: To appear in Proceedings of the $\mathit{41}^{st}$ International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), Vienna, Austria. PMLR 235, 2024
comments: To appear in Proceedings of the $\mathit{41}^{st}$ International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), Vienna, Austria. PMLR 235, 2024
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) for constrained MDPs (CMDPs) is an increasingly important problem for various applications. Often, the average criterion is more suitable than the discounted criterion. Yet, RL for average-CMDPs (ACMDPs) remains a challenging problem. Algorithms designed for discounted constrained RL problems often do not perform well for the average CMDP setting. In this paper, we introduce a new policy optimization with function approximation algorithm for constrained MDPs with the average criterion. The Average-Constrained Policy Optimization (ACPO) algorithm is inspired by trust region-based policy optimization algorithms. We develop basic sensitivity theory for average CMDPs, and then use the corresponding bounds in the design of the algorithm. We provide theoretical guarantees on its performance, and through extensive experimental work in various challenging OpenAI Gym environments, show its superior empirical performance when compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms adapted for the ACMDPs.
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) for constrained MDPs (CMDPs) is an increasingly important problem for various applications. Often, the average criterion is more suitable than the discounted criterion. Yet, RL for average-CMDPs (ACMDPs) remains a challenging problem. Algorithms designed for discounted constrained RL problems often do not perform well for the average CMDP setting. In this paper, we introduce a new policy optimization with function approximation algorithm for constrained MDPs with the average criterion. The Average-Constrained Policy Optimization (ACPO) algorithm is inspired by trust region-based policy optimization algorithms. We develop basic sensitivity theory for average CMDPs, and then use the corresponding bounds in the design of the algorithm. We provide theoretical guarantees on its performance, and through extensive experimental work in various challenging OpenAI Gym environments, show its superior empirical performance when compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms adapted for the ACMDPs.
abstract_zh: 对于各种应用来说，约束 MDP (CMDP) 的强化学习 (RL) 是一个日益重要的问题。通常，平均标准比折扣标准更合适。然而，平均 CMDP（ACMDP）的强化学习仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为折扣约束 RL 问题设计的算法通常在平均 CMDP 设置下表现不佳。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的策略优化函数逼近算法，用于具有平均准则的约束 MDP。平均约束策略优化 (ACPO) 算法受到基于信任域的策略优化算法的启发。我们开发了平均 CMDP 的基本灵敏度理论，然后在算法设计中使用相应的界限。我们对其性能提供了理论保证，并通过在各种具有挑战性的 OpenAI Gym 环境中进行的广泛实验工作，展示了与其他适用于 ACMDP 的最先进算法相比，其优越的经验性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对平均约束马尔可夫决策过程（ACMDPs）的策略优化算法ACPO，以解决现有算法在平均准则下的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 平均准则比折扣准则更适用于某些应用场景，但现有针对折扣约束强化学习的算法在平均CMDP设置中表现不佳，亟需新的优化方法。
AI.method: ACPO算法基于信任区域策略优化框架，结合平均CMDPs的灵敏度理论分析，通过函数逼近设计策略更新机制。
AI.result: 理论分析证明了算法收敛性，实验表明在多个OpenAI Gym环境中，ACPO的性能优于其他先进算法。
AI.conclusion: ACPO为平均约束强化学习提供了有效的策略优化方案，填补了该领域算法设计的空白。

search_text: ACPO: A Policy Optimization Algorithm for Average MDPs with Constraints ACPO：带约束的平均 MDP 策略优化算法 Reinforcement Learning (RL) for constrained MDPs (CMDPs) is an increasingly important problem for various applications. Often, the average criterion is more suitable than the discounted criterion. Yet, RL for average-CMDPs (ACMDPs) remains a challenging problem. Algorithms designed for discounted constrained RL problems often do not perform well for the average CMDP setting. In this paper, we introduce a new policy optimization with function approximation algorithm for constrained MDPs with the average criterion. The Average-Constrained Policy Optimization (ACPO) algorithm is inspired by trust region-based policy optimization algorithms. We develop basic sensitivity theory for average CMDPs, and then use the corresponding bounds in the design of the algorithm. We provide theoretical guarantees on its performance, and through extensive experimental work in various challenging OpenAI Gym environments, show its superior empirical performance when compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms adapted for the ACMDPs. 对于各种应用来说，约束 MDP (CMDP) 的强化学习 (RL) 是一个日益重要的问题。通常，平均标准比折扣标准更合适。然而，平均 CMDP（ACMDP）的强化学习仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为折扣约束 RL 问题设计的算法通常在平均 CMDP 设置下表现不佳。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的策略优化函数逼近算法，用于具有平均准则的约束 MDP。平均约束策略优化 (ACPO) 算法受到基于信任域的策略优化算法的启发。我们开发了平均 CMDP 的基本灵敏度理论，然后在算法设计中使用相应的界限。我们对其性能提供了理论保证，并通过在各种具有挑战性的 OpenAI Gym 环境中进行的广泛实验工作，展示了与其他适用于 ACMDP 的最先进算法相比，其优越的经验性能。 本文提出了一种针对平均约束马尔可夫决策过程（ACMDPs）的策略优化算法ACPO，以解决现有算法在平均准则下的性能不足问题。 Akhil Agnihotri,Rahul Jain,Haipeng Luo cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Khemraj Shukla,Vivek Oommen,Ahmad Peyvan,Michael Penwarden,Luis Bravo,Anindya Ghoshal,Robert M. Kirby,George Em Karniadakis
title: Deep neural operators can serve as accurate surrogates for shape optimization: A case study for airfoils
title_zh: 深度神经算子可以作为形状优化的精确替代：机翼的案例研究
abstract: Deep neural operators, such as DeepONets, have changed the paradigm in high-dimensional nonlinear regression from function regression to (differential) operator regression, paving the way for significant changes in computational engineering applications. Here, we investigate the use of DeepONets to infer flow fields around unseen airfoils with the aim of shape optimization, an important design problem in aerodynamics that typically taxes computational resources heavily. We present results which display little to no degradation in prediction accuracy, while reducing the online optimization cost by orders of magnitude. We consider NACA airfoils as a test case for our proposed approach, as their shape can be easily defined by the four-digit parametrization. We successfully optimize the constrained NACA four-digit problem with respect to maximizing the lift-to-drag ratio and validate all results by comparing them to a high-order CFD solver. We find that DeepONets have low generalization error, making them ideal for generating solutions of unseen shapes. Specifically, pressure, density, and velocity fields are accurately inferred at a fraction of a second, hence enabling the use of general objective functions beyond the maximization of the lift-to-drag ratio considered in the current work.
summary: Deep neural operators, such as DeepONets, have changed the paradigm in high-dimensional nonlinear regression from function regression to (differential) operator regression, paving the way for significant changes in computational engineering applications. Here, we investigate the use of DeepONets to infer flow fields around unseen airfoils with the aim of shape optimization, an important design problem in aerodynamics that typically taxes computational resources heavily. We present results which display little to no degradation in prediction accuracy, while reducing the online optimization cost by orders of magnitude. We consider NACA airfoils as a test case for our proposed approach, as their shape can be easily defined by the four-digit parametrization. We successfully optimize the constrained NACA four-digit problem with respect to maximizing the lift-to-drag ratio and validate all results by comparing them to a high-order CFD solver. We find that DeepONets have low generalization error, making them ideal for generating solutions of unseen shapes. Specifically, pressure, density, and velocity fields are accurately inferred at a fraction of a second, hence enabling the use of general objective functions beyond the maximization of the lift-to-drag ratio considered in the current work.
abstract_zh: DeepONets 等深度神经算子已经将高维非线性回归的范式从函数回归改变为（微分）算子回归，为计算工程应用的重大变化铺平了道路。在这里，我们研究使用 DeepONet 来推断看不见的翼型周围的流场，以实现形状优化，这是空气动力学中的一个重要设计问题，通常会占用大量计算资源。我们提出的结果显示预测精度几乎没有下降，同时将在线优化成本降低了几个数量级。我们将 NACA 翼型视为我们提出的方法的测试用例，因为它们的形状可以通过四位数参数化轻松定义。我们成功地优化了关于最大化升阻比的约束 NACA 四位数问题，并通过将它们与高阶 CFD 求解器进行比较来验证所有结果。我们发现 DeepONets 具有较低的泛化误差，这使得它们非常适合生成未见过的形状的解决方案。具体来说，压力、密度和速度场可以在不到一秒的时间内准确推断出来，因此可以使用一般目标函数，超出当前工作中考虑的升阻比最大化的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用深度神经算子（DeepONets）作为高精度替代模型，用于空气动力学中的形状优化问题，以减少计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统形状优化依赖高计算成本的CFD模拟，而DeepONets能高效预测流场，降低优化成本。
AI.method: 采用DeepONets模型推断流场，结合NACA四数字参数化机翼进行形状优化，并与高阶CFD求解器对比验证。
AI.result: 结果表明，DeepONets在预测精度上无明显下降，优化成本降低数个数量级，且能快速准确推断流场，支持多种优化目标。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为DeepONets具有低泛化误差，适合生成未知形状的解，为工程优化提供高效替代方案。

authors_text: Evan Hubinger,Adam Jermyn,Johannes Treutlein,Rubi Hudson,Kate Woolverton
title: Conditioning Predictive Models: Risks and Strategies
title_zh: 条件预测模型：风险和策略
abstract: Our intention is to provide a definitive reference on what it would take to safely make use of generative/predictive models in the absence of a solution to the Eliciting Latent Knowledge problem. Furthermore, we believe that large language models can be understood as such predictive models of the world, and that such a conceptualization raises significant opportunities for their safe yet powerful use via carefully conditioning them to predict desirable outputs. Unfortunately, such approaches also raise a variety of potentially fatal safety problems, particularly surrounding situations where predictive models predict the output of other AI systems, potentially unbeknownst to us. There are numerous potential solutions to such problems, however, primarily via carefully conditioning models to predict the things we want (e.g. humans) rather than the things we don't (e.g. malign AIs). Furthermore, due to the simplicity of the prediction objective, we believe that predictive models present the easiest inner alignment problem that we are aware of. As a result, we think that conditioning approaches for predictive models represent the safest known way of eliciting human-level and slightly superhuman capabilities from large language models and other similar future models.
summary: Our intention is to provide a definitive reference on what it would take to safely make use of generative/predictive models in the absence of a solution to the Eliciting Latent Knowledge problem. Furthermore, we believe that large language models can be understood as such predictive models of the world, and that such a conceptualization raises significant opportunities for their safe yet powerful use via carefully conditioning them to predict desirable outputs. Unfortunately, such approaches also raise a variety of potentially fatal safety problems, particularly surrounding situations where predictive models predict the output of other AI systems, potentially unbeknownst to us. There are numerous potential solutions to such problems, however, primarily via carefully conditioning models to predict the things we want (e.g. humans) rather than the things we don't (e.g. malign AIs). Furthermore, due to the simplicity of the prediction objective, we believe that predictive models present the easiest inner alignment problem that we are aware of. As a result, we think that conditioning approaches for predictive models represent the safest known way of eliciting human-level and slightly superhuman capabilities from large language models and other similar future models.
abstract_zh: 我们的目的是提供一个明确的参考，说明在缺乏潜在知识问题的解决方案的情况下，如何安全地使用生成/预测模型。此外，我们相信大型语言模型可以被理解为世界的预测模型，并且这种概念化通过仔细调节它们来预测所需的输出，为它们的安全而强大的使用提供了重要的机会。不幸的是，这种方法也引发了各种潜在的致命安全问题，特别是在预测模型预测其他人工智能系统输出的情况下，而我们可能不知道。然而，此类问题有许多潜在的解决方案，主要是通过仔细调节模型来预测我们想要的东西（例如人类），而不是我们不想要的东西（例如恶意人工智能）。此外，由于预测目标的简单性，我们认为预测模型提出了我们所知道的最简单的内部对齐问题。因此，我们认为预测模型的调节方法代表了从大型语言模型和其他类似的未来模型中引发人类水平和稍微超人类能力的最安全的已知方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨在无法解决‘引发潜在知识’问题的情况下，如何安全使用生成式/预测模型，并分析通过条件设置控制模型输出的风险与策略。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为世界预测模型具有潜力，但其预测其他AI系统输出时可能引发安全问题，需通过条件设置确保模型预测人类需求而非恶意AI行为。
AI.method: 通过仔细设计模型条件，引导其预测人类期望的输出（如人类行为），而非潜在危险的输出（如恶意AI行为），并利用预测目标的简单性解决内部对齐问题。
AI.result: 条件设置方法被认定为当前最安全的策略，可从大型语言模型中提取人类水平及略超人类的能力，同时降低预测其他AI系统输出的风险。
AI.conclusion: 条件设置是安全利用预测模型的关键，尽管存在风险，但通过针对性条件设计可有效缓解，为未来模型开发提供方向。

Furthermore, we believe that large language models can be understood as such predictive models of the world, and that such a conceptualization raises significant opportunities for their safe yet powerful use via carefully conditioning them to predict desirable outputs. Unfortunately, such approaches also raise a variety of potentially fatal safety problems, particularly surrounding situations where predictive models predict the output of other AI systems, potentially unbeknownst to us. There are numerous potential solutions to such problems, however, primarily via carefully conditioning models to predict the things we want (e.g. humans) rather than the things we don't (e.g. malign AIs). Furthermore, due to the simplicity of the prediction objective, we believe that predictive models present the easiest inner alignment problem that we are aware of. As a result, we think that conditioning approaches for predictive models represent the safest known way of eliciting human-level and slightly superhuman capabilities from large language models and other similar future models. 我们的目的是提供一个明确的参考，说明在缺乏潜在知识问题的解决方案的情况下，如何安全地使用生成/预测模型。此外，我们相信大型语言模型可以被理解为世界的预测模型，并且这种概念化通过仔细调节它们来预测所需的输出，为它们的安全而强大的使用提供了重要的机会。不幸的是，这种方法也引发了各种潜在的致命安全问题，特别是在预测模型预测其他人工智能系统输出的情况下，而我们可能不知道。然而，此类问题有许多潜在的解决方案，主要是通过仔细调节模型来预测我们想要的东西（例如人类），而不是我们不想要的东西（例如恶意人工智能）。此外，由于预测目标的简单性，我们认为预测模型提出了我们所知道的最简单的内部对齐问题。因此，我们认为预测模型的调节方法代表了从大型语言模型和其他类似的未来模型中引发人类水平和稍微超人类能力的最安全的已知方法。 本文旨在探讨在无法解决‘引发潜在知识’问题的情况下，如何安全使用生成式/预测模型，并分析通过条件设置控制模型输出的风险与策略。 Evan Hubinger,Adam Jermyn,Johannes Treutlein,Rubi Hudson,Kate Woolverton cs.AI

authors_text: Upol Ehsan,Koustuv Saha,Munmun De Choudhury,Mark O. Riedl
title: Charting the Sociotechnical Gap in Explainable AI: A Framework to Address the Gap in XAI
title_zh: 绘制可解释人工智能的社会技术差距：解决 XAI 差距的框架
abstract: Explainable AI (XAI) systems are sociotechnical in nature; thus, they are subject to the sociotechnical gap--divide between the technical affordances and the social needs. However, charting this gap is challenging. In the context of XAI, we argue that charting the gap improves our problem understanding, which can reflexively provide actionable insights to improve explainability. Utilizing two case studies in distinct domains, we empirically derive a framework that facilitates systematic charting of the sociotechnical gap by connecting AI guidelines in the context of XAI and elucidating how to use them to address the gap. We apply the framework to a third case in a new domain, showcasing its affordances. Finally, we discuss conceptual implications of the framework, share practical considerations in its operationalization, and offer guidance on transferring it to new contexts. By making conceptual and practical contributions to understanding the sociotechnical gap in XAI, the framework expands the XAI design space.
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) systems are sociotechnical in nature; thus, they are subject to the sociotechnical gap--divide between the technical affordances and the social needs. However, charting this gap is challenging. Finally, we discuss conceptual implications of the framework, share practical considerations in its operationalization, and offer guidance on transferring it to new contexts. By making conceptual and practical contributions to understanding the sociotechnical gap in XAI, the framework expands the XAI design space.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能（XAI）系统本质上是社会技术的；因此，它们受到社会技术差距的影响——技术可供性和社会需求之间的鸿沟。然而，绘制这一差距具有挑战性。在 XAI 的背景下，我们认为绘制差距图表可以提高我们对问题的理解，这可以反射性地提供可操作的见解以提高可解释性。利用不同领域的两个案例研究，我们凭经验推导出一个框架，通过在 XAI 背景下连接人工智能指南并阐明如何使用它们来解决差距，促进系统地绘制社会技术差距图表。我们将该框架应用于新领域的第三个案例，展示其功能可供性。最后，我们讨论该框架的概念含义，分享其操作中的实际考虑因素，并提供将其转移到新环境的指导。通过为理解 XAI 中的社会技术差距做出概念和实践贡献，该框架扩展了 XAI 设计空间。

AI.tldr: 提出一个框架以系统分析XAI中的社会技术差距，并通过案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: XAI系统存在技术功能与社会需求间的差距，现有方法难以有效解决，需系统性框架来识别和解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过两个不同领域案例研究实证推导框架，并在新领域案例中应用验证其适用性。
AI.result: 提出连接XAI中AI指南的系统框架，阐明其应用方法，并验证其在新案例中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在概念和实践上扩展了XAI设计空间，提供了理解与解决社会技术差距的新方法。

authors_text: Zun Li,Marc Lanctot,Kevin R. McKee,Luke Marris,Ian Gemp,Daniel Hennes,Paul Muller,Kate Larson,Yoram Bachrach,Michael P. Wellman
title: Combining Tree-Search, Generative Models, and Nash Bargaining Concepts in Game-Theoretic Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 在博弈论强化学习中结合树搜索、生成模型和纳什讨价还价概念
abstract: Opponent modeling methods typically involve two crucial steps: building a belief distribution over opponents' strategies, and exploiting this opponent model by playing a best response. However, existing approaches typically require domain-specific heurstics to come up with such a model, and algorithms for approximating best responses are hard to scale in large, imperfect information domains. In this work, we introduce a scalable and generic multiagent training regime for opponent modeling using deep game-theoretic reinforcement learning. We first propose Generative Best Respoonse (GenBR), a best response algorithm based on Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a learned deep generative model that samples world states during planning. This new method scales to large imperfect information domains and can be plug and play in a variety of multiagent algorithms. We use this new method under the framework of Policy Space Response Oracles (PSRO), to automate the generation of an \emph{offline opponent model} via iterative game-theoretic reasoning and population-based training. We propose using solution concepts based on bargaining theory to build up an opponent mixture, which we find identifying profiles that are near the Pareto frontier. Then GenBR keeps updating an \emph{online opponent model} and reacts against it during gameplay. We conduct behavioral studies where human participants negotiate with our agents in Deal-or-No-Deal, a class of bilateral bargaining games. Search with generative modeling finds stronger policies during both training time and test time, enables online Bayesian co-player prediction, and can produce agents that achieve comparable social welfare and Nash bargaining score negotiating with humans as humans trading among themselves.

However, existing approaches typically require domain-specific heurstics to come up with such a model, and algorithms for approximating best responses are hard to scale in large, imperfect information domains. In this work, we introduce a scalable and generic multiagent training regime for opponent modeling using deep game-theoretic reinforcement learning. We first propose Generative Best Respoonse (GenBR), a best response algorithm based on Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with a learned deep generative model that samples world states during planning. This new method scales to large imperfect information domains and can be plug and play in a variety of multiagent algorithms. We use this new method under the framework of Policy Space Response Oracles (PSRO), to automate the generation of an \emph{offline opponent model} via iterative game-theoretic reasoning and population-based training. We propose using solution concepts based on bargaining theory to build up an opponent mixture, which we find identifying profiles that are near the Pareto frontier. Then GenBR keeps updating an \emph{online opponent model} and reacts against it during gameplay. We conduct behavioral studies where human participants negotiate with our agents in Deal-or-No-Deal, a class of bilateral bargaining games. Search with generative modeling finds stronger policies during both training time and test time, enables online Bayesian co-player prediction, and can produce agents that achieve comparable social welfare and Nash bargaining score negotiating with humans as humans trading among themselves.
abstract_zh: 对手建模方法通常涉及两个关键步骤：建立对手策略的信念分布，并通过发挥最佳响应来利用该对手模型。然而，现有的方法通常需要特定领域的启发法来提出这样的模型，并且用于近似最佳响应的算法很难在大型、不完美的信息领域中扩展。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种可扩展且通用的多智能体训练机制，用于使用深度博弈论强化学习进行对手建模。我们首先提出生成最佳响应（GenBR），这是一种基于蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）的最佳响应算法，具有在规划期间对世界状态进行采样的学习深度生成模型。这种新方法可以扩展到大型不完美信息域，并且可以在各种多智能体算法中即插即用。我们在策略空间响应预言机（PSRO）的框架下使用这种新方法，通过迭代博弈论推理和基于群体的训练自动生成 \emph{离线对手模型}。我们建议使用基于讨价还价理论的解决方案概念来构建对手混合物，我们发现它可以识别接近帕累托边界的配置文件。然后 GenBR 不断更新 \emph{在线对手模型} 并在游戏过程中对其做出反应。我们进行行为研究，人类参与者与我们的代理人在“交易或不交易”（一类双边讨价还价游戏）中进行谈判。使用生成模型进行搜索可以在训练时间和测试时间找到更强大的策略，实现在线贝叶斯合作玩家预测，并且可以产生在人类相互交易时与人类谈判时实现可比较的社会福利和纳什讨价还价分数的代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合树搜索、生成模型和纳什博弈概念的多智能体强化学习框架，用于改进对手建模方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对手建模方法依赖领域特定启发式策略，且在大规模不完美信息场景中难以扩展，需开发通用可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与生成模型的GenBR算法，结合策略空间响应预言机（PSRO）框架，利用博弈论与议价理论构建离线/在线对手模型。
AI.result: 在Deal-or-No-Deal等博弈中实现与人类相当的谈判效果，提升策略强度与社会福利，支持在线贝叶斯对手预测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成模型与博弈理论结合，有效解决了大规模不完美信息场景下的对手建模难题，推动了多智能体强化学习的实际应用。

McKee,Luke Marris,Ian Gemp,Daniel Hennes,Paul Muller,Kate Larson,Yoram Bachrach,Michael P. Wellman cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Xiaoze Liu,Junyang Wu,Tianyi Li,Lu Chen,Yunjun Gao
title: Unsupervised Entity Alignment for Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 时态知识图的无监督实体对齐
abstract: Entity alignment (EA) is a fundamental data integration task that identifies equivalent entities between different knowledge graphs (KGs). Temporal Knowledge graphs (TKGs) extend traditional knowledge graphs by introducing timestamps, which have received increasing attention. State-of-the-art time-aware EA studies have suggested that the temporal information of TKGs facilitates the performance of EA. However, existing studies have not thoroughly exploited the advantages of temporal information in TKGs. Also, they perform EA by pre-aligning entity pairs, which can be labor-intensive and thus inefficient. In this paper, we present DualMatch which effectively fuses the relational and temporal information for EA. DualMatch transfers EA on TKGs into a weighted graph matching problem. More specifically, DualMatch is equipped with an unsupervised method, which achieves EA without necessitating seed alignment. DualMatch has two steps: (i) encoding temporal and relational information into embeddings separately using a novel label-free encoder, Dual-Encoder; and (ii) fusing both information and transforming it into alignment using a novel graph-matching-based decoder, GM-Decoder. DualMatch is able to perform EA on TKGs with or without supervision, due to its capability of effectively capturing temporal information. Extensive experiments on three real-world TKG datasets offer the insight that DualMatch outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of H@1 by 2.4% - 10.7% and MRR by 1.7% - 7.6%, respectively.
summary: Entity alignment (EA) is a fundamental data integration task that identifies equivalent entities between different knowledge graphs (KGs). Temporal Knowledge graphs (TKGs) extend traditional knowledge graphs by introducing timestamps, which have received increasing attention. State-of-the-art time-aware EA studies have suggested that the temporal information of TKGs facilitates the performance of EA. However, existing studies have not thoroughly exploited the advantages of temporal information in TKGs. Also, they perform EA by pre-aligning entity pairs, which can be labor-intensive and thus inefficient. In this paper, we present DualMatch which effectively fuses the relational and temporal information for EA. DualMatch transfers EA on TKGs into a weighted graph matching problem. More specifically, DualMatch is equipped with an unsupervised method, which achieves EA without necessitating seed alignment. DualMatch has two steps: (i) encoding temporal and relational information into embeddings separately using a novel label-free encoder, Dual-Encoder; and (ii) fusing both information and transforming it into alignment using a novel graph-matching-based decoder, GM-Decoder. DualMatch is able to perform EA on TKGs with or without supervision, due to its capability of effectively capturing temporal information. Extensive experiments on three real-world TKG datasets offer the insight that DualMatch outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of H@1 by 2.4% - 10.7% and MRR by 1.7% - 7.6%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐（EA）是一项基本的数据集成任务，用于识别不同知识图（KG）之间的等效实体。时态知识图（TKG）通过引入时间戳来扩展传统知识图，受到越来越多的关注。最先进的时间感知 EA 研究表明，TKG 的时间信息有助于 EA 的性能。然而，现有的研究尚未充分利用 TKG 中时间信息的优势。此外，他们通过预先对齐实体对来执行 EA，这可能是劳动密集型的，因此效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 DualMatch，它有效地融合了 EA 的关系信息和时间信息。 DualMatch 将 TKG 上的 EA 转换为加权图匹配问题。更具体地说，DualMatch 配备了一种无监督方法，无需种子对齐即可实现 EA。 DualMatch 有两个步骤：（i）使用新型无标签编码器 Dual-Encoder 将时间信息和关系信息分别编码到嵌入中； (ii) 融合这两种信息并使用一种新颖的基于图匹配的解码器 GM-Decoder 将其转换为对齐。 DualMatch 能够在有或没有监督的情况下对 TKG 执行 EA，因为它能够有效捕获时间信息。对三个真实世界 TKG 数据集的广泛实验表明，DualMatch 在 H@1 方面优于最先进的方法，分别高出 2.4% - 10.7% 和 MRR 1.7% - 7.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督的时态知识图谱实体对齐方法DualMatch，通过融合关系和时间信息提升对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有时态知识图谱实体对齐方法未能充分挖掘时间信息优势，且依赖耗时的手动预对齐实体对，效率低下。
AI.method: DualMatch包含两个核心模块：Dual-Encoder分别编码时态和关系信息生成嵌入，GM-Decoder通过图匹配机制融合信息实现对齐，无需种子对监督。
AI.result: 在三个真实时态知识图谱数据集上，DualMatch在H@1指标上优于现有方法2.4%-10.7%，MRR指标提升1.7%-7.6%。
AI.conclusion: DualMatch通过有效捕捉时间信息并采用无监督框架，显著提升了时态知识图谱实体对齐的性能和效率。

authors_text: Yuan Yue,Jeremiah D. Deng,Dirk De Ridder,Patrick Manning,Divya Adhia
title: Variational Autoencoder Learns Better Feature Representations for EEG-based Obesity Classification
title_zh: 变分自动编码器为基于脑电图的肥胖分类学习更好的特征表示
abstract: Obesity is a common issue in modern societies today that can lead to various diseases and significantly reduced quality of life. Currently, research has been conducted to investigate resting state EEG (electroencephalogram) signals with an aim to identify possible neurological characteristics associated with obesity. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework to extract the resting state EEG features for obese and lean subject classification. Specifically, a novel variational autoencoder framework is employed to extract subject-invariant features from the raw EEG signals, which are then classified by a 1-D convolutional neural network. Comparing with conventional machine learning and deep learning methods, we demonstrate the superiority of using VAE for feature extraction, as reflected by the significantly improved classification accuracies, better visualizations and reduced impurity measures in the feature representations. Future work can be directed to gaining an in-depth understanding regarding the spatial patterns that have been learned by the proposed model from a neurological view, as well as improving the interpretability of the proposed model by allowing it to uncover any temporal-related information.
summary: Obesity is a common issue in modern societies today that can lead to various diseases and significantly reduced quality of life. Currently, research has been conducted to investigate resting state EEG (electroencephalogram) signals with an aim to identify possible neurological characteristics associated with obesity. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework to extract the resting state EEG features for obese and lean subject classification. Specifically, a novel variational autoencoder framework is employed to extract subject-invariant features from the raw EEG signals, which are then classified by a 1-D convolutional neural network. Comparing with conventional machine learning and deep learning methods, we demonstrate the superiority of using VAE for feature extraction, as reflected by the significantly improved classification accuracies, better visualizations and reduced impurity measures in the feature representations. Future work can be directed to gaining an in-depth understanding regarding the spatial patterns that have been learned by the proposed model from a neurological view, as well as improving the interpretability of the proposed model by allowing it to uncover any temporal-related information.
abstract_zh: 肥胖是当今现代社会的一个常见问题，可导致各种疾病并显着降低生活质量。目前，正在进行研究调查静息态脑电图（EEG）信号，旨在确定与肥胖相关的可能的神经特征。在本研究中，我们提出了一个基于深度学习的框架来提取静息态脑电图特征以进行肥胖和瘦主题分类。具体来说，采用一种新颖的变分自动编码器框架从原始脑电图信号中提取主题不变特征，然后通过一维卷积神经网络对其进行分类。与传统的机器学习和深度学习方法相比，我们证明了使用 VAE 进行特征提取的优越性，这体现在特征表示中分类精度的显着提高、更好的可视化和减少的杂质测量。未来的工作可以致力于从神经学角度深入了解所提出的模型所学习的空间模式，并通过允许其发现任何与时间相关的信息来提高所提出的模型的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的深度学习框架，用于从静息状态脑电图（EEG）信号中提取特征，以实现对肥胖和非肥胖受试者的分类。
AI.motivation: 肥胖是一种普遍存在的问题，可能导致多种疾病并显著降低生活质量。目前的研究试图通过静息状态EEG信号识别与肥胖相关的神经特征，但传统方法在分类精度和特征表示方面存在不足。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的框架，从原始EEG信号中提取受试者不变的特征，然后使用一维卷积神经网络（1-D CNN）进行分类。
AI.result: 与传统的机器学习和深度学习方法相比，使用VAE进行特征提取显著提高了分类精度，同时改善了特征表示的可视化效果并减少了杂质度量。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了VAE在EEG信号特征提取中的优越性，未来的工作可以进一步从神经学角度深入理解模型所学习的空间模式，并提高模型的可解释性以揭示时间相关的信息。

Future work can be directed to gaining an in-depth understanding regarding the spatial patterns that have been learned by the proposed model from a neurological view, as well as improving the interpretability of the proposed model by allowing it to uncover any temporal-related information. 肥胖是当今现代社会的一个常见问题，可导致各种疾病并显着降低生活质量。目前，正在进行研究调查静息态脑电图（EEG）信号，旨在确定与肥胖相关的可能的神经特征。在本研究中，我们提出了一个基于深度学习的框架来提取静息态脑电图特征以进行肥胖和瘦主题分类。具体来说，采用一种新颖的变分自动编码器框架从原始脑电图信号中提取主题不变特征，然后通过一维卷积神经网络对其进行分类。与传统的机器学习和深度学习方法相比，我们证明了使用 VAE 进行特征提取的优越性，这体现在特征表示中分类精度的显着提高、更好的可视化和减少的杂质测量。未来的工作可以致力于从神经学角度深入了解所提出的模型所学习的空间模式，并通过允许其发现任何与时间相关的信息来提高所提出的模型的可解释性。 本文提出了一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的深度学习框架，用于从静息状态脑电图（EEG）信号中提取特征，以实现对肥胖和非肥胖受试者的分类。 Yuan Yue,Jeremiah D. Deng,Dirk De Ridder,Patrick Manning,Divya Adhia cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Kaitlin Gili,Rohan S. Kumar,Mykolas Sveistrys,C. J. Ballance
title: A supplemental investigation of non-linearity in quantum generative models with respect to simulatability and optimization
title_zh: 量子生成模型中非线性在可模拟性和优化方面的补充研究
abstract: Recent work has demonstrated the utility of introducing non-linearity through repeat-until-success (RUS) sub-routines into quantum circuits for generative modeling. As a follow-up to this work, we investigate two questions of relevance to the quantum algorithms and machine learning communities: Does introducing this form of non-linearity make the learning model classically simulatable due to the deferred measurement principle? And does introducing this form of non-linearity make the overall model's training more unstable? With respect to the first question, we demonstrate that the RUS sub-routines do not allow us to trivially map this quantum model to a classical one, whereas a model without RUS sub-circuits containing mid-circuit measurements could be mapped to a classical Bayesian network due to the deferred measurement principle of quantum mechanics. This strongly suggests that the proposed form of non-linearity makes the model classically in-efficient to simulate. In the pursuit of the second question, we train larger models than previously shown on three different probability distributions, one continuous and two discrete, and compare the training performance across multiple random trials. We see that while the model is able to perform exceptionally well in some trials, the variance across trials with certain datasets quantifies its relatively poor training stability.
summary: Recent work has demonstrated the utility of introducing non-linearity through repeat-until-success (RUS) sub-routines into quantum circuits for generative modeling. As a follow-up to this work, we investigate two questions of relevance to the quantum algorithms and machine learning communities: Does introducing this form of non-linearity make the learning model classically simulatable due to the deferred measurement principle? And does introducing this form of non-linearity make the overall model's training more unstable? With respect to the first question, we demonstrate that the RUS sub-routines do not allow us to trivially map this quantum model to a classical one, whereas a model without RUS sub-circuits containing mid-circuit measurements could be mapped to a classical Bayesian network due to the deferred measurement principle of quantum mechanics. This strongly suggests that the proposed form of non-linearity makes the model classically in-efficient to simulate. In the pursuit of the second question, we train larger models than previously shown on three different probability distributions, one continuous and two discrete, and compare the training performance across multiple random trials. We see that while the model is able to perform exceptionally well in some trials, the variance across trials with certain datasets quantifies its relatively poor training stability.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作证明了通过重复直到成功 (RUS) 子例程将非线性引入量子电路以进行生成建模的实用性。作为这项工作的后续工作，我们研究了与量子算法和机器学习社区相关的两个问题：由于延迟测量原理，引入这种形式的非线性是否会使学习模型经典地可模拟？引入这种形式的非线性是否会使整个模型的训练更加不稳定？关于第一个问题，我们证明 RUS 子例程不允许我们简单地将这个量子模型映射到经典模型，而由于量子力学的延迟测量原理，没有包含中间电路测量的 RUS 子电路的模型可以映射到经典贝叶斯网络。这强烈表明所提出的非线性形式使得模型的模拟效率通常较低。为了解决第二个问题，我们在三种不同的概率分布（一种连续的和两种离散的）上训练比之前显示的更大的模型，并比较多个随机试验的训练性能。我们看到，虽然该模型在某些试验中能够表现得非常好，但某些数据集的试验之间的方差量化了其相对较差的训练稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在量子生成模型中引入非线性（通过重复直到成功子程序RUS）对模型可模拟性和训练稳定性的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索量子生成模型中非线性机制的可行性，解决其是否可被经典模拟及训练稳定性问题，以推动量子机器学习发展。
AI.method: 通过分析RUS子程序与延迟测量原理的关系判断经典模拟性，并在不同概率分布上训练模型比较训练稳定性。
AI.result: RUS子程序使模型难以经典模拟，且在部分数据集上训练稳定性较差，存在较大方差。
AI.conclusion: 引入RUS非线性机制的量子模型具有经典不可模拟性，但训练稳定性不足，需进一步优化方法。

authors_text: Joshua Springer,Marcel Kyas
title: Autonomous Drone Landing: Marked Landing Pads and Solidified Lava Flows
title_zh: 无人机自主着陆：标记的着陆场和凝固的熔岩流
abstract: Landing is the most challenging and risky aspect of multirotor drone flight, and only simple landing methods exist for autonomous drones. We explore methods for autonomous drone landing in two scenarios. In the first scenario, we examine methods for landing on known landing pads using fiducial markers and a gimbal-mounted monocular camera. This method has potential in drone applications where a drone must land more accurately than GPS can provide (e.g.~package delivery in an urban canyon). We expand on previous methods by actuating the drone's camera to track the marker over time, and we address the complexities of pose estimation caused by fiducial marker orientation ambiguity. In the second scenario, and in collaboration with the RAVEN project, we explore methods for landing on solidified lava flows in Iceland, which serves as an analog environment for Mars and provides insight into the effectiveness of drone-rover exploration teams. Our drone uses a depth camera to visualize the terrain, and we are developing methods to analyze the terrain data for viable landing sites in real time with minimal sensors and external infrastructure requirements, so that the solution does not heavily influence the drone's behavior, mission structure, or operational environments.
summary: Landing is the most challenging and risky aspect of multirotor drone flight, and only simple landing methods exist for autonomous drones. We explore methods for autonomous drone landing in two scenarios. In the first scenario, we examine methods for landing on known landing pads using fiducial markers and a gimbal-mounted monocular camera. This method has potential in drone applications where a drone must land more accurately than GPS can provide (e.g.~package delivery in an urban canyon). We expand on previous methods by actuating the drone's camera to track the marker over time, and we address the complexities of pose estimation caused by fiducial marker orientation ambiguity. In the second scenario, and in collaboration with the RAVEN project, we explore methods for landing on solidified lava flows in Iceland, which serves as an analog environment for Mars and provides insight into the effectiveness of drone-rover exploration teams. Our drone uses a depth camera to visualize the terrain, and we are developing methods to analyze the terrain data for viable landing sites in real time with minimal sensors and external infrastructure requirements, so that the solution does not heavily influence the drone's behavior, mission structure, or operational environments.
abstract_zh: 着陆是多旋翼无人机飞行中最具挑战性和风险的方面，自主无人机仅存在简单的着陆方法。我们探索两种场景下无人机自主着陆的方法。在第一个场景中，我们研究使用基准标记和万向节安装的单目相机在已知着陆垫上着陆的方法。这种方法在无人机应用中具有潜力，其中无人机必须比 GPS 提供的着陆更准确（例如，在城市峡谷中运送包裹）。我们通过驱动无人机的相机随着时间的推移跟踪标记来扩展以前的方法，并解决由基准标记方向模糊引起的姿态估计的复杂性。在第二种情况下，我们与 RAVEN 项目合作，探索在冰岛凝固熔岩流上着陆的方法，该熔岩流可作为火星的模拟环境，并提供对无人机漫游车勘探团队有效性的深入了解。我们的无人机使用深度摄像头来可视化地形，我们正在开发方法，以最少的传感器和外部基础设施需求实时分析可行着陆点的地形数据，以便该解决方案不会严重影响无人机的行为、任务结构或操作环境。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多旋翼无人机在两种不同场景下的自主着陆方法：一种是使用标记的着陆垫，另一种是在冰岛固化的熔岩流上着陆。
AI.motivation: 无人机着陆是飞行中最具有挑战性和风险的部分，现有的自主着陆方法较为简单，因此需要探索更精确和可靠的着陆方法，特别是在复杂环境中。
AI.method: 第一种方法使用带有固定标记的着陆垫和云台安装的单目相机进行定位和跟踪，解决标记方向模糊带来的姿态估计问题；第二种方法使用深度相机对地形进行可视化，并实时分析地形数据以寻找合适的着陆点。
AI.result: 该研究成功开发了两种自主着陆方法，并验证了其在城市峡谷和类似火星环境（如冰岛熔岩流）中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为无人机在复杂环境中的自主着陆提供了可行的解决方案，并为未来的无人机-探测车协同探索任务提供了参考。
