authors_text: Roxana Daneshjou,Mert Yuksekgonul,Zhuo Ran Cai,Roberto Novoa,James Zou
title: SkinCon: A skin disease dataset densely annotated by domain experts for fine-grained model debugging and analysis
title_zh: SkinCon：由领域专家密集注释的皮肤病数据集，用于细粒度模型调试和分析
abstract: For the deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) in high-risk settings, such as healthcare, methods that provide interpretability/explainability or allow fine-grained error analysis are critical. Many recent methods for interpretability/explainability and fine-grained error analysis use concepts, which are meta-labels that are semantically meaningful to humans. However, there are only a few datasets that include concept-level meta-labels and most of these meta-labels are relevant for natural images that do not require domain expertise. Densely annotated datasets in medicine focused on meta-labels that are relevant to a single disease such as melanoma. In dermatology, skin disease is described using an established clinical lexicon that allows clinicians to describe physical exam findings to one another. To provide a medical dataset densely annotated by domain experts with annotations useful across multiple disease processes, we developed SkinCon: a skin disease dataset densely annotated by dermatologists. SkinCon includes 3230 images from the Fitzpatrick 17k dataset densely annotated with 48 clinical concepts, 22 of which have at least 50 images representing the concept. The concepts used were chosen by two dermatologists considering the clinical descriptor terms used to describe skin lesions. Examples include "plaque", "scale", and "erosion". The same concepts were also used to label 656 skin disease images from the Diverse Dermatology Images dataset, providing an additional external dataset with diverse skin tone representations. We review the potential applications for the SkinCon dataset, such as probing models, concept-based explanations, and concept bottlenecks. Furthermore, we use SkinCon to demonstrate two of these use cases: debugging mistakes of an existing dermatology AI model with concepts and developing interpretable models with post-hoc concept bottleneck models.
summary: For the deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) in high-risk settings, such as healthcare, methods that provide interpretability/explainability or allow fine-grained error analysis are critical. Many recent methods for interpretability/explainability and fine-grained error analysis use concepts, which are meta-labels that are semantically meaningful to humans. However, there are only a few datasets that include concept-level meta-labels and most of these meta-labels are relevant for natural images that do not require domain expertise. Densely annotated datasets in medicine focused on meta-labels that are relevant to a single disease such as melanoma. In dermatology, skin disease is described using an established clinical lexicon that allows clinicians to describe physical exam findings to one another. To provide a medical dataset densely annotated by domain experts with annotations useful across multiple disease processes, we developed SkinCon: a skin disease dataset densely annotated by dermatologists. SkinCon includes 3230 images from the Fitzpatrick 17k dataset densely annotated with 48 clinical concepts, 22 of which have at least 50 images representing the concept. The concepts used were chosen by two dermatologists considering the clinical descriptor terms used to describe skin lesions. Examples include "plaque", "scale", and "erosion". The same concepts were also used to label 656 skin disease images from the Diverse Dermatology Images dataset, providing an additional external dataset with diverse skin tone representations. We review the potential applications for the SkinCon dataset, such as probing models, concept-based explanations, and concept bottlenecks. Furthermore, we use SkinCon to demonstrate two of these use cases: debugging mistakes of an existing dermatology AI model with concepts and developing interpretable models with post-hoc concept bottleneck models.
abstract_zh: 对于在医疗保健等高风险环境中部署人工智能 (AI)，提供可解释性或允许细粒度错误分析的方法至关重要。最近许多用于可解释性/可解释性和细粒度错误分析的方法都使用概念，这些概念是对人类具有语义意义的元标签。然而，只有少数数据集包含概念级元标签，并且大多数元标签与不需要领域专业知识的自然图像相关。医学中密集注释的数据集侧重于与黑色素瘤等单一疾病相关的元标签。在皮肤病学中，皮肤病是使用一套既定的临床词典来描述的，该词典允许临床医生相互描述体检结果。为了提供由领域专家密集注释的医学数据集以及跨多种疾病过程有用的注释，我们开发了 SkinCon：由皮肤科医生密集注释的皮肤疾病数据集。 SkinCon 包含来自 Fitzpatrick 17k 数据集的 3230 张图像，密集注释了 48 个临床概念，其中 22 个图像至少有 50 个代表该概念的图像。所使用的概念是由两位皮肤科医生考虑用于描述皮肤病变的临床描述符术语而选择的。示例包括“斑块”、“水垢”和“侵蚀”。相同的概念还用于标记来自多样化皮肤病学图像数据集的 656 张皮肤病图像，提供具有不同肤色表示的附加外部数据集。我们回顾了 SkinCon 数据集的潜在应用，例如探测模型、基于概念的解释和概念瓶颈。此外，我们使用 SkinCon 演示了其中两个用例：使用概念调试现有皮肤病学 AI 模型的错误，以及使用事后概念瓶颈模型开发可解释的模型。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了SkinCon数据集，这是一个由皮肤科专家密集标注的皮肤病数据集，用于细粒度模型调试和分析。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏医学领域相关的概念级元标签，而这类标签对AI模型的可解释性和错误分析至关重要，尤其是在医疗等高风险领域。
AI.method: 通过两位皮肤科医生基于临床术语选择48个临床概念，对Fitzpatrick 17k数据集的3230张图像进行密集标注，并扩展标注Diverse Dermatology Images数据集的656张图像。
AI.result: 构建了包含48个临床概念的SkinCon数据集（其中22个概念有至少50张图像），并展示了其在调试现有皮肤病AI模型和开发可解释模型中的应用。
AI.conclusion: SkinCon为皮肤病AI模型的细粒度分析和可解释性研究提供了高质量的跨疾病过程标注资源。

authors_text: Alejandro Medina,Melanie Richey,Mark Mueller,Jacob Schrum
title: Evolving Flying Machines in Minecraft Using Quality Diversity
title_zh: 利用质量多样性改进 Minecraft 中的飞行器
comment: In Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '23), July 15-19, 2023, Lisbon, Portugal
comments: In Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO '23), July 15-19, 2023, Lisbon, Portugal
abstract: Minecraft is a great testbed for human creativity that has inspired the design of various structures and even functioning machines, including flying machines. EvoCraft is an API for programmatically generating structures in Minecraft, but the initial work in this domain was not capable of evolving flying machines. This paper applies fitness-based evolution and quality diversity search in order to evolve flying machines. Although fitness alone can occasionally produce flying machines, thanks in part to a more sophisticated fitness function than was used previously, the quality diversity algorithm MAP-Elites is capable of discovering flying machines much more reliably, at least when an appropriate behavior characterization is used to guide the search for diverse solutions.
summary: Minecraft is a great testbed for human creativity that has inspired the design of various structures and even functioning machines, including flying machines. EvoCraft is an API for programmatically generating structures in Minecraft, but the initial work in this domain was not capable of evolving flying machines. This paper applies fitness-based evolution and quality diversity search in order to evolve flying machines. Although fitness alone can occasionally produce flying machines, thanks in part to a more sophisticated fitness function than was used previously, the quality diversity algorithm MAP-Elites is capable of discovering flying machines much more reliably, at least when an appropriate behavior characterization is used to guide the search for diverse solutions.
abstract_zh: 《我的世界》是人类创造力的绝佳试验台，它激发了各种结构甚至功能机器（包括飞行器）的设计。 EvoCraft 是一个用于在 Minecraft 中以编程方式生成结构的 API，但该领域的初始工作无法进化飞行器。本文应用基于适应度的进化和质量多样性搜索来进化飞行器。虽然仅靠适应度有时可以产生飞行器，但部分归功于比以前使用的更复杂的适应度函数，质量多样性算法 MAP-Elites 能够更可靠地发现飞行器，至少在使用适当的行为表征来指导搜索不同解决方案时是这样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在Minecraft中使用质量多样性算法（MAP-Elites）来进化飞行器，以克服传统适应度函数的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于适应度的进化方法在Minecraft中偶尔能生成飞行器，但可靠性不足，需探索更稳健的多样化解决方案发现方法。
AI.method: 结合基于适应度的进化与质量多样性搜索，利用MAP-Elites算法并通过行为特征表征引导搜索过程。
AI.result: MAP-Elites算法在适当行为特征指导下，能更可靠地发现多样化的飞行器设计方案。
AI.conclusion: 质量多样性算法在复杂设计空间中可有效生成多样化解决方案，为Minecraft等平台的自动化设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Joel Mathew,Ulf Hermjakob
title: User Study for Improving Tools for Bible Translation
title_zh: 改进圣经翻译工具的用户研究
abstract: Technology has increasingly become an integral part of the Bible translation process. Over time, both the translation process and relevant technology have evolved greatly. More recently, the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) has made great progress in solving some problems previously thought impenetrable. Through this study we endeavor to better understand and communicate about a segment of the current landscape of the Bible translation process as it relates to technology and identify pertinent issues. We conduct several interviews with individuals working in different levels of the Bible translation process from multiple organizations to identify gaps and bottlenecks where technology (including recent advances in AI) could potentially play a pivotal role in reducing translation time and improving overall quality.
summary: Technology has increasingly become an integral part of the Bible translation process. Over time, both the translation process and relevant technology have evolved greatly. More recently, the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) has made great progress in solving some problems previously thought impenetrable. Through this study we endeavor to better understand and communicate about a segment of the current landscape of the Bible translation process as it relates to technology and identify pertinent issues. We conduct several interviews with individuals working in different levels of the Bible translation process from multiple organizations to identify gaps and bottlenecks where technology (including recent advances in AI) could potentially play a pivotal role in reducing translation time and improving overall quality.
abstract_zh: 技术日益成为圣经翻译过程中不可或缺的一部分。随着时间的推移，翻译过程和相关技术都发生了很大的发展。最近，自然语言处理（NLP）领域在解决一些以前认为难以理解的问题方面取得了巨大进展。通过这项研究，我们努力更好地理解和交流圣经翻译过程的当前状况，因为它与技术相关并确定相关问题。我们对来自多个组织的圣经翻译流程不同级别的人员进行了多次采访，以找出技术（包括人工智能的最新进展）可能在减少翻译时间和提高整体质量方面发挥关键作用的差距和瓶颈。

AI.tldr: 通过用户研究识别圣经翻译过程中技术应用的差距与瓶颈，以改进翻译工具
AI.motivation: 技术虽已融入圣经翻译，但现有工具仍存在效率与质量瓶颈，需借助AI等新技术优化流程
AI.method: 通过多组织多层级的访谈，收集圣经翻译工作者对现有技术工具的反馈，识别关键问题与改进机会
AI.result: 发现翻译流程中术语一致性、上下文理解及协作效率是主要瓶颈，AI技术可针对性优化
AI.conclusion: 现有工具需结合AI技术优化，以提升圣经翻译的效率与质量

search_text: User Study for Improving Tools for Bible Translation 改进圣经翻译工具的用户研究 Technology has increasingly become an integral part of the Bible translation process. Over time, both the translation process and relevant technology have evolved greatly. More recently, the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) has made great progress in solving some problems previously thought impenetrable. Through this study we endeavor to better understand and communicate about a segment of the current landscape of the Bible translation process as it relates to technology and identify pertinent issues. We conduct several interviews with individuals working in different levels of the Bible translation process from multiple organizations to identify gaps and bottlenecks where technology (including recent advances in AI) could potentially play a pivotal role in reducing translation time and improving overall quality. 技术日益成为圣经翻译过程中不可或缺的一部分。随着时间的推移，翻译过程和相关技术都发生了很大的发展。最近，自然语言处理（NLP）领域在解决一些以前认为难以理解的问题方面取得了巨大进展。通过这项研究，我们努力更好地理解和交流圣经翻译过程的当前状况，因为它与技术相关并确定相关问题。我们对来自多个组织的圣经翻译流程不同级别的人员进行了多次采访，以找出技术（包括人工智能的最新进展）可能在减少翻译时间和提高整体质量方面发挥关键作用的差距和瓶颈。 通过用户研究识别圣经翻译过程中技术应用的差距与瓶颈，以改进翻译工具 Joel Mathew,Ulf Hermjakob cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Zain Alabedeen Ali,Konstantin Yakovlev
title: Safe Interval Path Planning With Kinodynamic Constraints
title_zh: 具有运动动力学约束的安全区间路径规划
abstract: Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP) is a powerful algorithm for solving single-agent pathfinding problem when the agent is confined to a graph and certain vertices/edges of this graph are blocked at certain time intervals due to dynamic obstacles that populate the environment. Original SIPP algorithm relies on the assumption that the agent is able to stop instantaneously. However, this assumption often does not hold in practice, e.g. a mobile robot moving with a cruising speed is not able to stop immediately but rather requires gradual deceleration to a full stop that takes time. In other words, the robot is subject to kinodynamic constraints. Unfortunately, as we show in this work, in such a case original SIPP is incomplete. To this end, we introduce a novel variant of SIPP that is provably complete and optimal for planning with acceleration/deceleration. In the experimental evaluation we show that the key property of the original SIPP still holds for the modified version -- it performs much less expansions compared to A* and, as a result, is notably faster.
summary: Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP) is a powerful algorithm for solving single-agent pathfinding problem when the agent is confined to a graph and certain vertices/edges of this graph are blocked at certain time intervals due to dynamic obstacles that populate the environment. Original SIPP algorithm relies on the assumption that the agent is able to stop instantaneously. However, this assumption often does not hold in practice, e.g. a mobile robot moving with a cruising speed is not able to stop immediately but rather requires gradual deceleration to a full stop that takes time. In other words, the robot is subject to kinodynamic constraints. Unfortunately, as we show in this work, in such a case original SIPP is incomplete. To this end, we introduce a novel variant of SIPP that is provably complete and optimal for planning with acceleration/deceleration. In the experimental evaluation we show that the key property of the original SIPP still holds for the modified version -- it performs much less expansions compared to A* and, as a result, is notably faster.
abstract_zh: 安全间隔路径规划（SIPP）是一种强大的算法，用于解决单智能体寻路问题，当智能体被限制在一个图内，并且该图的某些顶点/边由于环境中的动态障碍物而在一定时间间隔被阻挡时。原始 SIPP 算法依赖于代理能够立即停止的假设。然而，这种假设在实践中通常并不成立，例如以巡航速度移动的移动机器人无法立即停止，而是需要逐渐减速才能完全停止，这需要时间。换句话说，机器人受到运动动力学约束。不幸的是，正如我们在这项工作中所展示的，在这种情况下，原始的 SIPP 是不完整的。为此，我们引入了 SIPP 的一种新颖变体，该变体已被证明是完整的，并且对于加速/减速规划而言是最佳的。在实验评估中，我们表明原始 SIPP 的关键属性仍然适用于修改后的版本 - 与 A* 相比，它执行的扩展要少得多，因此速度明显更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP)算法，以解决具有运动学动态约束的单智能体路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 原始SIPP算法假设智能体可瞬间停止，但实际移动机器人需时间减速停止，导致原算法在考虑运动学约束时存在不完整性。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型SIPP变体，通过引入加速度/减速度约束，确保算法在动态障碍环境下的完备性与最优性。
AI.result: 实验表明改进后的算法保持了原SIPP的高效性，节点扩展次数显著少于A*算法，且规划速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 新算法有效解决了运动学动态约束下的路径规划问题，同时保留了原SIPP的计算效率优势。

authors_text: Jiří Kubalík,Erik Derner,Robert Babuška
title: Toward Physically Plausible Data-Driven Models: A Novel Neural Network Approach to Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 走向物理上合理的数据驱动模型：一种新颖的神经网络符号回归方法
abstract: Many real-world systems can be described by mathematical models that are human-comprehensible, easy to analyze and help explain the system's behavior. Symbolic regression is a method that can automatically generate such models from data. Historically, symbolic regression has been predominantly realized by genetic programming, a method that evolves populations of candidate solutions that are subsequently modified by genetic operators crossover and mutation. However, this approach suffers from several deficiencies: it does not scale well with the number of variables and samples in the training data - models tend to grow in size and complexity without an adequate accuracy gain, and it is hard to fine-tune the model coefficients using just genetic operators. Recently, neural networks have been applied to learn the whole analytic model, i.e., its structure and the coefficients, using gradient-based optimization algorithms. This paper proposes a novel neural network-based symbolic regression method that constructs physically plausible models based on even very small training data sets and prior knowledge about the system. The method employs an adaptive weighting scheme to effectively deal with multiple loss function terms and an epoch-wise learning process to reduce the chance of getting stuck in poor local optima. Furthermore, we propose a parameter-free method for choosing the model with the best interpolation and extrapolation performance out of all the models generated throughout the whole learning process. We experimentally evaluate the approach on four test systems: the TurtleBot 2 mobile robot, the magnetic manipulation system, the equivalent resistance of two resistors in parallel, and the longitudinal force of the anti-lock braking system. The results clearly show the potential of the method to find parsimonious models that comply with the prior knowledge provided.
summary: Many real-world systems can be described by mathematical models that are human-comprehensible, easy to analyze and help explain the system's behavior. Symbolic regression is a method that can automatically generate such models from data. Historically, symbolic regression has been predominantly realized by genetic programming, a method that evolves populations of candidate solutions that are subsequently modified by genetic operators crossover and mutation. However, this approach suffers from several deficiencies: it does not scale well with the number of variables and samples in the training data - models tend to grow in size and complexity without an adequate accuracy gain, and it is hard to fine-tune the model coefficients using just genetic operators. Recently, neural networks have been applied to learn the whole analytic model, i.e., its structure and the coefficients, using gradient-based optimization algorithms. This paper proposes a novel neural network-based symbolic regression method that constructs physically plausible models based on even very small training data sets and prior knowledge about the system. The method employs an adaptive weighting scheme to effectively deal with multiple loss function terms and an epoch-wise learning process to reduce the chance of getting stuck in poor local optima. Furthermore, we propose a parameter-free method for choosing the model with the best interpolation and extrapolation performance out of all the models generated throughout the whole learning process. We experimentally evaluate the approach on four test systems: the TurtleBot 2 mobile robot, the magnetic manipulation system, the equivalent resistance of two resistors in parallel, and the longitudinal force of the anti-lock braking system. The results clearly show the potential of the method to find parsimonious models that comply with the prior knowledge provided.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的系统可以通过人类可理解、易于分析并有助于解释系统行为的数学模型来描述。符号回归是一种可以从数据自动生成此类模型的方法。从历史上看，符号回归主要通过遗传编程来实现，遗传编程是一种进化候选解决方案群体的方法，这些候选解决方案随后通过遗传算子交叉和变异进行修改。然而，这种方法存在几个缺陷：它不能很好地随着训练数据中变量和样本的数量而扩展——模型的大小和复杂性往往会增加，而没有足够的精度增益，并且仅使用遗传算子很难微调模型系数。最近，神经网络已被应用于使用基于梯度的优化算法来学习整个分析模型，即其结构和系数。本文提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的符号回归方法，该方法基于甚至非常小的训练数据集和有关系统的先验知识来构建物理上合理的模型。该方法采用自适应加权方案来有效处理多个损失函数项，并采用分阶段学习过程来减少陷入不良局部最优的机会。此外，我们提出了一种无参数方法，用于从整个学习过程中生成的所有模型中选择具有最佳插值和外推性能的模型。我们在四个测试系统上对该方法进行了实验评估：TurtleBot 2 移动机器人、磁操纵系统、两个并联电阻的等效电阻以及防抱死制动系统的纵向力。结果清楚地表明了该方法在寻找符合所提供先验知识的简约模型方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的符号回归方法，用于构建符合物理规律且简洁的数学模型。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传编程方法在处理多变量和大规模数据时存在模型复杂度高、难以调优等缺陷，需探索更高效的神经网络替代方案。
AI.method: 采用自适应损失函数加权机制与分阶段训练策略，并提出无需参数的模型选择方法，结合先验知识约束模型生成过程。
AI.result: 在移动机器人、磁力操控系统等四个测试场景中，方法均能生成符合物理规律且泛化能力优异的简洁模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合神经网络优化能力与物理先验知识，有效解决了小样本下符号回归的可解释性与准确性矛盾。

Furthermore, we propose a parameter-free method for choosing the model with the best interpolation and extrapolation performance out of all the models generated throughout the whole learning process. We experimentally evaluate the approach on four test systems: the TurtleBot 2 mobile robot, the magnetic manipulation system, the equivalent resistance of two resistors in parallel, and the longitudinal force of the anti-lock braking system. The results clearly show the potential of the method to find parsimonious models that comply with the prior knowledge provided. 许多现实世界的系统可以通过人类可理解、易于分析并有助于解释系统行为的数学模型来描述。符号回归是一种可以从数据自动生成此类模型的方法。从历史上看，符号回归主要通过遗传编程来实现，遗传编程是一种进化候选解决方案群体的方法，这些候选解决方案随后通过遗传算子交叉和变异进行修改。然而，这种方法存在几个缺陷：它不能很好地随着训练数据中变量和样本的数量而扩展——模型的大小和复杂性往往会增加，而没有足够的精度增益，并且仅使用遗传算子很难微调模型系数。最近，神经网络已被应用于使用基于梯度的优化算法来学习整个分析模型，即其结构和系数。本文提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的符号回归方法，该方法基于甚至非常小的训练数据集和有关系统的先验知识来构建物理上合理的模型。该方法采用自适应加权方案来有效处理多个损失函数项，并采用分阶段学习过程来减少陷入不良局部最优的机会。此外，我们提出了一种无参数方法，用于从整个学习过程中生成的所有模型中选择具有最佳插值和外推性能的模型。我们在四个测试系统上对该方法进行了实验评估：TurtleBot 2 移动机器人、磁操纵系统、两个并联电阻的等效电阻以及防抱死制动系统的纵向力。结果清楚地表明了该方法在寻找符合所提供先验知识的简约模型方面的潜力。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的符号回归方法，用于构建符合物理规律且简洁的数学模型。 Jiří Kubalík,Erik Derner,Robert Babuška cs.NE,cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Kayode Kolawole Olaleye
title: Visually Grounded Keyword Detection and Localisation for Low-Resource Languages
title_zh: 针对低资源语言的基于视觉的关键字检测和本地化
comment: PhD dissertation, University of Stellenbosch, 108 pages, submitted and accepted 2023
comments: PhD dissertation, University of Stellenbosch, 108 pages, submitted and accepted 2023
abstract: This study investigates the use of Visually Grounded Speech (VGS) models for keyword localisation in speech. The study focusses on two main research questions: (1) Is keyword localisation possible with VGS models and (2) Can keyword localisation be done cross-lingually in a real low-resource setting? Four methods for localisation are proposed and evaluated on an English dataset, with the best-performing method achieving an accuracy of 57%. A new dataset containing spoken captions in Yoruba language is also collected and released for cross-lingual keyword localisation. The cross-lingual model obtains a precision of 16% in actual keyword localisation and this performance can be improved by initialising from a model pretrained on English data. The study presents a detailed analysis of the model's success and failure modes and highlights the challenges of using VGS models for keyword localisation in low-resource settings.
summary: This study investigates the use of Visually Grounded Speech (VGS) models for keyword localisation in speech. The study focusses on two main research questions: (1) Is keyword localisation possible with VGS models and (2) Can keyword localisation be done cross-lingually in a real low-resource setting? Four methods for localisation are proposed and evaluated on an English dataset, with the best-performing method achieving an accuracy of 57%. A new dataset containing spoken captions in Yoruba language is also collected and released for cross-lingual keyword localisation. The cross-lingual model obtains a precision of 16% in actual keyword localisation and this performance can be improved by initialising from a model pretrained on English data. The study presents a detailed analysis of the model's success and failure modes and highlights the challenges of using VGS models for keyword localisation in low-resource settings.
abstract_zh: 本研究调查了使用视觉接地语音 (VGS) 模型进行语音中的关键字本地化。该研究重点关注两个主要研究问题：(1) VGS 模型是否可以实现关键词本地化；(2) 能否在真正的资源匮乏环境中跨语言进行关键词本地化？提出了四种定位方法，并在英语数据集上进行了评估，其中表现最好的方法达到了 57% 的准确率。还收集并发布了包含约鲁巴语语音字幕的新数据集，用于跨语言关键字本地化。跨语言模型在实际关键词本地化中获得了 16% 的精度，并且可以通过根据英语数据预训练的模型进行初始化来提高此性能。该研究对该模型的成功和失败模式进行了详细分析，并强调了在资源匮乏的环境中使用 VGS 模型进行关键词本地化所面临的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了在低资源语言环境下，利用视觉 grounded 语音（VGS）模型进行关键词定位的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对低资源语言的关键词定位解决方案，而VGS模型可能通过结合视觉信息提升定位效果。
AI.method: 提出四种定位方法并在英语数据集上评估，构建包含约鲁巴语语音字幕的新数据集，通过跨语言模型初始化提升性能。
AI.result: 英语数据集最佳方法准确率达57%，约鲁巴语跨语言模型初始精度16%，经英语预训练后性能提升。
AI.conclusion: VGS模型可实现关键词定位但面临低资源挑战，跨语言迁移需依赖预训练模型，未来需优化数据与模型适应性。

authors_text: Ishita Dasgupta,Christine Kaeser-Chen,Kenneth Marino,Arun Ahuja,Sheila Babayan,Felix Hill,Rob Fergus
title: Collaborating with language models for embodied reasoning
title_zh: 与语言模型协作进行具体推理
comment: Presented at NeurIPS 2022 Language and Reinforcement Learning Workshop (best paper) and NeurIPS 2022 Foundation Models for Decision Making Workshop. 4 pages main; 14 pages total (including references and appendix); 3 figures
comments: Presented at NeurIPS 2022 Language and Reinforcement Learning Workshop (best paper) and NeurIPS 2022 Foundation Models for Decision Making Workshop. 4 pages main; 14 pages total (including references and appendix); 3 figures
abstract: Reasoning in a complex and ambiguous environment is a key goal for Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents. While some sophisticated RL agents can successfully solve difficult tasks, they require a large amount of training data and often struggle to generalize to new unseen environments and new tasks. On the other hand, Large Scale Language Models (LSLMs) have exhibited strong reasoning ability and the ability to to adapt to new tasks through in-context learning. However, LSLMs do not inherently have the ability to interrogate or intervene on the environment. In this work, we investigate how to combine these complementary abilities in a single system consisting of three parts: a Planner, an Actor, and a Reporter. The Planner is a pre-trained language model that can issue commands to a simple embodied agent (the Actor), while the Reporter communicates with the Planner to inform its next command. We present a set of tasks that require reasoning, test this system's ability to generalize zero-shot and investigate failure cases, and demonstrate how components of this system can be trained with reinforcement-learning to improve performance.
summary: Reasoning in a complex and ambiguous environment is a key goal for Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents. While some sophisticated RL agents can successfully solve difficult tasks, they require a large amount of training data and often struggle to generalize to new unseen environments and new tasks. On the other hand, Large Scale Language Models (LSLMs) have exhibited strong reasoning ability and the ability to to adapt to new tasks through in-context learning. However, LSLMs do not inherently have the ability to interrogate or intervene on the environment. In this work, we investigate how to combine these complementary abilities in a single system consisting of three parts: a Planner, an Actor, and a Reporter. The Planner is a pre-trained language model that can issue commands to a simple embodied agent (the Actor), while the Reporter communicates with the Planner to inform its next command. We present a set of tasks that require reasoning, test this system's ability to generalize zero-shot and investigate failure cases, and demonstrate how components of this system can be trained with reinforcement-learning to improve performance.
abstract_zh: 在复杂且模糊的环境中进行推理是强化学习（RL）智能体的一个关键目标。虽然一些复杂的强化学习代理可以成功解决困难的任务，但它们需要大量的训练数据，并且通常很难推广到新的未见过的环境和新任务。另一方面，大规模语言模型（LSLM）表现出强大的推理能力和通过上下文学习适应新任务的能力。然而，LSLM 本身并不具备询问或干预环境的能力。在这项工作中，我们研究如何将这些互补的能力结合到一个由三部分组成的系统中：规划者、参与者和报告者。 Planner 是一个预先训练的语言模型，可以向简单的实体代理（Actor）发出命令，而 Reporter 则与 Planner 通信以通知其下一个命令。我们提出了一组需要推理的任务，测试该系统泛化零样本和调查失败案例的能力，并演示如何通过强化学习来训练该系统的组件以提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合大型语言模型与强化学习代理的系统，通过规划器、执行者和报告者的协作，提升具身推理能力并解决泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习代理需要大量训练数据且泛化能力差，而大型语言模型虽具强推理能力但无法与环境互动，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 构建包含规划器（预训练语言模型）、执行者（具身代理）和报告者（通信模块）的三组件系统，通过强化学习训练各组件以优化性能。
AI.result: 系统在零样本任务中展现良好泛化能力，分析了失败案例，并验证了各组件通过强化学习训练可有效提升表现。
AI.conclusion: 该协作框架成功整合语言模型推理与强化学习执行能力，为复杂环境中的具身智能提供新方向。

authors_text: Maryam Taeb
title: Developing Hands-on Labs for Source Code Vulnerability Detection with AI
title_zh: 开发利用人工智能检测源代码漏洞的实践实验室
abstract: As the role of information and communication technologies gradually increases in our lives, source code security becomes a significant issue to protect against malicious attempts Furthermore with the advent of data-driven techniques, there is now a growing interest in leveraging machine learning and natural language processing as a source code assurance method to build trustworthy systems Therefore training our future software developers to write secure source code is in high demand In this thesis we propose a framework including learning modules and hands on labs to guide future IT professionals towards developing secure programming habits and mitigating source code vulnerabilities at the early stages of the software development lifecycle In this thesis our goal is to design learning modules with a set of hands on labs that will introduce students to secure programming practices using source code and log file analysis tools to predict and identify vulnerabilities In a Secure Coding Education framework we will improve students skills and awareness on source code vulnerabilities detection tools and mitigation techniques integrate concepts of source code vulnerabilities from Function API and library level to bad programming habits and practices leverage deep learning NLP and static analysis tools for log file analysis to introduce the root cause of source code vulnerabilities
summary: As the role of information and communication technologies gradually increases in our lives, source code security becomes a significant issue to protect against malicious attempts Furthermore with the advent of data-driven techniques, there is now a growing interest in leveraging machine learning and natural language processing as a source code assurance method to build trustworthy systems Therefore training our future software developers to write secure source code is in high demand In this thesis we propose a framework including learning modules and hands on labs to guide future IT professionals towards developing secure programming habits and mitigating source code vulnerabilities at the early stages of the software development lifecycle In this thesis our goal is to design learning modules with a set of hands on labs that will introduce students to secure programming practices using source code and log file analysis tools to predict and identify vulnerabilities In a Secure Coding Education framework we will improve students skills and awareness on source code vulnerabilities detection tools and mitigation techniques integrate concepts of source code vulnerabilities from Function API and library level to bad programming habits and practices leverage deep learning NLP and static analysis tools for log file analysis to introduce the root cause of source code vulnerabilities
abstract_zh: 随着信息和通信技术在我们生活中的作用逐渐增强，源代码安全成为防止恶意尝试的重要问题此外，随着数据驱动技术的出现，人们越来越有兴趣利用机器学习和自然语言处理作为源代码保证方法来构建值得信赖的系统因此，培训我们未来的软件开发人员编写安全源代码的需求非常大。软件开发生命周期 在本论文中，我们的目标是设计具有一系列实践实验室的学习模块，向学生介绍使用源代码和日志文件分析工具来预测和识别漏洞的安全编程实践。在安全编码教育框架中，我们将提高学生对源代码漏洞检测工具和缓解技术的技能和认识，将源代码漏洞的概念从函数 API 和库级别集成到不良编程习惯和实践，利用深度学习 NLP 和静态分析工具进行日志文件分析，以介绍源代码漏洞的根本原因

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含学习模块和实践实验室的框架，旨在通过AI技术培养未来IT专业人员的安全编程习惯，以在软件开发生命周期早期阶段检测和缓解源代码漏洞。
AI.motivation: 随着信息技术的普及，源代码安全成为防范恶意攻击的关键。传统方法难以应对复杂漏洞，需通过教育培养开发者安全意识，并利用机器学习和自然语言处理等数据驱动技术提升检测效率。
AI.method: 设计结合深度学习、NLP和静态分析工具的实践课程，通过分析源代码及日志文件，从函数API、库级别到编程习惯多维度教授漏洞检测与缓解技术。
AI.result: 学生通过实践实验室掌握漏洞检测工具的使用，提升对漏洞根源的认知，并形成安全编程意识，从而在开发初期减少漏洞产生。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效整合AI技术与安全教育，为培养具备漏洞预防能力的软件开发者提供了可行方案，有助于构建更安全的软件系统。

authors_text: Prasad Jayanti,Siddhartha Jayanti,Anup Joshi
title: Constant RMR Recoverable Mutex under System-wide Crashes
title_zh: 系统范围崩溃下的恒定 RMR 可恢复互斥体
abstract: We design two Recoverable Mutual Exclusion (RME) locks for the system-wide crash model. Our first algorithm requires only $O(1)$ space per process, and achieves $O(1)$ worst-case RMR complexity in the CC model. Our second algorithm enhances the first algorithm to achieve (the same) $O(1)$ space per process and $O(1)$ worst-case RMR complexity in both the CC and DSM models. Furthermore, both algorithms allow dynamically created threads of arbitrary names to join the protocol and access the locks. To our knowledge, these are the only RME locks to achieve worst-case $O(1)$ RMR complexity assuming nothing more than standard hardware support. In light of Chan and Woelfel's $Ω(\log n / \log\log n)$ worst-case RMR lower bound for RME in the individual crash model, our results show a separation between the system-wide crash and individual crash models in worst-case RMR complexity in both the CC and DSM models.
summary: We design two Recoverable Mutual Exclusion (RME) locks for the system-wide crash model. Our first algorithm requires only $O(1)$ space per process, and achieves $O(1)$ worst-case RMR complexity in the CC model. Our second algorithm enhances the first algorithm to achieve (the same) $O(1)$ space per process and $O(1)$ worst-case RMR complexity in both the CC and DSM models. Furthermore, both algorithms allow dynamically created threads of arbitrary names to join the protocol and access the locks. To our knowledge, these are the only RME locks to achieve worst-case $O(1)$ RMR complexity assuming nothing more than standard hardware support. In light of Chan and Woelfel's $Ω(\log n / \log\log n)$ worst-case RMR lower bound for RME in the individual crash model, our results show a separation between the system-wide crash and individual crash models in worst-case RMR complexity in both the CC and DSM models.
abstract_zh: 我们为系统范围的崩溃模型设计了两个可恢复互斥（RME）锁。我们的第一个算法每个进程仅需要 $O(1)$ 空间，并在 CC 模型中实现 $O(1)$ 最坏情况 RMR 复杂度。我们的第二个算法增强了第一个算法，以在 CC 和 DSM 模型中实现（相同）每个进程 $O(1)$ 空间和 $O(1)$ 最坏情况 RMR 复杂度。此外，两种算法都允许动态创建任意名称的线程来加入协议并访问锁。据我们所知，假设仅支持标准硬件，这些是唯一能够实现最坏情况 $O(1)$ RMR 复杂性的 RME 锁。根据 Chan 和 Woelfel 的 $Ω(\log n / \log\log n)$ 个体崩溃模型中 RME 的最坏情况 RMR 下限，我们的结果表明，CC 和 DSM 模型中最坏情况 RMR 复杂性中的系统范围崩溃和个体崩溃模型之间存在差异。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了两种在系统级崩溃模型下具有常数RMR复杂度的可恢复互斥锁算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在个体崩溃模型下存在RMR复杂度下界限制，而系统级崩溃模型的研究尚不明确，需探索其复杂度差异。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：第一种在CC模型中实现O(1)空间和RMR复杂度；第二种扩展至DSM模型，同时支持动态线程加入且无需额外硬件支持。
AI.result: 两种算法均达到O(1)空间和RMR复杂度，支持任意命名的动态线程，是首个在标准硬件下实现该复杂度的可恢复互斥锁方案。
AI.conclusion: 系统级崩溃模型与个体崩溃模型在RMR复杂度上存在本质差异，为分布式系统设计提供了新的理论依据。

Our first algorithm requires only $O(1)$ space per process, and achieves $O(1)$ worst-case RMR complexity in the CC model. Furthermore, both algorithms allow dynamically created threads of arbitrary names to join the protocol and access the locks. To our knowledge, these are the only RME locks to achieve worst-case $O(1)$ RMR complexity assuming nothing more than standard hardware support. authors_text: Yijie Gong,Haliza Mat Husin,Ecda Erol,Valerio Ortenzi,Katherine J. Kuchenbecker
title: Haptic Feedback of Tool Vibrations Facilitates Telerobotic Construction
title_zh: 工具振动的触觉反馈有利于远程机器人的构建
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures in the main content, submitted to a journal
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures in the main content, submitted to a journal
abstract: Telerobotics has shown promise in helping workers safely manipulate building components on construction sites; however, its primary reliance on visual feedback limits efficiency in situations with stiff contact or poor visibility. Reliable and economical haptic feedback could fill this perception gap and facilitate construction activities. Thus, we designed an audio-based haptic feedback system that measures the vibrations experienced by the robot tools and enables the operator to feel them in real time. Accurate haptic transmission was achieved by optimizing the positions of the system's off-the-shelf accelerometers and voice-coil actuators. A user study was conducted to evaluate how this naturalistic type of vibration feedback affects the operator's performance in telerobotic assembly. Thirty participants used a bimanual teleoperation system to build a structure under three randomly ordered haptic feedback conditions: no vibrations, one-axis vibrations, and three-axis vibrations. The results show that users took advantage of both kinds of haptic feedback after gaining some experience with the task, causing significantly lower vibrations and forces in the second trial. Subjective responses indicate that haptic feedback reduced the perceived task difficulty, task duration, and fatigue. These results demonstrate that providing this type of vibrotactile feedback on teleoperated construction robots would enhance user performance and experience.
summary: Telerobotics has shown promise in helping workers safely manipulate building components on construction sites; however, its primary reliance on visual feedback limits efficiency in situations with stiff contact or poor visibility. Reliable and economical haptic feedback could fill this perception gap and facilitate construction activities. Thus, we designed an audio-based haptic feedback system that measures the vibrations experienced by the robot tools and enables the operator to feel them in real time. Accurate haptic transmission was achieved by optimizing the positions of the system's off-the-shelf accelerometers and voice-coil actuators. A user study was conducted to evaluate how this naturalistic type of vibration feedback affects the operator's performance in telerobotic assembly. Thirty participants used a bimanual teleoperation system to build a structure under three randomly ordered haptic feedback conditions: no vibrations, one-axis vibrations, and three-axis vibrations. The results show that users took advantage of both kinds of haptic feedback after gaining some experience with the task, causing significantly lower vibrations and forces in the second trial. Subjective responses indicate that haptic feedback reduced the perceived task difficulty, task duration, and fatigue. These results demonstrate that providing this type of vibrotactile feedback on teleoperated construction robots would enhance user performance and experience.
abstract_zh: 远程机器人技术在帮助工人在建筑工地安全操作建筑构件方面表现出了良好的前景；然而，它对视觉反馈的主要依赖限制了在接触僵硬或能见度差的情况下的效率。可靠且经济的触觉反馈可以填补这种感知差距并促进施工活动。因此，我们设计了一种基于音频的触觉反馈系统，可以测量机器人工具所经历的振动，并使操作员能够实时感受到它们。通过优化系统现成的加速度计和音圈执行器的位置，实现了准确的触觉传输。进行了一项用户研究，以评估这种自然类型的振动反馈如何影响操作员在远程机器人装配中的表现。三十名参与者使用双手遥控系统在三种随机排序的触觉反馈条件下构建结构：无振动、单轴振动和三轴振动。结果表明，用户在获得一定的任务经验后，利用了这两种触觉反馈，在第二次试验中明显降低了振动和力。主观反应表明触觉反馈降低了感知的任务难度、任务持续时间和疲劳。这些结果表明，为遥控施工机器人提供这种类型的振动触觉反馈将提高用户的性能和体验。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于音频的触觉反馈系统，通过实时传递机器人工具的振动信息，提升远程操作施工机器人的效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 远程机器人施工依赖视觉反馈，在接触刚性或能见度差的情况下效率受限，亟需可靠的触觉反馈弥补感知缺陷。
AI.method: 优化商用加速度计和音圈执行器的位置，构建振动反馈系统；通过30名参与者的双手法操作实验，对比无振动、单轴振动和三轴振动三种条件下的操作表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用触觉反馈后，操作者在第二次试验中振动与作用力显著降低，主观评价显示任务难度、耗时和疲劳感均下降。
AI.conclusion: 振动触觉反馈可有效提升远程操作施工机器人的用户性能与操作体验，为复杂施工场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Haptic Feedback of Tool Vibrations Facilitates Telerobotic Construction 工具振动的触觉反馈有利于远程机器人的构建 Telerobotics has shown promise in helping workers safely manipulate building components on construction sites; however, its primary reliance on visual feedback limits efficiency in situations with stiff contact or poor visibility. Reliable and economical haptic feedback could fill this perception gap and facilitate construction activities. Thus, we designed an audio-based haptic feedback system that measures the vibrations experienced by the robot tools and enables the operator to feel them in real time. Accurate haptic transmission was achieved by optimizing the positions of the system's off-the-shelf accelerometers and voice-coil actuators. A user study was conducted to evaluate how this naturalistic type of vibration feedback affects the operator's performance in telerobotic assembly. Thirty participants used a bimanual teleoperation system to build a structure under three randomly ordered haptic feedback conditions: no vibrations, one-axis vibrations, and three-axis vibrations. The results show that users took advantage of both kinds of haptic feedback after gaining some experience with the task, causing significantly lower vibrations and forces in the second trial. Subjective responses indicate that haptic feedback reduced the perceived task difficulty, task duration, and fatigue. These results demonstrate that providing this type of vibrotactile feedback on teleoperated construction robots would enhance user performance and experience. 远程机器人技术在帮助工人在建筑工地安全操作建筑构件方面表现出了良好的前景；然而，它对视觉反馈的主要依赖限制了在接触僵硬或能见度差的情况下的效率。可靠且经济的触觉反馈可以填补这种感知差距并促进施工活动。因此，我们设计了一种基于音频的触觉反馈系统，可以测量机器人工具所经历的振动，并使操作员能够实时感受到它们。通过优化系统现成的加速度计和音圈执行器的位置，实现了准确的触觉传输。进行了一项用户研究，以评估这种自然类型的振动反馈如何影响操作员在远程机器人装配中的表现。三十名参与者使用双手遥控系统在三种随机排序的触觉反馈条件下构建结构：无振动、单轴振动和三轴振动。结果表明，用户在获得一定的任务经验后，利用了这两种触觉反馈，在第二次试验中明显降低了振动和力。主观反应表明触觉反馈降低了感知的任务难度、任务持续时间和疲劳。这些结果表明，为遥控施工机器人提供这种类型的振动触觉反馈将提高用户的性能和体验。 本文设计了一种基于音频的触觉反馈系统，通过实时传递机器人工具的振动信息，提升远程操作施工机器人的效率与安全性。 Yijie Gong,Haliza Mat Husin,Ecda Erol,Valerio Ortenzi,Katherine J. authors_text: Prasad Jayanti,Siddhartha Jayanti,Ugur Y. Yavuz,Lizzie Hernandez
title: A Universal Technique for Machine-Certified Proofs of Linearizable Algorithms
title_zh: 线性化算法机器认证证明的通用技术
abstract: Linearizability has been the long standing gold standard for consistency in concurrent data structures. However, proofs of linearizability can be long and intricate, hard to produce, and extremely time consuming even to verify. In this work, we address this issue by introducing simple $universal$, $sound$, and $complete$ proof methods for producing machine-verifiable proofs of linearizability and its close cousin, strong linearizability. Universality means that our method works for any object type; soundness means that an algorithm can be proved correct by our method only if it is linearizable (resp. strong linearizable); and completeness means that any linearizable (resp. strong linearizable) implementation can be proved so using our method. We demonstrate the simplicity and power of our method by producing proofs of linearizability for the Herlihy-Wing queue and Jayanti's single-scanner snapshot, as well as a proof of strong linearizability of the Jayanti-Tarjan union-find object. All three of these proofs are machine-verified by TLAPS (the Temporal Logic of Actions Proof System).
summary: Linearizability has been the long standing gold standard for consistency in concurrent data structures. However, proofs of linearizability can be long and intricate, hard to produce, and extremely time consuming even to verify. In this work, we address this issue by introducing simple $universal$, $sound$, and $complete$ proof methods for producing machine-verifiable proofs of linearizability and its close cousin, strong linearizability. Universality means that our method works for any object type; soundness means that an algorithm can be proved correct by our method only if it is linearizable (resp. strong linearizable); and completeness means that any linearizable (resp. strong linearizable) implementation can be proved so using our method. We demonstrate the simplicity and power of our method by producing proofs of linearizability for the Herlihy-Wing queue and Jayanti's single-scanner snapshot, as well as a proof of strong linearizability of the Jayanti-Tarjan union-find object. All three of these proofs are machine-verified by TLAPS (the Temporal Logic of Actions Proof System).
abstract_zh: 线性化一直是并发数据结构一致性的长期黄金标准。然而，线性化的证明可能又长又复杂，难以生成，甚至验证也极其耗时。在这项工作中，我们通过引入简单的 $universal$、$sound$ 和 $complete$ 证明方法来解决这个问题，这些方法用于生成机器可验证的线性化证明及其近亲，强线性化证明。通用性意味着我们的方法适用于任何对象类型；稳健性意味着只有当算法可线性化（或强线性化）时，我们的方法才能证明该算法是正确的；完整性意味着任何可线性化（或强线性化）的实现都可以使用我们的方法来证明。我们通过为 Herlihy-Wing 队列和 Jayanti 的单扫描器快照提供线性化证明，以及 Jayanti-Tarjan 联合查找对象的强线性化证明，证明了我们方法的简单性和强大功能。所有这三个证明均由 TLAPS（动作时序逻辑证明系统）进行机器验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的机器验证方法，用于生成线性可序列化算法的正确性证明。
AI.motivation: 线性可序列化是并发数据结构的一致性标准，但其证明过程复杂且耗时，亟需自动化方法提升验证效率。
AI.method: 设计一种适用于所有对象类型的通用证明方法，结合形式化验证工具TLAPS实现自动验证，确保方法的完备性与正确性。
AI.result: 成功用该方法验证了Herlihy-Wing队列、Jayanti快照及Jayanti-Tarjan并查集的线性可序列化性质，并通过TLAPS系统完成机器验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为并发算法的自动化验证提供了统一框架，显著降低证明复杂度并提升可靠性。

authors_text: Theodor Westny,Joel Oskarsson,Björn Olofsson,Erik Frisk
title: MTP-GO: Graph-Based Probabilistic Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction with Neural ODEs
title_zh: MTP-GO：使用神经常微分方程进行基于图的概率多智能体轨迹预测
abstract: Enabling resilient autonomous motion planning requires robust predictions of surrounding road users' future behavior. In response to this need and the associated challenges, we introduce our model titled MTP-GO. The model encodes the scene using temporal graph neural networks to produce the inputs to an underlying motion model. The motion model is implemented using neural ordinary differential equations where the state-transition functions are learned with the rest of the model. Multimodal probabilistic predictions are obtained by combining the concept of mixture density networks and Kalman filtering. The results illustrate the predictive capabilities of the proposed model across various data sets, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods on a number of metrics.
summary: Enabling resilient autonomous motion planning requires robust predictions of surrounding road users' future behavior. In response to this need and the associated challenges, we introduce our model titled MTP-GO. The model encodes the scene using temporal graph neural networks to produce the inputs to an underlying motion model. The motion model is implemented using neural ordinary differential equations where the state-transition functions are learned with the rest of the model. Multimodal probabilistic predictions are obtained by combining the concept of mixture density networks and Kalman filtering. The results illustrate the predictive capabilities of the proposed model across various data sets, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods on a number of metrics.
abstract_zh: 实现弹性自主运动规划需要对周围道路使用者的未来行为进行可靠预测。为了满足这一需求和相关挑战，我们推出了名为 MTP-GO 的模型。该模型使用时间图神经网络对场景进行编码，以生成底层运动模型的输入。运动模型是使用神经常微分方程实现的，其中状态转移函数是与模型的其余部分一起学习的。通过结合混合密度网络和卡尔曼滤波的概念获得多模态概率预测。结果说明了所提出的模型在各种数据集上的预测能力，在许多指标上优于几种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图结构和神经ODE的多智能体轨迹预测模型MTP-GO，实现概率多模态预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要准确预测周围交通参与者行为，但现有方法在动态场景建模和不确定性量化方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用时间图神经网络编码场景信息，结合神经ODE建模运动过程，并融合混合密度网络与卡尔曼滤波生成多模态概率预测。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有先进方法，在预测准确性和多模态分布建模指标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: MTP-GO通过图结构与神经ODE的结合有效捕捉交通动态，为复杂场景下的轨迹预测提供了新思路。

result: 在多个数据集上优于现有先进方法，在预测准确性和多模态分布建模指标上表现突出。
conclusion: MTP-GO通过图结构与神经ODE的结合有效捕捉交通动态，为复杂场景下的轨迹预测提供了新思路。
search_text: MTP-GO: Graph-Based Probabilistic Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction with Neural ODEs MTP-GO：使用神经常微分方程进行基于图的概率多智能体轨迹预测 Enabling resilient autonomous motion planning requires robust predictions of surrounding road users' future behavior. In response to this need and the associated challenges, we introduce our model titled MTP-GO. The model encodes the scene using temporal graph neural networks to produce the inputs to an underlying motion model. The motion model is implemented using neural ordinary differential equations where the state-transition functions are learned with the rest of the model. Multimodal probabilistic predictions are obtained by combining the concept of mixture density networks and Kalman filtering. The results illustrate the predictive capabilities of the proposed model across various data sets, outperforming several state-of-the-art methods on a number of metrics. 实现弹性自主运动规划需要对周围道路使用者的未来行为进行可靠预测。为了满足这一需求和相关挑战，我们推出了名为 MTP-GO 的模型。该模型使用时间图神经网络对场景进行编码，以生成底层运动模型的输入。运动模型是使用神经常微分方程实现的，其中状态转移函数是与模型的其余部分一起学习的。通过结合混合密度网络和卡尔曼滤波的概念获得多模态概率预测。结果说明了所提出的模型在各种数据集上的预测能力，在许多指标上优于几种最先进的方法。 本文提出基于图结构和神经ODE的多智能体轨迹预测模型MTP-GO，实现概率多模态预测。 Theodor Westny,Joel Oskarsson,Björn Olofsson,Erik Frisk cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nicholas Matsumoto,Anil Kumar Saini,Pedro Ribeiro,Hyunjun Choi,Alena Orlenko,Leo-Pekka Lyytikäinen,Jari O Laurikka,Terho Lehtimäki,Sandra Batista,Jason H. Moore
title: Faster Convergence with Lexicase Selection in Tree-based Automated Machine Learning
title_zh: 基于树的自动化机器学习中 Lexicase 选择的更快收敛
abstract: In many evolutionary computation systems, parent selection methods can affect, among other things, convergence to a solution. In this paper, we present a study comparing the role of two commonly used parent selection methods in evolving machine learning pipelines in an automated machine learning system called Tree-based Pipeline Optimization Tool (TPOT). Specifically, we demonstrate, using experiments on multiple datasets, that lexicase selection leads to significantly faster convergence as compared to NSGA-II in TPOT. We also compare the exploration of parts of the search space by these selection methods using a trie data structure that contains information about the pipelines explored in a particular run.
summary: In many evolutionary computation systems, parent selection methods can affect, among other things, convergence to a solution. In this paper, we present a study comparing the role of two commonly used parent selection methods in evolving machine learning pipelines in an automated machine learning system called Tree-based Pipeline Optimization Tool (TPOT). Specifically, we demonstrate, using experiments on multiple datasets, that lexicase selection leads to significantly faster convergence as compared to NSGA-II in TPOT. We also compare the exploration of parts of the search space by these selection methods using a trie data structure that contains information about the pipelines explored in a particular run.
abstract_zh: 在许多进化计算系统中，父选择方法可以影响解决方案的收敛等。在本文中，我们提出了一项研究，比较了两种常用的父选择方法在称为基于树的管道优化工具（TPOT）的自动化机器学习系统中发展机器学习管道中的作用。具体来说，我们通过在多个数据集上进行实验证明，与 TPOT 中的 NSGA-II 相比，词典选择可以显着加快收敛速度​​。我们还使用包含有关在特定运行中探索的管道的信息的 trie 数据结构来比较这些选择方法对部分搜索空间的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在树基自动机器学习系统TPOT中，词典选择方法相较于NSGA-II能否加快收敛速度，并通过实验和搜索空间分析进行验证。
AI.motivation: 进化计算中的父选择方法影响收敛效率，但现有研究缺乏对Lexicase与NSGA-II在TPOT中具体效果的比较，需探索更优方法提升自动机器学习的效率。
AI.method: 通过多数据集实验对比Lexicase与NSGA-II在TPOT中的收敛速度，并利用trie数据结构分析两种方法对搜索空间的探索差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，Lexicase选择在TPOT中显著优于NSGA-II，收敛速度更快，且trie分析显示其探索路径更高效。
AI.conclusion: 词典选择方法在树基自动机器学习中能有效提升收敛速度，优于NSGA-II，值得在类似系统中推广使用。

authors_text: Sing-Yuan Yeh,Fu-Chieh Chang,Chang-Wei Yueh,Pei-Yuan Wu,Alberto Bernacchia,Sattar Vakili
title: Sample Complexity of Kernel-Based Q-Learning
title_zh: 基于内核的 Q-Learning 的样本复杂性
abstract: Modern reinforcement learning (RL) often faces an enormous state-action space. Existing analytical results are typically for settings with a small number of state-actions, or simple models such as linearly modeled Q-functions. To derive statistically efficient RL policies handling large state-action spaces, with more general Q-functions, some recent works have considered nonlinear function approximation using kernel ridge regression. In this work, we derive sample complexities for kernel based Q-learning when a generative model exists. We propose a nonparametric Q-learning algorithm which finds an $ε$-optimal policy in an arbitrarily large scale discounted MDP. The sample complexity of the proposed algorithm is order optimal with respect to $ε$ and the complexity of the kernel (in terms of its information gain). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first result showing a finite sample complexity under such a general model.
summary: Modern reinforcement learning (RL) often faces an enormous state-action space. Existing analytical results are typically for settings with a small number of state-actions, or simple models such as linearly modeled Q-functions. To derive statistically efficient RL policies handling large state-action spaces, with more general Q-functions, some recent works have considered nonlinear function approximation using kernel ridge regression. In this work, we derive sample complexities for kernel based Q-learning when a generative model exists. We propose a nonparametric Q-learning algorithm which finds an $ε$-optimal policy in an arbitrarily large scale discounted MDP. The sample complexity of the proposed algorithm is order optimal with respect to $ε$ and the complexity of the kernel (in terms of its information gain). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first result showing a finite sample complexity under such a general model.
abstract_zh: 现代强化学习（RL）常常面临巨大的状态-动作空间。现有的分析结果通常适用于具有少量状态动作的设置，或简单模型（例如线性建模的 Q 函数）。为了利用更通用的 Q 函数导出统计上有效的 RL 策略来处理大型状态动作空间，最近的一些工作考虑了使用核岭回归的非线性函数逼近。在这项工作中，当生成模型存在时，我们推导了基于内核的 Q 学习的样本复杂性。我们提出了一种非参数 Q 学习算法，该算法在任意大规模贴现 MDP 中找到 $ε$ 最优策略。所提出算法的样本复杂度相对于 $ε$ 和内核的复杂度（就其信息增益而言）是最优的。据我们所知，这是在这种通用模型下显示有限样本复杂性的第一个结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在生成模型的情况下，基于核方法的Q学习算法的样本复杂度，提出了一种非参数Q学习算法以处理大规模折扣MDP问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习理论结果多针对小规模状态-动作空间或线性Q函数模型，难以处理大规模状态-动作空间和更一般的非线性Q函数情况。
AI.method: 提出基于核岭回归的非参数Q学习算法，通过分析核函数的信息增益，推导出与ε和核复杂度相关的样本复杂度上界。
AI.result: 所提算法在任意规模的折扣MDP中可找到ε-最优策略，其样本复杂度在ε和核复杂度方面达到最优阶数，是首个在此类通用模型下的有限样本复杂度结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文为基于核方法的Q学习提供了理论保证，推动了大规模强化学习问题的统计效率分析，为非线性函数逼近的RL算法设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Paweł Gawrychowski,Samah Ghazawi,Gad M. Landau
title: Order-Preserving Squares in Strings
title_zh: 字符串中的保序正方形
abstract: An order-preserving square in a string is a fragment of the form $uv$ where $u\neq v$ and $u$ is order-isomorphic to $v$. We show that a string $w$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$ contains $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words. This improves the upper bound of $\mathcal{O}(σ^{2}n)$ by Kociumaka, Radoszewski, Rytter, and Waleń [TCS 2016]. Further, for every $σ$ and $n$ we exhibit a string with $Ω(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words, thus establishing that our upper bound is asymptotically tight. Finally, we design an $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ time algorithm that outputs all order-preserving squares that occur in a given string and are distinct as words. By our lower bound, this is optimal in the worst case.
summary: An order-preserving square in a string is a fragment of the form $uv$ where $u\neq v$ and $u$ is order-isomorphic to $v$. We show that a string $w$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$ contains $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words. This improves the upper bound of $\mathcal{O}(σ^{2}n)$ by Kociumaka, Radoszewski, Rytter, and Waleń [TCS 2016]. Further, for every $σ$ and $n$ we exhibit a string with $Ω(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words, thus establishing that our upper bound is asymptotically tight. Finally, we design an $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ time algorithm that outputs all order-preserving squares that occur in a given string and are distinct as words. By our lower bound, this is optimal in the worst case.
abstract_zh: 字符串中的保序方块是 $uv$ 形式的片段，其中 $u\neq v$ 和 $u$ 与 $v$ 顺序同构。我们证明，长度为 $n$ 的字符串 $w$ 在大小为 $σ$ 的字母表上包含与单词不同的 $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ 保序方块。 Kociumaka、Radoszewski、Rytter 和 Waleń [TCS 2016] 改进了 $\mathcal{O}(σ^{2}n)$ 的上限。此外，对于每个 $σ$ 和 $n$，我们都会展示一个带有 $Ω(σn)$ 保序平方的字符串，这些平方与单词不同，从而确定我们的上限是渐近紧的。最后，我们设计了一个 $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ 时间算法，该算法输出给定字符串中出现的所有保序方块，并且与单词不同。根据我们的下限，这在最坏的情况下是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究字符串中满足顺序同构的order-preserving square的数量及高效枚举算法。
AI.motivation: 改进前人关于order-preserving squares数量的上界结果，并设计最优时间复杂度的算法。
AI.method: 通过组合分析证明上界并构造下界实例，结合字符串结构设计线性时间算法。
AI.result: 证明字符串中order-preserving squares数量为O(σn)，设计O(σn)时间算法，下界证明其最优性。
AI.conclusion: 确定了order-preserving squares数量的渐进紧界，并给出了最优枚举算法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究字符串中满足顺序同构的order-preserving square的数量及高效枚举算法。
ai_content.motivation: 改进前人关于order-preserving squares数量的上界结果，并设计最优时间复杂度的算法。
ai_content.method: 通过组合分析证明上界并构造下界实例，结合字符串结构设计线性时间算法。
ai_content.result: 证明字符串中order-preserving squares数量为O(σn)，设计O(σn)时间算法，下界证明其最优性。

search_text: Order-Preserving Squares in Strings 字符串中的保序正方形 An order-preserving square in a string is a fragment of the form $uv$ where $u\neq v$ and $u$ is order-isomorphic to $v$. We show that a string $w$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$ contains $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words. This improves the upper bound of $\mathcal{O}(σ^{2}n)$ by Kociumaka, Radoszewski, Rytter, and Waleń [TCS 2016]. Further, for every $σ$ and $n$ we exhibit a string with $Ω(σn)$ order-preserving squares that are distinct as words, thus establishing that our upper bound is asymptotically tight. Finally, we design an $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ time algorithm that outputs all order-preserving squares that occur in a given string and are distinct as words. By our lower bound, this is optimal in the worst case. 字符串中的保序方块是 $uv$ 形式的片段，其中 $u\neq v$ 和 $u$ 与 $v$ 顺序同构。我们证明，长度为 $n$ 的字符串 $w$ 在大小为 $σ$ 的字母表上包含与单词不同的 $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ 保序方块。 Kociumaka、Radoszewski、Rytter 和 Waleń [TCS 2016] 改进了 $\mathcal{O}(σ^{2}n)$ 的上限。此外，对于每个 $σ$ 和 $n$，我们都会展示一个带有 $Ω(σn)$ 保序平方的字符串，这些平方与单词不同，从而确定我们的上限是渐近紧的。最后，我们设计了一个 $\mathcal{O}(σn)$ 时间算法，该算法输出给定字符串中出现的所有保序方块，并且与单词不同。根据我们的下限，这在最坏的情况下是最佳的。 本文研究字符串中满足顺序同构的order-preserving square的数量及高效枚举算法。 Paweł Gawrychowski,Samah Ghazawi,Gad M. Landau cs.DS,cs.FL

authors_text: Johannes Schneider,Michalis Vlachos
title: A Survey of Deep Learning: From Activations to Transformers
title_zh: 深度学习综述：从激活到变形金刚
comment: International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence (ICAART), 2024
comments: International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence (ICAART), 2024
abstract: Deep learning has made tremendous progress in the last decade. A key success factor is the large amount of architectures, layers, objectives, and optimization techniques. They include a myriad of variants related to attention, normalization, skip connections, transformers and self-supervised learning schemes -- to name a few. We provide a comprehensive overview of the most important, recent works in these areas to those who already have a basic understanding of deep learning. We hope that a holistic and unified treatment of influential, recent works helps researchers to form new connections between diverse areas of deep learning. We identify and discuss multiple patterns that summarize the key strategies for many of the successful innovations over the last decade as well as works that can be seen as rising stars. We also include a discussion on recent commercially built, closed-source models such as OpenAI's GPT-4 and Google's PaLM 2.
summary: Deep learning has made tremendous progress in the last decade. A key success factor is the large amount of architectures, layers, objectives, and optimization techniques. They include a myriad of variants related to attention, normalization, skip connections, transformers and self-supervised learning schemes -- to name a few. We provide a comprehensive overview of the most important, recent works in these areas to those who already have a basic understanding of deep learning. We hope that a holistic and unified treatment of influential, recent works helps researchers to form new connections between diverse areas of deep learning. We identify and discuss multiple patterns that summarize the key strategies for many of the successful innovations over the last decade as well as works that can be seen as rising stars. We also include a discussion on recent commercially built, closed-source models such as OpenAI's GPT-4 and Google's PaLM 2.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在过去十年中取得了巨大进步。一个关键的成功因素是大量的架构、层、目标和优化技术。它们包括与注意力、标准化、跳跃连接、变压器和自我监督学习方案相关的无数变体——仅举几例。我们为那些已经对深度学习有基本了解的人提供了这些领域最重要的最新工作的全面概述。我们希望对有影响力的近期作品进行全面、统一的处理有助于研究人员在深度学习的不同领域之间建立新的联系。我们识别并讨论了多种模式，总结了过去十年许多成功创新的关键策略以及可被视为后起之秀的作品。我们还讨论了最近商业构建的闭源模型，例如 OpenAI 的 GPT-4 和 Google 的 PaLM 2。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习领域从激活函数到Transformer的最新进展，总结了关键策略并讨论了商业模型。
AI.motivation: 深度学习发展迅速但缺乏系统性总结，需通过归纳关键技术和创新点帮助研究者建立跨领域联系。
AI.method: 通过系统综述近年文献，分类分析注意力机制、归一化、Transformer等技术，并讨论闭源模型案例。
AI.result: 识别出多种成功创新模式，总结了自监督学习等趋势，并分析了GPT-4等商业模型的技术特征。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域技术融合是深度学习发展的核心，未来需关注自监督学习与Transformer架构的进一步突破。

authors_text: Lorenzo Pichierri,Andrea Testa,Giuseppe Notarstefano
title: CrazyChoir: Flying Swarms of Crazyflie Quadrotors in ROS 2
title_zh: CrazyChoir：ROS 2 中的 Crazyflie 四旋翼飞行群
abstract: This paper introduces CrazyChoir, a modular Python framework based on the Robot Operating System (ROS) 2. The toolbox provides a comprehensive set of functionalities to simulate and run experiments on teams of cooperating Crazyflie nano-quadrotors. Specifically, it allows users to perform realistic simulations over robotic simulators as, e.g., Webots and includes bindings of the firmware control and planning functions. The toolbox also provides libraries to perform radio communication with Crazyflie directly inside ROS 2 scripts. The package can be thus used to design, implement and test planning strategies and control schemes for a Crazyflie nano-quadrotor. Moreover, the modular structure of CrazyChoir allows users to easily implement online distributed optimization and control schemes over multiple quadrotors. The CrazyChoir package is validated via simulations and experiments on a swarm of Crazyflies for formation control, pickup-and-delivery vehicle routing and trajectory tracking tasks. CrazyChoir is available at https://github.com/OPT4SMART/crazychoir.
summary: This paper introduces CrazyChoir, a modular Python framework based on the Robot Operating System (ROS) 2. The toolbox provides a comprehensive set of functionalities to simulate and run experiments on teams of cooperating Crazyflie nano-quadrotors. Specifically, it allows users to perform realistic simulations over robotic simulators as, e.g., Webots and includes bindings of the firmware control and planning functions. The toolbox also provides libraries to perform radio communication with Crazyflie directly inside ROS 2 scripts. The package can be thus used to design, implement and test planning strategies and control schemes for a Crazyflie nano-quadrotor. Moreover, the modular structure of CrazyChoir allows users to easily implement online distributed optimization and control schemes over multiple quadrotors. The CrazyChoir package is validated via simulations and experiments on a swarm of Crazyflies for formation control, pickup-and-delivery vehicle routing and trajectory tracking tasks. CrazyChoir is available at https://github.com/OPT4SMART/crazychoir.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 CrazyChoir，一个基于机器人操作系统 (ROS) 2 的模块化 Python 框架。该工具箱提供了一套全面的功能，可以在协作的 Crazyflie 纳米四旋翼飞行器团队上进行模拟和运行实验。具体来说，它允许用户通过机器人模拟器（例如 Webots）执行真实模拟，并包括固件控制和规划功能的绑定。该工具箱还提供了直接在 ROS 2 脚本内与 Crazyflie 进行无线电通信的库。因此，该软件包可用于设计、实施和测试 Crazyflie 纳米四旋翼飞行器的规划策略和控制方案。此外，CrazyChoir的模块化结构允许用户轻松实现多个四旋翼飞行器的在线分布式优化和控制方案。 CrazyChoir 软件包通过对一群 Crazyflies 的模拟和实验进行了验证，用于编队控制、取货和送货车辆路线以及轨迹跟踪任务。 CrazyChoir 可在 https://github.com/OPT4SMART/crazychoir 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于ROS 2的模块化Python框架CrazyChoir，用于模拟和运行协作的Crazyflie微型四旋翼无人机团队实验。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多无人机系统研究中仿真、控制与测试的复杂性，提供一个集成化工具支持分布式优化与控制方案的快速实现。
AI.method: 开发了包含仿真接口（如Webots）、固件控制绑定、无线电通信库的ROS 2模块化框架，并支持多四旋翼无人机的在线分布式控制策略实现。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实体机群实验验证了框架有效性，成功应用于编队控制、取送货路径规划及轨迹跟踪等任务。
AI.conclusion: CrazyChoir为多无人机系统研究提供了全面工具链，降低了算法开发与验证门槛，推动了群体智能控制技术的发展。

authors_text: Melanie Bancilhon,AJ Wright,Sunwoo Ha,Jordan Crouser,Alvitta Ottley
title: Why Combining Text and Visualization Could Improve Bayesian Reasoning: A Cognitive Load Perspective
title_zh: 为什么结合文本和可视化可以改进贝叶斯推理：认知负荷视角
abstract: Investigations into using visualization to improve Bayesian reasoning and advance risk communication have produced mixed results, suggesting that cognitive ability might affect how users perform with different presentation formats. Our work examines the cognitive load elicited when solving Bayesian problems using icon arrays, text, and a juxtaposition of text and icon arrays. We used a three-pronged approach to capture a nuanced picture of cognitive demand and measure differences in working memory capacity, performance under divided attention using a dual-task paradigm, and subjective ratings of self-reported effort. We found that individuals with low working memory capacity made fewer errors and experienced less subjective workload when the problem contained an icon array compared to text alone, showing that visualization improves accuracy while exerting less cognitive demand. We believe these findings can considerably impact accessible risk communication, especially for individuals with low working memory capacity.

We found that individuals with low working memory capacity made fewer errors and experienced less subjective workload when the problem contained an icon array compared to text alone, showing that visualization improves accuracy while exerting less cognitive demand. We believe these findings can considerably impact accessible risk communication, especially for individuals with low working memory capacity.
abstract_zh: 使用可视化来改进贝叶斯推理和推进风险沟通的研究产生了好坏参半的结果，这表明认知能力可能会影响用户使用不同演示格式的表现。我们的工作检查了使用图标数组、文本以及文本和图标数组并置解决贝叶斯问题时引起的认知负荷。我们采用三管齐下的方法来捕捉认知需求的细微差别，并测量工作记忆容量的差异、使用双任务范式的分散注意力下的表现以及自我报告努力的主观评分。我们发现，与单独的文本相比，当问题包含图标数组时，工作记忆容量较低的人犯的错误更少，主观工作量也更少，这表明可视化提高了准确性，同时减少了认知需求。我们相信这些发现可以极大地影响可访问的风险沟通，特别是对于工作记忆能力较低的个人而言。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨结合文本和可视化如何通过降低认知负荷来提升贝叶斯推理能力。
AI.motivation: 先前研究显示可视化对贝叶斯推理的效果存在争议，认知能力可能影响不同呈现格式的使用效果，需进一步探究认知负荷差异。
AI.method: 采用三重方法：测量工作记忆容量、双任务范式下的分心表现及主观努力度评分，对比图标阵列、文本及二者结合的呈现方式。
AI.result: 低工作记忆容量者在图标阵列条件下错误率更低且主观认知负荷更小，表明可视化能提升准确性并降低认知需求。
AI.conclusion: 该发现对低工作记忆人群的风险沟通具有重要意义，建议采用图文结合方式优化信息传达效率。

search_text: Why Combining Text and Visualization Could Improve Bayesian Reasoning: A Cognitive Load Perspective 为什么结合文本和可视化可以改进贝叶斯推理：认知负荷视角 Investigations into using visualization to improve Bayesian reasoning and advance risk communication have produced mixed results, suggesting that cognitive ability might affect how users perform with different presentation formats. Our work examines the cognitive load elicited when solving Bayesian problems using icon arrays, text, and a juxtaposition of text and icon arrays. We used a three-pronged approach to capture a nuanced picture of cognitive demand and measure differences in working memory capacity, performance under divided attention using a dual-task paradigm, and subjective ratings of self-reported effort. We found that individuals with low working memory capacity made fewer errors and experienced less subjective workload when the problem contained an icon array compared to text alone, showing that visualization improves accuracy while exerting less cognitive demand. We believe these findings can considerably impact accessible risk communication, especially for individuals with low working memory capacity. 使用可视化来改进贝叶斯推理和推进风险沟通的研究产生了好坏参半的结果，这表明认知能力可能会影响用户使用不同演示格式的表现。我们的工作检查了使用图标数组、文本以及文本和图标数组并置解决贝叶斯问题时引起的认知负荷。我们采用三管齐下的方法来捕捉认知需求的细微差别，并测量工作记忆容量的差异、使用双任务范式的分散注意力下的表现以及自我报告努力的主观评分。我们发现，与单独的文本相比，当问题包含图标数组时，工作记忆容量较低的人犯的错误更少，主观工作量也更少，这表明可视化提高了准确性，同时减少了认知需求。我们相信这些发现可以极大地影响可访问的风险沟通，特别是对于工作记忆能力较低的个人而言。 本文探讨结合文本和可视化如何通过降低认知负荷来提升贝叶斯推理能力。 Melanie Bancilhon,AJ Wright,Sunwoo Ha,Jordan Crouser,Alvitta Ottley cs.HC

authors_text: Aurore Loisy,Robin A. Heinonen
title: Deep reinforcement learning for the olfactory search POMDP: a quantitative benchmark
title_zh: 嗅觉搜索 POMDP 的深度强化学习：定量基准
abstract: The olfactory search POMDP (partially observable Markov decision process) is a sequential decision-making problem designed to mimic the task faced by insects searching for a source of odor in turbulence, and its solutions have applications to sniffer robots. As exact solutions are out of reach, the challenge consists in finding the best possible approximate solutions while keeping the computational cost reasonable. We provide a quantitative benchmarking of a solver based on deep reinforcement learning against traditional POMDP approximate solvers. We show that deep reinforcement learning is a competitive alternative to standard methods, in particular to generate lightweight policies suitable for robots.
summary: The olfactory search POMDP (partially observable Markov decision process) is a sequential decision-making problem designed to mimic the task faced by insects searching for a source of odor in turbulence, and its solutions have applications to sniffer robots. As exact solutions are out of reach, the challenge consists in finding the best possible approximate solutions while keeping the computational cost reasonable. We provide a quantitative benchmarking of a solver based on deep reinforcement learning against traditional POMDP approximate solvers. We show that deep reinforcement learning is a competitive alternative to standard methods, in particular to generate lightweight policies suitable for robots.
abstract_zh: 嗅觉搜索 POMDP（部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程）是一个顺序决策问题，旨在模拟昆虫在湍流中寻找气味源所面临的任务，其解决方案可应用于嗅探机器人。由于无法获得精确的解决方案，因此面临的挑战在于找到最佳的近似解决方案，同时保持计算成本合理。我们针对传统 POMDP 近似求解器提供了基于深度强化学习的求解器的定量基准测试。我们证明深度强化学习是标准方法的一种有竞争力的替代方案，特别是在生成适合机器人的轻量级策略方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的嗅觉搜索POMDP求解方法，并与传统方法进行定量基准测试。
AI.motivation: 嗅觉搜索POMDP问题难以获得精确解，需寻找计算成本合理的近似解，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习算法构建求解器，通过定量基准测试对比传统POMDP近似求解方法。
AI.result: 深度强化学习在生成轻量级策略方面表现优异，成为传统方法的有效替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习可有效解决嗅觉搜索POMDP问题，适合应用于机器人轻量化策略生成。

authors_text: Kazuki Yoshiyama,Takuya Narihira
title: NDJIR: Neural Direct and Joint Inverse Rendering for Geometry, Lights, and Materials of Real Object
title_zh: NDJIR：真实对象的几何、灯光和材质的神经直接和联合逆向渲染
abstract: The goal of inverse rendering is to decompose geometry, lights, and materials given pose multi-view images. To achieve this goal, we propose neural direct and joint inverse rendering, NDJIR. Different from prior works which relies on some approximations of the rendering equation, NDJIR directly addresses the integrals in the rendering equation and jointly decomposes geometry: signed distance function, lights: environment and implicit lights, materials: base color, roughness, specular reflectance using the powerful and flexible volume rendering framework, voxel grid feature, and Bayesian prior. Our method directly uses the physically-based rendering, so we can seamlessly export an extracted mesh with materials to DCC tools and show material conversion examples. We perform intensive experiments to show that our proposed method can decompose semantically well for real object in photogrammetric setting and what factors contribute towards accurate inverse rendering.
summary: The goal of inverse rendering is to decompose geometry, lights, and materials given pose multi-view images. To achieve this goal, we propose neural direct and joint inverse rendering, NDJIR. Different from prior works which relies on some approximations of the rendering equation, NDJIR directly addresses the integrals in the rendering equation and jointly decomposes geometry: signed distance function, lights: environment and implicit lights, materials: base color, roughness, specular reflectance using the powerful and flexible volume rendering framework, voxel grid feature, and Bayesian prior. Our method directly uses the physically-based rendering, so we can seamlessly export an extracted mesh with materials to DCC tools and show material conversion examples. We perform intensive experiments to show that our proposed method can decompose semantically well for real object in photogrammetric setting and what factors contribute towards accurate inverse rendering.
abstract_zh: 逆渲染的目标是分解给定多视图图像的几何体、灯光和材质。为了实现这一目标，我们提出神经直接和联合逆渲染，NDJIR。与依赖于渲染方程的一些近似的先前作品不同，NDJIR直接处理渲染方程中的积分，并使用强大而灵活的体渲染框架、体素网格特征和贝叶斯先验联合分解几何：有符号距离函数、灯光：环境和隐式灯光、材质：基色、粗糙度、镜面反射率。我们的方法直接使用基于物理的渲染，因此我们可以将提取的带有材质的网格无缝导出到 DCC 工具并显示材质转换示例。我们进行了大量的实验，以表明我们提出的方法可以在摄影测量设置中很好地对真实对象进行语义分解，以及哪些因素有助于精确的逆渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NDJIR方法，从多视角图像中直接联合分解真实物体的几何、光照和材料属性。
AI.motivation: 传统逆向渲染方法依赖渲染方程的近似，难以准确分解真实场景的几何、光照和材料，需更精确的直接求解方法。
AI.method: 基于体积渲染框架，结合体素网格特征与贝叶斯先验，直接求解渲染方程积分，联合估计几何（符号距离函数）、光照（环境光与隐式光源）及材料属性（基础颜色、粗糙度、镜面反射率）。
AI.result: 实验表明NDJIR在真实物体摄影测量场景中实现语义清晰的分解，且明确影响逆向渲染精度的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: NDJIR通过直接物理渲染实现高精度分解，支持材质转换，并经实验验证其在真实场景中的有效性，推动逆向渲染技术发展。
